## File: `components (2)/AdminPanel.tsx`
- Bytes: 104,258
- SHA256: `e2a5479915101b319c8e91d026672150f0a94faf309da07ebbadb6f1cf5f89b1`

```tsx
/**
 * AdminPanel Component
 * 
 * Comprehensive admin dashboard for managing:
 * - Users: CRUD operations, API key assignment, AI model selection, custom prompts
 * - Groups: User groups with shared AI models and prompts
 * - API Keys: Dynamic provider list - add custom providers (e.g., cohere, mistral) 
 *   and they'll appear in dropdown for all future use
 * - Policies: View all policies, filter, bulk download/analysis
 * - Analytics: System metrics and usage statistics
 * - Settings: System-wide configuration
 */

import { useState } from 'react';
import {
  Shield, Users, Key, Settings, FileText, Download, BarChart3,
  Search, Filter, Plus, Edit, Trash2, Save, X, ChevronDown,
  Upload, CheckCircle, AlertCircle, Clock, Eye, Copy, RefreshCw,
  UserPlus, UserMinus, Mail, Phone, Calendar, Tag, Zap, Brain,
  Database, Lock, Unlock, MoreVertical, Check, Loader, ArrowUpDown,
  ChevronRight, Folders, Globe, Code, MessageSquare
} from 'lucide-react';
import { toast } from 'sonner@2.0.3';

interface User {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  email: string;
  phone?: string;
  role: 'admin' | 'user' | 'viewer';
  status: 'active' | 'inactive' | 'suspended';
  groupId?: string;
  apiKeyId?: string;
  customPrompt?: string;
  aiModel?: string;
  aiProvider?: string;
  createdAt: string;
  lastLogin?: string;
  policyCount: number;
  tokenLimitHour?: number;
  tokenLimitDay?: number;
  tokenLimitWeek?: number;
  tokenLimitMonth?: number;
  tokenLimitYear?: number;
  tokenLimitLifelong?: number;
}

interface UserGroup {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  description: string;
  userCount: number;
  apiKeyId?: string;
  aiModel?: string;
  aiProvider?: string;
  customPrompt?: string;
  createdAt: string;
}

interface ApiKey {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  key: string;
  provider: string; // Allow any provider name - can be 'openai', 'anthropic', 'gemini', or custom values
  status: 'active' | 'inactive';
  usageLimit?: number;
  usageCount: number;
  assignedTo: number;
  createdAt: string;
  expiresAt?: string;
}

interface Policy {
  id: string;
  userId: string;
  userName: string;
  userEmail: string;
  policyNumber: string;
  provider: string;
  type: string;
  uploadDate: string;
  status: 'processed' | 'processing' | 'failed';
  fileSize: number;
  fileName: string;
}

type TabType = 'users' | 'groups' | 'apiKeys' | 'policies' | 'analytics' | 'settings';

interface AdminPanelProps {
  onBack?: () => void;
}

export function AdminPanel({ onBack }: AdminPanelProps) {
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<TabType>('users');
  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('');
  const [showUserModal, setShowUserModal] = useState(false);
  const [showGroupModal, setShowGroupModal] = useState(false);
  const [showApiKeyModal, setShowApiKeyModal] = useState(false);
  const [editingUser, setEditingUser] = useState<User | null>(null);
  
  // Dynamic provider list - starts with defaults and grows as custom providers are added
  const [availableProviders, setAvailableProviders] = useState<string[]>([
    'openai',
    'anthropic',
    'gemini',
    'cohere' // Example of a custom provider already added
  ]);
  const [editingGroup, setEditingGroup] = useState<UserGroup | null>(null);
  const [editingApiKey, setEditingApiKey] = useState<ApiKey | null>(null);
  const [selectedUsers, setSelectedUsers] = useState<string[]>([]);
  const [selectedPolicies, setSelectedPolicies] = useState<string[]>([]);
  
  // Advanced filtering and column management for Users
  const [userFilters, setUserFilters] = useState({
    role: '',
    status: '',
    groupId: '',
    apiKeyId: '',
    aiProvider: '',
    aiModel: ''
  });
  const [visibleColumns, setVisibleColumns] = useState({
    user: true,
    role: true,
    status: true,
    group: true,
    aiModel: true,
    apiKey: true,
    tokenLimitHour: false,
    tokenLimitDay: false,
    tokenLimitWeek: false,
    tokenLimitMonth: false,
    tokenLimitYear: false,
    tokenLimitLifelong: false,
    policies: true,
    actions: true
  });
  const [showColumnSelector, setShowColumnSelector] = useState(false);
  const [showFilterPanel, setShowFilterPanel] = useState(false);

  // Mock data
  const [users, setUsers] = useState<User[]>([
    {
      id: '1',
      name: 'John Doe',
      email: 'john@example.com',
      phone: '+1 555-0123',
      role: 'user',
      status: 'active',
      groupId: 'grp-1',
      apiKeyId: 'key-1',
      aiModel: 'gpt-4',
      aiProvider: 'openai',
      createdAt: '2024-01-15',
      lastLogin: '2024-12-02',
      policyCount: 3,
      tokenLimitHour: 1000,
      tokenLimitDay: 10000,
      tokenLimitWeek: 50000,
      tokenLimitMonth: 150000,
      tokenLimitYear: 1500000,
      tokenLimitLifelong: 10000000
    },
    {
      id: '2',
      name: 'Jane Smith',
      email: 'jane@example.com',
      phone: '+1 555-0124',
      role: 'user',
      status: 'active',
      groupId: 'grp-1',
      apiKeyId: 'key-1',
      customPrompt: 'Always provide detailed explanations for medical terms.',
      aiModel: 'claude-3-opus',
      aiProvider: 'anthropic',
      createdAt: '2024-02-20',
      lastLogin: '2024-12-01',
      policyCount: 5,
      tokenLimitHour: 2000,
      tokenLimitDay: 20000,
      tokenLimitWeek: 100000,
      tokenLimitMonth: 300000,
      tokenLimitYear: 3000000,
      tokenLimitLifelong: 20000000
    },
    {
      id: '3',
      name: 'Bob Johnson',
      email: 'bob@example.com',
      role: 'viewer',
      status: 'inactive',
      apiKeyId: 'key-2',
      aiModel: 'gemini-pro',
      aiProvider: 'gemini',
      createdAt: '2024-03-10',
      policyCount: 1,
      tokenLimitHour: 500,
      tokenLimitDay: 5000,
      tokenLimitWeek: 25000,
      tokenLimitMonth: 75000,
      tokenLimitYear: 750000,
      tokenLimitLifelong: 5000000
    }
  ]);

  const [groups, setGroups] = useState<UserGroup[]>([
    {
      id: 'grp-1',
      name: 'Premium Users',
      description: 'Users with premium access and advanced AI features',
      userCount: 25,
      apiKeyId: 'key-1',
      aiModel: 'gpt-4',
      aiProvider: 'openai',
      customPrompt: 'Provide comprehensive insurance analysis with cost-benefit breakdowns.',
      createdAt: '2024-01-01'
    },
    {
      id: 'grp-2',
      name: 'Basic Users',
      description: 'Standard access users',
      userCount: 150,
      apiKeyId: 'key-2',
      aiModel: 'gpt-3.5-turbo',
      aiProvider: 'openai',
      createdAt: '2024-01-01'
    }
  ]);

  const [apiKeys, setApiKeys] = useState<ApiKey[]>([
    {
      id: 'key-1',
      name: 'Production OpenAI',
      key: 'sk-proj-...abc123',
      provider: 'openai',
      status: 'active',
      usageLimit: 100000,
      usageCount: 45230,
      assignedTo: 25,
      createdAt: '2024-01-01',
      expiresAt: '2025-01-01'
    },
    {
      id: 'key-2',
      name: 'Backup OpenAI',
      key: 'sk-proj-...def456',
      provider: 'openai',
      status: 'active',
      usageLimit: 50000,
      usageCount: 12450,
      assignedTo: 150,
      createdAt: '2024-01-01'
    },
    {
      id: 'key-3',
      name: 'Anthropic Claude',
      key: 'sk-ant-...ghi789',
      provider: 'anthropic',
      status: 'active',
      usageCount: 5230,
      assignedTo: 5,
      createdAt: '2024-02-01'
    },
    {
      id: 'key-4',
      name: 'Cohere Command',
      key: 'co-...xyz999',
      provider: 'cohere',
      status: 'active',
      usageCount: 1250,
      assignedTo: 3,
      createdAt: '2024-11-15'
    }
  ]);

  const [policies, setPolicies] = useState<Policy[]>([
    {
      id: 'pol-1',
      userId: '1',
      userName: 'John Doe',
      userEmail: 'john@example.com',
      policyNumber: 'POL-2024-001',
      provider: 'State Farm',
      type: 'Auto Insurance',
      uploadDate: '2024-11-15',
      status: 'processed',
      fileSize: 2456789,
      fileName: 'auto_policy.pdf'
    },
    {
      id: 'pol-2',
      userId: '1',
      userName: 'John Doe',
      userEmail: 'john@example.com',
      policyNumber: 'POL-2024-002',
      provider: 'Blue Cross',
      type: 'Health Insurance',
      uploadDate: '2024-11-20',
      status: 'processed',
      fileSize: 3567890,
      fileName: 'health_policy.pdf'
    },
    {
      id: 'pol-3',
      userId: '2',
      userName: 'Jane Smith',
      userEmail: 'jane@example.com',
      policyNumber: 'POL-2024-003',
      provider: 'Allstate',
      type: 'Home Insurance',
      uploadDate: '2024-12-01',
      status: 'processing',
      fileSize: 4123456,
      fileName: 'home_policy.pdf'
    }
  ]);

  // Filter data with advanced filters
  const filteredUsers = users.filter(user => {
    // Text search filter
    const matchesSearch = searchQuery === '' || 
      user.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()) ||
      user.email.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()) ||
      (user.phone && user.phone.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()));
    
    // Column-specific filters
    const matchesRole = userFilters.role === '' || user.role === userFilters.role;
    const matchesStatus = userFilters.status === '' || user.status === userFilters.status;
    const matchesGroup = userFilters.groupId === '' || user.groupId === userFilters.groupId;
    const matchesApiKey = userFilters.apiKeyId === '' || user.apiKeyId === userFilters.apiKeyId;
    const matchesProvider = userFilters.aiProvider === '' || user.aiProvider === userFilters.aiProvider;
    const matchesModel = userFilters.aiModel === '' || user.aiModel === userFilters.aiModel;
    
    return matchesSearch && matchesRole && matchesStatus && matchesGroup && 
           matchesApiKey && matchesProvider && matchesModel;
  });

  const filteredGroups = groups.filter(group =>
    group.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()) ||
    group.description.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase())
  );

  const filteredApiKeys = apiKeys.filter(key =>
    key.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()) ||
    key.provider.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase())
  );

  const filteredPolicies = policies.filter(policy =>
    policy.userName.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()) ||
    policy.userEmail.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()) ||
    policy.policyNumber.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()) ||
    policy.provider.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase())
  );

  // Handlers
  const handleSaveUser = (user: User) => {
    if (editingUser) {
      setUsers(users.map(u => u.id === user.id ? user : u));
      toast.success('User updated successfully');
    } else {
      setUsers([...users, { ...user, id: `user-${Date.now()}`, createdAt: new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0], policyCount: 0 }]);
      toast.success('User created successfully');
    }
    setShowUserModal(false);
    setEditingUser(null);
  };

  const handleDeleteUser = (userId: string) => {
    if (window.confirm('Are you sure you want to delete this user?')) {
      setUsers(users.filter(u => u.id !== userId));
      toast.success('User deleted successfully');
    }
  };

  const handleBulkDeleteUsers = () => {
    if (window.confirm(`Are you sure you want to delete ${selectedUsers.length} users?`)) {
      setUsers(users.filter(u => !selectedUsers.includes(u.id)));
      toast.success(`${selectedUsers.length} users deleted successfully`);
      setSelectedUsers([]);
    }
  };

  const handleBulkUpdateUsers = (field: keyof User, value: any) => {
    setUsers(users.map(u => 
      selectedUsers.includes(u.id) ? { ...u, [field]: value } : u
    ));
    toast.success(`${selectedUsers.length} users updated successfully`);
    setSelectedUsers([]);
  };

  const handleInlineEdit = (userId: string, field: keyof User, value: any) => {
    setUsers(users.map(u => 
      u.id === userId ? { ...u, [field]: value } : u
    ));
    toast.success('User updated');
  };

  const handleToggleAllUsers = () => {
    if (selectedUsers.length === filteredUsers.length) {
      setSelectedUsers([]);
    } else {
      setSelectedUsers(filteredUsers.map(u => u.id));
    }
  };

  const handleClearFilters = () => {
    setUserFilters({
      role: '',
      status: '',
      groupId: '',
      apiKeyId: '',
      aiProvider: '',
      aiModel: ''
    });
    setSearchQuery('');
  };

  const handleSaveGroup = (group: UserGroup) => {
    if (editingGroup) {
      setGroups(groups.map(g => g.id === group.id ? group : g));
      toast.success('Group updated successfully');
    } else {
      setGroups([...groups, { ...group, id: `grp-${Date.now()}`, createdAt: new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0], userCount: 0 }]);
      toast.success('Group created successfully');
    }
    setShowGroupModal(false);
    setEditingGroup(null);
  };

  const handleDeleteGroup = (groupId: string) => {
    if (window.confirm('Are you sure you want to delete this group?')) {
      setGroups(groups.filter(g => g.id !== groupId));
      toast.success('Group deleted successfully');
    }
  };

  const handleSaveApiKey = (apiKey: ApiKey) => {
    // Add new provider to the list if it doesn't exist
    const providerLower = apiKey.provider.toLowerCase();
    if (!availableProviders.includes(providerLower)) {
      setAvailableProviders(prev => [...prev, providerLower]);
      toast.success(`New provider "${apiKey.provider}" added to the list`);
    }
    
    if (editingApiKey) {
      setApiKeys(apiKeys.map(k => k.id === apiKey.id ? apiKey : k));
      toast.success('API Key updated successfully');
    } else {
      setApiKeys([...apiKeys, { ...apiKey, id: `key-${Date.now()}`, createdAt: new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0], usageCount: 0, assignedTo: 0 }]);
      toast.success('API Key created successfully');
    }
    setShowApiKeyModal(false);
    setEditingApiKey(null);
  };

  const handleDeleteApiKey = (keyId: string) => {
    if (window.confirm('Are you sure you want to delete this API key?')) {
      setApiKeys(apiKeys.filter(k => k.id !== keyId));
      toast.success('API Key deleted successfully');
    }
  };

  const handleBulkDownload = () => {
    toast.success(`Downloading ${selectedPolicies.length} policies...`);
    setSelectedPolicies([]);
  };

  const handleBulkAnalysis = () => {
    toast.success(`Starting analysis for ${selectedPolicies.length} policies...`);
    setSelectedPolicies([]);
  };

  const tabs = [
    { id: 'users' as TabType, label: 'Users', icon: Users, count: users.length },
    { id: 'groups' as TabType, label: 'Groups', icon: Folders, count: groups.length },
    { id: 'apiKeys' as TabType, label: 'API Keys', icon: Key, count: apiKeys.length },
    { id: 'policies' as TabType, label: 'Policies', icon: FileText, count: policies.length },
    { id: 'analytics' as TabType, label: 'Analytics', icon: BarChart3 },
    { id: 'settings' as TabType, label: 'Settings', icon: Settings }
  ];

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-slate-50">
      {/* Header */}
      <div className="bg-white border-b border-gray-200 sticky top-0 z-40 shadow-sm">
        <div className="max-w-[1800px] mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-4">
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
            <div>
              <h1 className="text-2xl md:text-3xl font-bold tracking-tight text-gray-900">
                Admin Panel
              </h1>
              <p className="text-sm text-gray-600 mt-1">
                Manage users, API keys, groups, and policies
              </p>
            </div>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
              <div className="px-3 py-1.5 bg-emerald-50 border border-emerald-200 rounded-lg">
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                  <div className="w-2 h-2 bg-emerald-500 rounded-full animate-pulse"></div>
                  <span className="text-sm font-medium text-emerald-700">System Online</span>
                </div>
              </div>
              {onBack && (
                <button
                  onClick={onBack}
                  className="px-4 py-2 text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900 hover:bg-gray-100 rounded-xl transition-colors"
                >
                  Exit Admin
                </button>
              )}
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* Tabs */}
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mt-4 overflow-x-auto">
            {tabs.map((tab) => {
              const Icon = tab.icon;
              return (
                <button
                  key={tab.id}
                  onClick={() => setActiveTab(tab.id)}
                  className={`flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2.5 rounded-xl font-medium text-sm whitespace-nowrap transition-all ${
                    activeTab === tab.id
                      ? 'bg-slate-700 text-white shadow-md'
                      : 'text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900 hover:bg-gray-100'
                  }`}
                >
                  <Icon size={18} />
                  <span>{tab.label}</span>
                  {tab.count !== undefined && (
                    <span className={`px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold ${
                      activeTab === tab.id
                        ? 'bg-white/20 text-white'
                        : 'bg-gray-200 text-gray-700'
                    }`}>
                      {tab.count}
                    </span>
                  )}
                </button>
              );
            })}
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Content */}
      <div className="max-w-[1800px] mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-6">
        {/* Search and Actions Bar */}
        {(activeTab === 'users' || activeTab === 'groups' || activeTab === 'apiKeys' || activeTab === 'policies') && (
          <div className="bg-white rounded-xl border border-gray-200 p-4 mb-6">
            <div className="flex flex-col md:flex-row gap-4 md:items-center md:justify-between">
              <div className="relative flex-1 max-w-md">
                <Search className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-gray-400" size={20} />
                <input
                  type="text"
                  placeholder={`Search ${activeTab}...`}
                  value={searchQuery}
                  onChange={(e) => setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}
                  className="w-full pl-10 pr-4 py-2.5 border border-gray-300 rounded-xl focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-transparent"
                />
              </div>
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2 flex-wrap">
                {/* Users Bulk Actions */}
                {activeTab === 'users' && selectedUsers.length > 0 && (
                  <>
                    <button
                      onClick={() => {
                        const role = window.prompt('Select role (admin/user/viewer):', 'user');
                        if (role && ['admin', 'user', 'viewer'].includes(role)) {
                          handleBulkUpdateUsers('role', role);
                        }
                      }}
                      className="flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2.5 bg-blue-600 text-white rounded-xl hover:bg-blue-700 transition-colors font-medium text-sm"
                    >
                      <Edit size={18} />
                      Set Role ({selectedUsers.length})
                    </button>
                    <button
                      onClick={() => {
                        const status = window.prompt('Select status (active/inactive/suspended):', 'active');
                        if (status && ['active', 'inactive', 'suspended'].includes(status)) {
                          handleBulkUpdateUsers('status', status);
                        }
                      }}
                      className="flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2.5 bg-emerald-600 text-white rounded-xl hover:bg-emerald-700 transition-colors font-medium text-sm"
                    >
                      <CheckCircle size={18} />
                      Set Status ({selectedUsers.length})
                    </button>
                    <button
                      onClick={handleBulkDeleteUsers}
                      className="flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2.5 bg-red-600 text-white rounded-xl hover:bg-red-700 transition-colors font-medium text-sm"
                    >
                      <Trash2 size={18} />
                      Delete ({selectedUsers.length})
                    </button>
                  </>
                )}

                {/* Policies Bulk Actions */}
                {activeTab === 'policies' && selectedPolicies.length > 0 && (
                  <>
                    <button
                      onClick={handleBulkDownload}
                      className="flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2.5 bg-emerald-600 text-white rounded-xl hover:bg-emerald-700 transition-colors font-medium text-sm"
                    >
                      <Download size={18} />
                      Download ({selectedPolicies.length})
                    </button>
                    <button
                      onClick={handleBulkAnalysis}
                      className="flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2.5 bg-blue-600 text-white rounded-xl hover:bg-blue-700 transition-colors font-medium text-sm"
                    >
                      <BarChart3 size={18} />
                      Analyze ({selectedPolicies.length})
                    </button>
                  </>
                )}

                {/* Users Tab Actions */}
                {activeTab === 'users' && selectedUsers.length === 0 && (
                  <>
                    <button
                      onClick={() => setShowFilterPanel(!showFilterPanel)}
                      className={`flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2.5 rounded-xl transition-all font-medium text-sm ${
                        showFilterPanel 
                          ? 'bg-blue-600 text-white shadow-lg' 
                          : 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-200'
                      }`}
                    >
                      <Filter size={18} />
                      Filters
                      {Object.values(userFilters).some(v => v !== '') && (
                        <span className="w-2 h-2 bg-red-500 rounded-full"></span>
                      )}
                    </button>
                    <button
                      onClick={() => setShowColumnSelector(!showColumnSelector)}
                      className="flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2.5 bg-gray-100 text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-200 rounded-xl transition-all font-medium text-sm"
                    >
                      <Eye size={18} />
                      Columns
                    </button>
                    <button
                      onClick={() => {
                        setEditingUser(null);
                        setShowUserModal(true);
                      }}
                      className="flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2.5 bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 text-white rounded-xl hover:shadow-lg hover:shadow-blue-500/30 transition-all font-medium text-sm"
                    >
                      <UserPlus size={18} />
                      Add User
                    </button>
                  </>
                )}
                {activeTab === 'groups' && (
                  <button
                    onClick={() => {
                      setEditingGroup(null);
                      setShowGroupModal(true);
                    }}
                    className="flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2.5 bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 text-white rounded-xl hover:shadow-lg hover:shadow-blue-500/30 transition-all font-medium text-sm"
                  >
                    <Plus size={18} />
                    Add Group
                  </button>
                )}
                {activeTab === 'apiKeys' && (
                  <button
                    onClick={() => {
                      setEditingApiKey(null);
                      setShowApiKeyModal(true);
                    }}
                    className="flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2.5 bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 text-white rounded-xl hover:shadow-lg hover:shadow-blue-500/30 transition-all font-medium text-sm"
                  >
                    <Plus size={18} />
                    Add API Key
                  </button>
                )}
              </div>
            </div>

            {/* Filter Panel for Users */}
            {activeTab === 'users' && showFilterPanel && (
              <div className="mt-4 p-4 bg-slate-50 rounded-xl border border-gray-200">
                <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-3">
                  <h3 className="font-semibold text-gray-900">Advanced Filters</h3>
                  <button
                    onClick={handleClearFilters}
                    className="text-sm text-blue-600 hover:text-blue-700 font-medium"
                  >
                    Clear All
                  </button>
                </div>
                <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-6 gap-3">
                  <div>
                    <label className="block text-xs font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1">Role</label>
                    <select
                      value={userFilters.role}
                      onChange={(e) => setUserFilters({...userFilters, role: e.target.value})}
                      className="w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500"
                    >
                      <option value="">All</option>
                      <option value="admin">Admin</option>
                      <option value="user">User</option>
                      <option value="viewer">Viewer</option>
                    </select>
                  </div>
                  <div>
                    <label className="block text-xs font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1">Status</label>
                    <select
                      value={userFilters.status}
                      onChange={(e) => setUserFilters({...userFilters, status: e.target.value})}
                      className="w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500"
                    >
                      <option value="">All</option>
                      <option value="active">Active</option>
                      <option value="inactive">Inactive</option>
                      <option value="suspended">Suspended</option>
                    </select>
                  </div>
                  <div>
                    <label className="block text-xs font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1">Group</label>
                    <select
                      value={userFilters.groupId}
                      onChange={(e) => setUserFilters({...userFilters, groupId: e.target.value})}
                      className="w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500"
                    >
                      <option value="">All</option>
                      {groups.map(group => (
                        <option key={group.id} value={group.id}>{group.name}</option>
                      ))}
                    </select>
                  </div>
                  <div>
                    <label className="block text-xs font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1">API Key</label>
                    <select
                      value={userFilters.apiKeyId}
                      onChange={(e) => setUserFilters({...userFilters, apiKeyId: e.target.value})}
                      className="w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500"
                    >
                      <option value="">All</option>
                      {apiKeys.map(key => (
                        <option key={key.id} value={key.id}>{key.name}</option>
                      ))}
                    </select>
                  </div>
                  <div>
                    <label className="block text-xs font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1">AI Provider</label>
                    <select
                      value={userFilters.aiProvider}
                      onChange={(e) => setUserFilters({...userFilters, aiProvider: e.target.value})}
                      className="w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500"
                    >
                      <option value="">All</option>
                      {availableProviders.map(provider => (
                        <option key={provider} value={provider} className="capitalize">{provider}</option>
                      ))}
                    </select>
                  </div>
                  <div>
                    <label className="block text-xs font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1">AI Model</label>
                    <select
                      value={userFilters.aiModel}
                      onChange={(e) => setUserFilters({...userFilters, aiModel: e.target.value})}
                      className="w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500"
                    >
                      <option value="">All</option>
                      <option value="gpt-4">GPT-4</option>
                      <option value="gpt-3.5-turbo">GPT-3.5 Turbo</option>
                      <option value="claude-3-opus">Claude 3 Opus</option>
                      <option value="claude-3-sonnet">Claude 3 Sonnet</option>
                      <option value="gemini-pro">Gemini Pro</option>
                    </select>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            )}

            {/* Column Selector for Users */}
            {activeTab === 'users' && showColumnSelector && (
              <div className="mt-4 p-4 bg-slate-50 rounded-xl border border-gray-200">
                <h3 className="font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-3">Visible Columns</h3>
                <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-3">
                  {Object.entries(visibleColumns).map(([key, value]) => (
                    <label key={key} className="flex items-center gap-2 cursor-pointer">
                      <input
                        type="checkbox"
                        checked={value}
                        onChange={(e) => setVisibleColumns({...visibleColumns, [key]: e.target.checked})}
                        className="w-4 h-4 text-blue-600 rounded border-gray-300 focus:ring-blue-500"
                      />
                      <span className="text-sm text-gray-700 capitalize">{key}</span>
                    </label>
                  ))}
                </div>
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        )}

        {/* Users Tab */}
        {activeTab === 'users' && (
          <UsersTab
            users={filteredUsers}
            groups={groups}
            apiKeys={apiKeys}
            selectedUsers={selectedUsers}
            visibleColumns={visibleColumns}
            onToggleSelect={(userId) => {
              setSelectedUsers(prev =>
                prev.includes(userId)
                  ? prev.filter(id => id !== userId)
                  : [...prev, userId]
              );
            }}
            onSelectAll={handleToggleAllUsers}
            onInlineEdit={handleInlineEdit}
            onEdit={(user) => {
              setEditingUser(user);
              setShowUserModal(true);
            }}
            onDelete={handleDeleteUser}
          />
        )}

        {/* Groups Tab */}
        {activeTab === 'groups' && (
          <GroupsTab
            groups={filteredGroups}
            apiKeys={apiKeys}
            onEdit={(group) => {
              setEditingGroup(group);
              setShowGroupModal(true);
            }}
            onDelete={handleDeleteGroup}
          />
        )}

        {/* API Keys Tab */}
        {activeTab === 'apiKeys' && (
          <ApiKeysTab
            apiKeys={filteredApiKeys}
            onEdit={(key) => {
              setEditingApiKey(key);
              setShowApiKeyModal(true);
            }}
            onDelete={handleDeleteApiKey}
          />
        )}

        {/* Policies Tab */}
        {activeTab === 'policies' && (
          <PoliciesTab
            policies={filteredPolicies}
            selectedPolicies={selectedPolicies}
            onToggleSelect={(policyId) => {
              setSelectedPolicies(prev =>
                prev.includes(policyId)
                  ? prev.filter(id => id !== policyId)
                  : [...prev, policyId]
              );
            }}
            onSelectAll={() => {
              if (selectedPolicies.length === filteredPolicies.length) {
                setSelectedPolicies([]);
              } else {
                setSelectedPolicies(filteredPolicies.map(p => p.id));
              }
            }}
          />
        )}

        {/* Analytics Tab */}
        {activeTab === 'analytics' && <AnalyticsTab users={users} policies={policies} apiKeys={apiKeys} />}

        {/* Settings Tab */}
        {activeTab === 'settings' && <SettingsTab />}
      </div>

      {/* Modals */}
      {showUserModal && (
        <UserModal
          user={editingUser}
          groups={groups}
          apiKeys={apiKeys}
          onSave={handleSaveUser}
          onClose={() => {
            setShowUserModal(false);
            setEditingUser(null);
          }}
        />
      )}

      {showGroupModal && (
        <GroupModal
          group={editingGroup}
          apiKeys={apiKeys}
          onSave={handleSaveGroup}
          onClose={() => {
            setShowGroupModal(false);
            setEditingGroup(null);
          }}
        />
      )}

      {showApiKeyModal && (
        <ApiKeyModal
          apiKey={editingApiKey}
          availableProviders={availableProviders}
          onSave={handleSaveApiKey}
          onClose={() => {
            setShowApiKeyModal(false);
            setEditingApiKey(null);
          }}
        />
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

// Users Tab Component with inline editing and column management
function UsersTab({ users, groups, apiKeys, selectedUsers, visibleColumns, onToggleSelect, onSelectAll, onInlineEdit, onEdit, onDelete }: {
  users: User[];
  groups: UserGroup[];
  apiKeys: ApiKey[];
  selectedUsers: string[];
  visibleColumns: Record<string, boolean>;
  onToggleSelect: (userId: string) => void;
  onSelectAll: () => void;
  onInlineEdit: (userId: string, field: keyof User, value: any) => void;
  onEdit: (user: User) => void;
  onDelete: (userId: string) => void;
}) {
  const [editingCell, setEditingCell] = useState<{userId: string; field: string} | null>(null);

  const handleCellEdit = (userId: string, field: keyof User, value: any) => {
    onInlineEdit(userId, field, value);
    setEditingCell(null);
  };

  return (
    <div className="bg-white rounded-xl border border-gray-200 overflow-hidden">
      <div className="overflow-x-auto">
        <table className="w-full">
          <thead className="bg-slate-50 border-b border-gray-200">
            <tr>
              <th className="px-4 py-3 text-left">
                <input
                  type="checkbox"
                  checked={selectedUsers.length === users.length && users.length > 0}
                  onChange={onSelectAll}
                  className="w-4 h-4 text-blue-600 rounded border-gray-300 focus:ring-blue-500"
                />
              </th>
              {visibleColumns.user && (
                <th className="px-6 py-3 text-left text-xs font-semibold text-gray-700 uppercase tracking-wider">User</th>
              )}
              {visibleColumns.role && (
                <th className="px-6 py-3 text-left text-xs font-semibold text-gray-700 uppercase tracking-wider">Role</th>
              )}
              {visibleColumns.status && (
                <th className="px-6 py-3 text-left text-xs font-semibold text-gray-700 uppercase tracking-wider">Status</th>
              )}
              {visibleColumns.group && (
                <th className="px-6 py-3 text-left text-xs font-semibold text-gray-700 uppercase tracking-wider">Group</th>
              )}
              {visibleColumns.aiModel && (
                <th className="px-6 py-3 text-left text-xs font-semibold text-gray-700 uppercase tracking-wider">AI Model</th>
              )}
              {visibleColumns.apiKey && (
                <th className="px-6 py-3 text-left text-xs font-semibold text-gray-700 uppercase tracking-wider">API Key</th>
              )}
              {visibleColumns.tokenLimitHour && (
                <th className="px-6 py-3 text-left text-xs font-semibold text-gray-700 uppercase tracking-wider">Token/Hour</th>
              )}
              {visibleColumns.tokenLimitDay && (
                <th className="px-6 py-3 text-left text-xs font-semibold text-gray-700 uppercase tracking-wider">Token/Day</th>
              )}
              {visibleColumns.tokenLimitWeek && (
                <th className="px-6 py-3 text-left text-xs font-semibold text-gray-700 uppercase tracking-wider">Token/Week</th>
              )}
              {visibleColumns.tokenLimitMonth && (
                <th className="px-6 py-3 text-left text-xs font-semibold text-gray-700 uppercase tracking-wider">Token/Month</th>
              )}
              {visibleColumns.tokenLimitYear && (
                <th className="px-6 py-3 text-left text-xs font-semibold text-gray-700 uppercase tracking-wider">Token/Year</th>
              )}
              {visibleColumns.tokenLimitLifelong && (
                <th className="px-6 py-3 text-left text-xs font-semibold text-gray-700 uppercase tracking-wider">Token/Lifelong</th>
              )}
              {visibleColumns.policies && (
                <th className="px-6 py-3 text-left text-xs font-semibold text-gray-700 uppercase tracking-wider">Policies</th>
              )}
              {visibleColumns.actions && (
                <th className="px-6 py-3 text-left text-xs font-semibold text-gray-700 uppercase tracking-wider">Actions</th>
              )}
            </tr>
          </thead>
          <tbody className="divide-y divide-gray-200">
            {users.map((user) => {
              const group = groups.find(g => g.id === user.groupId);
              const apiKey = apiKeys.find(k => k.id === user.apiKeyId);
              const isSelected = selectedUsers.includes(user.id);
              
              return (
                <tr key={user.id} className={`hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors ${isSelected ? 'bg-blue-50' : ''}`}>
                  <td className="px-4 py-4">
                    <input
                      type="checkbox"
                      checked={isSelected}
                      onChange={() => onToggleSelect(user.id)}
                      className="w-4 h-4 text-blue-600 rounded border-gray-300 focus:ring-blue-500"
                    />
                  </td>

                  {/* User Column - Not editable */}
                  {visibleColumns.user && (
                    <td className="px-6 py-4">
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                        <div className="w-10 h-10 bg-slate-700 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center">
                          <span className="text-white font-semibold">{user.name.charAt(0)}</span>
                        </div>
                        <div>
                          <div className="font-semibold text-gray-900">{user.name}</div>
                          <div className="text-sm text-gray-500">{user.email}</div>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    </td>
                  )}

                  {/* Role Column - Inline editable */}
                  {visibleColumns.role && (
                    <td className="px-6 py-4">
                      {editingCell?.userId === user.id && editingCell?.field === 'role' ? (
                        <select
                          autoFocus
                          defaultValue={user.role}
                          onBlur={(e) => handleCellEdit(user.id, 'role', e.target.value)}
                          onChange={(e) => handleCellEdit(user.id, 'role', e.target.value)}
                          className="px-2 py-1 border border-blue-500 rounded text-xs focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500"
                        >
                          <option value="admin">Admin</option>
                          <option value="user">User</option>
                          <option value="viewer">Viewer</option>
                        </select>
                      ) : (
                        <span
                          onClick={() => setEditingCell({userId: user.id, field: 'role'})}
                          className={`px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold cursor-pointer hover:ring-2 hover:ring-blue-300 ${
                            user.role === 'admin' ? 'bg-purple-100 text-purple-700' :
                            user.role === 'user' ? 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-700' :
                            'bg-gray-100 text-gray-700'
                          }`}
                        >
                          {user.role}
                        </span>
                      )}
                    </td>
                  )}

                  {/* Status Column - Inline editable */}
                  {visibleColumns.status && (
                    <td className="px-6 py-4">
                      {editingCell?.userId === user.id && editingCell?.field === 'status' ? (
                        <select
                          autoFocus
                          defaultValue={user.status}
                          onBlur={(e) => handleCellEdit(user.id, 'status', e.target.value)}
                          onChange={(e) => handleCellEdit(user.id, 'status', e.target.value)}
                          className="px-2 py-1 border border-blue-500 rounded text-xs focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500"
                        >
                          <option value="active">Active</option>
                          <option value="inactive">Inactive</option>
                          <option value="suspended">Suspended</option>
                        </select>
                      ) : (
                        <span
                          onClick={() => setEditingCell({userId: user.id, field: 'status'})}
                          className={`px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold flex items-center gap-1 w-fit cursor-pointer hover:ring-2 hover:ring-blue-300 ${
                            user.status === 'active' ? 'bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-700' :
                            user.status === 'inactive' ? 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-700' :
                            'bg-red-100 text-red-700'
                          }`}
                        >
                          <div className={`w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full ${
                            user.status === 'active' ? 'bg-emerald-500' :
                            user.status === 'inactive' ? 'bg-gray-500' :
                            'bg-red-500'
                          }`}></div>
                          {user.status}
                        </span>
                      )}
                    </td>
                  )}

                  {/* Group Column - Inline editable */}
                  {visibleColumns.group && (
                    <td className="px-6 py-4">
                      {editingCell?.userId === user.id && editingCell?.field === 'groupId' ? (
                        <select
                          autoFocus
                          defaultValue={user.groupId || ''}
                          onBlur={(e) => handleCellEdit(user.id, 'groupId', e.target.value)}
                          onChange={(e) => handleCellEdit(user.id, 'groupId', e.target.value)}
                          className="px-2 py-1 border border-blue-500 rounded text-xs focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500"
                        >
                          <option value="">No group</option>
                          {groups.map(g => (
                            <option key={g.id} value={g.id}>{g.name}</option>
                          ))}
                        </select>
                      ) : (
                        <div
                          onClick={() => setEditingCell({userId: user.id, field: 'groupId'})}
                          className="text-sm text-gray-900 cursor-pointer hover:text-blue-600"
                        >
                          {group?.name || '-'}
                        </div>
                      )}
                    </td>
                  )}

                  {/* AI Model Column - Inline editable */}
                  {visibleColumns.aiModel && (
                    <td className="px-6 py-4">
                      {editingCell?.userId === user.id && editingCell?.field === 'aiModel' ? (
                        <select
                          autoFocus
                          defaultValue={user.aiModel || ''}
                          onBlur={(e) => handleCellEdit(user.id, 'aiModel', e.target.value)}
                          onChange={(e) => handleCellEdit(user.id, 'aiModel', e.target.value)}
                          className="px-2 py-1 border border-blue-500 rounded text-xs focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500"
                        >
                          <option value="">Select model</option>
                          <option value="gpt-4">GPT-4</option>
                          <option value="gpt-3.5-turbo">GPT-3.5 Turbo</option>
                          <option value="claude-3-opus">Claude 3 Opus</option>
                          <option value="claude-3-sonnet">Claude 3 Sonnet</option>
                          <option value="gemini-pro">Gemini Pro</option>
                        </select>
                      ) : (
                        <div
                          onClick={() => setEditingCell({userId: user.id, field: 'aiModel'})}
                          className="flex items-center gap-2 cursor-pointer hover:text-blue-600"
                        >
                          <Brain size={14} className="text-blue-600" />
                          <div>
                            <div className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-900">{user.aiModel || '-'}</div>
                            <div className="text-xs text-gray-500">{user.aiProvider || '-'}</div>
                          </div>
                        </div>
                      )}
                    </td>
                  )}

                  {/* API Key Column - Inline editable */}
                  {visibleColumns.apiKey && (
                    <td className="px-6 py-4">
                      {editingCell?.userId === user.id && editingCell?.field === 'apiKeyId' ? (
                        <select
                          autoFocus
                          defaultValue={user.apiKeyId || ''}
                          onBlur={(e) => handleCellEdit(user.id, 'apiKeyId', e.target.value)}
                          onChange={(e) => handleCellEdit(user.id, 'apiKeyId', e.target.value)}
                          className="px-2 py-1 border border-blue-500 rounded text-xs focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500"
                        >
                          <option value="">Select API key</option>
                          {apiKeys.map(k => (
                            <option key={k.id} value={k.id}>{k.name}</option>
                          ))}
                        </select>
                      ) : (
                        <div
                          onClick={() => setEditingCell({userId: user.id, field: 'apiKeyId'})}
                          className="text-sm text-gray-900 cursor-pointer hover:text-blue-600"
                        >
                          {apiKey?.name || '-'}
                        </div>
                      )}
                    </td>
                  )}

                  {/* Token Limit Hour Column - Inline editable */}
                  {visibleColumns.tokenLimitHour && (
                    <td className="px-6 py-4">
                      {editingCell?.userId === user.id && editingCell?.field === 'tokenLimitHour' ? (
                        <input
                          type="number"
                          autoFocus
                          defaultValue={user.tokenLimitHour || ''}
                          onBlur={(e) => handleCellEdit(user.id, 'tokenLimitHour', parseInt(e.target.value) || 0)}
                          onKeyDown={(e) => {
                            if (e.key === 'Enter') {
                              handleCellEdit(user.id, 'tokenLimitHour', parseInt((e.target as HTMLInputElement).value) || 0);
                            }
                          }}
                          className="w-24 px-2 py-1 border border-blue-500 rounded text-xs focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500"
                          placeholder="0"
                        />
                      ) : (
                        <div
                          onClick={() => setEditingCell({userId: user.id, field: 'tokenLimitHour'})}
                          className="text-sm text-gray-900 cursor-pointer hover:text-blue-600"
                        >
                          {user.tokenLimitHour?.toLocaleString() || '-'}
                        </div>
                      )}
                    </td>
                  )}

                  {/* Token Limit Day Column - Inline editable */}
                  {visibleColumns.tokenLimitDay && (
                    <td className="px-6 py-4">
                      {editingCell?.userId === user.id && editingCell?.field === 'tokenLimitDay' ? (
                        <input
                          type="number"
                          autoFocus
                          defaultValue={user.tokenLimitDay || ''}
                          onBlur={(e) => handleCellEdit(user.id, 'tokenLimitDay', parseInt(e.target.value) || 0)}
                          onKeyDown={(e) => {
                            if (e.key === 'Enter') {
                              handleCellEdit(user.id, 'tokenLimitDay', parseInt((e.target as HTMLInputElement).value) || 0);
                            }
                          }}
                          className="w-24 px-2 py-1 border border-blue-500 rounded text-xs focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500"
                          placeholder="0"
                        />
                      ) : (
                        <div
                          onClick={() => setEditingCell({userId: user.id, field: 'tokenLimitDay'})}
                          className="text-sm text-gray-900 cursor-pointer hover:text-blue-600"
                        >
                          {user.tokenLimitDay?.toLocaleString() || '-'}
                        </div>
                      )}
                    </td>
                  )}

                  {/* Token Limit Week Column - Inline editable */}
                  {visibleColumns.tokenLimitWeek && (
                    <td className="px-6 py-4">
                      {editingCell?.userId === user.id && editingCell?.field === 'tokenLimitWeek' ? (
                        <input
                          type="number"
                          autoFocus
                          defaultValue={user.tokenLimitWeek || ''}
                          onBlur={(e) => handleCellEdit(user.id, 'tokenLimitWeek', parseInt(e.target.value) || 0)}
                          onKeyDown={(e) => {
                            if (e.key === 'Enter') {
                              handleCellEdit(user.id, 'tokenLimitWeek', parseInt((e.target as HTMLInputElement).value) || 0);
                            }
                          }}
                          className="w-24 px-2 py-1 border border-blue-500 rounded text-xs focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500"
                          placeholder="0"
                        />
                      ) : (
                        <div
                          onClick={() => setEditingCell({userId: user.id, field: 'tokenLimitWeek'})}
                          className="text-sm text-gray-900 cursor-pointer hover:text-blue-600"
                        >
                          {user.tokenLimitWeek?.toLocaleString() || '-'}
                        </div>
                      )}
                    </td>
                  )}

                  {/* Token Limit Month Column - Inline editable */}
                  {visibleColumns.tokenLimitMonth && (
                    <td className="px-6 py-4">
                      {editingCell?.userId === user.id && editingCell?.field === 'tokenLimitMonth' ? (
                        <input
                          type="number"
                          autoFocus
                          defaultValue={user.tokenLimitMonth || ''}
                          onBlur={(e) => handleCellEdit(user.id, 'tokenLimitMonth', parseInt(e.target.value) || 0)}
                          onKeyDown={(e) => {
                            if (e.key === 'Enter') {
                              handleCellEdit(user.id, 'tokenLimitMonth', parseInt((e.target as HTMLInputElement).value) || 0);
                            }
                          }}
                          className="w-24 px-2 py-1 border border-blue-500 rounded text-xs focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500"
                          placeholder="0"
                        />
                      ) : (
                        <div
                          onClick={() => setEditingCell({userId: user.id, field: 'tokenLimitMonth'})}
                          className="text-sm text-gray-900 cursor-pointer hover:text-blue-600"
                        >
                          {user.tokenLimitMonth?.toLocaleString() || '-'}
                        </div>
                      )}
                    </td>
                  )}

                  {/* Token Limit Year Column - Inline editable */}
                  {visibleColumns.tokenLimitYear && (
                    <td className="px-6 py-4">
                      {editingCell?.userId === user.id && editingCell?.field === 'tokenLimitYear' ? (
                        <input
                          type="number"
                          autoFocus
                          defaultValue={user.tokenLimitYear || ''}
                          onBlur={(e) => handleCellEdit(user.id, 'tokenLimitYear', parseInt(e.target.value) || 0)}
                          onKeyDown={(e) => {
                            if (e.key === 'Enter') {
                              handleCellEdit(user.id, 'tokenLimitYear', parseInt((e.target as HTMLInputElement).value) || 0);
                            }
                          }}
                          className="w-24 px-2 py-1 border border-blue-500 rounded text-xs focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500"
                          placeholder="0"
                        />
                      ) : (
                        <div
                          onClick={() => setEditingCell({userId: user.id, field: 'tokenLimitYear'})}
                          className="text-sm text-gray-900 cursor-pointer hover:text-blue-600"
                        >
                          {user.tokenLimitYear?.toLocaleString() || '-'}
                        </div>
                      )}
                    </td>
                  )}

                  {/* Token Limit Lifelong Column - Inline editable */}
                  {visibleColumns.tokenLimitLifelong && (
                    <td className="px-6 py-4">
                      {editingCell?.userId === user.id && editingCell?.field === 'tokenLimitLifelong' ? (
                        <input
                          type="number"
                          autoFocus
                          defaultValue={user.tokenLimitLifelong || ''}
                          onBlur={(e) => handleCellEdit(user.id, 'tokenLimitLifelong', parseInt(e.target.value) || 0)}
                          onKeyDown={(e) => {
                            if (e.key === 'Enter') {
                              handleCellEdit(user.id, 'tokenLimitLifelong', parseInt((e.target as HTMLInputElement).value) || 0);
                            }
                          }}
                          className="w-24 px-2 py-1 border border-blue-500 rounded text-xs focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500"
                          placeholder="0"
                        />
                      ) : (
                        <div
                          onClick={() => setEditingCell({userId: user.id, field: 'tokenLimitLifelong'})}
                          className="text-sm text-gray-900 cursor-pointer hover:text-blue-600"
                        >
                          {user.tokenLimitLifelong?.toLocaleString() || '-'}
                        </div>
                      )}
                    </td>
                  )}

                  {/* Policies Column - Not editable */}
                  {visibleColumns.policies && (
                    <td className="px-6 py-4">
                      <div className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-900">{user.policyCount}</div>
                    </td>
                  )}

                  {/* Actions Column */}
                  {visibleColumns.actions && (
                    <td className="px-6 py-4">
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                        <button
                          onClick={() => onEdit(user)}
                          className="p-2 text-gray-600 hover:text-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-50 rounded-lg transition-colors"
                          title="Edit user (full form)"
                        >
                          <Edit size={16} />
                        </button>
                        <button
                          onClick={() => onDelete(user.id)}
                          className="p-2 text-gray-600 hover:text-red-600 hover:bg-red-50 rounded-lg transition-colors"
                          title="Delete user"
                        >
                          <Trash2 size={16} />
                        </button>
                      </div>
                    </td>
                  )}
                </tr>
              );
            })}
          </tbody>
        </table>
      </div>
      
      {users.length === 0 && (
        <div className="text-center py-12">
          <Users className="mx-auto text-gray-400 mb-3" size={48} />
          <p className="text-gray-600">No users found</p>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

// Groups Tab Component
function GroupsTab({ groups, apiKeys, onEdit, onDelete }: {
  groups: UserGroup[];
  apiKeys: ApiKey[];
  onEdit: (group: UserGroup) => void;
  onDelete: (groupId: string) => void;
}) {
  return (
    <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
      {groups.map((group) => {
        const apiKey = apiKeys.find(k => k.id === group.apiKeyId);
        return (
          <div key={group.id} className="bg-white rounded-xl border border-gray-200 p-6 hover:shadow-lg transition-all">
            <div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-4">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                <div className="w-12 h-12 bg-gradient-to-br from-slate-700 to-slate-900 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center">
                  <Folders className="text-white" size={20} />
                </div>
                <div>
                  <h3 className="font-bold text-gray-900">{group.name}</h3>
                  <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">{group.userCount} users</p>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
                <button
                  onClick={() => onEdit(group)}
                  className="p-2 text-gray-600 hover:text-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-50 rounded-lg transition-colors"
                >
                  <Edit size={16} />
                </button>
                <button
                  onClick={() => onDelete(group.id)}
                  className="p-2 text-gray-600 hover:text-red-600 hover:bg-red-50 rounded-lg transition-colors"
                >
                  <Trash2 size={16} />
                </button>
              </div>
            </div>
            
            <p className="text-sm text-gray-600 mb-4">{group.description}</p>
            
            <div className="space-y-3 pt-4 border-t border-gray-100">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                <Brain size={16} className="text-blue-600" />
                <span className="text-sm text-gray-700">
                  <span className="font-medium">{group.aiModel || 'No AI model'}</span>
                  {group.aiProvider && <span className="text-gray-500"> ({group.aiProvider})</span>}
                </span>
              </div>
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                <Key size={16} className="text-emerald-600" />
                <span className="text-sm text-gray-700">{apiKey?.name || 'No API key assigned'}</span>
              </div>
              {group.customPrompt && (
                <div className="flex items-start gap-2">
                  <MessageSquare size={16} className="text-purple-600 mt-0.5 flex-shrink-0" />
                  <span className="text-sm text-gray-700 line-clamp-2">{group.customPrompt}</span>
                </div>
              )}
            </div>
          </div>
        );
      })}
    </div>
  );
}

// API Keys Tab Component
function ApiKeysTab({ apiKeys, onEdit, onDelete }: {
  apiKeys: ApiKey[];
  onEdit: (key: ApiKey) => void;
  onDelete: (keyId: string) => void;
}) {
  const [copiedKey, setCopiedKey] = useState<string | null>(null);

  const copyToClipboard = (key: string, keyId: string) => {
    navigator.clipboard.writeText(key);
    setCopiedKey(keyId);
    toast.success('API key copied to clipboard');
    setTimeout(() => setCopiedKey(null), 2000);
  };

  return (
    <div className="space-y-4">
      {apiKeys.map((apiKey) => {
        const usagePercent = apiKey.usageLimit ? (apiKey.usageCount / apiKey.usageLimit) * 100 : 0;
        return (
          <div key={apiKey.id} className="bg-white rounded-xl border border-gray-200 p-6">
            <div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-4">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
                <div className={`w-12 h-12 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center ${
                  apiKey.provider === 'openai' ? 'bg-emerald-100' :
                  apiKey.provider === 'anthropic' ? 'bg-orange-100' :
                  apiKey.provider === 'gemini' ? 'bg-blue-100' :
                  'bg-gray-100'
                }`}>
                  <Key className={
                    apiKey.provider === 'openai' ? 'text-emerald-600' :
                    apiKey.provider === 'anthropic' ? 'text-orange-600' :
                    apiKey.provider === 'gemini' ? 'text-blue-600' :
                    'text-gray-600'
                  } size={20} />
                </div>
                <div>
                  <h3 className="font-bold text-gray-900 flex items-center gap-2">
                    {apiKey.name}
                    <span className={`px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold ${
                      apiKey.status === 'active' ? 'bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-700' : 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-700'
                    }`}>
                      {apiKey.status}
                    </span>
                  </h3>
                  <p className="text-sm text-gray-500 capitalize">{apiKey.provider}</p>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
                <button
                  onClick={() => onEdit(apiKey)}
                  className="p-2 text-gray-600 hover:text-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-50 rounded-lg transition-colors"
                >
                  <Edit size={16} />
                </button>
                <button
                  onClick={() => onDelete(apiKey.id)}
                  className="p-2 text-gray-600 hover:text-red-600 hover:bg-red-50 rounded-lg transition-colors"
                >
                  <Trash2 size={16} />
                </button>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-4 mb-4">
              <div className="bg-slate-50 rounded-lg p-3">
                <div className="text-xs text-gray-600 mb-1">API Key</div>
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                  <code className="text-sm font-mono text-gray-900">{apiKey.key}</code>
                  <button
                    onClick={() => copyToClipboard(apiKey.key, apiKey.id)}
                    className="p-1 text-gray-600 hover:text-blue-600 transition-colors"
                  >
                    {copiedKey === apiKey.id ? <Check size={14} /> : <Copy size={14} />}
                  </button>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div className="bg-slate-50 rounded-lg p-3">
                <div className="text-xs text-gray-600 mb-1">Assigned To</div>
                <div className="text-lg font-bold text-gray-900">{apiKey.assignedTo} users</div>
              </div>
              <div className="bg-slate-50 rounded-lg p-3">
                <div className="text-xs text-gray-600 mb-1">Created</div>
                <div className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-900">{apiKey.createdAt}</div>
              </div>
            </div>

            {apiKey.usageLimit && (
              <div>
                <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-2">
                  <span className="text-sm text-gray-600">Usage</span>
                  <span className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-900">
                    {apiKey.usageCount.toLocaleString()} / {apiKey.usageLimit.toLocaleString()}
                  </span>
                </div>
                <div className="w-full h-2 bg-gray-200 rounded-full overflow-hidden">
                  <div
                    className={`h-full rounded-full transition-all ${
                      usagePercent > 90 ? 'bg-red-500' :
                      usagePercent > 70 ? 'bg-amber-500' :
                      'bg-emerald-500'
                    }`}
                    style={{ width: `${Math.min(usagePercent, 100)}%` }}
                  ></div>
                </div>
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        );
      })}
    </div>
  );
}

// Policies Tab Component
function PoliciesTab({ policies, selectedPolicies, onToggleSelect, onSelectAll }: {
  policies: Policy[];
  selectedPolicies: string[];
  onToggleSelect: (policyId: string) => void;
  onSelectAll: () => void;
}) {
  const formatFileSize = (bytes: number) => {
    if (bytes < 1024) return bytes + ' B';
    if (bytes < 1024 * 1024) return (bytes / 1024).toFixed(1) + ' KB';
    return (bytes / (1024 * 1024)).toFixed(1) + ' MB';
  };

  return (
    <div className="bg-white rounded-xl border border-gray-200 overflow-hidden">
      <div className="overflow-x-auto">
        <table className="w-full">
          <thead className="bg-slate-50 border-b border-gray-200">
            <tr>
              <th className="px-6 py-3 text-left">
                <input
                  type="checkbox"
                  checked={selectedPolicies.length === policies.length && policies.length > 0}
                  onChange={onSelectAll}
                  className="w-4 h-4 text-blue-600 rounded border-gray-300 focus:ring-blue-500"
                />
              </th>
              <th className="px-6 py-3 text-left text-xs font-semibold text-gray-700 uppercase tracking-wider">User</th>
              <th className="px-6 py-3 text-left text-xs font-semibold text-gray-700 uppercase tracking-wider">Policy</th>
              <th className="px-6 py-3 text-left text-xs font-semibold text-gray-700 uppercase tracking-wider">Type</th>
              <th className="px-6 py-3 text-left text-xs font-semibold text-gray-700 uppercase tracking-wider">Status</th>
              <th className="px-6 py-3 text-left text-xs font-semibold text-gray-700 uppercase tracking-wider">Upload Date</th>
              <th className="px-6 py-3 text-left text-xs font-semibold text-gray-700 uppercase tracking-wider">File</th>
              <th className="px-6 py-3 text-left text-xs font-semibold text-gray-700 uppercase tracking-wider">Actions</th>
            </tr>
          </thead>
          <tbody className="divide-y divide-gray-200">
            {policies.map((policy) => (
              <tr key={policy.id} className="hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors">
                <td className="px-6 py-4">
                  <input
                    type="checkbox"
                    checked={selectedPolicies.includes(policy.id)}
                    onChange={() => onToggleSelect(policy.id)}
                    className="w-4 h-4 text-blue-600 rounded border-gray-300 focus:ring-blue-500"
                  />
                </td>
                <td className="px-6 py-4">
                  <div>
                    <div className="font-semibold text-gray-900">{policy.userName}</div>
                    <div className="text-sm text-gray-500">{policy.userEmail}</div>
                  </div>
                </td>
                <td className="px-6 py-4">
                  <div>
                    <div className="font-semibold text-gray-900">{policy.policyNumber}</div>
                    <div className="text-sm text-gray-500">{policy.provider}</div>
                  </div>
                </td>
                <td className="px-6 py-4">
                  <span className="text-sm text-gray-900">{policy.type}</span>
                </td>
                <td className="px-6 py-4">
                  <span className={`px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold flex items-center gap-1 w-fit ${
                    policy.status === 'processed' ? 'bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-700' :
                    policy.status === 'processing' ? 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-700' :
                    'bg-red-100 text-red-700'
                  }`}>
                    {policy.status === 'processed' && <CheckCircle size={12} />}
                    {policy.status === 'processing' && <Loader size={12} className="animate-spin" />}
                    {policy.status === 'failed' && <AlertCircle size={12} />}
                    {policy.status}
                  </span>
                </td>
                <td className="px-6 py-4">
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                    <Calendar size={14} className="text-gray-400" />
                    <span className="text-sm text-gray-900">{policy.uploadDate}</span>
                  </div>
                </td>
                <td className="px-6 py-4">
                  <div>
                    <div className="text-sm text-gray-900">{policy.fileName}</div>
                    <div className="text-xs text-gray-500">{formatFileSize(policy.fileSize)}</div>
                  </div>
                </td>
                <td className="px-6 py-4">
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                    <button
                      className="p-2 text-gray-600 hover:text-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-50 rounded-lg transition-colors"
                      title="View policy"
                    >
                      <Eye size={16} />
                    </button>
                    <button
                      className="p-2 text-gray-600 hover:text-emerald-600 hover:bg-emerald-50 rounded-lg transition-colors"
                      title="Download policy"
                    >
                      <Download size={16} />
                    </button>
                  </div>
                </td>
              </tr>
            ))}
          </tbody>
        </table>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// Analytics Tab Component
function AnalyticsTab({ users, policies, apiKeys }: {
  users: User[];
  policies: Policy[];
  apiKeys: ApiKey[];
}) {
  const stats = {
    totalUsers: users.length,
    activeUsers: users.filter(u => u.status === 'active').length,
    totalPolicies: policies.length,
    processedPolicies: policies.filter(p => p.status === 'processed').length,
    totalApiKeys: apiKeys.length,
    activeApiKeys: apiKeys.filter(k => k.status === 'active').length
  };

  return (
    <div className="space-y-6">
      {/* Stats Grid */}
      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6">
        <div className="bg-white rounded-xl border border-gray-200 p-6">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-3">
            <div className="w-12 h-12 bg-blue-100 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center">
              <Users className="text-blue-600" size={24} />
            </div>
            <div>
              <div className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">{stats.totalUsers}</div>
              <div className="text-sm text-gray-600">Total Users</div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div className="text-xs text-gray-500">
            {stats.activeUsers} active
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="bg-white rounded-xl border border-gray-200 p-6">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-3">
            <div className="w-12 h-12 bg-emerald-100 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center">
              <FileText className="text-emerald-600" size={24} />
            </div>
            <div>
              <div className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">{stats.totalPolicies}</div>
              <div className="text-sm text-gray-600">Total Policies</div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div className="text-xs text-gray-500">
            {stats.processedPolicies} processed
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="bg-white rounded-xl border border-gray-200 p-6">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-3">
            <div className="w-12 h-12 bg-purple-100 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center">
              <Key className="text-purple-600" size={24} />
            </div>
            <div>
              <div className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">{stats.totalApiKeys}</div>
              <div className="text-sm text-gray-600">API Keys</div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div className="text-xs text-gray-500">
            {stats.activeApiKeys} active
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="bg-white rounded-xl border border-gray-200 p-6">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-3">
            <div className="w-12 h-12 bg-amber-100 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center">
              <BarChart3 className="text-amber-600" size={24} />
            </div>
            <div>
              <div className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">98.5%</div>
              <div className="text-sm text-gray-600">Success Rate</div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div className="text-xs text-gray-500">
            Last 30 days
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Additional Analytics */}
      <div className="bg-white rounded-xl border border-gray-200 p-6">
        <h3 className="font-bold text-gray-900 mb-4">System Overview</h3>
        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
          <div>
            <h4 className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-700 mb-3">User Distribution</h4>
            <div className="space-y-2">
              <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                <span className="text-sm text-gray-600">Admin</span>
                <span className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-900">
                  {users.filter(u => u.role === 'admin').length}
                </span>
              </div>
              <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                <span className="text-sm text-gray-600">Users</span>
                <span className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-900">
                  {users.filter(u => u.role === 'user').length}
                </span>
              </div>
              <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                <span className="text-sm text-gray-600">Viewers</span>
                <span className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-900">
                  {users.filter(u => u.role === 'viewer').length}
                </span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div>
            <h4 className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-700 mb-3">Policy Status</h4>
            <div className="space-y-2">
              <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                <span className="text-sm text-gray-600">Processed</span>
                <span className="text-sm font-semibold text-emerald-600">
                  {policies.filter(p => p.status === 'processed').length}
                </span>
              </div>
              <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                <span className="text-sm text-gray-600">Processing</span>
                <span className="text-sm font-semibold text-blue-600">
                  {policies.filter(p => p.status === 'processing').length}
                </span>
              </div>
              <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                <span className="text-sm text-gray-600">Failed</span>
                <span className="text-sm font-semibold text-red-600">
                  {policies.filter(p => p.status === 'failed').length}
                </span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// Settings Tab Component
function SettingsTab() {
  return (
    <div className="space-y-6">
      <div className="bg-white rounded-xl border border-gray-200 p-6">
        <h3 className="font-bold text-gray-900 mb-4">System Settings</h3>
        <div className="space-y-4">
          <div>
            <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2">
              Default AI Model
            </label>
            <select className="w-full px-4 py-2.5 border border-gray-300 rounded-xl focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500">
              <option>gpt-4</option>
              <option>gpt-3.5-turbo</option>
              <option>claude-3-opus</option>
              <option>gemini-pro</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div>
            <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2">
              Default AI Provider
            </label>
            <select className="w-full px-4 py-2.5 border border-gray-300 rounded-xl focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500">
              <option>OpenAI</option>
              <option>Anthropic</option>
              <option>Google Gemini</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div>
            <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2">
              Maximum File Size (MB)
            </label>
            <input
              type="number"
```
