```tsx
              defaultValue="10"
              className="w-full px-4 py-2.5 border border-gray-300 rounded-xl focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500"
            />
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div className="bg-white rounded-xl border border-gray-200 p-6">
        <h3 className="font-bold text-gray-900 mb-4">Email Notifications</h3>
        <div className="space-y-3">
          <label className="flex items-center gap-3">
            <input type="checkbox" defaultChecked className="w-4 h-4 text-blue-600 rounded" />
            <span className="text-sm text-gray-700">New user registrations</span>
          </label>
          <label className="flex items-center gap-3">
            <input type="checkbox" defaultChecked className="w-4 h-4 text-blue-600 rounded" />
            <span className="text-sm text-gray-700">Policy upload failures</span>
          </label>
          <label className="flex items-center gap-3">
            <input type="checkbox" className="w-4 h-4 text-blue-600 rounded" />
            <span className="text-sm text-gray-700">API key usage warnings</span>
          </label>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// User Modal Component
function UserModal({ user, groups, apiKeys, onSave, onClose }: {
  user: User | null;
  groups: UserGroup[];
  apiKeys: ApiKey[];
  onSave: (user: User) => void;
  onClose: () => void;
}) {
  const [formData, setFormData] = useState<User>(user || {
    id: '',
    name: '',
    email: '',
    phone: '',
    role: 'user',
    status: 'active',
    groupId: '',
    apiKeyId: '',
    customPrompt: '',
    aiModel: '',
    aiProvider: '',
    createdAt: '',
    policyCount: 0
  });

  const handleSubmit = (e: React.FormEvent) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    onSave(formData);
  };

  return (
    <>
      <div className="fixed inset-0 bg-black/50 backdrop-blur-sm z-50" onClick={onClose}></div>
      <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center p-4">
        <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-2xl max-w-2xl w-full max-h-[90vh] overflow-y-auto">
          <div className="sticky top-0 bg-white border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 flex items-center justify-between">
            <h2 className="text-xl font-bold text-gray-900">
              {user ? 'Edit User' : 'Add New User'}
            </h2>
            <button onClick={onClose} className="p-2 hover:bg-gray-100 rounded-lg transition-colors">
              <X size={20} />
            </button>
          </div>

          <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="p-6 space-y-4">
            <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
              <div>
                <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2">Name *</label>
                <input
                  type="text"
                  required
                  value={formData.name}
                  onChange={(e) => setFormData({ ...formData, name: e.target.value })}
                  className="w-full px-4 py-2.5 border border-gray-300 rounded-xl focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500"
                />
              </div>
              <div>
                <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2">Email *</label>
                <input
                  type="email"
                  required
                  value={formData.email}
                  onChange={(e) => setFormData({ ...formData, email: e.target.value })}
                  className="w-full px-4 py-2.5 border border-gray-300 rounded-xl focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500"
                />
              </div>
            </div>

            <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
              <div>
                <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2">Phone</label>
                <input
                  type="tel"
                  value={formData.phone}
                  onChange={(e) => setFormData({ ...formData, phone: e.target.value })}
                  className="w-full px-4 py-2.5 border border-gray-300 rounded-xl focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500"
                />
              </div>
              <div>
                <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2">Role *</label>
                <select
                  required
                  value={formData.role}
                  onChange={(e) => setFormData({ ...formData, role: e.target.value as User['role'] })}
                  className="w-full px-4 py-2.5 border border-gray-300 rounded-xl focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500"
                >
                  <option value="user">User</option>
                  <option value="admin">Admin</option>
                  <option value="viewer">Viewer</option>
                </select>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
              <div>
                <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2">Status *</label>
                <select
                  required
                  value={formData.status}
                  onChange={(e) => setFormData({ ...formData, status: e.target.value as User['status'] })}
                  className="w-full px-4 py-2.5 border border-gray-300 rounded-xl focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500"
                >
                  <option value="active">Active</option>
                  <option value="inactive">Inactive</option>
                  <option value="suspended">Suspended</option>
                </select>
              </div>
              <div>
                <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2">Group</label>
                <select
                  value={formData.groupId}
                  onChange={(e) => setFormData({ ...formData, groupId: e.target.value })}
                  className="w-full px-4 py-2.5 border border-gray-300 rounded-xl focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500"
                >
                  <option value="">No group</option>
                  {groups.map(group => (
                    <option key={group.id} value={group.id}>{group.name}</option>
                  ))}
                </select>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
              <div>
                <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2">API Key</label>
                <select
                  value={formData.apiKeyId}
                  onChange={(e) => setFormData({ ...formData, apiKeyId: e.target.value })}
                  className="w-full px-4 py-2.5 border border-gray-300 rounded-xl focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500"
                >
                  <option value="">Select API key</option>
                  {apiKeys.map(key => (
                    <option key={key.id} value={key.id}>{key.name}</option>
                  ))}
                </select>
              </div>
              <div>
                <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2">AI Provider</label>
                <select
                  value={formData.aiProvider}
                  onChange={(e) => setFormData({ ...formData, aiProvider: e.target.value })}
                  className="w-full px-4 py-2.5 border border-gray-300 rounded-xl focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500"
                >
                  <option value="">Select provider</option>
                  <option value="openai">OpenAI</option>
                  <option value="anthropic">Anthropic</option>
                  <option value="gemini">Google Gemini</option>
                </select>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div>
              <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2">AI Model</label>
              <select
                value={formData.aiModel}
                onChange={(e) => setFormData({ ...formData, aiModel: e.target.value })}
                className="w-full px-4 py-2.5 border border-gray-300 rounded-xl focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500"
              >
                <option value="">Select model</option>
                <option value="gpt-4">GPT-4</option>
                <option value="gpt-3.5-turbo">GPT-3.5 Turbo</option>
                <option value="claude-3-opus">Claude 3 Opus</option>
                <option value="claude-3-sonnet">Claude 3 Sonnet</option>
                <option value="gemini-pro">Gemini Pro</option>
              </select>
            </div>

            <div>
              <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2">Custom Prompt (Optional)</label>
              <textarea
                value={formData.customPrompt}
                onChange={(e) => setFormData({ ...formData, customPrompt: e.target.value })}
                rows={4}
                placeholder="Enter a custom prompt that will be injected for this user..."
                className="w-full px-4 py-2.5 border border-gray-300 rounded-xl focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500"
              />
            </div>

            <div className="flex items-center gap-3 pt-4 border-t border-gray-200">
              <button
                type="submit"
                className="flex-1 flex items-center justify-center gap-2 px-4 py-2.5 bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 text-white rounded-xl hover:shadow-lg hover:shadow-blue-500/30 transition-all font-medium"
              >
                <Save size={18} />
                Save User
              </button>
              <button
                type="button"
                onClick={onClose}
                className="px-4 py-2.5 text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900 hover:bg-gray-100 rounded-xl transition-colors font-medium"
              >
                Cancel
              </button>
            </div>
          </form>
        </div>
      </div>
    </>
  );
}

// Group Modal Component
function GroupModal({ group, apiKeys, onSave, onClose }: {
  group: UserGroup | null;
  apiKeys: ApiKey[];
  onSave: (group: UserGroup) => void;
  onClose: () => void;
}) {
  const [formData, setFormData] = useState<UserGroup>(group || {
    id: '',
    name: '',
    description: '',
    userCount: 0,
    apiKeyId: '',
    aiModel: '',
    aiProvider: '',
    customPrompt: '',
    createdAt: ''
  });

  const handleSubmit = (e: React.FormEvent) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    onSave(formData);
  };

  return (
    <>
      <div className="fixed inset-0 bg-black/50 backdrop-blur-sm z-50" onClick={onClose}></div>
      <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center p-4">
        <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-2xl max-w-2xl w-full max-h-[90vh] overflow-y-auto">
          <div className="sticky top-0 bg-white border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 flex items-center justify-between">
            <h2 className="text-xl font-bold text-gray-900">
              {group ? 'Edit Group' : 'Add New Group'}
            </h2>
            <button onClick={onClose} className="p-2 hover:bg-gray-100 rounded-lg transition-colors">
              <X size={20} />
            </button>
          </div>

          <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="p-6 space-y-4">
            <div>
              <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2">Group Name *</label>
              <input
                type="text"
                required
                value={formData.name}
                onChange={(e) => setFormData({ ...formData, name: e.target.value })}
                className="w-full px-4 py-2.5 border border-gray-300 rounded-xl focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500"
              />
            </div>

            <div>
              <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2">Description *</label>
              <textarea
                required
                value={formData.description}
                onChange={(e) => setFormData({ ...formData, description: e.target.value })}
                rows={3}
                className="w-full px-4 py-2.5 border border-gray-300 rounded-xl focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500"
              />
            </div>

            <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
              <div>
                <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2">API Key</label>
                <select
                  value={formData.apiKeyId}
                  onChange={(e) => setFormData({ ...formData, apiKeyId: e.target.value })}
                  className="w-full px-4 py-2.5 border border-gray-300 rounded-xl focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500"
                >
                  <option value="">Select API key</option>
                  {apiKeys.map(key => (
                    <option key={key.id} value={key.id}>{key.name}</option>
                  ))}
                </select>
              </div>
              <div>
                <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2">AI Provider</label>
                <select
                  value={formData.aiProvider}
                  onChange={(e) => setFormData({ ...formData, aiProvider: e.target.value })}
                  className="w-full px-4 py-2.5 border border-gray-300 rounded-xl focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500"
                >
                  <option value="">Select provider</option>
                  <option value="openai">OpenAI</option>
                  <option value="anthropic">Anthropic</option>
                  <option value="gemini">Google Gemini</option>
                </select>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div>
              <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2">AI Model</label>
              <select
                value={formData.aiModel}
                onChange={(e) => setFormData({ ...formData, aiModel: e.target.value })}
                className="w-full px-4 py-2.5 border border-gray-300 rounded-xl focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500"
              >
                <option value="">Select model</option>
                <option value="gpt-4">GPT-4</option>
                <option value="gpt-3.5-turbo">GPT-3.5 Turbo</option>
                <option value="claude-3-opus">Claude 3 Opus</option>
                <option value="claude-3-sonnet">Claude 3 Sonnet</option>
                <option value="gemini-pro">Gemini Pro</option>
              </select>
            </div>

            <div>
              <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2">Custom Prompt (Optional)</label>
              <textarea
                value={formData.customPrompt}
                onChange={(e) => setFormData({ ...formData, customPrompt: e.target.value })}
                rows={4}
                placeholder="Enter a custom prompt that will be injected for all users in this group..."
                className="w-full px-4 py-2.5 border border-gray-300 rounded-xl focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500"
              />
            </div>

            <div className="flex items-center gap-3 pt-4 border-t border-gray-200">
              <button
                type="submit"
                className="flex-1 flex items-center justify-center gap-2 px-4 py-2.5 bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 text-white rounded-xl hover:shadow-lg hover:shadow-blue-500/30 transition-all font-medium"
              >
                <Save size={18} />
                Save Group
              </button>
              <button
                type="button"
                onClick={onClose}
                className="px-4 py-2.5 text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900 hover:bg-gray-100 rounded-xl transition-colors font-medium"
              >
                Cancel
              </button>
            </div>
          </form>
        </div>
      </div>
    </>
  );
}

// API Key Modal Component
function ApiKeyModal({ apiKey, availableProviders, onSave, onClose }: {
  apiKey: ApiKey | null;
  availableProviders: string[];
  onSave: (apiKey: ApiKey) => void;
  onClose: () => void;
}) {
  const [formData, setFormData] = useState<ApiKey>(apiKey || {
    id: '',
    name: '',
    key: '',
    provider: 'openai',
    status: 'active',
    usageLimit: 0,
    usageCount: 0,
    assignedTo: 0,
    createdAt: '',
    expiresAt: ''
  });
  
  const [customProviderInput, setCustomProviderInput] = useState('');
  const [showCustomInput, setShowCustomInput] = useState(false);

  const handleSubmit = (e: React.FormEvent) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    // Use custom provider input if available
    const finalFormData = showCustomInput && customProviderInput.trim()
      ? { ...formData, provider: customProviderInput.trim() as ApiKey['provider'] }
      : formData;
    onSave(finalFormData);
  };

  return (
    <>
      <div className="fixed inset-0 bg-black/50 backdrop-blur-sm z-50" onClick={onClose}></div>
      <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center p-4">
        <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-2xl max-w-2xl w-full max-h-[90vh] overflow-y-auto">
          <div className="sticky top-0 bg-white border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 flex items-center justify-between">
            <h2 className="text-xl font-bold text-gray-900">
              {apiKey ? 'Edit API Key' : 'Add New API Key'}
            </h2>
            <button onClick={onClose} className="p-2 hover:bg-gray-100 rounded-lg transition-colors">
              <X size={20} />
            </button>
          </div>

          <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="p-6 space-y-4">
            <div>
              <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2">Key Name *</label>
              <input
                type="text"
                required
                value={formData.name}
                onChange={(e) => setFormData({ ...formData, name: e.target.value })}
                placeholder="Production OpenAI"
                className="w-full px-4 py-2.5 border border-gray-300 rounded-xl focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500"
              />
            </div>

            <div>
              <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2">API Key *</label>
              <input
                type="text"
                required
                value={formData.key}
                onChange={(e) => setFormData({ ...formData, key: e.target.value })}
                placeholder="sk-proj-..."
                className="w-full px-4 py-2.5 border border-gray-300 rounded-xl focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 font-mono text-sm"
              />
            </div>

            <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
              <div>
                <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2">Provider *</label>
                <div className="space-y-2">
                  {!showCustomInput ? (
                    <>
                      <select
                        required={!showCustomInput}
                        value={formData.provider}
                        onChange={(e) => {
                          if (e.target.value === '__custom__') {
                            setShowCustomInput(true);
                            setCustomProviderInput('');
                          } else {
                            setFormData({ ...formData, provider: e.target.value as ApiKey['provider'] });
                          }
                        }}
                        className="w-full px-4 py-2.5 border border-gray-300 rounded-xl focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 capitalize"
                      >
                        {availableProviders.map(provider => (
                          <option key={provider} value={provider} className="capitalize">
                            {provider.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + provider.slice(1)}
                          </option>
                        ))}
                        <option value="__custom__">+ Add Custom Provider</option>
                      </select>
                    </>
                  ) : (
                    <div className="flex gap-2">
                      <input
                        type="text"
                        required
                        value={customProviderInput}
                        onChange={(e) => setCustomProviderInput(e.target.value)}
                        placeholder="Enter provider name (e.g., cohere, mistral)"
                        className="flex-1 px-4 py-2.5 border border-gray-300 rounded-xl focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500"
                      />
                      <button
                        type="button"
                        onClick={() => {
                          setShowCustomInput(false);
                          setCustomProviderInput('');
                        }}
                        className="px-3 py-2.5 text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900 hover:bg-gray-100 rounded-xl transition-colors"
                        title="Cancel custom provider"
                      >
                        <X size={18} />
                      </button>
                    </div>
                  )}
                  {showCustomInput && (
                    <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">
                      Enter a custom provider name. It will be added to the dropdown for future use.
                    </p>
                  )}
                </div>
              </div>
              <div>
                <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2">Status *</label>
                <select
                  required
                  value={formData.status}
                  onChange={(e) => setFormData({ ...formData, status: e.target.value as ApiKey['status'] })}
                  className="w-full px-4 py-2.5 border border-gray-300 rounded-xl focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500"
                >
                  <option value="active">Active</option>
                  <option value="inactive">Inactive</option>
                </select>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
              <div>
                <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2">Usage Limit (Optional)</label>
                <input
                  type="number"
                  value={formData.usageLimit || ''}
                  onChange={(e) => setFormData({ ...formData, usageLimit: parseInt(e.target.value) || 0 })}
                  placeholder="100000"
                  className="w-full px-4 py-2.5 border border-gray-300 rounded-xl focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500"
                />
              </div>
              <div>
                <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2">Expires At (Optional)</label>
                <input
                  type="date"
                  value={formData.expiresAt || ''}
                  onChange={(e) => setFormData({ ...formData, expiresAt: e.target.value })}
                  className="w-full px-4 py-2.5 border border-gray-300 rounded-xl focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500"
                />
              </div>
            </div>

            <div className="flex items-center gap-3 pt-4 border-t border-gray-200">
              <button
                type="submit"
                className="flex-1 flex items-center justify-center gap-2 px-4 py-2.5 bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 text-white rounded-xl hover:shadow-lg hover:shadow-blue-500/30 transition-all font-medium"
              >
                <Save size={18} />
                Save API Key
              </button>
              <button
                type="button"
                onClick={onClose}
                className="px-4 py-2.5 text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900 hover:bg-gray-100 rounded-xl transition-colors font-medium"
              >
                Cancel
              </button>
            </div>
          </form>
        </div>
      </div>
    </>
  );
}
```

```tsx
/**
 * All Samples Demo Page
 * 
 * Showcases all sample policies organized by insurance line.
 * Users can browse and select any sample to view full details.
 */

import { useState } from 'react';
import { ArrowLeft, Sparkles, FileText } from 'lucide-react';
import { SamplePolicyPicker } from './SamplePolicyPicker';
import { PolicyDetailView } from './PolicyDetailView';
import { BasePolicy } from './insurance-lines';

type AllSamplesDemoProps = {
  onBack: () => void;
};

export function AllSamplesDemo({ onBack }: AllSamplesDemoProps) {
  const [selectedPolicy, setSelectedPolicy] = useState<BasePolicy | null>(null);

  if (selectedPolicy) {
    return (
      <PolicyDetailView
        policy={selectedPolicy}
        onBack={() => setSelectedPolicy(null)}
      />
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gradient-to-br from-slate-50 via-blue-50 to-indigo-50">
      {/* Header */}
      <div className="bg-white border-b border-gray-200 sticky top-0 z-10 shadow-sm">
        <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-6">
          <button
            onClick={onBack}
            className="flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-100 rounded-xl transition-colors mb-4"
          >
            <ArrowLeft size={20} />
            <span>Back to Landing</span>
          </button>
          
          <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
            <div className="w-16 h-16 bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center">
              <FileText className="text-white" size={32} />
            </div>
            <div className="flex-1">
              <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900">Sample Policy Library</h1>
              <p className="text-gray-600 mt-1">
                Explore our comprehensive collection of sample insurance policies with detailed regulatory information
              </p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Content */}
      <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-12">
        {/* Info Banner */}
        <div className="bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 text-white rounded-2xl p-6 mb-8">
          <div className="flex items-start gap-4">
            <div className="w-12 h-12 bg-white/20 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center flex-shrink-0">
              <Sparkles className="text-white" size={24} />
            </div>
            <div className="flex-1">
              <h2 className="font-bold text-xl mb-2">AI-Powered Policy Analysis</h2>
              <p className="text-blue-100 mb-4">
                Each sample policy includes complete regulatory details, coverage breakdowns, and AI-generated insights.
                Click any policy to explore its comprehensive analysis.
              </p>
              <div className="grid md:grid-cols-3 gap-4 text-sm">
                <div className="bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-lg p-3">
                  <div className="font-bold mb-1">🇹🇷 Turkish Kasko</div>
                  <div className="text-blue-100">3 samples: Budget, Mid-tier, Luxury</div>
                </div>
                <div className="bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-lg p-3">
                  <div className="font-bold mb-1">🇹🇷 Turkish Traffic</div>
                  <div className="text-blue-100">3 samples: Steps 1, 6, and 8</div>
                </div>
                <div className="bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-lg p-3">
                  <div className="font-bold mb-1">🔮 Coming Soon</div>
                  <div className="text-blue-100">US Health, UK Home, and more</div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Policy Picker */}
        <SamplePolicyPicker
          onSelectPolicy={setSelectedPolicy}
          selectedPolicyId={selectedPolicy?.id}
        />

        {/* Sample Details Summary */}
        <div className="mt-12 bg-white rounded-2xl p-8 border border-gray-200">
          <h3 className="font-bold text-gray-900 mb-6">What Makes These Samples Special?</h3>
          
          <div className="grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
            <div>
              <h4 className="font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-3">🇹🇷 Turkish Kasko Samples</h4>
              <div className="space-y-3 text-sm text-gray-700">
                <div className="flex gap-3">
                  <span className="font-bold text-blue-600">Sample 1:</span>
                  <span>Honda Civic - Mid-tier coverage with 30% NCD, comprehensive protection for everyday drivers</span>
                </div>
                <div className="flex gap-3">
                  <span className="font-bold text-blue-600">Sample 2:</span>
                  <span>Fiat Egea - Budget-friendly with basic coverage, perfect for cost-conscious first-time buyers</span>
                </div>
                <div className="flex gap-3">
                  <span className="font-bold text-blue-600">Sample 3:</span>
                  <span>Tesla Model 3 - Luxury EV with maximum coverage including battery protection and depreciation waiver</span>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div>
              <h4 className="font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-3">🇹🇷 Turkish Traffic Samples</h4>
              <div className="space-y-3 text-sm text-gray-700">
                <div className="flex gap-3">
                  <span className="font-bold text-blue-600">Sample 1:</span>
                  <span>Renault Clio - Step 6 (Very Good), 2 years accident-free with 25% discount</span>
                </div>
                <div className="flex gap-3">
                  <span className="font-bold text-amber-600">Sample 2:</span>
                  <span>Toyota Corolla - Step 1 (High Risk), 2 accidents last year with 135% surcharge</span>
                </div>
                <div className="flex gap-3">
                  <span className="font-bold text-purple-600">Sample 3:</span>
                  <span>VW Passat - Step 8 (Elite), 8 years accident-free with 50% discount and unlimited IMM</span>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div className="mt-6 pt-6 border-t border-gray-200">
            <h4 className="font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-2">📊 Comprehensive Data Points</h4>
            <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">
              Each sample includes 50+ data points covering policy identity, coverage limits, premium breakdowns,
              supplementary coverages, exclusions, recourse risks, and regulatory compliance details specific to
              Turkish insurance regulations.
            </p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
```

## File: `components (2)/animations/AnimatedComponents.tsx`
- Bytes: 16,831
- SHA256: `97932e024d1c845aa09ddcbe800cc4f363b76d846e29dc20986f993d937d5d6a`

```tsx
/**
 * Ready-to-use Animated Components for InsureBench
 * 
 * Import these components to add professional animations throughout the app
 * All animations respect prefers-reduced-motion
 */

import { motion, useReducedMotion, AnimatePresence } from 'motion/react';
import { ReactNode } from 'react';

// ========================================
// ANIMATION CONSTANTS
// ========================================

export const DURATIONS = {
  instant: 0.1,
  fast: 0.2,
  normal: 0.3,
  slow: 0.5,
  slower: 0.8,
};

export const EASINGS = {
  // Smooth, professional (recommended for insurance)
  smooth: [0.22, 1, 0.36, 1],
  
  // Standard easing
  easeInOut: [0.4, 0, 0.2, 1],
  
  // Bouncy spring
  spring: { type: "spring" as const, stiffness: 300, damping: 25 },
  
  // Gentle reveal
  gentle: [0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94],
};

// ========================================
// PAGE TRANSITIONS
// ========================================

type PageTransitionProps = {
  children: ReactNode;
  className?: string;
};

export function PageTransition({ children, className = '' }: PageTransitionProps) {
  const shouldReduceMotion = useReducedMotion();
  
  return (
    <motion.div
      initial={{ opacity: 0, y: shouldReduceMotion ? 0 : 20 }}
      animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
      exit={{ opacity: 0, y: shouldReduceMotion ? 0 : -20 }}
      transition={{ 
        duration: shouldReduceMotion ? 0 : DURATIONS.slow,
        ease: EASINGS.smooth 
      }}
      className={className}
    >
      {children}
    </motion.div>
  );
}

// ========================================
// CARD ANIMATIONS
// ========================================

type AnimatedCardProps = {
  children: ReactNode;
  className?: string;
  onClick?: () => void;
  delay?: number;
};

export function AnimatedCard({ children, className = '', onClick, delay = 0 }: AnimatedCardProps) {
  const shouldReduceMotion = useReducedMotion();
  
  return (
    <motion.div
      initial={{ opacity: 0, y: shouldReduceMotion ? 0 : 20 }}
      animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
      whileHover={shouldReduceMotion ? {} : { 
        y: -4, 
        boxShadow: "0 20px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.12)" 
      }}
      whileTap={shouldReduceMotion ? {} : { scale: 0.98 }}
      transition={{ 
        duration: DURATIONS.normal,
        delay: delay,
        ease: EASINGS.smooth 
      }}
      className={className}
      onClick={onClick}
    >
      {children}
    </motion.div>
  );
}

// ========================================
// STAGGERED LIST
// ========================================

type StaggeredListProps = {
  children: ReactNode[];
  className?: string;
  staggerDelay?: number;
};

export function StaggeredList({ children, className = '', staggerDelay = 0.1 }: StaggeredListProps) {
  const shouldReduceMotion = useReducedMotion();
  
  return (
    <motion.div
      variants={{
        hidden: { opacity: 0 },
        show: {
          opacity: 1,
          transition: {
            staggerChildren: shouldReduceMotion ? 0 : staggerDelay,
            delayChildren: shouldReduceMotion ? 0 : 0.1
          }
        }
      }}
      initial="hidden"
      animate="show"
      className={className}
    >
      {children.map((child, i) => (
        <motion.div
          key={i}
          variants={{
            hidden: { opacity: 0, y: shouldReduceMotion ? 0 : 20 },
            show: { opacity: 1, y: 0 }
          }}
        >
          {child}
        </motion.div>
      ))}
    </motion.div>
  );
}

// ========================================
// ANIMATED BUTTON
// ========================================

type AnimatedButtonProps = {
  children: ReactNode;
  className?: string;
  onClick?: () => void;
  disabled?: boolean;
};

export function AnimatedButton({ children, className = '', onClick, disabled = false }: AnimatedButtonProps) {
  const shouldReduceMotion = useReducedMotion();
  
  return (
    <motion.button
      whileHover={!disabled && !shouldReduceMotion ? { scale: 1.02 } : {}}
      whileTap={!disabled && !shouldReduceMotion ? { scale: 0.98 } : {}}
      transition={{ duration: DURATIONS.fast }}
      className={className}
      onClick={onClick}
      disabled={disabled}
    >
      {children}
    </motion.button>
  );
}

// ========================================
// PROGRESS BAR
// ========================================

type AnimatedProgressProps = {
  progress: number; // 0-100
  className?: string;
  barClassName?: string;
};

export function AnimatedProgress({ progress, className = '', barClassName = '' }: AnimatedProgressProps) {
  const shouldReduceMotion = useReducedMotion();
  
  return (
    <div className={`w-full bg-gray-200 rounded-full h-2 overflow-hidden ${className}`}>
      <motion.div
        initial={{ width: 0 }}
        animate={{ width: `${progress}%` }}
        transition={{ 
          duration: shouldReduceMotion ? 0 : DURATIONS.normal,
          ease: "easeOut" 
        }}
        className={`h-full bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 ${barClassName}`}
      />
    </div>
  );
}

// ========================================
// SUCCESS CHECKMARK
// ========================================

type SuccessCheckmarkProps = {
  className?: string;
  size?: number;
};

export function SuccessCheckmark({ className = '', size = 24 }: SuccessCheckmarkProps) {
  const shouldReduceMotion = useReducedMotion();
  
  return (
    <motion.div
      initial={{ scale: 0, rotate: shouldReduceMotion ? 0 : -180 }}
      animate={{ scale: 1, rotate: 0 }}
      transition={{ 
        type: shouldReduceMotion ? "tween" : "spring",
        stiffness: 200,
        damping: 15,
        duration: shouldReduceMotion ? DURATIONS.fast : undefined
      }}
      className={className}
    >
      <svg
        width={size}
        height={size}
        viewBox="0 0 24 24"
        fill="none"
        stroke="currentColor"
        strokeWidth="2"
        strokeLinecap="round"
        strokeLinejoin="round"
      >
        <path d="M22 11.08V12a10 10 0 1 1-5.93-9.14" />
        <polyline points="22 4 12 14.01 9 11.01" />
      </svg>
    </motion.div>
  );
}

// ========================================
// MODAL WITH BACKDROP
// ========================================

type AnimatedModalProps = {
  isOpen: boolean;
  onClose: () => void;
  children: ReactNode;
  className?: string;
};

export function AnimatedModal({ isOpen, onClose, children, className = '' }: AnimatedModalProps) {
  const shouldReduceMotion = useReducedMotion();
  
  return (
    <AnimatePresence>
      {isOpen && (
        <>
          {/* Backdrop */}
          <motion.div
            initial={{ opacity: 0 }}
            animate={{ opacity: 1 }}
            exit={{ opacity: 0 }}
            transition={{ duration: DURATIONS.fast }}
            onClick={onClose}
            className="fixed inset-0 bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-sm z-50"
          />
          
          {/* Modal Content */}
          <motion.div
            initial={{ 
              opacity: 0,
              scale: shouldReduceMotion ? 1 : 0.95,
              y: shouldReduceMotion ? 0 : 20 
            }}
            animate={{ 
              opacity: 1,
              scale: 1,
              y: 0 
            }}
            exit={{ 
              opacity: 0,
              scale: shouldReduceMotion ? 1 : 0.95,
              y: shouldReduceMotion ? 0 : 20 
            }}
            transition={{ 
              duration: shouldReduceMotion ? DURATIONS.fast : DURATIONS.normal,
              ease: EASINGS.smooth 
            }}
            className={`fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center p-4 ${className}`}
            onClick={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}
          >
            {children}
          </motion.div>
        </>
      )}
    </AnimatePresence>
  );
}

// ========================================
// MOBILE BOTTOM SHEET
// ========================================

type BottomSheetProps = {
  isOpen: boolean;
  onClose: () => void;
  children: ReactNode;
  className?: string;
};

export function BottomSheet({ isOpen, onClose, children, className = '' }: BottomSheetProps) {
  const shouldReduceMotion = useReducedMotion();
  
  return (
    <AnimatePresence>
      {isOpen && (
        <>
          {/* Backdrop */}
          <motion.div
            initial={{ opacity: 0 }}
            animate={{ opacity: 1 }}
            exit={{ opacity: 0 }}
            onClick={onClose}
            className="fixed inset-0 bg-black/50 z-50"
          />
          
          {/* Sheet */}
          <motion.div
            initial={{ y: "100%" }}
            animate={{ y: 0 }}
            exit={{ y: "100%" }}
            transition={{
              type: shouldReduceMotion ? "tween" : "spring",
              damping: 30,
              stiffness: 300,
              duration: shouldReduceMotion ? DURATIONS.fast : undefined
            }}
            drag="y"
            dragConstraints={{ top: 0, bottom: 0 }}
            dragElastic={shouldReduceMotion ? 0 : 0.2}
            onDragEnd={(e, { offset, velocity }) => {
              if (offset.y > 100 || velocity.y > 500) {
                onClose();
              }
            }}
            className={`fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 bg-white rounded-t-3xl max-h-[90vh] overflow-y-auto z-50 ${className}`}
          >
            {/* Drag Handle */}
            <div className="flex justify-center pt-3 pb-2">
              <motion.div 
                className="w-12 h-1.5 bg-gray-300 rounded-full"
                whileTap={{ scale: 1.1 }}
              />
            </div>
            
            {children}
          </motion.div>
        </>
      )}
    </AnimatePresence>
  );
}

// ========================================
// SKELETON LOADER
// ========================================

type SkeletonProps = {
  className?: string;
  count?: number;
};

export function Skeleton({ className = '', count = 1 }: SkeletonProps) {
  const shouldReduceMotion = useReducedMotion();
  
  return (
    <>
      {Array.from({ length: count }).map((_, i) => (
        <motion.div
          key={i}
          className={`bg-gradient-to-r from-gray-200 via-gray-100 to-gray-200 rounded ${className}`}
          animate={shouldReduceMotion ? {} : {
            backgroundPosition: ["0% 0%", "100% 0%"]
          }}
          transition={{
            duration: 1.5,
            repeat: Infinity,
            ease: "linear"
          }}
          style={{
            backgroundSize: "200% 100%"
          }}
        />
      ))}
    </>
  );
}

// ========================================
// ANIMATED NUMBER COUNTER
// ========================================

import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';

type NumberCounterProps = {
  value: number;
  duration?: number;
  prefix?: string;
  suffix?: string;
  className?: string;
  decimals?: number;
};

export function NumberCounter({ 
  value, 
  duration = 1500,
  prefix = '',
  suffix = '',
  className = '',
  decimals = 0 
}: NumberCounterProps) {
  const [count, setCount] = useState(0);
  const shouldReduceMotion = useReducedMotion();
  
  useEffect(() => {
    if (shouldReduceMotion) {
      setCount(value);
      return;
    }
    
    const steps = 60;
    const increment = value / steps;
    let current = 0;
    
    const timer = setInterval(() => {
      current += increment;
      if (current >= value) {
        setCount(value);
        clearInterval(timer);
      } else {
        setCount(current);
      }
    }, duration / steps);
    
    return () => clearInterval(timer);
  }, [value, duration, shouldReduceMotion]);
  
  return (
    <motion.span
      initial={{ opacity: 0 }}
      animate={{ opacity: 1 }}
      transition={{ duration: DURATIONS.normal }}
      className={className}
    >
      {prefix}{count.toFixed(decimals)}{suffix}
    </motion.span>
  );
}

// ========================================
// SCROLL REVEAL
// ========================================

type ScrollRevealProps = {
  children: ReactNode;
  className?: string;
  delay?: number;
};

export function ScrollReveal({ children, className = '', delay = 0 }: ScrollRevealProps) {
  const shouldReduceMotion = useReducedMotion();
  
  return (
    <motion.div
      initial={{ opacity: 0, y: shouldReduceMotion ? 0 : 50 }}
      whileInView={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
      viewport={{ once: true, amount: 0.3 }}
      transition={{ 
        duration: shouldReduceMotion ? 0 : DURATIONS.slow,
        delay: shouldReduceMotion ? 0 : delay,
        ease: EASINGS.smooth 
      }}
      className={className}
    >
      {children}
    </motion.div>
  );
}

// ========================================
// BADGE PULSE
// ========================================

type PulseBadgeProps = {
  children: ReactNode;
  className?: string;
  pulseColor?: string;
};

export function PulseBadge({ 
  children, 
  className = '',
  pulseColor = "59, 130, 246" // RGB for blue-500
}: PulseBadgeProps) {
  const shouldReduceMotion = useReducedMotion();
  
  return (
    <motion.div
      animate={shouldReduceMotion ? {} : {
        scale: [1, 1.05, 1],
        boxShadow: [
          `0 0 0 0 rgba(${pulseColor}, 0.4)`,
          `0 0 0 8px rgba(${pulseColor}, 0)`,
          `0 0 0 0 rgba(${pulseColor}, 0)`
        ]
      }}
      transition={{
        duration: 2,
        repeat: Infinity,
        repeatDelay: 1
      }}
      className={className}
    >
      {children}
    </motion.div>
  );
}

// ========================================
// FADE IN
// ========================================

type FadeInProps = {
  children: ReactNode;
  className?: string;
  delay?: number;
};

export function FadeIn({ children, className = '', delay = 0 }: FadeInProps) {
  const shouldReduceMotion = useReducedMotion();
  
  return (
    <motion.div
      initial={{ opacity: 0 }}
      animate={{ opacity: 1 }}
      transition={{ 
        duration: shouldReduceMotion ? 0 : DURATIONS.slow,
        delay: shouldReduceMotion ? 0 : delay 
      }}
      className={className}
    >
      {children}
    </motion.div>
  );
}

// ========================================
// TOOLTIP
// ========================================

type AnimatedTooltipProps = {
  children: ReactNode;
  content: ReactNode;
  className?: string;
};

export function AnimatedTooltip({ children, content, className = '' }: AnimatedTooltipProps) {
  const [isVisible, setIsVisible] = useState(false);
  const shouldReduceMotion = useReducedMotion();
  
  return (
    <div 
      className="relative inline-block"
      onMouseEnter={() => setIsVisible(true)}
      onMouseLeave={() => setIsVisible(false)}
    >
      {children}
      
      <AnimatePresence>
        {isVisible && (
          <motion.div
            initial={{ opacity: 0, y: shouldReduceMotion ? 0 : -10 }}
            animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
            exit={{ opacity: 0, y: shouldReduceMotion ? 0 : -10 }}
            transition={{ duration: DURATIONS.fast }}
            className={`absolute bottom-full left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 mb-2 px-3 py-2 bg-gray-900 text-white text-sm rounded-lg whitespace-nowrap z-50 ${className}`}
          >
            {content}
            {/* Arrow */}
            <div className="absolute top-full left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 -mt-1">
              <div className="border-4 border-transparent border-t-gray-900" />
            </div>
          </motion.div>
        )}
      </AnimatePresence>
    </div>
  );
}

// ========================================
// LOADING SPINNER
// ========================================

type LoadingSpinnerProps = {
  size?: number;
  className?: string;
};

export function LoadingSpinner({ size = 24, className = '' }: LoadingSpinnerProps) {
  const shouldReduceMotion = useReducedMotion();
  
  return (
    <motion.div
      animate={shouldReduceMotion ? {} : { rotate: 360 }}
      transition={{
        duration: 1,
        repeat: Infinity,
        ease: "linear"
      }}
      className={className}
    >
      <svg
        width={size}
        height={size}
        viewBox="0 0 24 24"
        fill="none"
        stroke="currentColor"
        strokeWidth="2"
        strokeLinecap="round"
        strokeLinejoin="round"
      >
        <path d="M21 12a9 9 0 1 1-6.219-8.56" />
      </svg>
    </motion.div>
  );
}

// ========================================
// SCALE ON HOVER
// ========================================

type ScaleOnHoverProps = {
  children: ReactNode;
  scale?: number;
  className?: string;
};

export function ScaleOnHover({ children, scale = 1.05, className = '' }: ScaleOnHoverProps) {
  const shouldReduceMotion = useReducedMotion();
  
  return (
    <motion.div
      whileHover={shouldReduceMotion ? {} : { scale }}
      transition={{ duration: DURATIONS.fast }}
      className={className}
    >
      {children}
    </motion.div>
  );
}
```

## File: `components (2)/Breadcrumb.tsx`
- Bytes: 1,338
- SHA256: `496e5942c0e0e43df76bb06c07fde23bc02610bfc99e00ce26987ebe2edba66d`

```tsx
import { ChevronRight, Home } from 'lucide-react';

export type BreadcrumbItem = {
  label: string;
  onClick?: () => void;
  icon?: any;
};

interface BreadcrumbProps {
  items: BreadcrumbItem[];
}

export function Breadcrumb({ items }: BreadcrumbProps) {
  if (items.length === 0) return null;

  return (
    <nav className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm" aria-label="Breadcrumb">
      {items.map((item, index) => {
        const isLast = index === items.length - 1;
        const Icon = item.icon;

        return (
          <div key={index} className="flex items-center gap-2">
            {item.onClick ? (
              <button
                onClick={item.onClick}
                className="flex items-center gap-1.5 text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900 transition-colors"
              >
                {Icon && <Icon size={16} />}
                <span>{item.label}</span>
              </button>
            ) : (
              <span className={`flex items-center gap-1.5 ${
                isLast ? 'text-gray-900 font-medium' : 'text-gray-600'
              }`}>
                {Icon && <Icon size={16} />}
                <span>{item.label}</span>
              </span>
            )}
            {!isLast && <ChevronRight size={16} className="text-gray-400" />}
          </div>
        );
      })}
    </nav>
  );
}

```

## File: `components (2)/CommandBar.tsx`
- Bytes: 9,671
- SHA256: `128ca7bd438f917f2b01eeb5e6ca50805c7a32471361f0121d037c0abd2fab06`

```tsx
import { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from 'react';
import { 
  Search, Home, LayoutGrid, BarChart, MessageSquare, 
  Upload, Settings, HelpCircle, Phone, FileText,
  ArrowRight, Hash, Calendar, DollarSign, Command
} from 'lucide-react';

type Action = {
  id: string;
  label: string;
  icon: any;
  keywords: string[];
  action: () => void;
  category: 'navigation' | 'actions' | 'policies' | 'help';
  shortcut?: string;
};

interface CommandBarProps {
  isOpen: boolean;
  onClose: () => void;
  onNavigateToLanding: () => void;
  onNavigateToComparison: () => void;
  onNavigateToDashboard: () => void;
  onNavigateToChat: () => void;
  policies?: any[];
  onViewPolicy?: (policyId: string) => void;
}

export function CommandBar({
  isOpen,
  onClose,
  onNavigateToLanding,
  onNavigateToComparison,
  onNavigateToDashboard,
  onNavigateToChat,
  policies = [],
  onViewPolicy
}: CommandBarProps) {
  const [query, setQuery] = useState('');
  const [selectedIndex, setSelectedIndex] = useState(0);

  const actions: Action[] = [
    // Navigation
    {
      id: 'nav-home',
      label: 'Go to Home',
      icon: Home,
      keywords: ['home', 'landing', 'main'],
      action: () => { onNavigateToLanding(); onClose(); },
      category: 'navigation',
      shortcut: 'H'
    },
    {
      id: 'nav-browse',
      label: 'Browse Plans',
      icon: LayoutGrid,
      keywords: ['browse', 'plans', 'marketplace', 'compare'],
      action: () => { onNavigateToComparison(); onClose(); },
      category: 'navigation',
      shortcut: 'B'
    },
    {
      id: 'nav-dashboard',
      label: 'Go to My Policies',
      icon: BarChart,
      keywords: ['dashboard', 'policies', 'my policies', 'overview'],
      action: () => { onNavigateToDashboard(); onClose(); },
      category: 'navigation',
      shortcut: 'D'
    },
    {
      id: 'nav-chat',
      label: 'Open AI Assistant',
      icon: MessageSquare,
      keywords: ['chat', 'ai', 'assistant', 'help', 'ask'],
      action: () => { onNavigateToChat(); onClose(); },
      category: 'navigation',
      shortcut: 'A'
    },
    // Actions
    {
      id: 'action-upload',
      label: 'Upload New Policy',
      icon: Upload,
      keywords: ['upload', 'add', 'new', 'policy', 'document'],
      action: () => { onNavigateToComparison(); onClose(); },
      category: 'actions',
      shortcut: 'U'
    },
    {
      id: 'action-settings',
      label: 'Open Settings',
      icon: Settings,
      keywords: ['settings', 'preferences', 'config'],
      action: () => { onClose(); },
      category: 'actions',
      shortcut: 'S'
    },
    // Help
    {
      id: 'help-support',
      label: 'Contact Support',
      icon: Phone,
      keywords: ['support', 'help', 'contact', 'call'],
      action: () => { onClose(); },
      category: 'help'
    },
    {
      id: 'help-faq',
      label: 'Help Center',
      icon: HelpCircle,
      keywords: ['help', 'faq', 'guide', 'docs'],
      action: () => { onClose(); },
      category: 'help'
    }
  ];

  // Add policy actions
  const policyActions: Action[] = policies.map(policy => ({
    id: `policy-${policy.id}`,
    label: `${policy.provider} - ${policy.type}`,
    icon: FileText,
    keywords: [
      policy.provider?.toLowerCase() || '',
      policy.type?.toLowerCase() || '',
      policy.policyNumber?.toLowerCase() || '',
      'policy'
    ],
    action: () => { 
      if (onViewPolicy) {
        onViewPolicy(policy.id); 
        onClose(); 
      }
    },
    category: 'policies'
  }));

  const allActions = [...actions, ...policyActions];

  const filteredActions = query.trim() === ''
    ? allActions
    : allActions.filter(action =>
        action.label.toLowerCase().includes(query.toLowerCase()) ||
        action.keywords.some(keyword => keyword.includes(query.toLowerCase()))
      );

  const groupedActions = filteredActions.reduce((acc, action) => {
    if (!acc[action.category]) acc[action.category] = [];
    acc[action.category].push(action);
    return acc;
  }, {} as Record<string, Action[]>);

  const handleKeyDown = useCallback((e: KeyboardEvent) => {
    if (!isOpen) return;

    if (e.key === 'ArrowDown') {
      e.preventDefault();
      setSelectedIndex(prev => (prev + 1) % filteredActions.length);
    } else if (e.key === 'ArrowUp') {
      e.preventDefault();
      setSelectedIndex(prev => (prev - 1 + filteredActions.length) % filteredActions.length);
    } else if (e.key === 'Enter') {
      e.preventDefault();
      filteredActions[selectedIndex]?.action();
    } else if (e.key === 'Escape') {
      e.preventDefault();
      onClose();
    }
  }, [isOpen, filteredActions, selectedIndex, onClose]);

  useEffect(() => {
    document.addEventListener('keydown', handleKeyDown);
    return () => document.removeEventListener('keydown', handleKeyDown);
  }, [handleKeyDown]);

  useEffect(() => {
    setSelectedIndex(0);
  }, [query]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (isOpen) {
      setQuery('');
      setSelectedIndex(0);
    }
  }, [isOpen]);

  if (!isOpen) return null;

  const categoryLabels = {
    navigation: 'Navigation',
    actions: 'Actions',
    policies: 'Your Policies',
    help: 'Help & Support'
  };

  let currentIndex = 0;

  return (
    <>
      {/* Backdrop */}
      <div 
        className="fixed inset-0 bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-sm z-[100]"
        onClick={onClose}
      />

      {/* Command Bar */}
      <div className="fixed top-[20vh] left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 w-full max-w-2xl z-[101] px-4">
        <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-2xl border border-gray-200 overflow-hidden">
          {/* Search Input */}
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-4 border-b border-gray-200">
            <Search size={20} className="text-gray-400" />
            <input
              type="text"
              placeholder="Type a command or search..."
              value={query}
              onChange={(e) => setQuery(e.target.value)}
              className="flex-1 bg-transparent outline-none text-gray-900 placeholder-gray-400"
              autoFocus
            />
            <div className="flex items-center gap-1 text-xs text-gray-400">
              <kbd className="px-2 py-1 bg-gray-100 rounded border border-gray-300">ESC</kbd>
              <span>to close</span>
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* Results */}
          <div className="max-h-[60vh] overflow-y-auto">
            {filteredActions.length === 0 ? (
              <div className="px-4 py-12 text-center text-gray-500">
                <Search size={48} className="mx-auto mb-3 text-gray-300" />
                <p className="font-medium">No results found</p>
                <p className="text-sm mt-1">Try searching for something else</p>
              </div>
            ) : (
              <div className="py-2">
                {Object.entries(groupedActions).map(([category, items]) => (
                  <div key={category} className="mb-4 last:mb-0">
                    <div className="px-4 py-2 text-xs font-semibold text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider">
                      {categoryLabels[category as keyof typeof categoryLabels]}
                    </div>
                    {items.map((action) => {
                      const isSelected = currentIndex === selectedIndex;
                      const index = currentIndex++;
                      const Icon = action.icon;

                      return (
                        <button
                          key={action.id}
                          onClick={action.action}
                          onMouseEnter={() => setSelectedIndex(index)}
                          className={`w-full flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 transition-colors ${
                            isSelected
                              ? 'bg-slate-100'
                              : 'hover:bg-gray-50'
                          }`}
                        >
                          <Icon size={18} className="text-gray-600" />
                          <span className="flex-1 text-left text-sm text-gray-900">
                            {action.label}
                          </span>
                          {action.shortcut && (
                            <kbd className="px-2 py-1 text-xs bg-gray-100 rounded border border-gray-300 text-gray-600">
                              {action.shortcut}
                            </kbd>
                          )}
                          <ArrowRight size={16} className="text-gray-400" />
                        </button>
                      );
                    })}
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>
            )}
          </div>

          {/* Footer */}
          <div className="px-4 py-3 bg-gray-50 border-t border-gray-200 flex items-center justify-between text-xs text-gray-500">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
                <kbd className="px-1.5 py-0.5 bg-white rounded border border-gray-300">↑</kbd>
                <kbd className="px-1.5 py-0.5 bg-white rounded border border-gray-300">↓</kbd>
                <span>Navigate</span>
              </div>
              <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
                <kbd className="px-1.5 py-0.5 bg-white rounded border border-gray-300">↵</kbd>
                <span>Select</span>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
              <Command size={12} />
              <span>Quick Actions</span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </>
  );
}

```

## File: `components (2)/ComparisonResults.tsx`
- Bytes: 11,259
- SHA256: `abce022852850f9329d958aecd55ab456bd06168757dfc94bff3d674b3c567fc`

```tsx
import { useState } from 'react';
import { ArrowLeft, Shield, DollarSign, TrendingDown, Award, Share2, Download, Plus } from 'lucide-react';
import { Policy } from '../App';

type ComparisonResultsProps = {
  policies: Policy[];
  onBack: () => void;
};

export function ComparisonResults({ policies, onBack }: ComparisonResultsProps) {
  const lowestPremium = Math.min(...policies.map(p => p.premium));
  const highestCoverage = Math.max(...policies.map(p => p.coverage));
  const lowestDeductible = Math.min(...policies.map(p => p.deductible));

  const getBestPolicy = () => {
    return policies.reduce((best, current) => {
      const currentScore = (lowestPremium / current.premium) + 
                          (current.coverage / highestCoverage) + 
                          (lowestDeductible / current.deductible);
      const bestScore = (lowestPremium / best.premium) + 
                       (best.coverage / highestCoverage) + 
                       (lowestDeductible / best.deductible);
      return currentScore > bestScore ? current : best;
    });
  };

  const bestPolicy = getBestPolicy();
  const maxPremium = Math.max(...policies.map(p => p.premium));
  const potentialSavings = (maxPremium - lowestPremium) * 12;

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50">
      {/* Header */}
      <div className="bg-white border-b border-gray-200 sticky top-0 z-10">
        <div className="container mx-auto px-4 py-4">
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
            <button
              onClick={onBack}
              className="flex items-center gap-2 text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900 transition-colors"
            >
              <ArrowLeft size={20} />
              <span>Back to Home</span>
            </button>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
              <div className="w-8 h-8 bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center">
                <Shield className="text-white" size={16} />
              </div>
              <span className="font-semibold">InsureBench</span>
            </div>
            <div className="flex gap-2">
              <button className="flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors text-sm">
                <Share2 size={16} />
                <span className="hidden sm:inline">Share</span>
              </button>
              <button className="flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 bg-blue-600 text-white rounded-lg hover:bg-blue-700 transition-colors text-sm">
                <Download size={16} />
                <span className="hidden sm:inline">Export</span>
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div className="container mx-auto px-4 py-8 space-y-8">
        {/* Results Summary */}
        <div>
          <h1 className="text-2xl md:text-3xl mb-2">Your Comparison Results</h1>
          <p className="text-gray-600">{policies.length} policies analyzed</p>
        </div>

        {/* Best Option Card */}
        <div className="bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 text-white rounded-2xl p-6 md:p-8 shadow-xl">
          <div className="flex items-start gap-4 mb-4">
            <div className="w-12 h-12 bg-white/20 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center flex-shrink-0">
              <Award size={24} />
            </div>
            <div className="flex-1">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
                <h2 className="text-xl md:text-2xl">Best Option for You</h2>
                <span className="px-3 py-1 bg-yellow-400 text-yellow-900 rounded-full text-sm font-semibold">Recommended</span>
              </div>
              <p className="text-blue-100 text-lg">
                <span className="font-semibold text-white">{bestPolicy.provider}</span> provides the best overall value 
                based on coverage, premium, and deductible analysis.
              </p>
            </div>
          </div>
          
          {potentialSavings > 0 && (
            <div className="bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-xl p-4 flex flex-col sm:flex-row items-center justify-between gap-4">
              <div>
                <div className="text-sm text-blue-100 mb-1">You could save annually</div>
                <div className="text-3xl md:text-4xl font-bold text-yellow-300">${potentialSavings.toLocaleString()}</div>
              </div>
              <button className="w-full sm:w-auto px-6 py-3 bg-white text-blue-600 rounded-lg hover:bg-blue-50 transition-colors font-semibold">
                Get This Policy
              </button>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>

        {/* Policy Cards */}
        <div className="grid md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
          {policies.map((policy) => {
            const isBest = policy.id === bestPolicy.id;
            
            return (
              <div
                key={policy.id}
                className={`
                  bg-white rounded-xl shadow-md hover:shadow-lg transition-all overflow-hidden
                  ${isBest ? 'ring-2 ring-blue-500 ring-offset-2' : ''}
                `}
              >
                <div className={`p-6 ${isBest ? 'bg-blue-50' : 'bg-gray-50'} border-b`}>
                  <div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-3">
                    <div>
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-1">
                        <h3 className="text-xl font-semibold">{policy.provider}</h3>
                        {isBest && (
                          <Award className="text-blue-600" size={18} />
                        )}
                      </div>
                      <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">{policy.type} Insurance</p>
                    </div>
                    {isBest && (
                      <span className="px-2 py-1 bg-blue-600 text-white text-xs rounded font-semibold">Best Value</span>
                    )}
                  </div>

                  <div>
                    <div className="text-3xl font-bold mb-1">
                      ${policy.premium}
                      <span className="text-lg font-normal text-gray-600">/mo</span>
                    </div>
                    <div className="text-sm text-gray-600">${(policy.premium * 12).toLocaleString()}/year</div>
                  </div>
                </div>

                <div className="p-6 space-y-4">
                  <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-4 bg-gray-50 rounded-lg">
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                      <div className="w-10 h-10 bg-blue-100 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center">
                        <Shield className="text-blue-600" size={20} />
                      </div>
                      <div>
                        <div className="text-xs text-gray-600">Coverage</div>
                        <div className="font-semibold">${policy.coverage.toLocaleString()}</div>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                    {policy.coverage === highestCoverage && (
                      <span className="text-xs px-2 py-1 bg-blue-100 text-blue-700 rounded">Highest</span>
                    )}
                  </div>

                  <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-4 bg-gray-50 rounded-lg">
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                      <div className="w-10 h-10 bg-purple-100 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center">
                        <DollarSign className="text-purple-600" size={20} />
                      </div>
                      <div>
                        <div className="text-xs text-gray-600">Deductible</div>
                        <div className="font-semibold">${policy.deductible}</div>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                    {policy.deductible === lowestDeductible && (
                      <span className="text-xs px-2 py-1 bg-purple-100 text-purple-700 rounded">Lowest</span>
                    )}
                  </div>

                  <button className={`w-full py-3 rounded-lg font-semibold transition-colors ${
                    isBest 
                      ? 'bg-blue-600 text-white hover:bg-blue-700' 
                      : 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-200'
                  }`}>
                    {isBest ? 'Select This Policy' : 'View Details'}
                  </button>
                </div>
              </div>
            );
          })}

          <button className="bg-white border-2 border-dashed border-gray-300 rounded-xl p-8 hover:border-blue-400 hover:bg-blue-50 transition-all flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-3 text-gray-500 hover:text-blue-600 min-h-[400px]">
            <div className="w-16 h-16 bg-gray-100 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center">
              <Plus size={32} />
            </div>
            <div className="text-center">
              <div className="font-semibold mb-1">Compare More Policies</div>
              <div className="text-sm">Upload additional documents</div>
            </div>
          </button>
        </div>

        {/* Stats Summary */}
        <div className="grid md:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
          <div className="bg-white rounded-xl p-6 shadow-md">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-3">
              <div className="w-12 h-12 bg-green-100 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center">
                <TrendingDown className="text-green-600" size={24} />
              </div>
              <div className="text-sm text-gray-600">Best Annual Rate</div>
            </div>
            <div className="text-3xl font-bold mb-1">${(lowestPremium * 12).toLocaleString()}</div>
            <div className="text-sm text-gray-500">Save up to ${potentialSavings.toLocaleString()}/year</div>
          </div>

          <div className="bg-white rounded-xl p-6 shadow-md">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-3">
              <div className="w-12 h-12 bg-blue-100 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center">
                <Shield className="text-blue-600" size={24} />
              </div>
              <div className="text-sm text-gray-600">Maximum Coverage</div>
            </div>
            <div className="text-3xl font-bold mb-1">${highestCoverage.toLocaleString()}</div>
            <div className="text-sm text-gray-500">Best protection available</div>
          </div>

          <div className="bg-white rounded-xl p-6 shadow-md">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-3">
              <div className="w-12 h-12 bg-purple-100 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center">
                <DollarSign className="text-purple-600" size={24} />
              </div>
              <div className="text-sm text-gray-600">Lowest Deductible</div>
            </div>
            <div className="text-3xl font-bold mb-1">${lowestDeductible}</div>
            <div className="text-sm text-gray-500">Minimum out-of-pocket</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
```

## File: `components (2)/CoverageDetails.tsx`
