```tsx
import {
  Shield, CheckCircle, AlertCircle, Car, Users, Heart, Home as HomeIcon,
  Sparkles, FileText, Phone, Info, AlertTriangle, X
} from 'lucide-react';
import { BasePolicy } from './insurance-lines';

interface CoverageDetailsProps {
  policy: BasePolicy & {
    extendedData?: any;
    country?: string;
    insuranceLine?: string;
  };
}

export function CoverageDetails({ policy }: CoverageDetailsProps) {
  const formatCurrency = (amount: number) => {
    return new Intl.NumberFormat('tr-TR', {
      style: 'currency',
      currency: 'TRY',
      minimumFractionDigits: 0,
      maximumFractionDigits: 0
    }).format(amount);
  };

  const formatDate = (dateString: string) => {
    return new Date(dateString).toLocaleDateString('tr-TR', {
      year: 'numeric',
      month: 'long',
      day: 'numeric'
    });
  };

  const isAutoKasko = policy.type.toLowerCase().includes('auto') || 
                      policy.type.toLowerCase().includes('kasko') || 
                      policy.insuranceLine === 'kasko';

  const isTraffic = policy.type.toLowerCase().includes('traffic') || 
                    policy.insuranceLine === 'traffic';

  const isHealth = policy.type.toLowerCase().includes('health');
  const isHome = policy.type.toLowerCase().includes('home');
  const isLife = policy.type.toLowerCase().includes('life');

  return (
    <div className="space-y-6">
      {/* Coverage Overview Header */}
      <div className="bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 text-white rounded-3xl p-8">
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-4">
          <div>
            <h2 className="text-2xl mb-2">Coverage Details</h2>
            <p className="text-blue-100">Comprehensive breakdown of your policy coverage</p>
          </div>
          <Shield className="w-16 h-16 text-blue-200 opacity-50" />
        </div>
        <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-6 mt-6">
          <div className="bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-2xl p-4">
            <p className="text-blue-100 text-sm mb-1">Total Coverage</p>
            <p className="text-2xl">{formatCurrency(policy.coverage)}</p>
          </div>
          <div className="bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-2xl p-4">
            <p className="text-blue-100 text-sm mb-1">Your Deductible</p>
            <p className="text-2xl">{formatCurrency(policy.deductible)}</p>
          </div>
          <div className="bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-2xl p-4">
            <p className="text-blue-100 text-sm mb-1">Coverage Type</p>
            <p className="text-2xl capitalize">{policy.type}</p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Auto/Kasko Coverage */}
      {isAutoKasko && (
        <>
          {/* Main Coverage Sections */}
          <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
            <h3 className="text-slate-900 mb-6 flex items-center gap-2">
              <Car className="w-6 h-6 text-blue-600" />
              Vehicle Damage Coverage (Kasko)
            </h3>
            
            <div className="space-y-4">
              {/* Own Damage */}
              <div className="p-4 bg-blue-50 rounded-2xl border border-blue-200">
                <div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-3">
                  <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                    <CheckCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-blue-600 mt-1" />
                    <div>
                      <h4 className="text-slate-900 mb-1">Own Vehicle Damage</h4>
                      <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm">Coverage for damage to your own vehicle from accidents, collision, or overturning</p>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <span className="text-blue-700 whitespace-nowrap ml-4">
                    {formatCurrency(policy.coverage)}
                  </span>
                </div>
                <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4 mt-3 pl-8">
                  <div className="text-sm">
                    <p className="text-slate-500">Deductible Rate</p>
                    <p className="text-slate-900">2% (Min {formatCurrency(policy.deductible)})</p>
                  </div>
                  <div className="text-sm">
                    <p className="text-slate-500">Coverage Territory</p>
                    <p className="text-slate-900">Turkey + EU Countries</p>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>

              {/* Theft Coverage */}
              <div className="p-4 bg-emerald-50 rounded-2xl border border-emerald-200">
                <div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-3">
                  <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                    <CheckCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-emerald-600 mt-1" />
                    <div>
                      <h4 className="text-slate-900 mb-1">Theft & Attempted Theft</h4>
                      <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm">Full coverage for vehicle theft or damage during theft attempts</p>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <span className="text-emerald-700 whitespace-nowrap ml-4">
                    {formatCurrency(policy.coverage)}
                  </span>
                </div>
                <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4 mt-3 pl-8">
                  <div className="text-sm">
                    <p className="text-slate-500">Waiting Period</p>
                    <p className="text-slate-900">15 days from policy start</p>
                  </div>
                  <div className="text-sm">
                    <p className="text-slate-500">Required Security</p>
                    <p className="text-slate-900">Factory alarm system</p>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>

              {/* Fire & Natural Disasters */}
              <div className="p-4 bg-orange-50 rounded-2xl border border-orange-200">
                <div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-3">
                  <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                    <CheckCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-orange-600 mt-1" />
                    <div>
                      <h4 className="text-slate-900 mb-1">Fire & Natural Disasters</h4>
                      <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm">Fire, lightning, explosion, earthquake, flood, storm damage</p>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <span className="text-orange-700 whitespace-nowrap ml-4">
                    {formatCurrency(policy.coverage)}
                  </span>
                </div>
                <div className="mt-3 pl-8">
                  <p className="text-sm text-slate-600">
                    <span className="text-slate-900">Covered Events:</span> Fire, lightning strike, explosion, earthquake, 
                    landslide, flood, storm, hail, snow pressure, volcanic eruption
                  </p>
                </div>
              </div>

              {/* Glass Breakage */}
              <div className="p-4 bg-purple-50 rounded-2xl border border-purple-200">
                <div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-3">
                  <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                    <CheckCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-purple-600 mt-1" />
                    <div>
                      <h4 className="text-slate-900 mb-1">Glass Breakage</h4>
                      <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm">All vehicle glass including windshield, windows, mirrors</p>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <span className="text-purple-700 whitespace-nowrap ml-4">
                    Full Coverage
                  </span>
                </div>
                <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4 mt-3 pl-8">
                  <div className="text-sm">
                    <p className="text-slate-500">Deductible</p>
                    <p className="text-slate-900">No deductible</p>
                  </div>
                  <div className="text-sm">
                    <p className="text-slate-500">Annual Limit</p>
                    <p className="text-slate-900">Unlimited repairs</p>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* Third Party Coverage */}
          <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
            <h3 className="text-slate-900 mb-6 flex items-center gap-2">
              <Users className="w-6 h-6 text-indigo-600" />
              Third Party Liability Coverage
            </h3>
            
            <div className="space-y-4">
              <div className="p-4 bg-indigo-50 rounded-2xl border border-indigo-200">
                <div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-3">
                  <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                    <CheckCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-indigo-600 mt-1" />
                    <div>
                      <h4 className="text-slate-900 mb-1">Bodily Injury Liability</h4>
                      <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm">Coverage for injuries to others caused by your vehicle</p>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <span className="text-indigo-700 whitespace-nowrap ml-4">
                    Unlimited
                  </span>
                </div>
                <div className="mt-3 pl-8 text-sm">
                  <p className="text-slate-600">
                    Provided through mandatory Traffic Insurance (IMM). No limit on medical expenses, 
                    disability compensation, or death benefits.
                  </p>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div className="p-4 bg-indigo-50 rounded-2xl border border-indigo-200">
                <div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-3">
                  <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                    <CheckCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-indigo-600 mt-1" />
                    <div>
                      <h4 className="text-slate-900 mb-1">Property Damage Liability</h4>
                      <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm">Damage to other vehicles and property</p>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <span className="text-indigo-700 whitespace-nowrap ml-4">
                    Unlimited
                  </span>
                </div>
                <div className="mt-3 pl-8 text-sm">
                  <p className="text-slate-600">
                    Covers damage to third-party vehicles, buildings, and property. Includes legal defense costs.
                  </p>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* Additional Coverage & Benefits */}
          <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
            <h3 className="text-slate-900 mb-6 flex items-center gap-2">
              <Sparkles className="w-6 h-6 text-amber-600" />
              Additional Coverage & Benefits
            </h3>
            
            <div className="grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
              <div className="p-4 bg-amber-50 rounded-2xl border border-amber-200">
                <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                  <CheckCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-amber-600 mt-0.5" />
                  <div>
                    <h4 className="text-slate-900 text-sm mb-1">Roadside Assistance</h4>
                    <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm">24/7 towing, battery jump, fuel delivery, tire change</p>
                    <p className="text-amber-700 text-sm mt-1">Limit: 5 services/year</p>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div className="p-4 bg-amber-50 rounded-2xl border border-amber-200">
                <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                  <CheckCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-amber-600 mt-0.5" />
                  <div>
                    <h4 className="text-slate-900 text-sm mb-1">Replacement Vehicle</h4>
                    <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm">Rental car during repairs after total loss</p>
                    <p className="text-amber-700 text-sm mt-1">Limit: {formatCurrency(5000)}, max 10 days</p>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div className="p-4 bg-amber-50 rounded-2xl border border-amber-200">
                <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                  <CheckCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-amber-600 mt-0.5" />
                  <div>
                    <h4 className="text-slate-900 text-sm mb-1">Key Replacement</h4>
                    <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm">Lost or stolen key replacement including smart keys</p>
                    <p className="text-amber-700 text-sm mt-1">Limit: {formatCurrency(3000)}</p>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div className="p-4 bg-amber-50 rounded-2xl border border-amber-200">
                <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                  <CheckCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-amber-600 mt-0.5" />
                  <div>
                    <h4 className="text-slate-900 text-sm mb-1">Accessories Coverage</h4>
                    <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm">Aftermarket accessories, audio system, navigation</p>
                    <p className="text-amber-700 text-sm mt-1">Limit: {formatCurrency(10000)}</p>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div className="p-4 bg-amber-50 rounded-2xl border border-amber-200">
                <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                  <CheckCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-amber-600 mt-0.5" />
                  <div>
                    <h4 className="text-slate-900 text-sm mb-1">Mini Kasko (Abroad)</h4>
                    <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm">Limited coverage in EU countries for 90 days/year</p>
                    <p className="text-amber-700 text-sm mt-1">Covers: Theft, fire, glass breakage</p>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div className="p-4 bg-amber-50 rounded-2xl border border-amber-200">
                <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                  <CheckCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-amber-600 mt-0.5" />
                  <div>
                    <h4 className="text-slate-900 text-sm mb-1">Legal Protection</h4>
                    <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm">Legal defense and court costs in traffic disputes</p>
                    <p className="text-amber-700 text-sm mt-1">Limit: {formatCurrency(15000)}</p>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* Exclusions */}
          <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
            <h3 className="text-slate-900 mb-6 flex items-center gap-2">
              <AlertCircle className="w-6 h-6 text-red-600" />
              Exclusions & Limitations
            </h3>
            
            <div className="space-y-3">
              <div className="flex items-start gap-3 p-4 bg-red-50 rounded-2xl border border-red-200">
                <X className="w-5 h-5 text-red-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
                <div className="text-sm">
                  <p className="text-slate-900 mb-1">Driving Under Influence</p>
                  <p className="text-slate-600">No coverage if driver is under influence of alcohol (&gt;0.5‰) or drugs</p>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div className="flex items-start gap-3 p-4 bg-red-50 rounded-2xl border border-red-200">
                <X className="w-5 h-5 text-red-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
                <div className="text-sm">
                  <p className="text-slate-900 mb-1">Unlicensed Driver</p>
                  <p className="text-slate-600">Driver must have valid license for vehicle class</p>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div className="flex items-start gap-3 p-4 bg-red-50 rounded-2xl border border-red-200">
                <X className="w-5 h-5 text-red-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
                <div className="text-sm">
                  <p className="text-slate-900 mb-1">Intentional Damage</p>
                  <p className="text-slate-600">Damage caused intentionally by insured or driver</p>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div className="flex items-start gap-3 p-4 bg-red-50 rounded-2xl border border-red-200">
                <X className="w-5 h-5 text-red-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
                <div className="text-sm">
                  <p className="text-slate-900 mb-1">War & Nuclear Events</p>
                  <p className="text-slate-600">War, terrorism, nuclear incidents, riots, civil unrest</p>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div className="flex items-start gap-3 p-4 bg-red-50 rounded-2xl border border-red-200">
                <X className="w-5 h-5 text-red-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
                <div className="text-sm">
                  <p className="text-slate-900 mb-1">Commercial Use</p>
                  <p className="text-slate-600">No coverage if used for taxi, delivery, or commercial purposes (unless specified)</p>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div className="flex items-start gap-3 p-4 bg-red-50 rounded-2xl border border-red-200">
                <X className="w-5 h-5 text-red-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
                <div className="text-sm">
                  <p className="text-slate-900 mb-1">Wear & Tear</p>
                  <p className="text-slate-600">Normal wear, mechanical/electrical failures, lack of maintenance</p>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </>
      )}

      {/* Traffic Insurance Coverage */}
      {isTraffic && (
        <>
          <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
            <h3 className="text-slate-900 mb-6 flex items-center gap-2">
              <Shield className="w-6 h-6 text-blue-600" />
              Mandatory Traffic Insurance (IMM)
            </h3>
            
            <div className="space-y-4">
              <div className="p-4 bg-blue-50 rounded-2xl border border-blue-200">
                <div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-3">
                  <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                    <CheckCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-blue-600 mt-1" />
                    <div>
                      <h4 className="text-slate-900 mb-1">Third Party Bodily Injury</h4>
                      <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm">Unlimited coverage for injuries caused to others</p>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <span className="text-blue-700 whitespace-nowrap ml-4">Unlimited</span>
                </div>
                <div className="mt-3 pl-8 space-y-2">
                  <div className="flex justify-between text-sm">
                    <span className="text-slate-600">Death per person:</span>
                    <span className="text-slate-900">Unlimited</span>
                  </div>
                  <div className="flex justify-between text-sm">
                    <span className="text-slate-600">Permanent disability:</span>
                    <span className="text-slate-900">Unlimited</span>
                  </div>
                  <div className="flex justify-between text-sm">
                    <span className="text-slate-600">Medical expenses:</span>
                    <span className="text-slate-900">Unlimited</span>
                  </div>
                  <div className="flex justify-between text-sm">
                    <span className="text-slate-600">Temporary disability:</span>
                    <span className="text-slate-900">Unlimited</span>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div className="p-4 bg-emerald-50 rounded-2xl border border-emerald-200">
                <div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-3">
                  <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                    <CheckCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-emerald-600 mt-1" />
                    <div>
                      <h4 className="text-slate-900 mb-1">Third Party Property Damage</h4>
                      <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm">Damage to other vehicles and property</p>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <span className="text-emerald-700 whitespace-nowrap ml-4">Unlimited</span>
                </div>
                <div className="mt-3 pl-8 space-y-2">
                  <div className="flex justify-between text-sm">
                    <span className="text-slate-600">Vehicle damage:</span>
                    <span className="text-slate-900">Unlimited</span>
                  </div>
                  <div className="flex justify-between text-sm">
                    <span className="text-slate-600">Property damage:</span>
                    <span className="text-slate-900">Unlimited</span>
                  </div>
                  <div className="flex justify-between text-sm">
                    <span className="text-slate-600">Legal costs:</span>
                    <span className="text-slate-900">Included</span>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div className="p-4 bg-purple-50 rounded-2xl border border-purple-200">
                <div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-3">
                  <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                    <CheckCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-purple-600 mt-1" />
                    <div>
                      <h4 className="text-slate-900 mb-1">Passenger Coverage</h4>
                      <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm">Coverage for passengers in your vehicle</p>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <span className="text-purple-700 whitespace-nowrap ml-4">
                    {formatCurrency(100000)}/person
                  </span>
                </div>
                <div className="mt-3 pl-8 text-sm">
                  <p className="text-slate-600">
                    Covers medical expenses, disability, and death for passengers. Max 5 passengers covered.
                  </p>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
            <h3 className="text-slate-900 mb-6 flex items-center gap-2">
              <Info className="w-6 h-6 text-indigo-600" />
              Coverage Territory & Validity
            </h3>
            
            <div className="space-y-3">
              <div className="p-4 bg-slate-50 rounded-2xl">
                <div className="flex justify-between mb-2">
                  <span className="text-slate-700">Coverage Territory:</span>
                  <span className="text-slate-900">Republic of Turkey</span>
                </div>
                <div className="flex justify-between mb-2">
                  <span className="text-slate-700">International Coverage:</span>
                  <span className="text-slate-900">Green Card required for EU</span>
                </div>
                <div className="flex justify-between mb-2">
                  <span className="text-slate-700">Policy Valid Until:</span>
                  <span className="text-slate-900">{formatDate(policy.endDate)}</span>
                </div>
                <div className="flex justify-between">
                  <span className="text-slate-700">Automatic Extension:</span>
                  <span className="text-slate-900">60 days grace period</span>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
            <h3 className="text-slate-900 mb-6 flex items-center gap-2">
              <AlertTriangle className="w-6 h-6 text-amber-600" />
              Important Notes
            </h3>
            
            <div className="space-y-3">
              <div className="flex items-start gap-3 p-4 bg-amber-50 rounded-2xl border border-amber-200">
                <Info className="w-5 h-5 text-amber-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
                <div className="text-sm">
                  <p className="text-slate-900 mb-1">No Deductible</p>
                  <p className="text-slate-600">Traffic insurance has no deductible for third-party claims</p>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div className="flex items-start gap-3 p-4 bg-amber-50 rounded-2xl border border-amber-200">
                <Info className="w-5 h-5 text-amber-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
                <div className="text-sm">
                  <p className="text-slate-900 mb-1">Own Damage Not Covered</p>
                  <p className="text-slate-600">Traffic insurance does NOT cover damage to your own vehicle. Consider Kasko for comprehensive coverage.</p>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div className="flex items-start gap-3 p-4 bg-amber-50 rounded-2xl border border-amber-200">
                <Info className="w-5 h-5 text-amber-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
                <div className="text-sm">
                  <p className="text-slate-900 mb-1">Mandatory by Law</p>
                  <p className="text-slate-600">Traffic insurance is legally required for all motor vehicles in Turkey. Driving without valid insurance carries heavy fines.</p>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </>
      )}

      {/* Health Insurance Coverage */}
      {isHealth && (
        <>
          <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
            <h3 className="text-slate-900 mb-6 flex items-center gap-2">
              <Heart className="w-6 h-6 text-rose-600" />
              Medical Coverage
            </h3>
            
            <div className="space-y-4">
              <div className="p-4 bg-rose-50 rounded-2xl border border-rose-200">
                <div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-3">
                  <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                    <CheckCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-rose-600 mt-1" />
                    <div>
                      <h4 className="text-slate-900 mb-1">Inpatient Treatment</h4>
                      <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm">Hospital stays, surgeries, and intensive care</p>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <span className="text-rose-700 whitespace-nowrap ml-4">{formatCurrency(policy.coverage)}</span>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div className="p-4 bg-blue-50 rounded-2xl border border-blue-200">
                <div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-3">
                  <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                    <CheckCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-blue-600 mt-1" />
                    <div>
                      <h4 className="text-slate-900 mb-1">Outpatient Treatment</h4>
                      <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm">Doctor visits, diagnostics, medications</p>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <span className="text-blue-700 whitespace-nowrap ml-4">{formatCurrency(policy.coverage * 0.3)}</span>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div className="p-4 bg-purple-50 rounded-2xl border border-purple-200">
                <div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-3">
                  <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                    <CheckCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-purple-600 mt-1" />
                    <div>
                      <h4 className="text-slate-900 mb-1">Emergency Services</h4>
                      <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm">24/7 emergency room and ambulance</p>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <span className="text-purple-700 whitespace-nowrap ml-4">Unlimited</span>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div className="p-4 bg-emerald-50 rounded-2xl border border-emerald-200">
                <div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-3">
                  <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                    <CheckCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-emerald-600 mt-1" />
                    <div>
                      <h4 className="text-slate-900 mb-1">Prescription Drugs</h4>
                      <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm">Medications prescribed by doctors</p>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <span className="text-emerald-700 whitespace-nowrap ml-4">80% coverage</span>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </>
      )}

      {/* Home Insurance Coverage */}
      {isHome && (
        <>
          <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
            <h3 className="text-slate-900 mb-6 flex items-center gap-2">
              <HomeIcon className="w-6 h-6 text-blue-600" />
              Property Coverage
            </h3>
            
            <div className="space-y-4">
              <div className="p-4 bg-blue-50 rounded-2xl border border-blue-200">
                <div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-3">
                  <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                    <CheckCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-blue-600 mt-1" />
                    <div>
                      <h4 className="text-slate-900 mb-1">Building Structure</h4>
                      <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm">Walls, roof, floors, fixed installations</p>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <span className="text-blue-700 whitespace-nowrap ml-4">{formatCurrency(policy.coverage * 0.7)}</span>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div className="p-4 bg-emerald-50 rounded-2xl border border-emerald-200">
                <div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-3">
                  <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                    <CheckCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-emerald-600 mt-1" />
                    <div>
                      <h4 className="text-slate-900 mb-1">Contents & Belongings</h4>
                      <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm">Furniture, electronics, personal items</p>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <span className="text-emerald-700 whitespace-nowrap ml-4">{formatCurrency(policy.coverage * 0.3)}</span>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div className="p-4 bg-orange-50 rounded-2xl border border-orange-200">
                <div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-3">
                  <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                    <CheckCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-orange-600 mt-1" />
                    <div>
                      <h4 className="text-slate-900 mb-1">Fire & Natural Disasters</h4>
                      <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm">Fire, earthquake, flood, storm damage</p>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <span className="text-orange-700 whitespace-nowrap ml-4">Full Coverage</span>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div className="p-4 bg-purple-50 rounded-2xl border border-purple-200">
                <div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-3">
                  <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                    <CheckCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-purple-600 mt-1" />
                    <div>
                      <h4 className="text-slate-900 mb-1">Theft & Burglary</h4>
                      <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm">Break-in, robbery, vandalism</p>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <span className="text-purple-700 whitespace-nowrap ml-4">{formatCurrency(policy.coverage * 0.3)}</span>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div className="p-4 bg-indigo-50 rounded-2xl border border-indigo-200">
                <div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-3">
                  <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                    <CheckCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-indigo-600 mt-1" />
                    <div>
                      <h4 className="text-slate-900 mb-1">Liability Coverage</h4>
                      <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm">Damage to neighbors or third parties</p>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <span className="text-indigo-700 whitespace-nowrap ml-4">{formatCurrency(100000)}</span>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>

        </>
      )}

      {/* Life Insurance Coverage */}
      {isLife && (
        <>
          <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
            <h3 className="text-slate-900 mb-6 flex items-center gap-2">
              <Users className="w-6 h-6 text-blue-600" />
              Life Insurance Benefits
            </h3>
            
            <div className="space-y-4">

                <div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-3">
                  <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                    <CheckCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-purple-600 mt-1" />
                    <div>
                      <h4 className="text-slate-900 mb-1">Critical Illness</h4>
                      <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm">Cancer, heart attack, stroke coverage</p>

                  <span className="text-purple-700 whitespace-nowrap ml-4">{formatCurrency(policy.coverage * 0.5)}</span>
                </div>

                <div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-3">
                  <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                    <CheckCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-amber-600 mt-1" />
                    <div>
                      <h4 className="text-slate-900 mb-1">Accidental Death</h4>
                      <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm">Double indemnity for accidental death</p>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <span className="text-amber-700 whitespace-nowrap ml-4">{formatCurrency(policy.coverage * 2)}</span>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </>
      )}

      {/* Claim Process */}
      <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
        <h3 className="text-slate-900 mb-6 flex items-center gap-2">
          <FileText className="w-6 h-6 text-blue-600" />
          How to File a Claim
        </h3>
        
        <div className="space-y-4">
          <div className="flex gap-4">
            <div className="flex-shrink-0 w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-blue-100 text-blue-600 flex items-center justify-center">
              1
            </div>
            <div>
              <h4 className="text-slate-900 mb-1">Report the Incident</h4>
              <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm">Contact us immediately at 0850 420 20 24 or through mobile app within 24 hours</p>
            </div>
          </div>
          
          <div className="flex gap-4">
            <div className="flex-shrink-0 w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-blue-100 text-blue-600 flex items-center justify-center">
              2
            </div>
            <div>
              <h4 className="text-slate-900 mb-1">Gather Documentation</h4>
              <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm">Collect police report, photos, witness statements, and relevant documents</p>
            </div>
          </div>
          
          <div className="flex gap-4">
            <div className="flex-shrink-0 w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-blue-100 text-blue-600 flex items-center justify-center">
              3
            </div>
            <div>
              <h4 className="text-slate-900 mb-1">Submit Claim</h4>
              <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm">Complete claim form online or visit nearest branch office</p>
            </div>
          </div>
          
          <div className="flex gap-4">
            <div className="flex-shrink-0 w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-blue-100 text-blue-600 flex items-center justify-center">
              4
            </div>
            <div>
              <h4 className="text-slate-900 mb-1">Claim Review</h4>
              <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm">Our team will review and assess within 5-10 business days</p>
            </div>
          </div>
          
          <div className="flex gap-4">
            <div className="flex-shrink-0 w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-600 flex items-center justify-center">
              5
            </div>
            <div>
              <h4 className="text-slate-900 mb-1">Payment</h4>
              <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm">Approved claims are paid within 15 business days to your bank account</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="mt-6 p-4 bg-blue-50 rounded-2xl border border-blue-200">
          <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
            <Phone className="w-5 h-5 text-blue-600 mt-0.5" />
            <div>
              <p className="text-slate-900 mb-1">24/7 Claims Hotline</p>
              <p className="text-blue-600">0850 420 20 24</p>
              <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm mt-2">Average claim processing time: 7-10 business days</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
```

## File: `components (2)/examples/AnimatedPlanCardExample.tsx`
- Bytes: 12,127
- SHA256: `37b0fe11a410aec2baee40e9945792660b867e411ba549a39e947996ed355db6`

```tsx
/**
 * EXAMPLE: Fully Animated Insurance Plan Card
 * 
 * This shows how to combine multiple animations for a professional result.
 * Copy this pattern to your InsuranceComparison.tsx
 */

import { useState } from 'react';
import { Star, CheckCircle, Heart, Eye, Info } from 'lucide-react';
import {
  AnimatedCard,
  AnimatedButton,
  AnimatedProgress,
  SuccessCheckmark,
  NumberCounter,
  AnimatedTooltip,
  PulseBadge,
  ScaleOnHover,
  AnimatedModal,
} from '../animations/AnimatedComponents';

type Plan = {
  id: string;
  provider: string;
  name: string;
  logo: string;
  monthlyPremium: number;
  coverage: number;
  deductible: number;
  rating: number;
  reviews: number;
  features: string[];
  popular?: boolean;
  aiBadge?: 'best-value' | 'top-rated' | 'most-coverage';
  savings?: number;
};

type AnimatedPlanCardProps = {
  plan: Plan;
  isSelected: boolean;
  onSelect: (id: string) => void;
  delay?: number;
};

export function AnimatedPlanCard({ 
  plan, 
  isSelected, 
  onSelect,
  delay = 0 
}: AnimatedPlanCardProps) {
  const [isFavorite, setIsFavorite] = useState(false);
  const [showQuickView, setShowQuickView] = useState(false);
  const [isExpanded, setIsExpanded] = useState(false);

  return (
    <>
      {/* Main Card with Animation */}
      <AnimatedCard
        className={`
          relative bg-white rounded-3xl overflow-hidden
          ${isSelected 
            ? 'border-2 border-blue-600 shadow-2xl' 
            : 'border border-gray-200 shadow-lg'
          }
        `}
        delay={delay}
        onClick={() => onSelect(plan.id)}
      >
        {/* Badges with Pulse Animation */}
        <div className="absolute top-4 right-4 z-10 flex flex-col gap-2 items-end">
          {plan.popular && (
            <PulseBadge className="px-3 py-1 bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 text-white text-xs rounded-full font-semibold shadow-lg">
              Popular
            </PulseBadge>
          )}
          
          {plan.aiBadge === 'best-value' && (
            <PulseBadge 
              className="px-3 py-1 bg-gradient-to-r from-green-600 to-emerald-600 text-white text-xs rounded-full font-semibold shadow-lg"
              pulseColor="34, 197, 94" // green-500 RGB
            >
              Best Value
            </PulseBadge>
          )}
        </div>

        {/* Selected Indicator with Animation */}
        {isSelected && (
          <div className="absolute top-4 left-4 z-10">
            <SuccessCheckmark className="text-green-600 bg-white rounded-full p-1" size={32} />
          </div>
        )}

        {/* Favorite Button with Scale Animation */}
        <button
          onClick={(e) => {
            e.stopPropagation();
            setIsFavorite(!isFavorite);
          }}
          className="absolute top-4 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 z-10 w-10 h-10 bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shadow-lg"
        >
          <ScaleOnHover scale={1.2}>
            <Heart 
              size={20} 
              className={isFavorite ? 'text-red-500 fill-red-500' : 'text-gray-400'} 
            />
          </ScaleOnHover>
        </button>

        {/* Card Header */}
        <div className="bg-gradient-to-br from-gray-50 to-white p-6 border-b border-gray-100">
          <div className="flex items-start gap-4 mb-4">
            <ScaleOnHover className="w-14 h-14 bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center text-2xl shadow-sm">
              <span>{plan.logo}</span>
            </ScaleOnHover>
            
            <div className="flex-1">
              <h3 className="text-xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-1">{plan.provider}</h3>
              <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">{plan.name}</p>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
            <Star className="text-yellow-500 fill-yellow-500" size={16} />
            <span className="font-semibold text-gray-900">{plan.rating}</span>
            <span className="text-sm text-gray-500">({plan.reviews.toLocaleString()})</span>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Card Body */}
        <div className="p-6">
          {/* Pricing with Animated Numbers */}
          <div className="mb-6">
            <div className="flex items-baseline gap-2 mb-2">
              <NumberCounter 
                value={plan.monthlyPremium}
                prefix="$"
                className="text-5xl font-bold text-gray-900"
                duration={1000}
              />
              <span className="text-gray-500">/month</span>
              
              <AnimatedTooltip content="Monthly premium you'll pay">
                <button className="ml-1 text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-600">
                  <Info size={16} />
                </button>
              </AnimatedTooltip>
            </div>
            
            {plan.savings && (
              <div className="inline-block px-3 py-1 bg-green-50 border border-green-200 text-green-700 text-sm rounded-full font-semibold">
                Save ${plan.savings}/mo
              </div>
            )}
          </div>

          {/* Coverage with Animated Progress */}
          <div className="mb-6">
            <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-2">
              <span className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-700">Coverage</span>
              <NumberCounter 
                value={plan.coverage / 1000}
                prefix="$"
                suffix="K"
                className="font-semibold text-gray-900"
              />
            </div>
            <AnimatedProgress 
              progress={Math.min((plan.coverage / 2000000) * 100, 100)}
            />
          </div>

          {/* Deductible */}
          <div className="flex justify-between items-center p-4 bg-gray-50 border border-gray-100 rounded-xl mb-6">
            <span className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-700">Deductible</span>
            <NumberCounter 
              value={plan.deductible}
              prefix="$"
              className="font-semibold text-gray-900"
            />
          </div>

          {/* Features */}
          <div className="mb-6">
            <div className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-3">Key Features</div>
            <ul className="space-y-2">
              {plan.features.slice(0, isExpanded ? undefined : 3).map((feature, idx) => (
                <li key={idx} className="flex items-start gap-2 text-sm text-gray-700">
                  <div className="w-5 h-5 bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5">
                    <CheckCircle className="text-white" size={12} />
                  </div>
                  <span>{feature}</span>
                </li>
              ))}
            </ul>
            {plan.features.length > 3 && (
              <AnimatedButton
                onClick={(e) => {
                  e?.stopPropagation();
                  setIsExpanded(!isExpanded);
                }}
                className="mt-3 text-sm text-blue-600 hover:text-blue-700 font-medium"
              >
                {isExpanded ? 'Show less' : `+${plan.features.length - 3} more features`}
              </AnimatedButton>
            )}
          </div>

          {/* Action Buttons */}
          <div className="flex gap-3">
            <AnimatedButton
              onClick={(e) => {
                e?.stopPropagation();
                onSelect(plan.id);
              }}
              className={`
                flex-1 py-3 rounded-xl font-semibold transition-all
                ${isSelected
                  ? 'bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 text-white shadow-lg'
                  : 'bg-gray-900 text-white hover:bg-gray-800 shadow-lg'
                }
              `}
            >
              {isSelected ? (
                <span className="flex items-center justify-center gap-2">
                  <CheckCircle size={18} />
                  Selected
                </span>
              ) : (
                'Select to Compare'
              )}
            </AnimatedButton>
            
            <AnimatedButton
              onClick={(e) => {
                e?.stopPropagation();
                setShowQuickView(true);
              }}
              className="px-4 py-3 bg-gray-100 hover:bg-gray-200 rounded-xl transition-colors"
            >
              <Eye size={18} className="text-gray-700" />
            </AnimatedButton>
          </div>
        </div>
      </AnimatedCard>

      {/* Quick View Modal with Animation */}
      <AnimatedModal 
        isOpen={showQuickView} 
        onClose={() => setShowQuickView(false)}
      >
        <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-8 max-w-2xl w-full max-h-[90vh] overflow-y-auto">
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-6">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
              <div className="w-16 h-16 bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center text-3xl shadow-sm">
                {plan.logo}
              </div>
              <div>
                <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">{plan.provider}</h2>
                <p className="text-gray-600">{plan.name}</p>
              </div>
            </div>
            <AnimatedButton
              onClick={() => setShowQuickView(false)}
              className="p-2 hover:bg-gray-100 rounded-xl"
            >
              ✕
            </AnimatedButton>
          </div>

          {/* Modal Content */}
          <div className="bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-50 to-indigo-50 border border-blue-100 rounded-2xl p-6 mb-6">
            <div className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-600 uppercase tracking-wide mb-2">
              Monthly Premium
            </div>
            <NumberCounter 
              value={plan.monthlyPremium}
              prefix="$"
              className="text-5xl font-bold text-gray-900"
            />
          </div>

          <div className="space-y-4 mb-6">
            <h3 className="font-bold text-gray-900">All Features</h3>
            <ul className="space-y-2">
              {plan.features.map((feature, idx) => (
                <li key={idx} className="flex items-start gap-2 text-sm text-gray-700">
                  <CheckCircle size={16} className="text-green-600 mt-0.5 flex-shrink-0" />
                  <span>{feature}</span>
                </li>
              ))}
            </ul>
          </div>

          <AnimatedButton
            onClick={() => {
              onSelect(plan.id);
              setShowQuickView(false);
            }}
            className="w-full py-3 bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 text-white rounded-xl font-semibold shadow-lg"
          >
            {isSelected ? 'Remove from Comparison' : 'Add to Comparison'}
          </AnimatedButton>
        </div>
      </AnimatedModal>
    </>
  );
}

// Example Usage:
export function AnimatedPlanGrid() {
  const [selectedPlans, setSelectedPlans] = useState<string[]>([]);

  const plans: Plan[] = [
    {
      id: '1',
      provider: 'Geico',
      name: 'Complete Auto Coverage',
      logo: '🚗',
      monthlyPremium: 125,
      coverage: 250000,
      deductible: 500,
      rating: 4.8,
      reviews: 12453,
      features: ['Liability Coverage', '24/7 Roadside Assistance', 'Accident Forgiveness'],
      popular: true,
      aiBadge: 'best-value',
      savings: 20,
    },
    // Add more plans...
  ];

  const handleSelect = (id: string) => {
    setSelectedPlans(prev =>
      prev.includes(id) ? prev.filter(p => p !== id) : [...prev, id]
    );
  };

  return (
    <div className="grid md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-8 max-w-7xl mx-auto p-8">
      {plans.map((plan, index) => (
        <AnimatedPlanCard
          key={plan.id}
          plan={plan}
          isSelected={selectedPlans.includes(plan.id)}
          onSelect={handleSelect}
          delay={index * 0.1} // Stagger animation
        />
      ))}
    </div>
  );
}
```

```tsx
/**
 * Animation Showcase Component
 * 
 * This demonstrates all available animations in one place.
 * Use this as a reference or testing ground for animations.
 * 
 * To view: Import this component in App.tsx temporarily
 */

import { useState } from 'react';
import { CheckCircle, Heart, Star, Sparkles, TrendingDown } from 'lucide-react';
import {
  PageTransition,
  AnimatedCard,
  AnimatedButton,
  AnimatedProgress,
  SuccessCheckmark,
  NumberCounter,
  ScrollReveal,
  StaggeredList,
  BottomSheet,
  AnimatedModal,
  Skeleton,
  PulseBadge,
  LoadingSpinner,
  ScaleOnHover,
  AnimatedTooltip,
  FadeIn,
} from '../animations/AnimatedComponents';

export function AnimationShowcase() {
  const [progress, setProgress] = useState(65);
  const [showModal, setShowModal] = useState(false);
  const [showBottomSheet, setShowBottomSheet] = useState(false);
  const [counterValue, setCounterValue] = useState(2847);

  return (
    <PageTransition className="min-h-screen bg-gradient-to-b from-slate-50 to-white p-8">
      <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto">
        {/* Header */}
        <div className="text-center mb-16">
          <h1 className="text-5xl font-bold mb-4 bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 bg-clip-text text-transparent">
            Animation Showcase
          </h1>
          <p className="text-xl text-gray-600">
            All animations in one place - your reference guide
          </p>
        </div>

        {/* Section 1: Basic Animations */}
        <div className="mb-20">
          <h2 className="text-3xl font-bold mb-8 text-gray-900">Basic Animations</h2>
          
          <div className="grid md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-8">
            {/* Animated Card */}
            <AnimatedCard className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-gray-200">
              <h3 className="font-bold text-gray-900 mb-2">Animated Card</h3>
              <p className="text-gray-600 text-sm mb-4">
                Hover to see lift effect. Click to see tap feedback.
              </p>
              <div className="text-xs text-gray-500 bg-gray-50 rounded-lg p-3">
                <code><AnimatedCard></code>
              </div>
            </AnimatedCard>

            {/* Animated Button */}
            <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-gray-200">
              <h3 className="font-bold text-gray-900 mb-2">Animated Button</h3>
              <p className="text-gray-600 text-sm mb-4">
                Click to feel the feedback
              </p>
              <AnimatedButton className="w-full py-3 bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 text-white rounded-xl font-semibold">
                Click Me
              </AnimatedButton>
              <div className="text-xs text-gray-500 bg-gray-50 rounded-lg p-3 mt-3">
                <code><AnimatedButton></code>
              </div>
            </div>

            {/* Scale on Hover */}
            <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-gray-200">
              <h3 className="font-bold text-gray-900 mb-2">Scale on Hover</h3>
              <p className="text-gray-600 text-sm mb-4">
                Hover over the icon
              </p>
              <div className="flex justify-center">
                <ScaleOnHover scale={1.2}>
                  <div className="w-16 h-16 bg-gradient-to-br from-purple-500 to-pink-500 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center text-white text-2xl shadow-lg">
                    ⭐
                  </div>
                </ScaleOnHover>
              </div>
              <div className="text-xs text-gray-500 bg-gray-50 rounded-lg p-3 mt-3">
                <code><ScaleOnHover></code>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Section 2: Progress & Status */}
        <div className="mb-20">
          <h2 className="text-3xl font-bold mb-8 text-gray-900">Progress & Status</h2>
          
          <div className="grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-8">
            {/* Progress Bar */}
            <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-gray-200">
              <h3 className="font-bold text-gray-900 mb-4">Animated Progress</h3>
              <AnimatedProgress progress={progress} className="mb-4" />
              <div className="flex gap-2">
                <button
                  onClick={() => setProgress(Math.max(0, progress - 10))}
                  className="px-4 py-2 bg-gray-100 hover:bg-gray-200 rounded-lg text-sm"
                >
                  -10%
                </button>
                <button
                  onClick={() => setProgress(Math.min(100, progress + 10))}
                  className="px-4 py-2 bg-gray-100 hover:bg-gray-200 rounded-lg text-sm"
                >
                  +10%
                </button>
                <button
                  onClick={() => setProgress(65)}
                  className="px-4 py-2 bg-blue-600 text-white rounded-lg text-sm"
                >
                  Reset
                </button>
              </div>
              <div className="text-xs text-gray-500 bg-gray-50 rounded-lg p-3 mt-4">
                <code><AnimatedProgress progress={'{'}progress{'}'} /></code>
              </div>
            </div>

            {/* Success Checkmark */}
            <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-gray-200">
              <h3 className="font-bold text-gray-900 mb-4">Success Checkmark</h3>
              <div className="flex items-center justify-center py-8">
                <SuccessCheckmark className="text-green-600" size={64} />
              </div>
              <p className="text-center text-gray-600 text-sm mb-4">
                Animated spring entrance
              </p>
              <div className="text-xs text-gray-500 bg-gray-50 rounded-lg p-3">
                <code><SuccessCheckmark /></code>
              </div>
            </div>

            {/* Loading Spinner */}
            <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-gray-200">
              <h3 className="font-bold text-gray-900 mb-4">Loading Spinner</h3>
              <div className="flex items-center justify-center py-8">
                <LoadingSpinner size={48} className="text-blue-600" />
              </div>
              <p className="text-center text-gray-600 text-sm mb-4">
                Smooth infinite rotation
              </p>
              <div className="text-xs text-gray-500 bg-gray-50 rounded-lg p-3">
                <code><LoadingSpinner /></code>
              </div>
            </div>

            {/* Skeleton Loader */}
            <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-gray-200">
              <h3 className="font-bold text-gray-900 mb-4">Skeleton Loader</h3>
              <div className="space-y-3">
                <Skeleton className="h-6 w-3/4" />
                <Skeleton className="h-6 w-full" />
                <Skeleton className="h-6 w-5/6" />
              </div>
              <div className="text-xs text-gray-500 bg-gray-50 rounded-lg p-3 mt-4">
                <code><Skeleton /></code>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Section 3: Numbers & Counters */}
        <div className="mb-20">
          <h2 className="text-3xl font-bold mb-8 text-gray-900">Numbers & Counters</h2>
          
          <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-8 border border-gray-200">
            <h3 className="font-bold text-gray-900 mb-6">Animated Number Counter</h3>
            
            <div className="grid md:grid-cols-3 gap-8 mb-6">
              <div className="text-center">
                <div className="text-sm text-gray-600 mb-2">Monthly Savings</div>
                <NumberCounter 
                  value={counterValue}
                  prefix="$"
                  className="text-5xl font-bold text-green-600"
                />
              </div>
              
              <div className="text-center">
                <div className="text-sm text-gray-600 mb-2">Coverage Amount</div>
                <NumberCounter 
                  value={counterValue * 100}
                  prefix="$"
                  suffix="K"
                  className="text-5xl font-bold text-blue-600"
                  decimals={0}
                />
              </div>
              
              <div className="text-center">
                <div className="text-sm text-gray-600 mb-2">Customer Rating</div>
                <NumberCounter 
                  value={4.8}
                  suffix="★"
                  className="text-5xl font-bold text-yellow-500"
                  decimals={1}
                />
              </div>
            </div>

            <div className="flex gap-2 justify-center">
              <button
                onClick={() => setCounterValue(Math.floor(Math.random() * 5000) + 1000)}
                className="px-6 py-3 bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 text-white rounded-xl font-semibold"
              >
                Randomize Numbers
              </button>
            </div>

            <div className="text-xs text-gray-500 bg-gray-50 rounded-lg p-3 mt-6">
              <code><NumberCounter value={'{'}value{'}'} prefix="$" /></code>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Section 4: Badges & Highlights */}
        <div className="mb-20">
          <h2 className="text-3xl font-bold mb-8 text-gray-900">Badges & Highlights</h2>
          
          <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-8 border border-gray-200">
            <h3 className="font-bold text-gray-900 mb-6">Pulse Badge</h3>
            
            <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-4 justify-center mb-6">
              <PulseBadge className="px-4 py-2 bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 text-white rounded-full font-semibold">
                Popular Choice
              </PulseBadge>
              
              <PulseBadge 
                className="px-4 py-2 bg-gradient-to-r from-green-600 to-emerald-600 text-white rounded-full font-semibold"
                pulseColor="34, 197, 94"
              >
                Best Value
              </PulseBadge>
              
              <PulseBadge 
                className="px-4 py-2 bg-gradient-to-r from-yellow-500 to-orange-500 text-white rounded-full font-semibold"
                pulseColor="234, 179, 8"
              >
                Top Rated
              </PulseBadge>
            </div>

            <p className="text-center text-gray-600 text-sm mb-4">
              Badges pulse to draw attention
            </p>

            <div className="text-xs text-gray-500 bg-gray-50 rounded-lg p-3">
              <code><PulseBadge>Badge Text</PulseBadge></code>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Section 5: Modals & Sheets */}
        <div className="mb-20">
          <h2 className="text-3xl font-bold mb-8 text-gray-900">Modals & Sheets</h2>
          
          <div className="grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-8">
            <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-gray-200">
              <h3 className="font-bold text-gray-900 mb-4">Animated Modal</h3>
              <p className="text-gray-600 text-sm mb-4">
                Smooth fade + scale entrance
              </p>
              <button
                onClick={() => setShowModal(true)}
                className="w-full py-3 bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 text-white rounded-xl font-semibold"
              >
                Open Modal
              </button>
              <div className="text-xs text-gray-500 bg-gray-50 rounded-lg p-3 mt-4">
                <code><AnimatedModal /></code>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-gray-200">
              <h3 className="font-bold text-gray-900 mb-4">Bottom Sheet (Mobile)</h3>
              <p className="text-gray-600 text-sm mb-4">
                Slides up from bottom, drag to dismiss
              </p>
              <button
                onClick={() => setShowBottomSheet(true)}
                className="w-full py-3 bg-gradient-to-r from-purple-600 to-pink-600 text-white rounded-xl font-semibold"
              >
                Open Bottom Sheet
              </button>
              <div className="text-xs text-gray-500 bg-gray-50 rounded-lg p-3 mt-4">
                <code><BottomSheet /></code>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Section 6: Lists & Reveals */}
        <div className="mb-20">
          <h2 className="text-3xl font-bold mb-8 text-gray-900">Lists & Reveals</h2>
          
          <div className="grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-8">
            {/* Staggered List */}
            <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-gray-200">
              <h3 className="font-bold text-gray-900 mb-4">Staggered List</h3>
              <StaggeredList>
                {[
                  'First item appears',
                  'Then second item',
                  'Then third item',
                  'Beautiful rhythm'
                ].map((text, i) => (
                  <div key={i} className="p-3 bg-gray-50 rounded-lg mb-2">
                    {text}
                  </div>
                ))}
              </StaggeredList>
              <div className="text-xs text-gray-500 bg-gray-50 rounded-lg p-3 mt-4">
                <code><StaggeredList></code>
              </div>
            </div>

            {/* Scroll Reveal */}
            <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-gray-200">
              <h3 className="font-bold text-gray-900 mb-4">Scroll Reveal</h3>
              <p className="text-gray-600 text-sm mb-4">
                Elements appear as you scroll down
              </p>
              <ScrollReveal>
                <div className="p-4 bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-100 to-indigo-100 rounded-lg text-center">
                  I appeared on scroll!
                </div>
              </ScrollReveal>
              <div className="text-xs text-gray-500 bg-gray-50 rounded-lg p-3 mt-4">
                <code><ScrollReveal></code>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Section 7: Tooltips */}
        <div className="mb-20">
          <h2 className="text-3xl font-bold mb-8 text-gray-900">Tooltips</h2>
          
          <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-8 border border-gray-200">
            <h3 className="font-bold text-gray-900 mb-6 text-center">Animated Tooltip</h3>
            
            <div className="flex justify-center gap-8">
              <AnimatedTooltip content="This is a helpful tooltip">
                <button className="px-6 py-3 bg-gray-100 hover:bg-gray-200 rounded-xl font-semibold">
                  Hover Me
                </button>
              </AnimatedTooltip>

              <AnimatedTooltip content="Tooltips provide extra context">
                <div className="w-12 h-12 bg-blue-600 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-white">
                  ?
                </div>
              </AnimatedTooltip>
            </div>

            <div className="text-xs text-gray-500 bg-gray-50 rounded-lg p-3 mt-6">
              <code><AnimatedTooltip content="..."></code>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Implementation Tips */}
        <div className="bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-50 to-indigo-50 border-2 border-blue-200 rounded-3xl p-8">
          <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold mb-4 text-gray-900">💡 Implementation Tips</h2>
          <ul className="space-y-3 text-gray-700">
            <li className="flex items-start gap-2">
              <CheckCircle size={20} className="text-green-600 mt-0.5 flex-shrink-0" />
              <span>All animations respect <code className="bg-white px-2 py-0.5 rounded">prefers-reduced-motion</code></span>
            </li>
            <li className="flex items-start gap-2">
              <CheckCircle size={20} className="text-green-600 mt-0.5 flex-shrink-0" />
              <span>Use <code className="bg-white px-2 py-0.5 rounded">delay</code> prop to stagger card animations</span>
            </li>
            <li className="flex items-start gap-2">
              <CheckCircle size={20} className="text-green-600 mt-0.5 flex-shrink-0" />
              <span>Combine multiple animations for rich interactions</span>
            </li>
            <li className="flex items-start gap-2">
              <CheckCircle size={20} className="text-green-600 mt-0.5 flex-shrink-0" />
              <span>Test on real mobile devices for performance</span>
            </li>
            <li className="flex items-start gap-2">
              <CheckCircle size={20} className="text-green-600 mt-0.5 flex-shrink-0" />
              <span>Keep animations subtle for insurance/finance UX</span>
            </li>
          </ul>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Modal Example */}
      <AnimatedModal isOpen={showModal} onClose={() => setShowModal(false)}>
        <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-8 max-w-md w-full">
          <div className="text-center mb-6">
            <div className="w-16 h-16 bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center mx-auto mb-4">
              <Sparkles className="text-white" size={32} />
            </div>
            <h3 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-2">
              Animated Modal
            </h3>
            <p className="text-gray-600">
              Smooth entrance with fade + scale animation
            </p>
          </div>
          
          <AnimatedButton
            onClick={() => setShowModal(false)}
            className="w-full py-3 bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 text-white rounded-xl font-semibold"
          >
            Close Modal
          </AnimatedButton>
        </div>
      </AnimatedModal>

      {/* Bottom Sheet Example */}
      <BottomSheet isOpen={showBottomSheet} onClose={() => setShowBottomSheet(false)}>
        <div className="p-6 pb-safe">
          <h3 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-4">
            Bottom Sheet
          </h3>
          <p className="text-gray-600 mb-6">
            Perfect for mobile filters, actions, and forms. Drag down to dismiss!
          </p>
          
          <div className="space-y-3">
            {['Option 1', 'Option 2', 'Option 3'].map((option, i) => (
              <button
                key={i}
                className="w-full p-4 bg-gray-100 hover:bg-gray-200 active:bg-gray-300 rounded-xl text-left font-medium transition-colors"
                onClick={() => setShowBottomSheet(false)}
              >
                {option}
              </button>
            ))}
          </div>
        </div>
      </BottomSheet>
    </PageTransition>
  );
}

export default AnimationShowcase;

```

## File: `components (2)/figma/ImageWithFallback.tsx`
- Bytes: 1,153
- SHA256: `79caaf9d1736698c090823383f7b18a9496e9c1309a40f925c8aeb37e496bd8e`

```tsx
import React, { useState } from 'react'

const ERROR_IMG_SRC =
  'data:image/svg+xml;base64,'

export function ImageWithFallback(props: React.ImgHTMLAttributes<HTMLImageElement>) {
  const [didError, setDidError] = useState(false)

  const handleError = () => {
    setDidError(true)
  }

  const { src, alt, style, className, ...rest } = props

  return didError ? (
    <div
      className={`inline-block bg-gray-100 text-center align-middle ${className ?? ''}`}
      style={style}
    >
      <div className="flex items-center justify-center w-full h-full">
        <img src={ERROR_IMG_SRC} alt="Error loading image" {...rest} data-original-url={src} />
      </div>
    </div>
  ) : (
    <img src={src} alt={alt} className={className} style={style} {...rest} onError={handleError} />
  )
}

```
