## File: `components (2)/GlobalNavigationImproved.tsx`
- Bytes: 22,346
- SHA256: `461bc4f8099f0bdade5357ac65aee66246345826de30b89f176bf0990792bb96`

```tsx
import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { 
  Home, LayoutGrid, BarChart, MessageSquare, Upload, Shield,
  Menu, X, Settings, User, LogOut, Bell, Phone, Search,
  ChevronDown, HelpCircle, Lock, FileText, ChevronRight, Command as CommandIcon
} from 'lucide-react';
import { CommandBar } from './CommandBar';
import { GlobalSearch } from './GlobalSearch';
import { NotificationPanel, Notification, sampleNotifications } from './NotificationPanel';
import { ThemeToggle } from './ThemeToggle';
import { LanguageSelector } from './LanguageSelector';

type Page = 'landing' | 'upload' | 'comparison' | 'results' | 'policyDetail' | 'dashboard' | 'chat' | 'myAccount' | 'settings' | 'helpCenter';

interface GlobalNavigationImprovedProps {
  currentPage: Page;
  onNavigateToLanding: () => void;
  onNavigateToComparison: () => void;
  onNavigateToDashboard: () => void;
  onNavigateToChat: () => void;
  policyCount?: number;
  hasUnreadNotifications?: boolean;
  policies?: any[];
  onViewPolicy?: (policyId: string) => void;
  onNavigateToMyAccount?: () => void;
  onNavigateToSettings?: () => void;
  onNavigateToHelpCenter?: () => void;
}

export function GlobalNavigationImproved({
  currentPage,
  onNavigateToLanding,
  onNavigateToComparison,
  onNavigateToDashboard,
  onNavigateToChat,
  policyCount = 0,
  hasUnreadNotifications = false,
  policies = [],
  onViewPolicy,
  onNavigateToMyAccount,
  onNavigateToSettings,
  onNavigateToHelpCenter
}: GlobalNavigationImprovedProps) {
  const [mobileMenuOpen, setMobileMenuOpen] = useState(false);
  const [showProfileMenu, setShowProfileMenu] = useState(false);
  const [showCommandBar, setShowCommandBar] = useState(false);
  const [showSearch, setShowSearch] = useState(false);
  const [showNotifications, setShowNotifications] = useState(false);
  const [notifications, setNotifications] = useState<Notification[]>(sampleNotifications);

  // Command bar keyboard shortcut (Cmd/Ctrl + K)
  useEffect(() => {
    const handleKeyDown = (e: KeyboardEvent) => {
      if ((e.metaKey || e.ctrlKey) && e.key === 'k') {
        e.preventDefault();
        setShowCommandBar(true);
      }
    };

    document.addEventListener('keydown', handleKeyDown);
    return () => document.removeEventListener('keydown', handleKeyDown);
  }, []);

  const unreadNotificationCount = notifications.filter(n => !n.read).length;

  const handleMarkAsRead = (id: string) => {
    setNotifications(prev => 
      prev.map(n => n.id === id ? { ...n, read: true } : n)
    );
  };

  const handleMarkAllAsRead = () => {
    setNotifications(prev => prev.map(n => ({ ...n, read: true })));
  };

  const navItems = [
    {
      id: 'dashboard',
      label: 'Dashboard',
      icon: FileText,
      onClick: onNavigateToDashboard,
      show: true,
      badge: policyCount > 9 ? '9+' : policyCount > 0 ? policyCount.toString() : undefined
    },
    {
      id: 'comparison',
      label: 'Compare',
      icon: LayoutGrid,
      onClick: onNavigateToComparison,
      show: true
    },
    {
      id: 'chat',
      label: 'Chat',
      icon: MessageSquare,
      onClick: onNavigateToChat,
      show: policyCount > 0
    }
  ];

  const isActive = (pageId: string) => {
    if (pageId === 'landing') return currentPage === 'landing';
    if (pageId === 'comparison') return currentPage === 'comparison' || currentPage === 'upload' || currentPage === 'results';
    if (pageId === 'dashboard') return currentPage === 'dashboard' || currentPage === 'policyDetail';
    if (pageId === 'chat') return currentPage === 'chat';
    return false;
  };

  return (
    <>
      {/* Desktop Navigation */}
      <nav className="bg-white border-b border-gray-200 sticky top-0 z-50 shadow-sm">
        {/* Top utility bar */}
        <div className="bg-slate-50 border-b border-gray-200">
          <div className="max-w-[1600px] mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
            <div className="flex items-center justify-between h-9 text-xs">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
                <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5 text-gray-600">
                  <Lock size={12} className="text-emerald-600" />
                  <span>Secure & Encrypted</span>
                </div>
                <div className="hidden sm:flex items-center gap-1.5 text-gray-600">
                  <Shield size={12} className="text-blue-600" />
                  <span>Licensed Insurance Advisors</span>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
                <a 
                  href="tel:1-855-555-0123" 
                  className="flex items-center gap-1.5 text-gray-700 hover:text-slate-900 font-medium transition-colors"
                >
                  <Phone size={12} />
                  <span className="hidden sm:inline">1-855-555-0123</span>
                  <span className="sm:hidden">Call Us</span>
                </a>
                <button 
                  onClick={() => {
                    if (onNavigateToHelpCenter) onNavigateToHelpCenter();
                  }}
                  className="text-gray-600 hover:text-slate-900 transition-colors"
                >
                  Help
                </button>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Main navigation */}
        <div className="max-w-[1600px] mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between h-16">
            {/* Logo */}
            <button 
              onClick={onNavigateToLanding}
              className="flex items-center gap-3 hover:opacity-80 transition-opacity"
            >
              <div className="w-9 h-9 bg-gradient-to-br from-slate-700 to-slate-900 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center shadow-md">
                <Shield className="text-white" size={18} />
              </div>
              <div className="hidden sm:block">
                <div className="font-bold text-gray-900">InsureBench</div>
                <div className="text-xs text-gray-500">Your Policy Benchmarking Command Center</div>
              </div>
            </button>

            {/* Desktop Navigation Items */}
            <div className="hidden md:flex items-center gap-1">
              {navItems.filter(item => item.show).map((item) => {
                const Icon = item.icon;
                const active = isActive(item.id);
                return (
                  <button
                    key={item.id}
                    onClick={item.onClick}
                    className={`relative flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg font-medium text-sm transition-all ${
                      active
                        ? 'bg-slate-50 text-slate-900 border-b-2 border-slate-700'
                        : 'text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900 hover:bg-gray-50'
                    }`}
                  >
                    <Icon size={18} />
                    <span>{item.label}</span>
                    {item.badge && (
                      <span className="ml-1 px-1.5 py-0.5 bg-slate-700 text-white text-xs rounded-full font-semibold">
                        {item.badge}
                      </span>
                    )}
                  </button>
                );
              })}
            </div>

            {/* Right side utilities */}
            <div className="hidden md:flex items-center gap-2">
              {/* Search */}
              <button
                className="p-2 text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900 hover:bg-gray-100 rounded-lg transition-colors"
                aria-label="Search"
                onClick={() => setShowSearch(true)}
              >
                <Search size={20} />
              </button>

              {/* Notifications */}
              <button
                className="relative p-2 text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900 hover:bg-gray-100 rounded-lg transition-colors"
                aria-label="Notifications"
                onClick={() => setShowNotifications(true)}
              >
                <Bell size={20} />
                {unreadNotificationCount > 0 && (
                  <span className="absolute top-1 right-1 w-2 h-2 bg-red-500 rounded-full"></span>
                )}
              </button>

              {/* Upload Button - Primary CTA */}
              <button
                onClick={onNavigateToComparison}
                className="flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 text-white rounded-xl hover:shadow-lg hover:shadow-blue-500/30 transition-all font-medium text-sm ml-2"
              >
                <Upload size={18} />
                <span>Upload Policy</span>
              </button>

              {/* Profile Dropdown */}
              <div className="relative">
                <button
                  onClick={() => setShowProfileMenu(!showProfileMenu)}
                  className="flex items-center gap-2 p-2 hover:bg-gray-100 rounded-lg transition-colors"
                  aria-label="Profile menu"
                >
                  <div className="w-8 h-8 bg-slate-700 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center">
                    <User size={16} className="text-white" />
                  </div>
                  <ChevronDown size={16} className="text-gray-600" />
                </button>

                {showProfileMenu && (
                  <>
                    {/* Backdrop */}
                    <div 
                      className="fixed inset-0 z-40"
                      onClick={() => setShowProfileMenu(false)}
                    ></div>
                    
                    {/* Dropdown */}
                    <div className="absolute right-0 mt-2 w-56 bg-white rounded-xl shadow-lg border border-gray-200 py-2 z-50">
                      <div className="px-4 py-3 border-b border-gray-100">
                        <p className="font-semibold text-gray-900">John Doe</p>
                        <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">john@example.com</p>
                      </div>
                      <button 
                        onClick={() => {
                          setShowProfileMenu(false);
                          // Navigate to account page (to be implemented)
                          console.log('Navigate to My Account');
                          if (onNavigateToMyAccount) onNavigateToMyAccount();
                        }}
                        className="w-full flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors text-left"
                      >
                        <User size={16} />
                        <span>My Account</span>
                      </button>
                      <button 
                        onClick={() => {
                          setShowProfileMenu(false);
                          // Open settings modal or navigate to settings (to be implemented)
                          console.log('Navigate to Settings');
                          if (onNavigateToSettings) onNavigateToSettings();
                        }}
                        className="w-full flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors text-left"
                      >
                        <Settings size={16} />
                        <span>Settings</span>
                      </button>
                      <button 
                        onClick={() => {
                          setShowProfileMenu(false);
                          // Open help center or navigate to help (to be implemented)
                          console.log('Navigate to Help Center');
                          if (onNavigateToHelpCenter) onNavigateToHelpCenter();
                          else window.open('https://help.insurebench.com', '_blank');
                        }}
                        className="w-full flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors text-left"
                      >
                        <HelpCircle size={16} />
                        <span>Help Center</span>
                      </button>
                      <div className="border-t border-gray-100 mt-2 pt-2">
                        <button 
                          onClick={() => {
                            setShowProfileMenu(false);
                            // Handle sign out (to be implemented)
                            console.log('Sign out clicked');
                            if (window.confirm('Are you sure you want to sign out?')) {
                              // Clear user session, redirect to login, etc.
                              onNavigateToLanding();
                            }
                          }}
                          className="w-full flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-2 text-sm text-red-600 hover:bg-red-50 transition-colors text-left"
                        >
                          <LogOut size={16} />
                          <span>Sign Out</span>
                        </button>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </>
                )}
              </div>
            </div>

            {/* Mobile Menu Button */}
            <button
              className="md:hidden p-2 rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-100 transition-colors"
              onClick={() => setMobileMenuOpen(!mobileMenuOpen)}
              aria-label="Toggle menu"
            >
              {mobileMenuOpen ? <X size={24} /> : <Menu size={24} />}
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Mobile Menu */}
        {mobileMenuOpen && (
          <>
            {/* Backdrop */}
            <div 
              className="fixed inset-0 bg-black/20 backdrop-blur-sm z-40 md:hidden"
              onClick={() => setMobileMenuOpen(false)}
            ></div>

            {/* Menu Panel */}
            <div className="fixed inset-y-0 right-0 w-80 max-w-full bg-white shadow-2xl z-50 md:hidden overflow-y-auto">
              <div className="p-4">
                {/* Close button */}
                <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-6">
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                    <div className="w-9 h-9 bg-gradient-to-br from-slate-700 to-slate-900 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center">
                      <Shield className="text-white" size={18} />
                    </div>
                    <div>
                      <div className="font-bold text-gray-900">InsureBench</div>
                      <div className="text-xs text-gray-500">Menu</div>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <button
                    onClick={() => setMobileMenuOpen(false)}
                    className="p-2 hover:bg-gray-100 rounded-lg transition-colors"
                  >
                    <X size={24} />
                  </button>
                </div>

                {/* User info */}
                <div className="p-4 bg-slate-50 rounded-xl mb-4">
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                    <div className="w-12 h-12 bg-slate-700 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center">
                      <User size={20} className="text-white" />
                    </div>
                    <div>
                      <p className="font-semibold text-gray-900">John Doe</p>
                      <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">john@example.com</p>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>

                {/* Navigation */}
                <div className="space-y-1 mb-4">
                  {navItems.filter(item => item.show).map((item) => {
                    const Icon = item.icon;
                    const active = isActive(item.id);
                    return (
                      <button
                        key={item.id}
                        onClick={() => {
                          item.onClick();
                          setMobileMenuOpen(false);
                        }}
                        className={`w-full flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 rounded-lg font-medium text-sm transition-all ${
                          active
                            ? 'bg-slate-100 text-slate-900'
                            : 'text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-50'
                        }`}
                      >
                        <Icon size={20} />
                        <span className="flex-1 text-left">{item.label}</span>
                        {item.badge && (
                          <span className="px-2 py-0.5 bg-slate-700 text-white text-xs rounded-full font-semibold">
                            {item.badge}
                          </span>
                        )}
                        <ChevronRight size={16} className="text-gray-400" />
                      </button>
                    );
                  })}
                </div>

                {/* Upload Button */}
                <button
                  onClick={() => {
                    onNavigateToComparison();
                    setMobileMenuOpen(false);
                  }}
                  className="w-full flex items-center justify-center gap-2 px-4 py-3 bg-slate-700 text-white rounded-lg hover:bg-slate-800 transition-all font-medium mb-4"
                >
                  <Upload size={20} />
                  <span>Upload Policy</span>
                </button>

                {/* Utility Links */}
                <div className="border-t border-gray-200 pt-4 space-y-1">
                  <button 
                    onClick={() => {
                      setShowSearch(true);
                      setMobileMenuOpen(false);
                    }}
                    className="w-full flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-50 rounded-lg transition-colors"
                  >
                    <Search size={18} />
                    <span>Search</span>
                  </button>
                  <button 
                    onClick={() => {
                      setShowNotifications(true);
                      setMobileMenuOpen(false);
                    }}
                    className="w-full flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-50 rounded-lg transition-colors"
                  >
                    <Bell size={18} />
                    <span>Notifications</span>
                    {hasUnreadNotifications && (
                      <span className="w-2 h-2 bg-red-500 rounded-full ml-auto"></span>
                    )}
                  </button>
                  <button 
                    onClick={() => {
                      setMobileMenuOpen(false);
                      if (onNavigateToSettings) onNavigateToSettings();
                    }}
                    className="w-full flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-50 rounded-lg transition-colors"
                  >
                    <Settings size={18} />
                    <span>Settings</span>
                  </button>
                  <button 
                    onClick={() => {
                      setMobileMenuOpen(false);
                      if (onNavigateToHelpCenter) onNavigateToHelpCenter();
                      else window.open('https://help.insurebench.com', '_blank');
                    }}
                    className="w-full flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-50 rounded-lg transition-colors"
                  >
                    <HelpCircle size={18} />
                    <span>Help Center</span>
                  </button>
                </div>

                {/* Contact */}
                <div className="border-t border-gray-200 pt-4 mt-4">
                  <a 
                    href="tel:1-855-555-0123"
                    className="flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-50 rounded-lg transition-colors"
                  >
                    <Phone size={18} />
                    <div>
                      <div className="font-medium">Need Help?</div>
                      <div className="text-xs text-gray-500">1-855-555-0123</div>
                    </div>
                  </a>
                </div>

                {/* Sign Out */}
                <div className="border-t border-gray-200 pt-4 mt-4">
                  <button 
                    onClick={() => {
                      setMobileMenuOpen(false);
                      console.log('Sign out clicked');
                      if (window.confirm('Are you sure you want to sign out?')) {
                        // Clear user session, redirect to login, etc.
                        onNavigateToLanding();
                      }
                    }}
                    className="w-full flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-2 text-sm text-red-600 hover:bg-red-50 rounded-lg transition-colors"
                  >
                    <LogOut size={18} />
                    <span>Sign Out</span>
                  </button>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </>
        )}
      </nav>

      {/* Command Bar */}
      {showCommandBar && (
        <CommandBar
          isOpen={showCommandBar}
          onClose={() => setShowCommandBar(false)}
          onNavigateToLanding={onNavigateToLanding}
          onNavigateToComparison={onNavigateToComparison}
          onNavigateToDashboard={onNavigateToDashboard}
          onNavigateToChat={onNavigateToChat}
          policies={policies}
          onViewPolicy={onViewPolicy}
        />
      )}

      {/* Global Search */}
      {showSearch && (
        <GlobalSearch
          isOpen={showSearch}
          onClose={() => setShowSearch(false)}
          policies={policies}
          onViewPolicy={onViewPolicy}
        />
      )}

      {/* Notification Panel */}
      {showNotifications && (
        <NotificationPanel
          isOpen={showNotifications}
          onClose={() => setShowNotifications(false)}
          notifications={notifications}
          onMarkAsRead={handleMarkAsRead}
          onMarkAllAsRead={handleMarkAllAsRead}
        />
      )}
    </>
  );
}

```

## File: `components (2)/GlobalSearch.tsx`
- Bytes: 10,149
- SHA256: `5cf393de33e793072e095873f9a50756477e16587b1c66a058ab79f2d9235f14`

```tsx
import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { 
  Search, X, FileText, Calendar, DollarSign, 
  Shield, Building, TrendingUp, Clock, ArrowRight
} from 'lucide-react';

type SearchResult = {
  id: string;
  type: 'policy' | 'transaction' | 'document' | 'suggestion';
  title: string;
  subtitle: string;
  metadata?: string;
  icon?: any;
  action: () => void;
};

interface GlobalSearchProps {
  isOpen: boolean;
  onClose: () => void;
  policies?: any[];
  onViewPolicy?: (policyId: string) => void;
}

export function GlobalSearch({
  isOpen,
  onClose,
  policies = [],
  onViewPolicy
}: GlobalSearchProps) {
  const [query, setQuery] = useState('');
  const [selectedIndex, setSelectedIndex] = useState(0);

  // Sample search data
  const generateResults = (searchQuery: string): SearchResult[] => {
    if (!searchQuery.trim()) return [];

    const results: SearchResult[] = [];

    // Search policies
    policies.forEach(policy => {
      const searchableText = `
        ${policy.provider} 
        ${policy.type} 
        ${policy.policyNumber}
        ${policy.coverage}
        ${policy.premium}
      `.toLowerCase();

      if (searchableText.includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase())) {
        results.push({
          id: policy.id,
          type: 'policy',
          title: `${policy.provider} ${policy.type}`,
          subtitle: `Policy #${policy.policyNumber}`,
          metadata: `$${policy.coverage.toLocaleString()} coverage • $${policy.premium}/mo`,
          icon: FileText,
          action: () => {
            if (onViewPolicy) onViewPolicy(policy.id);
            onClose();
          }
        });
      }
    });

    // Sample transactions
    if ('payment'.includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()) || 'transaction'.includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase())) {
      results.push({
        id: 'trans-1',
        type: 'transaction',
        title: 'Premium Payment - State Farm',
        subtitle: 'Paid on Nov 15, 2025',
        metadata: '$245.00',
        icon: DollarSign,
        action: () => onClose()
      });
    }

    // Sample documents
    if ('document'.includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()) || 'pdf'.includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase())) {
      results.push({
        id: 'doc-1',
        type: 'document',
        title: 'Policy Declaration Page - Allstate',
        subtitle: 'Uploaded 3 days ago',
        metadata: 'PDF • 2.4 MB',
        icon: FileText,
        action: () => onClose()
      });
    }

    // Suggestions based on query
    if (searchQuery.length >= 3) {
      const suggestions = [
        {
          id: 'sug-1',
          title: 'Benchmark your auto insurance',
          subtitle: 'Compare premiums and coverage',
          icon: TrendingUp
        },
        {
          id: 'sug-2',
          title: 'View upcoming renewals',
          subtitle: 'See policies expiring soon',
          icon: Calendar
        },
        {
          id: 'sug-3',
          title: 'Check coverage gaps',
          subtitle: 'AI-powered analysis',
          icon: Shield
        }
      ];

      suggestions.forEach(sug => {
        if (
          sug.title.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()) ||
          sug.subtitle.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase())
        ) {
          results.push({
            ...sug,
            type: 'suggestion',
            action: () => onClose()
          });
        }
      });
    }

    return results;
  };

  const results = generateResults(query);

  useEffect(() => {
    setSelectedIndex(0);
  }, [query]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (isOpen) {
      setQuery('');
      setSelectedIndex(0);
    }
  }, [isOpen]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!isOpen) return;

    const handleKeyDown = (e: KeyboardEvent) => {
      if (e.key === 'ArrowDown') {
        e.preventDefault();
        setSelectedIndex(prev => (prev + 1) % results.length);
      } else if (e.key === 'ArrowUp') {
        e.preventDefault();
        setSelectedIndex(prev => (prev - 1 + results.length) % results.length);
      } else if (e.key === 'Enter' && results[selectedIndex]) {
        e.preventDefault();
        results[selectedIndex].action();
      } else if (e.key === 'Escape') {
        e.preventDefault();
        onClose();
      }
    };

    document.addEventListener('keydown', handleKeyDown);
    return () => document.removeEventListener('keydown', handleKeyDown);
  }, [isOpen, results, selectedIndex, onClose]);

  if (!isOpen) return null;

  const groupedResults = results.reduce((acc, result) => {
    if (!acc[result.type]) acc[result.type] = [];
    acc[result.type].push(result);
    return acc;
  }, {} as Record<string, SearchResult[]>);

  const typeLabels = {
    policy: 'Policies',
    transaction: 'Transactions',
    document: 'Documents',
    suggestion: 'Suggestions'
  };

  return (
    <>
      {/* Backdrop */}
      <div 
        className="fixed inset-0 bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-sm z-[100]"
        onClick={onClose}
      />

      {/* Search Modal */}
      <div className="fixed top-[15vh] left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 w-full max-w-2xl z-[101] px-4">
        <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-2xl border border-gray-200 overflow-hidden">
          {/* Search Input */}
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-4 border-b border-gray-200">
            <Search size={20} className="text-gray-400" />
            <input
              type="text"
              placeholder="Search policies, transactions, documents..."
              value={query}
              onChange={(e) => setQuery(e.target.value)}
              className="flex-1 bg-transparent outline-none text-gray-900 placeholder-gray-400"
              autoFocus
            />
            {query && (
              <button
                onClick={() => setQuery('')}
                className="p-1 hover:bg-gray-100 rounded transition-colors"
              >
                <X size={16} className="text-gray-400" />
              </button>
            )}
          </div>

          {/* Results */}
          <div className="max-h-[60vh] overflow-y-auto">
            {query.trim() === '' ? (
              <div className="px-4 py-8 text-center text-gray-500">
                <Search size={48} className="mx-auto mb-3 text-gray-300" />
                <p className="font-medium">Start typing to search</p>
                <p className="text-sm mt-1">Search across policies, transactions, and more</p>
              </div>
            ) : results.length === 0 ? (
              <div className="px-4 py-12 text-center text-gray-500">
                <Search size={48} className="mx-auto mb-3 text-gray-300" />
                <p className="font-medium">No results found for "{query}"</p>
                <p className="text-sm mt-1">Try a different search term</p>
              </div>
            ) : (
              <div className="py-2">
                {Object.entries(groupedResults).map(([type, items]) => (
                  <div key={type} className="mb-4 last:mb-0">
                    <div className="px-4 py-2 text-xs font-semibold text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider">
                      {typeLabels[type as keyof typeof typeLabels]}
                    </div>
                    {items.map((result, index) => {
                      const globalIndex = results.indexOf(result);
                      const isSelected = globalIndex === selectedIndex;
                      const Icon = result.icon || FileText;

                      return (
                        <button
                          key={result.id}
                          onClick={result.action}
                          onMouseEnter={() => setSelectedIndex(globalIndex)}
                          className={`w-full flex items-start gap-3 px-4 py-3 transition-colors ${
                            isSelected ? 'bg-slate-100' : 'hover:bg-gray-50'
                          }`}
                        >
                          <div className="flex-shrink-0 w-10 h-10 bg-slate-100 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center">
                            <Icon size={18} className="text-slate-700" />
                          </div>
                          <div className="flex-1 min-w-0 text-left">
                            <h4 className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-900 mb-0.5">
                              {result.title}
                            </h4>
                            <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">
                              {result.subtitle}
                            </p>
                            {result.metadata && (
                              <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-1">
                                {result.metadata}
                              </p>
                            )}
                          </div>
                          <ArrowRight size={16} className="text-gray-400 flex-shrink-0 mt-2" />
                        </button>
                      );
                    })}
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>
            )}
          </div>

          {/* Footer */}
          <div className="px-4 py-3 bg-gray-50 border-t border-gray-200 flex items-center justify-between text-xs text-gray-500">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
                <kbd className="px-1.5 py-0.5 bg-white rounded border border-gray-300">↑</kbd>
                <kbd className="px-1.5 py-0.5 bg-white rounded border border-gray-300">↓</kbd>
                <span>Navigate</span>
              </div>
              <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
                <kbd className="px-1.5 py-0.5 bg-white rounded border border-gray-300">↵</kbd>
                <span>Select</span>
              </div>
              <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
                <kbd className="px-1.5 py-0.5 bg-white rounded border border-gray-300">ESC</kbd>
                <span>Close</span>
              </div>
            </div>
            <span>{results.length} results</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </>
  );
}

```

## File: `components (2)/HelpArticle.tsx`
- Bytes: 8,254
- SHA256: `b230643607e1b82808445e30f8077483d841b37b51cf53096ea6a0d773267df3`

```tsx
import { useState } from 'react';
import { 
  ChevronLeft, Clock, ThumbsUp, ThumbsDown, Share2, 
  Bookmark, CheckCircle, AlertCircle, Info, Lightbulb
} from 'lucide-react';

interface HelpArticleProps {
  article: {
    id: string;
    title: string;
    category: string;
    readTime: string;
    content: React.ReactNode;
    relatedArticles?: string[];
  };
  onBack: () => void;
}

export function HelpArticle({ article, onBack }: HelpArticleProps) {
  const [helpful, setHelpful] = useState<boolean | null>(null);
  const [bookmarked, setBookmarked] = useState(false);

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-slate-50">
      {/* Header */}
      <div className="bg-white border-b border-gray-200 sticky top-0 z-10">
        <div className="max-w-4xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-4">
          <button 
            onClick={onBack}
            className="flex items-center gap-2 text-blue-600 hover:text-blue-700 font-medium mb-3"
          >
            <ChevronLeft size={20} />
            <span>Back to Help Center</span>
          </button>
          <div className="flex items-start justify-between">
            <div className="flex-1">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-gray-500 mb-2">
                <span>{article.category}</span>
                <span>•</span>
                <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
                  <Clock size={14} />
                  <span>{article.readTime}</span>
                </div>
              </div>
              <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900">{article.title}</h1>
            </div>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2 ml-4">
              <button
                onClick={() => setBookmarked(!bookmarked)}
                className={`p-2 rounded-lg border transition-colors ${
                  bookmarked 
                    ? 'bg-blue-50 border-blue-200 text-blue-600' 
                    : 'bg-white border-gray-200 text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-50'
                }`}
                aria-label="Bookmark"
              >
                <Bookmark size={20} fill={bookmarked ? 'currentColor' : 'none'} />
              </button>
              <button
                className="p-2 rounded-lg border border-gray-200 text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors"
                aria-label="Share"
              >
                <Share2 size={20} />
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Content */}
      <div className="max-w-4xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-8">
        <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl border border-gray-200 shadow-sm p-8 md:p-12">
          <div className="prose prose-slate max-w-none">
            {article.content}
          </div>

          {/* Was this helpful? */}
          <div className="mt-12 pt-8 border-t border-gray-200">
            <div className="text-center">
              <p className="text-lg font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-4">Was this article helpful?</p>
              <div className="flex items-center justify-center gap-3">
                <button
                  onClick={() => setHelpful(true)}
                  className={`flex items-center gap-2 px-6 py-3 rounded-xl font-medium transition-all ${
                    helpful === true
                      ? 'bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-700 border-2 border-emerald-300'
                      : 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-200 border-2 border-transparent'
                  }`}
                >
                  <ThumbsUp size={20} />
                  <span>Yes, it helped</span>
                </button>
                <button
                  onClick={() => setHelpful(false)}
                  className={`flex items-center gap-2 px-6 py-3 rounded-xl font-medium transition-all ${
                    helpful === false
                      ? 'bg-red-100 text-red-700 border-2 border-red-300'
                      : 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-200 border-2 border-transparent'
                  }`}
                >
                  <ThumbsDown size={20} />
                  <span>No, I need more help</span>
                </button>
              </div>
              {helpful === true && (
                <p className="mt-4 text-emerald-600 font-medium">Thank you for your feedback!</p>
              )}
              {helpful === false && (
                <div className="mt-4">
                  <p className="text-gray-600 mb-3">We're sorry this didn't help. Please contact our support team:</p>
                  <a 
                    href="mailto:support@insurebench.com"
                    className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-6 py-3 bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 text-white rounded-xl hover:shadow-lg hover:shadow-blue-500/30 transition-all font-medium"
                  >
                    Contact Support
                  </a>
                </div>
              )}
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Related Articles */}
        {article.relatedArticles && article.relatedArticles.length > 0 && (
          <div className="mt-8">
            <h2 className="text-xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-4">Related Articles</h2>
            <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
              {article.relatedArticles.map((relatedTitle, index) => (
                <button
                  key={index}
                  className="bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-2xl p-4 hover:shadow-lg transition-all text-left group"
                >
                  <p className="font-semibold text-gray-900 group-hover:text-blue-600 transition-colors">{relatedTitle}</p>
                  <p className="text-sm text-gray-500 mt-1">Learn more →</p>
                </button>
              ))}
            </div>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// Reusable content components for articles
export const ArticleSection = ({ title, children }: { title: string; children: React.ReactNode }) => (
  <div className="mb-8">
    <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-4">{title}</h2>
    {children}
  </div>
);

export const ArticleStep = ({ number, title, children }: { number: number; title: string; children: React.ReactNode }) => (
  <div className="mb-6">
    <div className="flex items-start gap-4">
      <div className="w-8 h-8 bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 text-white rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center font-bold flex-shrink-0">
        {number}
      </div>
      <div className="flex-1">
        <h3 className="font-bold text-gray-900 mb-2">{title}</h3>
        <div className="text-gray-700">{children}</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
);

export const ArticleTip = ({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) => (
  <div className="my-6 p-4 bg-blue-50 border-l-4 border-blue-600 rounded-r-xl">
    <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
      <Lightbulb size={20} className="text-blue-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
      <div className="text-sm text-blue-900">{children}</div>
    </div>
  </div>
);

export const ArticleWarning = ({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) => (
  <div className="my-6 p-4 bg-amber-50 border-l-4 border-amber-600 rounded-r-xl">
    <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
      <AlertCircle size={20} className="text-amber-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
      <div className="text-sm text-amber-900">{children}</div>
    </div>
  </div>
);

export const ArticleSuccess = ({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) => (
  <div className="my-6 p-4 bg-emerald-50 border-l-4 border-emerald-600 rounded-r-xl">
    <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
      <CheckCircle size={20} className="text-emerald-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
      <div className="text-sm text-emerald-900">{children}</div>
    </div>
  </div>
);

export const ArticleInfo = ({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) => (
  <div className="my-6 p-4 bg-slate-50 border-l-4 border-slate-600 rounded-r-xl">
    <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
      <Info size={20} className="text-slate-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
      <div className="text-sm text-slate-900">{children}</div>
    </div>
  </div>
);

```

## File: `components (2)/HelpCenter.tsx`
- Bytes: 18,070
- SHA256: `281ae8d9ba4354f6fdee84bea998e5c2112925924e84a6f4d40944df270bc574`

```tsx
import { useState } from 'react';
import { 
  Search, HelpCircle, Book, MessageSquare, Phone, Mail,
  FileText, Shield, Upload, BarChart, ChevronRight, 
  Video, ExternalLink, Clock, ThumbsUp, ThumbsDown,
  AlertCircle, CheckCircle, Zap, CreditCard
} from 'lucide-react';
import { HelpArticle } from './HelpArticle';
import { helpArticles } from '../data/helpArticles';

interface HelpCenterProps {
  onBack: () => void;
  onNavigateToChat?: () => void;
}

export function HelpCenter({ onBack, onNavigateToChat }: HelpCenterProps) {
  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('');
  const [activeCategory, setActiveCategory] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [expandedFaq, setExpandedFaq] = useState<number | null>(null);
  const [selectedArticle, setSelectedArticle] = useState<string | null>(null);

  // Show article view if one is selected
  if (selectedArticle && helpArticles[selectedArticle]) {
    return (
      <HelpArticle
        article={helpArticles[selectedArticle]}
        onBack={() => setSelectedArticle(null)}
      />
    );
  }

  const categories = [
    {
      id: 'getting-started',
      title: 'Getting Started',
      icon: Zap,
      color: 'blue',
      articles: 12
    },
    {
      id: 'uploading',
      title: 'Uploading Policies',
      icon: Upload,
      color: 'indigo',
      articles: 8
    },
    {
      id: 'comparing',
      title: 'Comparing Coverage',
      icon: BarChart,
      color: 'purple',
      articles: 10
    },
    {
      id: 'security',
      title: 'Security & Privacy',
      icon: Shield,
      color: 'emerald',
      articles: 6
    },
    {
      id: 'billing',
      title: 'Billing & Plans',
      icon: CreditCard,
      color: 'amber',
      articles: 7
    },
    {
      id: 'ai-assistant',
      title: 'AI Assistant',
      icon: MessageSquare,
      color: 'pink',
      articles: 5
    }
  ];

  const faqs = [
    {
      question: 'How do I upload my insurance policy?',
      answer: 'You can upload your insurance policy by clicking the "Upload Policy" button in the navigation bar. We accept PDF files and photos of your insurance cards. Simply drag and drop your files or click to browse, and our AI will automatically extract the key information.'
    },
    {
      question: 'Is my policy information secure?',
      answer: 'Yes, absolutely. All policy documents and personal information are encrypted using industry-standard AES-256 encryption. We are GDPR and CCPA compliant, and your data is stored securely on encrypted servers. We never share your information with third parties without your explicit consent.'
    },
    {
      question: 'How does the AI analysis work?',
      answer: 'Our AI-powered system uses advanced natural language processing to read and understand your insurance policies. It extracts key coverage details, identifies gaps or overlaps, and provides plain-language explanations of complex insurance terms. The AI is trained on millions of insurance documents to ensure accuracy.'
    },
    {
      question: 'Can I compare policies from different insurance types?',
      answer: 'Yes! InsureBench allows you to compare policies across different insurance types (auto, home, health, life, etc.). While direct comparisons work best for similar policy types, our system can help you understand coverage across your entire insurance portfolio.'
    },
    {
      question: 'What file formats are supported?',
      answer: 'We support PDF files and common image formats (JPG, PNG) for policy documents. For best results, upload clear, high-resolution PDFs or photos. Our OCR technology can extract text from scanned documents and photos.'
    },
    {
      question: 'How accurate is the AI coverage analysis?',
      answer: 'Our AI analysis has an accuracy rate of over 95% for standard policy documents. However, we always recommend reviewing the extracted information and consulting with a licensed insurance professional for important decisions. The AI provides a helpful starting point, but human expertise is invaluable.'
    },
    {
      question: 'Can I share my policy comparisons?',
      answer: 'Yes, you can export and share your policy comparison reports. Click the "Share" or "Export" button on any comparison view to generate a shareable PDF report. You control what information is included in the export.'
    },
    {
      question: 'What if the AI misreads my policy?',
      answer: 'If you notice any inaccuracies, you can manually edit the extracted information in your policy dashboard. Click the "Edit" button next to any field to make corrections. This also helps improve our AI for future uploads.'
    },
    {
      question: 'How long are my policies stored?',
      answer: 'Your policies are stored securely for as long as you maintain an active account. You can delete individual policies or your entire account at any time from your settings. We recommend downloading your data before account deletion.'
    },
    {
      question: 'Do you offer customer support?',
      answer: 'Yes! We offer multiple support channels: AI chat assistant (24/7), email support (support@insurebench.com), and phone support at 1-855-555-0123 (Mon-Fri, 9am-6pm EST). Premium plan users get priority support.'
    }
  ];

  const popularArticles = [
    {
      title: 'Quick Start Guide: Upload Your First Policy',
      category: 'Getting Started',
      readTime: '3 min',
      icon: Upload,
      articleId: 'upload-first-policy'
    },
    {
      title: 'Understanding Your Coverage Gaps',
      category: 'Comparing Coverage',
      readTime: '5 min',
      icon: BarChart,
      articleId: 'understanding-coverage-gaps'
    },
    {
      title: 'How We Keep Your Data Secure',
      category: 'Security & Privacy',
      readTime: '4 min',
      icon: Shield,
      articleId: 'data-security'
    },
    {
      title: 'Making the Most of AI Explanations',
      category: 'AI Assistant',
      readTime: '6 min',
      icon: MessageSquare,
      articleId: 'ai-assistant-guide'
    }
  ];

  const getColorClasses = (color: string) => {
    const colors: Record<string, { bg: string; text: string; border: string }> = {
      blue: { bg: 'bg-blue-100', text: 'text-blue-600', border: 'border-blue-200' },
      indigo: { bg: 'bg-indigo-100', text: 'text-indigo-600', border: 'border-indigo-200' },
      purple: { bg: 'bg-purple-100', text: 'text-purple-600', border: 'border-purple-200' },
      emerald: { bg: 'bg-emerald-100', text: 'text-emerald-600', border: 'border-emerald-200' },
      amber: { bg: 'bg-amber-100', text: 'text-amber-600', border: 'border-amber-200' },
      pink: { bg: 'bg-pink-100', text: 'text-pink-600', border: 'border-pink-200' }
    };
    return colors[color] || colors.blue;
  };

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-slate-50">
      {/* Header */}
      <div className="bg-white border-b border-gray-200">
        <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-6">
          <button 
            onClick={onBack}
            className="text-sm text-blue-600 hover:text-blue-700 font-medium mb-4 flex items-center gap-2"
          >
            ← Back to Dashboard
          </button>
          <div className="text-center max-w-3xl mx-auto">
            <h1 className="text-4xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-2">How can we help you?</h1>
            <p className="text-gray-600 mb-6">Search our knowledge base or browse categories below</p>
            
            {/* Search Bar */}
            <div className="relative">
              <Search className="absolute left-4 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-gray-400" size={20} />
              <input
                type="text"
                value={searchQuery}
                onChange={(e) => setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}
                placeholder="Search for help articles, FAQs, guides..."
                className="w-full pl-12 pr-4 py-4 border border-gray-300 rounded-2xl focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-blue-500 text-lg"
              />
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-12">
        {/* Quick Contact Options */}
        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-6 mb-12">
          <button 
            onClick={onNavigateToChat}
            className="bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 text-white rounded-3xl p-6 hover:shadow-xl hover:shadow-blue-500/30 transition-all text-left"
          >
            <MessageSquare size={32} className="mb-3" />
            <h3 className="font-bold text-lg mb-1">Chat with AI Assistant</h3>
            <p className="text-blue-100 text-sm">Get instant answers 24/7</p>
            <div className="mt-4 flex items-center gap-2 text-sm">
              <span>Start chatting</span>
              <ChevronRight size={16} />
            </div>
          </button>

          <a 
            href="tel:1-855-555-0123"
            className="bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-3xl p-6 hover:shadow-lg transition-all text-left"
          >
            <div className="w-12 h-12 bg-gradient-to-br from-emerald-100 to-emerald-200 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center mb-3">
              <Phone size={24} className="text-emerald-600" />
            </div>
            <h3 className="font-bold text-lg text-gray-900 mb-1">Call Us</h3>
            <p className="text-gray-600 text-sm mb-2">Mon-Fri, 9am-6pm EST</p>
            <p className="text-blue-600 font-medium">1-855-555-0123</p>
          </a>

          <a 
            href="mailto:support@insurebench.com"
            className="bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-3xl p-6 hover:shadow-lg transition-all text-left"
          >
            <div className="w-12 h-12 bg-gradient-to-br from-purple-100 to-purple-200 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center mb-3">
              <Mail size={24} className="text-purple-600" />
            </div>
            <h3 className="font-bold text-lg text-gray-900 mb-1">Email Support</h3>
            <p className="text-gray-600 text-sm mb-2">Response within 24 hours</p>
            <p className="text-blue-600 font-medium">support@insurebench.com</p>
          </a>
        </div>

        {/* Browse by Category */}
        <div className="mb-12">
          <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-6">Browse by Category</h2>
          <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
            {categories.map((category) => {
              const Icon = category.icon;
              const colors = getColorClasses(category.color);
              return (
                <button
                  key={category.id}
                  onClick={() => setActiveCategory(category.id)}
                  className="bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-2xl p-6 hover:shadow-lg transition-all text-left group"
                >
                  <div className={`w-12 h-12 ${colors.bg} rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center mb-4 group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform`}>
                    <Icon size={24} className={colors.text} />
                  </div>
                  <h3 className="font-bold text-gray-900 mb-1">{category.title}</h3>
                  <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">{category.articles} articles</p>
                  <div className="mt-3 flex items-center text-sm text-blue-600 font-medium">
                    <span>View articles</span>
                    <ChevronRight size={16} className="ml-1 group-hover:translate-x-1 transition-transform" />
                  </div>
                </button>
              );
            })}
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Popular Articles */}
        <div className="mb-12">
          <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-6">Popular Articles</h2>
          <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl border border-gray-200 shadow-sm divide-y divide-gray-200">
            {popularArticles.map((article, index) => {
              const Icon = article.icon;
              return (
                <button
                  key={index}
                  onClick={() => setSelectedArticle(article.articleId)}
                  className="w-full p-6 hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors flex items-center gap-4 text-left"
                >
                  <div className="w-12 h-12 bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-100 to-indigo-100 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center flex-shrink-0">
                    <Icon size={20} className="text-blue-600" />
                  </div>
                  <div className="flex-1">
                    <h3 className="font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-1">{article.title}</h3>
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-3 text-sm text-gray-500">
                      <span>{article.category}</span>
                      <span>•</span>
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
                        <Clock size={14} />
                        <span>{article.readTime}</span>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <ChevronRight size={20} className="text-gray-400" />
                </button>
              );
            })}
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Video Tutorials */}
        <div className="mb-12">
          <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-6">Video Tutorials</h2>
          <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
            {[
              { title: 'How to Upload Your First Policy', duration: '2:30', thumbnail: 'blue' },
              { title: 'Understanding Your Coverage Report', duration: '4:15', thumbnail: 'indigo' },
              { title: 'Comparing Multiple Policies', duration: '3:45', thumbnail: 'purple' },
              { title: 'Using the AI Assistant Effectively', duration: '5:20', thumbnail: 'emerald' }
            ].map((video, index) => (
              <button
                key={index}
                className="bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden hover:shadow-lg transition-all text-left group"
              >
                <div className={`h-40 bg-gradient-to-br from-${video.thumbnail}-100 to-${video.thumbnail}-200 flex items-center justify-center relative`}>
                  <div className="w-16 h-16 bg-white/90 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform">
                    <Video size={28} className="text-gray-900 ml-1" />
                  </div>
                  <div className="absolute bottom-3 right-3 px-2 py-1 bg-black/70 text-white text-xs rounded">
                    {video.duration}
                  </div>
                </div>
                <div className="p-4">
                  <h3 className="font-semibold text-gray-900">{video.title}</h3>
                </div>
              </button>
            ))}
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* FAQs */}
        <div>
          <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-6">Frequently Asked Questions</h2>
          <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl border border-gray-200 shadow-sm divide-y divide-gray-200">
            {faqs.map((faq, index) => (
              <div key={index}>
                <button
                  onClick={() => setExpandedFaq(expandedFaq === index ? null : index)}
                  className="w-full p-6 flex items-start justify-between text-left hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors"
                >
                  <div className="flex-1">
                    <h3 className="font-semibold text-gray-900 pr-4">{faq.question}</h3>
                  </div>
                  <ChevronRight 
                    size={20} 
                    className={`text-gray-400 flex-shrink-0 transition-transform ${
                      expandedFaq === index ? 'rotate-90' : ''
                    }`}
                  />
                </button>
                {expandedFaq === index && (
                  <div className="px-6 pb-6">
                    <p className="text-gray-600 leading-relaxed">{faq.answer}</p>
                    <div className="mt-4 pt-4 border-t border-gray-200 flex items-center gap-4">
                      <span className="text-sm text-gray-500">Was this helpful?</span>
                      <button className="flex items-center gap-1 text-sm text-gray-600 hover:text-emerald-600 transition-colors">
                        <ThumbsUp size={16} />
                        <span>Yes</span>
                      </button>
                      <button className="flex items-center gap-1 text-sm text-gray-600 hover:text-red-600 transition-colors">
                        <ThumbsDown size={16} />
                        <span>No</span>
                      </button>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                )}
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Still Need Help */}
        <div className="mt-12 bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-50 to-indigo-50 rounded-3xl border border-blue-100 p-8 text-center">
          <HelpCircle size={48} className="text-blue-600 mx-auto mb-4" />
          <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-2">Still need help?</h2>
          <p className="text-gray-600 mb-6">Our support team is here to assist you</p>
          <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center justify-center gap-3">
            <button 
              onClick={onNavigateToChat}
              className="px-6 py-3 bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 text-white rounded-xl hover:shadow-lg hover:shadow-blue-500/30 transition-all font-medium"
            >
              Chat with AI Assistant
            </button>
            <a 
              href="mailto:support@insurebench.com"
              className="px-6 py-3 bg-white border border-gray-300 text-gray-700 rounded-xl hover:bg-gray-50 transition-all font-medium"
            >
              Contact Support
            </a>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

```

## File: `components (2)/insurance-lines/README.md`
- Bytes: 12,519
- SHA256: `034293d3e53561051d7bc27d5cdb18688d952cbfa199e7301fd53e4f9909c6d0`

````markdown
# Insurance Lines Module

## Overview

This module provides a **modular, extensible architecture** for adding country and insurance line-specific policy details while keeping the core application generic and maintainable.

## Architecture

### Core Principles

1. **General Core, Specific Extensions**: The main app handles generic insurance concepts (premium, coverage, deductible). Line-specific details are isolated in this module.

2. **Registry Pattern**: New insurance lines are registered in `types.ts` and can be dynamically rendered based on policy metadata.

3. **Type Safety**: Full TypeScript support with extended data types for each insurance line.

4. **Zero Breaking Changes**: Policies without line-specific data work perfectly with the existing UI.

## File Structure

```
insurance-lines/
├── README.md                      # This file
├── index.ts                       # Main exports
├── types.ts                       # Type definitions & registry
├── sample-policies.ts             # Demo policies for testing
├── TurkishKaskoDetails.tsx        # Turkish auto insurance component
└── [Future additions]
    ├── USHealthDetails.tsx        # US health insurance
    ├── UKHomeDetails.tsx          # UK home insurance
    └── ...
```

## How It Works

### 1. Base Policy Structure

All policies extend `BasePolicy`:

```typescript
type BasePolicy = {
  // Standard fields (coverage, premium, etc.)
  id: string;
  provider: string;
  monthlyPremium: number;
  // ...
  
  // Line identification
  country?: string;            // ISO code: 'TR', 'US', 'UK'
  insuranceLine?: string;      // Line: 'kasko', 'health', 'home'
  
  // Extended data (line-specific)
  extendedData?: any;
};
```

### 2. Extended Data Types

Each insurance line defines its own extended data structure:

```typescript
// Turkish Kasko example
type TurkishKaskoExtendedData = {
  coverageType?: 'Dar Kasko' | 'Kasko' | 'Genişletilmiş Kasko' | 'Tam Kasko';
  immLimit?: 'Unlimited' | number;
  clauses?: {
    service?: 'Yetkili Servis' | 'Özel Servis';
    // ... more clauses
  };
  // ... 40+ Turkish-specific fields
};
```

### 3. Component Registry

Register new line components in `types.ts`:

```typescript
export const INSURANCE_LINE_REGISTRY: InsuranceLineComponent[] = [
  {
    id: 'turkish-kasko',
    country: 'TR',
    insuranceLine: 'kasko',
    label: 'Turkish Kasko Auto Insurance',
    componentPath: './TurkishKaskoDetails',
  },
  // Add more here...
];
```

### 4. Automatic Tab Rendering

The `PolicyDetailView` automatically:
- Detects if a policy has line-specific data
- Shows a new tab if line component is registered
- Renders the appropriate component

```tsx
// In PolicyDetailView.tsx
const lineComponent = getInsuranceLineComponent(policy);
const hasLineSpecificDetails = !!lineComponent;

// Tab is automatically added if hasLineSpecificDetails is true
```

## Adding a New Insurance Line

### Step 1: Define Extended Data Type

In `types.ts`:

```typescript
export type USHealthExtendedData = {
  networkType?: 'HMO' | 'PPO' | 'EPO' | 'POS';
  outOfPocketMax?: number;
  copays?: {
    primaryCare?: number;
    specialist?: number;
    emergency?: number;
  };
  prescriptionTiers?: {
    tier1?: number;
    tier2?: number;
    tier3?: number;
  };
  // ... more US health-specific fields
};

export type USHealthPolicy = BasePolicy & {
  country: 'US';
  insuranceLine: 'health';
  extendedData: USHealthExtendedData;
};
```

### Step 2: Create Line-Specific Component

Create `USHealthDetails.tsx`:

```typescript
import { USHealthExtendedData } from './types';

type USHealthDetailsProps = {
  extendedData: USHealthExtendedData;
  startDate: string;
  endDate: string;
};

export function USHealthDetails({ extendedData }: USHealthDetailsProps) {
  return (
    <div className="space-y-6">
      {/* US Health-specific UI components */}
      <div className="border border-gray-200 rounded-2xl p-6">
        <h4 className="font-bold mb-4">Network Type</h4>
        <p>{extendedData.networkType}</p>
      </div>
      
      {/* More sections... */}
    </div>
  );
}
```

### Step 3: Register in Registry

In `types.ts`:

```typescript
export const INSURANCE_LINE_REGISTRY: InsuranceLineComponent[] = [
  // ... existing entries
  {
    id: 'us-health',
    country: 'US',
    insuranceLine: 'health',
    label: 'US Health Insurance',
    description: 'Health insurance with ACA, network, and formulary details',
    componentPath: './USHealthDetails',
  },
];
```

### Step 4: Export Component

In `index.ts`:

```typescript
export { USHealthDetails } from './USHealthDetails';
```

### Step 5: Add to PolicyDetailView

In `PolicyDetailView.tsx`, add conditional render:

```typescript
{policy.country === 'US' && policy.insuranceLine === 'health' && policy.extendedData && (
  <USHealthDetails 
    extendedData={policy.extendedData}
    startDate={policy.startDate}
    endDate={policy.endDate}
  />
)}
```

### Step 6: Create Sample Policy (Optional)

In `sample-policies.ts`:

```typescript
export const sampleUSHealthPolicy: USHealthPolicy = {
  // ... base fields
  country: 'US',
  insuranceLine: 'health',
  extendedData: {
    networkType: 'PPO',
    outOfPocketMax: 6000,
    // ...
  },
};
```

## Current Implementations

### Turkish Kasko Auto Insurance

**Component**: `TurkishKaskoDetails.tsx`

**Key Features**:
- ⏰ Time-specific coverage display (noon rule)
- 🏷️ Coverage type hierarchy (Dar/Standard/Extended/Full)
- 🚗 Vehicle information display
- 🛡️ İMM (Excess Liability) protection emphasis
- 🔧 Service & parts clause breakdown
- 👁️ Glass coverage details
- 📉 No-claim discount tracker
- ⚠️ Critical exclusions warnings
- 🎁 Additional benefits (rental car, mini repair, new value clause)

**Extended Data Fields**: 40+ Turkish-specific fields including:
- Regulatory coverage types
- Time-precise coverage dates
- Complex deductible structures
- Service/parts/glass clauses
- No-claim discount history
- Critical exclusions

### Turkish Traffic Insurance

**Component**: `TurkishTrafficDetails.tsx`

**Key Features**:
- Mandatory third-party liability coverage
- Tariff step system (0-8 classification)
- No-claim discount/surcharge tracking
- 2025 statutory coverage limits
- İMM supplementary coverage
- Assistance pack add-ons

### Turkish Credit-Linked Life Insurance

**Component**: `TurkishCreditLifeDetails.tsx`

**Key Features**:
- Decreasing/Level term life coverage
- Bank lienholder information
- Death, disability, and unemployment coverage
- Loan-specific premium structure
- Tax benefit calculations
- Surrender rights and refund formulas

### Turkish Fire/Housing Insurance

**Component**: `TurkishFireDetails.tsx`

**Key Features**:
- DASK integration (compulsory earthquake insurance)
- Building vs contents coverage breakdown
- Under-insurance risk assessment
- Comprehensive peril coverage
- Inflation protection mechanisms
- Tenant and landlord liability

### Turkish Personal Accident Insurance

**Component**: `TurkishPersonalAccidentDetails.tsx`

**Key Features**:
- Compulsory and voluntary coverage types
- Occupation risk classification (Class 1-3)
- Disability percentage scale
- Mining worker and bus passenger coverage
- 2025 updated regulatory limits
- Buy-back clauses for excluded risks

### Turkish Health Insurance (NEW)

**Component**: `TurkishHealthDetails.tsx`

**Key Features**:
- 🏥 TSS vs ÖSS product differentiation (Complementary vs Private Health)
- 🏥 Provider network configuration (Network A+ to C)
- 🔄 SGK dependency tracking (for TSS policies)
- 🛡️ Lifetime Renewal Guarantee (Ömür Boyu Yenileme Garantisi) - THE HOLY GRAIL
- ⏰ Comprehensive waiting period tracking (surgery, maternity)
- 👶 Maternity coverage with waiting period countdown
- 💊 Inpatient (unlimited) and outpatient coverage details
- 🩺 Specific benefits: Check-ups, Physical Therapy, Dental/Vision, Online Doctor
- 🚫 Pre-existing condition exclusions
- 💰 Premium breakdown with 2024 inflation context (79% TSS, 64% ÖSS increases)
- 📊 Claims process - Provision (Provizyon) system
- 🎯 Strategic insights and coverage adequacy assessment
- 📈 2025 market context (5.2M TSS vs 2.3M ÖSS policies)

**Extended Data Fields**: 100+ Turkish health insurance-specific fields including:
- TSS vs ÖSS product type
- Network configuration and hospital lists
- SGK requirement and dependency
- Inpatient and outpatient coverage limits
- Maternity, check-up, physical therapy benefits
- Waiting period tracking for surgeries and maternity
- Lifetime Renewal Guarantee status and progress
- Pre-existing condition exclusions
- Premium inflation tracking
- Claims process (Provision system)
- Strategic insights and market context

## Design Guidelines

### Keep It Modular

❌ **Don't** modify core components for line-specific features
✅ **Do** create isolated line components

### Use Consistent Styling

All line-specific components should use the existing design system:
- `rounded-2xl` for cards
- `border border-gray-200` for borders
- Professional slate colors for financial lines
- Alert colors (amber, red) for warnings

### Display Critical Information First

Order sections by importance:
1. Time-sensitive alerts (expiry, renewal)
2. Coverage type/tier
3. Financial protection (liability limits)
4. Repair/service terms
5. Exclusions and warnings
6. Additional benefits

### Use Clear Visual Hierarchy

```tsx
// ✅ Good: Clear visual distinction
<div className="bg-gradient-to-br from-emerald-50 to-teal-50 border-2 border-emerald-200 rounded-2xl p-6">
  <h4 className="font-bold text-emerald-900">Important Feature</h4>
</div>

// ❌ Bad: Everything looks the same
<div className="border p-4">
  <h4>Feature</h4>
</div>
```

### Internationalization Ready

Use English labels but include native terms:

```tsx
<h4 className="font-bold">
  No-Claim Discount (Hasarsızlık İndirimi)
</h4>
```

## Testing

### Sample Policy Testing

```typescript
import { sampleTurkishKaskoPolicy } from './insurance-lines/sample-policies';

// Use in your component
<PolicyDetailView policy={sampleTurkishKaskoPolicy} />
```

### Type Checking

```bash
# Run TypeScript compiler
npm run type-check
```

## Future Roadmap

### Planned Insurance Lines

1. **US Health Insurance** (Priority: High)
   - Network types (HMO/PPO/EPO/POS)
   - Copays and coinsurance
   - Prescription drug formulary
   - ACA compliance details

2. **UK Home Insurance** (Priority: Medium)
   - Buildings vs Contents coverage
   - Flood risk zones
   - Excess types
   - Accidental damage add-ons

3. **German Auto Insurance** (Priority: Medium)
   - SF-Klasse (no-claims class)
   - Teilkasko vs Vollkasko
   - Regional coverage classes

4. **US Auto Insurance** (Priority: Low)
   - State-specific minimum requirements
   - Collision vs Comprehensive
   - Personal Injury Protection (PIP)
   - Uninsured motorist coverage

### Enhancement Ideas

- [ ] Line-specific comparison tables
- [ ] AI explanations tailored to each line
- [ ] Country/line-specific document templates
- [ ] Regulatory compliance checklists
- [ ] Multi-language support for native terms

## Migration Guide

### For Existing Policies

Existing policies without `country` or `insuranceLine` fields will:
- ✅ Continue to work normally
- ✅ Show Overview, Coverage, Analysis, Documents tabs
- ✅ NOT show the line-specific tab

### Adding Line Data to Existing Policies

```typescript
// Before (generic)
const policy = {
  id: '123',
  provider: 'Allianz',
  monthlyPremium: 850,
  // ... standard fields
};

// After (with Turkish Kasko data)
const policy = {
  id: '123',
  provider: 'Allianz',
  monthlyPremium: 850,
  // ... standard fields
  country: 'TR',
  insuranceLine: 'kasko',
  extendedData: {
    coverageType: 'Genişletilmiş Kasko',
    immLimit: 'Unlimited',
    // ... more fields
  },
};
```

## Support

For questions or issues with the insurance lines module:
1. Check this README
2. Review existing implementations (e.g., `TurkishKaskoDetails.tsx`)
3. Look at sample policies in `sample-policies.ts`
4. Check type definitions in `types.ts`

## Contributing

When adding a new insurance line:
1. Follow the "Adding a New Insurance Line" guide above
2. Create comprehensive sample data
3. Document country-specific regulations in component comments
4. Use clear, accessible UI patterns
5. Add entry to this README's "Current Implementations" section

````

---

/**
 * Sample Insurance Policies Collection
 * 
 * This file contains 3+ sample policies for each insurance line we have detailed information for.
 * Each sample showcases different scenarios, risk levels, and coverage options.
 * 
 * NAMING CONVENTION:
 * - sample[Country][InsuranceLine]Policy[Number]
 * - Example: sampleTRKaskoPolicy1, sampleTRKaskoPolicy2, sampleTRKaskoPolicy3
 */

import { TurkishKaskoPolicy, TurkishTrafficPolicy, TurkishCreditLifePolicy, TurkishFirePolicy, TurkishPersonalAccidentPolicy, TurkishHealthPolicy, TurkishAgriculturalPolicy } from './types';

// ============================================================================
// TURKISH KASKO - 3 SAMPLES
// ============================================================================

  sampleTRPersonalAccidentPolicy3,
];

export const turkishAgriculturePolicies = [
  sampleTRAgriculturePolicy1,
  sampleTRAgriculturePolicy2,
  sampleTRAgriculturePolicy3,
];

// ============================================================================
// EXPORTS - Policy Collections by Insurance Line
// ============================================================================

export const turkishKaskoPolicies = [
  sampleTRKaskoPolicy1,
  sampleTRKaskoPolicy2,
  sampleTRKaskoPolicy3,
];

export const turkishTrafficPolicies = [
  sampleTRTrafficPolicy1,
  sampleTRTrafficPolicy2,
  sampleTRTrafficPolicy3,
];

export const turkishCreditLifePolicies = [
  sampleTRCreditLifePolicy1,
  sampleTRCreditLifePolicy2,
  sampleTRCreditLifePolicy3,
];

/**
 * All sample policies grouped by country and insurance line
 */
export const samplePoliciesByLine = {
  TR: {
    kasko: turkishKaskoPolicies,
    traffic: turkishTrafficPolicies,
    'credit-life': turkishCreditLifePolicies,
    fire: turkishFirePolicies,
    'personal-accident': turkishPersonalAccidentPolicies,
    health: turkishHealthPolicies,
    agricultural: turkishAgriculturePolicies,
  },
  // Future additions:
  // US: {
  //   health: usHealthPolicies,
  //   auto: usAutoPolicies,
  // },
  // UK: {
  //   home: ukHomePolicies,
  // },
};

/**
 * Flat array of all sample policies for easy iteration
 */
export const allSamplePolicies = [
  ...turkishKaskoPolicies,
  ...turkishTrafficPolicies,
  ...turkishCreditLifePolicies,
  ...turkishFirePolicies,
  ...turkishPersonalAccidentPolicies,
  ...turkishHealthPolicies,
  ...turkishAgriculturePolicies,
];

/**
 * Get sample policies by country and line
 */
export function getSamplePolicies(country: string, insuranceLine: string) {
  return samplePoliciesByLine[country as keyof typeof samplePoliciesByLine]?.[
    insuranceLine as keyof (typeof samplePoliciesByLine)[keyof typeof samplePoliciesByLine]
  ] || [];
}

/**
 * Get a random sample policy for a given line
 */
export function getRandomSamplePolicy(country: string, insuranceLine: string) {
  const policies = getSamplePolicies(country, insuranceLine);
  return policies[Math.floor(Math.random() * policies.length)];
}

/**
 * Sample Insurance Policies - Main Export File
 * 
 * This file re-exports sample policies from the collection for backward compatibility
 * and provides convenient named exports.
 * 
 * For the full collection with 3+ samples per line, import from:
 * './sample-policies-collection'
 */

import { 
  sampleTRKaskoPolicy1, 
  sampleTRTrafficPolicy1,
  allSamplePolicies,
  samplePoliciesByLine,
} from './sample-policies-collection';

// Backward compatibility - export the first sample of each line
export const sampleTurkishKaskoPolicy = sampleTRKaskoPolicy1;
export const sampleTurkishTrafficPolicy = sampleTRTrafficPolicy1;

// Export all samples for easy access
export { allSamplePolicies, samplePoliciesByLine };

// Re-export the collection module
export * from './sample-policies-collection';

/**
 * Legacy export for backward compatibility
 */
export const samplePolicies = {
  turkishKasko: sampleTRKaskoPolicy1,
  turkishTraffic: sampleTRTrafficPolicy1,
};

/**
 * Sample Turkish Traffic Insurance Policy
 */

import { TurkishTrafficPolicy } from './types';

export const sampleTurkishTrafficPolicy: TurkishTrafficPolicy = {
  id: 'sample-tr-traffic-001',
  fileName: 'axa-traffic-sample.pdf',
  provider: 'AXA Sigorta A.Ş.',
  policyNumber: 'TRF2024-9876543210',
  type: 'auto',
  monthlyPremium: 150,  // Much cheaper than Kasko
  coverage: 300000,     // Material damage limit per vehicle
  deductible: 0,        // Traffic insurance has no deductible
  startDate: '2024-06-01',
  endDate: '2025-06-01',
  features: [
    'Third-Party Material Damage (300,000 TL per vehicle)',
    'Third-Party Bodily Injury (2,700,000 TL per person)',
    'Death & Disability Coverage',
    'Legal Defense',
    'Roadside Assistance (Plus Package)',
    'Value Loss Coverage (Değer Kaybı)',
  ],
  logo: '🚗',
  aiConfidence: 94,
  recommendation: 'review',
  
  // Turkish Traffic specific fields
  country: 'TR',
  insuranceLine: 'traffic',
  
  extendedData: {
    // 1. Policy Identity
    agencyInfo: 'Merkez Sigorta Aracı Kuruluşu - Levha No: 54321',
    renewalNumber: 2,
    issueDate: '2024-05-25',
    
    // Time-specific coverage (same noon rule)
    inceptionDateTime: {
      date: '2024-06-01',
      time: '12:00',
    },
    expirationDateTime: {
      date: '2025-06-01',
      time: '12:00',
    },
    
    // 2. Tariff & Risk - CRITICAL
    tariffStepCode: 6,  // Very Good - 2 years accident-free
    stepClassification: 'Very Good',
    ncdSurchargeRate: -25,  // 25% discount
    yearsAccidentFree: 2,
    usageType: 'Otomobil',
    tariffProvince: '34 - İstanbul',
    
    // 3. Asset & Insured
    licensePlate: '34 XYZ 5678',
    vehicleOwner: 'Sample Driver',
    idNumber: '98765432109',
    chassisNumber: 'WVWZZZ3CZPE654321',
    engineNumber: 'DFYA654321',
    makeModel: 'Renault Clio 1.0 TCe Joy',
    modelYear: 2022,
    
    // 4. Coverage Limits (2025 Statutory)
    coverageLimits: {
      materialPerVehicle: 300000,
      materialPerAccident: 600000,
      healthPerPerson: 2700000,
      healthPerAccident: 13500000,
      deathDisabilityPerPerson: 2700000,
      deathDisabilityPerAccident: 13500000,
    },
    
    // 5. Premium Breakdown
    premiumBreakdown: {
      netPremium: 1200,
      guaranteeFundShare: 150,    // G.H. Katkı Payı
      trafficServicesFund: 200,   // THGF
      bsmv: 60,                   // 5% tax
      grossPremium: 1800,         // Annual total (150 TL/month)
    },
    
    // 6. Supplementary Coverages
    supplementaryCoverages: {
      imm: {
        enabled: false,  // Not included in this policy
        // User should consider adding standalone IMM
      },
      assistancePack: {
        enabled: true,
        type: 'Plus',
        towingLimit: 2000,
        services: [
          'Towing to nearest service',
          'Ambulance dispatch',
          'Fuel delivery (10L)',
          'Flat tire change',
        ],
      },
      moralDamages: false,  // Manevi Tazminat not included
    },
    
    // 7. Exclusions
    exclusionsApply: [
      'Own vehicle damage (not covered - need Kasko)',
      'Own driver medical expenses',
      'Damage to spouse/children/siblings property',
      'Intentional acts',
      'Racing or speed competitions',
      'Moral damages (pain and suffering)',
    ],
    
    // 8. Recourse Risks
    recourseRisks: [
      'Drunk driving (above 0.50 promil for private vehicles)',
      'Driving without valid license',
      'Gross negligence (intentional wrong-way, etc.)',
    ],
    
    // 9. Claims History
    claimsInLastYear: 0,
    totalClaimsHistory: 0,
  },
};
