## File: `components (2)/insurance-lines/TurkishAgriculturalDetails.tsx`
- Bytes: 39,375
- SHA256: `867d1d4fa145dafd00684f07aea9e98162d62b4950fc94943b476136218b8621`

```tsx
import { 
  Sprout, Clock, AlertCircle, Shield, MapPin, Building2, 
  TrendingUp, CheckCircle, Info, ShieldAlert, DollarSign,
  Calendar, Sparkles, AlertTriangle, FileText, Users,
  Percent, ChevronRight, Ban, XCircle, AlertOctagon,
  Award, CheckSquare, WalletCards, Droplets, Wheat, Leaf,
  Milk, Fish, Bug, TreePine, CloudRain, Snowflake, Wind,
  Zap, Activity, Target, TrendingDown, BadgePercent
} from 'lucide-react';
import { TurkishAgriculturalExtendedData } from './types';
import { BasePolicy } from './index';

type TurkishAgriculturalDetailsProps = {
  policy: BasePolicy & {
    extendedData?: TurkishAgriculturalExtendedData;
    country?: string;
    insuranceLine?: string;
  };
};

export function TurkishAgriculturalDetails({ policy }: TurkishAgriculturalDetailsProps) {
  // Guard clause - return early if no extended data
  if (!policy.extendedData) {
    return (
      <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
        <p className="text-slate-500">No extended Turkish Agricultural Insurance data available for this policy.</p>
      </div>
    );
  }

  const extendedData = policy.extendedData as TurkishAgriculturalExtendedData;
  
  // Calculate time until coverage expires
  const now = new Date();
  const expiryDate = policy.endDate;
  const expiryDateTime = new Date(`${expiryDate}T12:00:00`);
  const hoursUntilExpiry = Math.max(0, (expiryDateTime.getTime() - now.getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60));
  const daysUntilExpiry = Math.floor(hoursUntilExpiry / 24);

  const formatCurrency = (amount: number) => {
    return new Intl.NumberFormat('tr-TR', {
      style: 'currency',
      currency: 'TRY',
      minimumFractionDigits: 0,
      maximumFractionDigits: 0
    }).format(amount);
  };

  const formatDate = (dateString: string) => {
    return new Date(dateString).toLocaleDateString('tr-TR', {
      year: 'numeric',
      month: 'long',
      day: 'numeric'
    });
  };

  // Determine insurance branch icon and color
  const getBranchInfo = () => {
    const branch = extendedData.insuranceBranch;
    
    switch (branch) {
      case 'crop':
        return { icon: Wheat, color: 'amber', label: 'Crop Insurance (Bitkisel Ürün)', emoji: '🌾' };
      case 'livestock-cattle':
        return { icon: Milk, color: 'blue', label: 'Cattle Life Insurance (Büyükbaş Hayat)', emoji: '🐄' };
      case 'livestock-sheep-goat':
        return { icon: Sprout, color: 'green', label: 'Sheep/Goat Insurance (Küçükbaş Hayat)', emoji: '🐑' };
      case 'poultry':
        return { icon: Users, color: 'orange', label: 'Poultry Insurance (Kümes Hayvanları)', emoji: '🐔' };
      case 'aquaculture':
        return { icon: Fish, color: 'cyan', label: 'Aquaculture Insurance (Su Ürünleri)', emoji: '🐟' };
      case 'bees':
        return { icon: Bug, color: 'yellow', label: 'Beekeeping Insurance (Arıcılık)', emoji: '🐝' };
      case 'greenhouse':
        return { icon: Building2, color: 'emerald', label: 'Greenhouse Insurance (Sera)', emoji: '🏡' };
      default:
        return { icon: Sprout, color: 'green', label: 'Agricultural Insurance', emoji: '🌱' };
    }
  };

  const branchInfo = getBranchInfo();
  const premiumBreakdown = extendedData.premiumBreakdown;
  const stateSupport = premiumBreakdown?.stateSupport;

  return (
    <div className="space-y-6">
      {/* Header Card */}
      <div className={`bg-gradient-to-br from-${branchInfo.color}-600 to-${branchInfo.color}-700 text-white rounded-3xl p-8`}>
        <div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-4">
          <div>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-2">
              <branchInfo.icon className="w-8 h-8" />
              <h2 className="text-2xl">{branchInfo.emoji} {branchInfo.label}</h2>
            </div>
            <p className={`text-${branchInfo.color}-100`}>{extendedData.insuranceType || 'TARSİM Agricultural Insurance'}</p>
          </div>
          <div className="text-right">
            <p className="text-sm opacity-80 mb-1">Coverage expires in</p>
            <p className="text-3xl">{daysUntilExpiry} days</p>
          </div>
        </div>
        
        {/* Farm/Location Info */}
        {(extendedData.farmerName || extendedData.farmAddress) && (
          <div className="flex items-start gap-3 bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-2xl p-4 mt-4">
            <MapPin className="w-5 h-5 flex-shrink-0 mt-1" />
            <div>
              {extendedData.farmerName && (
                <>
                  <p className="text-sm opacity-80 mb-1">Farmer/Producer</p>
                  <p className="mb-2">{extendedData.farmerName}</p>
                </>
              )}
              {extendedData.farmAddress && (
                <>
                  <p className="text-sm opacity-80 mb-1">Farm Location</p>
                  <p>{extendedData.farmAddress}</p>
                  {extendedData.village && (
                    <p className="text-sm mt-1">{extendedData.village}, {extendedData.district}, {extendedData.province}</p>
                  )}
                </>
              )}
            </div>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>

      {/* 2025 Regulatory Highlights */}
      {extendedData.regulatoryNotes && (
        <div className="bg-gradient-to-br from-indigo-50 to-blue-50 border border-indigo-200 rounded-3xl p-6">
          <div className="flex items-start gap-4">
            <Sparkles className="w-6 h-6 text-indigo-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-1" />
            <div className="flex-1">
              <h3 className="text-indigo-900 mb-3">🆕 2025 Framework Updates</h3>
              <div className="space-y-2 text-sm">
                {extendedData.regulatoryNotes.stateSupportIncrease && (
                  <div className="flex items-start gap-2">
                    <CheckCircle className="w-4 h-4 text-indigo-600 mt-0.5" />
                    <p className="text-indigo-800">{extendedData.regulatoryNotes.stateSupportIncrease}</p>
                  </div>
                )}
                {extendedData.regulatoryNotes.productionPlanningDiscount && (
                  <div className="flex items-start gap-2">
                    <BadgePercent className="w-4 h-4 text-indigo-600 mt-0.5" />
                    <p className="text-indigo-800">{extendedData.regulatoryNotes.productionPlanningDiscount}</p>
                  </div>
                )}
                {extendedData.regulatoryNotes.newCoverages && extendedData.regulatoryNotes.newCoverages.length > 0 && (
                  <div className="flex items-start gap-2">
                    <Sparkles className="w-4 h-4 text-indigo-600 mt-0.5" />
                    <div>
                      <p className="text-indigo-800 mb-1">New Coverages:</p>
                      <ul className="list-disc list-inside text-indigo-700 ml-2">
                        {extendedData.regulatoryNotes.newCoverages.map((coverage, idx) => (
                          <li key={idx}>{coverage}</li>
                        ))}
                      </ul>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                )}
                {extendedData.regulatoryNotes.marketContext && (
                  <div className="flex items-start gap-2">
                    <TrendingUp className="w-4 h-4 text-indigo-600 mt-0.5" />
                    <p className="text-indigo-700 italic">{extendedData.regulatoryNotes.marketContext}</p>
                  </div>
                )}
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* 2025 Framework Strategic Context */}
      {extendedData.framework2025?.enabled && (
        <div className="bg-gradient-to-br from-purple-50 to-violet-50 border border-purple-200 rounded-3xl p-6">
          <div className="flex items-start gap-4">
            <Award className="w-6 h-6 text-purple-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-1" />
            <div className="flex-1">
              <h3 className="text-purple-900 mb-3">🎯 2025 Strategic Framework Context</h3>
              <div className="grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-4 mb-4">
                {extendedData.framework2025.strategicCropStatus && (
                  <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl p-4">
                    <p className="text-sm text-purple-600 mb-1">Crop Status</p>
                    <p className="text-purple-900">{extendedData.framework2025.strategicCropStatus}</p>
                    {extendedData.framework2025.strategicCropStatus === 'Strategic' && (
                      <p className="text-xs text-purple-700 mt-1">Qualifies for 70% state support under 2025 food security policy</p>
                    )}
                  </div>
                )}
                {extendedData.framework2025.productionPlanningCompliance !== undefined && (
                  <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl p-4">
                    <p className="text-sm text-purple-600 mb-1">Production Planning Compliance</p>
                    <p className="text-purple-900">
                      {extendedData.framework2025.productionPlanningCompliance ? '✅ Compliant' : '❌ Non-Compliant'}
                    </p>
                    {extendedData.framework2025.productionPlanningCompliance && (
                      <p className="text-xs text-purple-700 mt-1">Receives 10% premium discount</p>
                    )}
                  </div>
                )}
              </div>
              {extendedData.framework2025.keyChanges && extendedData.framework2025.keyChanges.length > 0 && (
                <div className="bg-purple-100 rounded-2xl p-4">
                  <p className="text-sm text-purple-900 mb-2">Key 2025 Policy Changes:</p>
                  <ul className="list-disc list-inside text-sm text-purple-800 space-y-1">
                    {extendedData.framework2025.keyChanges.map((change, idx) => (
                      <li key={idx}>{change}</li>
                    ))}
                  </ul>
                </div>
              )}
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Policy Declaration Inventory */}
      {extendedData.policyDeclaration && (
        <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-5">
            <FileText className="w-6 h-6 text-blue-600" />
            <h3 className="text-slate-900">Policy Declaration Details</h3>
          </div>
          <div className="grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
            {extendedData.policyDeclaration.adaParcelNo && (
              <div className="bg-blue-50 border border-blue-200 rounded-2xl p-4">
                <p className="text-sm text-blue-600 mb-1">Ada/Parcel Number</p>
                <p className="text-blue-900 font-mono">{extendedData.policyDeclaration.adaParcelNo}</p>
                <p className="text-xs text-blue-700 mt-1">Critical: Exact cadastral location for expert assessment</p>
              </div>
            )}
            {extendedData.policyDeclaration.plantingDate && (
              <div className="bg-blue-50 border border-blue-200 rounded-2xl p-4">
                <p className="text-sm text-blue-600 mb-1">Planting Date</p>
                <p className="text-blue-900">{formatDate(extendedData.policyDeclaration.plantingDate)}</p>
                <p className="text-xs text-blue-700 mt-1">Determines phenological stages and frost coverage start</p>
              </div>
            )}
            {extendedData.policyDeclaration.declaredYield && (
              <div className="bg-blue-50 border border-blue-200 rounded-2xl p-4">
                <p className="text-sm text-blue-600 mb-1">Declared Yield</p>
                <p className="text-blue-900">{extendedData.policyDeclaration.declaredYield} kg/decare</p>
                <p className="text-xs text-blue-700 mt-1">Expected yield (capped by TARSİM regional average)</p>
              </div>
            )}
            {extendedData.policyDeclaration.enterpriseNumber && (
              <div className="bg-blue-50 border border-blue-200 rounded-2xl p-4">
                <p className="text-sm text-blue-600 mb-1">Enterprise Number</p>
                <p className="text-blue-900 font-mono">{extendedData.policyDeclaration.enterpriseNumber}</p>
                <p className="text-xs text-blue-700 mt-1">Ministry registration ID for barn/farm</p>
              </div>
            )}
            {extendedData.policyDeclaration.earTagNumbers && extendedData.policyDeclaration.earTagNumbers.length > 0 && (
              <div className="bg-blue-50 border border-blue-200 rounded-2xl p-4">
                <p className="text-sm text-blue-600 mb-1">Ear Tag Numbers (TÜRKVET)</p>
                <p className="text-blue-900 text-sm font-mono">
                  {extendedData.policyDeclaration.earTagNumbers.slice(0, 3).join(', ')}
                  {extendedData.policyDeclaration.earTagNumbers.length > 3 && ` +${extendedData.policyDeclaration.earTagNumbers.length - 3} more`}
                </p>
                <p className="text-xs text-blue-700 mt-1">Mandatory animal IDs - if tag falls off, animal is uninsured</p>
              </div>
            )}
            {extendedData.policyDeclaration.deductibleAndCoinsurance && (
              <div className="bg-orange-50 border border-orange-200 rounded-2xl p-4">
                <p className="text-sm text-orange-600 mb-1">Deductible & Co-insurance</p>
                <p className="text-orange-900">{extendedData.policyDeclaration.deductibleAndCoinsurance}</p>
                <p className="text-xs text-orange-700 mt-1">Your retained risk percentage</p>
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* State Premium Support - Prominent Display */}
      {stateSupport && (
        <div className="bg-gradient-to-br from-emerald-600 to-emerald-700 text-white rounded-3xl p-6">
          <div className="flex items-start justify-between">
            <div className="flex items-start gap-4">
              <Shield className="w-8 h-8 flex-shrink-0 mt-1" />
              <div>
                <h3 className="text-xl mb-2">State Premium Support</h3>
                <p className="text-emerald-100 text-sm mb-4">
                  The Turkish government subsidizes {stateSupport.rate}% of your agricultural insurance premium
                </p>
                <div className="grid md:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
                  <div className="bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-2xl p-4">
                    <p className="text-sm opacity-80 mb-1">Gross Premium</p>
                    <p className="text-2xl">{formatCurrency(premiumBreakdown?.grossPremium || 0)}</p>
                  </div>
                  <div className="bg-white/20 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-2xl p-4">
                    <p className="text-sm opacity-80 mb-1">State Support ({stateSupport.rate}%)</p>
                    <p className="text-2xl">-{formatCurrency(stateSupport.amount)}</p>
                  </div>
                  <div className="bg-white/30 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-2xl p-4">
                    <p className="text-sm opacity-80 mb-1">Your Payment</p>
                    <p className="text-2xl">{formatCurrency(premiumBreakdown?.farmerPayment || 0)}</p>
                  </div>
                </div>
                {premiumBreakdown?.paymentStructure && (
                  <p className="text-emerald-100 text-sm mt-3">
                    💡 Payment: {premiumBreakdown.paymentStructure}
                  </p>
                )}
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Discounts Applied */}
      {premiumBreakdown?.discounts && premiumBreakdown.discounts.length > 0 && (
        <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-4">
            <BadgePercent className="w-6 h-6 text-green-600" />
            <h3 className="text-slate-900">Discounts Applied</h3>
          </div>
          <div className="grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-3">
            {premiumBreakdown.discounts.map((discount, idx) => (
              <div key={idx} className="bg-green-50 border border-green-200 rounded-2xl p-4">
                <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                  <div>
                    <p className="text-sm text-green-600 mb-1">{discount.type}</p>
                    <p className="text-green-900">{discount.rate}% discount</p>
                  </div>
                  <p className="text-green-700">-{formatCurrency(discount.amount)}</p>
                </div>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Insured Asset Details */}
      <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-5">
          <Target className="w-6 h-6 text-blue-600" />
          <h3 className="text-slate-900">Insured Asset Details</h3>
        </div>
        
        {/* Crop Details */}
        {extendedData.assetDetails?.crop && (
          <div className="space-y-4">
            <div className="grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
              <div className="bg-amber-50 rounded-2xl p-4">
                <p className="text-sm text-amber-600 mb-1">Crop Type</p>
                <p className="text-amber-900">{extendedData.assetDetails.crop.type}</p>
                {extendedData.assetDetails.crop.variety && (
                  <p className="text-sm text-amber-700 mt-1">Variety: {extendedData.assetDetails.crop.variety}</p>
                )}
              </div>
              <div className="bg-amber-50 rounded-2xl p-4">
                <p className="text-sm text-amber-600 mb-1">Total Insured Area</p>
                <p className="text-amber-900">{extendedData.assetDetails.crop.totalArea} decares</p>
                <p className="text-sm text-amber-700 mt-1">
                  ({((extendedData.assetDetails.crop.totalArea || 0) / 10).toFixed(1)} hectares)
                </p>
              </div>
            </div>
            
            {extendedData.assetDetails.crop.parcelInfo && extendedData.assetDetails.crop.parcelInfo.length > 0 && (
              <div>
                <p className="text-sm text-slate-600 mb-2">Parcel Details:</p>
                <div className="space-y-2">
                  {extendedData.assetDetails.crop.parcelInfo.map((parcel, idx) => (
                    <div key={idx} className="bg-slate-50 rounded-2xl p-3 text-sm">
                      <div className="flex justify-between items-start">
                        <div>
                          <p className="text-slate-900">{parcel.parcelNo}</p>
                          <p className="text-slate-600">{parcel.village}</p>
                        </div>
                        <div className="text-right">
                          <p className="text-slate-900">{parcel.area} decares</p>
                          {parcel.estimatedYield && (
                            <p className="text-slate-600">{parcel.estimatedYield} kg total</p>
                          )}
                        </div>
                      </div>
                      {parcel.plantingDate && (
                        <p className="text-slate-500 text-xs mt-2">Planted: {formatDate(parcel.plantingDate)}</p>
                      )}
                    </div>
                  ))}
                </div>
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        )}

        {/* Livestock Details */}
        {extendedData.assetDetails?.livestock && (
          <div className="space-y-4">
            <div className="grid md:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
              <div className="bg-blue-50 rounded-2xl p-4">
                <p className="text-sm text-blue-600 mb-1">Species</p>
                <p className="text-blue-900">{extendedData.assetDetails.livestock.species}</p>
                {extendedData.assetDetails.livestock.breed && (
                  <p className="text-sm text-blue-700 mt-1">{extendedData.assetDetails.livestock.breed}</p>
                )}
              </div>
              <div className="bg-blue-50 rounded-2xl p-4">
                <p className="text-sm text-blue-600 mb-1">Animal Count</p>
                <p className="text-blue-900 text-2xl">{extendedData.assetDetails.livestock.count}</p>
              </div>
              <div className="bg-blue-50 rounded-2xl p-4">
                <p className="text-sm text-blue-600 mb-1">Average Age</p>
                <p className="text-blue-900">{extendedData.assetDetails.livestock.averageAge} years</p>
              </div>
            </div>
            {extendedData.assetDetails.livestock.registrationSystem && (
              <div className="bg-slate-50 rounded-2xl p-3">
                <p className="text-sm text-slate-600">
                  Registration System: <strong>{extendedData.assetDetails.livestock.registrationSystem}</strong>
                </p>
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        )}

        {/* Greenhouse Details */}
        {extendedData.assetDetails?.greenhouse && (
          <div className="grid md:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
            <div className="bg-emerald-50 rounded-2xl p-4">
              <p className="text-sm text-emerald-600 mb-1">Greenhouse Type</p>
              <p className="text-emerald-900">{extendedData.assetDetails.greenhouse.type}</p>
            </div>
            <div className="bg-emerald-50 rounded-2xl p-4">
              <p className="text-sm text-emerald-600 mb-1">Total Area</p>
              <p className="text-emerald-900">{extendedData.assetDetails.greenhouse.area} m²</p>
            </div>
            <div className="bg-emerald-50 rounded-2xl p-4">
              <p className="text-sm text-emerald-600 mb-1">Risk Category</p>
              <p className="text-emerald-900">Category {extendedData.assetDetails.greenhouse.riskCategory}</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        )}

        {/* Aquaculture Details */}
        {extendedData.assetDetails?.aquaculture && (
          <div className="grid md:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
            <div className="bg-cyan-50 rounded-2xl p-4">
              <p className="text-sm text-cyan-600 mb-1">Species</p>
              <p className="text-cyan-900">{extendedData.assetDetails.aquaculture.species}</p>
            </div>
            <div className="bg-cyan-50 rounded-2xl p-4">
              <p className="text-sm text-cyan-600 mb-1">Cage Count</p>
              <p className="text-cyan-900">{extendedData.assetDetails.aquaculture.cageCount}</p>
            </div>
            <div className="bg-cyan-50 rounded-2xl p-4">
              <p className="text-sm text-cyan-600 mb-1">Total Biomass</p>
              <p className="text-cyan-900">{extendedData.assetDetails.aquaculture.totalBiomass} kg</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>

      {/* KBVS-Specific Details (Village-Based Yield Insurance) */}
      {extendedData.kbvsDetails && (
        <div className="bg-gradient-to-br from-purple-50 to-indigo-50 border border-purple-200 rounded-3xl p-6">
          <div className="flex items-start gap-4">
            <Activity className="w-6 h-6 text-purple-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-1" />
            <div className="flex-1">
              <h3 className="text-purple-900 mb-4">Village-Based Yield Insurance (KBVS) Details</h3>
              <div className="grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl p-4">
                  <p className="text-sm text-purple-600 mb-1">Village</p>
                  <p className="text-purple-900">{extendedData.kbvsDetails.village}</p>
                </div>
                <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl p-4">
                  <p className="text-sm text-purple-600 mb-1">Crop</p>
                  <p className="text-purple-900">{extendedData.kbvsDetails.crop}</p>
                </div>
                <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl p-4">
                  <p className="text-sm text-purple-600 mb-1">Reference Yield</p>
                  <p className="text-purple-900">{extendedData.kbvsDetails.referenceYield} kg/decare</p>
                  <p className="text-sm text-purple-700 mt-1">Village historical average</p>
                </div>
                <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl p-4">
                  <p className="text-sm text-purple-600 mb-1">Guaranteed Yield</p>
                  <p className="text-purple-900">{extendedData.kbvsDetails.guaranteedYield} kg/decare</p>
                  <p className="text-sm text-purple-700 mt-1">{extendedData.kbvsDetails.triggerLevel}% of reference</p>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div className="bg-purple-100 rounded-2xl p-4 mt-4">
                <p className="text-sm text-purple-900">
                  <strong>How it works:</strong> If the average yield for {extendedData.kbvsDetails.village} falls below {extendedData.kbvsDetails.guaranteedYield} kg/decare, 
                  you receive compensation based on the shortfall. No individual parcel assessment needed.
                </p>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Coverage Structure */}
      {extendedData.coverageStructure && (
        <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-5">
            <Shield className="w-6 h-6 text-blue-600" />
            <h3 className="text-slate-900">Coverage Structure</h3>
          </div>
          
          <div className="space-y-4">
            <div className="bg-blue-50 border border-blue-200 rounded-2xl p-4">
              <p className="text-sm text-blue-600 mb-1">Base Coverage</p>
              <p className="text-blue-900">{extendedData.coverageStructure.baseCoverage}</p>
            </div>
            
            {extendedData.coverageStructure.optionalCoverages && extendedData.coverageStructure.optionalCoverages.length > 0 && (
              <div>
                <p className="text-sm text-slate-600 mb-2">Optional Coverages Included:</p>
                <div className="grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-2">
                  {extendedData.coverageStructure.optionalCoverages.map((coverage, idx) => (
                    <div key={idx} className="flex items-center gap-2 bg-green-50 border border-green-200 rounded-2xl p-3">
                      <CheckCircle className="w-4 h-4 text-green-600" />
                      <p className="text-sm text-green-900">{coverage}</p>
                    </div>
                  ))}
                </div>
              </div>
            )}
            
            {extendedData.coverageStructure.excludedPerils && extendedData.coverageStructure.excludedPerils.length > 0 && (
              <div>
                <p className="text-sm text-slate-600 mb-2">Excluded Perils:</p>
                <div className="space-y-2">
                  {extendedData.coverageStructure.excludedPerils.map((peril, idx) => (
                    <div key={idx} className="flex items-start gap-2 bg-slate-50 rounded-2xl p-3">
                      <XCircle className="w-4 h-4 text-slate-400 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
                      <p className="text-sm text-slate-600">{peril}</p>
                    </div>
                  ))}
                </div>
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Livestock-Specific Coverage Details */}
      {extendedData.livestockDetails && (
        <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-5">
            <Milk className="w-6 h-6 text-blue-600" />
            <h3 className="text-slate-900">Livestock Coverage Details</h3>
          </div>
          
          <div className="space-y-4">
            <div className="bg-blue-50 rounded-2xl p-4">
              <p className="text-sm text-blue-600 mb-1">Scope Type</p>
              <p className="text-blue-900 text-lg">{extendedData.livestockDetails.scopeType}</p>
            </div>

            {extendedData.livestockDetails.pregnancyLossCoverage && (
              <div className="bg-gradient-to-br from-pink-50 to-rose-50 border border-pink-200 rounded-2xl p-4">
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
                  <Sparkles className="w-5 h-5 text-pink-600" />
                  <p className="text-pink-900">Pregnancy Loss Coverage (NEW 2025)</p>
                </div>
                <p className="text-sm text-pink-700">
                  Covers economic loss from fetus/calf death for dairy cattle aged 20+ months. Zero deductible for Wide Scope.
                </p>
              </div>
            )}

            {extendedData.livestockDetails.diseases && (
              <div className="grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                {extendedData.livestockDetails.diseases.covered && extendedData.livestockDetails.diseases.covered.length > 0 && (
                  <div>
                    <p className="text-sm text-slate-600 mb-2">Covered Diseases:</p>
                    <div className="space-y-1">
                      {extendedData.livestockDetails.diseases.covered.map((disease, idx) => (
                        <div key={idx} className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm">
                          <CheckCircle className="w-4 h-4 text-green-600" />
                          <p className="text-green-900">{disease}</p>
                        </div>
                      ))}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                )}

                {extendedData.livestockDetails.diseases.excluded && extendedData.livestockDetails.diseases.excluded.length > 0 && (
                  <div>
                    <p className="text-sm text-slate-600 mb-2">Excluded Diseases:</p>
                    <div className="space-y-1">
                      {extendedData.livestockDetails.diseases.excluded.map((disease, idx) => (
                        <div key={idx} className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm">
                          <XCircle className="w-4 h-4 text-red-600" />
                          <p className="text-red-900">{disease}</p>
                        </div>
                      ))}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                )}
              </div>
            )}

            {extendedData.livestockDetails.waitingPeriod && (
              <div className="bg-amber-50 border border-amber-200 rounded-2xl p-4">
                <p className="text-sm text-amber-600 mb-1">Waiting Period</p>
                <p className="text-amber-900">{extendedData.livestockDetails.waitingPeriod.days} days</p>
                <p className="text-sm text-amber-700 mt-1">
                  Applies to: {extendedData.livestockDetails.waitingPeriod.applicableTo.join(', ')}
                </p>
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Deductibles & Co-insurance */}
      {(extendedData.deductibles || extendedData.coInsurance) && (
        <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-5">
            <Percent className="w-6 h-6 text-orange-600" />
            <h3 className="text-slate-900">Deductibles & Co-insurance</h3>
          </div>
          
          <div className="grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
            {extendedData.deductibles && (
              <div className="bg-orange-50 rounded-2xl p-4">
                <p className="text-sm text-orange-600 mb-2">Deductibles</p>
                {extendedData.deductibles.standard && (
                  <p className="text-orange-900 mb-2">Standard: {extendedData.deductibles.standard}</p>
                )}
                {extendedData.deductibles.specificPerils && Object.keys(extendedData.deductibles.specificPerils).length > 0 && (
                  <div className="space-y-1 text-sm">
                    {Object.entries(extendedData.deductibles.specificPerils).map(([peril, value], idx) => (
                      <p key={idx} className="text-orange-700">{peril}: {value}</p>
                    ))}
                  </div>
                )}
              </div>
            )}

            {extendedData.coInsurance && (
              <div className="bg-orange-50 rounded-2xl p-4">
                <p className="text-sm text-orange-600 mb-2">Co-insurance</p>
                <p className="text-orange-900 mb-2">Rate: {extendedData.coInsurance.rate}%</p>
                {extendedData.coInsurance.applicableTo && extendedData.coInsurance.applicableTo.length > 0 && (
                  <div className="space-y-1 text-sm">
                    <p className="text-orange-700">Applies to:</p>
                    {extendedData.coInsurance.applicableTo.map((item, idx) => (
                      <p key={idx} className="text-orange-600 ml-2">• {item}</p>
                    ))}
                  </div>
                )}
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Notification Requirements */}
      {extendedData.notificationRequirements && (
        <div className="bg-red-50 border border-red-200 rounded-3xl p-6">
          <div className="flex items-start gap-4">
            <Clock className="w-6 h-6 text-red-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-1" />
            <div className="flex-1">
              <h3 className="text-red-900 mb-3">⏰ Critical: Claim Notification Deadline</h3>
              <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl p-4 mb-3">
                <p className="text-red-900 mb-2">
                  <strong>Deadline: {extendedData.notificationRequirements.deadline}</strong>
                </p>
                <p className="text-sm text-red-700">
                  Failure to notify within this period may result in claim rejection. This is the most common reason for denied claims.
                </p>
              </div>
              {extendedData.notificationRequirements.method && extendedData.notificationRequirements.method.length > 0 && (
                <div>
                  <p className="text-sm text-red-800 mb-2">Notification Methods:</p>
                  <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
                    {extendedData.notificationRequirements.method.map((method, idx) => (
                      <div key={idx} className="bg-red-100 rounded-xl px-3 py-1 text-sm text-red-900">
                        {method}
                      </div>
                    ))}
                  </div>
                </div>
              )}
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Production Planning Compliance */}
      {extendedData.productionPlanningCompliance?.compliant && (
        <div className="bg-gradient-to-br from-green-50 to-emerald-50 border border-green-200 rounded-3xl p-6">
          <div className="flex items-start gap-4">
            <Award className="w-6 h-6 text-green-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-1" />
            <div className="flex-1">
              <h3 className="text-green-900 mb-2">✅ Production Planning Compliance</h3>
              <p className="text-sm text-green-700 mb-3">
                This policy qualifies for the 10% Production Planning Discount because it aligns with the Ministry of Agriculture and Forestry's strategic production planning.
              </p>
              {extendedData.productionPlanningCompliance.planReferenceNo && (
                <p className="text-xs text-green-600">
                  Plan Reference: {extendedData.productionPlanningCompliance.planReferenceNo}
                </p>
              )}
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Claims History */}
      {extendedData.claimsHistory && extendedData.claimsHistory.totalClaims && extendedData.claimsHistory.totalClaims > 0 && (
        <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-5">
            <FileText className="w-6 h-6 text-slate-600" />
            <h3 className="text-slate-900">Claims History</h3>
          </div>
          
          <div className="grid md:grid-cols-3 gap-4 mb-4">
            <div className="bg-slate-50 rounded-2xl p-4">
              <p className="text-sm text-slate-600 mb-1">Total Claims</p>
              <p className="text-slate-900 text-2xl">{extendedData.claimsHistory.totalClaims}</p>
            </div>
            <div className="bg-slate-50 rounded-2xl p-4">
              <p className="text-sm text-slate-600 mb-1">Claims Last Year</p>
              <p className="text-slate-900 text-2xl">{extendedData.claimsHistory.claimsInLastYear}</p>
            </div>
            {extendedData.claimsHistory.largestClaim && (
              <div className="bg-slate-50 rounded-2xl p-4">
                <p className="text-sm text-slate-600 mb-1">Largest Claim</p>
                <p className="text-slate-900 text-lg">{formatCurrency(extendedData.claimsHistory.largestClaim.amount)}</p>
                <p className="text-xs text-slate-600 mt-1">{extendedData.claimsHistory.largestClaim.year} - {extendedData.claimsHistory.largestClaim.peril}</p>
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Policy Administration */}
      <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-5">
          <FileText className="w-6 h-6 text-slate-600" />
          <h3 className="text-slate-900">Policy Administration</h3>
        </div>
        
        <div className="grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
          {extendedData.tarsimReferenceNumber && (
            <div className="bg-slate-50 rounded-2xl p-4">
              <p className="text-sm text-slate-600 mb-1">TARSİM Reference</p>
              <p className="text-slate-900 font-mono text-sm">{extendedData.tarsimReferenceNumber}</p>
            </div>
          )}
          {extendedData.registrationNo && (
            <div className="bg-slate-50 rounded-2xl p-4">
              <p className="text-sm text-slate-600 mb-1">Farmer Registration</p>
              <p className="text-slate-900 font-mono text-sm">{extendedData.registrationNo}</p>
            </div>
          )}
          {extendedData.renewalNumber !== undefined && (
            <div className="bg-slate-50 rounded-2xl p-4">
              <p className="text-sm text-slate-600 mb-1">Renewal Number</p>
              <p className="text-slate-900">{extendedData.renewalNumber}</p>
              <p className="text-xs text-slate-600 mt-1">
                {extendedData.renewalNumber === 0 ? 'First year policy' : `Renewed ${extendedData.renewalNumber} times`}
              </p>
            </div>
          )}
          {extendedData.issueDate && (
            <div className="bg-slate-50 rounded-2xl p-4">
              <p className="text-sm text-slate-600 mb-1">Issue Date</p>
              <p className="text-slate-900">{formatDate(extendedData.issueDate)}</p>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>

        {extendedData.agencyInfo && (
          <div className="bg-blue-50 border border-blue-200 rounded-2xl p-4 mt-4">
            <p className="text-sm text-blue-600 mb-1">Issuing Agency</p>
            <p className="text-blue-900">{extendedData.agencyInfo}</p>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

```
