## File: `components (2)/insurance-lines/TurkishCreditLifeDetails.tsx`
- Bytes: 46,468
- SHA256: `db804971d97a9426c09082644d0eb013697be1474cc038d7e387bfa252663877`

```tsx
import { 
  Heart, Clock, AlertCircle, TrendingDown, DollarSign, Info, 
  ShieldAlert, Building2, AlertTriangle, Ban, Users, FileText,
  Scale, FileWarning, Zap, Award, CheckCircle, XCircle, ChevronRight,
  Phone, Mail, MapPin, Percent, AlertOctagon, Calendar, Coins,
  TrendingUp, Calculator, Shield, CreditCard, UserCheck, Activity,
  ClipboardList, BadgeCheck, Briefcase, Home, Car as CarIcon, Wallet,
  TrendingDownIcon
} from 'lucide-react';
import { TurkishCreditLifeExtendedData } from './types';
import { BasePolicy } from './index';

type TurkishCreditLifeDetailsProps = {
  policy: BasePolicy & {
    extendedData?: TurkishCreditLifeExtendedData;
    country?: string;
    insuranceLine?: string;
  };
};

export function TurkishCreditLifeDetails({ policy }: TurkishCreditLifeDetailsProps) {
  // Guard clause - return early if no extended data
  if (!policy.extendedData) {
    return (
      <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
        <p className="text-slate-500">No extended Turkish Credit Life Insurance data available for this policy.</p>
      </div>
    );
  }

  const extendedData = policy.extendedData as TurkishCreditLifeExtendedData;
  
  // Calculate time until coverage expires
  const now = new Date();
  const expiryDate = policy.endDate;
  const expiryDateTime = new Date(expiryDate);
  const hoursUntilExpiry = Math.max(0, (expiryDateTime.getTime() - now.getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60));
  const daysUntilExpiry = Math.floor(hoursUntilExpiry / 24);
  const monthsRemaining = Math.floor(daysUntilExpiry / 30);

  const formatCurrency = (amount: number) => {
    return new Intl.NumberFormat('tr-TR', {
      style: 'currency',
      currency: 'TRY',
      minimumFractionDigits: 0,
      maximumFractionDigits: 0
    }).format(amount);
  };

  const formatDate = (dateString: string) => {
    return new Date(dateString).toLocaleDateString('tr-TR', {
      year: 'numeric',
      month: 'long',
      day: 'numeric'
    });
  };

  // Get loan type icon and info
  const getLoanTypeInfo = () => {
    const loanType = extendedData.loanType || 'Personal Loan';
    const configs: Record<string, any> = {
      'Mortgage': {
        label: 'Mortgage (Konut Kredisi)',
        icon: Home,
        color: 'blue',
        description: 'Home loan protection',
      },
      'Vehicle Loan': {
        label: 'Vehicle Loan (Taşıt Kredisi)',
        icon: CarIcon,
        color: 'purple',
        description: 'Auto financing protection',
      },
      'Personal Loan': {
        label: 'Personal Loan (İhtiyaç Kredisi)',
        icon: Wallet,
        color: 'emerald',
        description: 'Consumer loan coverage',
      },
      'Consumer Loan': {
        label: 'Consumer Loan (Tüketici Kredisi)',
        icon: CreditCard,
        color: 'amber',
        description: 'General purpose loan',
      },
    };
    return configs[loanType] || configs['Personal Loan'];
  };

  // Get coverage type info
  const getCoverageTypeInfo = () => {
    const type = extendedData.coverageStructure?.type || 'Decreasing';
    const configs: Record<string, any> = {
      'Decreasing': {
        label: 'Decreasing Term (Azalan Bakiyeli)',
        description: 'Coverage decreases as loan is repaid',
        color: 'blue',
        icon: TrendingDownIcon,
        advantage: 'Lower premium cost',
      },
      'Level': {
        label: 'Level Term (Sabit)',
        description: 'Coverage remains constant throughout loan term',
        color: 'emerald',
        icon: Award,
        advantage: 'Maximum family protection',
      },
    };
    return configs[type] || configs['Decreasing'];
  };

  const loanTypeInfo = getLoanTypeInfo();
  const coverageTypeInfo = getCoverageTypeInfo();

  // Calculate loan progress
  const loanTerm = extendedData.loanTerm || 36;
  const monthsElapsed = loanTerm - monthsRemaining;
  const loanProgress = (monthsElapsed / loanTerm) * 100;

  return (
    <div className="space-y-6">
      {/* Header Card */}
      <div className="bg-gradient-to-br from-indigo-600 to-purple-700 text-white rounded-3xl p-8">
        <div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-4">
          <div>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-2">
              <Shield className="w-8 h-8" />
              <h2 className="text-2xl">🇹🇷 Turkish Credit-Linked Life Insurance</h2>
            </div>
            <p className="text-indigo-100">Kredi Bağlantılı Hayat Sigortası - Loan Protection & Family Security</p>
          </div>
          <div className="text-right">
            <p className="text-sm opacity-80 mb-1">Coverage expires in</p>
            <p className="text-3xl">{monthsRemaining} months</p>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div className="grid grid-cols-4 gap-4 mt-6">
          <div className="bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-2xl p-4">
            <p className="text-indigo-100 text-sm mb-1">Loan Type</p>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
              <loanTypeInfo.icon className="w-5 h-5" />
              <p className="text-lg">{loanTypeInfo.label.split('(')[0].trim()}</p>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div className="bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-2xl p-4">
            <p className="text-indigo-100 text-sm mb-1">Coverage Type</p>
            <p className="text-lg">{extendedData.coverageStructure?.type || 'Decreasing'}</p>
          </div>
          <div className="bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-2xl p-4">
            <p className="text-indigo-100 text-sm mb-1">Sum Assured</p>
            <p className="text-lg">{formatCurrency(extendedData.coverageStructure?.currentSumAssured || policy.coverage)}</p>
          </div>
          <div className="bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-2xl p-4">
            <p className="text-indigo-100 text-sm mb-1">Monthly Premium</p>
            <p className="text-lg">{formatCurrency(policy.monthlyPremium)}</p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Critical: Lienholder & Beneficiary Structure */}
      <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
        <h3 className="text-slate-900 mb-6 flex items-center gap-2">
          <Building2 className="w-6 h-6 text-blue-600" />
          Critical: Lienholder & Beneficiary Information
        </h3>

        <div className="p-6 bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-50 to-blue-100 rounded-2xl border-2 border-blue-300 mb-4">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-4">
            <div className="p-3 bg-blue-600 rounded-xl">
              <Building2 className="w-6 h-6 text-white" />
            </div>
            <div>
              <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm">Dain-i Mürtehin (Pledgee / Lienholder)</p>
              <p className="text-2xl text-slate-900">{extendedData.dainIMurtehin || 'Bank Name'}</p>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div className="p-4 bg-blue-50 rounded-xl border border-blue-200">
            <p className="text-sm text-slate-700 mb-2"><strong>What this means:</strong></p>
            <ul className="space-y-2 text-sm text-slate-600">
              <li className="flex items-start gap-2">
                <CheckCircle className="w-4 h-4 text-blue-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
                <span>The bank is the <strong>first beneficiary</strong> and receives claim payments up to the outstanding loan balance</span>
              </li>
              <li className="flex items-start gap-2">
                <CheckCircle className="w-4 h-4 text-blue-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
                <span>In the event of death or total disability, the loan is paid off automatically - heirs do not inherit the debt</span>
              </li>
              <li className="flex items-start gap-2">
                <CheckCircle className="w-4 h-4 text-blue-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
                <span>{extendedData.coverageStructure?.beneficiaryStructure || 'Any surplus above the loan amount goes to your heirs'}</span>
              </li>
            </ul>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
          <div className="p-4 bg-slate-50 rounded-2xl">
            <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm mb-1">Credit Reference Number</p>
            <p className="text-slate-900">{extendedData.creditReferenceNo || 'N/A'}</p>
          </div>
          <div className="p-4 bg-slate-50 rounded-2xl">
            <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm mb-1">Product/Tariff Name</p>
            <p className="text-slate-900">{extendedData.tariffProductName || 'Standard Credit Life'}</p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Insured Person & Health Declaration */}
      <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
        <h3 className="text-slate-900 mb-6 flex items-center gap-2">
          <UserCheck className="w-6 h-6 text-purple-600" />
          Insured Person & Health Declaration
        </h3>

        <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4 mb-6">
          <div className="p-4 bg-slate-50 rounded-2xl">
            <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm mb-1">Policyholder Name</p>
            <p className="text-slate-900">{extendedData.policyholderName || 'N/A'}</p>
          </div>
          <div className="p-4 bg-slate-50 rounded-2xl">
            <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm mb-1">T.C. Kimlik No</p>
            <p className="text-slate-900">{extendedData.idNumber || 'N/A'}</p>
          </div>
          <div className="p-4 bg-slate-50 rounded-2xl">
            <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm mb-1">Age (Primary Premium Driver)</p>
            <p className="text-slate-900 flex items-center gap-2">
              <Activity className="w-4 h-4 text-slate-600" />
              {extendedData.age || 'N/A'} years old
            </p>
          </div>
          <div className="p-4 bg-slate-50 rounded-2xl">
            <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm mb-1">Occupation</p>
            <p className="text-slate-900 flex items-center gap-2">
              <Briefcase className="w-4 h-4 text-slate-600" />
              {extendedData.occupation || 'N/A'}
            </p>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="p-4 bg-amber-50 rounded-2xl border border-amber-200">
          <div className="flex items-start gap-3 mb-3">
            <AlertTriangle className="w-5 h-5 text-amber-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
            <div>
              <p className="text-slate-900 mb-1"><strong>Health Declaration Status:</strong> {extendedData.healthDeclarationStatus || 'Pending'}</p>
              <p className="text-sm text-slate-600">{extendedData.healthDeclarationNotes || 'No notes available'}</p>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div className="p-3 bg-amber-100 rounded-xl">
            <p className="text-sm text-amber-900">⚠️ <strong>Critical Warning:</strong> False or incomplete health declarations are the #1 cause of claim rejection. If undisclosed pre-existing conditions caused death, the claim will be denied.</p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Loan Details & Progress */}
      <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
        <h3 className="text-slate-900 mb-6 flex items-center gap-2">
          <CreditCard className="w-6 h-6 text-emerald-600" />
          Loan Details & Repayment Progress
        </h3>

        <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-4 mb-6">
          <div className="p-4 bg-slate-50 rounded-2xl">
            <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm mb-1">Original Loan Principal</p>
            <p className="text-2xl text-slate-900">{formatCurrency(extendedData.loanPrincipal || 0)}</p>
          </div>
          <div className="p-4 bg-emerald-50 rounded-2xl border border-emerald-200">
            <p className="text-emerald-700 text-sm mb-1">Current Outstanding Balance</p>
            <p className="text-2xl text-emerald-900">{formatCurrency(extendedData.currentOutstandingBalance || 0)}</p>
          </div>
          <div className="p-4 bg-slate-50 rounded-2xl">
            <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm mb-1">Monthly Installment</p>
            <p className="text-2xl text-slate-900">{formatCurrency(extendedData.monthlyInstallment || 0)}</p>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="p-4 bg-slate-50 rounded-2xl mb-4">
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-2">
            <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm">Loan Progress</p>
            <p className="text-slate-900">{Math.round(loanProgress)}% complete</p>
          </div>
          <div className="w-full bg-slate-200 rounded-full h-3">
            <div 
              className="bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-500 to-emerald-500 h-3 rounded-full transition-all duration-500"
              style={{ width: `${loanProgress}%` }}
            />
          </div>
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between mt-2 text-xs text-slate-500">
            <span>{formatDate(extendedData.loanStartDate || policy.startDate)}</span>
            <span>{monthsElapsed} of {loanTerm} months</span>
            <span>{formatDate(extendedData.loanEndDate || policy.endDate)}</span>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
          <div className="p-4 bg-slate-50 rounded-2xl">
            <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm mb-1">Loan Term</p>
            <p className="text-slate-900">{loanTerm} months ({Math.round(loanTerm / 12)} years)</p>
          </div>
          <div className="p-4 bg-slate-50 rounded-2xl">
            <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm mb-1">Loan Type</p>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
              <loanTypeInfo.icon className="w-5 h-5" style={{ color: `var(--${loanTypeInfo.color}-600)` }} />
              <p className="text-slate-900">{loanTypeInfo.label}</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Coverage Structure */}
      <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
        <h3 className="text-slate-900 mb-6 flex items-center gap-2">
          <coverageTypeInfo.icon className="w-6 h-6" style={{ color: `var(--${coverageTypeInfo.color}-600)` }} />
          Coverage Structure: {coverageTypeInfo.label}
        </h3>

        <div className={`p-6 bg-gradient-to-br from-${coverageTypeInfo.color}-50 to-${coverageTypeInfo.color}-100 rounded-2xl border border-${coverageTypeInfo.color}-200 mb-6`}>
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-4">
            <div>
              <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm mb-1">Initial Sum Assured</p>
              <p className="text-3xl text-slate-900">{formatCurrency(extendedData.coverageStructure?.initialSumAssured || policy.coverage)}</p>
            </div>
            <ChevronRight className="w-8 h-8 text-slate-400" />
            <div>
              <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm mb-1">Current Sum Assured</p>
              <p className="text-3xl text-slate-900">{formatCurrency(extendedData.coverageStructure?.currentSumAssured || policy.coverage)}</p>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div className={`p-4 bg-${coverageTypeInfo.color}-200 rounded-xl`}>
            <p className={`text-${coverageTypeInfo.color}-900 text-sm`}>
              <strong>{coverageTypeInfo.advantage}:</strong> {coverageTypeInfo.description}
            </p>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="space-y-4">
          <div className="p-4 bg-blue-50 rounded-2xl border border-blue-200">
            <h4 className="text-slate-900 mb-3 flex items-center gap-2">
              <Info className="w-5 h-5 text-blue-600" />
              Understanding Coverage Types
            </h4>
            <div className="space-y-3 text-sm">
              <div className="p-3 bg-white rounded-xl">
                <p className="text-slate-900 mb-1"><strong>Decreasing Term (Azalan Bakiyeli):</strong></p>
                <p className="text-slate-600">Coverage amount reduces monthly as you pay off the loan. Lower premium. If you die in year 9 of a 10-year loan, only the small remaining balance is paid.</p>
              </div>
              <div className="p-3 bg-white rounded-xl">
                <p className="text-slate-900 mb-1"><strong>Level Term (Sabit):</strong></p>
                <p className="text-slate-600">Coverage stays constant. Higher premium. If you die in year 9, the bank takes the remaining debt and your heirs receive the large surplus.</p>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Main Coverages */}
      <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
        <h3 className="text-slate-900 mb-6 flex items-center gap-2">
          <Shield className="w-6 h-6 text-blue-600" />
          Coverage Details (Teminatlar)
        </h3>

        <div className="space-y-4">
          {/* Death Benefit */}
          {extendedData.coverages?.death?.enabled && (
            <div className="p-6 bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-50 to-blue-100 rounded-2xl border border-blue-200">
              <div className="flex items-start gap-4 mb-4">
                <div className="p-3 bg-blue-600 rounded-xl">
                  <Heart className="w-6 h-6 text-white" />
                </div>
                <div className="flex-1">
                  <h4 className="text-slate-900 mb-1">Death Benefit (Vefat Teminatı)</h4>
                  <p className="text-sm text-slate-600 mb-3">{extendedData.coverages.death.coverage}</p>
                  <div className="p-3 bg-white rounded-xl">
                    <p className="text-sm text-slate-900 mb-2"><strong>How it works:</strong></p>
                    <ol className="space-y-1 text-sm text-slate-600 list-decimal list-inside">
                      <li>Insurer pays the outstanding loan balance to the bank</li>
                      <li>Your heirs do NOT inherit the debt</li>
                      <li>The financed asset (house/car) becomes debt-free for your family</li>
                      <li>If coverage exceeds debt, heirs receive the surplus</li>
                    </ol>
                  </div>
                  {extendedData.coverages.death.exclusions && extendedData.coverages.death.exclusions.length > 0 && (
                    <div className="mt-3 p-3 bg-amber-50 rounded-xl border border-amber-200">
                      <p className="text-sm text-amber-900 mb-2"><strong>Exclusions:</strong></p>
                      <ul className="space-y-1 text-sm text-amber-800">
                        {extendedData.coverages.death.exclusions.map((exclusion, idx) => (
                          <li key={idx} className="flex items-start gap-2">
                            <XCircle className="w-4 h-4 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
                            <span>{exclusion}</span>
                          </li>
                        ))}
                      </ul>
                    </div>
                  )}
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          )}

          {/* Accidental Death */}
          {extendedData.coverages?.accidentalDeath?.enabled && (
            <div className="p-4 bg-purple-50 rounded-2xl border border-purple-200">
              <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                <Zap className="w-6 h-6 text-purple-600 flex-shrink-0" />
                <div className="flex-1">
                  <h4 className="text-slate-900 mb-1">Accidental Death (Kaza Sonucu Vefat)</h4>
                  <p className="text-sm text-slate-600">
                    {extendedData.coverages.accidentalDeath.doubleIndemnity 
                      ? '🎯 Double Indemnity: Pays 2x the sum assured if death is caused by accident'
                      : 'Additional coverage for accidental death'}
                  </p>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          )}

          {/* Total Disability */}
          {extendedData.coverages?.totalDisability?.enabled && (
            <div className="p-6 bg-gradient-to-br from-emerald-50 to-emerald-100 rounded-2xl border border-emerald-200">
              <div className="flex items-start gap-4">
                <div className="p-3 bg-emerald-600 rounded-xl">
                  <Activity className="w-6 h-6 text-white" />
                </div>
                <div className="flex-1">
                  <h4 className="text-slate-900 mb-1">Total & Permanent Disability (Tam ve Daimi Maluliyet)</h4>
                  <p className="text-sm text-slate-600 mb-3">Trigger: {extendedData.coverages.totalDisability.trigger}</p>
                  <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3">
                    <div className="p-3 bg-white rounded-xl">
                      <p className="text-xs text-slate-600 mb-1">Certification Required</p>
                      <p className="text-sm text-slate-900">{extendedData.coverages.totalDisability.certification}</p>
                    </div>
                    <div className="p-3 bg-white rounded-xl">
                      <p className="text-xs text-slate-600 mb-1">Payout Type</p>
                      <p className="text-sm text-slate-900">{extendedData.coverages.totalDisability.payoutType}</p>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <p className="text-sm text-emerald-800 mt-3 bg-emerald-50 p-3 rounded-xl">
                    💡 Functions exactly like death benefit - pays off the entire loan to relieve you of debt burden
                  </p>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          )}

          {/* Involuntary Unemployment */}
          {extendedData.coverages?.involuntaryUnemployment?.enabled && (
            <div className="p-6 bg-gradient-to-br from-amber-50 to-amber-100 rounded-2xl border border-amber-200">
              <div className="flex items-start gap-4">
                <div className="p-3 bg-amber-600 rounded-xl">
                  <Users className="w-6 h-6 text-white" />
                </div>
                <div className="flex-1">
                  <h4 className="text-slate-900 mb-1">Involuntary Unemployment (İstem Dışı İşsizlik)</h4>
                  <p className="text-sm text-slate-600 mb-3">For private-sector employees only</p>
                  <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-3 mb-3">
                    <div className="p-3 bg-white rounded-xl">
                      <p className="text-xs text-slate-600 mb-1">Max Coverage</p>
                      <p className="text-sm text-slate-900">{extendedData.coverages.involuntaryUnemployment.maxMonthsCovered} months</p>
                    </div>
                    <div className="p-3 bg-white rounded-xl">
                      <p className="text-xs text-slate-600 mb-1">Waiting Period</p>
                      <p className="text-sm text-slate-900">{extendedData.coverages.involuntaryUnemployment.waitingPeriod} days</p>
                    </div>
                    <div className="p-3 bg-white rounded-xl">
                      <p className="text-xs text-slate-600 mb-1">Monthly Benefit</p>
                      <p className="text-sm text-slate-900">{formatCurrency(extendedData.coverages.involuntaryUnemployment.monthlyBenefit || 0)}</p>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <div className="p-3 bg-amber-50 rounded-xl border border-amber-200">
                    <p className="text-sm text-amber-900 mb-2"><strong>Important:</strong></p>
                    <ul className="space-y-1 text-sm text-amber-800">
                      <li className="flex items-start gap-2">
                        <CheckCircle className="w-4 h-4 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
                        <span>Pays monthly installments, NOT the full loan</span>
                      </li>
                      <li className="flex items-start gap-2">
                        <CheckCircle className="w-4 h-4 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
                        <span>Only triggered if you are fired (not resignation)</span>
                      </li>
                      <li className="flex items-start gap-2">
                        <CheckCircle className="w-4 h-4 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
                        <span>Must register with İŞKUR (Turkish Employment Agency)</span>
                      </li>
                    </ul>
                  </div>
                  {extendedData.coverages.involuntaryUnemployment.exclusions && (
                    <div className="mt-3 p-3 bg-white rounded-xl">
                      <p className="text-sm text-slate-900 mb-2"><strong>Not covered:</strong></p>
                      <ul className="space-y-1 text-sm text-slate-600">
                        {extendedData.coverages.involuntaryUnemployment.exclusions.map((exclusion, idx) => (
                          <li key={idx} className="flex items-start gap-2">
                            <Ban className="w-4 h-4 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5 text-red-500" />
                            <span>{exclusion}</span>
                          </li>
                        ))}
                      </ul>
                    </div>
                  )}
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Premium & Tax Benefits */}
      <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
        <h3 className="text-slate-900 mb-6 flex items-center gap-2">
          <DollarSign className="w-6 h-6 text-emerald-600" />
          Premium Structure & Tax Benefits
        </h3>

        <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4 mb-6">
          <div className="p-6 bg-slate-50 rounded-2xl">
            <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm mb-1">Payment Method</p>
            <p className="text-2xl text-slate-900 mb-2">{extendedData.premiumStructure?.paymentMethod}</p>
            <div className="space-y-1 text-sm text-slate-600">
              <p>Total Premium: {formatCurrency(extendedData.premiumStructure?.totalPremium || 0)}</p>
              <p>Monthly Equivalent: {formatCurrency(extendedData.premiumStructure?.monthlyPremium || policy.monthlyPremium)}</p>
              {extendedData.premiumStructure?.addedToLoanAmount && (
                <p className="text-amber-700 flex items-center gap-1">
                  <Info className="w-4 h-4" />
                  Added to loan principal
                </p>
              )}
            </div>
          </div>

          {extendedData.taxBenefits?.eligible && (
            <div className="p-6 bg-gradient-to-br from-emerald-50 to-emerald-100 rounded-2xl border border-emerald-200">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
                <Coins className="w-6 h-6 text-emerald-600" />
                <p className="text-slate-900">Tax Deduction Benefit</p>
              </div>
              <p className="text-3xl text-emerald-700 mb-2">{formatCurrency(extendedData.taxBenefits.estimatedAnnualSaving || 0)}/year</p>
              <div className="space-y-1 text-sm text-slate-600">
                <p>Deduction Rate: {extendedData.taxBenefits.deductionRate}% of gross salary</p>
                <p className="text-emerald-700">💰 Effective cost reduction: ~20-30%</p>
                <p className="text-xs text-slate-500 mt-2">{extendedData.taxBenefits.applicableTo}</p>
              </div>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>

        {extendedData.premiumStructure?.premiumDrivers && (
          <div className="p-4 bg-blue-50 rounded-2xl border border-blue-200">
            <p className="text-slate-900 mb-2 flex items-center gap-2">
              <Calculator className="w-5 h-5 text-blue-600" />
              <strong>Premium Calculation Factors:</strong>
            </p>
            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-2">
              {extendedData.premiumStructure.premiumDrivers.map((driver, idx) => (
                <div key={idx} className="p-2 bg-white rounded-xl text-sm text-slate-700">
                  {driver}
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>

      {/* Critical Exclusions */}
      <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
        <h3 className="text-slate-900 mb-6 flex items-center gap-2">
          <ShieldAlert className="w-6 h-6 text-red-600" />
          Critical Exclusions (Teminat Dışı Haller)
        </h3>

        <div className="space-y-4">
          {/* Suicide Clause */}
          {extendedData.exclusions?.suicideClause && (
            <div className="p-6 bg-gradient-to-br from-red-50 to-red-100 rounded-2xl border-2 border-red-300">
              <div className="flex items-start gap-4">
                <AlertOctagon className="w-8 h-8 text-red-600 flex-shrink-0" />
                <div className="flex-1">
                  <h4 className="text-red-900 mb-2"><strong>Suicide Clause (İntihar Klozu)</strong></h4>
                  <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3">
                    <div className="p-3 bg-white rounded-xl">
                      <p className="text-xs text-slate-600 mb-1">Excluded Period</p>
                      <p className="text-sm text-red-900">{extendedData.exclusions.suicideClause.period}</p>
                    </div>
                    <div className="p-3 bg-white rounded-xl">
                      <p className="text-xs text-slate-600 mb-1">After Period</p>
                      <p className="text-sm text-emerald-700">{extendedData.exclusions.suicideClause.afterPeriod}</p>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <p className="text-sm text-red-800 mt-3 bg-red-50 p-3 rounded-xl">
                    ⚠️ If suicide occurs within the exclusion period, the insurer pays NOTHING (or only the mathematical reserve). This is one of the strictest exclusions.
                  </p>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          )}

          {/* Pre-existing Conditions */}
          {extendedData.exclusions?.preExistingConditions && (
            <div className="p-6 bg-gradient-to-br from-amber-50 to-amber-100 rounded-2xl border-2 border-amber-300">
              <div className="flex items-start gap-4">
                <FileWarning className="w-8 h-8 text-amber-600 flex-shrink-0" />
                <div className="flex-1">
                  <h4 className="text-amber-900 mb-2"><strong>Pre-Existing Conditions (Beyan Edilmeyen Hastalıklar)</strong></h4>
                  <div className="p-3 bg-white rounded-xl mb-3">
                    <p className="text-sm text-slate-900 mb-1"><strong>The Rule:</strong></p>
                    <p className="text-sm text-slate-700">{extendedData.exclusions.preExistingConditions.clause}</p>
                  </div>
                  <div className="p-3 bg-amber-50 rounded-xl border border-amber-200">
                    <p className="text-sm text-amber-900 mb-1"><strong>Impact:</strong></p>
                    <p className="text-sm text-amber-800">{extendedData.exclusions.preExistingConditions.impact}</p>
                  </div>
                  <p className="text-sm text-amber-900 mt-3 bg-amber-100 p-3 rounded-xl">
                    🚨 <strong>Example:</strong> Borrower diagnosed with cancer takes loan, dies 3 months later. If cancer was NOT declared on health form → claim REJECTED for "Breach of Duty of Disclosure"
                  </p>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          )}

          {/* Other Exclusions */}
          <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
            <div className="p-4 bg-slate-50 rounded-2xl">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
                <Ban className="w-5 h-5 text-red-600" />
                <p className="text-slate-900"><strong>Criminal Acts</strong></p>
              </div>
              <p className="text-sm text-slate-600">
                {extendedData.exclusions?.criminalActs 
                  ? 'Death occurring while committing a crime is excluded'
                  : 'Covered'}
              </p>
            </div>

            {extendedData.exclusions?.warAndTerror && (
              <div className="p-4 bg-slate-50 rounded-2xl">
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
                  <ShieldAlert className="w-5 h-5 text-red-600" />
                  <p className="text-slate-900"><strong>War & Terror</strong></p>
                </div>
                <p className="text-sm text-slate-600">
                  Direct participation: {extendedData.exclusions.warAndTerror.directParticipation ? 'Excluded' : 'Covered'}<br />
                  Passive victim: {extendedData.exclusions.warAndTerror.passiveVictim ? 'Covered ✓' : 'Excluded'}
                </p>
              </div>
            )}

            {extendedData.exclusions?.aviation && (
              <div className="p-4 bg-slate-50 rounded-2xl">
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
                  <AlertTriangle className="w-5 h-5 text-amber-600" />
                  <p className="text-slate-900"><strong>Aviation</strong></p>
                </div>
                <p className="text-sm text-slate-600">{extendedData.exclusions.aviation}</p>
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Consumer Rights: Early Closure & Refunds */}
      <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
        <h3 className="text-slate-900 mb-6 flex items-center gap-2">
          <Scale className="w-6 h-6 text-blue-600" />
          Consumer Rights: Early Loan Closure & Refunds
        </h3>

        {extendedData.surrenderRights && (
          <div className="space-y-4">
            <div className="p-6 bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-50 to-blue-100 rounded-2xl border border-blue-200">
              <div className="flex items-start gap-4 mb-4">
                <div className="p-3 bg-blue-600 rounded-xl">
                  <Coins className="w-6 h-6 text-white" />
                </div>
                <div className="flex-1">
                  <h4 className="text-slate-900 mb-1">Current Surrender Value (İştira Değeri)</h4>
                  <p className="text-4xl text-blue-700 mb-2">{formatCurrency(extendedData.surrenderRights.surrenderValue || 0)}</p>
                  <p className="text-sm text-slate-600">Refund amount if you close the loan today</p>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div className="p-4 bg-white rounded-xl">
                <p className="text-sm text-slate-900 mb-2"><strong>Refund Formula:</strong></p>
                <p className="text-sm text-slate-600">{extendedData.surrenderRights.refundFormula}</p>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
              <div className="p-4 bg-slate-50 rounded-2xl">
                <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm mb-1">Early Closure Allowed?</p>
                <p className="text-slate-900 flex items-center gap-2">
                  {extendedData.surrenderRights.earlyClosureAllowed ? (
                    <><CheckCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-emerald-600" /> Yes</>
                  ) : (
                    <><XCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-red-600" /> No</>
                  )}
                </p>
              </div>
              <div className="p-4 bg-slate-50 rounded-2xl">
                <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm mb-1">Automatic Refund?</p>
                <p className="text-slate-900 flex items-center gap-2">
                  {extendedData.surrenderRights.automaticRefund ? (
                    <><CheckCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-emerald-600" /> Yes</>
                  ) : (
                    <><XCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-amber-600" /> No - Must apply</>
                  )}
                </p>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div className="p-4 bg-amber-50 rounded-2xl border border-amber-200">
              <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                <AlertCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-amber-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
                <div>
                  <p className="text-amber-900 mb-2"><strong>Process Required:</strong></p>
                  <p className="text-sm text-amber-800">{extendedData.surrenderRights.processRequired}</p>
                  <p className="text-sm text-amber-700 mt-2 bg-amber-100 p-3 rounded-xl">
                    ⚠️ <strong>Critical:</strong> Refunds are rarely automatic. If you pay off a 36-month loan in month 12, you MUST actively request the refund for the remaining 24 months. Banks won't remind you!
                  </p>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>

      {/* Regulatory Compliance */}
      <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
        <h3 className="text-slate-900 mb-6 flex items-center gap-2">
          <BadgeCheck className="w-6 h-6 text-purple-600" />
          Regulatory Compliance & Consumer Rights
        </h3>

        {extendedData.regulatoryInfo && (
          <div className="space-y-4">
            <div className="p-6 bg-gradient-to-br from-purple-50 to-purple-100 rounded-2xl border-2 border-purple-300">
              <div className="flex items-start gap-4">
                <Scale className="w-8 h-8 text-purple-600 flex-shrink-0" />
                <div className="flex-1">
                  <h4 className="text-purple-900 mb-2"><strong>Right of Choice (Seçim Hakkı) - Article 13</strong></h4>
                  <p className="text-sm text-purple-800 bg-purple-50 p-3 rounded-xl mb-3">
                    {extendedData.regulatoryInfo.rightOfChoice}
                  </p>
                  <div className="p-3 bg-white rounded-xl">
                    <p className="text-sm text-slate-900 mb-2"><strong>Operational Reality:</strong></p>
                    <p className="text-sm text-slate-600">
                      Banks often incentivize their own policy: {extendedData.regulatoryInfo.bankIncentive || 'No specific incentive disclosed'}
                    </p>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
              <div className="p-4 bg-slate-50 rounded-2xl">
                <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm mb-1">General Conditions</p>
                <p className="text-slate-900">{extendedData.regulatoryInfo.generalConditions}</p>
              </div>
              <div className="p-4 bg-slate-50 rounded-2xl">
                <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm mb-1">Governing Regulation</p>
                <p className="text-slate-900">{extendedData.regulatoryInfo.regulation}</p>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>

      {/* Claims Process */}
      <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
        <h3 className="text-slate-900 mb-6 flex items-center gap-2">
          <ClipboardList className="w-6 h-6 text-blue-600" />
          Claims Process & Documentation
        </h3>

        {extendedData.claimsInfo && (
          <div className="space-y-4">
            <div className="p-6 bg-blue-50 rounded-2xl border border-blue-200 mb-4">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-4">
                <Building2 className="w-6 h-6 text-blue-600" />
                <h4 className="text-slate-900"><strong>First Beneficiary</strong></h4>
              </div>
              <p className="text-lg text-blue-800 mb-2">{extendedData.claimsInfo.firstBeneficiary}</p>
              <p className="text-sm text-slate-600">
                The bank always receives claim payment first, up to the outstanding debt amount. 
                {extendedData.claimsInfo.surplusToHeirs && ' Any surplus goes to your heirs.'}
              </p>
            </div>

            <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-4 mb-4">
              {extendedData.claimsInfo.deathClaimProcess && (
                <div className="p-4 bg-slate-50 rounded-2xl">
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
                    <Heart className="w-5 h-5 text-slate-600" />
                    <p className="text-slate-900"><strong>Death Claim</strong></p>
                  </div>
                  <p className="text-sm text-slate-600">{extendedData.claimsInfo.deathClaimProcess}</p>
                </div>
              )}
              {extendedData.claimsInfo.disabilityClaimProcess && (
                <div className="p-4 bg-slate-50 rounded-2xl">
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
                    <Activity className="w-5 h-5 text-slate-600" />
                    <p className="text-slate-900"><strong>Disability Claim</strong></p>
                  </div>
                  <p className="text-sm text-slate-600">{extendedData.claimsInfo.disabilityClaimProcess}</p>
                </div>
              )}
              {extendedData.claimsInfo.unemploymentClaimProcess && (
                <div className="p-4 bg-slate-50 rounded-2xl">
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
                    <Users className="w-5 h-5 text-slate-600" />
                    <p className="text-slate-900"><strong>Unemployment</strong></p>
                  </div>
                  <p className="text-sm text-slate-600">{extendedData.claimsInfo.unemploymentClaimProcess}</p>
                </div>
              )}
            </div>

            <div className="p-4 bg-slate-50 rounded-2xl">
              <p className="text-slate-900 mb-2 flex items-center gap-2">
                <FileText className="w-5 h-5 text-slate-600" />
                <strong>Documentation Required</strong>
              </p>
              {extendedData.claimsInfo.documentationRequired && (
                <ul className="space-y-1 text-sm text-slate-600">
                  {extendedData.claimsInfo.documentationRequired.map((doc, idx) => (
                    <li key={idx} className="flex items-start gap-2">
                      <CheckCircle className="w-4 h-4 text-blue-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
                      <span>{doc}</span>
                    </li>
                  ))}
                </ul>
              )}
            </div>

            <div className="p-4 bg-amber-50 rounded-2xl border border-amber-200">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-1">
                <Clock className="w-5 h-5 text-amber-600" />
                <p className="text-amber-900"><strong>Average Processing Time</strong></p>
              </div>
              <p className="text-sm text-amber-800">{extendedData.claimsInfo.averageProcessingTime}</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>

      {/* Policy History */}
      {extendedData.policyHistory && (
        <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
          <h3 className="text-slate-900 mb-6 flex items-center gap-2">
            <Calendar className="w-6 h-6 text-slate-600" />
            Policy History
          </h3>

          <div className="grid grid-cols-4 gap-4">
            <div className="p-4 bg-slate-50 rounded-2xl">
              <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm mb-1">Years in Force</p>
              <p className="text-2xl text-slate-900">{extendedData.policyHistory.yearsInForce?.toFixed(1) || '0'}</p>
            </div>
            <div className="p-4 bg-slate-50 rounded-2xl">
              <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm mb-1">Claims Filed</p>
              <p className="text-2xl text-slate-900">{extendedData.policyHistory.claimsFiled || 0}</p>
            </div>
            <div className="p-4 bg-slate-50 rounded-2xl">
              <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm mb-1">Last Renewal</p>
              <p className="text-sm text-slate-900">{extendedData.policyHistory.lastRenewalDate || 'N/A'}</p>
            </div>
            <div className="p-4 bg-slate-50 rounded-2xl">
              <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm mb-1">Original Loan</p>
              <p className="text-sm text-slate-900">
                {extendedData.policyHistory.continuousFromOriginalLoan ? (
                  <span className="flex items-center gap-1 text-emerald-600">
                    <CheckCircle className="w-4 h-4" /> Yes
                  </span>
                ) : (
                  <span className="flex items-center gap-1 text-amber-600">
                    <XCircle className="w-4 h-4" /> No
                  </span>
                )}
              </p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Summary Card */}
      <div className="bg-gradient-to-br from-slate-900 to-slate-800 text-white rounded-3xl p-8">
        <h3 className="mb-4 flex items-center gap-2">
          <Info className="w-6 h-6" />
          Strategic Summary
        </h3>
        <div className="space-y-4">
          <div className="p-4 bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-2xl">
            <p className="text-sm mb-2 opacity-80">For the Bank</p>
            <p className="text-base">Credit risk mitigation. Ensures loan repayment if borrower dies/disabled, eliminating complex inheritance foreclosure.</p>
          </div>
          <div className="p-4 bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-2xl">
            <p className="text-sm mb-2 opacity-80">For the Borrower/Heirs</p>
            <p className="text-base">Asset protection. Prevents debt from passing to heirs, ensuring family retains the financed asset (house/car) debt-free.</p>
          </div>
          <div className="p-4 bg-emerald-500/20 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-2xl border border-emerald-400/30">
            <p className="text-sm mb-2 text-emerald-200">Tax Advantage</p>
            <p className="text-base">For salaried employees, premiums are tax-deductible (up to 15% of income), effectively lowering policy cost by 20-30%.</p>
          </div>
          <div className="p-4 bg-amber-500/20 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-2xl border border-amber-400/30">
            <p className="text-sm mb-2 text-amber-200">Claim Priority</p>
            <p className="text-base">In a claim, the Bank ALWAYS gets paid first. Heirs only see money if Sum Assured {">"} Outstanding Debt Balance.</p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

```

## File: `components (2)/insurance-lines/TurkishEngineeringDetails.tsx`
- Bytes: 51,914
- SHA256: `52b94e1528d461f91053074cbb438e810ba862f5a4f71f4a557d76491d1fd78b`

```tsx
import { 
  Hammer, Clock, AlertCircle, Shield, MapPin, Building2, 
  TrendingUp, CheckCircle, Info, ShieldAlert, DollarSign,
  Calendar, Sparkles, AlertTriangle, FileText, Users,
  Percent, ChevronRight, Ban, XCircle, AlertOctagon,
  Award, CheckSquare, WalletCards, Zap, Factory,
  Wrench, HardHat, Cog, Cpu, TestTube, Settings,
  Mountain, Flame, Wind, CloudRain, X, Activity,
  Target, TrendingDown, BadgePercent, CircleDot,
  Layers, Container, Truck, PackageCheck, Eye, Lock,
  Gauge, Timer, BarChart3, Scale, ShieldCheck, Briefcase
} from 'lucide-react';
import { TurkishEngineeringExtendedData } from './types';
import { BasePolicy } from './index';

type TurkishEngineeringDetailsProps = {
  policy: BasePolicy & {
    extendedData?: TurkishEngineeringExtendedData;
    country?: string;
    insuranceLine?: string;
  };
};

export function TurkishEngineeringDetails({ policy }: TurkishEngineeringDetailsProps) {
  // Guard clause - return early if no extended data
  if (!policy.extendedData) {
    return (
      <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
        <p className="text-slate-500">No extended Turkish Engineering Insurance data available for this policy.</p>
      </div>
    );
  }

  const extendedData = policy.extendedData as TurkishEngineeringExtendedData;
  
  // Calculate time until coverage expires
  const now = new Date();
  const expiryDate = extendedData.expirationDateTime?.date || policy.endDate;
  const expiryTime = extendedData.expirationDateTime?.time || '12:00';
  const expiryDateTime = new Date(`${expiryDate}T${expiryTime}:00`);
  const hoursUntilExpiry = Math.max(0, (expiryDateTime.getTime() - now.getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60));
  const daysUntilExpiry = Math.floor(hoursUntilExpiry / 24);

  const formatCurrency = (amount: number) => {
    return new Intl.NumberFormat('tr-TR', {
      style: 'currency',
      currency: 'TRY',
      minimumFractionDigits: 0,
      maximumFractionDigits: 0
    }).format(amount);
  };

  const formatDate = (dateString: string) => {
    return new Date(dateString).toLocaleDateString('tr-TR', {
      year: 'numeric',
      month: 'long',
      day: 'numeric'
    });
  };

  // Determine policy type icon and color
  const getPolicyTypeInfo = () => {
    const type = extendedData.policyType;
    
    switch (type) {
      case 'CAR':
        return { icon: Building2, color: 'blue', label: 'Construction All Risks (CAR)', emoji: '🏗️' };
      case 'EAR':
        return { icon: Factory, color: 'indigo', label: 'Erection All Risks (EAR)', emoji: '⚙️' };
      case 'MB':
        return { icon: Cog, color: 'orange', label: 'Machinery Breakdown (MB)', emoji: '🔧' };
      case 'EEI':
        return { icon: Cpu, color: 'cyan', label: 'Electronic Equipment Insurance (EEI)', emoji: '💻' };
      case 'Combined':
        return { icon: Layers, color: 'purple', label: 'Combined Engineering Policy', emoji: '📋' };
      default:
        return { icon: Hammer, color: 'slate', label: 'Engineering Insurance', emoji: '🛠️' };
    }
  };

  const typeInfo = getPolicyTypeInfo();
  const projectInfo = extendedData.projectInfo;
  const insuredValues = extendedData.insuredValues;
  const earthquakeCoverage = extendedData.earthquakeCoverage;
  const testingPeriod = extendedData.testingPeriod;
  const maintenancePeriod = extendedData.maintenancePeriod;
  const designDefectClauses = extendedData.designDefectClauses;
  const tpl = extendedData.thirdPartyLiability;
  const employersLiability = extendedData.employersLiability;

  return (
    <div className="space-y-6">
      {/* Header Card */}
      <div className={`bg-gradient-to-br from-${typeInfo.color}-600 to-${typeInfo.color}-700 text-white rounded-3xl p-8`}>
        <div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-4">
          <div>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-2">
              <typeInfo.icon className="w-8 h-8" />
              <h2 className="text-2xl">{typeInfo.emoji} {typeInfo.label}</h2>
            </div>
            <p className={`text-${typeInfo.color}-100`}>
              {extendedData.policySubtype || 'Turkish Engineering Insurance'}
            </p>
          </div>
          <div className="text-right">
            <p className="text-sm opacity-80 mb-1">Coverage expires in</p>
            <p className="text-3xl">{daysUntilExpiry} days</p>
          </div>
        </div>
        
        {projectInfo && (
          <div className="flex items-start gap-3 bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-2xl p-4 mt-4">
            <HardHat className="w-5 h-5 flex-shrink-0 mt-1" />
            <div className="flex-1">
              <p className="text-sm opacity-80 mb-1">Project Information</p>
              <p className="mb-1"><strong>{projectInfo.projectName}</strong></p>
              <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-2 text-sm">
                {projectInfo.projectType && (
                  <p>Type: {projectInfo.projectType}</p>
                )}
                {projectInfo.projectValue && (
                  <p>Value: {formatCurrency(projectInfo.projectValue)}</p>
                )}
                {projectInfo.contractualPeriod && (
                  <p>Duration: {projectInfo.contractualPeriod} months</p>
                )}
                {projectInfo.mainContractor && (
                  <p>Contractor: {projectInfo.mainContractor}</p>
                )}
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        )}

        {projectInfo?.siteLocation && (
          <div className="flex items-start gap-3 bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-2xl p-4 mt-3">
            <MapPin className="w-5 h-5 flex-shrink-0 mt-1" />
            <div>
              <p className="text-sm opacity-80 mb-1">Site Location</p>
              <p>{projectInfo.siteLocation.address}</p>
              {projectInfo.siteLocation.seismicZone && (
                <p className="text-sm mt-1 opacity-80">
                  Seismic Zone: {projectInfo.siteLocation.seismicZone} 
                  {projectInfo.siteLocation.seismicZone <= 2 && ' (High Risk)'}
                  {projectInfo.siteLocation.seismicZone === 3 && ' (Moderate Risk)'}
                  {projectInfo.siteLocation.seismicZone >= 4 && ' (Lower Risk)'}
                </p>
              )}
            </div>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>

      {/* Earthquake Warning for High-Risk Zones */}
      {projectInfo?.siteLocation?.seismicZone && projectInfo.siteLocation.seismicZone <= 2 && (
        <div className="bg-red-50 border border-red-200 rounded-3xl p-6">
          <div className="flex items-start gap-4">
            <Mountain className="w-6 h-6 text-red-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-1" />
            <div className="flex-1">
              <h3 className="text-red-900 mb-2">⚠️ High Seismic Risk Zone</h3>
              <p className="text-red-700 text-sm mb-3">
                <strong>Critical: Project located in Zone {projectInfo.siteLocation.seismicZone}</strong> - one of Turkey's most seismically active areas. Post-2023 Kahramanmaraş earthquake, capacity is limited.
              </p>
              {earthquakeCoverage?.included && (
                <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl p-4">
                  <p className="text-sm mb-2"><strong>Earthquake Coverage Details:</strong></p>
                  {earthquakeCoverage.deductible && (
                    <p className="text-sm text-slate-700">• Deductible: {earthquakeCoverage.deductible}% of Sum Insured</p>
                  )}
                  {earthquakeCoverage.deductibleAmount && (
                    <p className="text-sm text-slate-700">• Minimum Deductible: {formatCurrency(earthquakeCoverage.deductibleAmount)}</p>
                  )}
                  {earthquakeCoverage.clause72Hour?.applies && (
                    <p className="text-sm text-slate-700 mt-2">
                      • 72-Hour Clause: All aftershocks within 72 hours treated as single event (one deductible)
                    </p>
                  )}
                </div>
              )}
              {!earthquakeCoverage?.included && (
                <p className="text-red-800 text-sm mt-3">
                  <strong>Action Required:</strong> Earthquake coverage not included. This is a critical gap for Zone {projectInfo.siteLocation.seismicZone}.
                </p>
              )}
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* All Risks Principle Explanation */}
      <div className="bg-gradient-to-br from-emerald-50 to-teal-50 border border-emerald-200 rounded-3xl p-6">
        <div className="flex items-start gap-4">
          <ShieldCheck className="w-6 h-6 text-emerald-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-1" />
          <div className="flex-1">
            <h3 className="text-emerald-900 mb-2">✅ "All Risks" Coverage Principle</h3>
            <p className="text-emerald-700 text-sm mb-3">
              Unlike "Named Perils" policies, this covers ANY sudden and unforeseen physical damage that is NOT specifically excluded.
            </p>
            <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl p-4">
              <p className="text-sm mb-2"><strong>Burden of Proof:</strong></p>
              <p className="text-sm text-slate-700 mb-2">
                • <strong>You prove:</strong> Physical damage occurred and its value
              </p>
              <p className="text-sm text-slate-700 mb-2">
                • <strong>Insurer proves:</strong> The cause falls under a specific exclusion
              </p>
              <p className="text-sm text-emerald-700 mt-3">
                <strong>Default position: If insurer cannot prove exclusion, claim is paid.</strong>
              </p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Insured Values Breakdown */}
      <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-5">
          <DollarSign className="w-6 h-6 text-blue-600" />
          <h3 className="text-slate-900">Insured Values & Subject Matter</h3>
        </div>
        
        <div className="grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
          {insuredValues?.contractWorks && (
            <div className="bg-blue-50 rounded-2xl p-4">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
                <Building2 className="w-5 h-5 text-blue-600" />
                <p className="text-sm text-slate-600">Contract Works</p>
              </div>
              <p className="text-blue-900 mb-1">{formatCurrency(insuredValues.contractWorks)}</p>
              <p className="text-xs text-slate-600">Asıl İnşaat Bedeli - Permanent structure</p>
            </div>
          )}
          
          {insuredValues?.temporaryFacilities && (
            <div className="bg-amber-50 rounded-2xl p-4">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
                <Container className="w-5 h-5 text-amber-600" />
                <p className="text-sm text-slate-600">Temporary Facilities</p>
              </div>
              <p className="text-amber-900 mb-1">{formatCurrency(insuredValues.temporaryFacilities)}</p>
              <p className="text-xs text-slate-600">Site camps, scaffolding, formwork</p>
            </div>
          )}
          
          {insuredValues?.constructionPlantMachinery && (
            <div className="bg-orange-50 rounded-2xl p-4">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
                <Truck className="w-5 h-5 text-orange-600" />
                <p className="text-sm text-slate-600">Construction Plant & Machinery</p>
              </div>
              <p className="text-orange-900 mb-1">{formatCurrency(insuredValues.constructionPlantMachinery)}</p>
              <p className="text-xs text-slate-600">CPM - Cranes, excavators, equipment</p>
            </div>
          )}
          
          {insuredValues?.debrisRemoval && (
            <div className="bg-slate-50 rounded-2xl p-4">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
                <PackageCheck className="w-5 h-5 text-slate-600" />
                <p className="text-sm text-slate-600">Debris Removal</p>
              </div>
              <p className="text-slate-900 mb-1">{formatCurrency(insuredValues.debrisRemoval)}</p>
              <p className="text-xs text-slate-600">Site clearance after loss (typically 2-5%)</p>
            </div>
          )}
          
          {insuredValues?.machineryValue && (
            <div className="bg-indigo-50 rounded-2xl p-4">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
                <Cog className="w-5 h-5 text-indigo-600" />
                <p className="text-sm text-slate-600">Machinery Value (NRV)</p>
              </div>
              <p className="text-indigo-900 mb-1">{formatCurrency(insuredValues.machineryValue)}</p>
              <p className="text-xs text-slate-600">New Replacement Value for MB coverage</p>
            </div>
          )}
          
          {insuredValues?.electronicEquipment && (
            <div className="bg-cyan-50 rounded-2xl p-4">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
                <Cpu className="w-5 h-5 text-cyan-600" />
                <p className="text-sm text-slate-600">Electronic Equipment</p>
              </div>
              <p className="text-cyan-900 mb-1">{formatCurrency(insuredValues.electronicEquipment)}</p>
              <p className="text-xs text-slate-600">Low-voltage systems, servers, controls</p>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>

        {insuredValues?.totalSumInsured && (
          <div className="mt-4 pt-4 border-t border-slate-200">
            <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
              <p className="text-slate-600">Total Sum Insured:</p>
              <p className="text-2xl text-slate-900">{formatCurrency(insuredValues.totalSumInsured)}</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        )}

        {/* Escalation Clause Warning */}
        {insuredValues?.escalationClause && (
          <div className="mt-4 bg-blue-50 rounded-2xl p-4">
            <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
              <TrendingUp className="w-5 h-5 text-blue-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
              <div>
                <p className="text-sm text-blue-900 mb-1">
                  <strong>Escalation Clause: {insuredValues.escalationClause.enabled ? 'Active ✓' : 'Not Active ✗'}</strong>
                </p>
                {insuredValues.escalationClause.enabled && (
                  <>
                    {insuredValues.escalationClause.rate && (
                      <p className="text-sm text-blue-700">
                        Rate: {insuredValues.escalationClause.rate}% per annum
                      </p>
                    )}
                    <p className="text-sm text-blue-700 mt-2">
                      {insuredValues.escalationClause.mechanism || 'Automatic adjustment for inflation to avoid underinsurance'}
                    </p>
                  </>
                )}
                {!insuredValues.escalationClause.enabled && (
                  <p className="text-sm text-red-700">
                    Warning: Without escalation, policy may become underinsured. Average Clause (Eksik Sigorta) will apply.
                  </p>
                )}
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>

      {/* Design Defect Coverage (LEG Clauses) */}
      {designDefectClauses && (
        <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-5">
            <Eye className="w-6 h-6 text-purple-600" />
            <h3 className="text-slate-900">Design Defect Coverage (LEG Clauses)</h3>
          </div>
          
          {designDefectClauses.legClause && (
            <div className="mb-4 p-4 bg-purple-50 rounded-2xl">
              <p className="text-purple-900 mb-2">
                <strong>Applied Clause: {designDefectClauses.legClause}</strong>
              </p>
              <p className="text-sm text-purple-700">
                {designDefectClauses.explanation}
              </p>
            </div>
          )}

          <div className="space-y-3">
            <div className="p-4 bg-red-50 rounded-2xl border border-red-200">
              <p className="text-sm text-red-900 mb-1"><strong>LEG 1/96 - Model Exclusion (Narrowest)</strong></p>
              <p className="text-sm text-red-700">
                {designDefectClauses.leg1 || 'Excludes ALL loss attributable to the defect - both the defective part and consequential damage'}
              </p>
            </div>

            <div className={`p-4 rounded-2xl border ${designDefectClauses.legClause === 'LEG 2/96' ? 'bg-blue-100 border-blue-300' : 'bg-slate-50 border-slate-200'}`}>
              <p className={`text-sm mb-1 ${designDefectClauses.legClause === 'LEG 2/96' ? 'text-blue-900' : 'text-slate-900'}`}>
                <strong>LEG 2/96 - Consequences Cover (Standard)</strong>
                {designDefectClauses.legClause === 'LEG 2/96' && ' ✓ Active'}
              </p>
              <p className={`text-sm ${designDefectClauses.legClause === 'LEG 2/96' ? 'text-blue-700' : 'text-slate-700'}`}>
                {designDefectClauses.leg2 || 'Excludes cost of rectifying defective part itself, but covers consequential damage to other property'}
              </p>
            </div>

            <div className="p-4 bg-emerald-50 rounded-2xl border border-emerald-200">
              <p className="text-sm text-emerald-900 mb-1"><strong>LEG 3/06 - Improvement Exclusion (Broadest)</strong></p>
              <p className="text-sm text-emerald-700">
                {designDefectClauses.leg3 || 'Pays for damage to defective part itself, excluding only cost to improve design to non-defective state'}
              </p>
            </div>
          </div>

          {designDefectClauses.applicationToProject && (
            <div className="mt-4 p-4 bg-blue-50 rounded-2xl">
              <p className="text-sm text-blue-900">
                <strong>Application to This Project:</strong> {designDefectClauses.applicationToProject}
              </p>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Testing Period (for EAR) */}
      {testingPeriod?.applicable && (
        <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-5">
            <TestTube className="w-6 h-6 text-indigo-600" />
            <h3 className="text-slate-900">Testing & Commissioning Period</h3>
          </div>
          
          <div className="mb-4 p-4 bg-indigo-50 rounded-2xl">
            <p className="text-indigo-900 mb-2">
              <strong>Critical Phase: Risk Peaks During Testing</strong>
            </p>
            <p className="text-sm text-indigo-700 mb-3">
              Unlike CAR where risk diminishes toward completion, EAR risk maximizes at end during energization and operational testing.
            </p>
            <div className="grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-3">
              {testingPeriod.standardDuration && (
                <div className="bg-white rounded-xl p-3">
                  <p className="text-xs text-slate-600 mb-1">Standard Duration</p>
                  <p className="text-indigo-900">{testingPeriod.standardDuration} weeks</p>
                </div>
              )}
              {testingPeriod.actualDuration && (
                <div className="bg-white rounded-xl p-3">
                  <p className="text-xs text-slate-600 mb-1">Actual Duration</p>
                  <p className="text-indigo-900">{testingPeriod.actualDuration} weeks</p>
                </div>
              )}
            </div>
          </div>

          <div className="grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
            {testingPeriod.coldTesting && (
              <div className={`p-4 rounded-2xl ${testingPeriod.coldTesting.covered ? 'bg-blue-50' : 'bg-slate-50'}`}>
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
                  <Settings className="w-5 h-5 text-blue-600" />
                  <p className="text-sm">Cold Testing</p>
                  {testingPeriod.coldTesting.covered && <CheckCircle className="w-4 h-4 text-blue-600 ml-auto" />}
                </div>
                <p className="text-xs text-slate-700">
                  {testingPeriod.coldTesting.description || 'Mechanical completeness, pressure testing, bumping motors without load'}
                </p>
              </div>
            )}

            {testingPeriod.hotTesting && (
              <div className={`p-4 rounded-2xl ${testingPeriod.hotTesting.covered ? 'bg-orange-50' : 'bg-slate-50'}`}>
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
                  <Flame className="w-5 h-5 text-orange-600" />
                  <p className="text-sm">Hot Testing</p>
                  {testingPeriod.hotTesting.covered && <CheckCircle className="w-4 h-4 text-orange-600 ml-auto" />}
                </div>
                <p className="text-xs text-slate-700 mb-2">
                  {testingPeriod.hotTesting.description || 'Full operational testing with load, temperatures, grid sync - HIGHEST RISK'}
                </p>
                {testingPeriod.hotTesting.premiumLoading && (
                  <p className="text-xs text-orange-700">
                    Premium loading: +{testingPeriod.hotTesting.premiumLoading}%
                  </p>
                )}
              </div>
            )}
          </div>

          {testingPeriod.extensions?.granted && (
            <div className="mt-4 p-4 bg-amber-50 rounded-2xl border border-amber-200">
              <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                <Timer className="w-5 h-5 text-amber-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
                <div>
                  <p className="text-sm text-amber-900 mb-1">
                    <strong>Extension Granted</strong>
                  </p>
                  <p className="text-sm text-amber-700">
                    Additional {testingPeriod.extensions.additionalWeeks} weeks granted
                    {testingPeriod.extensions.additionalPremium && 
                      ` - Additional premium: ${formatCurrency(testingPeriod.extensions.additionalPremium)}`
                    }
                  </p>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Maintenance Period */}
      {maintenancePeriod?.applicable && (
        <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-5">
            <Wrench className="w-6 h-6 text-emerald-600" />
            <h3 className="text-slate-900">Maintenance Period Coverage</h3>
          </div>
          
          <div className="p-4 bg-emerald-50 rounded-2xl mb-4">
            <p className="text-emerald-900 mb-2">
              <strong>Type: {maintenancePeriod.type}</strong>
            </p>
            <p className="text-sm text-emerald-700 mb-1">
              Duration: {maintenancePeriod.duration} months post-completion
            </p>
          </div>

          <div className="space-y-3">
            <div className="p-4 bg-blue-50 rounded-2xl">
              <p className="text-sm text-blue-900 mb-1"><strong>Standard Maintenance</strong></p>
              <p className="text-sm text-blue-700">
                {maintenancePeriod.standardCoverage || 'Covers damage caused only while contractor is physically on site performing maintenance tasks'}
              </p>
            </div>

            {maintenancePeriod.type === 'Extended Maintenance' && (
              <div className="p-4 bg-emerald-50 rounded-2xl border-2 border-emerald-300">
                <p className="text-sm text-emerald-900 mb-1"><strong>Extended Maintenance ✓ Active</strong></p>
                <p className="text-sm text-emerald-700">
                  {maintenancePeriod.extendedCoverage || 'Covers defective workmanship from construction period that manifests during maintenance. Industry standard for major projects.'}
                </p>
                <p className="text-xs text-emerald-600 mt-2">
                  Example: Waterproofing improperly installed during construction but leak appears 6 months after handover → Covered
                </p>
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Third Party Liability */}
      {tpl && (
        <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-5">
            <Shield className="w-6 h-6 text-blue-600" />
            <h3 className="text-slate-900">Third Party Liability (TPL)</h3>
          </div>
          
          {tpl.included ? (
            <>
              <div className="grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-4 mb-4">
                {tpl.limit && (
                  <div className="bg-blue-50 rounded-2xl p-4">
                    <p className="text-xs text-slate-600 mb-1">Limit Per Occurrence</p>
                    <p className="text-blue-900">{formatCurrency(tpl.limit)}</p>
                  </div>
                )}
                {tpl.aggregateLimit && (
                  <div className="bg-blue-50 rounded-2xl p-4">
                    <p className="text-xs text-slate-600 mb-1">Aggregate Limit</p>
                    <p className="text-blue-900">{formatCurrency(tpl.aggregateLimit)}</p>
                  </div>
                )}
              </div>

              {tpl.coverageScope && (
                <div className="space-y-3">
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm">
                    {tpl.coverageScope.bodilyInjury && (
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-2 bg-slate-50 rounded-xl">
                        <CheckCircle className="w-4 h-4 text-emerald-600" />
                        <span>Bodily Injury</span>
                      </div>
                    )}
                    {tpl.coverageScope.propertyDamage && (
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-2 bg-slate-50 rounded-xl">
                        <CheckCircle className="w-4 h-4 text-emerald-600" />
                        <span>Property Damage</span>
                      </div>
                    )}
                    {tpl.coverageScope.crossLiability && (
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-2 bg-slate-50 rounded-xl">
                        <CheckCircle className="w-4 h-4 text-emerald-600" />
                        <span>Cross Liability</span>
                      </div>
                    )}
                  </div>

                  {tpl.coverageScope.surroundingPropertyClause?.enabled && (
                    <div className="p-4 bg-emerald-50 rounded-2xl">
                      <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                        <Building2 className="w-5 h-5 text-emerald-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
                        <div>
                          <p className="text-sm text-emerald-900 mb-1"><strong>Surrounding Property Clause ✓</strong></p>
                          <p className="text-sm text-emerald-700">
                            {tpl.coverageScope.surroundingPropertyClause.description || 
                              'Covers damage to existing structures on site (normally excluded as "care, custody, control")'}
                          </p>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  )}

                  {tpl.coverageScope.vibrationAndSupport?.covered && (
                    <div className="p-4 bg-blue-50 rounded-2xl">
                      <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                        <Activity className="w-5 h-5 text-blue-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
                        <div>
                          <p className="text-sm text-blue-900 mb-1"><strong>Vibration & Support Removal ✓</strong></p>
                          <p className="text-sm text-blue-700">
                            Critical for urban excavation. Covers cracking in neighboring buildings due to vibration or soil support removal.
                          </p>
                          {tpl.coverageScope.vibrationAndSupport.urbanExcavationRisk && (
                            <p className="text-xs text-blue-600 mt-2">
                              {tpl.coverageScope.vibrationAndSupport.urbanExcavationRisk}
                            </p>
                          )}
                          {tpl.coverageScope.vibrationAndSupport.deductible && (
                            <p className="text-xs text-slate-600 mt-2">
                              Deductible: {formatCurrency(tpl.coverageScope.vibrationAndSupport.deductible)}
                            </p>
                          )}
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  )}
                </div>
              )}

              {tpl.exclusions && tpl.exclusions.length > 0 && (
                <div className="mt-4 p-4 bg-slate-50 rounded-2xl">
                  <p className="text-sm text-slate-900 mb-2"><strong>Standard TPL Exclusions:</strong></p>
                  <ul className="space-y-1">
                    {tpl.exclusions.map((exclusion, idx) => (
                      <li key={idx} className="text-sm text-slate-700 flex items-start gap-2">
                        <XCircle className="w-4 h-4 text-slate-400 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
                        <span>{exclusion}</span>
                      </li>
                    ))}
                  </ul>
                </div>
              )}
            </>
          ) : (
            <div className="p-4 bg-red-50 rounded-2xl">
              <p className="text-sm text-red-700">TPL coverage not included in this policy</p>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Employer's Liability & SGK Recourse */}
      {employersLiability && (
        <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-5">
            <Users className="w-6 h-6 text-orange-600" />
            <h3 className="text-slate-900">Employer's Liability & SGK Recourse</h3>
          </div>
          
          {employersLiability.included ? (
            <>
              {employersLiability.limit && (
                <div className="mb-4 p-4 bg-orange-50 rounded-2xl">
                  <p className="text-xs text-slate-600 mb-1">Coverage Limit</p>
                  <p className="text-orange-900 text-xl">{formatCurrency(employersLiability.limit)}</p>
                </div>
              )}

              <div className="space-y-3">
                {employersLiability.sgkRecourse?.covered && (
                  <div className="p-4 bg-blue-50 rounded-2xl">
                    <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                      <Scale className="w-5 h-5 text-blue-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
                      <div>
                        <p className="text-sm text-blue-900 mb-1"><strong>SGK Recourse Coverage ✓</strong></p>
                        <p className="text-sm text-blue-700 mb-2">
                          {employersLiability.sgkRecourse.explanation || 
                            'When worker injured due to employer negligence, SGK (Social Security) pays benefits then sues employer. This policy indemnifies you.'}
                        </p>
                        {employersLiability.sgkRecourse.capitalValue && (
                          <p className="text-xs text-blue-600">
                            Covers: {employersLiability.sgkRecourse.capitalValue}
                          </p>
                        )}
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                )}

                {employersLiability.moralDamages?.covered && (
                  <div className="p-4 bg-purple-50 rounded-2xl">
                    <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                      <ShieldAlert className="w-5 h-5 text-purple-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
                      <div>
                        <p className="text-sm text-purple-900 mb-1"><strong>Moral Damages (Pain & Suffering) ✓</strong></p>
                        <p className="text-sm text-purple-700 mb-2">
                          SGK does not pay for emotional distress. Courts frequently award significant sums in fatal/severe injury cases.
                        </p>
                        {employersLiability.moralDamages.limit && (
                          <p className="text-sm text-purple-900">
                            Limit: {formatCurrency(employersLiability.moralDamages.limit)}
                          </p>
                        )}
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                )}
              </div>

              <div className="mt-4 p-4 bg-amber-50 rounded-2xl border border-amber-200">
                <p className="text-sm text-amber-900">
```
