```tsx
                  <strong>Three-Layer Defense System:</strong>
                </p>
                <ol className="mt-2 space-y-1 text-sm text-amber-700">
                  <li>1. SGK Recourse Actions (capital value of benefits)</li>
                  <li>2. Worker/Family Claims (exceeding SGK benefits)</li>
                  <li>3. Moral Damages (pain & suffering not covered by SGK)</li>
                </ol>
              </div>
            </>
          ) : (
            <div className="p-4 bg-red-50 rounded-2xl">
              <p className="text-sm text-red-700">Employer's Liability not included - critical gap for construction projects</p>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Machinery Breakdown Specifics */}
      {extendedData.machineryBreakdownDetails && (
        <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-5">
            <Cog className="w-6 h-6 text-orange-600" />
            <h3 className="text-slate-900">Machinery Breakdown Coverage Details</h3>
          </div>
          
          <div className="mb-4 grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
            {extendedData.machineryBreakdownDetails.machineryType && (
              <div className="bg-orange-50 rounded-2xl p-4">
                <p className="text-xs text-slate-600 mb-1">Machinery Type</p>
                <p className="text-orange-900">{extendedData.machineryBreakdownDetails.machineryType}</p>
              </div>
            )}
            {extendedData.machineryBreakdownDetails.machineryAge && (
              <div className={`rounded-2xl p-4 ${
                extendedData.machineryBreakdownDetails.ageLimit?.exceeded 
                  ? 'bg-red-50' 
                  : 'bg-slate-50'
              }`}>
                <p className="text-xs text-slate-600 mb-1">Machinery Age</p>
                <p className={extendedData.machineryBreakdownDetails.ageLimit?.exceeded ? 'text-red-900' : 'text-slate-900'}>
                  {extendedData.machineryBreakdownDetails.machineryAge} years
                  {extendedData.machineryBreakdownDetails.ageLimit?.exceeded && ' ⚠️ Exceeds limit'}
                </p>
              </div>
            )}
          </div>

          {extendedData.machineryBreakdownDetails.ageLimit?.exceeded && (
            <div className="mb-4 p-4 bg-red-50 rounded-2xl border border-red-200">
              <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                <AlertOctagon className="w-5 h-5 text-red-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
                <div>
                  <p className="text-sm text-red-900 mb-1"><strong>Age Limit Exceeded</strong></p>
                  <p className="text-sm text-red-700">
                    {extendedData.machineryBreakdownDetails.ageLimit.implication || 
                      `Machinery exceeds standard age limit of ${extendedData.machineryBreakdownDetails.ageLimit.limit} years. Coverage may be restricted or premiums significantly loaded.`}
                  </p>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          )}

          {extendedData.machineryBreakdownDetails.newReplacementValue?.required && (
            <div className="mb-4 p-4 bg-blue-50 rounded-2xl">
              <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                <DollarSign className="w-5 h-5 text-blue-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
                <div>
                  <p className="text-sm text-blue-900 mb-1"><strong>New Replacement Value (NRV) Requirement</strong></p>
                  <p className="text-sm text-blue-700">
                    {extendedData.machineryBreakdownDetails.newReplacementValue.calculation || 
                      'Sum Insured must be: New machine cost + Customs duties + Freight + Installation. Insuring at book value causes severe underinsurance penalties.'}
                  </p>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          )}

          {extendedData.machineryBreakdownDetails.internalPerilsCovered && 
           extendedData.machineryBreakdownDetails.internalPerilsCovered.length > 0 && (
            <div className="p-4 bg-emerald-50 rounded-2xl">
              <p className="text-sm text-emerald-900 mb-2"><strong>Internal Perils Covered:</strong></p>
              <div className="grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-2">
                {extendedData.machineryBreakdownDetails.internalPerilsCovered.map((peril, idx) => (
                  <div key={idx} className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-emerald-700">
                    <CheckCircle className="w-4 h-4 text-emerald-600 flex-shrink-0" />
                    <span>{peril}</span>
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>
            </div>
          )}

          <div className="mt-4 p-4 bg-amber-50 rounded-2xl border border-amber-200">
            <p className="text-sm text-amber-900 mb-2">
              <strong>Fire Gap Principle:</strong>
            </p>
            <p className="text-sm text-amber-700">
              MB policies exclude fire, lightning, and explosion (covered in Property/Fire policy). Both policies needed to avoid coverage gap.
            </p>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Exclusions */}
      {extendedData.exclusions && (
        <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-5">
            <Ban className="w-6 h-6 text-red-600" />
            <h3 className="text-slate-900">Standard Exclusions</h3>
          </div>
          
          <div className="space-y-2">
            {extendedData.exclusions.penaltiesAndConsequentialLoss && (
              <div className="flex items-start gap-3 p-3 bg-slate-50 rounded-xl">
                <XCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-slate-400 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
                <div>
                  <p className="text-sm text-slate-900">Penalties & Consequential Loss</p>
                  <p className="text-xs text-slate-600">Delay fines, loss of contract, loss of market share excluded (ALOP/DSU can be purchased separately)</p>
                </div>
              </div>
            )}
            {extendedData.exclusions.wearAndTear && (
              <div className="flex items-start gap-3 p-3 bg-slate-50 rounded-xl">
                <XCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-slate-400 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
                <div>
                  <p className="text-sm text-slate-900">Wear & Tear</p>
                  <p className="text-xs text-slate-600">Gradual deterioration, rust, oxidation, normal atmospheric conditions</p>
                </div>
              </div>
            )}
            {extendedData.exclusions.willfulAct && (
              <div className="flex items-start gap-3 p-3 bg-slate-50 rounded-xl">
                <XCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-slate-400 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
                <div>
                  <p className="text-sm text-slate-900">Willful Act</p>
                  <p className="text-xs text-slate-600">Intentional damage by insured or senior management</p>
                </div>
              </div>
            )}
            {extendedData.exclusions.warAndNuclear && (
              <div className="flex items-start gap-3 p-3 bg-slate-50 rounded-xl">
                <XCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-slate-400 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
                <div>
                  <p className="text-sm text-slate-900">War & Nuclear Risks</p>
                  <p className="text-xs text-slate-600">Absolute exclusions</p>
                </div>
              </div>
            )}
            {extendedData.exclusions.inventoryShortages && (
              <div className="flex items-start gap-3 p-3 bg-slate-50 rounded-xl">
                <XCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-slate-400 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
                <div>
                  <p className="text-sm text-slate-900">Inventory Shortages</p>
                  <p className="text-xs text-slate-600">Loss discovered during routine checks without evidence of specific theft event</p>
                </div>
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* 2025 Market Context */}
      {extendedData.marketContext2025 && (
        <div className="bg-gradient-to-br from-slate-700 to-slate-800 text-white rounded-3xl p-6">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-4">
            <TrendingUp className="w-6 h-6" />
            <h3>2025 Market Context & Challenges</h3>
          </div>
          
          <div className="space-y-3">
            {extendedData.marketContext2025.inflationPressure && (
              <div className="p-4 bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-2xl">
                <p className="text-sm mb-1"><strong>Inflation Pressure</strong></p>
                <p className="text-sm opacity-90">{extendedData.marketContext2025.inflationPressure.issue}</p>
                {extendedData.marketContext2025.inflationPressure.mitigation && (
                  <p className="text-sm opacity-80 mt-2">Mitigation: {extendedData.marketContext2025.inflationPressure.mitigation}</p>
                )}
              </div>
            )}
            
            {extendedData.marketContext2025.reinsuranceCapacity && (
              <div className="p-4 bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-2xl">
                <p className="text-sm mb-1"><strong>Reinsurance Capacity</strong></p>
                <p className="text-sm opacity-90">{extendedData.marketContext2025.reinsuranceCapacity.status}</p>
                {extendedData.marketContext2025.reinsuranceCapacity.premiumImpact && (
                  <p className="text-sm opacity-80 mt-2">Impact: {extendedData.marketContext2025.reinsuranceCapacity.premiumImpact}</p>
                )}
              </div>
            )}
            
            {extendedData.marketContext2025.underwritingDiscipline && (
              <div className="p-4 bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-2xl">
                <p className="text-sm mb-1"><strong>Underwriting Discipline Shift</strong></p>
                <p className="text-sm opacity-90">{extendedData.marketContext2025.underwritingDiscipline.shift}</p>
                {extendedData.marketContext2025.underwritingDiscipline.requirements && 
                 extendedData.marketContext2025.underwritingDiscipline.requirements.length > 0 && (
                  <ul className="mt-2 space-y-1">
                    {extendedData.marketContext2025.underwritingDiscipline.requirements.map((req, idx) => (
                      <li key={idx} className="text-sm opacity-80 flex items-start gap-2">
                        <ChevronRight className="w-4 h-4 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
                        <span>{req}</span>
                      </li>
                    ))}
                  </ul>
                )}
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Premium Breakdown */}
      {extendedData.premiumBreakdown && (
        <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-5">
            <WalletCards className="w-6 h-6 text-blue-600" />
            <h3 className="text-slate-900">Premium Breakdown</h3>
          </div>
          
          <div className="space-y-3">
            {extendedData.premiumBreakdown.constructionRate && (
              <div className="flex items-center justify-between py-2 border-b border-slate-100">
                <span className="text-sm text-slate-600">Construction Phase Rate</span>
                <span className="text-slate-900">{extendedData.premiumBreakdown.constructionRate}%</span>
              </div>
            )}
            {extendedData.premiumBreakdown.testingRate && (
              <div className="flex items-center justify-between py-2 border-b border-slate-100">
                <span className="text-sm text-slate-600">Testing Phase Rate</span>
                <span className="text-orange-900">{extendedData.premiumBreakdown.testingRate}% (higher risk)</span>
              </div>
            )}
            {extendedData.premiumBreakdown.maintenanceRate && (
              <div className="flex items-center justify-between py-2 border-b border-slate-100">
                <span className="text-sm text-slate-600">Maintenance Phase Rate</span>
                <span className="text-emerald-900">{extendedData.premiumBreakdown.maintenanceRate}% (lower risk)</span>
              </div>
            )}
            {extendedData.premiumBreakdown.netPremium && (
              <div className="flex items-center justify-between py-2 border-b border-slate-100">
                <span className="text-sm text-slate-600">Net Premium</span>
                <span className="text-slate-900">{formatCurrency(extendedData.premiumBreakdown.netPremium)}</span>
              </div>
            )}
            {extendedData.premiumBreakdown.bsmv && (
              <div className="flex items-center justify-between py-2 border-b border-slate-100">
                <span className="text-sm text-slate-600">BSMV (5% Insurance Tax)</span>
                <span className="text-slate-900">{formatCurrency(extendedData.premiumBreakdown.bsmv)}</span>
              </div>
            )}
            {extendedData.premiumBreakdown.ydv && (
              <div className="flex items-center justify-between py-2 border-b border-slate-100">
                <span className="text-sm text-slate-600">YDV (Stamp Duty)</span>
                <span className="text-slate-900">{formatCurrency(extendedData.premiumBreakdown.ydv)}</span>
              </div>
            )}
            {extendedData.premiumBreakdown.grossPremium && (
              <div className="flex items-center justify-between py-3 mt-2 bg-blue-50 rounded-xl px-4">
                <span className="text-slate-900"><strong>Gross Premium</strong></span>
                <span className="text-blue-900 text-xl"><strong>{formatCurrency(extendedData.premiumBreakdown.grossPremium)}</strong></span>
              </div>
            )}
            {extendedData.premiumBreakdown.paymentTerms && (
              <div className="flex items-center justify-between py-2 mt-2">
                <span className="text-sm text-slate-600">Payment Terms</span>
                <span className="text-slate-900">{extendedData.premiumBreakdown.paymentTerms}</span>
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Claims Process */}
      {extendedData.claimsInfo && (
        <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-5">
            <FileText className="w-6 h-6 text-slate-600" />
            <h3 className="text-slate-900">Claims Process & Notification</h3>
          </div>
          
          <div className="space-y-3">
            {extendedData.claimsInfo.notificationPeriod && (
              <div className="p-4 bg-amber-50 rounded-2xl border border-amber-200">
                <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                  <Clock className="w-5 h-5 text-amber-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
                  <div>
                    <p className="text-sm text-amber-900 mb-1"><strong>Notification Period</strong></p>
                    <p className="text-sm text-amber-700">{extendedData.claimsInfo.notificationPeriod}</p>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            )}

            {extendedData.claimsInfo.expertAppointment?.required && (
              <div className="p-4 bg-blue-50 rounded-2xl">
                <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                  <Briefcase className="w-5 h-5 text-blue-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
                  <div>
                    <p className="text-sm text-blue-900 mb-1"><strong>Expert Appointment</strong></p>
                    <p className="text-sm text-blue-700 mb-1">
                      {extendedData.claimsInfo.expertAppointment.expertType || 'Licensed Sigorta Eksperi will be appointed'}
                    </p>
                    {extendedData.claimsInfo.expertAppointment.reportBinding && (
                      <p className="text-xs text-blue-600">Expert report is highly influential and often binding</p>
                    )}
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            )}

            {extendedData.claimsInfo.mitigationDuty?.required && (
              <div className="p-4 bg-purple-50 rounded-2xl">
                <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                  <ShieldAlert className="w-5 h-5 text-purple-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
                  <div>
                    <p className="text-sm text-purple-900 mb-1"><strong>Mitigation Duty</strong></p>
                    <p className="text-sm text-purple-700 mb-1">
                      {extendedData.claimsInfo.mitigationDuty.description || 'You must act as if uninsured to minimize the loss'}
                    </p>
                    {extendedData.claimsInfo.mitigationDuty.penaltyForFailure && (
                      <p className="text-xs text-purple-600">{extendedData.claimsInfo.mitigationDuty.penaltyForFailure}</p>
                    )}
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Footer Info */}
      <div className="bg-slate-50 rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
        <div className="flex items-start gap-4">
          <Info className="w-5 h-5 text-slate-500 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
          <div>
            <p className="text-sm text-slate-700 mb-2">
              <strong>About Turkish Engineering Insurance (2025)</strong>
            </p>
            <p className="text-sm text-slate-600 mb-3">
              Engineering insurance is fundamental for Turkey's infrastructure growth. Following the 2023 Kahramanmaraş earthquakes, 
              the market has shifted toward technical underwriting with strict requirements for risk engineering assessments, 
              natural catastrophe modeling, and proper escalation clauses to manage inflation.
            </p>
            <p className="text-sm text-slate-600">
              The policies are governed by TSB (Insurance Association of Turkey) General Conditions and are integrated with 
              compulsory schemes (DASK for residential earthquake, compulsory liability for hazardous materials and coastal facilities).
            </p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

```

---

## File: `components (2)/insurance-lines/TurkishFireDetails.tsx`
- Bytes: 47,318
- SHA256: `1610c24277ae67a1b34cee2e81903bfd3722c856244ed91a95041b8f2d92c2a7`

```tsx
import { 
  Home, Clock, AlertCircle, Shield, MapPin, Building2, 
  TrendingUp, CheckCircle, Info, ShieldAlert, DollarSign,
  Calendar, Sparkles, AlertTriangle, FileText, Flame, Users,
  Percent, ChevronRight, Ban, XCircle, AlertOctagon, Zap,
  Wrench, Eye, Award, CheckSquare, WalletCards, Mountain,
  Droplets, Lock, Wine
} from 'lucide-react';
import { TurkishFireExtendedData } from './types';
import { BasePolicy } from './index';

type TurkishFireDetailsProps = {
  policy: BasePolicy & {
    extendedData?: TurkishFireExtendedData;
    country?: string;
    insuranceLine?: string;
  };
};

export function TurkishFireDetails({ policy }: TurkishFireDetailsProps) {
  // Guard clause - return early if no extended data
  if (!policy.extendedData) {
    return (
      <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
        <p className="text-slate-500">No extended Turkish Fire Insurance data available for this policy.</p>
      </div>
    );
  }

  const extendedData = policy.extendedData as TurkishFireExtendedData;
  
  // Calculate time until coverage expires
  const now = new Date();
  const expiryDate = extendedData.expirationDateTime?.date || policy.endDate;
  const expiryTime = extendedData.expirationDateTime?.time || '12:00';
  const expiryDateTime = new Date(`${expiryDate}T${expiryTime}:00`);
  const hoursUntilExpiry = Math.max(0, (expiryDateTime.getTime() - now.getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60));
  const daysUntilExpiry = Math.floor(hoursUntilExpiry / 24);

  const formatCurrency = (amount: number) => {
    return new Intl.NumberFormat('tr-TR', {
      style: 'currency',
      currency: 'TRY',
      minimumFractionDigits: 0,
      maximumFractionDigits: 0
    }).format(amount);
  };

  const formatDate = (dateString: string) => {
    return new Date(dateString).toLocaleDateString('tr-TR', {
      year: 'numeric',
      month: 'long',
      day: 'numeric'
    });
  };

  // Determine coverage tier based on included perils
  const getCoverageTier = () => {
    const hasFire = extendedData.coverages?.fire?.enabled;
    const hasWater = extendedData.coverages?.internalWater?.enabled;
    const hasTheft = extendedData.coverages?.theft?.enabled;
    const hasEarthquake = extendedData.coverages?.earthquake?.enabled;
    const hasLiability = extendedData.coverages?.thirdPartyLiability?.enabled;
    
    const coverageCount = [hasFire, hasWater, hasTheft, hasEarthquake, hasLiability].filter(Boolean).length;
    
    if (coverageCount >= 5) return { tier: 'Comprehensive Package', color: 'emerald', icon: Award };
    if (coverageCount >= 3) return { tier: 'Standard Package', color: 'blue', icon: Shield };
    return { tier: 'Basic Fire Coverage', color: 'orange', icon: ShieldAlert };
  };

  const tierInfo = getCoverageTier();
  const riskLocation = extendedData.riskLocation;
  const buildingInfo = extendedData.buildingInfo;
  const insuredValues = extendedData.insuredValues;
  const daskInfo = extendedData.daskIntegration;
  const coverages = extendedData.coverages;

  return (
    <div className="space-y-6">
      {/* Header Card */}
      <div className={`bg-gradient-to-br from-${tierInfo.color}-600 to-${tierInfo.color}-700 text-white rounded-3xl p-8`}>
        <div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-4">
          <div>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-2">
              <tierInfo.icon className="w-8 h-8" />
              <h2 className="text-2xl">🇹🇷 Turkish Fire/Housing Insurance</h2>
            </div>
            <p className={`text-${tierInfo.color}-100`}>{tierInfo.tier}</p>
          </div>
          <div className="text-right">
            <p className="text-sm opacity-80 mb-1">Coverage expires in</p>
            <p className="text-3xl">{daysUntilExpiry} days</p>
          </div>
        </div>
        
        {riskLocation && (
          <div className="flex items-start gap-3 bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-2xl p-4 mt-4">
            <MapPin className="w-5 h-5 flex-shrink-0 mt-1" />
            <div>
              <p className="text-sm opacity-80 mb-1">Insured Property Location</p>
              <p className="font-semibold">{riskLocation.fullAddress}</p>
              {riskLocation.uavtCode && (
                <p className="text-sm mt-1 opacity-80">UAVT Code: {riskLocation.uavtCode}</p>
              )}
            </div>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>

      {/* Under-Insurance Warning */}
      {insuredValues?.underInsuranceRisk?.exists && (
        <div className="bg-red-50 border border-red-200 rounded-3xl p-6">
          <div className="flex items-start gap-4">
            <AlertOctagon className="w-6 h-6 text-red-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-1" />
            <div className="flex-1">
              <h3 className="text-red-900 mb-2">⚠️ Under-Insurance Risk Detected</h3>
              <p className="text-red-700 text-sm mb-3">
                <strong>Critical: Missing Insurance Clause (Eksik Sigorta) Applies</strong>
              </p>
              <p className="text-red-700 text-sm mb-2">
                Your property is insured for only {insuredValues.underInsuranceRisk.percentage}% of its actual reconstruction value. 
                In a claim, the insurer will pay proportionally reduced amounts.
              </p>
              <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl p-4 mt-3">
                <p className="text-sm text-slate-600 mb-2">Example Calculation:</p>
                <p className="text-sm text-slate-700">
                  • Actual Value: {formatCurrency(insuredValues.actualReconstructionCost || 0)}<br/>
                  • Insured Amount: {formatCurrency(insuredValues.totalSumInsured || 0)}<br/>
                  • If Damage = 50,000 TL → You Receive: {formatCurrency((50000 * (insuredValues.underInsuranceRisk.percentage || 50)) / 100)}
                </p>
              </div>
              <p className="text-red-800 text-sm mt-3">
                <strong>Action:</strong> Contact your insurer immediately to increase coverage to {formatCurrency(insuredValues.actualReconstructionCost || 0)}
              </p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Financial Values Summary */}
      <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-5">
          <DollarSign className="w-6 h-6 text-blue-600" />
          <h3 className="text-slate-900">Financial Values & Coverage Limits</h3>
        </div>
        
        <div className="grid md:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
          {insuredValues?.buildingSumInsured && (
            <div className="bg-slate-50 rounded-2xl p-4">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
                <Building2 className="w-4 h-4 text-slate-600" />
                <p className="text-sm text-slate-600">Building Value</p>
              </div>
              <p className="text-2xl text-slate-900">{formatCurrency(insuredValues.buildingSumInsured)}</p>
              <p className="text-xs text-slate-500 mt-1">Excludes land value</p>
            </div>
          )}
          
          {insuredValues?.contentsSumInsured && (
            <div className="bg-slate-50 rounded-2xl p-4">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
                <Home className="w-4 h-4 text-slate-600" />
                <p className="text-sm text-slate-600">Contents Value</p>
              </div>
              <p className="text-2xl text-slate-900">{formatCurrency(insuredValues.contentsSumInsured)}</p>
              <p className="text-xs text-slate-500 mt-1">Furniture & belongings</p>
            </div>
          )}
          
          {insuredValues?.totalSumInsured && (
            <div className="bg-blue-50 rounded-2xl p-4 border-2 border-blue-200">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
                <Shield className="w-4 h-4 text-blue-600" />
                <p className="text-sm text-blue-600">Total Coverage</p>
              </div>
              <p className="text-2xl text-blue-900">{formatCurrency(insuredValues.totalSumInsured)}</p>
              <p className="text-xs text-blue-600 mt-1">Maximum protection</p>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>

        {insuredValues?.actualReconstructionCost && (
          <div className="mt-4 p-4 bg-amber-50 border border-amber-200 rounded-2xl">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
              <Info className="w-5 h-5 text-amber-600" />
              <p className="text-sm text-amber-900">Actual Reconstruction Cost: {formatCurrency(insuredValues.actualReconstructionCost)}</p>
            </div>
            <p className="text-xs text-amber-700">
              {insuredValues.underInsuranceRisk?.exists 
                ? '⚠️ Your coverage is below this amount - Missing Insurance Clause applies'
                : '✓ Your coverage matches the reconstruction cost - No under-insurance risk'}
            </p>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>

      {/* DASK Integration */}
      {daskInfo && (
        <div className="bg-gradient-to-br from-indigo-50 to-purple-50 border border-indigo-200 rounded-3xl p-6">
          <div className="flex items-start gap-4">
            <Mountain className="w-6 h-6 text-indigo-600 flex-shrink-0" />
            <div className="flex-1">
              <h3 className="text-indigo-900 mb-3 flex items-center gap-2">
                DASK Integration (Compulsory Earthquake Insurance)
                {daskInfo.daskActive && <CheckCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-emerald-600" />}
              </h3>
              
              {daskInfo.daskActive ? (
                <div className="space-y-3">
                  <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl p-4">
                    <div className="grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                      <div>
                        <p className="text-sm text-slate-600 mb-1">DASK Policy Number</p>
                        <p className="text-slate-900">{daskInfo.daskPolicyNumber}</p>
                      </div>
                      <div>
                        <p className="text-sm text-slate-600 mb-1">DASK Coverage Limit</p>
                        <p className="text-slate-900">{formatCurrency(daskInfo.daskLimit || 0)}</p>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  
                  <div className="bg-indigo-100 rounded-2xl p-4">
                    <p className="text-sm text-indigo-900 mb-2">
                      <strong>How Claims Work in Earthquakes:</strong>
                    </p>
                    <ol className="text-sm text-indigo-800 space-y-1 list-decimal list-inside">
                      <li>DASK pays first up to {formatCurrency(daskInfo.daskLimit || 0)}</li>
                      <li>This private policy covers damages <strong>exceeding</strong> the DASK limit</li>
                      <li>2% deductible applies to the private policy portion</li>
                    </ol>
                    {daskInfo.excessCoverageNote && (
                      <p className="text-xs text-indigo-700 mt-2 italic">{daskInfo.excessCoverageNote}</p>
                    )}
                  </div>
                </div>
              ) : (
                <div className="bg-red-50 border border-red-200 rounded-2xl p-4">
                  <p className="text-red-900 text-sm">
                    <strong>⚠️ No Active DASK Policy Found</strong><br/>
                    Earthquake coverage through this private policy may not be valid without an active DASK policy.
                  </p>
                </div>
              )}
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Building Information */}
      {buildingInfo && (
        <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-5">
            <Building2 className="w-6 h-6 text-blue-600" />
            <h3 className="text-slate-900">Property Characteristics</h3>
          </div>
          
          <div className="grid md:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
            {buildingInfo.constructionType && (
              <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                <div className="w-10 h-10 bg-blue-100 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center flex-shrink-0">
                  <Building2 className="w-5 h-5 text-blue-600" />
                </div>
                <div>
                  <p className="text-sm text-slate-600">Construction Type</p>
                  <p className="text-slate-900">{buildingInfo.constructionType}</p>
                  <p className="text-xs text-slate-500 mt-1">
                    {buildingInfo.constructionType === 'Tam Kagir' && 'Reinforced Concrete - Best Rating'}
                    {buildingInfo.constructionType === 'Yığma' && 'Masonry - Standard Rating'}
                    {buildingInfo.constructionType === 'Ahşap' && 'Wood - Higher Premium'}
                    {buildingInfo.constructionType === 'Çelik Karkas' && 'Steel Frame - Good Rating'}
                  </p>
                </div>
              </div>
            )}
            
            {buildingInfo.usageType && (
              <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                <div className="w-10 h-10 bg-emerald-100 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center flex-shrink-0">
                  <Home className="w-5 h-5 text-emerald-600" />
                </div>
                <div>
                  <p className="text-sm text-slate-600">Usage Type</p>
                  <p className="text-slate-900">{buildingInfo.usageType}</p>
                  <p className="text-xs text-slate-500 mt-1">
                    {buildingInfo.usageType === 'Boş' && '⚠️ Vacant - Theft coverage may be limited'}
                  </p>
                </div>
              </div>
            )}
            
            {buildingInfo.totalArea && (
              <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                <div className="w-10 h-10 bg-purple-100 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center flex-shrink-0">
                  <MapPin className="w-5 h-5 text-purple-600" />
                </div>
                <div>
                  <p className="text-sm text-slate-600">Total Area</p>
                  <p className="text-slate-900">{buildingInfo.totalArea} m²</p>
                  {buildingInfo.floor !== undefined && (
                    <p className="text-xs text-slate-500 mt-1">Floor {buildingInfo.floor}</p>
                  )}
                </div>
              </div>
            )}
          </div>

          {(buildingInfo.buildingAge !== undefined || buildingInfo.heatingType) && (
            <div className="grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-4 mt-4 pt-4 border-t border-slate-200">
              {buildingInfo.buildingAge !== undefined && (
                <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                  <Calendar className="w-5 h-5 text-slate-600" />
                  <div>
                    <p className="text-sm text-slate-600">Building Age</p>
                    <p className="text-slate-900">{buildingInfo.buildingAge} years old</p>
                  </div>
                </div>
              )}
              
              {buildingInfo.heatingType && (
                <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                  <Flame className="w-5 h-5 text-slate-600" />
                  <div>
                    <p className="text-sm text-slate-600">Heating System</p>
                    <p className="text-slate-900">{buildingInfo.heatingType}</p>
                  </div>
                </div>
              )}
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Coverage Details */}
      {coverages && (
        <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-5">
            <Shield className="w-6 h-6 text-blue-600" />
            <h3 className="text-slate-900">Detailed Coverage Breakdown</h3>
          </div>
          
          <div className="space-y-4">
            {/* Fire Coverage */}
            {coverages.fire?.enabled && (
              <div className="border border-slate-200 rounded-2xl p-5">
                <div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-3">
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                    <div className="w-10 h-10 bg-red-100 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center">
                      <Flame className="w-5 h-5 text-red-600" />
                    </div>
                    <div>
                      <h4 className="text-slate-900">Fire, Lightning & Explosion</h4>
                      <p className="text-sm text-slate-600">Core Coverage</p>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <div className="text-right">
                    <p className="text-sm text-slate-600">Limit</p>
                    <p className="text-slate-900">{formatCurrency(coverages.fire.limit || insuredValues?.totalSumInsured || 0)}</p>
                  </div>
                </div>
                {coverages.fire.includes && coverages.fire.includes.length > 0 && (
                  <div className="bg-slate-50 rounded-xl p-3">
                    <p className="text-xs text-slate-600 mb-2">Covered Perils:</p>
                    <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
                      {coverages.fire.includes.map((peril, idx) => (
                        <span key={idx} className="text-xs bg-white px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-slate-700 border border-slate-200">
                          {peril}
                        </span>
                      ))}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                )}
              </div>
            )}

            {/* Internal Water Coverage */}
            {coverages.internalWater?.enabled && (
              <div className="border border-slate-200 rounded-2xl p-5">
                <div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-3">
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                    <div className="w-10 h-10 bg-blue-100 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center">
                      <Droplets className="w-5 h-5 text-blue-600" />
                    </div>
                    <div>
                      <h4 className="text-slate-900">Internal Water Damage</h4>
                      <p className="text-sm text-slate-600">Bursting pipes & radiator leaks</p>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <div className="text-right">
                    <p className="text-sm text-slate-600">Limit</p>
                    <p className="text-slate-900">{formatCurrency(coverages.internalWater.limit || 0)}</p>
                  </div>
                </div>
                
                {coverages.internalWater.deductible !== undefined && (
                  <div className="bg-amber-50 border border-amber-200 rounded-xl p-3 mb-3">
                    <p className="text-sm text-amber-900">
                      <strong>Deductible:</strong> {formatCurrency(coverages.internalWater.deductible)} per claim
                    </p>
                  </div>
                )}

                <div className="grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-3">
                  {coverages.internalWater.covers && coverages.internalWater.covers.length > 0 && (
                    <div className="bg-emerald-50 rounded-xl p-3">
                      <p className="text-xs text-emerald-900 mb-2 flex items-center gap-2">
                        <CheckCircle className="w-4 h-4" /> Covered:
                      </p>
                      <ul className="text-xs text-emerald-800 space-y-1">
                        {coverages.internalWater.covers.map((item, idx) => (
                          <li key={idx}>• {item}</li>
                        ))}
                      </ul>
                    </div>
                  )}
                  
                  {coverages.internalWater.excludes && coverages.internalWater.excludes.length > 0 && (
                    <div className="bg-red-50 rounded-xl p-3">
                      <p className="text-xs text-red-900 mb-2 flex items-center gap-2">
                        <XCircle className="w-4 h-4" /> Not Covered:
                      </p>
                      <ul className="text-xs text-red-800 space-y-1">
                        {coverages.internalWater.excludes.map((item, idx) => (
                          <li key={idx}>• {item}</li>
                        ))}
                      </ul>
                    </div>
                  )}
                </div>
              </div>
            )}

            {/* Theft Coverage */}
            {coverages.theft?.enabled && (
              <div className="border border-slate-200 rounded-2xl p-5">
                <div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-3">
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                    <div className="w-10 h-10 bg-purple-100 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center">
                      <Lock className="w-5 h-5 text-purple-600" />
                    </div>
                    <div>
                      <h4 className="text-slate-900">Theft & Burglary</h4>
                      <p className="text-sm text-slate-600">
                        {coverages.theft.forcibleEntryRequired ? 'Forcible entry required' : 'All theft incidents'}
                      </p>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <div className="text-right">
                    <p className="text-sm text-slate-600">Limit</p>
                    <p className="text-slate-900">{formatCurrency(coverages.theft.limit || 0)}</p>
                  </div>
                </div>

                {coverages.theft.subLimits && (
                  <div className="bg-slate-50 rounded-xl p-3">
                    <p className="text-xs text-slate-600 mb-2">Sub-Limits:</p>
                    <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3">
                      {coverages.theft.subLimits.cashAndJewelry && (
                        <div className="bg-white rounded-lg p-2">
                          <p className="text-xs text-slate-600">Cash & Jewelry</p>
                          <p className="text-sm text-slate-900">{formatCurrency(coverages.theft.subLimits.cashAndJewelry)}</p>
                        </div>
                      )}
                      {coverages.theft.subLimits.electronics && (
                        <div className="bg-white rounded-lg p-2">
                          <p className="text-xs text-slate-600">Electronics</p>
                          <p className="text-sm text-slate-900">{formatCurrency(coverages.theft.subLimits.electronics)}</p>
                        </div>
                      )}
                    </div>
                    {coverages.theft.safeRequirement && (
                      <p className="text-xs text-amber-700 mt-2">⚠️ {coverages.theft.safeRequirement}</p>
                    )}
                  </div>
                )}
              </div>
            )}

            {/* Third Party Liability */}
            {coverages.thirdPartyLiability?.enabled && (
              <div className="border border-slate-200 rounded-2xl p-5">
                <div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-3">
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                    <div className="w-10 h-10 bg-indigo-100 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center">
                      <Users className="w-5 h-5 text-indigo-600" />
                    </div>
                    <div>
                      <h4 className="text-slate-900">Third Party Liability</h4>
                      <p className="text-sm text-slate-600">Damage to neighbors</p>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <div className="text-right">
                    <p className="text-sm text-slate-600">Limit</p>
                    <p className="text-slate-900">{formatCurrency(coverages.thirdPartyLiability.limit || 0)}</p>
                  </div>
                </div>

                <div className="bg-indigo-50 rounded-xl p-3">
                  <p className="text-xs text-indigo-900 mb-2">Protects you against:</p>
                  <ul className="text-xs text-indigo-800 space-y-1">
                    {coverages.thirdPartyLiability.tenantLiability && (
                      <li className="flex items-center gap-2">
                        <CheckCircle className="w-3 h-3" /> Tenant's liability to landlord for fire damage
                      </li>
                    )}
                    {coverages.thirdPartyLiability.neighborLiability && (
                      <li className="flex items-center gap-2">
                        <CheckCircle className="w-3 h-3" /> Fire or water spreading to neighbor's property
                      </li>
                    )}
                    <li className="flex items-center gap-2">
                      <CheckCircle className="w-3 h-3" /> Legal defense costs
                    </li>
                  </ul>
                </div>
              </div>
            )}

            {/* Earthquake Coverage */}
            {coverages.earthquake?.enabled && (
              <div className="border-2 border-indigo-300 rounded-2xl p-5 bg-gradient-to-br from-indigo-50 to-purple-50">
                <div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-3">
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                    <div className="w-10 h-10 bg-indigo-200 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center">
                      <Mountain className="w-5 h-5 text-indigo-700" />
                    </div>
                    <div>
                      <h4 className="text-slate-900">Earthquake Coverage (Excess over DASK)</h4>
                      <p className="text-sm text-indigo-700">Voluntary supplementary coverage</p>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <div className="text-right">
                    <p className="text-sm text-slate-600">Limit</p>
                    <p className="text-slate-900">{formatCurrency(coverages.earthquake.limit || 0)}</p>
                  </div>
                </div>

                <div className="bg-white rounded-xl p-4">
                  <div className="flex items-start gap-3 mb-3">
                    <AlertTriangle className="w-5 h-5 text-amber-600 flex-shrink-0" />
                    <div>
                      <p className="text-sm text-slate-900 mb-2">
                        <strong>Mandatory {coverages.earthquake.deductible && `${coverages.earthquake.deductibleType === 'Percentage' ? coverages.earthquake.deductible + '%' : formatCurrency(coverages.earthquake.deductible)}`} Deductible Applies</strong>
                      </p>
                      {coverages.earthquake.deductible && coverages.earthquake.deductibleType === 'Percentage' && (
                        <p className="text-sm text-slate-700">
                          You pay the first {formatCurrency((insuredValues?.totalSumInsured || 0) * (coverages.earthquake.deductible / 100))} 
                          {' '}({coverages.earthquake.deductible}% of {formatCurrency(insuredValues?.totalSumInsured || 0)}) 
                          in any earthquake claim. Claims below this amount are not paid.
                        </p>
                      )}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  
                  <div className="bg-slate-50 rounded-lg p-3">
                    <p className="text-xs text-slate-700">
                      <strong>Important:</strong> This coverage integrates with DASK. In an earthquake:
                      DASK pays first → Private policy pays excess above DASK limit minus the deductible.
                    </p>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            )}
          </div>

          {/* Additional Perils */}
          {coverages.additionalPerils && (
            <div className="mt-5 pt-5 border-t border-slate-200">
              <h4 className="text-slate-900 mb-4 flex items-center gap-2">
                <Sparkles className="w-5 h-5 text-blue-600" />
                Additional Perils Covered
              </h4>
              <div className="grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-3">
                {coverages.additionalPerils.storm?.enabled && (
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-3 bg-slate-50 rounded-xl p-3">
                    <CheckCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-emerald-600" />
                    <div>
                      <p className="text-sm text-slate-900">Storm Damage</p>
                      {coverages.additionalPerils.storm.windSpeedThreshold && (
                        <p className="text-xs text-slate-600">Wind speed &gt; {coverages.additionalPerils.storm.windSpeedThreshold}</p>
                      )}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                )}
                
                {coverages.additionalPerils.snow?.enabled && (
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-3 bg-slate-50 rounded-xl p-3">
                    <CheckCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-emerald-600" />
                    <p className="text-sm text-slate-900">Snow Weight (Roof Collapse)</p>
                  </div>
                )}
                
                {coverages.additionalPerils.vehicleImpact?.enabled && (
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-3 bg-slate-50 rounded-xl p-3">
                    <CheckCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-emerald-600" />
                    <p className="text-sm text-slate-900">Vehicle Impact</p>
                  </div>
                )}
                
                {coverages.additionalPerils.terrorism?.enabled && (
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-3 bg-slate-50 rounded-xl p-3">
                    <CheckCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-emerald-600" />
                    <div>
                      <p className="text-sm text-slate-900">Terrorism</p>
                      {coverages.additionalPerils.terrorism.coInsurance && (
                        <p className="text-xs text-slate-600">{coverages.additionalPerils.terrorism.coInsurance}% co-insurance (mandatory)</p>
                      )}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                )}
                
                {coverages.additionalPerils.glkhh?.enabled && (
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-3 bg-slate-50 rounded-xl p-3">
                    <CheckCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-emerald-600" />
                    <p className="text-sm text-slate-900">GLKHH (Strikes, Civil Commotion)</p>
                  </div>
                )}
              </div>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Critical Clauses */}
      {extendedData.criticalClauses && (
        <div className="bg-gradient-to-br from-amber-50 to-orange-50 border border-amber-200 rounded-3xl p-6">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-5">
            <AlertCircle className="w-6 h-6 text-amber-600" />
            <h3 className="text-slate-900">Critical Policy Clauses</h3>
          </div>

          <div className="space-y-4">
            {/* Missing Insurance Clause */}
            {extendedData.criticalClauses.missingInsurance?.applies && (
              <div className="bg-white border border-amber-300 rounded-2xl p-5">
                <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                  <AlertOctagon className="w-6 h-6 text-red-600 flex-shrink-0" />
                  <div className="flex-1">
                    <h4 className="text-slate-900 mb-2">Missing Insurance Clause (Eksik Sigorta Klozu)</h4>
                    <p className="text-sm text-slate-700 mb-3">{extendedData.criticalClauses.missingInsurance.explanation}</p>
                    
                    {extendedData.criticalClauses.missingInsurance.formula && (
                      <div className="bg-slate-50 rounded-xl p-3 mb-3">
                        <p className="text-xs text-slate-600 mb-1">Formula:</p>
                        <p className="text-sm text-slate-900 font-mono">{extendedData.criticalClauses.missingInsurance.formula}</p>
                      </div>
                    )}
                    
                    {extendedData.criticalClauses.missingInsurance.currentRisk && (
                      <div className="bg-red-50 border border-red-200 rounded-xl p-3">
                        <p className="text-sm text-red-900">
                          <strong>Current Status:</strong> {extendedData.criticalClauses.missingInsurance.currentRisk}
                        </p>
                      </div>
                    )}
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            )}

            {/* Inflation Protection */}
            {extendedData.criticalClauses.inflationProtection?.enabled && (
              <div className="bg-white border border-emerald-300 rounded-2xl p-5">
                <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                  <TrendingUp className="w-6 h-6 text-emerald-600 flex-shrink-0" />
                  <div className="flex-1">
                    <h4 className="text-slate-900 mb-2">✓ Inflation Protection Clause Active</h4>
                    <p className="text-sm text-slate-700 mb-3">
                      Your coverage amount increases automatically to protect against inflation
                    </p>
                    
                    <div className="grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-3">
                      <div className="bg-emerald-50 rounded-xl p-3">
                        <p className="text-xs text-slate-600 mb-1">Annual Increase Rate</p>
                        <p className="text-lg text-emerald-900">{extendedData.criticalClauses.inflationProtection.rate}%</p>
                      </div>
                      <div className="bg-emerald-50 rounded-xl p-3">
                        <p className="text-xs text-slate-600 mb-1">Adjustment Frequency</p>
                        <p className="text-lg text-emerald-900">{extendedData.criticalClauses.inflationProtection.mechanism}</p>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                    
                    {extendedData.criticalClauses.inflationProtection.benefit && (
                      <p className="text-sm text-emerald-700 mt-3">
                        <strong>Benefit:</strong> {extendedData.criticalClauses.inflationProtection.benefit}
                      </p>
                    )}
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            )}

            {/* New Value Clause */}
            {extendedData.criticalClauses.newValueClause?.enabled && (
              <div className="bg-white border border-blue-300 rounded-2xl p-5">
                <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                  <Sparkles className="w-6 h-6 text-blue-600 flex-shrink-0" />
                  <div className="flex-1">
                    <h4 className="text-slate-900 mb-2">✓ New Value Clause (Yeni Değer Klozu)</h4>
                    <p className="text-sm text-slate-700 mb-3">
                      {extendedData.criticalClauses.newValueClause.appliesToContents 
                        ? 'Damaged items replaced with brand new equivalents - no depreciation deducted'
                        : 'New value replacement available for building only'}
                    </p>
                    
                    {extendedData.criticalClauses.newValueClause.excludes && extendedData.criticalClauses.newValueClause.excludes.length > 0 && (
                      <div className="bg-slate-50 rounded-xl p-3">
                        <p className="text-xs text-slate-600 mb-2">Exclusions (depreciation still applies):</p>
                        <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
                          {extendedData.criticalClauses.newValueClause.excludes.map((item, idx) => (
                            <span key={idx} className="text-xs bg-white px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-slate-700 border border-slate-200">
                              {item}
                            </span>
                          ))}
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    )}
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Electronic Device Coverage */}
      {extendedData.electronicDeviceCoverage?.enabled && (
        <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-4">
            <Zap className="w-6 h-6 text-yellow-600" />
            <h3 className="text-slate-900">Electronic Device Protection</h3>
          </div>
          
          <div className="bg-yellow-50 border border-yellow-200 rounded-2xl p-4">
            <p className="text-sm text-yellow-900 mb-3">
              Optional add-on covering risks not included in standard fire policy
            </p>
            <div className="grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-3">
              {extendedData.electronicDeviceCoverage.voltageSurge && (
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                  <CheckCircle className="w-4 h-4 text-emerald-600" />
                  <p className="text-sm text-slate-700">Voltage surge damage</p>
                </div>
              )}
              {extendedData.electronicDeviceCoverage.accidentalBreakage && (
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                  <CheckCircle className="w-4 h-4 text-emerald-600" />
                  <p className="text-sm text-slate-700">Accidental breakage</p>
                </div>
              )}
            </div>
            {extendedData.electronicDeviceCoverage.limit && (
              <p className="text-sm text-slate-600 mt-3">
                Coverage Limit: {formatCurrency(extendedData.electronicDeviceCoverage.limit)}
              </p>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Premium Breakdown */}
      {extendedData.premiumBreakdown && (
        <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-5">
            <WalletCards className="w-6 h-6 text-blue-600" />
            <h3 className="text-slate-900">Premium Breakdown</h3>
          </div>
          
          <div className="space-y-3">
            {extendedData.premiumBreakdown.buildingPremium !== undefined && (
              <div className="flex justify-between items-center py-2 border-b border-slate-100">
                <span className="text-sm text-slate-600">Building Premium</span>
                <span className="text-slate-900">{formatCurrency(extendedData.premiumBreakdown.buildingPremium)}</span>
              </div>
            )}
            
            {extendedData.premiumBreakdown.contentsPremium !== undefined && (
              <div className="flex justify-between items-center py-2 border-b border-slate-100">
                <span className="text-sm text-slate-600">Contents Premium</span>
                <span className="text-slate-900">{formatCurrency(extendedData.premiumBreakdown.contentsPremium)}</span>
              </div>
            )}
            
            {extendedData.premiumBreakdown.earthquakePremium !== undefined && (
              <div className="flex justify-between items-center py-2 border-b border-slate-100">
                <span className="text-sm text-slate-600">Earthquake Premium</span>
                <span className="text-slate-900">{formatCurrency(extendedData.premiumBreakdown.earthquakePremium)}</span>
              </div>
            )}
            
            {extendedData.premiumBreakdown.additionalCoverages !== undefined && (
              <div className="flex justify-between items-center py-2 border-b border-slate-100">
                <span className="text-sm text-slate-600">Additional Coverages</span>
                <span className="text-slate-900">{formatCurrency(extendedData.premiumBreakdown.additionalCoverages)}</span>
              </div>
            )}
            
            {extendedData.premiumBreakdown.netPremium !== undefined && (
              <div className="flex justify-between items-center py-2 border-b border-slate-200">
                <span className="text-sm text-slate-900">Net Premium</span>
                <span className="text-slate-900">{formatCurrency(extendedData.premiumBreakdown.netPremium)}</span>
              </div>
            )}
            
            {extendedData.premiumBreakdown.bsmv !== undefined && (
              <div className="flex justify-between items-center py-2 border-b border-slate-100">
                <span className="text-sm text-slate-600">BSMV (5% Tax)</span>
                <span className="text-slate-900">{formatCurrency(extendedData.premiumBreakdown.bsmv)}</span>
              </div>
            )}
            
            {extendedData.premiumBreakdown.grossPremium !== undefined && (
              <div className="flex justify-between items-center py-3 bg-blue-50 rounded-2xl px-4 border-2 border-blue-200">
                <span className="text-blue-900">Total Annual Premium</span>
                <span className="text-xl text-blue-900">{formatCurrency(extendedData.premiumBreakdown.grossPremium)}</span>
              </div>
            )}
            
            {extendedData.premiumBreakdown.paymentPlan && (
              <div className="mt-3 text-center">
                <p className="text-sm text-slate-600">Payment Plan: <strong>{extendedData.premiumBreakdown.paymentPlan}</strong></p>
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Standard Exclusions */}
      {extendedData.standardExclusions && extendedData.standardExclusions.length > 0 && (
        <div className="bg-red-50 border border-red-200 rounded-3xl p-6">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-4">
            <Ban className="w-6 h-6 text-red-600" />
            <h3 className="text-red-900">Standard Exclusions</h3>
          </div>
          
          <div className="grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-3">
            {extendedData.standardExclusions.map((exclusion, idx) => (
              <div key={idx} className="flex items-start gap-2 bg-white rounded-xl p-3">
                <XCircle className="w-4 h-4 text-red-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
                <p className="text-sm text-slate-700">{exclusion}</p>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>

          {extendedData.specificExclusions && (
            <div className="mt-4 pt-4 border-t border-red-200">
              <p className="text-sm text-red-900 mb-3">
                <strong>Important Specific Exclusions:</strong>
              </p>
              {extendedData.specificExclusions.electricalDamage && (
                <div className="bg-white rounded-xl p-3 mb-2">
                  <p className="text-sm text-slate-700">
                    <strong>Electrical Damage:</strong> {extendedData.specificExclusions.electricalDamage}
                  </p>
                </div>
              )}
              {extendedData.specificExclusions.gradualDamage && (
                <div className="bg-white rounded-xl p-3 mb-2">
                  <p className="text-sm text-slate-700">
                    <strong>Gradual Damage:</strong> {extendedData.specificExclusions.gradualDamage}
                  </p>
                </div>
              )}
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Claims Process */}
      {extendedData.claimsInfo && (
        <div className="bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-50 to-indigo-50 border border-blue-200 rounded-3xl p-6">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-5">
            <FileText className="w-6 h-6 text-blue-600" />
            <h3 className="text-slate-900">Claims Process</h3>
          </div>

          <div className="space-y-4">
            {extendedData.claimsInfo.notificationPeriod && (
              <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl p-4">
                <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-2">
                  <Clock className="w-5 h-5 text-blue-600" />
                  <h4 className="text-slate-900">Notification Deadline</h4>
                </div>
                <p className="text-sm text-slate-700">
                  You must notify the insurer within <strong>{extendedData.claimsInfo.notificationPeriod}</strong> of becoming aware of a loss
                </p>
              </div>
            )}

            {extendedData.claimsInfo.requiredDocuments && extendedData.claimsInfo.requiredDocuments.length > 0 && (
              <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl p-4">
                <h4 className="text-slate-900 mb-3">Required Documents for Claims:</h4>
                <div className="grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-2">
                  {extendedData.claimsInfo.requiredDocuments.map((doc, idx) => (
                    <div key={idx} className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-slate-700">
                      <CheckSquare className="w-4 h-4 text-blue-600" />
                      {doc}
                    </div>
                  ))}
                </div>
              </div>
            )}

            {extendedData.claimsInfo.daskClaimFirst && (
              <div className="bg-indigo-100 border border-indigo-300 rounded-2xl p-4">
                <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                  <Info className="w-5 h-5 text-indigo-700 flex-shrink-0" />
                  <div>
                    <p className="text-sm text-indigo-900 mb-2">
                      <strong>For Earthquake Claims:</strong>
                    </p>
                    <p className="text-sm text-indigo-800">
                      You must file with DASK first. After DASK assessment and payment, this insurer will process 
                      the excess claim (damages above DASK limit minus the 2% deductible).
                    </p>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Regulatory Footer */}
      <div className="bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200 rounded-3xl p-6">
        <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
          <Info className="w-5 h-5 text-slate-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
          <div>
            <p className="text-sm text-slate-700 mb-2">
              <strong>Regulatory Framework:</strong> This policy is governed by the "Yangın Sigortası Genel Şartları" (Fire Insurance General Conditions) 
              combined with package policy special conditions.
            </p>
            <p className="text-sm text-slate-600">
              Complete protection in the Turkish property market requires three layers: (1) DASK for mandatory earthquake coverage, 
              (2) Housing Package Policy for comprehensive property protection, and (3) Optional Electronic Device Insurance for voltage surge coverage.
            </p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

```
