## File: `components (2)/insurance-lines/TurkishHealthDetails.tsx`
- Bytes: 57,942
- SHA256: `e835d92e06eecea9f676a0a5e32838f90c6c93b46d85e8d54699168d7c0083da`

```tsx
import { 
  Shield, Clock, AlertCircle, Users, Info, 
  ShieldAlert, DollarSign, AlertTriangle, HeartPulse, Ban,
  Hospital, Phone, FileText, Percent, Activity, Stethoscope,
  TrendingUp, Calendar, Target, Award, CheckCircle, XCircle,
  Building2, Pill, Syringe, Baby, Eye, Heart, Brain, Ambulance,
  UserCheck, FileCheck, CreditCard, Briefcase, HomeIcon, Plus
} from 'lucide-react';
import { TurkishHealthExtendedData } from './types';
import { BasePolicy } from './index';

type TurkishHealthDetailsProps = {
  policy: BasePolicy & {
    extendedData?: TurkishHealthExtendedData;
    country?: string;
    insuranceLine?: string;
  };
};

export function TurkishHealthDetails({ policy }: TurkishHealthDetailsProps) {
  // Guard clause - return early if no extended data
  if (!policy.extendedData) {
    return (
      <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
        <p className="text-slate-500">No extended Turkish Health Insurance data available for this policy.</p>
      </div>
    );
  }

  const extendedData = policy.extendedData as TurkishHealthExtendedData;
  
  const formatCurrency = (amount: number) => {
    return new Intl.NumberFormat('tr-TR', {
      style: 'currency',
      currency: 'TRY',
      minimumFractionDigits: 0,
      maximumFractionDigits: 0
    }).format(amount);
  };

  const formatDate = (dateString: string) => {
    return new Date(dateString).toLocaleDateString('tr-TR', {
      year: 'numeric',
      month: 'long',
      day: 'numeric'
    });
  };

  const isTSS = extendedData.productType === 'TSS';
  const isOSS = extendedData.productType === 'ÖSS';
  const hasLifetimeRenewal = extendedData.lifetimeRenewalGuarantee?.status === 'Earned';
  const inProgressRenewal = extendedData.lifetimeRenewalGuarantee?.status === 'In Progress';

  return (
    <div className="space-y-6">
      {/* Header Card */}
      <div className={`bg-gradient-to-br ${isTSS ? 'from-emerald-600 to-teal-700' : 'from-blue-600 to-indigo-700'} text-white rounded-3xl p-8`}>
        <div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-4">
          <div>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-2">
              <Hospital className="w-8 h-8" />
              <h2 className="text-2xl">🇹🇷 Turkish Health Insurance (Sağlık Sigortası)</h2>
            </div>
            <p className={`${isTSS ? 'text-emerald-100' : 'text-blue-100'}`}>
              {isTSS ? 'Tamamlayıcı Sağlık Sigortası (TSS) - Complementary Health' : 'Özel Sağlık Sigortası (ÖSS) - Private Health'}
            </p>
          </div>
          {hasLifetimeRenewal && (
            <div className="bg-white/20 backdrop-blur px-4 py-2 rounded-xl">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                <Award className="w-5 h-5" />
                <span className="text-sm">Lifetime Renewal Earned</span>
              </div>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
        
        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-4 mt-6">
          <div className="bg-white/10 backdrop-blur rounded-xl p-4">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
              <Activity className="w-5 h-5" />
              <span className="text-sm opacity-90">Product Plan</span>
            </div>
            <div className="text-2xl">{extendedData.productName || 'Standard Plan'}</div>
            <div className="text-sm mt-1 opacity-80">{extendedData.planLevel || 'Standard'} Level</div>
          </div>
          
          <div className="bg-white/10 backdrop-blur rounded-xl p-4">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
              <Hospital className="w-5 h-5" />
              <span className="text-sm opacity-90">Provider Network</span>
            </div>
            <div className="text-2xl">{extendedData.networkInfo?.networkType || 'Network A'}</div>
            <div className="text-sm mt-1 opacity-80">{extendedData.networkInfo?.totalProviders || 0}+ Providers</div>
          </div>
          
          <div className="bg-white/10 backdrop-blur rounded-xl p-4">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
              <DollarSign className="w-5 h-5" />
              <span className="text-sm opacity-90">Annual Premium</span>
            </div>
            <div className="text-2xl">{formatCurrency(extendedData.premiumBreakdown?.totalAnnualPremium || policy.monthlyPremium * 12)}</div>
            <div className="text-sm mt-1 opacity-80">{formatCurrency(policy.monthlyPremium)}/month</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Critical Product Type Differentiator */}
      <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border-2 border-blue-200">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-4">
          <Info className="w-6 h-6 text-blue-600" />
          <h3 className="text-xl">Product Type: {isTSS ? 'TSS (Complementary Health)' : 'ÖSS (Private Health)'}</h3>
        </div>
        
        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
          <div className={`${isTSS ? 'bg-emerald-50 border-emerald-300' : 'bg-slate-50 border-slate-200'} border-2 rounded-xl p-4`}>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-3">
              <ShieldAlert className="w-5 h-5 text-emerald-600" />
              <span className="font-semibold">Coverage Logic</span>
            </div>
            <p className="text-sm text-slate-700">
              {isTSS 
                ? 'TSS pays the "Difference Fee" (Fark Ücreti) that hospitals charge above SGK payment. SGK pays base cost; TSS covers the rest.'
                : 'ÖSS pays the full hospital bill (minus any copayment) based on insurer\'s tariff. No SGK dependency - complete independence.'
              }
            </p>
          </div>
          
          <div className={`${isTSS ? 'bg-emerald-50 border-emerald-300' : 'bg-slate-50 border-slate-200'} border-2 rounded-xl p-4`}>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-3">
              <Target className="w-5 h-5 text-blue-600" />
              <span className="font-semibold">Strategic Positioning</span>
            </div>
            <p className="text-sm text-slate-700">
              {extendedData.strategicInsights?.productChoiceRationale || 
                (isTSS 
                  ? 'TSS is the efficiency choice - privatizes public SGK system at fraction of ÖSS cost'
                  : 'ÖSS is the freedom choice - access to luxury A+ hospitals that don\'t accept TSS'
                )
              }
            </p>
          </div>
        </div>

        {isTSS && extendedData.sgkRequirement && (
          <div className="mt-4 bg-amber-50 border-2 border-amber-300 rounded-xl p-4">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
              <AlertTriangle className="w-5 h-5 text-amber-600" />
              <span className="font-semibold text-amber-900">SGK Dependency (CRITICAL for TSS)</span>
            </div>
            <div className="space-y-2 text-sm">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                <CheckCircle className="w-4 h-4 text-emerald-600" />
                <span><strong>SGK Status:</strong> {extendedData.sgkRequirement.sgkStatus || 'Active'}</span>
              </div>
              {extendedData.sgkRequirement.employerName && (
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                  <Building2 className="w-4 h-4 text-slate-600" />
                  <span><strong>Employer:</strong> {extendedData.sgkRequirement.employerName}</span>
                </div>
              )}
              <div className="mt-2 p-3 bg-red-50 border border-red-200 rounded-lg">
                <p className="text-red-900 text-xs font-semibold">
                  ⚠️ WARNING: If SGK system (Medula) is down or SGK premiums unpaid, TSS claim will be REJECTED. Active SGK is mandatory trigger.
                </p>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>

      {/* Coverage Scope */}
      <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-6">
          <HeartPulse className="w-6 h-6 text-red-600" />
          <h3 className="text-xl">Coverage Scope & Limits</h3>
        </div>
        
        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
          {/* Inpatient Coverage */}
          {extendedData.inpatientCoverage && (
            <div className="bg-blue-50 rounded-xl p-5 border border-blue-200">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-3">
                <Ambulance className="w-5 h-5 text-blue-600" />
                <span className="font-semibold text-lg">Inpatient (Yatarak Tedavi)</span>
              </div>
              
              <div className="space-y-2 mb-4">
                <div className="flex justify-between items-center">
                  <span className="text-sm text-slate-600">Coverage Limit:</span>
                  <span className="font-semibold text-blue-700">
                    {extendedData.inpatientCoverage.limit === 'Unlimited' ? 'UNLIMITED' : formatCurrency(extendedData.inpatientCoverage.limit)}
                  </span>
                </div>
                <div className="flex justify-between items-center">
                  <span className="text-sm text-slate-600">Room Type:</span>
                  <span className="font-semibold">{extendedData.inpatientCoverage.roomType || 'Semi-Private'}</span>
                </div>
              </div>
              
              {extendedData.inpatientCoverage.includes && extendedData.inpatientCoverage.includes.length > 0 && (
                <div>
                  <div className="text-sm font-semibold mb-2 text-slate-700">Includes:</div>
                  <div className="space-y-1">
                    {extendedData.inpatientCoverage.includes.map((item, idx) => (
                      <div key={idx} className="flex items-start gap-2 text-sm">
                        <CheckCircle className="w-4 h-4 text-emerald-600 mt-0.5 flex-shrink-0" />
                        <span className="text-slate-700">{item}</span>
                      </div>
                    ))}
                  </div>
                </div>
              )}
            </div>
          )}
          
          {/* Outpatient Coverage */}
          {extendedData.outpatientCoverage && (
            <div className="bg-cyan-50 rounded-xl p-5 border border-cyan-200">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-3">
                <Stethoscope className="w-5 h-5 text-cyan-600" />
                <span className="font-semibold text-lg">Outpatient (Ayakta Tedavi)</span>
              </div>
              
              <div className="space-y-2 mb-4">
                <div className="flex justify-between items-center">
                  <span className="text-sm text-slate-600">Limit Type:</span>
                  <span className="font-semibold text-cyan-700">
                    {extendedData.outpatientCoverage.limitType}
                  </span>
                </div>
                
                {extendedData.outpatientCoverage.limitType === 'Usage Count' && extendedData.outpatientCoverage.usageLimit && (
                  <div className="flex justify-between items-center">
                    <span className="text-sm text-slate-600">Annual Limit:</span>
                    <span className="font-semibold text-cyan-700">
                      {extendedData.outpatientCoverage.usageLimit} Uses/Year
                    </span>
                  </div>
                )}
                
                {extendedData.outpatientCoverage.limitType === 'Monetary' && extendedData.outpatientCoverage.monetaryLimit !== undefined && (
                  <div className="flex justify-between items-center">
                    <span className="text-sm text-slate-600">Annual Limit:</span>
                    <span className="font-semibold text-cyan-700">
                      {extendedData.outpatientCoverage.monetaryLimit === 0 ? 'UNLIMITED' : formatCurrency(extendedData.outpatientCoverage.monetaryLimit)}
                    </span>
                  </div>
                )}
                
                <div className="flex justify-between items-center">
                  <span className="text-sm text-slate-600">Copayment:</span>
                  <span className="font-semibold">
                    {extendedData.outpatientCoverage.copayment || 0}%
                  </span>
                </div>
              </div>
              
              {extendedData.outpatientCoverage.usageDefinition && (
                <div className="bg-white border border-cyan-300 rounded-lg p-3">
                  <div className="text-xs font-semibold mb-1 text-slate-700">What is "1 Usage"?</div>
                  <p className="text-xs text-slate-600">{extendedData.outpatientCoverage.usageDefinition}</p>
                </div>
              )}
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Provider Network */}
      {extendedData.networkInfo && (
        <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-6">
            <Hospital className="w-6 h-6 text-purple-600" />
            <h3 className="text-xl">Provider Network Configuration</h3>
          </div>
          
          <div className="space-y-4">
            <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
              <div className="bg-purple-50 rounded-xl p-4 border border-purple-200">
                <div className="text-sm text-slate-600 mb-1">Network Type</div>
                <div className="text-lg font-semibold text-purple-700">{extendedData.networkInfo.networkType}</div>
              </div>
              
              <div className="bg-purple-50 rounded-xl p-4 border border-purple-200">
                <div className="text-sm text-slate-600 mb-1">Total Providers</div>
                <div className="text-lg font-semibold text-purple-700">{extendedData.networkInfo.totalProviders}+</div>
              </div>
              
              <div className="bg-purple-50 rounded-xl p-4 border border-purple-200">
                <div className="text-sm text-slate-600 mb-1">Geography</div>
                <div className="text-lg font-semibold text-purple-700">{extendedData.networkInfo.networkGeography || 'Nationwide'}</div>
              </div>
            </div>
            
            {extendedData.networkInfo.includedHospitals && extendedData.networkInfo.includedHospitals.length > 0 && (
              <div className="bg-emerald-50 rounded-xl p-4 border border-emerald-200">
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-3">
                  <CheckCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-emerald-600" />
                  <span className="font-semibold">Included Hospital Groups</span>
                </div>
                <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-2">
                  {extendedData.networkInfo.includedHospitals.map((hospital, idx) => (
                    <div key={idx} className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm">
                      <Building2 className="w-4 h-4 text-emerald-600 flex-shrink-0" />
                      <span className="text-slate-700">{hospital}</span>
                    </div>
                  ))}
                </div>
              </div>
            )}
            
            {extendedData.networkInfo.excludedLuxuryGroups && extendedData.networkInfo.excludedLuxuryGroups.length > 0 && (
              <div className="bg-red-50 rounded-xl p-4 border border-red-200">
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-3">
                  <XCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-red-600" />
                  <span className="font-semibold">Excluded/Not Contracted</span>
                </div>
                <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-2">
                  {extendedData.networkInfo.excludedLuxuryGroups.map((hospital, idx) => (
                    <div key={idx} className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm">
                      <Ban className="w-4 h-4 text-red-600 flex-shrink-0" />
                      <span className="text-slate-700">{hospital}</span>
                    </div>
                  ))}
                </div>
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Specific Benefits */}
      {extendedData.specificBenefits && (
        <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-6">
            <Plus className="w-6 h-6 text-green-600" />
            <h3 className="text-xl">Specific Benefits & Add-ons</h3>
          </div>
          
          <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
            {/* Maternity */}
            {extendedData.specificBenefits.maternity && (
              <div className={`${extendedData.specificBenefits.maternity.enabled ? 'bg-pink-50 border-pink-300' : 'bg-slate-100 border-slate-300'} border-2 rounded-xl p-5`}>
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-3">
                  <Baby className="w-5 h-5 text-pink-600" />
                  <span className="font-semibold text-lg">Maternity Coverage</span>
                </div>
                
                {extendedData.specificBenefits.maternity.enabled ? (
                  <div className="space-y-2">
                    <div className="flex justify-between items-center">
                      <span className="text-sm text-slate-600">Status:</span>
                      <span className={`px-2 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold ${
                        extendedData.specificBenefits.maternity.statusAfterWaiting === 'Active' 
                          ? 'bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-700'
                          : 'bg-amber-100 text-amber-700'
                      }`}>
                        {extendedData.specificBenefits.maternity.statusAfterWaiting || 'Waiting'}
                      </span>
                    </div>
                    
                    {extendedData.specificBenefits.maternity.normalDeliveryLimit && (
                      <div className="flex justify-between items-center text-sm">
                        <span className="text-slate-600">Normal Delivery:</span>
                        <span className="font-semibold">{formatCurrency(extendedData.specificBenefits.maternity.normalDeliveryLimit)}</span>
                      </div>
                    )}
                    
                    {extendedData.specificBenefits.maternity.cesareanLimit && (
                      <div className="flex justify-between items-center text-sm">
                        <span className="text-slate-600">C-Section:</span>
                        <span className="font-semibold">{formatCurrency(extendedData.specificBenefits.maternity.cesareanLimit)}</span>
                      </div>
                    )}
                    
                    {extendedData.waitingPeriods?.maternity && (
                      <div className="mt-3 p-3 bg-white border border-pink-300 rounded-lg">
                        <div className="text-xs font-semibold mb-1">Waiting Period:</div>
                        <div className="text-xs text-slate-600">
                          {extendedData.waitingPeriods.maternity.remainingMonths && extendedData.waitingPeriods.maternity.remainingMonths > 0 ? (
                            <span className="text-amber-700 font-semibold">
                              {extendedData.waitingPeriods.maternity.remainingMonths} months remaining 
                              (out of {extendedData.waitingPeriods.maternity.waitingMonths} months total)
                            </span>
                          ) : (
                            <span className="text-emerald-700 font-semibold">Waiting period completed ✓</span>
                          )}
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    )}
                  </div>
                ) : (
                  <div className="text-sm text-slate-500">Not included in this plan</div>
                )}
              </div>
            )}
            
            {/* Check-up */}
            {extendedData.specificBenefits.checkUp && extendedData.specificBenefits.checkUp.enabled && (
              <div className="bg-blue-50 border-2 border-blue-300 rounded-xl p-5">
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-3">
                  <Activity className="w-5 h-5 text-blue-600" />
                  <span className="font-semibold text-lg">Annual Check-up</span>
                </div>
                
                <div className="space-y-2">
                  <div className="flex justify-between items-center">
                    <span className="text-sm text-slate-600">Included per year:</span>
                    <span className="font-semibold text-blue-700">
                      {extendedData.specificBenefits.checkUp.annualCount} Check-up{(extendedData.specificBenefits.checkUp.annualCount || 1) > 1 ? 's' : ''}
                    </span>
                  </div>
                  
                  {extendedData.specificBenefits.checkUp.includedTests && extendedData.specificBenefits.checkUp.includedTests.length > 0 && (
                    <div className="mt-3">
                      <div className="text-xs font-semibold mb-2 text-slate-700">Included Tests:</div>
                      <div className="space-y-1">
                        {extendedData.specificBenefits.checkUp.includedTests.slice(0, 4).map((test, idx) => (
                          <div key={idx} className="text-xs text-slate-600 flex items-center gap-1">
                            <CheckCircle className="w-3 h-3 text-emerald-600" />
                            {test}
                          </div>
                        ))}
                        {extendedData.specificBenefits.checkUp.includedTests.length > 4 && (
                          <div className="text-xs text-slate-500 italic">
                            +{extendedData.specificBenefits.checkUp.includedTests.length - 4} more tests
                          </div>
                        )}
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  )}
                </div>
              </div>
            )}
            
            {/* Physical Therapy */}
            {extendedData.specificBenefits.physicalTherapy && extendedData.specificBenefits.physicalTherapy.enabled && (
              <div className="bg-teal-50 border-2 border-teal-300 rounded-xl p-5">
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-3">
                  <Heart className="w-5 h-5 text-teal-600" />
                  <span className="font-semibold text-lg">Physical Therapy</span>
                </div>
                
                <div className="space-y-2">
                  <div className="flex justify-between items-center">
                    <span className="text-sm text-slate-600">Annual Sessions:</span>
                    <span className="font-semibold text-teal-700">
                      {extendedData.specificBenefits.physicalTherapy.sessionLimit} Sessions
                    </span>
                  </div>
                  
                  <div className="flex justify-between items-center">
                    <span className="text-sm text-slate-600">Copay per Session:</span>
                    <span className="font-semibold">
                      {extendedData.specificBenefits.physicalTherapy.perSessionCopay || 0}%
                    </span>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            )}
            
            {/* Dental/Vision */}
            {extendedData.specificBenefits.dentalVision && extendedData.specificBenefits.dentalVision.enabled && (
              <div className="bg-indigo-50 border-2 border-indigo-300 rounded-xl p-5">
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-3">
                  <Eye className="w-5 h-5 text-indigo-600" />
                  <span className="font-semibold text-lg">Dental & Vision</span>
                </div>
                
                <div className="space-y-2">
                  <div className="flex justify-between items-center">
                    <span className="text-sm text-slate-600">Type:</span>
                    <span className="font-semibold text-indigo-700">
                      {extendedData.specificBenefits.dentalVision.type || 'Care Package'}
                    </span>
                  </div>
                  
                  {extendedData.specificBenefits.dentalVision.annualLimit && (
                    <div className="flex justify-between items-center">
                      <span className="text-sm text-slate-600">Annual Limit:</span>
                      <span className="font-semibold">{formatCurrency(extendedData.specificBenefits.dentalVision.annualLimit)}</span>
                    </div>
                  )}
                  
                  {extendedData.specificBenefits.dentalVision.includes && extendedData.specificBenefits.dentalVision.includes.length > 0 && (
                    <div className="mt-2 space-y-1">
                      {extendedData.specificBenefits.dentalVision.includes.map((item, idx) => (
                        <div key={idx} className="text-xs text-slate-600 flex items-center gap-1">
                          <CheckCircle className="w-3 h-3 text-emerald-600" />
                          {item}
                        </div>
                      ))}
                    </div>
                  )}
                </div>
              </div>
            )}
            
            {/* Online Doctor */}
            {extendedData.specificBenefits.onlineDoctor && extendedData.specificBenefits.onlineDoctor.enabled && (
              <div className="bg-purple-50 border-2 border-purple-300 rounded-xl p-5 md:col-span-2">
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-3">
                  <Phone className="w-5 h-5 text-purple-600" />
                  <span className="font-semibold text-lg">Online Doctor Service</span>
                </div>
                
                <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                    <CheckCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-emerald-600" />
                    <span className="text-sm"><strong>Availability:</strong> {extendedData.specificBenefits.onlineDoctor.availability || '24/7'}</span>
                  </div>
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                    <Info className="w-5 h-5 text-blue-600" />
                    <span className="text-sm">
                      <strong>Impact on Usage:</strong> {extendedData.specificBenefits.onlineDoctor.impactsUsageLimit ? 'Counts toward limit' : 'Does NOT count'}
                    </span>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Waiting Periods */}
      {extendedData.waitingPeriods && (
        <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-6">
            <Clock className="w-6 h-6 text-amber-600" />
            <h3 className="text-xl">Waiting Periods (Bekleme Süresi)</h3>
          </div>
          
          <div className="bg-amber-50 border-2 border-amber-300 rounded-xl p-5 mb-4">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
              <Info className="w-5 h-5 text-amber-700" />
              <span className="font-semibold text-amber-900">Why Waiting Periods Exist</span>
            </div>
            <p className="text-sm text-amber-900">
              Waiting periods prevent adverse selection (buying insurance only when sick). Emergency surgeries have ZERO waiting period.
              For renewals, waiting periods apply only in the first year.
            </p>
          </div>
          
          {extendedData.waitingPeriods.inpatientSurgery && (
            <div className="space-y-3">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-3">
                <Ambulance className="w-5 h-5 text-blue-600" />
                <span className="font-semibold">Inpatient Surgery Waiting Periods</span>
              </div>
              
              <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-3">
                <div className="bg-slate-50 rounded-lg p-3 border border-slate-200">
                  <div className="text-sm text-slate-600 mb-1">Standard Surgeries</div>
                  <div className="text-lg font-semibold">{extendedData.waitingPeriods.inpatientSurgery.standardWaitingDays} days</div>
                </div>
                
                <div className="bg-emerald-50 rounded-lg p-3 border border-emerald-200">
                  <div className="text-sm text-slate-600 mb-1">Emergency Surgeries</div>
                  <div className="text-lg font-semibold text-emerald-700">0 days (Immediate)</div>
                </div>
              </div>
              
              {extendedData.waitingPeriods.inpatientSurgery.specificConditions && extendedData.waitingPeriods.inpatientSurgery.specificConditions.length > 0 && (
                <div className="mt-4">
                  <div className="text-sm font-semibold mb-2 text-slate-700">Specific Condition Waiting Periods:</div>
                  <div className="space-y-2">
                    {extendedData.waitingPeriods.inpatientSurgery.specificConditions.map((cond, idx) => (
                      <div key={idx} className="flex items-center justify-between bg-slate-50 rounded-lg p-3 text-sm border border-slate-200">
                        <span className="text-slate-700">{cond.condition}</span>
                        <span className="font-semibold text-blue-700">{cond.waitingDays} days</span>
                      </div>
                    ))}
                  </div>
                </div>
              )}
              
              {extendedData.waitingPeriods.inpatientSurgery.statusForRenewals && (
                <div className="mt-3 p-3 bg-blue-50 border border-blue-200 rounded-lg">
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-1">
                    <Info className="w-4 h-4 text-blue-600" />
                    <span className="text-xs font-semibold text-blue-900">Renewal Status</span>
                  </div>
                  <p className="text-xs text-blue-800">{extendedData.waitingPeriods.inpatientSurgery.statusForRenewals}</p>
                </div>
              )}
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Lifetime Renewal Guarantee - THE HOLY GRAIL */}
      {extendedData.lifetimeRenewalGuarantee && (
        <div className={`rounded-3xl p-6 border-2 ${
          hasLifetimeRenewal 
            ? 'bg-gradient-to-br from-amber-50 to-yellow-50 border-amber-300'
            : inProgressRenewal
            ? 'bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-50 to-cyan-50 border-blue-300'
            : 'bg-slate-50 border-slate-300'
        }`}>
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-6">
            <Award className="w-7 h-7 text-amber-600" />
            <h3 className="text-xl">Lifetime Renewal Guarantee (Ömür Boyu Yenileme Garantisi) - THE HOLY GRAIL</h3>
          </div>
          
          <div className="space-y-4">
            <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
              <span className="text-lg font-semibold">Status:</span>
              <span className={`px-4 py-2 rounded-full text-sm font-semibold ${
                hasLifetimeRenewal 
                  ? 'bg-amber-200 text-amber-900'
                  : inProgressRenewal
                  ? 'bg-blue-200 text-blue-900'
                  : 'bg-slate-200 text-slate-700'
              }`}>
                {extendedData.lifetimeRenewalGuarantee.status}
              </span>
            </div>
            
            {inProgressRenewal && (
              <div className="bg-white rounded-xl p-4 border border-blue-300">
                <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-4 mb-4">
                  <div>
                    <div className="text-sm text-slate-600 mb-1">Years Required</div>
                    <div className="text-2xl font-semibold text-blue-700">{extendedData.lifetimeRenewalGuarantee.yearsRequired}</div>
                  </div>
                  <div>
                    <div className="text-sm text-slate-600 mb-1">Years Completed</div>
                    <div className="text-2xl font-semibold text-emerald-700">{extendedData.lifetimeRenewalGuarantee.yearsCurrent}</div>
                  </div>
                  <div>
                    <div className="text-sm text-slate-600 mb-1">Years Remaining</div>
                    <div className="text-2xl font-semibold text-amber-700">{extendedData.lifetimeRenewalGuarantee.yearsRemaining}</div>
                  </div>
                </div>
                
                {/* Progress Bar */}
                <div className="w-full bg-slate-200 rounded-full h-3 overflow-hidden">
                  <div 
                    className="bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-emerald-600 h-full rounded-full transition-all duration-500"
                    style={{ 
                      width: `${((extendedData.lifetimeRenewalGuarantee.yearsCurrent || 0) / (extendedData.lifetimeRenewalGuarantee.yearsRequired || 1)) * 100}%` 
                    }}
                  />
                </div>
              </div>
            )}
            
            {hasLifetimeRenewal && (
              <div className="bg-white border-2 border-amber-400 rounded-xl p-5">
                <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-3">
                  <Award className="w-6 h-6 text-amber-600" />
                  <span className="font-semibold text-lg text-amber-900">EARNED - Protection Active</span>
                </div>
                <p className="text-sm text-amber-900">
                  {extendedData.lifetimeRenewalGuarantee.benefit}
                </p>
              </div>
            )}
            
            {extendedData.lifetimeRenewalGuarantee.conditions && extendedData.lifetimeRenewalGuarantee.conditions.length > 0 && (
              <div>
                <div className="text-sm font-semibold mb-2 text-slate-700">Conditions to Earn/Maintain:</div>
                <div className="space-y-2">
                  {extendedData.lifetimeRenewalGuarantee.conditions.map((condition, idx) => (
                    <div key={idx} className="flex items-start gap-2 text-sm bg-white rounded-lg p-3 border border-slate-200">
                      <CheckCircle className="w-4 h-4 text-emerald-600 mt-0.5 flex-shrink-0" />
                      <span className="text-slate-700">{condition}</span>
                    </div>
                  ))}
                </div>
              </div>
            )}
            
            <div className="bg-blue-900 text-white rounded-xl p-4">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
                <Shield className="w-5 h-5" />
                <span className="font-semibold">Why This Matters</span>
              </div>
              <p className="text-sm opacity-90">
                Once earned, the insurer CANNOT deny your renewal, CANNOT exclude newly diagnosed chronic illnesses (cancer, diabetes, heart disease), 
                and CANNOT apply individual surcharges. You are protected for life. This is the ultimate insurance against becoming "uninsurable" 
                due to chronic illness.
              </p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Exclusions */}
      {extendedData.exclusions && (
        <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-6">
            <Ban className="w-6 h-6 text-red-600" />
            <h3 className="text-xl">Exclusions & Exemptions (What's NOT Covered)</h3>
          </div>
          
          <div className="space-y-4">
            {/* Pre-existing Conditions */}
            {extendedData.exclusions.preExistingConditions && (
              <div className="bg-red-50 border-2 border-red-300 rounded-xl p-5">
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-3">
                  <AlertCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-red-600" />
                  <span className="font-semibold text-lg text-red-900">Pre-existing Conditions (CRITICAL)</span>
                </div>
                
                <div className="mb-3">
                  <p className="text-sm text-red-900 font-semibold">
                    THE GOLDEN RULE: Any illness diagnosed or treated BEFORE policy inception date is permanently excluded.
                  </p>
                </div>
                
                {extendedData.exclusions.preExistingConditions.specificExclusions && extendedData.exclusions.preExistingConditions.specificExclusions.length > 0 && (
                  <div className="mt-3 space-y-1">
                    <div className="text-sm font-semibold text-red-900 mb-2">Your Specific Exclusions:</div>
                    {extendedData.exclusions.preExistingConditions.specificExclusions.map((exclusion, idx) => (
                      <div key={idx} className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-red-800 bg-white rounded p-2">
                        <XCircle className="w-4 h-4 text-red-600 flex-shrink-0" />
                        {exclusion}
                      </div>
                    ))}
                  </div>
                )}
              </div>
            )}
            
            {/* Standard Exclusions */}
            {extendedData.exclusions.standardExclusions && extendedData.exclusions.standardExclusions.length > 0 && (
              <div>
                <div className="text-sm font-semibold mb-3 text-slate-700">Standard Industry Exclusions:</div>
                <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-2">
                  {extendedData.exclusions.standardExclusions.map((exclusion, idx) => (
                    <div key={idx} className="flex items-start gap-2 text-sm bg-slate-50 rounded-lg p-3 border border-slate-200">
                      <XCircle className="w-4 h-4 text-slate-500 mt-0.5 flex-shrink-0" />
                      <span className="text-slate-700">{exclusion}</span>
                    </div>
                  ))}
                </div>
              </div>
            )}
            
            {/* SGK Red Area (TSS only) */}
            {isTSS && extendedData.exclusions.sgkRedArea && extendedData.exclusions.sgkRedArea.applies && (
              <div className="bg-amber-50 border-2 border-amber-300 rounded-xl p-5">
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
                  <AlertTriangle className="w-5 h-5 text-amber-600" />
                  <span className="font-semibold text-amber-900">SGK "Red Area" (TSS Specific)</span>
                </div>
                <p className="text-sm text-amber-900">
                  {extendedData.exclusions.sgkRedArea.explanation}
                </p>
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Premium Breakdown */}
      {extendedData.premiumBreakdown && (
        <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-6">
            <DollarSign className="w-6 h-6 text-green-600" />
            <h3 className="text-xl">Premium Breakdown & Financial Details</h3>
          </div>
          
          <div className="space-y-4">
            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4">
              <div className="bg-blue-50 rounded-xl p-4 border border-blue-200">
                <div className="text-sm text-slate-600 mb-1">Base Premium</div>
                <div className="text-lg font-semibold">{formatCurrency(extendedData.premiumBreakdown.basePremium || 0)}</div>
              </div>
              
              {extendedData.premiumBreakdown.networkSurcharge !== undefined && extendedData.premiumBreakdown.networkSurcharge > 0 && (
                <div className="bg-purple-50 rounded-xl p-4 border border-purple-200">
                  <div className="text-sm text-slate-600 mb-1">Network Surcharge</div>
                  <div className="text-lg font-semibold text-purple-700">+{formatCurrency(extendedData.premiumBreakdown.networkSurcharge)}</div>
                </div>
              )}
              
              {extendedData.premiumBreakdown.ageAdjustment !== undefined && extendedData.premiumBreakdown.ageAdjustment !== 0 && (
                <div className={`rounded-xl p-4 border ${extendedData.premiumBreakdown.ageAdjustment > 0 ? 'bg-amber-50 border-amber-200' : 'bg-emerald-50 border-emerald-200'}`}>
                  <div className="text-sm text-slate-600 mb-1">Age Adjustment</div>
                  <div className={`text-lg font-semibold ${extendedData.premiumBreakdown.ageAdjustment > 0 ? 'text-amber-700' : 'text-emerald-700'}`}>
                    {extendedData.premiumBreakdown.ageAdjustment > 0 ? '+' : ''}{formatCurrency(extendedData.premiumBreakdown.ageAdjustment)}
                  </div>
                </div>
              )}
              
              {extendedData.premiumBreakdown.maternityRider !== undefined && extendedData.premiumBreakdown.maternityRider > 0 && (
                <div className="bg-pink-50 rounded-xl p-4 border border-pink-200">
                  <div className="text-sm text-slate-600 mb-1">Maternity Rider</div>
                  <div className="text-lg font-semibold text-pink-700">+{formatCurrency(extendedData.premiumBreakdown.maternityRider)}</div>
                </div>
              )}
            </div>
            
            <div className="bg-gradient-to-r from-green-50 to-emerald-50 border-2 border-green-300 rounded-xl p-5">
              <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                <span className="text-lg font-semibold">Total Annual Premium:</span>
                <span className="text-3xl font-bold text-green-700">
                  {formatCurrency(extendedData.premiumBreakdown.totalAnnualPremium || 0)}
                </span>
              </div>
              <div className="flex items-center justify-between mt-2">
                <span className="text-sm text-slate-600">Payment Plan:</span>
                <span className="text-sm font-semibold">{extendedData.premiumBreakdown.paymentPlan || 'Monthly'}</span>
              </div>
            </div>
            
            {/* Inflation Context */}
            {extendedData.premiumBreakdown.inflationIncrease && extendedData.premiumBreakdown.inflationIncrease.increasePercentage > 0 && (
              <div className="bg-red-50 border-2 border-red-300 rounded-xl p-5">
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-3">
                  <TrendingUp className="w-5 h-5 text-red-600" />
                  <span className="font-semibold text-red-900">2024-2025 Premium Inflation</span>
                </div>
                
                <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                  <div>
                    <div className="text-sm text-slate-600 mb-1">Previous Year Premium</div>
                    <div className="text-lg font-semibold">{formatCurrency(extendedData.premiumBreakdown.inflationIncrease.previousYearPremium || 0)}</div>
                  </div>
                  <div>
                    <div className="text-sm text-slate-600 mb-1">Increase Rate</div>
                    <div className="text-lg font-semibold text-red-700">+{extendedData.premiumBreakdown.inflationIncrease.increasePercentage}%</div>
                  </div>
                </div>
                
                <div className="mt-3 p-3 bg-white border border-red-200 rounded-lg">
                  <p className="text-xs text-red-900">
                    <strong>2024 Market Context:</strong> {isTSS ? 'TSS policies saw 79% average increase' : 'ÖSS policies saw 64% average increase'} due to high medical inflation.
                  </p>
                </div>
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Claims Process */}
      {extendedData.claimsProcess && (
        <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-6">
            <FileCheck className="w-6 h-6 text-blue-600" />
            <h3 className="text-xl">Claims Process - Provision (Provizyon) System</h3>
          </div>
          
          <div className="space-y-4">
            {extendedData.claimsProcess.provisionSystem && (
              <div className="bg-blue-50 border-2 border-blue-300 rounded-xl p-5">
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-3">
                  <Info className="w-5 h-5 text-blue-600" />
                  <span className="font-semibold text-lg">How Pre-authorization Works</span>
                </div>
                
                <div className="space-y-3">
                  <div className="bg-white rounded-lg p-3 border border-blue-200">
                    <div className="text-xs font-semibold mb-1 text-slate-700">Mechanism:</div>
                    <p className="text-sm text-slate-700">{extendedData.claimsProcess.provisionSystem.mechanism}</p>
                  </div>
                  
                  {isTSS && extendedData.claimsProcess.provisionSystem.tssLogic && (
                    <div className="bg-emerald-50 rounded-lg p-3 border border-emerald-300">
                      <div className="text-xs font-semibold mb-1 text-emerald-900">TSS Approval Logic:</div>
                      <p className="text-sm text-emerald-900">{extendedData.claimsProcess.provisionSystem.tssLogic}</p>
                    </div>
                  )}
                  
                  {isOSS && extendedData.claimsProcess.provisionSystem.ossLogic && (
                    <div className="bg-indigo-50 rounded-lg p-3 border border-indigo-300">
                      <div className="text-xs font-semibold mb-1 text-indigo-900">ÖSS Approval Logic:</div>
                      <p className="text-sm text-indigo-900">{extendedData.claimsProcess.provisionSystem.ossLogic}</p>
                    </div>
                  )}
                </div>
              </div>
            )}
            
            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
              <div className="bg-slate-50 rounded-xl p-4 border border-slate-200">
                <div className="text-sm text-slate-600 mb-1">Copay at Admission</div>
                <div className="text-lg font-semibold">{formatCurrency(extendedData.claimsProcess.copaymentAtAdmission || 0)}</div>
              </div>
              
              <div className="bg-slate-50 rounded-xl p-4 border border-slate-200">
                <div className="text-sm text-slate-600 mb-1">Settlement</div>
                <div className="text-lg font-semibold">
                  {extendedData.claimsProcess.directSettlement ? 'Direct to Hospital' : 'Reimbursement'}
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
            
            {isTSS && extendedData.claimsProcess.sgkSystemDependency && extendedData.claimsProcess.sgkSystemDependency.applies && (
              <div className="bg-red-50 border-2 border-red-300 rounded-xl p-4">
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
                  <AlertTriangle className="w-5 h-5 text-red-600" />
                  <span className="font-semibold text-red-900">SGK System Dependency Warning</span>
                </div>
                <p className="text-sm text-red-900">{extendedData.claimsProcess.sgkSystemDependency.note}</p>
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Strategic Insights */}
      {extendedData.strategicInsights && (
        <div className="bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-50 to-cyan-50 rounded-3xl p-6 border-2 border-blue-300">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-6">
            <Target className="w-6 h-6 text-blue-700" />
            <h3 className="text-xl">Strategic Insights & Recommendations</h3>
          </div>
          
          <div className="space-y-4">
            {extendedData.strategicInsights.coverageAdequacy && (
              <div>
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-3">
                  <CheckCircle className={`w-5 h-5 ${extendedData.strategicInsights.coverageAdequacy.adequate ? 'text-emerald-600' : 'text-amber-600'}`} />
                  <span className="font-semibold">Coverage Adequacy: {extendedData.strategicInsights.coverageAdequacy.adequate ? 'Adequate' : 'Needs Review'}</span>
                </div>
                
                {extendedData.strategicInsights.coverageAdequacy.gaps && extendedData.strategicInsights.coverageAdequacy.gaps.length > 0 && (
                  <div className="mb-3">
                    <div className="text-sm font-semibold mb-2 text-slate-700">Coverage Gaps:</div>
                    <div className="space-y-1">
                      {extendedData.strategicInsights.coverageAdequacy.gaps.map((gap, idx) => (
                        <div key={idx} className="flex items-start gap-2 text-sm bg-white rounded-lg p-3 border border-amber-300">
                          <AlertCircle className="w-4 h-4 text-amber-600 mt-0.5 flex-shrink-0" />
                          <span className="text-slate-700">{gap}</span>
                        </div>
                      ))}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                )}
                
                {extendedData.strategicInsights.coverageAdequacy.recommendations && extendedData.strategicInsights.coverageAdequacy.recommendations.length > 0 && (
                  <div>
                    <div className="text-sm font-semibold mb-2 text-slate-700">Recommendations:</div>
                    <div className="space-y-1">
                      {extendedData.strategicInsights.coverageAdequacy.recommendations.map((rec, idx) => (
                        <div key={idx} className="flex items-start gap-2 text-sm bg-white rounded-lg p-3 border border-blue-300">
                          <CheckCircle className="w-4 h-4 text-blue-600 mt-0.5 flex-shrink-0" />
                          <span className="text-slate-700">{rec}</span>
                        </div>
                      ))}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                )}
              </div>
            )}
            
            {extendedData.strategicInsights.premiumValueAssessment && (
              <div className="bg-white rounded-xl p-4 border border-blue-300">
                <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-3">
                  <span className="font-semibold">Premium Value Assessment</span>
                  <span className={`px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold ${
                    extendedData.strategicInsights.premiumValueAssessment.pricePosition === 'Budget' 
                      ? 'bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-700'
                      : extendedData.strategicInsights.premiumValueAssessment.pricePosition === 'Premium'
                      ? 'bg-purple-100 text-purple-700'
                      : 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-700'
                  }`}>
                    {extendedData.strategicInsights.premiumValueAssessment.pricePosition}
                  </span>
                </div>
                
                {extendedData.strategicInsights.premiumValueAssessment.marketAverage && (
                  <div className="flex items-center justify-between text-sm">
                    <span className="text-slate-600">Market Average:</span>
                    <span className="font-semibold">{formatCurrency(extendedData.strategicInsights.premiumValueAssessment.marketAverage)}</span>
                  </div>
                )}
              </div>
            )}
            
            {extendedData.strategicInsights.criticalAction && (
              <div className="bg-blue-900 text-white rounded-xl p-4">
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
                  <AlertCircle className="w-5 h-5" />
                  <span className="font-semibold">Critical Action</span>
                </div>
                <p className="text-sm opacity-90">{extendedData.strategicInsights.criticalAction}</p>
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* 2025 Market Context */}
      {extendedData.marketContext && (
        <div className="bg-slate-100 rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-300">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-6">
            <TrendingUp className="w-6 h-6 text-slate-700" />
            <h3 className="text-xl">2025 Turkish Health Insurance Market Context</h3>
          </div>
          
          <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
            {extendedData.marketContext.tssGrowth && (
              <div className="bg-white rounded-xl p-4 border border-slate-300">
                <div className="text-sm text-slate-600 mb-2">TSS Market Growth</div>
                <p className="text-sm text-slate-800">{extendedData.marketContext.tssGrowth}</p>
              </div>
            )}
            
            {extendedData.marketContext.ossStatus && (
              <div className="bg-white rounded-xl p-4 border border-slate-300">
                <div className="text-sm text-slate-600 mb-2">ÖSS Market Status</div>
                <p className="text-sm text-slate-800">{extendedData.marketContext.ossStatus}</p>
              </div>
            )}
            
            {extendedData.marketContext.inflationPressure && (
              <div className="bg-white rounded-xl p-4 border border-slate-300">
                <div className="text-sm text-slate-600 mb-2">Inflation Pressure</div>
                <p className="text-sm text-slate-800">{extendedData.marketContext.inflationPressure}</p>
              </div>
            )}
            
            {extendedData.marketContext.regulatoryTightening && (
              <div className="bg-white rounded-xl p-4 border border-slate-300">
                <div className="text-sm text-slate-600 mb-2">Regulatory Changes</div>
                <p className="text-sm text-slate-800">{extendedData.marketContext.regulatoryTightening}</p>
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Policy History */}
      {extendedData.policyHistory && (
        <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-6">
            <Calendar className="w-6 h-6 text-slate-700" />
            <h3 className="text-xl">Policy History & Claims Record</h3>
          </div>
          
          <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4 mb-4">
            <div className="bg-blue-50 rounded-xl p-4 border border-blue-200">
              <div className="text-sm text-slate-600 mb-1">Current Insurer</div>
              <div className="text-2xl font-semibold text-blue-700">{extendedData.policyHistory.yearsWithCurrentInsurer} years</div>
            </div>
            
            <div className="bg-slate-50 rounded-xl p-4 border border-slate-200">
              <div className="text-sm text-slate-600 mb-1">Previous Insurers</div>
              <div className="text-2xl font-semibold">{extendedData.policyHistory.yearsWithPreviousInsurers || 0} years</div>
            </div>
            
            <div className="bg-emerald-50 rounded-xl p-4 border border-emerald-200">
              <div className="text-sm text-slate-600 mb-1">Total Continuous</div>
              <div className="text-2xl font-semibold text-emerald-700">{extendedData.policyHistory.totalContinuousYears} years</div>
            </div>
            
            {extendedData.policyHistory.claimHistory && (
              <div className="bg-purple-50 rounded-xl p-4 border border-purple-200">
                <div className="text-sm text-slate-600 mb-1">Claims Filed</div>
                <div className="text-2xl font-semibold text-purple-700">{extendedData.policyHistory.claimHistory.totalClaimsFiled || 0}</div>
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
          
          {extendedData.policyHistory.claimHistory && extendedData.policyHistory.claimHistory.largestClaim && (
            <div className="bg-gradient-to-r from-slate-50 to-slate-100 rounded-xl p-4 border border-slate-300">
              <div className="text-sm font-semibold mb-3 text-slate-700">Largest Claim</div>
              <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-4">
                <div>
                  <div className="text-xs text-slate-600 mb-1">Year</div>
                  <div className="text-lg font-semibold">{extendedData.policyHistory.claimHistory.largestClaim.year}</div>
                </div>
                <div>
                  <div className="text-xs text-slate-600 mb-1">Amount</div>
                  <div className="text-lg font-semibold text-blue-700">
                    {formatCurrency(extendedData.policyHistory.claimHistory.largestClaim.amount || 0)}
                  </div>
                </div>
                <div>
                  <div className="text-xs text-slate-600 mb-1">Condition</div>
                  <div className="text-sm font-semibold">{extendedData.policyHistory.claimHistory.largestClaim.condition}</div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

```
