## File: `components (2)/insurance-lines/TurkishKaskoDetails.tsx`
- Bytes: 21,962
- SHA256: `b68d40d1e4aa5e04689ff7004c00d5c504ecdef8d085ef063968071132cfdc0b`

```tsx
import { 
  Shield, Clock, AlertCircle, Wrench, Settings, Eye, Award, 
  TrendingDown, CheckCircle, Info, ShieldAlert, DollarSign,
  Calendar, Sparkles, AlertTriangle, Car, FileText, Zap, Users,
  MapPin, Phone, Building2, Percent, TrendingUp, ChevronRight,
  Ban, CheckSquare, XCircle, AlertOctagon
} from 'lucide-react';
import { TurkishKaskoExtendedData } from './types';
import { BasePolicy } from './index';

type TurkishKaskoDetailsProps = {
  policy: BasePolicy & {
    extendedData?: TurkishKaskoExtendedData;
    country?: string;
    insuranceLine?: string;
  };
};

export function TurkishKaskoDetails({ policy }: TurkishKaskoDetailsProps) {
  // Guard clause - return early if no extended data
  if (!policy.extendedData) {
    return (
      <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
        <p className="text-slate-500">No extended Turkish Kasko data available for this policy.</p>
      </div>
    );
  }

  const extendedData = policy.extendedData as TurkishKaskoExtendedData;
  
  // Calculate time until coverage expires
  const now = new Date();
  const expiryDate = extendedData.expirationDateTime?.date || policy.endDate;
  const expiryTime = extendedData.expirationDateTime?.time || '12:00';
  const expiryDateTime = new Date(`${expiryDate}T${expiryTime}:00`);
  const hoursUntilExpiry = Math.max(0, (expiryDateTime.getTime() - now.getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60));
  const daysUntilExpiry = Math.floor(hoursUntilExpiry / 24);

  const formatCurrency = (amount: number) => {
    return new Intl.NumberFormat('tr-TR', {
      style: 'currency',
      currency: 'TRY',
      minimumFractionDigits: 0,
      maximumFractionDigits: 0
    }).format(amount);
  };

  const formatDate = (dateString: string) => {
    return new Date(dateString).toLocaleDateString('tr-TR', {
      year: 'numeric',
      month: 'long',
      day: 'numeric'
    });
  };

  // Get coverage type configuration
  const getCoverageTypeInfo = () => {
    const type = extendedData.coverageType || 'Kasko';
    const configs: Record<string, any> = {
      'Dar Kasko': {
        label: 'Narrow Coverage (Dar Kasko)',
        description: 'Limited coverage for specific perils only',
        color: 'orange',
        icon: ShieldAlert,
      },
      'Kasko': {
        label: 'Standard Kasko Coverage',
        description: 'Comprehensive vehicle damage coverage',
        color: 'blue',
        icon: Shield,
      },
      'Genişletilmiş Kasko': {
        label: 'Extended Kasko Coverage',
        description: 'Maximum protection with additional benefits',
        color: 'emerald',
        icon: Award,
      },
    };
    return configs[type] || configs['Kasko'];
  };

  const coverageInfo = getCoverageTypeInfo();
  const vehicleInfo = extendedData.vehicleInfo;
  const protectionInfo = extendedData.protectionInfo;

  return (
    <div className="space-y-6">
      {/* Header Card */}
      <div className={`bg-gradient-to-br from-${coverageInfo.color}-600 to-${coverageInfo.color}-700 text-white rounded-3xl p-8`}>
        <div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-4">
          <div>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-2">
              <coverageInfo.icon className="w-8 h-8" />
              <h2 className="text-2xl">🇹🇷 Turkish Kasko Insurance</h2>
            </div>
            <p className={`text-${coverageInfo.color}-100`}>{coverageInfo.description}</p>
          </div>
          <div className="text-right">
            <p className="text-sm opacity-80 mb-1">Coverage expires in</p>
            <p className="text-3xl">{daysUntilExpiry} days</p>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-4 mt-6">
          <div className="bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-2xl p-4">
            <p className={`text-${coverageInfo.color}-100 text-sm mb-1`}>Coverage Type</p>
            <p className="text-lg">{coverageInfo.label}</p>
          </div>
          <div className="bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-2xl p-4">
            <p className={`text-${coverageInfo.color}-100 text-sm mb-1`}>Vehicle Value</p>
            <p className="text-lg">{vehicleInfo?.vehicleValue ? formatCurrency(vehicleInfo.vehicleValue) : 'N/A'}</p>
          </div>
          <div className="bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-2xl p-4">
            <p className={`text-${coverageInfo.color}-100 text-sm mb-1`}>Policy Status</p>
            <p className="text-lg">{daysUntilExpiry > 30 ? 'Active' : 'Expiring Soon'}</p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Vehicle Information */}
      {vehicleInfo && (
        <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
          <h3 className="text-slate-900 mb-6 flex items-center gap-2">
            <Car className="w-6 h-6 text-blue-600" />
            Insured Vehicle Details
          </h3>
          <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-6">
            <div className="space-y-4">
              <div className="p-4 bg-slate-50 rounded-2xl">
                <p className="text-slate-500 text-sm mb-1">Make & Model</p>
                <p className="text-slate-900">{vehicleInfo.brand} {vehicleInfo.model}</p>
              </div>
              <div className="p-4 bg-slate-50 rounded-2xl">
                <p className="text-slate-500 text-sm mb-1">Model Year</p>
                <p className="text-slate-900">{vehicleInfo.modelYear}</p>
              </div>
              <div className="p-4 bg-slate-50 rounded-2xl">
                <p className="text-slate-500 text-sm mb-1">License Plate</p>
                <p className="text-slate-900 font-mono">{vehicleInfo.licensePlate || 'Not specified'}</p>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div className="space-y-4">
              <div className="p-4 bg-slate-50 rounded-2xl">
                <p className="text-slate-500 text-sm mb-1">Engine Volume</p>
                <p className="text-slate-900">{vehicleInfo.engineVolume || 'Not specified'}</p>
              </div>
              <div className="p-4 bg-slate-50 rounded-2xl">
                <p className="text-slate-500 text-sm mb-1">Vehicle Value</p>
                <p className="text-slate-900">{vehicleInfo.vehicleValue ? formatCurrency(vehicleInfo.vehicleValue) : 'Not specified'}</p>
              </div>
              <div className="p-4 bg-slate-50 rounded-2xl">
                <p className="text-slate-500 text-sm mb-1">Usage Type</p>
                <p className="text-slate-900 capitalize">{vehicleInfo.usage || 'Private'}</p>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Deductible Information */}
      <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
        <h3 className="text-slate-900 mb-6 flex items-center gap-2">
          <Percent className="w-6 h-6 text-amber-600" />
          Deductible (Muafiyet) Structure
        </h3>
        <div className="space-y-4">
          <div className="p-4 bg-amber-50 rounded-2xl border border-amber-200">
            <div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-3">
              <div>
                <h4 className="text-slate-900 mb-1">Standard Deductible Rate</h4>
                <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm">Applied to all covered claims</p>
              </div>
              <span className="text-2xl text-amber-700">
                {extendedData.deductibleInfo?.standardRate || '2'}%
              </span>
            </div>
            <div className="mt-3 pt-3 border-t border-amber-200">
              <div className="flex justify-between text-sm">
                <span className="text-slate-600">Minimum Deductible Amount:</span>
                <span className="text-slate-900">{formatCurrency(policy.deductible)}</span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div className="grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
            <div className="p-4 bg-blue-50 rounded-2xl border border-blue-200">
              <h4 className="text-slate-900 text-sm mb-2 flex items-center gap-2">
                <CheckCircle className="w-4 h-4 text-blue-600" />
                No Deductible Coverage
              </h4>
              <ul className="space-y-1 text-sm text-slate-600">
                <li>• Glass breakage</li>
                <li>• Windshield replacement</li>
                <li>• Side mirrors</li>
                <li>• Headlight/taillight glass</li>
              </ul>
            </div>

            <div className="p-4 bg-purple-50 rounded-2xl border border-purple-200">
              <h4 className="text-slate-900 text-sm mb-2 flex items-center gap-2">
                <TrendingDown className="w-4 h-4 text-purple-600" />
                Reduced Deductible (50%)
              </h4>
              <ul className="space-y-1 text-sm text-slate-600">
                <li>• Fire damage</li>
                <li>• Natural disasters</li>
                <li>• Theft (total loss)</li>
                <li>• Vandalism while parked</li>
              </ul>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div className="p-4 bg-red-50 rounded-2xl border border-red-200">
            <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
              <AlertTriangle className="w-5 h-5 text-red-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
              <div className="text-sm">
                <p className="text-slate-900 mb-1">Higher Deductible Scenarios</p>
                <p className="text-slate-600">Deductible may increase to 10-20% if: driver is under 25 years old, vehicle used for commercial purposes, or driver has multiple claims history.</p>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Protection & Security Requirements */}
      {protectionInfo && (
        <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
          <h3 className="text-slate-900 mb-6 flex items-center gap-2">
            <Shield className="w-6 h-6 text-emerald-600" />
            Security & Protection Requirements
          </h3>
          <div className="grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
            <div className="p-4 bg-emerald-50 rounded-2xl border border-emerald-200">
              <div className="flex items-start gap-3 mb-3">
                <CheckSquare className="w-5 h-5 text-emerald-600 mt-0.5" />
                <div>
                  <h4 className="text-slate-900 text-sm mb-1">Alarm System</h4>
                  <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm">
                    {protectionInfo.hasAlarm ? '✓ Installed and active' : '✗ Not installed'}
                  </p>
                </div>
              </div>
              {protectionInfo.hasAlarm && (
                <p className="text-xs text-emerald-700 ml-8">
                  Premium discount: 5%
                </p>
              )}
            </div>

            <div className="p-4 bg-blue-50 rounded-2xl border border-blue-200">
              <div className="flex items-start gap-3 mb-3">
                <Eye className="w-5 h-5 text-blue-600 mt-0.5" />
                <div>
                  <h4 className="text-slate-900 text-sm mb-1">GPS Tracking</h4>
                  <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm">
                    {protectionInfo.hasGPS ? '✓ Installed and monitored' : '✗ Not installed'}
                  </p>
                </div>
              </div>
              {protectionInfo.hasGPS && (
                <p className="text-xs text-blue-700 ml-8">
                  Premium discount: 3%
                </p>
              )}
            </div>

            <div className="p-4 bg-purple-50 rounded-2xl border border-purple-200">
              <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                <Settings className="w-5 h-5 text-purple-600 mt-0.5" />
                <div>
                  <h4 className="text-slate-900 text-sm mb-1">Immobilizer</h4>
                  <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm">
                    {protectionInfo.hasImmobilizer ? '✓ Factory installed' : '✗ Not installed'}
                  </p>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div className="p-4 bg-orange-50 rounded-2xl border border-orange-200">
              <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                <Wrench className="w-5 h-5 text-orange-600 mt-0.5" />
                <div>
                  <h4 className="text-slate-900 text-sm mb-1">Steering Lock</h4>
                  <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm">
                    {protectionInfo.hasSteeringLock ? '✓ Installed' : '✗ Not required'}
                  </p>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div className="mt-4 p-4 bg-amber-50 rounded-2xl border border-amber-200">
            <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
              <Info className="w-5 h-5 text-amber-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
              <div className="text-sm">
                <p className="text-slate-900 mb-1">Important Notice</p>
                <p className="text-slate-600">Theft coverage requires at least factory alarm system. GPS tracking is mandatory for vehicles valued over ₺1,500,000. Failure to maintain security systems may void theft coverage.</p>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Turkish Kasko Specific Clauses */}
      <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
        <h3 className="text-slate-900 mb-6 flex items-center gap-2">
          <FileText className="w-6 h-6 text-indigo-600" />
          Turkish Insurance Regulations & Clauses
        </h3>
        
        <div className="space-y-4">
          <div className="p-4 bg-indigo-50 rounded-2xl border border-indigo-200">
            <h4 className="text-slate-900 mb-2 flex items-center gap-2">
              <Scale className="w-5 h-5 text-indigo-600" />
              TRAMER Integration
            </h4>
            <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm mb-3">
              This policy is registered with TRAMER (Traffic Insurance and Endorsement Center). All claims are automatically reported to the national database.
            </p>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-indigo-700">
              <CheckCircle className="w-4 h-4" />
              <span>TRAMER Registration Verified</span>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div className="p-4 bg-blue-50 rounded-2xl border border-blue-200">
            <h4 className="text-slate-900 mb-2 flex items-center gap-2">
              <Users className="w-5 h-5 text-blue-600" />
              Driver Coverage Scope
            </h4>
            <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm mb-2">
              Coverage extends to:
            </p>
            <ul className="space-y-1 text-sm text-slate-600 ml-4">
              <li>• Policy holder and spouse</li>
              <li>• Drivers listed on the policy (max 3)</li>
              <li>• Any driver with valid license (comprehensive)</li>
              <li>• Requires driver to be 21+ with 2+ years license</li>
            </ul>
          </div>

          <div className="p-4 bg-emerald-50 rounded-2xl border border-emerald-200">
            <h4 className="text-slate-900 mb-2 flex items-center gap-2">
              <MapPin className="w-5 h-5 text-emerald-600" />
              Geographical Coverage
            </h4>
            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4 text-sm">
              <div>
                <p className="text-slate-500 mb-1">Turkey (Republic)</p>
                <p className="text-emerald-700 flex items-center gap-1">
                  <CheckCircle className="w-4 h-4" /> Full Coverage
                </p>
              </div>
              <div>
                <p className="text-slate-500 mb-1">EU Countries</p>
                <p className="text-blue-700 flex items-center gap-1">
                  <Info className="w-4 h-4" /> Mini Kasko (90 days)
                </p>
              </div>
              <div>
                <p className="text-slate-500 mb-1">Turkish Republic of Northern Cyprus</p>
                <p className="text-emerald-700 flex items-center gap-1">
                  <CheckCircle className="w-4 h-4" /> Full Coverage
                </p>
              </div>
              <div>
                <p className="text-slate-500 mb-1">Other Countries</p>
                <p className="text-slate-500 flex items-center gap-1">
                  <Ban className="w-4 h-4" /> Not Covered
                </p>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div className="p-4 bg-purple-50 rounded-2xl border border-purple-200">
            <h4 className="text-slate-900 mb-2 flex items-center gap-2">
              <Zap className="w-5 h-5 text-purple-600" />
              Replacement Value Clause
            </h4>
            <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm mb-2">
              For vehicles under 1 year old:
            </p>
            <ul className="space-y-1 text-sm text-slate-600 ml-4">
              <li>• Total loss: New vehicle replacement (same model)</li>
              <li>• Valid for first 12 months from first registration</li>
              <li>• Deductible waived for total loss</li>
              <li>• Limited to vehicles under ₺3,000,000</li>
            </ul>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Critical Exclusions */}
      <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
        <h3 className="text-slate-900 mb-6 flex items-center gap-2">
          <AlertOctagon className="w-6 h-6 text-red-600" />
          Critical Exclusions (Kasko Kapsamı Dışı)
        </h3>
        
        <div className="space-y-3">
          <div className="p-4 bg-red-50 rounded-2xl border border-red-200">
            <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
              <XCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-red-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
              <div className="text-sm">
                <p className="text-slate-900 mb-1">Alcohol/Drug Related Incidents</p>
                <p className="text-slate-600">No coverage if blood alcohol exceeds 0.5‰ or driver is under influence of drugs. License suspension also voids coverage.</p>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div className="p-4 bg-red-50 rounded-2xl border border-red-200">
            <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
              <XCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-red-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
              <div className="text-sm">
                <p className="text-slate-900 mb-1">Racing & Speed Competitions</p>
                <p className="text-slate-600">Damage during racing, rallies, track days, or timed speed competitions is not covered.</p>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div className="p-4 bg-red-50 rounded-2xl border border-red-200">
            <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
              <XCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-red-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
              <div className="text-sm">
                <p className="text-slate-900 mb-1">Wear & Mechanical Failures</p>
                <p className="text-slate-600">Engine, transmission, electrical failures due to age, wear, or lack of maintenance are excluded.</p>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div className="p-4 bg-red-50 rounded-2xl border border-red-200">
            <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
              <XCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-red-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
              <div className="text-sm">
                <p className="text-slate-900 mb-1">Commercial Use Violations</p>
                <p className="text-slate-600">Using private vehicle for taxi, delivery, or ride-sharing without commercial endorsement voids all coverage.</p>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div className="p-4 bg-red-50 rounded-2xl border border-red-200">
            <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
              <XCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-red-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
              <div className="text-sm">
                <p className="text-slate-900 mb-1">Acts of War & Terrorism</p>
                <p className="text-slate-600">Damage from war, terrorism, nuclear events, civil unrest, or martial law situations.</p>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Contact & Emergency */}
      <div className="bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-50 to-indigo-50 rounded-3xl p-6 border border-blue-200">
        <h3 className="text-slate-900 mb-4 flex items-center gap-2">
          <Phone className="w-6 h-6 text-blue-600" />
          Emergency Contact & Claims
        </h3>
        <div className="grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
          <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl p-4">
            <p className="text-slate-500 text-sm mb-1">24/7 Emergency Hotline</p>
            <p className="text-blue-600 text-xl mb-2">0850 420 20 24</p>
            <p className="text-slate-600 text-xs">For accidents, theft, and roadside assistance</p>
          </div>
          <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl p-4">
            <p className="text-slate-500 text-sm mb-1">Claims Department</p>
            <p className="text-slate-900 text-xl mb-2">hasar@anadolusigorta.com.tr</p>
            <p className="text-slate-600 text-xs">Email claims with photos and police report</p>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div className="mt-4 p-4 bg-white rounded-2xl">
          <p className="text-slate-900 mb-2 flex items-center gap-2">
            <Building2 className="w-5 h-5 text-blue-600" />
            Authorized Repair Network
          </p>
          <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm">Access 500+ authorized service centers nationwide. No upfront payment required for repairs at network garages.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

```

## File: `components (2)/insurance-lines/TurkishPersonalAccidentDetails.tsx`
- Bytes: 50,616
- SHA256: `6479d4af050539a850e6fc5fe070f89f4c1af4f4ac477f9fc662a64ae04f7cc2`

```tsx
import { 
  Shield, Clock, AlertCircle, Users, Info, 
  ShieldAlert, DollarSign, AlertTriangle, HeartPulse, Ban,
  Scale, FileWarning, Zap, Award, CheckCircle, XCircle, ChevronRight,
  Building2, Phone, FileText, Percent, AlertOctagon, Activity,
  TrendingUp, Calculator, Calendar, Briefcase, Target, Hand,
  Eye, Ear, Heart, Brain, Ambulance, Stethoscope, Plus, Minus
} from 'lucide-react';
import { TurkishPersonalAccidentExtendedData } from './types';
import { BasePolicy } from './index';

type TurkishPersonalAccidentDetailsProps = {
  policy: BasePolicy & {
    extendedData?: TurkishPersonalAccidentExtendedData;
    country?: string;
    insuranceLine?: string;
  };
};

export function TurkishPersonalAccidentDetails({ policy }: TurkishPersonalAccidentDetailsProps) {
  // Guard clause - return early if no extended data
  if (!policy.extendedData) {
    return (
      <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
        <p className="text-slate-500">No extended Turkish Personal Accident data available for this policy.</p>
      </div>
    );
  }

  const extendedData = policy.extendedData as TurkishPersonalAccidentExtendedData;
  
  // Calculate time until coverage expires
  const now = new Date();
  const expiryDate = extendedData.expirationDateTime?.date || policy.endDate;
  const expiryTime = extendedData.expirationDateTime?.time || '12:00';
  const expiryDateTime = new Date(`${expiryDate}T${expiryTime}:00`);
  const hoursUntilExpiry = Math.max(0, (expiryDateTime.getTime() - now.getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60));
  const daysUntilExpiry = Math.floor(hoursUntilExpiry / 24);

  const formatCurrency = (amount: number) => {
    return new Intl.NumberFormat('tr-TR', {
      style: 'currency',
      currency: 'TRY',
      minimumFractionDigits: 0,
      maximumFractionDigits: 0
    }).format(amount);
  };

  const formatDate = (dateString: string) => {
    return new Date(dateString).toLocaleDateString('tr-TR', {
      year: 'numeric',
      month: 'long',
      day: 'numeric'
    });
  };

  // Risk class configuration
  const getRiskClassInfo = () => {
    const riskClass = extendedData.occupationRiskClass?.class || 1;
    const configs: Record<number, any> = {
      1: {
        label: 'Class 1 - Low Risk',
        description: 'Office workers, administrative staff',
        color: 'emerald',
        icon: Briefcase,
      },
      2: {
        label: 'Class 2 - Medium Risk',
        description: 'Light industrial, sales representatives',
        color: 'amber',
        icon: Activity,
      },
      3: {
        label: 'Class 3 - High Risk',
        description: 'Miners, couriers, construction workers',
        color: 'red',
        icon: AlertTriangle,
      },
    };
    return configs[riskClass] || configs[1];
  };

  const riskClassInfo = getRiskClassInfo();
  const isCompulsory = extendedData.compulsoryType?.isCompulsory || false;
  const scheme = extendedData.compulsoryType?.scheme || 'Voluntary';

  return (
    <div className="space-y-6">
      {/* Header Card */}
      <div className={`bg-gradient-to-br ${isCompulsory ? 'from-indigo-600 to-purple-700' : 'from-blue-600 to-cyan-700'} text-white rounded-3xl p-8`}>
        <div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-4">
          <div>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-2">
              <Shield className="w-8 h-8" />
              <h2 className="text-2xl">🇹🇷 Turkish Personal Accident Insurance (Ferdi Kaza Sigortası)</h2>
            </div>
            <p className={`${isCompulsory ? 'text-indigo-100' : 'text-blue-100'}`}>
              {isCompulsory ? `Compulsory ${scheme} Coverage` : 'Voluntary Personal Protection Coverage'}
            </p>
          </div>
          <div className="text-right">
            <p className="text-sm opacity-80 mb-1">Coverage expires in</p>
            <p className="text-3xl">{daysUntilExpiry} days</p>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-4 mt-6">
          <div className="bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-2xl p-4">
            <p className={`${isCompulsory ? 'text-indigo-100' : 'text-blue-100'} text-sm mb-1`}>Coverage Type</p>
            <p className="text-lg">{isCompulsory ? 'Compulsory' : 'Voluntary'}</p>
          </div>
          <div className="bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-2xl p-4">
            <p className={`${isCompulsory ? 'text-indigo-100' : 'text-blue-100'} text-sm mb-1`}>Death Sum Assured</p>
            <p className="text-lg">{formatCurrency(extendedData.coverageLimits?.deathSumAssured || 0)}</p>
          </div>
          <div className="bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-2xl p-4">
            <p className={`${isCompulsory ? 'text-indigo-100' : 'text-blue-100'} text-sm mb-1`}>Annual Premium</p>
            <p className="text-lg">{formatCurrency(policy.monthlyPremium * 12)}</p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Insured Party & Beneficiary */}
      <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
        <h3 className="text-slate-900 mb-6 flex items-center gap-2">
          <Users className="w-6 h-6 text-blue-600" />
          Insured Parties & Beneficiary
        </h3>
        
        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
          <div className="space-y-4">
            <div className="p-4 bg-slate-50 rounded-2xl">
              <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm mb-1">Policyholder (Sigorta Ettiren)</p>
              <p className="text-slate-900">{extendedData.policyholder || 'Not specified'}</p>
            </div>
            
            <div className="p-4 bg-slate-50 rounded-2xl">
              <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm mb-1">Insured Person (Sigortalı)</p>
              <p className="text-slate-900">{extendedData.insuredPerson || 'Not specified'}</p>
              {extendedData.idNumber && (
                <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm mt-1">ID: {extendedData.idNumber}</p>
              )}
            </div>
          </div>

          <div className="p-4 bg-blue-50 rounded-2xl border-2 border-blue-200">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
              <Target className="w-5 h-5 text-blue-600" />
              <p className="text-blue-900">Beneficiary (Lehtar) - CRITICAL</p>
            </div>
            <p className="text-slate-900 mb-2">{extendedData.beneficiary || 'Legal heirs (Kanuni Varisler)'}</p>
            {extendedData.beneficiaryDefault && (
              <div className="mt-2 p-3 bg-blue-100 rounded-xl">
                <p className="text-blue-900 text-sm">
                  ⚠️ No specific beneficiary designated. Death benefit will be distributed to legal heirs according to inheritance law.
                </p>
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Occupation Risk Class (Premium Driver) */}
      <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
        <h3 className="text-slate-900 mb-6 flex items-center gap-2">
          <Briefcase className="w-6 h-6 text-blue-600" />
          Occupation & Risk Classification
        </h3>
        
        <div className={`p-6 bg-gradient-to-br from-${riskClassInfo.color}-50 to-${riskClassInfo.color}-100 rounded-2xl border border-${riskClassInfo.color}-200 mb-4`}>
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-4">
            <div>
              <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm mb-1">Risk Class</p>
              <p className="text-4xl text-slate-900">{extendedData.occupationRiskClass?.class || 1}</p>
            </div>
            <riskClassInfo.icon className={`w-16 h-16 text-${riskClassInfo.color}-600`} />
          </div>
          <div className={`px-4 py-2 bg-${riskClassInfo.color}-200 rounded-xl inline-block mb-2`}>
            <p className={`text-${riskClassInfo.color}-900`}>{riskClassInfo.label}</p>
          </div>
          <p className="text-slate-700">{extendedData.occupationRiskClass?.occupation || 'Not specified'}</p>
          {extendedData.occupationRiskClass?.premiumMultiplier && (
            <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm mt-2">
              Premium Multiplier: {extendedData.occupationRiskClass.premiumMultiplier}x base rate
            </p>
          )}
        </div>

        <div className="p-4 bg-amber-50 rounded-2xl border border-amber-200">
          <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
            <AlertTriangle className="w-5 h-5 text-amber-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
            <div>
              <p className="text-slate-900">⚠️ Misstatement Risk</p>
              <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm mt-1">
                If occupation is misstated, the insurer can reduce payout proportionally (Pro-rata clause). 
                Always declare the correct occupation risk class.
              </p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Coverage Limits & Structure */}
      <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
        <h3 className="text-slate-900 mb-6 flex items-center gap-2">
          <ShieldAlert className="w-6 h-6 text-blue-600" />
          Coverage Limits & Benefits
        </h3>
        
        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4 mb-6">
          <div className="p-4 bg-gradient-to-br from-indigo-50 to-indigo-100 rounded-2xl border border-indigo-200">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
              <Heart className="w-5 h-5 text-indigo-600" />
              <p className="text-indigo-900">Death Sum Assured</p>
            </div>
            <p className="text-3xl text-slate-900">{formatCurrency(extendedData.coverageLimits?.deathSumAssured || 0)}</p>
            <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm mt-2">Vefat Sigorta Bedeli - Paid to beneficiary</p>
          </div>

          <div className="p-4 bg-gradient-to-br from-purple-50 to-purple-100 rounded-2xl border border-purple-200">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
              <Activity className="w-5 h-5 text-purple-600" />
              <p className="text-purple-900">Disability Sum Assured</p>
            </div>
            <p className="text-3xl text-slate-900">{formatCurrency(extendedData.coverageLimits?.disabilitySumAssured || 0)}</p>
            <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm mt-2">Sakatlık Sigorta Bedeli - Base for % calculations</p>
          </div>

          <div className="p-4 bg-gradient-to-br from-cyan-50 to-cyan-100 rounded-2xl border border-cyan-200">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
              <Ambulance className="w-5 h-5 text-cyan-600" />
              <p className="text-cyan-900">Medical Expenses Limit</p>
            </div>
            <p className="text-3xl text-slate-900">{formatCurrency(extendedData.coverageLimits?.medicalExpensesLimit || 0)}</p>
            <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm mt-2">Indemnity coverage - Actual hospital bills</p>
          </div>

          {extendedData.coverageLimits?.dailyIndemnity?.enabled && (
            <div className="p-4 bg-gradient-to-br from-emerald-50 to-emerald-100 rounded-2xl border border-emerald-200">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
                <Calendar className="w-5 h-5 text-emerald-600" />
                <p className="text-emerald-900">Daily Indemnity</p>
              </div>
              <p className="text-3xl text-slate-900">
                {formatCurrency(extendedData.coverageLimits.dailyIndemnity.amountPerDay || 0)}/day
              </p>
              <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm mt-2">
                Max {extendedData.coverageLimits.dailyIndemnity.maxDays || 0} days | 
                Waiting: {extendedData.coverageLimits.dailyIndemnity.waitingPeriod || 0} days
              </p>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>

        {isCompulsory && extendedData.compulsoryType?.regulatoryLimits && (
          <div className="p-4 bg-blue-50 rounded-2xl border border-blue-200">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
              <Info className="w-5 h-5 text-blue-600" />
              <p className="text-blue-900">2025 Regulatory Updates</p>
            </div>
            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4 mt-3">
              <div>
                <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm">Previous Limit (2024)</p>
                <p className="text-slate-900">{formatCurrency(extendedData.compulsoryType.regulatoryLimits.previousLimit || 0)}</p>
              </div>
              <div>
                <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm">Current Limit (July 1, 2025)</p>
                <p className="text-emerald-600 text-xl">
                  {formatCurrency(extendedData.compulsoryType.regulatoryLimits.deathDisability2025 || 0)}
                  <span className="text-sm ml-2">
                    (+{Math.round((((extendedData.compulsoryType.regulatoryLimits.deathDisability2025 || 0) / 
                    (extendedData.compulsoryType.regulatoryLimits.previousLimit || 1)) - 1) * 100)}%)
                  </span>
                </p>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>

      {/* Compulsory Type Details */}
      {isCompulsory && (
        <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
          <h3 className="text-slate-900 mb-6 flex items-center gap-2">
            <Scale className="w-6 h-6 text-blue-600" />
            Compulsory {scheme} Insurance Details
          </h3>
          
          {scheme === 'Road Passenger Transport' && extendedData.compulsoryType?.vehicleInfo && (
            <div className="space-y-4">
              <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                <div className="p-4 bg-slate-50 rounded-2xl">
                  <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm mb-1">Vehicle Plate</p>
                  <p className="text-slate-900">{extendedData.compulsoryType.vehicleInfo.plateNumber}</p>
                </div>
                <div className="p-4 bg-slate-50 rounded-2xl">
                  <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm mb-1">Seat Count</p>
                  <p className="text-slate-900">{extendedData.compulsoryType.vehicleInfo.seatCount} seats</p>
                </div>
                <div className="p-4 bg-slate-50 rounded-2xl">
                  <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm mb-1">Authorization Certificate</p>
                  <p className="text-slate-900">{extendedData.compulsoryType.vehicleInfo.authorizationCertificate}</p>
                </div>
                <div className="p-4 bg-emerald-50 rounded-2xl border border-emerald-200">
                  <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm mb-1">Aggregate Limit</p>
                  <p className="text-emerald-700 text-xl">
                    {formatCurrency(extendedData.compulsoryType.vehicleInfo.aggregateLimit || 0)}
                  </p>
                  <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm">
                    {formatCurrency(extendedData.coverageLimits?.deathSumAssured || 0)} × {extendedData.compulsoryType.vehicleInfo.seatCount}
                  </p>
                </div>
              </div>
              
              <div className="p-4 bg-blue-50 rounded-2xl border border-blue-200">
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
                  <Clock className="w-5 h-5 text-blue-600" />
                  <p className="text-blue-900">Coverage Scope</p>
                </div>
                <p className="text-slate-700">{extendedData.compulsoryType.vehicleInfo.coverageScope}</p>
              </div>

              {extendedData.journeyDetails && (
                <div className="p-4 bg-slate-50 rounded-2xl">
                  <p className="text-slate-900 mb-2">Journey Coverage</p>
                  <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm">{extendedData.journeyDetails.travelDuration}</p>
                  {extendedData.journeyDetails.includesBreaks && (
                    <p className="text-emerald-600 text-sm mt-1">✓ Coverage continues during rest stops (mola)</p>
                  )}
                </div>
              )}
            </div>
          )}

          {scheme === 'Mining Employees' && extendedData.compulsoryType?.miningInfo && (
            <div className="space-y-4">
              <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                <div className="p-4 bg-slate-50 rounded-2xl">
                  <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm mb-1">Mine Type</p>
                  <p className="text-slate-900">{extendedData.compulsoryType.miningInfo.mineType}</p>
                </div>
                <div className="p-4 bg-slate-50 rounded-2xl">
                  <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm mb-1">Risk Inspection</p>
                  <p className={`${extendedData.compulsoryType.miningInfo.riskInspectionCompleted ? 'text-emerald-600' : 'text-red-600'}`}>
                    {extendedData.compulsoryType.miningInfo.riskInspectionCompleted ? '✓ Completed' : '✗ Not Completed'}
                  </p>
                </div>
                <div className="p-4 bg-blue-50 rounded-2xl border border-blue-200">
                  <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm mb-1">Fixed Annual Premium (2025)</p>
                  <p className="text-blue-700 text-xl">
                    {formatCurrency(extendedData.compulsoryType.miningInfo.fixedAnnualPremium || 0)}
                  </p>
                  <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm">State-mandated tariff</p>
                </div>
                <div className="p-4 bg-slate-50 rounded-2xl">
                  <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm mb-1">Safety Standards</p>
                  <p className={`${extendedData.compulsoryType.miningInfo.safetyStandards === 'Met' ? 'text-emerald-600' : 'text-amber-600'}`}>
                    {extendedData.compulsoryType.miningInfo.safetyStandards}
                  </p>
                </div>
              </div>
              
              <div className="p-4 bg-red-50 rounded-2xl border border-red-200">
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
                  <AlertOctagon className="w-5 h-5 text-red-600" />
                  <p className="text-red-900">Critical Compliance Note</p>
                </div>
                <p className="text-slate-700 text-sm">
                  If mine fails safety inspection, insurance cannot be issued. This effectively halts mining operations 
                  until safety standards are met and re-inspection passes.
                </p>
              </div>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Disability Percentage Scale (THE CORE OF PAYOUT LOGIC) */}
      <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
        <h3 className="text-slate-900 mb-6 flex items-center gap-2">
          <Calculator className="w-6 h-6 text-blue-600" />
          Disability Percentage Scale (Sakatlık Oranları Cetveli)
        </h3>
        
        {extendedData.disabilityScale?.leftHanded && (
          <div className="p-4 bg-amber-50 rounded-2xl border border-amber-200 mb-4">
            <p className="text-amber-900">
              ⚠️ <strong>Left-Handed Clause Active:</strong> Right and left arm percentages are swapped for this policy.
            </p>
          </div>
        )}

        <div className="p-4 bg-blue-50 rounded-2xl border border-blue-200 mb-6">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
            <Info className="w-5 h-5 text-blue-600" />
            <p className="text-blue-900">How It Works</p>
          </div>
          <p className="text-slate-700 text-sm mb-3">
            This is the rigid schedule that determines exactly what percentage of the "Disability Sum Assured" 
            ({formatCurrency(extendedData.coverageLimits?.disabilitySumAssured || 0)}) is paid for specific anatomical losses.
          </p>
          <p className="text-slate-900 text-sm">
            <strong>Cumulative Cap:</strong> {extendedData.disabilityScale?.cumulativeCap || 'Total cannot exceed 100% of Sum Assured'}
          </p>
        </div>

        <div className="space-y-2">
          {extendedData.disabilityScale?.examples && extendedData.disabilityScale.examples.length > 0 ? (
            extendedData.disabilityScale.examples.map((example, index) => (
              <div key={index} className="p-4 bg-slate-50 rounded-2xl hover:bg-slate-100 transition-colors">
                <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                    {example.loss.toLowerCase().includes('eye') && <Eye className="w-5 h-5 text-slate-600" />}
                    {example.loss.toLowerCase().includes('ear') && <Ear className="w-5 h-5 text-slate-600" />}
                    {example.loss.toLowerCase().includes('arm') && <Hand className="w-5 h-5 text-slate-600" />}
                    {example.loss.toLowerCase().includes('hand') && <Hand className="w-5 h-5 text-slate-600" />}
                    {example.loss.toLowerCase().includes('thumb') && <Hand className="w-5 h-5 text-slate-600" />}
                    {example.loss.toLowerCase().includes('leg') && <Activity className="w-5 h-5 text-slate-600" />}
                    {example.loss.toLowerCase().includes('limb') && <Activity className="w-5 h-5 text-slate-600" />}
                    <div>
                      <p className="text-slate-900">{example.loss}</p>
                      <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm">{example.percentage}% of Disability Sum Assured</p>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <div className="text-right">
                    <p className="text-blue-600 text-xl">{formatCurrency(example.payoutAmount || 0)}</p>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            ))
          ) : (
            <p className="text-slate-500 text-sm">Standard disability scale applies (see general conditions)</p>
          )}
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Legal Definition of Accident (Compliance Critical) */}
      <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
        <h3 className="text-slate-900 mb-6 flex items-center gap-2">
          <FileWarning className="w-6 h-6 text-blue-600" />
          Legal Definition of "Accident" (Kaza Tanımı)
        </h3>
        
        <div className="p-6 bg-gradient-to-br from-purple-50 to-purple-100 rounded-2xl border-2 border-purple-200 mb-6">
          <p className="text-purple-900 mb-4">
            <strong>For an event to be covered, it MUST strictly meet ALL three criteria:</strong>
          </p>
          <div className="space-y-3">
            <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
              <CheckCircle className={`w-5 h-5 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5 ${extendedData.accidentDefinition?.sudden ? 'text-emerald-600' : 'text-slate-400'}`} />
              <div>
                <p className="text-slate-900"><strong>Sudden (Ani):</strong> Must occur in a specific moment</p>
                <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm">Not gradually (e.g., repetitive strain injury NOT covered)</p>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
              <CheckCircle className={`w-5 h-5 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5 ${extendedData.accidentDefinition?.external ? 'text-emerald-600' : 'text-slate-400'}`} />
              <div>
                <p className="text-slate-900"><strong>External (Harici):</strong> Cause must be outside the body</p>
                <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm">Heart attack causing crash is external; heart attack alone is NOT covered</p>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
              <CheckCircle className={`w-5 h-5 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5 ${extendedData.accidentDefinition?.involuntary ? 'text-emerald-600' : 'text-slate-400'}`} />
              <div>
                <p className="text-slate-900"><strong>Involuntary (İrade Dışı):</strong> Against the insured's will</p>
                <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm">Suicide is NEVER covered (unlike life insurance after 3 years)</p>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        {extendedData.accidentDefinition?.deemedAccidents && extendedData.accidentDefinition.deemedAccidents.length > 0 && (
          <div className="p-4 bg-emerald-50 rounded-2xl border border-emerald-200 mb-4">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-3">
              <Plus className="w-5 h-5 text-emerald-600" />
              <p className="text-emerald-900">Events "Deemed" as Accidents (Article A.3)</p>
            </div>
            <ul className="space-y-2">
              {extendedData.accidentDefinition.deemedAccidents.map((item, index) => (
                <li key={index} className="flex items-start gap-2 text-sm">
                  <CheckCircle className="w-4 h-4 text-emerald-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
                  <span className="text-slate-700">{item}</span>
                </li>
              ))}
            </ul>
          </div>
        )}

        {extendedData.accidentDefinition?.excludedAsIllness && extendedData.accidentDefinition.excludedAsIllness.length > 0 && (
          <div className="p-4 bg-red-50 rounded-2xl border border-red-200">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-3">
              <Minus className="w-5 h-5 text-red-600" />
              <p className="text-red-900">Events Excluded as "Illness" (Article A.4)</p>
            </div>
            <ul className="space-y-2">
              {extendedData.accidentDefinition.excludedAsIllness.map((item, index) => (
                <li key={index} className="flex items-start gap-2 text-sm">
                  <XCircle className="w-4 h-4 text-red-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
                  <span className="text-slate-700">{item}</span>
                </li>
              ))}
            </ul>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>

      {/* Optional Clauses (Buy-Backs) */}
      {extendedData.optionalClauses && (
        <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
          <h3 className="text-slate-900 mb-6 flex items-center gap-2">
            <Plus className="w-6 h-6 text-blue-600" />
            Optional Coverage Enhancements (Buy-Back Clauses)
          </h3>
          
          <div className="space-y-3">
            {extendedData.optionalClauses.earthquakeClause && (
              <div className={`p-4 rounded-2xl border ${extendedData.optionalClauses.earthquakeClause.enabled ? 'bg-emerald-50 border-emerald-200' : 'bg-slate-50 border-slate-200'}`}>
                <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                  <div>
                    <p className="text-slate-900">🌍 Earthquake Clause (Deprem Klozu)</p>
                    {extendedData.optionalClauses.earthquakeClause.coverage && (
                      <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm mt-1">{extendedData.optionalClauses.earthquakeClause.coverage}</p>
                    )}
                  </div>
                  <div className={`px-3 py-1 rounded-lg ${extendedData.optionalClauses.earthquakeClause.enabled ? 'bg-emerald-200 text-emerald-900' : 'bg-slate-200 text-slate-600'}`}>
                    {extendedData.optionalClauses.earthquakeClause.enabled ? 'Active' : 'Not Active'}
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            )}

            {extendedData.optionalClauses.motorcycleClause && (
              <div className={`p-4 rounded-2xl border ${extendedData.optionalClauses.motorcycleClause.enabled ? 'bg-emerald-50 border-emerald-200' : 'bg-slate-50 border-slate-200'}`}>
                <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                  <div>
                    <p className="text-slate-900">🏍️ Motorcycle Clause (Motosiklet Klozu)</p>
                    {extendedData.optionalClauses.motorcycleClause.mandatory && (
                      <p className="text-amber-600 text-sm mt-1">⚠️ Mandatory for couriers and motorcycle riders</p>
                    )}
                    {extendedData.optionalClauses.motorcycleClause.coverage && (
                      <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm mt-1">{extendedData.optionalClauses.motorcycleClause.coverage}</p>
                    )}
                  </div>
                  <div className={`px-3 py-1 rounded-lg ${extendedData.optionalClauses.motorcycleClause.enabled ? 'bg-emerald-200 text-emerald-900' : 'bg-slate-200 text-slate-600'}`}>
                    {extendedData.optionalClauses.motorcycleClause.enabled ? 'Active' : 'Not Active'}
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            )}

            {extendedData.optionalClauses.terrorClause && (
              <div className={`p-4 rounded-2xl border ${extendedData.optionalClauses.terrorClause.enabled ? 'bg-emerald-50 border-emerald-200' : 'bg-slate-50 border-slate-200'}`}>
                <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                  <div>
                    <p className="text-slate-900">🛡️ Terror Clause (Terör Klozu)</p>
                    {extendedData.optionalClauses.terrorClause.coversStatIntervention && (
                      <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm mt-1">Includes state intervention to prevent terrorism</p>
                    )}
                  </div>
                  <div className={`px-3 py-1 rounded-lg ${extendedData.optionalClauses.terrorClause.enabled ? 'bg-emerald-200 text-emerald-900' : 'bg-slate-200 text-slate-600'}`}>
                    {extendedData.optionalClauses.terrorClause.enabled ? 'Active' : 'Not Active'}
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            )}

            {extendedData.optionalClauses.professionalSports && (
              <div className={`p-4 rounded-2xl border ${extendedData.optionalClauses.professionalSports.enabled ? 'bg-emerald-50 border-emerald-200' : 'bg-slate-50 border-slate-200'}`}>
                <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                  <div>
                    <p className="text-slate-900">⚽ Professional Sports Clause</p>
                    {extendedData.optionalClauses.professionalSports.sports && (
                      <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm mt-1">
                        Covers: {extendedData.optionalClauses.professionalSports.sports.join(', ')}
                      </p>
                    )}
                  </div>
                  <div className={`px-3 py-1 rounded-lg ${extendedData.optionalClauses.professionalSports.enabled ? 'bg-emerald-200 text-emerald-900' : 'bg-slate-200 text-slate-600'}`}>
                    {extendedData.optionalClauses.professionalSports.enabled ? 'Active' : 'Not Active'}
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Exclusions (Article 5) */}
      {extendedData.exclusions && (
        <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
          <h3 className="text-slate-900 mb-6 flex items-center gap-2">
            <Ban className="w-6 h-6 text-red-600" />
            Standard Exclusions (Teminat Dışı Haller - Article 5)
          </h3>
          
          <div className="space-y-3">
            {extendedData.exclusions.suicide && (
              <div className="p-4 bg-red-50 rounded-2xl border border-red-200">
                <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                  <XCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-red-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
                  <div>
                    <p className="text-red-900">Suicide (İntihar)</p>
                    <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm mt-1">
                      {extendedData.exclusions.suicide.note || 'Intentional self-harm or suicide is NEVER covered in Personal Accident insurance'}
                    </p>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            )}

            {extendedData.exclusions.alcoholDrugs && (
              <div className="p-4 bg-red-50 rounded-2xl border border-red-200">
                <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                  <XCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-red-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
                  <div>
                    <p className="text-red-900">Alcohol & Drugs (Alkol/Uyuşturucu)</p>
                    <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm mt-1">
                      {extendedData.exclusions.alcoholDrugs.legalLimit || 'Accidents while under influence (above legal limits)'}
                    </p>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            )}

            {extendedData.exclusions.criminalActs && (
              <div className="p-4 bg-red-50 rounded-2xl border border-red-200">
                <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                  <XCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-red-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
                  <div>
                    <p className="text-red-900">Criminal Acts (Suç İşleme)</p>
                    <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm mt-1">Injuries while committing a crime</p>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            )}

            {extendedData.exclusions.warRebellion && (
              <div className="p-4 bg-red-50 rounded-2xl border border-red-200">
                <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                  <XCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-red-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
                  <div>
                    <p className="text-red-900">War & Rebellion (Savaş/İsyan)</p>
                    <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm mt-1">War, civil unrest, rebellion</p>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            )}

            {extendedData.exclusions.motorcycling && (
              <div className="p-4 bg-amber-50 rounded-2xl border border-amber-200">
                <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                  <AlertTriangle className="w-5 h-5 text-amber-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
                  <div>
                    <p className="text-amber-900">Motorcycling (Motosiklet Kullanımı)</p>
                    <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm mt-1">
                      {extendedData.optionalClauses?.motorcycleClause?.enabled 
                        ? '✓ Coverage bought back via Motorcycle Clause' 
                        : '✗ Not covered unless Motorcycle Clause purchased'}
                    </p>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            )}

            {extendedData.exclusions.earthquake && (
              <div className="p-4 bg-amber-50 rounded-2xl border border-amber-200">
                <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                  <AlertTriangle className="w-5 h-5 text-amber-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
                  <div>
                    <p className="text-amber-900">Earthquake (Deprem)</p>
                    <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm mt-1">
                      {extendedData.optionalClauses?.earthquakeClause?.enabled 
                        ? '✓ Coverage bought back via Earthquake Clause' 
                        : '✗ Not covered unless Earthquake Clause purchased'}
                    </p>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            )}

            {extendedData.exclusions.professionalSports && (
              <div className="p-4 bg-amber-50 rounded-2xl border border-amber-200">
                <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                  <AlertTriangle className="w-5 h-5 text-amber-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
                  <div>
                    <p className="text-amber-900">Professional Sports (Profesyonel Spor)</p>
                    <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm mt-1">
                      {extendedData.optionalClauses?.professionalSports?.enabled 
                        ? '✓ Coverage bought back via Sports Clause' 
                        : '✗ Hunting, skiing, aviation require specific endorsements'}
                    </p>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Claims Process */}
      {extendedData.claimsInfo && (
        <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
          <h3 className="text-slate-900 mb-6 flex items-center gap-2">
            <FileText className="w-6 h-6 text-blue-600" />
            Claims Process & Requirements
          </h3>
          
          <div className="space-y-4">
            <div className="p-4 bg-blue-50 rounded-2xl border border-blue-200">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
                <Clock className="w-5 h-5 text-blue-600" />
                <p className="text-blue-900">Notification Period</p>
              </div>
              <p className="text-slate-700">{extendedData.claimsInfo.notificationPeriod}</p>
            </div>

            {extendedData.claimsInfo.requiredDocuments && extendedData.claimsInfo.requiredDocuments.length > 0 && (
              <div className="p-4 bg-slate-50 rounded-2xl">
                <p className="text-slate-900 mb-3">Required Documents</p>
                <ul className="space-y-2">
                  {extendedData.claimsInfo.requiredDocuments.map((doc, index) => (
                    <li key={index} className="flex items-start gap-2 text-sm">
                      <CheckCircle className="w-4 h-4 text-emerald-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
                      <span className="text-slate-700">{doc}</span>
                    </li>
                  ))}
                </ul>
              </div>
            )}

            {extendedData.claimsInfo.medicalBoardReport?.required && (
              <div className="p-4 bg-purple-50 rounded-2xl border border-purple-200">
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
                  <Stethoscope className="w-5 h-5 text-purple-600" />
                  <p className="text-purple-900">Medical Board Report (Kati Rapor) - MANDATORY</p>
                </div>
                <p className="text-slate-700 text-sm mb-2">
                  Type: {extendedData.claimsInfo.medicalBoardReport.type}
                </p>
                <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm">
                  {extendedData.claimsInfo.medicalBoardReport.purpose}
                </p>
              </div>
            )}

            {extendedData.claimsInfo.burdenOfProof && (
              <div className="p-4 bg-amber-50 rounded-2xl border border-amber-200">
                <p className="text-amber-900 mb-3">Burden of Proof</p>
                <div className="space-y-2 text-sm">
                  {extendedData.claimsInfo.burdenOfProof.insured && (
                    <div className="flex items-start gap-2">
                      <CheckCircle className="w-4 h-4 text-amber-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
                      <div>
                        <p className="text-slate-900">Insured Must Prove:</p>
                        <p className="text-slate-600">{extendedData.claimsInfo.burdenOfProof.insured}</p>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  )}
                  {extendedData.claimsInfo.burdenOfProof.insurer && (
                    <div className="flex items-start gap-2">
                      <AlertTriangle className="w-4 h-4 text-amber-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
                      <div>
                        <p className="text-slate-900">Insurer Must Prove:</p>
                        <p className="text-slate-600">{extendedData.claimsInfo.burdenOfProof.insurer}</p>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  )}
                </div>
              </div>
            )}

            {extendedData.claimsInfo.subrogation && (
              <div className="p-4 bg-slate-50 rounded-2xl">
                <p className="text-slate-900 mb-3">Subrogation Rights</p>
                <div className="space-y-2 text-sm">
                  {extendedData.claimsInfo.subrogation.appliesTo && (
                    <p className="text-slate-600">
                      <strong>Applies To:</strong> {extendedData.claimsInfo.subrogation.appliesTo}
                    </p>
                  )}
                  {extendedData.claimsInfo.subrogation.deathBenefit && (
                    <p className="text-slate-600">
                      <strong>Death Benefit:</strong> {extendedData.claimsInfo.subrogation.deathBenefit}
                    </p>
                  )}
                </div>
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Strategic Insights & Protection Gap */}
      {extendedData.strategicInsights?.protectionGap && (
        <div className="bg-gradient-to-br from-amber-50 to-orange-50 rounded-3xl p-6 border-2 border-amber-300">
          <h3 className="text-slate-900 mb-6 flex items-center gap-2">
            <AlertTriangle className="w-6 h-6 text-amber-600" />
            Strategic Insights & Protection Gap Analysis
          </h3>
          
          {extendedData.strategicInsights.protectionGap.exists && (
            <div className="p-4 bg-white rounded-2xl border border-amber-200 mb-4">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-3">
                <AlertOctagon className="w-5 h-5 text-red-600" />
                <p className="text-red-900">⚠️ Protection Gap Identified</p>
              </div>
              {extendedData.strategicInsights.protectionGap.issue && (
                <p className="text-slate-700 mb-3">{extendedData.strategicInsights.protectionGap.issue}</p>
              )}
              {extendedData.strategicInsights.protectionGap.recommendation && (
                <div className="p-3 bg-emerald-50 rounded-xl border border-emerald-200">
                  <p className="text-emerald-900">
                    <strong>Recommendation:</strong> {extendedData.strategicInsights.protectionGap.recommendation}
                  </p>
                </div>
              )}
            </div>
          )}

          {extendedData.strategicInsights.occupationFactors && extendedData.strategicInsights.occupationFactors.length > 0 && (
            <div className="p-4 bg-white rounded-2xl border border-amber-200 mb-4">
              <p className="text-slate-900 mb-3">Occupation-Specific Factors</p>
              <ul className="space-y-2">
                {extendedData.strategicInsights.occupationFactors.map((factor, index) => (
                  <li key={index} className="flex items-start gap-2 text-sm">
                    <Info className="w-4 h-4 text-blue-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
                    <span className="text-slate-700">{factor}</span>
                  </li>
                ))}
              </ul>
            </div>
          )}

          {extendedData.strategicInsights.buyBacksNeeded && extendedData.strategicInsights.buyBacksNeeded.length > 0 && (
            <div className="p-4 bg-white rounded-2xl border border-amber-200">
              <p className="text-slate-900 mb-3">Recommended Clause Purchases</p>
              <ul className="space-y-2">
                {extendedData.strategicInsights.buyBacksNeeded.map((buyBack, index) => (
                  <li key={index} className="flex items-start gap-2 text-sm">
                    <Plus className="w-4 h-4 text-emerald-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
                    <span className="text-slate-700">{buyBack}</span>
                  </li>
                ))}
              </ul>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Premium Breakdown */}
      {extendedData.premiumBreakdown && (
        <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
          <h3 className="text-slate-900 mb-6 flex items-center gap-2">
            <DollarSign className="w-6 h-6 text-blue-600" />
            Premium Breakdown
          </h3>
          
          <div className="space-y-3">
            <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-3 bg-slate-50 rounded-xl">
              <span className="text-slate-600">Base Premium</span>
              <span className="text-slate-900">{formatCurrency(extendedData.premiumBreakdown.basePremium || 0)}</span>
            </div>
            
            {extendedData.premiumBreakdown.occupationSurcharge > 0 && (
              <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-3 bg-amber-50 rounded-xl">
                <span className="text-slate-600">Occupation Risk Surcharge</span>
                <span className="text-amber-700">+{formatCurrency(extendedData.premiumBreakdown.occupationSurcharge)}</span>
              </div>
            )}
            
            {extendedData.premiumBreakdown.clausePremiums > 0 && (
              <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-3 bg-blue-50 rounded-xl">
                <span className="text-slate-600">Optional Clauses</span>
                <span className="text-blue-700">+{formatCurrency(extendedData.premiumBreakdown.clausePremiums)}</span>
              </div>
            )}
            
            <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-3 bg-slate-100 rounded-xl">
              <span className="text-slate-900">Net Premium</span>
              <span className="text-slate-900">{formatCurrency(extendedData.premiumBreakdown.netPremium || 0)}</span>
            </div>
            
            <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-3 bg-slate-50 rounded-xl">
              <span className="text-slate-600">BSMV (5% Insurance Tax)</span>
              <span className="text-slate-900">+{formatCurrency(extendedData.premiumBreakdown.bsmv || 0)}</span>
            </div>
            
            <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-4 bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-600 to-blue-700 rounded-xl text-white">
              <span className="text-xl">Gross Premium (Annual)</span>
              <span className="text-2xl">{formatCurrency(extendedData.premiumBreakdown.grossPremium || 0)}</span>
            </div>

            {extendedData.premiumBreakdown.paymentMethod && (
              <div className="p-3 bg-blue-50 rounded-xl border border-blue-200 text-center">
                <p className="text-blue-900">Payment Method: {extendedData.premiumBreakdown.paymentMethod}</p>
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Regulatory Information */}
      {extendedData.regulatoryInfo && (
        <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
          <h3 className="text-slate-900 mb-6 flex items-center gap-2">
            <Scale className="w-6 h-6 text-blue-600" />
            Regulatory Framework & General Conditions
          </h3>
          
          <div className="space-y-4">
            <div className="p-4 bg-slate-50 rounded-2xl">
              <p className="text-slate-900 mb-2">General Conditions</p>
              <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm">{extendedData.regulatoryInfo.generalConditions}</p>
              {extendedData.regulatoryInfo.lastRevision && (
                <p className="text-slate-500 text-sm mt-1">Last Revision: {extendedData.regulatoryInfo.lastRevision}</p>
              )}
            </div>

            {extendedData.regulatoryInfo.article1Definition && (
              <div className="p-4 bg-blue-50 rounded-2xl border border-blue-200">
                <p className="text-blue-900 mb-2">Article 1 - Definition of "Accident"</p>
                <p className="text-slate-700 text-sm">{extendedData.regulatoryInfo.article1Definition}</p>
              </div>
            )}

            {extendedData.regulatoryInfo.article3DeemedAccidents && (
              <div className="p-4 bg-emerald-50 rounded-2xl border border-emerald-200">
                <p className="text-emerald-900 mb-2">Article 3 - Events "Deemed" as Accidents</p>
                <p className="text-slate-700 text-sm">{extendedData.regulatoryInfo.article3DeemedAccidents}</p>
              </div>
            )}

            {extendedData.regulatoryInfo.article4Exclusions && (
              <div className="p-4 bg-amber-50 rounded-2xl border border-amber-200">
                <p className="text-amber-900 mb-2">Article 4 - Events Excluded as "Illness"</p>
                <p className="text-slate-700 text-sm">{extendedData.regulatoryInfo.article4Exclusions}</p>
              </div>
            )}

            {extendedData.regulatoryInfo.article5Exclusions && (
              <div className="p-4 bg-red-50 rounded-2xl border border-red-200">
                <p className="text-red-900 mb-2">Article 5 - Absolute Exclusions</p>
                <p className="text-slate-700 text-sm">{extendedData.regulatoryInfo.article5Exclusions}</p>
              </div>
            )}

            {extendedData.regulatoryInfo.article6OptionalBuyBacks && (
              <div className="p-4 bg-purple-50 rounded-2xl border border-purple-200">
                <p className="text-purple-900 mb-2">Article 6 - Optional Buy-Backs</p>
                <p className="text-slate-700 text-sm">{extendedData.regulatoryInfo.article6OptionalBuyBacks}</p>
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Contact & Support */}
      <div className="bg-gradient-to-br from-slate-50 to-slate-100 rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
        <h3 className="text-slate-900 mb-4 flex items-center gap-2">
          <Phone className="w-6 h-6 text-blue-600" />
          Need Help?
        </h3>
        <p className="text-slate-600 mb-4">
          For questions about your Personal Accident policy coverage, disability percentage calculations, 
          or claims process, contact your insurance provider or agency.
        </p>
        <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-3">
          <div className="px-4 py-2 bg-blue-600 text-white rounded-xl hover:bg-blue-700 transition-colors cursor-pointer">
            Contact {policy.provider}
          </div>
          <div className="px-4 py-2 bg-white border border-slate-300 text-slate-700 rounded-xl hover:bg-slate-50 transition-colors cursor-pointer">
            Download Policy Document
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

```

---

## File: `components (2)/insurance-lines/TurkishTrafficDetails.tsx`
- Bytes: 28,522
- SHA256: `7e72a8133542348d58e0bc6eb299cd29b76eed38f9b630e85cc103611269602f`

```tsx
import { 
  Shield, Clock, AlertCircle, TrendingUp, TrendingDown, Info, 
  ShieldAlert, DollarSign, AlertTriangle, Car, Ban, Users,
  Scale, FileWarning, Zap, Award, CheckCircle, XCircle, ChevronRight,
  Building2, Phone, Mail, MapPin, FileText, Percent, AlertOctagon,
  TrendingUpDown, Calculator, Calendar
} from 'lucide-react';
import { TurkishTrafficExtendedData } from './types';
import { BasePolicy } from './index';

type TurkishTrafficDetailsProps = {
  policy: BasePolicy & {
    extendedData?: TurkishTrafficExtendedData;
    country?: string;
    insuranceLine?: string;
  };
};

export function TurkishTrafficDetails({ policy }: TurkishTrafficDetailsProps) {
  // Guard clause - return early if no extended data
  if (!policy.extendedData) {
    return (
      <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
        <p className="text-slate-500">No extended Turkish Traffic Insurance data available for this policy.</p>
      </div>
    );
  }

  const extendedData = policy.extendedData as TurkishTrafficExtendedData;
  
  // Calculate time until coverage expires
  const now = new Date();
  const expiryDate = extendedData.expirationDateTime?.date || policy.endDate;
  const expiryTime = extendedData.expirationDateTime?.time || '12:00';
  const expiryDateTime = new Date(`${expiryDate}T${expiryTime}:00`);
  const hoursUntilExpiry = Math.max(0, (expiryDateTime.getTime() - now.getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60));
  const daysUntilExpiry = Math.floor(hoursUntilExpiry / 24);

  const formatCurrency = (amount: number) => {
    return new Intl.NumberFormat('tr-TR', {
      style: 'currency',
      currency: 'TRY',
      minimumFractionDigits: 0,
      maximumFractionDigits: 0
    }).format(amount);
  };

  const formatDate = (dateString: string) => {
    return new Date(dateString).toLocaleDateString('tr-TR', {
      year: 'numeric',
      month: 'long',
      day: 'numeric'
    });
  };

  // Tariff step system
  const tariffStep = extendedData.tariffStep || 0;
  const getTariffInfo = () => {
    if (tariffStep <= -4) return { label: 'Maximum Discount', color: 'emerald', discount: '60%' };
    if (tariffStep <= -2) return { label: 'High Discount', color: 'green', discount: '40%' };
    if (tariffStep === 0) return { label: 'Base Rate', color: 'blue', discount: '0%' };
    if (tariffStep <= 2) return { label: 'Moderate Increase', color: 'amber', discount: '+40%' };
    return { label: 'Maximum Increase', color: 'red', discount: '+100%' };
  };

  const tariffInfo = getTariffInfo();
  const vehicleInfo = extendedData.vehicleInfo;

  return (
    <div className="space-y-6">
      {/* Header Card */}
      <div className="bg-gradient-to-br from-indigo-600 to-purple-700 text-white rounded-3xl p-8">
        <div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-4">
          <div>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-2">
              <Shield className="w-8 h-8" />
              <h2 className="text-2xl">🇹🇷 Turkish Traffic Insurance (Zorunlu Trafik Sigortası)</h2>
            </div>
            <p className="text-indigo-100">Mandatory third-party liability insurance - Required by Turkish law</p>
          </div>
          <div className="text-right">
            <p className="text-sm opacity-80 mb-1">Valid for</p>
            <p className="text-3xl">{daysUntilExpiry} days</p>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-4 mt-6">
          <div className="bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-2xl p-4">
            <p className="text-indigo-100 text-sm mb-1">Policy Type</p>
            <p className="text-lg">Traffic Insurance</p>
          </div>
          <div className="bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-2xl p-4">
            <p className="text-indigo-100 text-sm mb-1">Coverage Territory</p>
            <p className="text-lg">Turkey</p>
          </div>
          <div className="bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-2xl p-4">
            <p className="text-indigo-100 text-sm mb-1">Annual Premium</p>
            <p className="text-lg">{formatCurrency(policy.monthlyPremium * 12)}</p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Tariff Step System (Crucial for Turkish Traffic Insurance) */}
      <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
        <h3 className="text-slate-900 mb-6 flex items-center gap-2">
          <TrendingUpDown className="w-6 h-6 text-blue-600" />
          Tariff Step System (Kademe Sistemi)
        </h3>
        
        <div className={`p-6 bg-gradient-to-br from-${tariffInfo.color}-50 to-${tariffInfo.color}-100 rounded-2xl border border-${tariffInfo.color}-200 mb-4`}>
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-4">
            <div>
              <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm mb-1">Your Current Tariff Step</p>
              <p className="text-4xl text-slate-900">{tariffStep >= 0 ? '+' : ''}{tariffStep}</p>
            </div>
            <div className="text-right">
              <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm mb-1">Premium Impact</p>
              <p className={`text-3xl text-${tariffInfo.color}-700`}>{tariffInfo.discount}</p>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div className={`px-4 py-2 bg-${tariffInfo.color}-200 rounded-xl inline-block`}>
            <p className={`text-${tariffInfo.color}-900`}>{tariffInfo.label}</p>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="space-y-4">
          <div className="p-4 bg-slate-50 rounded-2xl">
            <h4 className="text-slate-900 mb-3 flex items-center gap-2">
              <Calculator className="w-5 h-5 text-slate-600" />
              How the Tariff Step System Works
            </h4>
            <div className="space-y-3 text-sm">
              <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                <CheckCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-emerald-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
                <div>
                  <p className="text-slate-900">Claim-Free Year: <span className="text-emerald-600">Move down 1 step (-20% premium)</span></p>
                  <p className="text-slate-600">No accidents or claims filed during policy period</p>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                <AlertTriangle className="w-5 h-5 text-amber-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
                <div>
                  <p className="text-slate-900">One Claim Filed: <span className="text-amber-600">Move up 2 steps (+40% premium)</span></p>
                  <p className="text-slate-600">Any at-fault accident reported to insurance</p>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                <XCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-red-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
                <div>
                  <p className="text-slate-900">Multiple Claims: <span className="text-red-600">Move up 3-5 steps (up to +100% premium)</span></p>
```
