```tsx
                  <p className="text-slate-600">Two or more at-fault accidents in one year</p>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div className="p-4 bg-blue-50 rounded-2xl border border-blue-200">
            <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
              <Info className="w-5 h-5 text-blue-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
              <div className="text-sm">
                <p className="text-slate-900 mb-1">Tariff Step Range</p>
                <p className="text-slate-600">Steps range from -8 (maximum discount, 60% off) to +8 (maximum surcharge, double premium). New policyholders start at step 0. All steps are tracked in TRAMER system.</p>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Coverage Limits */}
      <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
        <h3 className="text-slate-900 mb-6 flex items-center gap-2">
          <DollarSign className="w-6 h-6 text-emerald-600" />
          Coverage Limits & Benefits
        </h3>
        
        <div className="space-y-4">
          <div className="p-4 bg-emerald-50 rounded-2xl border border-emerald-200">
            <div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-3">
              <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                <Users className="w-5 h-5 text-emerald-600 mt-1" />
                <div>
                  <h4 className="text-slate-900 mb-1">Bodily Injury to Third Parties</h4>
                  <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm">Per person, per accident - No aggregate limit</p>
                </div>
              </div>
              <span className="text-emerald-700 text-xl whitespace-nowrap ml-4">
                Unlimited
              </span>
            </div>
            <div className="mt-3 pl-8 space-y-2 text-sm">
              <div className="flex justify-between">
                <span className="text-slate-600">Death benefit:</span>
                <span className="text-slate-900">Unlimited</span>
              </div>
              <div className="flex justify-between">
                <span className="text-slate-600">Permanent disability:</span>
                <span className="text-slate-900">Unlimited</span>
              </div>
              <div className="flex justify-between">
                <span className="text-slate-600">Medical expenses:</span>
                <span className="text-slate-900">Unlimited</span>
              </div>
              <div className="flex justify-between">
                <span className="text-slate-600">Lost wages:</span>
                <span className="text-slate-900">Unlimited</span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div className="p-4 bg-blue-50 rounded-2xl border border-blue-200">
            <div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-3">
              <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                <Car className="w-5 h-5 text-blue-600 mt-1" />
                <div>
                  <h4 className="text-slate-900 mb-1">Property Damage to Third Parties</h4>
                  <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm">Per accident - Covers vehicles, buildings, objects</p>
                </div>
              </div>
              <span className="text-blue-700 text-xl whitespace-nowrap ml-4">
                Unlimited
              </span>
            </div>
            <div className="mt-3 pl-8 space-y-2 text-sm">
              <div className="flex justify-between">
                <span className="text-slate-600">Vehicle damage:</span>
                <span className="text-slate-900">Unlimited</span>
              </div>
              <div className="flex justify-between">
                <span className="text-slate-600">Building/structure:</span>
                <span className="text-slate-900">Unlimited</span>
              </div>
              <div className="flex justify-between">
                <span className="text-slate-600">Personal property:</span>
                <span className="text-slate-900">Unlimited</span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div className="p-4 bg-purple-50 rounded-2xl border border-purple-200">
            <div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-3">
              <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                <Users className="w-5 h-5 text-purple-600 mt-1" />
                <div>
                  <h4 className="text-slate-900 mb-1">Passenger Injury Coverage</h4>
                  <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm">For injuries to passengers in your vehicle</p>
                </div>
              </div>
              <span className="text-purple-700 text-xl whitespace-nowrap ml-4">
                {formatCurrency(100000)}
              </span>
            </div>
            <div className="mt-3 pl-8 text-sm text-slate-600">
              <p>Maximum ₺100,000 per passenger. Covers up to 5 passengers (vehicle capacity). Includes medical expenses, disability, and death benefits.</p>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div className="p-4 bg-amber-50 rounded-2xl border border-amber-200">
            <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
              <Zap className="w-5 h-5 text-amber-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
              <div className="text-sm">
                <p className="text-slate-900 mb-1">No Deductible</p>
                <p className="text-slate-600">Traffic insurance has no deductible. All covered third-party claims are paid in full by the insurance company without any out-of-pocket expense for the policyholder.</p>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Vehicle Information */}
      {vehicleInfo && (
        <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
          <h3 className="text-slate-900 mb-6 flex items-center gap-2">
            <Car className="w-6 h-6 text-blue-600" />
            Insured Vehicle Details
          </h3>
          <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
            <div className="p-4 bg-slate-50 rounded-2xl">
              <p className="text-slate-500 text-sm mb-1">License Plate</p>
              <p className="text-slate-900 font-mono">{vehicleInfo.licensePlate || 'Not specified'}</p>
            </div>
            <div className="p-4 bg-slate-50 rounded-2xl">
              <p className="text-slate-500 text-sm mb-1">Vehicle Type</p>
              <p className="text-slate-900 capitalize">{vehicleInfo.type || 'Passenger Car'}</p>
            </div>
            <div className="p-4 bg-slate-50 rounded-2xl">
              <p className="text-slate-500 text-sm mb-1">Make & Model</p>
              <p className="text-slate-900">{vehicleInfo.brand} {vehicleInfo.model}</p>
            </div>
            <div className="p-4 bg-slate-50 rounded-2xl">
              <p className="text-slate-500 text-sm mb-1">Model Year</p>
              <p className="text-slate-900">{vehicleInfo.modelYear}</p>
            </div>
            <div className="p-4 bg-slate-50 rounded-2xl">
              <p className="text-slate-500 text-sm mb-1">Engine Volume</p>
              <p className="text-slate-900">{vehicleInfo.engineVolume || 'Not specified'}</p>
            </div>
            <div className="p-4 bg-slate-50 rounded-2xl">
              <p className="text-slate-500 text-sm mb-1">Usage Purpose</p>
              <p className="text-slate-900 capitalize">{vehicleInfo.usage || 'Private'}</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* TRAMER & IMM System */}
      <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
        <h3 className="text-slate-900 mb-6 flex items-center gap-2">
          <Scale className="w-6 h-6 text-indigo-600" />
          TRAMER & IMM Regulatory System
        </h3>
        
        <div className="space-y-4">
          <div className="p-4 bg-indigo-50 rounded-2xl border border-indigo-200">
            <h4 className="text-slate-900 mb-2 flex items-center gap-2">
              <Building2 className="w-5 h-5 text-indigo-600" />
              TRAMER Registration
            </h4>
            <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm mb-3">
              Traffic Insurance and Endorsement Center (TRAMER) is the national database that tracks all motor insurance policies and claims in Turkey.
            </p>
            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3 text-sm">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                <CheckCircle className="w-4 h-4 text-emerald-600" />
                <span className="text-slate-700">Policy registered in TRAMER</span>
              </div>
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                <CheckCircle className="w-4 h-4 text-emerald-600" />
                <span className="text-slate-700">Claims history tracked</span>
              </div>
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                <CheckCircle className="w-4 h-4 text-emerald-600" />
                <span className="text-slate-700">Tariff step verified</span>
              </div>
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                <CheckCircle className="w-4 h-4 text-emerald-600" />
                <span className="text-slate-700">No-claim bonus tracked</span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div className="p-4 bg-blue-50 rounded-2xl border border-blue-200">
            <h4 className="text-slate-900 mb-2 flex items-center gap-2">
              <Shield className="w-5 h-5 text-blue-600" />
              IMM System Integration
            </h4>
            <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm mb-3">
              Turkish Motor Insurance Bureau (IMM) manages the guarantee fund that compensates victims of uninsured or unknown vehicles.
            </p>
            <ul className="space-y-2 text-sm text-slate-600">
              <li className="flex items-start gap-2">
                <ChevronRight className="w-4 h-4 text-blue-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
                <span>Hit-and-run accidents covered by IMM fund</span>
              </li>
              <li className="flex items-start gap-2">
                <ChevronRight className="w-4 h-4 text-blue-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
                <span>Uninsured driver damages covered</span>
              </li>
              <li className="flex items-start gap-2">
                <ChevronRight className="w-4 h-4 text-blue-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
                <span>Insolvency protection included</span>
              </li>
            </ul>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Important Limitations */}
      <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
        <h3 className="text-slate-900 mb-6 flex items-center gap-2">
          <AlertOctagon className="w-6 h-6 text-red-600" />
          What Traffic Insurance Does NOT Cover
        </h3>
        
        <div className="space-y-3">
          <div className="p-4 bg-red-50 rounded-2xl border border-red-200">
            <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
              <Ban className="w-5 h-5 text-red-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
              <div className="text-sm">
                <p className="text-slate-900 mb-1">Your Own Vehicle Damage</p>
                <p className="text-slate-600">Traffic insurance only covers third-party damages. Damage to your own vehicle is NOT covered. You need Kasko insurance for own damage coverage.</p>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div className="p-4 bg-red-50 rounded-2xl border border-red-200">
            <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
              <Ban className="w-5 h-5 text-red-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
              <div className="text-sm">
                <p className="text-slate-900 mb-1">Driver's Own Injuries</p>
                <p className="text-slate-600">Injuries to the at-fault driver are not covered. Only third-party victims and passengers receive compensation.</p>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div className="p-4 bg-red-50 rounded-2xl border border-red-200">
            <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
              <Ban className="w-5 h-5 text-red-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
              <div className="text-sm">
                <p className="text-slate-900 mb-1">Intentional Acts</p>
                <p className="text-slate-600">Deliberately caused accidents, fraud, or racing activities void all coverage.</p>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div className="p-4 bg-red-50 rounded-2xl border border-red-200">
            <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
              <Ban className="w-5 h-5 text-red-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
              <div className="text-sm">
                <p className="text-slate-900 mb-1">Unlicensed or Drunk Driving</p>
                <p className="text-slate-600">No coverage if driver doesn't have valid license or blood alcohol exceeds 0.5‰. Company may seek recourse from policyholder.</p>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Recourse Rights */}
      <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
        <h3 className="text-slate-900 mb-6 flex items-center gap-2">
          <FileWarning className="w-6 h-6 text-amber-600" />
          Recourse (Rücu) Rights - Important Warning
        </h3>
        
        <div className="p-4 bg-amber-50 rounded-2xl border-2 border-amber-300 mb-4">
          <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
            <AlertTriangle className="w-6 h-6 text-amber-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
            <div>
              <p className="text-slate-900 mb-2">What is Recourse?</p>
              <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm">
                Even though traffic insurance pays third-party claims, the insurance company can seek reimbursement (recourse) from YOU if the accident occurred under specific prohibited circumstances.
              </p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="space-y-3">
          <div className="p-4 bg-red-50 rounded-2xl border border-red-200">
            <h4 className="text-slate-900 text-sm mb-2 flex items-center gap-2">
              <XCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-red-600" />
              Full Recourse (100% Reimbursement)
            </h4>
            <ul className="space-y-1 text-sm text-slate-600 ml-6">
              <li>• Driving under influence (alcohol {'>'} 0.5‰ or drugs)</li>
              <li>• Driver without valid license</li>
              <li>• Hit and run (leaving accident scene)</li>
              <li>• Using vehicle for criminal activity</li>
              <li>• Deliberately causing accident</li>
            </ul>
            <p className="text-red-700 text-sm mt-2 ml-6">You will be liable for 100% of all damages paid</p>
          </div>

          <div className="p-4 bg-orange-50 rounded-2xl border border-orange-200">
            <h4 className="text-slate-900 text-sm mb-2 flex items-center gap-2">
              <AlertCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-orange-600" />
              Partial Recourse (Limited Reimbursement)
            </h4>
            <ul className="space-y-1 text-sm text-slate-600 ml-6">
              <li>• Driving with expired license (max ₺50,000)</li>
              <li>• Minor traffic violations (max ₺25,000)</li>
              <li>• Expired vehicle inspection (max ₺30,000)</li>
            </ul>
            <p className="text-orange-700 text-sm mt-2 ml-6">Limited liability up to specified amounts</p>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="mt-4 p-4 bg-blue-50 rounded-2xl border border-blue-200">
          <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
            <Info className="w-5 h-5 text-blue-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
            <div className="text-sm">
              <p className="text-slate-900 mb-1">Protect Yourself from Recourse</p>
              <p className="text-slate-600">Always maintain valid license, never drive under influence, keep vehicle inspections current, and comply with all traffic regulations. Recourse claims can reach millions of liras in serious accidents.</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Legal Requirements */}
      <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
        <h3 className="text-slate-900 mb-6 flex items-center gap-2">
          <FileText className="w-6 h-6 text-indigo-600" />
          Turkish Law Requirements
        </h3>
        
        <div className="space-y-4">
          <div className="p-4 bg-indigo-50 rounded-2xl border border-indigo-200">
            <h4 className="text-slate-900 mb-2">Mandatory Coverage</h4>
            <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm mb-2">
              According to Highway Traffic Law No. 2918 and Insurance Law No. 5684:
            </p>
            <ul className="space-y-1 text-sm text-slate-600 ml-4">
              <li>• All motor vehicles must have valid traffic insurance</li>
              <li>• Coverage must start before vehicle can be registered</li>
              <li>• Grace period of 60 days after expiration</li>
              <li>• Automatic renewal unless cancelled in writing</li>
            </ul>
          </div>

          <div className="p-4 bg-red-50 rounded-2xl border border-red-200">
            <h4 className="text-slate-900 mb-2 flex items-center gap-2">
              <AlertTriangle className="w-5 h-5 text-red-600" />
              Penalties for Driving Without Insurance
            </h4>
            <div className="grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-3 text-sm">
              <div className="bg-white rounded-xl p-3">
                <p className="text-slate-900 mb-1">Traffic Fine</p>
                <p className="text-red-600">₺3,456 (2024 rate)</p>
              </div>
              <div className="bg-white rounded-xl p-3">
                <p className="text-slate-900 mb-1">Vehicle Impoundment</p>
                <p className="text-red-600">Until insurance obtained</p>
              </div>
              <div className="bg-white rounded-xl p-3">
                <p className="text-slate-900 mb-1">License Suspension</p>
                <p className="text-red-600">Possible suspension</p>
              </div>
              <div className="bg-white rounded-xl p-3">
                <p className="text-slate-900 mb-1">Personal Liability</p>
                <p className="text-red-600">100% damages if accident</p>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div className="p-4 bg-emerald-50 rounded-2xl border border-emerald-200">
            <h4 className="text-slate-900 mb-2 flex items-center gap-2">
              <CheckCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-emerald-600" />
              Policy Validity
            </h4>
            <div className="space-y-2 text-sm text-slate-600">
              <div className="flex justify-between">
                <span>Policy Start Date:</span>
                <span className="text-slate-900">{formatDate(policy.startDate)}</span>
              </div>
              <div className="flex justify-between">
                <span>Policy End Date:</span>
                <span className="text-slate-900">{formatDate(policy.endDate)}</span>
              </div>
              <div className="flex justify-between">
                <span>Grace Period Ends:</span>
                <span className="text-slate-900">
                  {formatDate(new Date(new Date(policy.endDate).getTime() + 60 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString())}
                </span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Contact & Claims */}
      <div className="bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-50 to-indigo-50 rounded-3xl p-6 border border-blue-200">
        <h3 className="text-slate-900 mb-4 flex items-center gap-2">
          <Phone className="w-6 h-6 text-blue-600" />
          Emergency Contact & Claims
        </h3>
        <div className="grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
          <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl p-4">
            <p className="text-slate-500 text-sm mb-1">24/7 Accident Hotline</p>
            <p className="text-blue-600 text-xl mb-2">0850 420 20 24</p>
            <p className="text-slate-600 text-xs">Call immediately after any accident</p>
          </div>
          <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl p-4">
            <p className="text-slate-500 text-sm mb-1">TRAMER Information</p>
            <p className="text-slate-900 text-xl mb-2">444 0 987</p>
            <p className="text-slate-600 text-xs">Check tariff step and claims history</p>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div className="mt-4 p-4 bg-white rounded-2xl">
          <p className="text-slate-900 mb-2 flex items-center gap-2">
            <FileText className="w-5 h-5 text-blue-600" />
            Required Documents for Claims
          </p>
          <ul className="text-slate-600 text-sm space-y-1 ml-6">
            <li>• Police report (Kaza Tespit Tutanağı)</li>
            <li>• Photos of damage and accident scene</li>
            <li>• Driver's license and vehicle registration</li>
            <li>• Traffic insurance policy number</li>
            <li>• Witness statements (if available)</li>
          </ul>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

```

---

## File: `components (2)/insurance-lines/types.ts`
- Bytes: 43,916
- SHA256: `de595c1e901cc998308b9c0a14a22dfc499ecc821b06f8fac1ef4ccb5434fb17`

```typescript
/**
 * Insurance Line-Specific Types
 * 
 * This module defines the extensible type system for different insurance lines and countries.
 * Each insurance line (e.g., Turkish Kasko, US Health, UK Home) can define its own extended data structure.
 */

// Base policy structure that all insurance lines extend
export type BasePolicy = {
  id: string;
  fileName: string;
  provider: string;
  policyNumber: string;
  type: 'auto' | 'home' | 'life' | 'health' | 'other';
  monthlyPremium: number;
  coverage: number;
  deductible: number;
  startDate: string;
  endDate: string;
  features: string[];
  logo: string;
  aiConfidence: number;
  savings?: number;
  recommendation?: 'keep' | 'switch' | 'review';
  
  // Line and country identifiers
  country?: string;            // e.g., 'TR', 'US', 'UK'
  insuranceLine?: string;      // e.g., 'kasko', 'health', 'home'
  
  // Extended data (line-specific)
  extendedData?: any;          // Line-specific data stored here
};

// Turkish Kasko-specific extended data structure
export type TurkishKaskoExtendedData = {
  // Policy Identity
  agencyInfo?: string;
  renewalNumber?: number;
  endorsementNumber?: number;
  issueDate?: string;
  
  // Time-specific coverage
  inceptionDateTime?: {
    date: string;
    time: string;  // Default: "12:00"
  };
  expirationDateTime?: {
    date: string;
    time: string;  // Default: "12:00"
  };
  
  // Insured Entity
  insuredName?: string;
  idNumber?: string;           // T.C. Kimlik/Vergi No
  customerNumber?: string;
  contactAddress?: string;
  lienholder?: string;         // Bank/Mortgage
  
  // Vehicle/Asset Data
  licensePlate?: string;
  makeModel?: string;
  modelYear?: number;
  engineNumber?: string;
  chassisNumber?: string;      // VIN
  usageType?: 'Hususi' | 'Ticari';
  seatCapacity?: number;
  color?: string;
  fuelType?: 'Gas' | 'Diesel' | 'Hybrid' | 'EV' | 'LPG';
  
  // Coverage Type (Turkish-specific)
  coverageType?: 'Dar Kasko' | 'Kasko' | 'Genişletilmiş Kasko' | 'Tam Kasko';
  
  // Financial Scope
  insuredValue?: {
    type: 'Rayiç Bedel' | 'Fixed';
    amount?: number;
  };
  immLimit?: 'Unlimited' | number;
  personalAccidentLimit?: number;
  medicalExpensesLimit?: number;
  legalProtectionLimit?: number;
  
  // Deductibles
  deductibleType?: 'Tenzili' | 'Entegral';
  deductibleAmountOrPercentage?: string;
  specificDeductibles?: {
    youngDriver?: string;
    terrorism?: string;
    valet?: string;
  };
  
  // Critical Clauses
  clauses?: {
    service?: 'Yetkili Servis' | 'Özel Servis';
    spareParts?: 'Orijinal Parça' | 'Eşdeğer Parça';
    glass?: {
      type?: 'Original' | 'Industrial';
      deductible?: string;
      freeReplacements?: number;
    };
    rentalCar?: {
      duration?: string;
      segment?: 'A' | 'B' | 'C' | 'D';
    };
    miniRepair?: boolean;
    newValueClause?: {
      enabled: boolean;
      yearsEligible?: number;
    };
    wrongFuel?: boolean;
  };
  
  // Premium Details
  premiumBreakdown?: {
    net?: number;
    bsmv?: number;            // Banking & Insurance Tax
    trafficFund?: number;
    gross?: number;
    paymentSchedule?: 'Block' | 'Installments';
  };
  
  // No-Claim Discount
  noClaimDiscount?: {
    currentRate?: number;
    yearsAccidentFree?: number;
    stepBackRule?: string;
  };
  
  // Exclusions
  criticalExclusions?: string[];
};

// Full Turkish Kasko policy type
export type TurkishKaskoPolicy = BasePolicy & {
  country: 'TR';
  insuranceLine: 'kasko';
  extendedData: TurkishKaskoExtendedData;
};

// Turkish Traffic Insurance-specific extended data structure
export type TurkishTrafficExtendedData = {
  // 1. Policy Identity
  agencyInfo?: string;
  renewalNumber?: number;
  issueDate?: string;
  
  // Time-specific coverage (same noon rule as Kasko)
  inceptionDateTime?: {
    date: string;
    time: string;  // Default: "12:00"
  };
  expirationDateTime?: {
    date: string;
    time: string;  // Default: "12:00"
  };
  
  // 2. Tariff & Risk (CRITICAL - Determines pricing)
  tariffStepCode?: 0 | 1 | 2 | 3 | 4 | 5 | 6 | 7 | 8;  // 0 = worst, 8 = best
  stepClassification?: 'Very High Risk' | 'High Risk' | 'Risky' | 'Risky Entry' | 'Standard Entry' | 'Good' | 'Very Good' | 'Excellent' | 'Elite';
  ncdSurchargeRate?: number;  // e.g., -50 (50% discount) or +200 (200% surcharge)
  yearsAccidentFree?: number;
  usageType?: 'Otomobil' | 'Kamyonet' | 'Taksi' | 'Motosiklet' | 'Minibüs' | 'Otobus' | 'Kamyon';
  tariffProvince?: string;  // e.g., "34 - Istanbul", "06 - Ankara"
  
  // 3. Asset & Insured
  licensePlate?: string;
  vehicleOwner?: string;
  idNumber?: string;  // T.C. Kimlik / Vergi No
  chassisNumber?: string;  // VIN
  engineNumber?: string;
  makeModel?: string;
  modelYear?: number;
  
  // 4. Coverage Limits (2025 Statutory Limits)
  coverageLimits?: {
    materialPerVehicle?: number;    // Default: 300,000 TL
    materialPerAccident?: number;   // Default: 600,000 TL
    healthPerPerson?: number;       // Default: 2,700,000 TL
    healthPerAccident?: number;     // Default: 13,500,000 TL
    deathDisabilityPerPerson?: number;   // Default: 2,700,000 TL
    deathDisabilityPerAccident?: number; // Default: 13,500,000 TL
  };
  
  // 5. Premium Breakdown
  premiumBreakdown?: {
    netPremium?: number;
    guaranteeFundShare?: number;  // G.H. Katkı Payı
    trafficServicesFund?: number; // THGF Payı
    bsmv?: number;                // Banking & Insurance Tax (5%)
    grossPremium?: number;
  };
  
  // 6. Supplementary Coverages
  supplementaryCoverages?: {
    imm?: {
      enabled: boolean;
      limit?: 'Unlimited' | number;
      type?: 'Standalone' | 'Bundled with Kasko';
    };
    assistancePack?: {
      enabled: boolean;
      type?: 'Basic' | 'Plus' | 'Super';
      towingLimit?: number;
      services?: string[];
    };
    moralDamages?: boolean;  // Manevi Tazminat coverage
  };
  
  // 7. Critical Exclusions & Recourse
  exclusionsApply?: string[];
  recourseRisks?: string[];  // Situations where insurer can recourse
  
  // 8. Claims History (affects step)
  claimsInLastYear?: number;
  totalClaimsHistory?: number;
};

// Full Turkish Traffic policy type
export type TurkishTrafficPolicy = BasePolicy & {
  country: 'TR';
  insuranceLine: 'traffic';
  extendedData: TurkishTrafficExtendedData;
};

// Turkish Credit-Linked Life Insurance-specific extended data structure
export type TurkishCreditLifeExtendedData = {
  // 1. Policy Identity & Critical Lienholder Information
  agencyInfo?: string;
  renewalNumber?: number;
  issueDate?: string;
  dainIMurtehin?: string;         // CRITICAL: The Bank (Pledgee/Lienholder)
  creditReferenceNo?: string;      // Links to specific loan account
  tariffProductName?: string;      // e.g., "Decreasing Term Life" or "Level Term Life"
  
  // 2. Insured Person (Borrower)
  policyholderName?: string;       // Usually the borrower
  idNumber?: string;               // T.C. Kimlik No
  age?: number;                    // Primary driver of premium calculation
  occupation?: string;
  healthDeclarationStatus?: 'Completed' | 'Waived' | 'Pending';
  healthDeclarationNotes?: string;
  
  // 3. Credit/Loan Details
  loanType?: 'Mortgage' | 'Personal Loan' | 'Vehicle Loan' | 'Consumer Loan';
  loanPrincipal?: number;          // Initial loan amount
  loanTerm?: number;               // In months
  loanStartDate?: string;
  loanEndDate?: string;
  currentOutstandingBalance?: number;
  monthlyInstallment?: number;
  
  // 4. Coverage Structure
  coverageStructure?: {
    type: 'Decreasing' | 'Level';   // Azalan Bakiyeli vs Sabit
    initialSumAssured?: number;      // Equals loan principal at start
    currentSumAssured?: number;      // Reduces monthly in Decreasing type
    beneficiaryStructure?: string;   // "Bank first up to debt, heirs get surplus"
  };
  
  // 5. Main Coverages
  coverages?: {
    death?: {
      enabled: boolean;
      coverage: 'All Causes' | 'Accident Only';
      exclusions?: string[];
    };
    accidentalDeath?: {
      enabled: boolean;
      doubleIndemnity?: boolean;    // Pays 2x if death from accident
    };
    totalDisability?: {
      enabled: boolean;
      trigger: '60% Working Capacity Loss' | '80% Working Capacity Loss';
      certification: 'State Hospital Board Required';
      payoutType: 'Lump Sum' | 'Monthly Installments';
    };
    involuntaryUnemployment?: {
      enabled: boolean;
      maxMonthsCovered?: number;     // e.g., 6 or 12 months
      waitingPeriod?: number;        // e.g., 90 days
      monthlyBenefit?: number;       // Pays installments, not full loan
      exclusions?: string[];
    };
  };
  
  // 6. Financial Details
  premiumStructure?: {
    paymentMethod: 'Lump Sum (Peşin)' | 'Monthly Installments (Taksitli)';
    totalPremium?: number;
    addedToLoanAmount?: boolean;     // If lump sum, usually added to loan
    monthlyPremium?: number;
    premiumDrivers?: string[];       // e.g., ["Age: 42", "Health: Good", "Term: 180 months"]
  };
  
  taxBenefits?: {
    eligible: boolean;
    deductionRate?: number;          // Up to 15% of gross wage
    estimatedAnnualSaving?: number;  // Effective cost reduction
    applicableTo?: 'Salaried Employees Only';
  };
  
  // 7. Critical Exclusions
  exclusions?: {
    suicideClause?: {
      excluded: boolean;
      period?: string;               // e.g., "First 2-3 years"
      afterPeriod?: string;          // "Covered after 3 years continuous"
    };
    preExistingConditions?: {
      clause: string;
      impact: string;                // e.g., "Claim rejection for undisclosed illness"
    };
    criminalActs?: boolean;
    warAndTerror?: {
      directParticipation: boolean;
      passiveVictim?: boolean;       // Usually covered
    };
    aviation?: string;
  };
  
  // 8. Consumer Rights & Refunds
  surrenderRights?: {
    earlyClosureAllowed: boolean;
    refundFormula?: string;          // e.g., "Unearned portion of premium"
    processRequired?: string;        // "Must apply with Loan Closure Letter"
    automaticRefund?: boolean;       // Usually false
    surrenderValue?: number;         // Current refund amount if closed today
  };
  
  // 9. Regulatory Compliance
  regulatoryInfo?: {
    rightOfChoice?: string;          // "Borrower can choose any insurer (Article 13)"
    bankIncentive?: string;          // e.g., "0.2% lower interest if using bank's policy"
    generalConditions?: string;      // "Hayat Sigortası Genel Şartları"
    regulation?: string;             // "2015 Regulation on Credit-Linked Insurance"
  };
  
  // 10. Claims Process
  claimsInfo?: {
    deathClaimProcess?: string;
    disabilityClaimProcess?: string;
    unemploymentClaimProcess?: string;
    documentationRequired?: string[];
    averageProcessingTime?: string;
    firstBeneficiary?: string;       // Always the bank
    surplusToHeirs?: boolean;
  };
  
  // 11. Policy History
  policyHistory?: {
    yearsInForce?: number;
    claimsFiled?: number;
    lastRenewalDate?: string;
    continuousFromOriginalLoan?: boolean;
  };
};

// Full Turkish Credit Life policy type
export type TurkishCreditLifePolicy = BasePolicy & {
  country: 'TR';
  insuranceLine: 'credit-life';
  extendedData: TurkishCreditLifeExtendedData;
};

// Turkish Fire/Housing Insurance-specific extended data structure
export type TurkishFireExtendedData = {
  // 1. Policy Identity
  agencyInfo?: string;
  renewalNumber?: number;
  issueDate?: string;
  
  // Time-specific coverage (same noon rule as Kasko)
  inceptionDateTime?: {
    date: string;
    time: string;  // Default: "12:00"
  };
  expirationDateTime?: {
    date: string;
    time: string;  // Default: "12:00"
  };
  
  // 2. Risk Location (Critical for property insurance)
  riskLocation?: {
    fullAddress?: string;             // Must match Title Deed (Tapu)
    uavtCode?: string;                // 10-digit National Address Code (mandatory)
    province?: string;                // e.g., "Istanbul"
    district?: string;                // e.g., "Kadıköy"
    neighborhood?: string;
    buildingNumber?: string;
    apartmentNumber?: string;
    floor?: number;
    postalCode?: string;
  };
  
  // 3. Building Characteristics
  buildingInfo?: {
    constructionType?: 'Tam Kagir' | 'Yığma' | 'Ahşap' | 'Çelik Karkas';  // RC, Masonry, Wood, Steel
    usageType?: 'Mesken' | 'Yazlık' | 'Ofis' | 'Dükkan' | 'Boş';  // Residential, Summer, Office, Shop, Vacant
    buildingAge?: number;
    totalFloors?: number;
    totalArea?: number;               // Square meters
    occupancyStatus?: 'Owner-Occupied' | 'Tenant-Occupied' | 'Vacant';
    heatingType?: 'Doğalgaz' | 'Kombi' | 'Soba' | 'Klima';
  };
  
  // 4. Financial Values (Critical - Under-insurance Risk)
  insuredValues?: {
    buildingSumInsured?: number;      // Excludes land value - only reconstruction cost
    contentsSumInsured?: number;      // Furniture, electronics, household goods
    decorationSumInsured?: number;    // For tenants - paint, wallpaper, fixtures
    totalSumInsured?: number;         // Building + Contents + Decoration
    landValue?: number;               // Info only - not insured
    actualReconstructionCost?: number; // Market value - for Eksik Sigorta check
    underInsuranceRisk?: {
      exists: boolean;
      percentage?: number;            // e.g., 50% means 50% under-insured
      implication?: string;
    };
  };
  
  // 5. DASK Integration (Critical in Turkey)
  daskIntegration?: {
    daskPolicyNumber?: string;        // Mandatory prerequisite
    daskLimit?: number;               // Amount DASK pays first (e.g., 1,500,000 TL)
    daskPremium?: number;
    daskActive?: boolean;
    excessCoverageNote?: string;      // "Private policy pays excess above DASK limit"
  };
  
  // 6. Main Coverages & Limits
  coverages?: {
    fire?: {
      enabled: boolean;
      limit?: number;                 // Usually = Total Sum Insured
      includes?: string[];            // Fire, Lightning, Explosion, Smoke
    };
    internalWater?: {
      enabled: boolean;
      limit?: number;                 // Often has specific cap
      deductible?: number;
      covers?: string[];              // Bursting pipes, radiator leaks
      excludes?: string[];            // Water through windows, mold
    };
    theft?: {
      enabled: boolean;
      limit?: number;
      forcibleEntryRequired?: boolean;
      safeRequirement?: string;       // For cash/jewelry
      subLimits?: {
        cashAndJewelry?: number;      // e.g., max 5% of total
        electronics?: number;
      };
    };
    glassBreakage?: {
      enabled: boolean;
      type?: 'First Loss' | 'Full Value';
      limit?: number;
      deductible?: number;
    };
    thirdPartyLiability?: {
      enabled: boolean;
      limit?: number;                 // Damage to neighbors
      tenantLiability?: boolean;      // Tenant's liability to landlord
      neighborLiability?: boolean;    // Fire/water spreading to neighbors
    };
    earthquake?: {
      enabled: boolean;
      limit?: number;                 // Covers excess above DASK
      deductible?: number;            // Typically 2% of Sum Insured
      deductibleType?: 'Percentage' | 'Fixed Amount';
    };
    additionalPerils?: {
      storm?: { enabled: boolean; windSpeedThreshold?: string; };
      snow?: { enabled: boolean; };
      vehicleImpact?: { enabled: boolean; };
      terrorism?: { enabled: boolean; coInsurance?: number; };  // 5% co-insurance mandatory
      glkhh?: { enabled: boolean; coverage?: number; };  // Strikes, civil commotion
    };
  };
  
  // 7. Deductibles
  deductibles?: {
    earthquakeDeductible?: number;     // Standard: 2% of Sum Insured
    waterDamageDeductible?: number;    // Often fixed (e.g., 100 USD eq.)
    standardDeductible?: number;
  };
  
  // 8. Critical Clauses
  criticalClauses?: {
    missingInsurance?: {
      applies: boolean;
      explanation?: string;           // "If under-insured, claim paid proportionally"
      formula?: string;               // "Payout = (Damage × Sum Insured) / Actual Value"
      currentRisk?: string;
    };
    inflationProtection?: {
      enabled: boolean;
      rate?: number;                  // e.g., 60% annual or CPI-based
      mechanism?: 'Daily' | 'Monthly';
      benefit?: string;
    };
    newValueClause?: {
      enabled: boolean;
      appliesToContents?: boolean;
      excludes?: string[];            // Usually excludes clothing/linen
    };
    fireLegalLiability?: {
      tenantToLandlord?: boolean;
      neighborDamage?: boolean;
    };
  };
  
  // 9. Insured Parties
  insuredParties?: {
    policyholder?: string;
    insuredPerson?: string;           // Can be different (landlord vs tenant)
    idNumber?: string;
    mortgagee?: string;               // CRITICAL: Bank listed here, paid first in total loss
    mortgageAccountNo?: string;
  };
  
  // 10. Premium Breakdown
  premiumBreakdown?: {
    buildingPremium?: number;
    contentsPremium?: number;
    earthquakePremium?: number;
    additionalCoverages?: number;
    netPremium?: number;
    bsmv?: number;                    // 5% insurance tax
    ydv?: number;                     // Stamp duty
    grossPremium?: number;
    paymentPlan?: 'Lump Sum' | 'Installments';
  };
  
  // 11. Exclusions
  standardExclusions?: string[];
  specificExclusions?: {
    electricalDamage?: string;        // Not covered unless fire ensues
    gradualDamage?: string;           // Mold, rust, wear & tear
    publicAuthority?: string;         // Municipal demolition orders
    warAndNuclear?: boolean;
  };
  
  // 12. Claims Process
  claimsInfo?: {
    notificationPeriod?: string;      // e.g., "5 business days"
    requiredDocuments?: string[];
    daskClaimFirst?: boolean;         // For earthquakes
    salvageRights?: string;
  };
  
  // 13. Coverage Enhancement
  valuableItemsSchedule?: {
    item?: string;
    value?: number;
    separately_insured?: boolean;
  }[];
  
  electronicDeviceCoverage?: {
    enabled: boolean;
    voltageSurge?: boolean;
    accidentalBreakage?: boolean;
    limit?: number;
  };
};

// Full Turkish Fire/Housing policy type
export type TurkishFirePolicy = BasePolicy & {
  country: 'TR';
  insuranceLine: 'fire';
  extendedData: TurkishFireExtendedData;
};

// Turkish Personal Accident Insurance-specific extended data structure
export type TurkishPersonalAccidentExtendedData = {
  // 1. Policy Identity
  agencyInfo?: string;
  renewalNumber?: number;
  issueDate?: string;
  
  // Time-specific coverage
  inceptionDateTime?: {
    date: string;
    time: string;  // For journey-based: boarding time
  };
  expirationDateTime?: {
    date: string;
    time: string;  // For journey-based: disembarking time
  };
  
  // 2. Insured Party Structure
  policyholder?: string;               // Sigorta Ettiren (e.g., Employer, Bus Company, Individual)
  insuredPerson?: string;              // Sigortalı (The person whose life/body is at risk)
  idNumber?: string;                   // T.C. Kimlik No
  beneficiary?: string;                // Lehtar - CRITICAL: Recipient of death benefit
  beneficiaryDefault?: boolean;        // If true, defaults to legal heirs (Kanuni Varisler)
  
  // 3. Risk Classification (Premium Driver)
  occupationRiskClass?: {
    class: 1 | 2 | 3;                  // Class 1 (Clerk) to Class 3 (Miner/Courier)
    occupation?: string;               // e.g., "Office Worker", "Miner", "Courier"
    riskLevel?: 'Low Risk' | 'Medium Risk' | 'High Risk';
    premiumMultiplier?: number;        // How much more than base rate
  };
  
  // 4. Coverage Structure & Limits
  coverageLimits?: {
    deathSumAssured?: number;          // Vefat Sigorta Bedeli
    disabilitySumAssured?: number;     // Sakatlık Sigorta Bedeli (base for % calculations)
    medicalExpensesLimit?: number;     // Tedavi Masrafları Limiti (optional indemnity coverage)
    dailyIndemnity?: {
      enabled: boolean;
      amountPerDay?: number;           // e.g., 500 TL/day
      maxDays?: number;                // Usually capped at 200 days
      waitingPeriod?: number;          // Deductible in days (e.g., first 3-7 days not paid)
    };
  };
  
  // 5. Compulsory Type (if applicable)
  compulsoryType?: {
    isCompulsory: boolean;
    scheme?: 'Road Passenger Transport' | 'Mining Employees' | 'Voluntary';
    regulatoryLimits?: {
      deathDisability2025?: number;    // Updated July 1, 2025
      medicalExpenses2025?: number;
      previousLimit?: number;          // For comparison (e.g., 175,000 TL -> 252,000 TL)
    };
    vehicleInfo?: {                    // For Transport Insurance
      plateNumber?: string;
      seatCount?: number;
      authorizationCertificate?: string;  // e.g., D1, B1 for intercity buses
      aggregateLimit?: number;         // Limit × Seat Count
      coverageScope?: string;          // "Boarding to disembarking, includes rest stops"
    };
    miningInfo?: {                     // For Mining Workers
      mineType?: 'Underground Coal' | 'Open-Pit Coal' | 'Other';
      riskInspectionCompleted?: boolean;
      fixedAnnualPremium?: number;     // 2025: 4,675 TL per miner
      safetyStandards?: 'Met' | 'Not Met' | 'Pending Review';
    };
  };
  
  // 6. Disability Percentage Scale (The Core of Payout Logic)
  disabilityScale?: {
    useStandardScale: boolean;
    leftHanded?: boolean;              // Swaps R/L arm percentages
    examples?: {
      loss: string;
      percentage: number;
      payoutAmount?: number;           // Pre-calculated for this policy
    }[];
    cumulativeCap?: string;            // "Total cannot exceed 100% of Sum Assured"
  };
  
  // 7. Legal Definition of Accident (Compliance Check)
  accidentDefinition?: {
    sudden?: boolean;                  // Ani - occurs in a specific moment
    external?: boolean;                // Harici - cause outside the body
    involuntary?: boolean;             // İrade Dışı - against insured's will
    deemedAccidents?: string[];        // Gas inhalation, muscle tearing, animal bites, rabies
    excludedAsIllness?: string[];      // Hernia, disease consequences, fever, allergies
  };
  
  // 8. Coverage Enhancements (Buy-Back Clauses)
  optionalClauses?: {
    earthquakeClause?: {
      enabled: boolean;
      coverage?: string;               // Standard policies exclude earthquake
    };
    motorcycleClause?: {
      enabled: boolean;
      mandatory?: boolean;             // Required for couriers/riders
      coverage?: string;
    };
    terrorClause?: {
      enabled: boolean;
      coversStatIntervention?: boolean; // Covers state's action to prevent terrorism
    };
    professionalSports?: {
      enabled: boolean;
      sports?: string[];               // Hunting, skiing, aviation
    };
  };
  
  // 9. Exclusions (Article 5 of General Conditions)
  exclusions?: {
    suicide?: {
      excluded: boolean;
      note?: string;                   // "Never covered in PA insurance (unlike Life insurance)"
    };
    alcoholDrugs?: {
      excluded: boolean;
      legalLimit?: string;             // Above legal BAC limits
    };
    criminalActs?: boolean;
    warRebellion?: boolean;
    motorcycling?: boolean;            // Unless bought back
    earthquake?: boolean;              // Unless bought back
    professionalSports?: boolean;      // Unless bought back
  };
  
  // 10. Premium Breakdown
  premiumBreakdown?: {
    basePremium?: number;
    occupationSurcharge?: number;      // Based on risk class
    clausePremiums?: number;           // Motorcycle, earthquake, etc.
    netPremium?: number;
    bsmv?: number;                     // 5% insurance tax
    grossPremium?: number;
    paymentMethod?: 'Lump Sum' | 'Monthly' | 'Ticket-Based';
  };
  
  // 11. Claims Process & Requirements
  claimsInfo?: {
    notificationPeriod?: string;       // Usually within 5 days
    requiredDocuments?: string[];
    medicalBoardReport?: {
      required: boolean;
      type?: 'Kati Rapor';             // Final report from full hospital
      purpose?: string;                // "To establish permanent disability percentage"
    };
    burdenOfProof?: {
      insured?: string;                // Must prove it was an "Accident"
      insurer?: string;                // Must prove any "Exclusion" (e.g., intoxication)
    };
    subrogation?: {
      appliesTo?: string;              // "Medical Expenses only (indemnity coverage)"
      deathBenefit?: string;           // "No subrogation - sum insurance"
    };
  };
  
  // 12. Strategic Recommendations & Protection Gap
  strategicInsights?: {
    protectionGap?: {
      exists: boolean;
      issue?: string;                  // e.g., "Compulsory limits (252K TL) insufficient for disability"
      recommendation?: string;         // e.g., "Purchase voluntary policy with 2-3M TL limit"
    };
    occupationFactors?: string[];      // Reminders for high-risk professions
    buyBacksNeeded?: string[];         // Recommended clause purchases
  };
  
  // 13. Journey-Based Coverage (for Transport Insurance)
  journeyDetails?: {
    travelDuration?: string;           // "Boarding to disembarking"
    route?: string;
    departureTime?: string;
    arrivalTime?: string;
    includesBreaks?: boolean;          // Coverage continues during rest stops
  };
  
  // 14. Regulatory Compliance
  regulatoryInfo?: {
    generalConditions?: string;        // "Ferdi Kaza Sigortası Genel Şartları"
    lastRevision?: string;             // When general conditions were last updated
    article1Definition?: string;       // Legal definition of "Accident"
    article3DeemedAccidents?: string;  // Legally expanded scenarios
    article4Exclusions?: string;       // Events excluded as "Illness"
    article5Exclusions?: string;       // Absolute exclusions
    article6OptionalBuyBacks?: string; // Risks excluded by default but can be covered
  };
};

// Full Turkish Personal Accident policy type
export type TurkishPersonalAccidentPolicy = BasePolicy & {
  country: 'TR';
  insuranceLine: 'personal-accident';
  extendedData: TurkishPersonalAccidentExtendedData;
};

// Turkish Health Insurance-specific extended data structure
export type TurkishHealthExtendedData = {
  // 1. Policy Identity & Product Type
  agencyInfo?: string;
  renewalNumber?: number;
  issueDate?: string;
  
  // Product Type: CRITICAL differentiator
  productType?: 'ÖSS' | 'TSS';  // Private Health (ÖSS) vs Complementary Health (TSS)
  productName?: string;  // e.g., "TSS - Yatarak+Ayakta" or "ÖSS - VIP Plan"
  planLevel?: 'Basic' | 'Standard' | 'Premium' | 'VIP';
  
  // 2. Insured Parties
  insuredPerson?: string;  // Sigortalı
  policyholder?: string;  // Sigorta Ettiren (can be different, e.g., employer)
  idNumber?: string;
  relationshipToHolder?: 'Self' | 'Spouse' | 'Child' | 'Employee';
  
  // 3. Network Configuration (CRITICAL Premium Driver)
  networkInfo?: {
    networkType?: 'Network A+' | 'Network A' | 'Network B' | 'Network C';
    includedHospitals?: string[];  // e.g., "Acıbadem, Florence Nightingale, American Hospital"
    excludedLuxuryGroups?: string[];  // For TSS
    totalProviders?: number;
    networkGeography?: 'Nationwide' | 'Regional' | 'Major Cities Only';
  };
  
  // TSS-specific: Must have SGK
  sgkRequirement?: {
    required: boolean;
    sgkStatus?: 'Active' | 'Inactive' | 'Not Applicable';
    employerName?: string;
    sgkNumber?: string;
    coverageLogic?: string;  // "Pays difference fee above SGK payment"
  };
  
  // 4. Coverage Scope & Limits
  inpatientCoverage?: {
    enabled: boolean;
    limit: 'Unlimited' | number;
    includes?: string[];  // Surgery, ICU, Chemotherapy, Radiotherapy, Dialysis
    roomType?: 'General' | 'Semi-Private' | 'Private' | 'Suite';
  };
  
  outpatientCoverage?: {
    enabled: boolean;
    limitType: 'Usage Count' | 'Monetary';  // TSS uses count, ÖSS uses money
    usageLimit?: number;  // For TSS: e.g., 10 cases/year
    monetaryLimit?: number;  // For ÖSS: e.g., 50,000 TL/year
    usageDefinition?: string;  // "1 usage = doctor visit + all related tests"
    copayment?: number;  // Percentage (0% for TSS, 20% for ÖSS typically)
  };
  
  // 5. Specific Benefits & Add-ons
  specificBenefits?: {
    maternity?: {
      enabled: boolean;
      waitingPeriod?: number;  // Months (e.g., 12)
      normalDeliveryLimit?: number;
      cesareanLimit?: number;
      embryoTransferLimit?: number;
      statusAfterWaiting?: 'Active' | 'Still Waiting' | 'Not Purchased';
    };
    checkUp?: {
      enabled: boolean;
      annualCount?: number;  // Usually 1
      includedTests?: string[];
    };
    physicalTherapy?: {
      enabled: boolean;
      sessionLimit?: number;  // e.g., 30 sessions/year
      perSessionCopay?: number;
    };
    dentalVision?: {
      enabled: boolean;
      type?: 'Care Package' | 'Limited Treatment';
      annualLimit?: number;
      includes?: string[];  // e.g., "1 cleaning, 1 eye exam"
    };
    onlineDoctor?: {
      enabled: boolean;
      availability?: string;  // "24/7"
      impactsUsageLimit?: boolean;  // Usually false
    };
  };
  
  // 6. Waiting Periods (Critical for Understanding Coverage)
  waitingPeriods?: {
    inpatientSurgery?: {
      standardWaitingDays?: number;  // e.g., 90-365 days
      emergencyWaitingDays?: number;  // Zero for emergencies
      specificConditions?: {
        condition: string;
        waitingDays: number;
      }[];  // e.g., Hernia: 180 days, Gallbladder: 365 days
      statusForRenewals?: string;  // "Applies only in first year"
    };
    maternity?: {
      waitingMonths?: number;  // Typically 12 months
      currentMonthsWaited?: number;
      remainingMonths?: number;
    };
  };
  
  // 7. Lifetime Renewal Guarantee (The Holy Grail)
  lifetimeRenewalGuarantee?: {
    status: 'Earned' | 'In Progress' | 'Not Yet Eligible' | 'Not Available';
    yearsRequired?: number;  // 3-4 years
    yearsCurrent?: number;
    yearsRemaining?: number;
    conditions?: string[];  // e.g., "Loss ratio below 80%", "Under 60 at inception"
    benefit?: string;  // "Cannot deny renewal, exclude new illnesses, or surcharge"
  };
  
  // 8. Acquired Rights (Transfer from Previous Insurer)
  acquiredRights?: {
    transferredFromCompany?: string;
    transferDate?: string;
    waitingPeriodsWaived?: boolean;
    continuousYearsCount?: number;  // Counts towards ÖBYG
    illnessesAlreadyCovered?: string[];
  };
  
  // 9. Exclusions & Exemptions
  exclusions?: {
    preExistingConditions?: {
      applies: boolean;
      specificExclusions?: string[];  // e.g., "Diabetes diagnosed 2019-05-10"
      permanentExclusion?: boolean;
    };
    standardExclusions?: string[];  // Aesthetic, psychiatric, dental, fertility
    sgkRedArea?: {  // For TSS only
      applies: boolean;
      explanation?: string;  // "Treatments not covered by SGK are not covered"
    };
  };
  
  // 10. Premium & Financial Details
  premiumBreakdown?: {
    basePremium?: number;
    networkSurcharge?: number;  // For premium networks
    ageAdjustment?: number;
    maternityRider?: number;
    totalAnnualPremium?: number;
    paymentPlan?: 'Annual Lump Sum' | 'Monthly' | 'Quarterly';
    inflationIncrease?: {
      previousYearPremium?: number;
      increasePercentage?: number;  // 2024: 79% for TSS, 64% for ÖSS
      medicalInflationRate?: number;
    };
  };
  
  // 11. Claims Process (Provision System)
  claimsProcess?: {
    provisionSystem?: {
      enabled: boolean;
      mechanism?: string;  // "Pre-authorization via hospital desk"
      tssLogic?: string;  // "SGK approval triggers insurer approval"
      ossLogic?: string;  // "Medical team reviews for pre-existing/exclusions"
    };
    copaymentAtAdmission?: number;  // Amount paid out-of-pocket
    directSettlement?: boolean;  // Insurer pays hospital directly
    sgkSystemDependency?: {  // For TSS
      applies: boolean;
      note?: string;  // "If SGK system down, TSS won't pay"
    };
  };
  
  // 12. Regulatory Compliance (2025 Updates)
  regulatoryInfo?: {
    generalConditions?: string;  // "Sağlık Sigortası Genel Şartları"
    specialConditionsTSS?: string;  // TSS-specific tie to SGK
    waitingPeriodStandardization?: {
      compliant: boolean;
      note?: string;  // "2025 regulations standardized waiting periods"
    };
    lifetimeRenewalMandate?: {
      compliant: boolean;
      ageLimit?: number;  // Must offer to under 60
    };
  };
  
  // 13. Coverage Details & Policy Specifics
  coverageDetails?: {
    chemotherapy?: {
      covered: boolean;
      drugSupply?: string;  // For TSS: "Via SGK channels"
      administrationCosts?: string;  // "Paid by TSS"
    };
    dialysis?: {
      covered: boolean;
      frequency?: string;
    };
    intensiveCare?: {
      covered: boolean;
      limit?: 'Unlimited' | number;
    };
    emergencyCare?: {
      covered: boolean;
      waitingPeriod?: number;  // Zero for emergencies
    };
  };
  
  // 14. Strategic Insights for Consumer
  strategicInsights?: {
    productChoiceRationale?: string;  // "TSS = efficiency, ÖSS = freedom"
    coverageAdequacy?: {
      adequate: boolean;
      gaps?: string[];
      recommendations?: string[];
    };
    premiumValueAssessment?: {
      competitive: boolean;
      marketAverage?: number;
      pricePosition?: 'Budget' | 'Market Average' | 'Premium';
    };
    criticalAction?: string;  // e.g., "Secure while healthy to pass waiting periods"
  };
  
  // 15. Historical Information
  policyHistory?: {
    yearsWithCurrentInsurer?: number;
    yearsWithPreviousInsurers?: number;
    totalContinuousYears?: number;
    claimHistory?: {
      totalClaimsFiled?: number;
      totalClaimsPaid?: number;
      largestClaim?: {
        year?: number;
        amount?: number;
        condition?: string;
      };
    };
  };
  
  // 16. 2025 Market Context
  marketContext?: {
    tssGrowth?: string;  // "5.2M policies by end of 2024"
    ossStatus?: string;  // "2.3M policies, stagnant"
    inflationPressure?: string;  // "79% avg increase for TSS in 2024"
    regulatoryTightening?: string;  // "Waiting period standardization"
  };
};

// Full Turkish Health policy type
export type TurkishHealthPolicy = BasePolicy & {
  country: 'TR';
  insuranceLine: 'health';
  extendedData: TurkishHealthExtendedData;
};

// ============================================================================
// TURKISH AGRICULTURAL INSURANCE (TARSİM)
// ============================================================================

export type TurkishAgriculturalExtendedData = {
  // Policy Identity
  agencyInfo?: string;
  renewalNumber?: number;
  issueDate?: string;
  tarsimReferenceNumber?: string;
  
  // Farmer/Producer Information
  farmerName?: string;
  idNumber?: string;
  registrationNo?: string;  // Çiftçi Kayıt Sistemi No
  farmAddress?: string;
  province?: string;
  district?: string;
  village?: string;
  
  // 2025 Framework Context
  framework2025?: {
    enabled: boolean;
    strategicCropStatus?: 'Strategic' | 'Non-Strategic';  // Determines 70% support eligibility
    productionPlanningCompliance?: boolean;
    keyChanges?: string[];  // Major 2025 updates
  };
  
  // Comprehensive Policy Declaration Inventory (Table 1 from analysis)
  policyDeclaration?: {
    // For Crops
    adaParcelNo?: string;  // Cadastral location - critical for expert assessment
    plantingDate?: string;  // Determines phenological stages
    declaredYield?: number;  // Farmer's expected yield (capped by TARSİM)
    
    // For Livestock
    earTagNumbers?: string[];  // TÜRKVET mandatory IDs
    enterpriseNumber?: string;  // Barn/farm registration
    breedDetails?: string;
    ageDetails?: string;
    genderBreakdown?: string;
    
    // Coverage & Financial Details
    deductibleAndCoinsurance?: string;  // e.g., "10% Co-insurance, 8% Deductible"
  };
  
  // Insurance Branch & Type
  insuranceBranch: 'crop' | 'livestock-cattle' | 'livestock-sheep-goat' | 'poultry' | 'aquaculture' | 'bees' | 'greenhouse';
  insuranceType?: string;  // e.g., "Hail Package + Frost", "KBVS Wheat", "Wide Scope Cattle Life"
  
  // Insured Asset Details
  assetDetails?: {
    // For Crop Insurance
    crop?: {
      type?: string;  // e.g., "Wheat", "Hazelnut", "Tomato"
      variety?: string;
      parcelInfo?: Array<{
        parcelNo: string;
        village: string;
        area: number;  // decare/hectare
        plantingDate?: string;
        estimatedYield?: number;
      }>;
      totalArea?: number;  // Total insured area in decares
    };
    
    // For Livestock Insurance
    livestock?: {
      species?: string;  // "Dairy Cattle", "Sheep", "Broiler"
      count?: number;
      breed?: string;
      averageAge?: number;
      registrationSystem?: 'TÜRKVET' | 'KKKS' | 'AKS';
      earTagNumbers?: string[];
    };
    
    // For Greenhouse Insurance
    greenhouse?: {
      type?: string;  // "Glass", "Hard Plastic", "Soft Plastic"
      area?: number;  // m²
      riskCategory?: 1 | 2 | 3 | 4 | 5;
      constructionYear?: number;
      crop?: string;
    };
    
    // For Aquaculture
    aquaculture?: {
      species?: string;  // "Sea Bass", "Sea Bream", "Trout", "Tuna"
      cageCount?: number;
      totalBiomass?: number;  // kg
      location?: 'Marine' | 'Inland';
    };
  };
  
  // Coverage Structure
  coverageStructure?: {
    baseCoverage?: string;  // "Hail Package", "Wide Scope", "KBVS"
    optionalCoverages?: string[];  // ["Frost", "Rain Risk", "Wildlife Damage"]
    excludedPerils?: string[];
  };
  
  // Financial Values
  insuredValues?: {
    sumInsured?: number;  // Total sum insured
    sumInsuredPerDecare?: number;  // For crops
    sumInsuredPerHead?: number;  // For livestock
    estimatedYield?: number;
    yieldGuaranteeLevel?: number;  // % for KBVS/Income Protection
  };
  
  // Deductibles & Co-insurance
  deductibles?: {
    standard?: number | string;  // "5%", "1000 TL"
    specificPerils?: {
      [key: string]: number | string;
    };
  };
  
  coInsurance?: {
    rate?: number;  // e.g., 10, 15, 20, 25, 30
    applicableTo?: string[];  // ["Storm", "Theft", "Mastitis"]
  };
  
  // Premium Breakdown
  premiumBreakdown?: {
    grossPremium?: number;
    stateSupport?: {
      rate: number;  // e.g., 50%, 60%, 70%
      amount: number;
    };
    discounts?: Array<{
      type: string;  // "Production Planning", "Young Farmer", "Female Farmer"
      rate: number;
      amount: number;
    }>;
    farmerPayment?: number;  // Net amount farmer pays
    paymentStructure?: string;  // "25% upfront + 75% at harvest"
  };
  
  // Village-Based Yield Insurance (KBVS) Specific
  kbvsDetails?: {
    village?: string;
    referenceYield?: number;  // kg/decare
    guaranteedYield?: number;  // kg/decare (typically 70% of reference)
    triggerLevel?: number;  // %
    crop?: string;
  };
  
  // Income Protection Specific
  incomeProtection?: {
    expectedYield?: number;
    strikePrice?: number;
    expectedRevenue?: number;
    revenueFloor?: number;  // 70% of expected
  };
  
  // Production Planning Incentive
  productionPlanningCompliance?: {
    compliant?: boolean;
    discountApplied?: boolean;
    planReferenceNo?: string;
  };
  
  // Livestock-Specific
  livestockDetails?: {
    scopeType?: 'Wide Scope' | 'Narrow Scope - Dar Kapsam 1' | 'Narrow Scope - Dar Kapsam 2';
    pregnancyLossCoverage?: boolean;
    diseases?: {
      covered?: string[];
      excluded?: string[];
      optional?: string[];  // e.g., "FMD (Şap)"
    };
    waitingPeriod?: {
      days: number;
      applicableTo: string[];  // ["Blue Tongue", "FMD"]
    };
  };
  
  // Poultry-Specific
  poultryDetails?: {
    biosecurityCertified?: boolean;
    salmonellaCoverage?: boolean;
    mechanicalFailureCoverage?: boolean;
    flockType?: 'Broiler' | 'Layer' | 'Breeder';
  };
  
  // Greenhouse-Specific
  greenhouseDetails?: {
    coverMaterial?: 'Glass' | 'Hard Plastic' | 'Soft Plastic';
    stormCoverageForCategory5?: boolean;
    repairClauseActive?: boolean;
  };
  
  // Notification & Claims
  notificationRequirements?: {
    deadline?: string;  // "24 hours", "10 days", "15 days"
    method?: string[];  // ["Alo 172", "TARSİM Mobil App", "Agent"]
  };
  
  claimsHistory?: {
    claimsInLastYear?: number;
    totalClaims?: number;
    largestClaim?: {
      year: number;
      peril: string;
      amount: number;
    };
  };
  
  // Exclusions
  specificExclusions?: string[];
  
  // Regulatory Context (2025 Updates)
  regulatoryNotes?: {
    productionPlanningDiscount?: string;
    stateSupportIncrease?: string;
    newCoverages?: string[];
    marketContext?: string;
  };
};

// Full Turkish Agricultural policy type
export type TurkishAgriculturalPolicy = BasePolicy & {
  country: 'TR';
  insuranceLine: 'agricultural';
  extendedData: TurkishAgriculturalExtendedData;
};

// Registry of available insurance line components
export type InsuranceLineComponent = {
  id: string;
  country: string;
  insuranceLine: string;
  label: string;
  description: string;
  // The component will be dynamically imported
  componentPath: string;
};

// Component registry (will be expanded as we add more lines)
export const INSURANCE_LINE_REGISTRY: InsuranceLineComponent[] = [
  {
    id: 'turkish-kasko',
    country: 'TR',
    insuranceLine: 'kasko',
    label: 'Turkish Kasko Auto Insurance',
    description: 'Comprehensive auto insurance for Turkey with regulatory-specific features',
    componentPath: './TurkishKaskoDetails',
  },
  {
    id: 'turkish-traffic',
    country: 'TR',
    insuranceLine: 'traffic',
    label: 'Turkish Traffic Insurance',
    description: 'Mandatory third-party liability insurance with tariff step system',
    componentPath: './TurkishTrafficDetails',
  },
  {
    id: 'turkish-credit-life',
    country: 'TR',
    insuranceLine: 'credit-life',
    label: 'Turkish Credit-Linked Life Insurance',
    description: 'Credit-linked life insurance for loan protection with regulatory compliance',
    componentPath: './TurkishCreditLifeDetails',
  },
  {
    id: 'turkish-fire',
    country: 'TR',
    insuranceLine: 'fire',
    label: 'Turkish Fire/Housing Insurance',
    description: 'Property insurance with comprehensive coverage and DASK integration',
    componentPath: './TurkishFireDetails',
  },
  {
    id: 'turkish-personal-accident',
    country: 'TR',
    insuranceLine: 'personal-accident',
    label: 'Turkish Personal Accident Insurance',
    description: 'Personal accident insurance with detailed coverage and risk classification',
    componentPath: './TurkishPersonalAccidentDetails',
  },
  {
    id: 'turkish-health',
    country: 'TR',
    insuranceLine: 'health',
    label: 'Turkish Health Insurance',
    description: 'Health insurance with detailed coverage and network configuration',
    componentPath: './TurkishHealthDetails',
  },
  {
    id: 'turkish-agricultural',
    country: 'TR',
    insuranceLine: 'agricultural',
    label: 'Turkish Agricultural Insurance',
    description: 'Agricultural insurance with detailed coverage and regulatory compliance',
    componentPath: './TurkishAgriculturalDetails',
  },
  // Future additions:
  // {
  //   id: 'us-health',
  //   country: 'US',
  //   insuranceLine: 'health',
  //   label: 'US Health Insurance',
  //   description: 'Health insurance with ACA, network, and formulary details',
  //   componentPath: './USHealthDetails',
  // },
];

// Helper function to get the appropriate line component
export function getInsuranceLineComponent(policy: BasePolicy): InsuranceLineComponent | null {
  if (!policy.country || !policy.insuranceLine) return null;
  
  return INSURANCE_LINE_REGISTRY.find(
    (line) => line.country === policy.country && line.insuranceLine === policy.insuranceLine
  ) || null;
}
```

## File: `components (2)/InsuranceComparison.tsx`
- Bytes: 143,364
- SHA256: `35e1c5298e4b377cb9903be4cf47af5e8c1fddf28a2ccdc10fbbcaa184fa0df9`

```tsx
/**
 * INSURANCE BENCHMARKING & ANALYSIS COMPONENT
 * 
 * Purpose: This component allows users to benchmark their existing insurance policies
 * by comparing coverage, premiums, and getting AI-powered insights.
 * 
 * NOTE: This component previously included marketplace comparison features for purchasing
 * insurance. Those features have been refocused toward benchmarking existing policies.
 * The underlying comparison infrastructure is preserved and can be re-enabled for
 * marketplace functionality if needed in the future.
 * 
 * Current Focus:
 * - Upload and analyze existing policies
 * - Benchmark premiums against market rates
 * - Compare multiple policies side-by-side
 * - Identify coverage gaps and redundancies
 * - Understand policy costs and value
 */

import { useState, useEffect, useRef } from 'react';
import { 
  ArrowLeft, Shield, Filter, Star, CheckCircle, X, Sparkles, 
  TrendingDown, Award, DollarSign, Heart, Eye, Info, HelpCircle,
  ChevronDown, ChevronUp, SlidersHorizontal, ArrowUpDown, Users,
  Clock, Zap, TrendingUp, Download, Share2, Printer, Mail, Link2,
  BarChart3, PieChart, Table2, LayoutGrid, Minus, Plus, AlertCircle,
  ThumbsUp, ThumbsDown, Calculator, Target, MessageCircle, Maximize2,
  Crown, Trophy, FileText, ChevronRight, ChevronLeft, RefreshCw, Menu,
  Grid3x3, Smartphone, Upload, Loader2
} from 'lucide-react';
import { toast } from 'sonner@2.0.3';
import { ComprehensiveComparison } from './InsuranceComparisonEnhanced';

type UploadedPolicy = {
  id: string;
  fileName: string;
  provider: string;
  policyNumber: string;
  type: 'auto' | 'home' | 'life' | 'health';
  monthlyPremium: number;
  coverage: number;
  deductible: number;
  startDate: string;
  endDate: string;
  features: string[];
  logo: string;
  aiConfidence: number;
  savings?: number;
  recommendation?: 'keep' | 'switch' | 'review';
};

type InsuranceComparisonProps = {
  onBack: () => void;
  uploadedPolicies?: UploadedPolicy[];
  onPoliciesAnalyzed?: (policies: UploadedPolicy[]) => void;
};

type InsuranceType = 'all' | 'auto' | 'home' | 'life' | 'health';
type SortOption = 'recommended' | 'price-low' | 'price-high' | 'rating' | 'coverage';
type ComparisonView = 'cards' | 'table' | 'compact';

type InsurancePlan = {
  id: string;
  provider: string;
  name: string;
  type: InsuranceType;
  rating: number;
  reviews: number;
  monthlyPremium: number;
  coverage: number;
  deductible: number;
  features: string[];
  logo: string;
  popular?: boolean;
  aiBadge?: 'best-value' | 'top-rated' | 'most-coverage';
  comparingNow?: number;
  outOfPocketMax?: number;
  copay?: number;
  coinsurance?: number;
  networkSize?: string;
  claimProcessingDays?: number;
  financialStrength?: string;
};

type DecisionPriority = {
  price: number;
  coverage: number;
  rating: number;
  service: number;
};

export function InsuranceComparison({ onBack, uploadedPolicies = [], onPoliciesAnalyzed }: InsuranceComparisonProps) {
  const [selectedType, setSelectedType] = useState<InsuranceType>('all');
  const [selectedPlans, setSelectedPlans] = useState<string[]>([]);
  const [showComparison, setShowComparison] = useState(false);
  const [sortBy, setSortBy] = useState<SortOption>('recommended');
  const [priceRange, setPriceRange] = useState<[number, number]>([0, 500]);
  const [minRating, setMinRating] = useState<number>(0);
  const [showAdvancedFilters, setShowAdvancedFilters] = useState(false);
  const [expandedFeatures, setExpandedFeatures] = useState<string[]>([]);
  const [favorites, setFavorites] = useState<string[]>([]);
  const [quickViewPlan, setQuickViewPlan] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [recentlyViewed, setRecentlyViewed] = useState<string[]>([]);
  const [showTooltip, setShowTooltip] = useState<string | null>(null);
  
  // Mobile-specific states
  const [showMobileFilters, setShowMobileFilters] = useState(false);
  const [showMobileSortSheet, setShowMobileSortSheet] = useState(false);
  const [currentCardIndex, setCurrentCardIndex] = useState(0);
  const [touchStart, setTouchStart] = useState<number | null>(null);
  const [touchEnd, setTouchEnd] = useState<number | null>(null);
  const [isMobile, setIsMobile] = useState(false);
  
  // Detect mobile
  useEffect(() => {
    const checkMobile = () => {
      setIsMobile(window.innerWidth < 768);
    };
    
    checkMobile();
    window.addEventListener('resize', checkMobile);
    return () => window.removeEventListener('resize', checkMobile);
  }, []);

  // Auto-select uploaded policies for comparison and set type filter
  useEffect(() => {
    if (uploadedPolicies.length > 0) {
      const uploadedIds = uploadedPolicies.map(p => `uploaded-${p.id}`);
      setSelectedPlans(uploadedIds);
      
      // If all uploaded policies are the same type, filter to that type
      const types = uploadedPolicies.map(p => p.type);
      const allSameType = types.every(type => type === types[0]);
      if (allSameType) {
        setSelectedType(types[0] as InsuranceType);
      }
    }
  }, [uploadedPolicies]);

  // File upload state and handlers
  const [isUploading, setIsUploading] = useState(false);

  const analyzePolicy = (file: File): Promise<UploadedPolicy> => {
    return new Promise((resolve) => {
      setTimeout(() => {
        const mockPolicies: Partial<UploadedPolicy>[] = [
          {
            provider: 'Geico',
            policyNumber: 'POL-2024-8834',
            type: 'auto',
            monthlyPremium: 145,
            coverage: 250000,
            deductible: 1000,
            startDate: '2023-06-15',
            endDate: '2024-06-15',
            features: ['Liability Coverage', 'Basic Collision', 'Uninsured Motorist'],
            logo: '🚗',
            aiConfidence: 92,
            savings: 20,
            recommendation: 'switch',
          },
          {
            provider: 'Allstate',
            policyNumber: 'HM-2023-5521',
            type: 'home',
            monthlyPremium: 165,
            coverage: 300000,
            deductible: 2000,
            startDate: '2023-01-10',
            endDate: '2024-01-10',
            features: ['Dwelling Coverage', 'Personal Property', 'Basic Liability'],
            logo: '🏠',
            aiConfidence: 88,
            savings: 15,
            recommendation: 'review',
          },
          {
            provider: 'Blue Cross',
            policyNumber: 'HLT-2024-1234',
            type: 'health',
            monthlyPremium: 425,
            coverage: 1000000,
            deductible: 2000,
            startDate: '2024-01-01',
            endDate: '2024-12-31',
            features: ['PPO Network', 'Prescription Coverage', 'Emergency Care'],
            logo: '🏥',
            aiConfidence: 95,
            recommendation: 'keep',
          },
        ];

        const randomPolicy = mockPolicies[Math.floor(Math.random() * mockPolicies.length)];
        
        resolve({
          id: Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9),
          fileName: file.name,
          ...randomPolicy,
        } as UploadedPolicy);
      }, 2500);
    });
  };

  const handleFileUpload = async (files: FileList | null) => {
    if (!files || files.length === 0) return;

    const validFiles = Array.from(files).filter(file => {
      const isValidType = file.type === 'application/pdf' || file.type.startsWith('image/');
      const isValidSize = file.size <= 10 * 1024 * 1024; // 10MB

      if (!isValidType) {
        toast.error(`${file.name}: Please upload PDF or image files only`);
        return false;
      }
      if (!isValidSize) {
        toast.error(`${file.name}: File size must be less than 10MB`);
        return false;
      }
      return true;
    });

    if (validFiles.length === 0) return;

    setIsUploading(true);
    toast.success(`Uploading ${validFiles.length} ${validFiles.length === 1 ? 'file' : 'files'}...`);

    try {
      const analyzed: UploadedPolicy[] = [];
      
      for (const file of validFiles) {
        const result = await analyzePolicy(file);
        analyzed.push(result);
        toast.success(`✓ ${file.name} analyzed successfully!`);
      }

      // Call parent callback with new policies
      if (onPoliciesAnalyzed) {
        const combined = [...uploadedPolicies, ...analyzed];
        onPoliciesAnalyzed(combined);
      }
    } catch (error) {
      toast.error('Failed to analyze policies. Please try again.');
    } finally {
      setIsUploading(false);
    }
  };

  const insurancePlans: InsurancePlan[] = [
    {
      id: '1',
      provider: 'Geico',
      name: 'Complete Auto Coverage',
      type: 'auto',
      rating: 4.8,
      reviews: 12453,
      monthlyPremium: 125,
      coverage: 250000,
      deductible: 500,
      features: ['Liability Coverage', '24/7 Roadside Assistance', 'Accident Forgiveness', 'New Car Replacement', 'Glass Coverage', 'Rental Reimbursement'],
      logo: '🚗',
      popular: true,
      aiBadge: 'best-value',
      comparingNow: 247,
      outOfPocketMax: 3000,
      copay: 25,
      coinsurance: 20,
      networkSize: 'National - 50,000+ providers',
      claimProcessingDays: 3,
      financialStrength: 'A++',
    },
    {
      id: '2',

      type: 'auto',
      rating: 4.7,
      reviews: 9821,
      monthlyPremium: 118,

      deductible: 1000,
      features: ['Usage-Based Pricing', 'Pet Injury Coverage', 'Custom Parts Coverage', 'Rideshare Coverage', 'Gap Insurance', 'Loan/Lease Payoff'],
      logo: '🚗',
      comparingNow: 189,
      outOfPocketMax: 4000,
      copay: 30,
      coinsurance: 25,

      claimProcessingDays: 5,
      financialStrength: 'A+',
    },
    {
      id: '3',

      type: 'auto',
      rating: 4.9,
      reviews: 15234,
      monthlyPremium: 135,
      coverage: 500000,
      deductible: 500,
      features: ['Safe Driving Discount', 'Multi-Car Discount', 'Rental Car Coverage', 'Accident Forgiveness', 'Good Student Discount', 'Anti-Theft Discount'],
      logo: '🚗',
      aiBadge: 'top-rated',
      comparingNow: 312,
      outOfPocketMax: 2500,
      copay: 20,

      networkSize: 'National - 60,000+ providers',
      claimProcessingDays: 2,
      financialStrength: 'A++',
    },
    {
      id: '4',

    },
    {
      id: '5',

      type: 'home',
      rating: 4.5,
      reviews: 7621,
      monthlyPremium: 132,
      coverage: 400000,
      deductible: 1000,
      features: ['Water Backup Coverage', 'Identity Theft Protection', 'Replacement Cost Coverage', 'Home Systems Protection', 'Equipment Breakdown', 'Ordinance Coverage'],
      logo: '🏠',
      comparingNow: 134,

    },
    {
      id: '6',

      type: 'home',
      rating: 4.7,
      reviews: 6543,
      monthlyPremium: 128,
      coverage: 300000,
      deductible: 2000,
      features: ['Flood Coverage', 'Earthquake Protection', 'Jewelry Coverage', 'Green Home Discount', 'Inflation Protection', 'Service Line Coverage'],
      logo: '🏠',
      comparingNow: 98,
      outOfPocketMax: 6000,

      claimProcessingDays: 6,
      financialStrength: 'A',
    },
    {
      id: '7',
      provider: 'MetLife',
      name: 'Term Life Essential',
      type: 'life',
      rating: 4.8,
      reviews: 11234,
      monthlyPremium: 45,
      coverage: 500000,
      deductible: 0,
      features: ['20-Year Term', 'Convertible to Whole Life', 'Accelerated Death Benefit', 'Waiver of Premium', 'Return of Premium Option', 'Living Benefits'],
      logo: '❤️',

      aiBadge: 'best-value',

    {

      aiBadge: 'top-rated',

    },
    {
      id: '9',

      claimProcessingDays: 10,
      financialStrength: 'A+',
    },
    {
      id: '10',
      provider: 'United Healthcare',
      name: 'Comprehensive Health',
      type: 'health',
      rating: 4.7,
      reviews: 16234,
      monthlyPremium: 425,
      coverage: 2000000,
      deductible: 1000,
      features: ['PPO Network', 'Dental & Vision', 'Mental Health Coverage', 'Maternity Care', 'Chronic Disease Management', 'Wellness Programs'],
      logo: '🏥',
      popular: true,
      aiBadge: 'most-coverage',
      comparingNow: 567,
      outOfPocketMax: 6500,
      copay: 20,
      coinsurance: 15,
      networkSize: 'National - 120,000+ providers',
      claimProcessingDays: 7,
      financialStrength: 'A++',
    },
    {
      id: '11',
      provider: 'Aetna',
      name: 'Smart Health HMO',
      type: 'health',
      rating: 4.5,
      reviews: 10987,
      monthlyPremium: 298,
      coverage: 500000,
      deductible: 2500,
      features: ['HMO Network', 'Wellness Programs', 'Urgent Care Coverage', 'Generic Rx $0 Copay', 'Annual Physical', 'Lab Services'],
      logo: '🏥',
      aiBadge: 'best-value',
      comparingNow: 201,
      outOfPocketMax: 8500,
      copay: 30,
      coinsurance: 25,
      networkSize: 'Regional - 50,000+ providers',
      claimProcessingDays: 14,
      financialStrength: 'A',
    },
    {
      id: '12',
      provider: 'Travelers',
      name: 'Auto Premier',
      type: 'auto',
      rating: 4.6,
      reviews: 7234,
      monthlyPremium: 142,
      coverage: 500000,
      deductible: 750,
      features: ['Accident Forgiveness', 'New Car Replacement', 'Disappearing Deductible', 'IntelliDrive Discount', 'Bundling Discount', 'Responsible Payer Discount'],
      logo: '🚗',
      aiBadge: 'most-coverage',
      comparingNow: 178,
      outOfPocketMax: 3500,
      copay: 25,
      coinsurance: 20,
      networkSize: 'National - 48,000+ providers',
      claimProcessingDays: 4,
      financialStrength: 'A+',
    },
  ];

  // Convert uploaded policies to InsurancePlan format
  const uploadedPlansAsInsurance: InsurancePlan[] = uploadedPolicies.map(policy => ({
    id: `uploaded-${policy.id}`,
    provider: policy.provider,
    name: `${policy.policyNumber}`,
    type: policy.type as InsuranceType,
    rating: 0, // Uploaded policies don't have ratings
    reviews: 0,
    monthlyPremium: policy.monthlyPremium,
    coverage: policy.coverage,
    deductible: policy.deductible,
    features: policy.features,
    logo: policy.logo,
    popular: false,
    aiBadge: policy.recommendation === 'keep' ? 'top-rated' : undefined,
    comparingNow: 0,
    outOfPocketMax: policy.deductible * 2,
    copay: 0,
    coinsurance: 0,
    networkSize: 'Your Current Coverage',
    claimProcessingDays: 0,
    financialStrength: '',
```
