  }));

  // Combine uploaded policies with market plans
  const allPlans = [...uploadedPlansAsInsurance, ...insurancePlans];

  // Filter and sort plans
  let filteredPlans = selectedType === 'all' 
    ? allPlans 
    : allPlans.filter(plan => plan.type === selectedType);

  // Apply price filter
  filteredPlans = filteredPlans.filter(plan => 
    plan.monthlyPremium >= priceRange[0] && plan.monthlyPremium <= priceRange[1]
  );

  // Apply rating filter
  if (minRating > 0) {
    filteredPlans = filteredPlans.filter(plan => plan.rating >= minRating);
  }

  // Sort plans - but keep uploaded policies at the top
  const uploadedIds = uploadedPlansAsInsurance.map(p => p.id);
  const uploadedFiltered = filteredPlans.filter(plan => uploadedIds.includes(plan.id));
  const marketFiltered = filteredPlans.filter(plan => !uploadedIds.includes(plan.id));
  
  const sortedMarketPlans = [...marketFiltered].sort((a, b) => {
    switch (sortBy) {
      case 'price-low':
        return a.monthlyPremium - b.monthlyPremium;
      case 'price-high':
        return b.monthlyPremium - a.monthlyPremium;
      case 'rating':
        return b.rating - a.rating;
      case 'coverage':
        return b.coverage - a.coverage;
      case 'recommended':
      default:
        const aScore = (a.aiBadge ? 3 : 0) + (a.popular ? 2 : 0) + a.rating;
        const bScore = (b.aiBadge ? 3 : 0) + (b.popular ? 2 : 0) + b.rating;
        return bScore - aScore;
    }
  });
  
  // Always put uploaded policies first, then sorted market plans
  const sortedPlans = [...uploadedFiltered, ...sortedMarketPlans];

  const togglePlanSelection = (planId: string) => {
    setSelectedPlans(prev => {
      if (prev.includes(planId)) {
        toast.success('Plan removed from comparison');
        return prev.filter(id => id !== planId);
      }
      if (prev.length >= 3) {
        toast.error('Maximum 3 plans can be compared at once');
        return prev;
      }
      toast.success('Plan added to comparison');
      return [...prev, planId];
    });
  };

  const toggleFavorite = (planId: string, e: React.MouseEvent) => {
    e.stopPropagation();
    setFavorites(prev => {
      if (prev.includes(planId)) {
        toast.success('Removed from favorites');
        return prev.filter(id => id !== planId);
      }
      toast.success('Added to favorites');
      return [...prev, planId];
    });
  };

  const toggleExpandFeatures = (planId: string, e: React.MouseEvent) => {
    e.stopPropagation();
    setExpandedFeatures(prev => 
      prev.includes(planId) 
        ? prev.filter(id => id !== planId)
        : [...prev, planId]
    );
  };

  const clearAllFilters = () => {
    setSelectedType('all');
    setPriceRange([0, 500]);
    setMinRating(0);
    setSortBy('recommended');
    setShowMobileFilters(false);
    toast.success('All filters cleared');
  };

  const selectedPlanDetails = insurancePlans.filter(plan => selectedPlans.includes(plan.id));

  // Calculate value indicators
  const getValueBadge = (plan: InsurancePlan) => {
    if (sortedPlans.length === 0) return null;
    
    const avgPrice = sortedPlans.reduce((sum, p) => sum + p.monthlyPremium, 0) / sortedPlans.length;
    const avgCoverage = sortedPlans.reduce((sum, p) => sum + p.coverage, 0) / sortedPlans.length;
    
    const priceRatio = plan.monthlyPremium / avgPrice;
    const coverageRatio = plan.coverage / avgCoverage;
    
    if (priceRatio < 0.85 && coverageRatio > 0.95) {
      return { label: 'Excellent Value', color: 'green' };
    } else if (priceRatio < 1 && coverageRatio >= 1) {
      return { label: 'Good Value', color: 'blue' };
    }
    return null;
  };

  const getSavingsVsAverage = (plan: InsurancePlan) => {
    if (sortedPlans.length === 0) return null;
    const avgPrice = sortedPlans.reduce((sum, p) => sum + p.monthlyPremium, 0) / sortedPlans.length;
    const savings = avgPrice - plan.monthlyPremium;
    return savings > 5 ? Math.round(savings) : null;
  };

  const getAIBadgeInfo = (badge: string) => {
    switch (badge) {
      case 'best-value':
        return { icon: DollarSign, label: 'Competitive Premium', color: 'from-green-600 to-emerald-600' };
      case 'top-rated':
        return { icon: Award, label: 'Strong Coverage', color: 'from-yellow-500 to-orange-500' };
      case 'most-coverage':
        return { icon: Shield, label: 'Comprehensive Plan', color: 'from-blue-600 to-indigo-600' };
      default:
        return null;
    }
  };

  // Track recently viewed
  const handlePlanView = (planId: string) => {
    setRecentlyViewed(prev => {
      const updated = [planId, ...prev.filter(id => id !== planId)].slice(0, 4);
      return updated;
    });
  };

  const quickPresets = [
    { id: 'best-value', label: 'Competitive Premium', icon: DollarSign },
    { id: 'most-popular', label: 'Most Popular', icon: TrendingUp },
    { id: 'highest-rated', label: 'Strong Coverage', icon: Star },
    { id: 'budget', label: 'Budget Friendly', icon: TrendingDown },
  ];

  const applyPreset = (presetId: string) => {
    switch (presetId) {
      case 'best-value':
        setSortBy('recommended');
        break;
      case 'most-popular':
        setSortBy('recommended');
        setSelectedType('all');
        break;
      case 'highest-rated':
        setSortBy('rating');
        setMinRating(4.5);
        break;
      case 'budget':
        setSortBy('price-low');
        setPriceRange([0, 150]);
        break;
    }
    setShowMobileFilters(false);
    toast.success(`Applied ${presetId.replace('-', ' ')} filter`);
  };

  const tooltipContent = {
    coverage: "The maximum amount your insurance will pay for a covered loss.",
    deductible: "The amount you pay out-of-pocket before insurance coverage begins.",
    premium: "The monthly amount you pay to maintain your insurance coverage.",
  };

  // Mobile swipe handlers
  const handleTouchStart = (e: React.TouchEvent) => {
    setTouchEnd(null);
    setTouchStart(e.targetTouches[0].clientX);
  };

  const handleTouchMove = (e: React.TouchEvent) => {
    setTouchEnd(e.targetTouches[0].clientX);
  };

  const handleTouchEnd = () => {
    if (!touchStart || !touchEnd) return;
    
    const distance = touchStart - touchEnd;
    const isLeftSwipe = distance > 50;
    const isRightSwipe = distance < -50;
    
    if (isLeftSwipe && currentCardIndex < sortedPlans.length - 1) {
      setCurrentCardIndex(prev => prev + 1);
    }
    if (isRightSwipe && currentCardIndex > 0) {
      setCurrentCardIndex(prev => prev - 1);
    }
  };

  // Comparison helpers
  const getWinner = (attribute: keyof InsurancePlan, preferLow: boolean = false) => {
    if (selectedPlanDetails.length === 0) return null;
    const sorted = [...selectedPlanDetails].sort((a, b) => {
      const aVal = a[attribute] as number;
      const bVal = b[attribute] as number;
      return preferLow ? aVal - bVal : bVal - aVal;
    });
    return sorted[0].id;
  };

  const calculateTotalCost = (plan: InsurancePlan, years: number, claims: number) => {
    const premiumCost = plan.monthlyPremium * 12 * years;
    const deductibleCost = plan.deductible * claims;
    return premiumCost + deductibleCost;
  };

  const getProsAndCons = (plan: InsurancePlan) => {
    const pros: string[] = [];
    const cons: string[] = [];

    const lowestPrice = Math.min(...selectedPlanDetails.map(p => p.monthlyPremium));
    const highestPrice = Math.max(...selectedPlanDetails.map(p => p.monthlyPremium));
    
    if (plan.monthlyPremium === lowestPrice) {
      pros.push('Lowest monthly premium');
    } else if (plan.monthlyPremium === highestPrice) {
      cons.push('Highest monthly premium');
    }

    const highestCoverage = Math.max(...selectedPlanDetails.map(p => p.coverage));
    const lowestCoverage = Math.min(...selectedPlanDetails.map(p => p.coverage));
    
    if (plan.coverage === highestCoverage) {
      pros.push('Maximum coverage amount');
    } else if (plan.coverage === lowestCoverage) {
      cons.push('Lowest coverage amount');
    }

    const highestRating = Math.max(...selectedPlanDetails.map(p => p.rating));
    if (plan.rating === highestRating) {
      pros.push(`Highest customer rating (${plan.rating}★)`);
    }

    const lowestDeductible = Math.min(...selectedPlanDetails.map(p => p.deductible));
    const highestDeductible = Math.max(...selectedPlanDetails.map(p => p.deductible));
    
    if (plan.deductible === lowestDeductible && plan.deductible > 0) {
      pros.push('Lowest deductible');
    } else if (plan.deductible === highestDeductible && selectedPlanDetails.length > 1) {
      cons.push('Highest deductible');
    }

    if (plan.features.length >= 6) {
      pros.push(`Comprehensive coverage (${plan.features.length} features)`);
    }

    if (plan.claimProcessingDays && plan.claimProcessingDays <= 3) {
      pros.push('Fast claim processing');
    } else if (plan.claimProcessingDays && plan.claimProcessingDays >= 10) {
      cons.push('Slower claim processing');
    }

    if (plan.financialStrength === 'A++') {
      pros.push('Superior financial strength');
    }

    return { pros, cons };
  };

  const getDecisionScore = (plan: InsurancePlan) => {
    const decisionPriorities = {
      price: 40,
      coverage: 30,
      rating: 20,
      service: 10,
    };

    const maxPrice = Math.max(...selectedPlanDetails.map(p => p.monthlyPremium));
    const minPrice = Math.min(...selectedPlanDetails.map(p => p.monthlyPremium));
    const maxCoverage = Math.max(...selectedPlanDetails.map(p => p.coverage));
    const minCoverage = Math.min(...selectedPlanDetails.map(p => p.coverage));
    
    const priceScore = maxPrice === minPrice ? 100 : ((maxPrice - plan.monthlyPremium) / (maxPrice - minPrice)) * 100;
    const coverageScore = maxCoverage === minCoverage ? 100 : ((plan.coverage - minCoverage) / (maxCoverage - minCoverage)) * 100;
    const ratingScore = (plan.rating / 5) * 100;
    const serviceScore = plan.claimProcessingDays ? Math.max(0, 100 - (plan.claimProcessingDays * 5)) : 50;
    
    const totalScore = (
      (priceScore * decisionPriorities.price / 100) +
      (coverageScore * decisionPriorities.coverage / 100) +
      (ratingScore * decisionPriorities.rating / 100) +
      (serviceScore * decisionPriorities.service / 100)
    );
    
    return Math.round(totalScore);
  };

  const getAllUniqueFeatures = () => {
    const allFeatures = new Set<string>();
    selectedPlanDetails.forEach(plan => {
      plan.features.forEach(feature => allFeatures.add(feature));
    });
    return Array.from(allFeatures).sort();
  };

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gradient-to-b from-slate-50 to-white pb-20 md:pb-0">
      {/* Decorative Elements */}
      <div className="absolute top-0 right-0 w-[500px] h-[500px] bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-100/30 to-purple-100/30 rounded-full blur-3xl pointer-events-none" />
      <div className="absolute bottom-0 left-0 w-[400px] h-[400px] bg-gradient-to-tr from-indigo-100/30 to-blue-100/30 rounded-full blur-3xl pointer-events-none" />
      
      <div className="container mx-auto px-3 md:px-4 py-6 md:py-12 lg:py-16 relative">
        {/* Mobile-Optimized Hero Section */}
        <div className="text-center max-w-3xl mx-auto mb-6 md:mb-12">
          <div className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-3 md:px-4 py-1.5 md:py-2 bg-blue-50 border border-blue-100 rounded-full mb-4 md:mb-6 text-xs md:text-sm">
            <Sparkles className="text-blue-600" size={14} />
            <span className="font-medium text-blue-900">AI-Powered Benchmarking</span>
          </div>
          <h1 className="text-2xl md:text-4xl lg:text-5xl mb-3 md:mb-4 tracking-tight px-2">
            {uploadedPolicies.length > 0 ? (
              <>Benchmark <span className="bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 bg-clip-text text-transparent">your coverage</span> and costs</>
            ) : (
              <>Understand your <span className="bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 bg-clip-text text-transparent">insurance value</span></>
            )}
          </h1>
          <p className="text-base md:text-xl text-gray-600 leading-relaxed mb-4 md:mb-8 px-4">
            {uploadedPolicies.length > 0 ? (
              <>Compare your {uploadedPolicies.length === 1 ? 'policy' : 'policies'} side-by-side and see if your premiums and coverage are competitive</>
            ) : (
              <>Upload your policies to benchmark premiums, analyze coverage, and understand your insurance costs</>
            )}
          </p>

          {/* Upload Section - Only show if no policies uploaded yet */}
          {uploadedPolicies.length === 0 && (
            <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl border-2 border-dashed border-gray-300 hover:border-blue-400 transition-all p-6 md:p-8 mb-6 max-w-2xl mx-auto group">
              <div className="text-center">
                <div className="w-16 h-16 bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-100 to-indigo-100 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center mx-auto mb-4 group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform">
                  {isUploading ? (
                    <Sparkles className="text-blue-600 animate-pulse" size={28} />
                  ) : (
                    <Upload className="text-blue-600" size={28} />
                  )}
                </div>
                <h3 className="font-bold text-gray-900 mb-2">
                  {isUploading ? 'Analyzing Your Policy...' : 'Upload Your Current Policy'}
                </h3>
                <p className="text-sm text-gray-600 mb-4">
                  {isUploading 
                    ? 'AI is extracting policy details - this takes about 2-3 seconds'
                    : 'Upload your existing policies to benchmark premiums and analyze coverage gaps'
                  }
                </p>
                {!isUploading && (
                  <>
                    <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row items-center justify-center gap-3">
                      <label className="px-5 py-2.5 bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 text-white rounded-xl hover:shadow-lg hover:shadow-blue-500/30 transition-all font-semibold cursor-pointer flex items-center gap-2">
                        <Upload size={18} />
                        <span>Upload Policy PDF</span>
                        <input
                          type="file"
                          multiple
                          accept=".pdf,image/*"
                          className="hidden"
                          onChange={(e) => handleFileUpload(e.target.files)}
                        />
                      </label>
                      <span className="text-sm text-gray-500">or explore sample benchmarks below</span>
                    </div>
                    <div className="flex items-center justify-center gap-4 text-xs text-gray-500 mt-4">
                      <span className="flex items-center gap-1">
                        <FileText size={14} />
                        PDF, JPG, PNG
                      </span>
                      <span>•</span>
                      <span>Max 10MB</span>
                      <span>•</span>
                      <span className="flex items-center gap-1">
                        <Shield size={14} />
                        Secure & Private
                      </span>
                    </div>
                  </>
                )}
                {isUploading && (
                  <div className="flex items-center justify-center gap-2 mt-4">
                    <div className="w-48 bg-gray-200 rounded-full h-2">
                      <div className="bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 h-2 rounded-full animate-pulse" style={{ width: '70%' }} />
                    </div>
                  </div>
                )}
              </div>
            </div>
          )}

          {/* Uploaded Policy Banner */}
          {uploadedPolicies.length > 0 && (
            <div className="bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-100 via-indigo-100 to-purple-100 border-2 border-blue-300 rounded-2xl p-4 md:p-6 mb-6 max-w-2xl mx-auto">
              <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                <div className="w-10 h-10 bg-white rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center flex-shrink-0">
                  <Shield className="text-purple-600" size={20} />
                </div>
                <div className="flex-1 text-left">
                  <h3 className="font-bold text-gray-900 mb-1">
                    {uploadedPolicies.length === 1 ? 'Your Policy Loaded' : `${uploadedPolicies.length} Policies Loaded`}
                  </h3>
                  <p className="text-sm text-gray-700 mb-3">
                    Your {uploadedPolicies.length === 1 ? 'policy is' : 'policies are'} shown with a purple badge. Scroll down to see coverage benchmarking and cost analysis.
                  </p>
                  <label className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 bg-white text-purple-700 border-2 border-purple-300 rounded-xl hover:bg-purple-50 transition-all font-semibold cursor-pointer text-sm">
                    <Upload size={16} />
                    <span>Upload Another Policy</span>
                    <input
                      type="file"
                      multiple
                      accept=".pdf,image/*"
                      className="hidden"
                      onChange={(e) => handleFileUpload(e.target.files)}
                      disabled={isUploading}
                    />
                  </label>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          )}

          {/* Selection Progress Indicator - Mobile Optimized */}
          <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-lg p-4 md:p-6 border border-gray-100 max-w-md mx-auto">
            <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-2 md:mb-3">
              <span className="text-xs md:text-sm font-medium text-gray-700">Select up to 3 plans</span>
              <span className="text-xs md:text-sm font-bold text-blue-600">{selectedPlans.length}/3</span>
            </div>
            <div className="w-full bg-gray-100 rounded-full h-2.5 md:h-3 overflow-hidden">
              <div 
                className="bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 h-full rounded-full transition-all duration-500 ease-out"
                style={{ width: `${(selectedPlans.length / 3) * 100}%` }}
              />
            </div>
            {selectedPlans.length === 0 && (
              <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-2">Tap plans below to start comparing</p>
            )}
            {selectedPlans.length > 0 && selectedPlans.length < 3 && (
              <p className="text-xs text-blue-600 mt-2">
                {3 - selectedPlans.length} more {3 - selectedPlans.length === 1 ? 'plan' : 'plans'} to compare
              </p>
            )}
            {selectedPlans.length === 3 && (
              <p className="text-xs text-green-600 mt-2 flex items-center justify-center gap-1">
                <CheckCircle size={14} />
                Ready! Tap "Compare" above
              </p>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Mobile Filter/Sort Bar */}
        <div className="sticky top-[57px] md:relative md:top-0 bg-white/95 backdrop-blur-xl border-y border-gray-100 -mx-3 md:mx-0 px-3 md:px-0 py-3 md:py-0 z-10 md:bg-transparent md:border-0 md:backdrop-blur-none mb-4 md:mb-8">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2 overflow-x-auto pb-2 md:pb-0 scrollbar-hide">
            {/* Mobile Filter Button */}
            <button
              onClick={() => setShowMobileFilters(true)}
              className="flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 bg-white md:bg-gray-100 border border-gray-200 md:border-0 rounded-xl hover:bg-gray-100 transition-all text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 flex-shrink-0 shadow-sm md:shadow-none"
            >
              <Filter size={16} />
              <span>Filters</span>
              {(selectedType !== 'all' || minRating > 0 || priceRange[0] > 0 || priceRange[1] < 500) && (
                <span className="w-2 h-2 bg-blue-600 rounded-full" />
              )}
            </button>

            {/* Mobile Sort Button */}
            <button
              onClick={() => setShowMobileSortSheet(true)}
              className="flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 bg-white md:bg-gray-100 border border-gray-200 md:border-0 rounded-xl hover:bg-gray-100 transition-all text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 flex-shrink-0 shadow-sm md:shadow-none"
            >
              <ArrowUpDown size={16} />
              <span className="hidden sm:inline">Sort:</span>
              <span className="capitalize">{sortBy.replace('-', ' ')}</span>
            </button>

            {/* Quick Preset Chips - Horizontal Scroll on Mobile */}
            <div className="flex gap-2 md:hidden">
              {quickPresets.map(preset => {
                const Icon = preset.icon;
                return (
                  <button
                    key={preset.id}
                    onClick={() => applyPreset(preset.id)}
                    className="flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-2 bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-xl hover:border-blue-300 hover:bg-blue-50 transition-all text-xs font-medium text-gray-700 hover:text-blue-700 flex-shrink-0 shadow-sm"
                  >
                    <Icon size={14} />
                    <span className="whitespace-nowrap">{preset.label}</span>
                  </button>
                );
              })}
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Desktop Quick Presets */}
        <div className="hidden md:flex flex-wrap gap-3 justify-center mb-8">
          {quickPresets.map(preset => {
            const Icon = preset.icon;
            return (
              <button
                key={preset.id}
                onClick={() => applyPreset(preset.id)}
                className="flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-xl hover:border-blue-300 hover:bg-blue-50 transition-all text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 hover:text-blue-700 shadow-sm"
              >
                <Icon size={16} />
                {preset.label}
              </button>
            );
          })}
        </div>

        {/* Plans Display - Mobile: Swipeable Cards, Desktop: Grid */}
        {isMobile ? (
          // MOBILE: Swipeable Card View
          <div className="relative mb-16">
            <div className="overflow-hidden">
              <div 
                className="flex transition-transform duration-300 ease-out"
                style={{ transform: `translateX(-${currentCardIndex * 100}%)` }}
                onTouchStart={handleTouchStart}
                onTouchMove={handleTouchMove}
                onTouchEnd={handleTouchEnd}
              >
                {sortedPlans.map((plan, planIndex) => {
                  const isSelected = selectedPlans.includes(plan.id);
                  const isFavorite = favorites.includes(plan.id);
                  const isExpanded = expandedFeatures.includes(plan.id);
                  const canSelect = selectedPlans.length < 3 || isSelected;
                  const valueBadge = getValueBadge(plan);
                  const savings = getSavingsVsAverage(plan);
                  const aiBadgeInfo = plan.aiBadge ? getAIBadgeInfo(plan.aiBadge) : null;
                  
                  return (
                    <div
                      key={plan.id}
                      className="w-full flex-shrink-0 px-2"
                    >
                      <div
                        className={`
                          relative bg-white rounded-3xl transition-all duration-300 overflow-hidden mx-auto max-w-md
                          ${isSelected 
                            ? 'shadow-2xl border-2 border-blue-600' 
                            : 'shadow-xl border-2 border-gray-100'
                          }
                        `}
                      >
                        {/* Badges Container */}
                        <div className="absolute top-3 right-3 z-10 flex flex-col gap-2 items-end">
                          {plan.id.startsWith('uploaded-') && (
                            <div className="px-2.5 py-1 bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 via-indigo-600 to-purple-600 text-white text-xs rounded-full font-semibold shadow-lg flex items-center gap-1">
                              <Shield size={10} />
                              Your Policy
                            </div>
                          )}
                          {plan.popular && !plan.id.startsWith('uploaded-') && (
                            <div className="px-2.5 py-1 bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 text-white text-xs rounded-full font-semibold shadow-lg">
                              Popular
                            </div>
                          )}
                          {valueBadge && (
                            <div className={`px-2.5 py-1 bg-gradient-to-r ${
                              valueBadge.color === 'green' ? 'from-green-600 to-emerald-600' : 'from-blue-600 to-cyan-600'
                            } text-white text-xs rounded-full font-semibold shadow-lg`}>
                              {valueBadge.label}
                            </div>
                          )}
                        </div>

                        {/* AI Badge & Selected */}
                        <div className="absolute top-3 left-3 z-10 flex flex-col gap-2">
                          {aiBadgeInfo && (
                            <div className={`flex items-center gap-1.5 px-2.5 py-1 bg-gradient-to-r ${aiBadgeInfo.color} text-white text-xs rounded-full font-semibold shadow-lg`}>
                              <aiBadgeInfo.icon size={10} />
                              {aiBadgeInfo.label}
                            </div>
                          )}
                          {isSelected && (
                            <div className="w-7 h-7 bg-gradient-to-br from-green-500 to-emerald-500 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shadow-lg">
                              <CheckCircle className="text-white" size={16} />
                            </div>
                          )}
                        </div>

                        {/* Favorite Heart */}
                        <button
                          onClick={(e) => toggleFavorite(plan.id, e)}
                          className="absolute top-3 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 z-10 w-9 h-9 bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shadow-lg active:scale-95 transition-transform"
                        >
                          <Heart 
                            size={18} 
                            className={isFavorite ? 'text-red-500 fill-red-500' : 'text-gray-400'} 
                          />
                        </button>

                        {/* Card Header */}
                        <div className="bg-gradient-to-br from-gray-50 to-white p-5 border-b border-gray-100 pt-16">
                          <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-3">
                            <div className="w-12 h-12 bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center text-2xl shadow-sm">
                              {plan.logo}
                            </div>
                            <div className="flex-1">
                              <h3 className="font-semibold text-base text-gray-900">{plan.provider}</h3>
                              <p className="text-xs text-gray-600">{plan.name}</p>
                            </div>
                          </div>
                          
                          <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                            <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
                              <Star className="text-yellow-500 fill-yellow-500" size={14} />
                              <span className="font-semibold text-sm text-gray-900">{plan.rating}</span>
                              <span className="text-xs text-gray-500">({plan.reviews.toLocaleString()})</span>
                            </div>
                            {plan.comparingNow && (
                              <div className="flex items-center gap-1 text-xs text-gray-500">
                                <Users size={10} />
                                <span>{plan.comparingNow}</span>
                              </div>
                            )}
                          </div>
                        </div>

                        {/* Card Body */}
                        <div className="p-5">
                          {/* Pricing */}
                          <div className="mb-5">
                            <div className="flex items-baseline gap-1 mb-1">
                              <span className="text-4xl font-bold text-gray-900">${plan.monthlyPremium}</span>
                              <span className="text-gray-500 text-sm">/month</span>
                            </div>
                            <div className="text-sm text-gray-600">${(plan.monthlyPremium * 12).toLocaleString()}/year</div>
                            {savings && (
                              <div className="mt-2 inline-block px-2.5 py-1 bg-green-50 border border-green-200 text-green-700 text-xs rounded-full font-semibold">
                                Save ${savings}/mo
                              </div>
                            )}
                          </div>

                          {/* Coverage Details */}
                          <div className="space-y-2.5 mb-5">
                            <div>
                              <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-1.5">
                                <span className="text-xs font-medium text-gray-700">Coverage</span>
                                <span className="font-semibold text-sm text-gray-900">${(plan.coverage / 1000).toFixed(0)}K</span>
                              </div>
                              <div className="w-full bg-gray-100 rounded-full h-1.5">
                                <div 
                                  className="bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 h-full rounded-full transition-all"
                                  style={{ width: `${Math.min((plan.coverage / 2000000) * 100, 100)}%` }}
                                />
                              </div>
                            </div>

                            <div className="flex justify-between items-center p-3 bg-gray-50 border border-gray-100 rounded-xl">
                              <span className="text-xs font-medium text-gray-700">Deductible</span>
                              <span className="font-semibold text-sm text-gray-900">${plan.deductible.toLocaleString()}</span>
                            </div>
                          </div>

                          {/* Features */}
                          <div className="mb-5">
                            <div className="text-xs font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-2.5">Key Features</div>
                            <ul className="space-y-2">
                              {plan.features.slice(0, isExpanded ? undefined : 3).map((feature, idx) => (
                                <li key={idx} className="flex items-start gap-1.5 text-xs text-gray-700">
                                  <div className="w-4 h-4 bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5">
                                    <CheckCircle className="text-white" size={10} />
                                  </div>
                                  <span>{feature}</span>
                                </li>
                              ))}
                            </ul>
                            {plan.features.length > 3 && (
                              <button
                                onClick={(e) => toggleExpandFeatures(plan.id, e)}
                                className="mt-2.5 text-xs text-blue-600 hover:text-blue-700 font-medium flex items-center gap-1"
                              >
                                {isExpanded ? (
                                  <>
                                    <ChevronUp size={14} />
                                    Show less
                                  </>
                                ) : (
                                  <>
                                    <ChevronDown size={14} />
                                    +{plan.features.length - 3} more
                                  </>
                                )}
                              </button>
                            )}
                          </div>

                          {/* Action Buttons */}
                          <div className="flex gap-2">
                            <button
                              onClick={(e) => {
                                e.stopPropagation();
                                if (canSelect) {
                                  togglePlanSelection(plan.id);
                                  handlePlanView(plan.id);
                                }
                              }}
                              disabled={!canSelect}
                              className={`
                                flex-1 py-3.5 rounded-xl font-semibold transition-all text-sm active:scale-95
                                ${isSelected
                                  ? 'bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 text-white shadow-lg'
                                  : canSelect
                                    ? 'bg-gray-900 text-white hover:bg-gray-800 shadow-lg'
                                    : 'bg-gray-200 text-gray-400 cursor-not-allowed'
                                }
                              `}
                            >
                              {isSelected ? (
                                <span className="flex items-center justify-center gap-1.5">
                                  <CheckCircle size={16} />
                                  Selected
                                </span>
                              ) : canSelect ? (
                                'Select to Compare'
                              ) : (
                                'Limit Reached'
                              )}
                            </button>
                            <button
                              onClick={(e) => {
                                e.stopPropagation();
                                setQuickViewPlan(plan.id);
                                handlePlanView(plan.id);
                              }}
                              className="px-4 py-3.5 bg-gray-100 hover:bg-gray-200 active:bg-gray-300 rounded-xl transition-colors active:scale-95"
                            >
                              <Eye size={18} className="text-gray-700" />
                            </button>
                          </div>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  );
                })}
              </div>
            </div>

            {/* Mobile Card Navigation */}
            <div className="flex items-center justify-center gap-4 mt-6">
              <button
                onClick={() => setCurrentCardIndex(prev => Math.max(0, prev - 1))}
                disabled={currentCardIndex === 0}
                className={`p-3 rounded-full transition-all active:scale-95 ${
                  currentCardIndex === 0
                    ? 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-300 cursor-not-allowed'
                    : 'bg-white border-2 border-gray-200 text-gray-700 shadow-lg active:shadow-md'
                }`}
              >
                <ChevronLeft size={20} />
              </button>

              <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
                {sortedPlans.map((_, idx) => (
                  <button
                    key={idx}
                    onClick={() => setCurrentCardIndex(idx)}
                    className={`transition-all ${
                      idx === currentCardIndex
                        ? 'w-8 h-2 bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 rounded-full'
                        : 'w-2 h-2 bg-gray-300 rounded-full'
                    }`}
                  />
                ))}
              </div>

              <button
                onClick={() => setCurrentCardIndex(prev => Math.min(sortedPlans.length - 1, prev + 1))}
                disabled={currentCardIndex === sortedPlans.length - 1}
                className={`p-3 rounded-full transition-all active:scale-95 ${
                  currentCardIndex === sortedPlans.length - 1
                    ? 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-300 cursor-not-allowed'
                    : 'bg-white border-2 border-gray-200 text-gray-700 shadow-lg active:shadow-md'
                }`}
              >
                <ChevronRight size={20} />
              </button>
            </div>

            <div className="text-center mt-4 text-sm text-gray-500">
              {currentCardIndex + 1} of {sortedPlans.length} plans
              <div className="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-1">Swipe left/right to browse</div>
            </div>
          </div>
        ) : (
          // DESKTOP: Grid View
          <div className="grid md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-8 max-w-7xl mx-auto">
            {sortedPlans.map((plan, index) => {
              const isSelected = selectedPlans.includes(plan.id);
              const isFavorite = favorites.includes(plan.id);
              const isExpanded = expandedFeatures.includes(plan.id);
              const canSelect = selectedPlans.length < 3 || isSelected;
              const valueBadge = getValueBadge(plan);
              const savings = getSavingsVsAverage(plan);
              const aiBadgeInfo = plan.aiBadge ? getAIBadgeInfo(plan.aiBadge) : null;
              
              return (
                <div
                  id={`plan-${plan.id}`}
                  key={plan.id}
                  className={`
                    group relative bg-white rounded-3xl transition-all duration-300 overflow-hidden
                    ${isSelected 
                      ? 'shadow-2xl border-2 border-blue-600 scale-[1.02]' 
                      : canSelect
                        ? 'shadow-lg hover:shadow-2xl border border-gray-100 hover:-translate-y-1 cursor-pointer'
                        : 'shadow-lg border border-gray-100 opacity-60 cursor-not-allowed'
                    }
                  `}
                  onClick={() => {
                    if (canSelect) {
                      togglePlanSelection(plan.id);
                      handlePlanView(plan.id);
                    }
                  }}
                >
                  {/* Badges Container */}
                  <div className="absolute top-4 right-4 z-10 flex flex-col gap-2 items-end">
                    {plan.id.startsWith('uploaded-') && (
                      <div className="px-3 py-1.5 bg-gradient-to-r from-purple-600 to-pink-600 text-white text-xs rounded-full font-semibold shadow-lg flex items-center gap-1.5">
                        <Shield size={12} />
                        Your Current Policy
                      </div>
                    )}
                    {plan.popular && !plan.id.startsWith('uploaded-') && (
                      <div className="px-3 py-1 bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 text-white text-xs rounded-full font-semibold shadow-lg">
                        Popular
                      </div>
                    )}
                    {valueBadge && (
                      <div className={`px-3 py-1 bg-gradient-to-r ${
                        valueBadge.color === 'green' ? 'from-green-600 to-emerald-600' : 'from-blue-600 to-cyan-600'
                      } text-white text-xs rounded-full font-semibold shadow-lg`}>
                        {valueBadge.label}
                      </div>
                    )}
                  </div>

                  {/* AI Badge & Selected/Favorite Indicators */}
                  <div className="absolute top-4 left-4 z-10 flex flex-col gap-2">
                    {aiBadgeInfo && (
                      <div className={`flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1.5 bg-gradient-to-r ${aiBadgeInfo.color} text-white text-xs rounded-full font-semibold shadow-lg`}>
                        <aiBadgeInfo.icon size={12} />
                        {aiBadgeInfo.label}
                      </div>
                    )}
                    {isSelected && (
                      <div className="w-8 h-8 bg-gradient-to-br from-green-500 to-emerald-500 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shadow-lg animate-in zoom-in duration-200">
                        <CheckCircle className="text-white" size={18} />
                      </div>
                    )}
                  </div>

                  {/* Favorite Heart */}
                  <button
                    onClick={(e) => toggleFavorite(plan.id, e)}
                    className="absolute top-4 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 z-10 w-8 h-8 bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shadow-lg hover:scale-110 transition-transform"
                  >
                    <Heart 
                      size={16} 
                      className={isFavorite ? 'text-red-500 fill-red-500' : 'text-gray-400'} 
                    />
                  </button>

                  {/* Savings Badge */}
                  {savings && (
                    <div className="absolute bottom-4 right-4 z-10">
                      <div className="px-3 py-1.5 bg-green-50 border border-green-200 text-green-700 text-xs rounded-full font-semibold shadow-sm">
                        Save ${savings}/mo
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  )}

                  {/* Card Header */}
                  <div className="bg-gradient-to-br from-gray-50 to-white p-6 border-b border-gray-100">
                    <div className="flex items-start gap-4 mb-4">
                      <div className="w-14 h-14 bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center text-2xl shadow-sm">
                        {plan.logo}
                      </div>
                      <div className="flex-1">
                        <h3 className="font-semibold text-lg text-gray-900 mb-1">{plan.provider}</h3>
                        <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">{plan.name}</p>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                    <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                        <Star className="text-yellow-500 fill-yellow-500" size={16} />
                        <span className="font-semibold text-gray-900">{plan.rating}</span>
                        <span className="text-sm text-gray-500">({plan.reviews.toLocaleString()})</span>
                      </div>
                      {plan.comparingNow && (
                        <div className="flex items-center gap-1 text-xs text-gray-500">
                          <Users size={12} />
                          <span>{plan.comparingNow} comparing</span>
                        </div>
                      )}
                    </div>
                  </div>

                  {/* Card Body */}
                  <div className="p-6">
                    {/* Pricing - More Prominent */}
                    <div className="mb-6">
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-1 mb-1">
                        <div className="flex items-baseline gap-1">
                          <span className="text-5xl font-bold text-gray-900">${plan.monthlyPremium}</span>
                          <span className="text-gray-500">/month</span>
                        </div>
                        <button
                          onMouseEnter={() => setShowTooltip('premium-' + plan.id)}
                          onMouseLeave={() => setShowTooltip(null)}
                          className="ml-1 text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-600"
                        >
                          <HelpCircle size={16} />
                        </button>
                      </div>
                      {showTooltip === 'premium-' + plan.id && (
                        <div className="absolute z-20 bg-gray-900 text-white text-xs rounded-lg p-2 mt-1 max-w-xs">
                          {tooltipContent.premium}
                        </div>
                      )}
                      <div className="text-sm text-gray-600">${(plan.monthlyPremium * 12).toLocaleString()}/year</div>
                    </div>

                    {/* Coverage Details with Visual Bars */}
                    <div className="space-y-3 mb-6">
                      <div>
                        <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-2">
                          <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
                            <span className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-700">Coverage</span>
                            <button
                              onMouseEnter={() => setShowTooltip('coverage-' + plan.id)}
                              onMouseLeave={() => setShowTooltip(null)}
                              className="text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-600"
                            >
                              <HelpCircle size={14} />
                            </button>
                          </div>
                          <span className="font-semibold text-gray-900">${(plan.coverage / 1000).toFixed(0)}K</span>
                        </div>
                        {showTooltip === 'coverage-' + plan.id && (
                          <div className="absolute z-20 bg-gray-900 text-white text-xs rounded-lg p-2 mt-1 max-w-xs">
                            {tooltipContent.coverage}
                          </div>
                        )}
                        <div className="w-full bg-gray-100 rounded-full h-2">
                          <div 
                            className="bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 h-full rounded-full transition-all"
                            style={{ width: `${Math.min((plan.coverage / 2000000) * 100, 100)}%` }}
                          />
                        </div>
                      </div>

                      <div className="flex justify-between items-center p-3.5 bg-gray-50 border border-gray-100 rounded-xl">
                        <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
                          <span className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-700">Deductible</span>
                          <button
                            onMouseEnter={() => setShowTooltip('deductible-' + plan.id)}
                            onMouseLeave={() => setShowTooltip(null)}
                            className="text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-600"
                          >
                            <HelpCircle size={14} />
                          </button>
                        </div>
                        <span className="font-semibold text-gray-900">${plan.deductible.toLocaleString()}</span>
                      </div>
                      {showTooltip === 'deductible-' + plan.id && (
                        <div className="absolute z-20 bg-gray-900 text-white text-xs rounded-lg p-2 mt-1 max-w-xs">
                          {tooltipContent.deductible}
                        </div>
                      )}
                    </div>

                    {/* Features with Expand/Collapse */}
                    <div className="mb-6">
                      <div className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-3">Key Features</div>
                      <ul className="space-y-2.5">
                        {plan.features.slice(0, isExpanded ? undefined : 3).map((feature, idx) => (
                          <li key={idx} className="flex items-start gap-2 text-sm text-gray-700">
                            <div className="w-5 h-5 bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5">
                              <CheckCircle className="text-white" size={12} />
                            </div>
                            <span>{feature}</span>
                          </li>
                        ))}
                      </ul>
                      {plan.features.length > 3 && (
                        <button
                          onClick={(e) => toggleExpandFeatures(plan.id, e)}
                          className="mt-3 text-sm text-blue-600 hover:text-blue-700 font-medium flex items-center gap-1"
                        >
                          {isExpanded ? (
                            <>
                              <ChevronUp size={16} />
                              Show less
                            </>
                          ) : (
                            <>
                              <ChevronDown size={16} />
                              +{plan.features.length - 3} more features
                            </>
                          )}
                        </button>
                      )}
                    </div>

                    {/* Action Buttons */}
                    <div className="flex gap-2">
                      <button
                        onClick={(e) => {
                          e.stopPropagation();
                          if (canSelect) {
                            togglePlanSelection(plan.id);
                            handlePlanView(plan.id);
                          }
                        }}
                        disabled={!canSelect}
                        className={`
                          flex-1 py-3 rounded-xl font-semibold transition-all
                          ${isSelected
                            ? 'bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 text-white shadow-lg shadow-blue-500/20 hover:shadow-xl'
                            : canSelect
                              ? 'bg-gray-900 text-white hover:bg-gray-800 shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl'
                              : 'bg-gray-200 text-gray-400 cursor-not-allowed'
                          }
                        `}
                      >
                        {isSelected ? (
                          <span className="flex items-center justify-center gap-2">
                            <CheckCircle size={18} />
                            Selected
                          </span>
                        ) : canSelect ? (
                          'Select to Compare'
                        ) : (
                          'Limit Reached'
                        )}
                      </button>
                      <button
                        onClick={(e) => {
                          e.stopPropagation();
                          setQuickViewPlan(plan.id);
                          handlePlanView(plan.id);
                        }}
                        className="px-4 py-3 bg-gray-100 hover:bg-gray-200 rounded-xl transition-colors"
                        title="Quick View"
                      >
                        <Eye size={18} className="text-gray-700" />
                      </button>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              );
            })}
          </div>
        )}

        {/* Empty State */}
        {sortedPlans.length === 0 && (
          <div className="text-center py-12 md:py-20">
            <div className="w-16 h-16 md:w-20 md:h-20 bg-gray-100 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mx-auto mb-4">
              <Filter className="text-gray-400" size={24} />
            </div>
            <h3 className="text-lg md:text-xl font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-2">No plans found</h3>
            <p className="text-sm md:text-base text-gray-600 mb-4">Try adjusting your filters to see more options</p>
            <button
              onClick={clearAllFilters}
              className="px-6 py-3 bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 text-white rounded-xl hover:shadow-lg transition-all font-medium text-sm md:text-base"
            >
              Clear All Filters
            </button>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>

      {/* Mobile Bottom Sheet: Filters */}
      {showMobileFilters && (
        <div 
          className="fixed inset-0 bg-black/50 z-50 md:hidden"
          onClick={() => setShowMobileFilters(false)}
        >
          <div 
            className="absolute bottom-0 left-0 right-0 bg-white rounded-t-3xl max-h-[85vh] overflow-y-auto"
            onClick={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}
          >
            {/* Handle */}
            <div className="flex justify-center pt-3 pb-2">
              <div className="w-12 h-1.5 bg-gray-300 rounded-full" />
            </div>

            <div className="p-6">
              <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-6">
                <h3 className="text-xl font-bold text-gray-900">Filters</h3>
                <button
                  onClick={() => setShowMobileFilters(false)}
                  className="p-2 hover:bg-gray-100 rounded-xl transition-colors"
                >
                  <X size={20} />
                </button>
              </div>

              {/* Type Filters */}
              <div className="mb-6">
                <h4 className="font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-3">Insurance Type</h4>
                <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
                  {[
                    { value: 'all', label: 'All', icon: '📋' },
                    { value: 'auto', label: 'Auto', icon: '🚗' },
                    { value: 'home', label: 'Home', icon: '🏠' },
                    { value: 'life', label: 'Life', icon: '❤️' },
                    { value: 'health', label: 'Health', icon: '🏥' },
                  ].map((type) => (
                    <button
                      key={type.value}
                      onClick={() => setSelectedType(type.value as InsuranceType)}
                      className={`
                        flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2.5 rounded-xl transition-all font-medium text-sm
                        ${selectedType === type.value
                          ? 'bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 text-white shadow-lg'
                          : 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-700 active:bg-gray-200'
                        }
                      `}
                    >
                      <span>{type.icon}</span>
                      <span>{type.label}</span>
                    </button>
                  ))}
                </div>
              </div>

              {/* Price Range */}
              <div className="mb-6">
                <h4 className="font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-3">Price Range</h4>
                <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-3">
                  <input
                    type="number"
                    value={priceRange[0]}
                    onChange={(e) => setPriceRange([Number(e.target.value), priceRange[1]])}
                    className="flex-1 px-4 py-3 border border-gray-200 rounded-xl text-sm"
                    placeholder="Min"
                  />
                  <span className="text-gray-400">to</span>
                  <input
                    type="number"
                    value={priceRange[1]}
                    onChange={(e) => setPriceRange([priceRange[0], Number(e.target.value)])}
                    className="flex-1 px-4 py-3 border border-gray-200 rounded-xl text-sm"
                    placeholder="Max"
                  />
                </div>
                <div className="flex gap-2">
                  <button onClick={() => setPriceRange([0, 100])} className="flex-1 px-3 py-2 text-xs bg-gray-100 active:bg-gray-200 rounded-lg">$0-$100</button>
                  <button onClick={() => setPriceRange([100, 200])} className="flex-1 px-3 py-2 text-xs bg-gray-100 active:bg-gray-200 rounded-lg">$100-$200</button>
                  <button onClick={() => setPriceRange([200, 400])} className="flex-1 px-3 py-2 text-xs bg-gray-100 active:bg-gray-200 rounded-lg">$200-$400</button>
                  <button onClick={() => setPriceRange([0, 500])} className="flex-1 px-3 py-2 text-xs bg-gray-100 active:bg-gray-200 rounded-lg">Any</button>
                </div>
              </div>

              {/* Minimum Rating */}
              <div className="mb-8">
                <h4 className="font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-3">Minimum Rating</h4>
                <div className="grid grid-cols-4 gap-2">
                  {[0, 3.5, 4.0, 4.5].map(rating => (
                    <button
                      key={rating}
                      onClick={() => setMinRating(rating)}
                      className={`flex items-center justify-center gap-1 px-4 py-3 rounded-xl text-sm font-medium transition-all ${
                        minRating === rating
                          ? 'bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 text-white shadow-lg'
                          : 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-700 active:bg-gray-200'
                      }`}
                    >
                      {rating > 0 ? (
                        <>
                          <Star size={14} className="fill-current" />
                          {rating}+
                        </>
                      ) : (
                        'Any'
                      )}
                    </button>
                  ))}
                </div>
              </div>

              {/* Action Buttons */}
              <div className="flex gap-3 pb-safe">
                <button
                  onClick={clearAllFilters}
                  className="flex-1 py-3.5 bg-gray-100 text-gray-700 rounded-xl font-semibold active:bg-gray-200"
                >
                  Clear All
                </button>
                <button
                  onClick={() => setShowMobileFilters(false)}
                  className="flex-1 py-3.5 bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 text-white rounded-xl font-semibold active:scale-95 transition-transform"
                >
                  Show {sortedPlans.length} Plans
                </button>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Mobile Bottom Sheet: Sort */}
      {showMobileSortSheet && (
        <div 
          className="fixed inset-0 bg-black/50 z-50 md:hidden"
          onClick={() => setShowMobileSortSheet(false)}
        >
          <div 
            className="absolute bottom-0 left-0 right-0 bg-white rounded-t-3xl"
            onClick={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}
          >
            {/* Handle */}
            <div className="flex justify-center pt-3 pb-2">
              <div className="w-12 h-1.5 bg-gray-300 rounded-full" />
            </div>

            <div className="p-6 pb-safe">
              <h3 className="text-xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-4">Sort By</h3>
              
              <div className="space-y-2">
                {[
                  { value: 'recommended', label: 'Recommended', icon: Sparkles },
                  { value: 'price-low', label: 'Price: Low to High', icon: TrendingDown },
                  { value: 'price-high', label: 'Price: High to Low', icon: TrendingUp },
                  { value: 'rating', label: 'Highest Rated', icon: Star },
                  { value: 'coverage', label: 'Highest Coverage', icon: Shield },
                ].map((option) => {
                  const Icon = option.icon;
                  return (
                    <button
                      key={option.value}
                      onClick={() => {
                        setSortBy(option.value as SortOption);
                        setShowMobileSortSheet(false);
                      }}
                      className={`
                        w-full flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-4 rounded-xl transition-all
                        ${sortBy === option.value
                          ? 'bg-blue-50 border-2 border-blue-600'
                          : 'bg-white border border-gray-200 active:bg-gray-50'
                        }
                      `}
                    >
                      <Icon size={20} className={sortBy === option.value ? 'text-blue-600' : 'text-gray-600'} />
                      <span className={`flex-1 text-left font-medium ${sortBy === option.value ? 'text-blue-900' : 'text-gray-700'}`}>
                        {option.label}
                      </span>
                      {sortBy === option.value && (
                        <CheckCircle size={20} className="text-blue-600" />
                      )}
                    </button>
                  );
                })}
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Floating Compare Bar - Mobile Optimized */}
      {selectedPlans.length > 0 && !showComparison && (
        <div className="fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 bg-white/95 backdrop-blur-xl border-t border-gray-200 shadow-2xl z-30 pb-safe">
          <div className="container mx-auto px-3 md:px-4 py-3 md:py-4">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2 md:gap-4 overflow-x-auto">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2 min-w-fit">
                <div className="w-9 h-9 md:w-10 md:h-10 bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center">
                  <Sparkles className="text-white" size={16} />
                </div>
                <div className="hidden sm:block">
                  <div className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-900">
                    {selectedPlans.length} plan{selectedPlans.length > 1 ? 's' : ''} selected
                  </div>
                  <div className="text-xs text-gray-600">
                    {selectedPlans.length < 3 ? `Add ${3 - selectedPlans.length} more` : 'Ready to compare'}
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>

              {/* Selected Plans Mini Cards */}
              <div className="flex gap-2 flex-1 overflow-x-auto scrollbar-hide">
                {selectedPlanDetails.map(plan => (
                  <div
                    key={plan.id}
                    className="flex items-center gap-2 px-2.5 md:px-3 py-2 bg-blue-50 border border-blue-200 rounded-xl min-w-fit"
                  >
                    <span className="text-lg md:text-xl">{plan.logo}</span>
                    <div className="hidden sm:block">
                      <div className="text-xs font-semibold text-gray-900">{plan.provider}</div>
                      <div className="text-xs text-gray-600">${plan.monthlyPremium}/mo</div>
                    </div>
                    <button
                      onClick={() => togglePlanSelection(plan.id)}
                      className="ml-1 p-1 hover:bg-blue-100 active:bg-blue-200 rounded-lg transition-colors"
                    >
                      <X size={12} className="text-gray-600" />
                    </button>
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>

              {/* Compare Button */}
              <button
                onClick={() => setShowComparison(true)}
                className="px-4 md:px-8 py-2.5 md:py-3 bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 text-white rounded-xl hover:shadow-lg active:scale-95 transition-all font-semibold min-w-fit text-sm md:text-base whitespace-nowrap"
              >
                Compare
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Quick View Modal - Mobile Optimized */}
      {quickViewPlan && (
        <div 
          className="fixed inset-0 bg-slate-900/40 backdrop-blur-sm z-50 flex items-end md:items-center justify-center p-0 md:p-4"
          onClick={() => setQuickViewPlan(null)}
        >
          <div 
            className="bg-white rounded-t-3xl md:rounded-3xl max-w-2xl w-full shadow-2xl border border-gray-100 max-h-[90vh] md:max-h-[85vh] overflow-y-auto"
            onClick={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}
          >
            {(() => {
              const plan = insurancePlans.find(p => p.id === quickViewPlan);
              if (!plan) return null;
              
              return (
                <>
                  {/* Header */}
                  <div className="sticky top-0 bg-white/95 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-gray-100 p-4 md:p-6 flex items-center justify-between z-10 rounded-t-3xl">
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-3 md:gap-4">
                      <div className="w-12 h-12 md:w-16 md:h-16 bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center text-2xl md:text-3xl shadow-sm">
                        {plan.logo}
                      </div>
                      <div>
                        <h2 className="text-lg md:text-2xl font-semibold text-gray-900">{plan.provider}</h2>
                        <p className="text-xs md:text-sm text-gray-600">{plan.name}</p>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                    <button
                      onClick={() => setQuickViewPlan(null)}
                      className="p-2 hover:bg-gray-100 active:bg-gray-200 rounded-xl transition-colors"
                    >
                      <X size={20} className="text-gray-600" />
                    </button>
                  </div>

                  {/* Content */}
                  <div className="p-4 md:p-6 lg:p-8">
                    {/* Rating & Social Proof */}
                    <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row items-start sm:items-center justify-between mb-6 pb-6 border-b border-gray-100 gap-3">
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                        <Star className="text-yellow-500 fill-yellow-500" size={18} />
                        <span className="text-lg md:text-xl font-semibold text-gray-900">{plan.rating}</span>
                        <span className="text-sm text-gray-600">({plan.reviews.toLocaleString()} reviews)</span>
                      </div>
                      {plan.comparingNow && (
                        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-gray-600">
                          <Users size={16} />
                          <span className="text-sm">{plan.comparingNow} people comparing now</span>
                        </div>
                      )}
                    </div>

                    {/* Pricing */}
                    <div className="bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-50 to-indigo-50 border border-blue-100 rounded-2xl p-5 md:p-6 mb-6">
                      <div className="text-xs md:text-sm font-semibold text-gray-600 uppercase tracking-wide mb-2">Monthly Premium</div>
                      <div className="flex items-baseline gap-2 mb-2">
                        <span className="text-4xl md:text-5xl font-bold text-gray-900">${plan.monthlyPremium}</span>
                        <span className="text-lg md:text-xl text-gray-600">/month</span>
                      </div>
                      <div className="text-sm text-gray-700">${(plan.monthlyPremium * 12).toLocaleString()} per year</div>
                    </div>

                    {/* Coverage Details */}
                    <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3 md:gap-4 mb-6">
                      <div className="bg-gray-50 border border-gray-100 rounded-2xl p-4 md:p-5">
                        <div className="text-xs font-semibold text-gray-600 uppercase tracking-wide mb-2">Coverage Amount</div>
                        <div className="text-2xl md:text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900">${plan.coverage.toLocaleString()}</div>
                      </div>
                      <div className="bg-gray-50 border border-gray-100 rounded-2xl p-4 md:p-5">
                        <div className="text-xs font-semibold text-gray-600 uppercase tracking-wide mb-2">Deductible</div>
                        <div className="text-2xl md:text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900">${plan.deductible.toLocaleString()}</div>
                      </div>
                    </div>

                    {/* All Features */}
                    <div className="mb-6">
                      <h3 className="text-base md:text-lg font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-4">All Features</h3>
                      <div className="grid sm:grid-cols-2 gap-2 md:gap-3">
                        {plan.features.map((feature, idx) => (
                          <div key={idx} className="flex items-start gap-2 text-sm text-gray-700">
                            <div className="w-5 h-5 bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5">
                              <CheckCircle className="text-white" size={12} />
                            </div>
                            <span>{feature}</span>
                          </div>
                        ))}
                      </div>
                    </div>

                    {/* Actions */}
                    <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row gap-3 pb-safe">
                      <button
                        onClick={() => {
                          togglePlanSelection(plan.id);
                          setQuickViewPlan(null);
                        }}
                        className="flex-1 py-3.5 bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 text-white rounded-xl hover:shadow-lg active:scale-95 transition-all font-semibold"
                      >
                        {selectedPlans.includes(plan.id) ? 'Remove from Benchmark' : 'Add to Benchmark'}
                      </button>
                      <button
                        onClick={(e) => {
                          toggleFavorite(plan.id, e);
                        }}
                        className="sm:w-auto px-6 py-3.5 bg-gray-100 hover:bg-gray-200 active:bg-gray-300 rounded-xl transition-colors flex items-center justify-center gap-2"
                      >
                        <Heart size={20} className={favorites.includes(plan.id) ? 'text-red-500 fill-red-500' : 'text-gray-700'} />
                        <span className="sm:hidden">{favorites.includes(plan.id) ? 'Saved' : 'Save'}</span>
                      </button>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </>
              );
            })()}
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* ENHANCED COMPARISON MODAL - Use existing component */}
      {showComparison && selectedPlanDetails.length > 0 && (
        <ComparisonModal
          plans={selectedPlanDetails}
          onClose={() => setShowComparison(false)}
          onRemovePlan={togglePlanSelection}
          onReplacePlan={(oldId, newId) => {
            setSelectedPlans(prev => prev.map(id => id === oldId ? newId : id));
            toast.success('Plan replaced');
          }}
          allPlans={insurancePlans}
          getWinner={getWinner}
          calculateTotalCost={calculateTotalCost}
          getProsAndCons={getProsAndCons}
          getDecisionScore={getDecisionScore}
          getAllUniqueFeatures={getAllUniqueFeatures}
          isMobile={isMobile}
        />
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

// SEPARATE COMPARISON MODAL COMPONENT (keeping existing but adding mobile support)
type ComparisonModalProps = {
  plans: InsurancePlan[];
  onClose: () => void;
  onRemovePlan: (id: string) => void;
  onReplacePlan: (oldId: string, newId: string) => void;
  allPlans: InsurancePlan[];
  getWinner: (attr: keyof InsurancePlan, preferLow?: boolean) => string | null;
  calculateTotalCost: (plan: InsurancePlan, years: number, claims: number) => number;
  getProsAndCons: (plan: InsurancePlan) => { pros: string[]; cons: string[] };
  getDecisionScore: (plan: InsurancePlan) => number;
  getAllUniqueFeatures: () => string[];
  isMobile: boolean;
};

function ComparisonModal({
  plans,
  onClose,
  onRemovePlan,
  onReplacePlan,
  allPlans,
  getWinner,
  calculateTotalCost,
  getProsAndCons,
  getDecisionScore,
  getAllUniqueFeatures,
  isMobile,
}: ComparisonModalProps) {
  const [comparisonView, setComparisonView] = useState<ComparisonView>(isMobile ? 'compact' : 'cards');
  const [showCostCalculator, setShowCostCalculator] = useState(false);
  const [calculatorYears, setCalculatorYears] = useState(3);
  const [expectedClaims, setExpectedClaims] = useState(0);
  const [showShareModal, setShowShareModal] = useState(false);
  const [activeTabIndex, setActiveTabIndex] = useState(0);

  const handleExport = (type: string) => {
    toast.success(`Exporting as ${type}...`);
  };

  const handleShare = (method: string) => {
    toast.success(`Sharing via ${method}...`);
    setShowShareModal(false);
  };

  // Get recommended plan
  const recommendedPlan = plans.reduce((best, current) => {
    return getDecisionScore(current) > getDecisionScore(best) ? current : best;
  }, plans[0]);

  // Category winners
  const lowestPrice = plans.reduce((min, p) => p.monthlyPremium < min.monthlyPremium ? p : min);
  const highestCoverage = plans.reduce((max, p) => p.coverage > max.coverage ? p : max);
  const highestRated = plans.reduce((max, p) => p.rating > max.rating ? p : max);

  return (
    <div className="fixed inset-0 bg-slate-900/40 backdrop-blur-sm z-50 flex items-end md:items-center justify-center p-0 md:p-4 overflow-y-auto">
      <div className="bg-white rounded-t-3xl md:rounded-3xl max-w-[95vw] w-full my-0 md:my-8 shadow-2xl border border-gray-100 max-h-screen md:max-h-[95vh] flex flex-col">
        {/* Sticky Header - Mobile Optimized */}
        <div className="sticky top-0 bg-white/95 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-gray-100 p-3 md:p-6 z-20 rounded-t-3xl flex-shrink-0">
          <div className="flex flex-col gap-3 md:gap-4">
            {/* Top Row */}
            <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
              <div>
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-1">
                  <div className="w-7 h-7 md:w-8 md:h-8 bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center">
                    <Sparkles className="text-white" size={14} />
                  </div>
                  <h2 className="text-lg md:text-2xl font-semibold text-gray-900">Benchmark Policies</h2>
                </div>
                <p className="text-xs md:text-sm text-gray-600 hidden sm:block">Side-by-side coverage and cost analysis</p>
              </div>
              <button
                onClick={onClose}
                className="p-2 hover:bg-gray-100 active:bg-gray-200 rounded-xl transition-colors flex-shrink-0"
              >
                <X size={20} className="text-gray-600" />
              </button>
            </div>

            {/* Controls Row - Mobile: Simplified */}
            <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2">
              {/* View Toggle - Hide on mobile, use tabs instead */}
              <div className="hidden md:flex items-center gap-1 bg-gray-100 rounded-xl p-1">
                <button
                  onClick={() => setComparisonView('cards')}
                  className={`flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium transition-all ${
                    comparisonView === 'cards'
                      ? 'bg-white text-gray-900 shadow-sm'
                      : 'text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900'
                  }`}
                >
                  <LayoutGrid size={16} />
                  Cards
                </button>
                <button
                  onClick={() => setComparisonView('table')}
                  className={`flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium transition-all ${
                    comparisonView === 'table'
                      ? 'bg-white text-gray-900 shadow-sm'
                      : 'text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900'
                  }`}
                >
                  <Table2 size={16} />
                  Table
                </button>
                <button
                  onClick={() => setComparisonView('compact')}
                  className={`flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium transition-all ${
                    comparisonView === 'compact'
                      ? 'bg-white text-gray-900 shadow-sm'
                      : 'text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900'
                  }`}
                >
                  <Maximize2 size={16} />
                  Compact
                </button>
              </div>

              {/* Cost Calculator */}
              <button
                onClick={() => setShowCostCalculator(!showCostCalculator)}
                className="flex items-center gap-1.5 md:gap-2 px-3 py-1.5 md:py-2 bg-gray-100 hover:bg-gray-200 active:bg-gray-300 rounded-xl text-xs md:text-sm font-medium transition-all text-gray-700"
              >
                <Calculator size={14} />
                <span className="hidden sm:inline">Calculator</span>
              </button>

              {/* Export/Share - Desktop only */}
              <div className="ml-auto hidden md:flex items-center gap-2">
                <button
                  onClick={() => handleExport('PDF')}
                  className="p-2 hover:bg-gray-100 rounded-xl transition-colors"
                  title="Export PDF"
                >
                  <Download size={18} className="text-gray-600" />
                </button>
                <button
                  onClick={() => setShowShareModal(true)}
                  className="p-2 hover:bg-gray-100 rounded-xl transition-colors"
                  title="Share"
                >
                  <Share2 size={18} className="text-gray-600" />
                </button>
              </div>

              {/* Mobile: Share button */}
              <button
                onClick={() => setShowShareModal(true)}
                className="ml-auto md:hidden p-2 hover:bg-gray-100 active:bg-gray-200 rounded-xl transition-colors"
              >
                <Share2 size={18} className="text-gray-600" />
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Content Area */}
        <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-3 md:p-6">
          {/* Winner Declaration Section - Mobile Optimized */}
          <div className="bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-50 to-indigo-50 border-2 border-blue-200 rounded-2xl md:rounded-3xl p-4 md:p-8 mb-4 md:mb-6">
            <div className="flex items-start gap-3 md:gap-4">
              <div className="w-12 h-12 md:w-16 md:h-16 bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 rounded-xl md:rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center flex-shrink-0 shadow-lg">
                <Trophy className="text-white" size={20} />
              </div>
              <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
                <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2 mb-2 md:mb-3">
                  <h3 className="text-lg md:text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">Recommended</h3>
                  <div className="px-2.5 py-0.5 md:px-3 md:py-1 bg-gradient-to-r from-yellow-500 to-orange-500 text-white text-xs rounded-full font-semibold">
                    {getDecisionScore(recommendedPlan)}% Match
                  </div>
                </div>
                
                <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row items-start sm:items-center gap-3 mb-3 md:mb-4">
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2 md:gap-3">
