```tsx
                    <span className="text-3xl md:text-4xl">{recommendedPlan.logo}</span>
                    <div>
                      <h4 className="text-base md:text-xl font-bold text-gray-900">{recommendedPlan.provider}</h4>
                      <p className="text-xs md:text-sm text-gray-600">{recommendedPlan.name}</p>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <div className="sm:ml-auto text-left sm:text-right">
                    <div className="text-2xl md:text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900">${recommendedPlan.monthlyPremium}</div>
                    <div className="text-xs md:text-sm text-gray-600">/month</div>
                  </div>
                </div>

                <button className="w-full py-3 bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 text-white rounded-xl hover:shadow-lg active:scale-95 transition-all font-semibold text-sm md:text-base">
                  Get {recommendedPlan.provider} Plan
                </button>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* Category Winners - Mobile: Horizontal Scroll */}
          <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-3 gap-3 md:gap-4 mb-4 md:mb-6 overflow-x-auto pb-2">
            <div className="bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-xl md:rounded-2xl p-3 md:p-4 min-w-[280px] sm:min-w-0">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
                <div className="w-7 h-7 md:w-8 md:h-8 bg-green-100 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center">
                  <DollarSign size={14} className="text-green-600" />
                </div>
                <h4 className="font-semibold text-sm md:text-base text-gray-900">Lowest Price</h4>
              </div>
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                <span className="text-xl md:text-2xl">{lowestPrice.logo}</span>
                <div>
                  <div className="font-bold text-sm md:text-base text-gray-900">{lowestPrice.provider}</div>
                  <div className="text-xs md:text-sm text-green-600">${lowestPrice.monthlyPremium}/mo</div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div className="bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-xl md:rounded-2xl p-3 md:p-4 min-w-[280px] sm:min-w-0">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
                <div className="w-7 h-7 md:w-8 md:h-8 bg-blue-100 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center">
                  <Shield size={14} className="text-blue-600" />
                </div>
                <h4 className="font-semibold text-sm md:text-base text-gray-900">Highest Coverage</h4>
              </div>
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                <span className="text-xl md:text-2xl">{highestCoverage.logo}</span>
                <div>
                  <div className="font-bold text-sm md:text-base text-gray-900">{highestCoverage.provider}</div>
                  <div className="text-xs md:text-sm text-blue-600">${(highestCoverage.coverage / 1000).toFixed(0)}K</div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div className="bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-xl md:rounded-2xl p-3 md:p-4 min-w-[280px] sm:min-w-0">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
                <div className="w-7 h-7 md:w-8 md:h-8 bg-yellow-100 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center">
                  <Star size={14} className="text-yellow-600 fill-yellow-600" />
                </div>
                <h4 className="font-semibold text-sm md:text-base text-gray-900">Highest Rated</h4>
              </div>
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                <span className="text-xl md:text-2xl">{highestRated.logo}</span>
                <div>
                  <div className="font-bold text-sm md:text-base text-gray-900">{highestRated.provider}</div>
                  <div className="text-xs md:text-sm text-yellow-600">{highestRated.rating}★</div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* Mobile: Tab View for Plans */}
          {isMobile ? (
            <div className="mb-6">
              {/* Tab Headers */}
              <div className="flex gap-2 mb-4 overflow-x-auto pb-2 scrollbar-hide">
                {plans.map((plan, idx) => (
                  <button
                    key={plan.id}
                    onClick={() => setActiveTabIndex(idx)}
                    className={`flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2.5 rounded-xl font-medium text-sm whitespace-nowrap transition-all ${
                      activeTabIndex === idx
                        ? 'bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 text-white shadow-lg'
                        : 'bg-white border border-gray-200 text-gray-700'
                    }`}
                  >
                    <span className="text-xl">{plan.logo}</span>
                    <span>{plan.provider}</span>
                  </button>
                ))}
              </div>

              {/* Active Tab Content */}
              {plans.map((plan, idx) => {
                if (idx !== activeTabIndex) return null;
                
                const prosAndCons = getProsAndCons(plan);
                
                return (
                  <div key={plan.id} className="bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-2xl p-5 space-y-4">
                    {/* Plan Header */}
                    <div className="flex items-center justify-between pb-4 border-b border-gray-100">
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                        <span className="text-3xl">{plan.logo}</span>
                        <div>
                          <h3 className="font-bold text-lg text-gray-900">{plan.provider}</h3>
                          <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">{plan.name}</p>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                      <button
                        onClick={() => onRemovePlan(plan.id)}
                        className="p-2 bg-red-50 hover:bg-red-100 active:bg-red-200 rounded-lg transition-colors"
                      >
                        <X size={16} className="text-red-600" />
                      </button>
                    </div>

                    {/* Match Score */}
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                      <span className="text-sm text-gray-600">Match Score:</span>
                      <div className="flex-1 bg-gray-200 rounded-full h-2">
                        <div 
                          className="bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 h-full rounded-full transition-all"
                          style={{ width: `${getDecisionScore(plan)}%` }}
                        />
                      </div>
                      <span className="text-sm font-bold text-blue-600">{getDecisionScore(plan)}%</span>
                    </div>

                    {/* Pricing */}
                    <div className={`rounded-2xl p-4 ${
                      getWinner('monthlyPremium', true) === plan.id
                        ? 'bg-gradient-to-br from-green-50 to-emerald-50 border-2 border-green-500'
                        : 'bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-50 to-indigo-50 border border-blue-100'
                    }`}>
                      <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-2">
                        <div className="text-xs font-semibold text-gray-600 uppercase tracking-wide">Monthly Premium</div>
                        {getWinner('monthlyPremium', true) === plan.id && (
                          <div className="px-2 py-0.5 bg-green-600 text-white text-xs rounded-full font-semibold flex items-center gap-1">
                            <Crown size={10} />
                            Lowest
                          </div>
                        )}
                      </div>
                      <div className="flex items-baseline gap-1">
                        <span className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900">${plan.monthlyPremium}</span>
                        <span className="text-gray-600">/mo</span>
                      </div>
                      <div className="text-sm text-gray-600">${(plan.monthlyPremium * 12).toLocaleString()} annually</div>
                    </div>

                    {/* Coverage & Deductible */}
                    <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3">
                      <div className={`rounded-2xl p-3 ${
                        getWinner('coverage') === plan.id
                          ? 'bg-blue-50 border-2 border-blue-500'
                          : 'bg-gray-50 border border-gray-100'
                      }`}>
                        <div className="text-xs font-semibold text-gray-600 uppercase tracking-wide mb-1">Coverage</div>
                        <div className="text-xl font-bold text-gray-900">${(plan.coverage / 1000).toFixed(0)}K</div>
                        {getWinner('coverage') === plan.id && (
                          <div className="text-xs text-blue-600 font-semibold mt-1">HIGHEST</div>
                        )}
                      </div>

                      <div className={`rounded-2xl p-3 ${
                        getWinner('deductible', true) === plan.id && plan.deductible > 0
                          ? 'bg-green-50 border-2 border-green-500'
                          : 'bg-gray-50 border border-gray-100'
                      }`}>
                        <div className="text-xs font-semibold text-gray-600 uppercase tracking-wide mb-1">Deductible</div>
                        <div className="text-xl font-bold text-gray-900">${plan.deductible.toLocaleString()}</div>
                        {getWinner('deductible', true) === plan.id && plan.deductible > 0 && (
                          <div className="text-xs text-green-600 font-semibold mt-1">LOWEST</div>
                        )}
                      </div>
                    </div>

                    {/* Additional Cost Details */}
                    <div className="bg-gradient-to-br from-gray-50 to-gray-100 border border-gray-200 rounded-2xl p-4 space-y-3">
                      <div className="text-xs font-semibold text-gray-600 uppercase tracking-wide mb-3">Additional Costs</div>
                      
                      <div className="flex justify-between items-center">
                        <span className="text-sm text-gray-700">3-Year Total</span>
                        <span className="font-bold text-gray-900">${((plan.monthlyPremium * 36) + (plan.deductible * 3)).toLocaleString()}</span>
                      </div>
                      
                      {plan.outOfPocketMax && (
                        <div className="flex justify-between items-center">
                          <span className="text-sm text-gray-700">Out-of-Pocket Max</span>
                          <span className="font-bold text-gray-900">${plan.outOfPocketMax.toLocaleString()}</span>
                        </div>
                      )}
                      
                      {plan.copay && (
                        <div className="flex justify-between items-center">
                          <span className="text-sm text-gray-700">Copay</span>
                          <span className="font-bold text-gray-900">${plan.copay}</span>
                        </div>
                      )}
                      
                      {plan.coinsurance && (
                        <div className="flex justify-between items-center">
                          <span className="text-sm text-gray-700">Coinsurance</span>
                          <span className="font-bold text-gray-900">{plan.coinsurance}%</span>
                        </div>
                      )}
                    </div>

                    {/* Service Details */}
                    <div className="bg-gradient-to-br from-purple-50 to-pink-50 border border-purple-100 rounded-2xl p-4 space-y-3">
                      <div className="text-xs font-semibold text-purple-700 uppercase tracking-wide mb-3 flex items-center gap-1">
                        <Zap size={12} />
                        Service & Support
                      </div>
                      
                      {plan.claimProcessingDays && (
                        <div className="flex justify-between items-center">
                          <span className="text-sm text-gray-700">Claim Processing</span>
                          <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
                            <Clock size={14} className="text-purple-600" />
                            <span className="font-bold text-gray-900">{plan.claimProcessingDays} days</span>
                          </div>
                        </div>
                      )}
                      
                      {plan.networkSize && (
                        <div className="flex justify-between items-center">
                          <span className="text-sm text-gray-700">Network Size</span>
                          <span className="font-bold text-gray-900">{plan.networkSize}</span>
                        </div>
                      )}
                      
                      {plan.financialStrength && (
                        <div className="flex justify-between items-center">
                          <span className="text-sm text-gray-700">Financial Strength</span>
                          <span className="font-bold text-gray-900">{plan.financialStrength}</span>
                        </div>
                      )}
                      
                      {plan.comparingNow && (
                        <div className="flex justify-between items-center">
                          <span className="text-sm text-gray-700">Popularity</span>
                          <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
                            <Users size={14} className="text-blue-600" />
                            <span className="font-bold text-gray-900">{plan.comparingNow} comparing now</span>
                          </div>
                        </div>
                      )}
                    </div>

                    {/* Rating */}
                    <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-3 bg-gray-50 rounded-xl">
                      <span className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-700">Customer Rating</span>
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
                        <Star size={16} className="text-yellow-500 fill-yellow-500" />
                        <span className="font-bold text-gray-900">{plan.rating}</span>
                        <span className="text-sm text-gray-600">({plan.reviews.toLocaleString()})</span>
                      </div>
                    </div>

                    {/* Pros & Cons */}
                    <div className="space-y-3">
                      {prosAndCons.pros.length > 0 && (
                        <div>
                          <div className="text-xs font-semibold text-green-700 mb-2 flex items-center gap-1">
                            <ThumbsUp size={12} />
                            Advantages
                          </div>
                          <ul className="space-y-1.5">
                            {prosAndCons.pros.map((pro, idx) => (
                              <li key={idx} className="flex items-start gap-2 text-sm text-gray-700">
                                <CheckCircle size={14} className="text-green-600 mt-0.5 flex-shrink-0" />
                                <span>{pro}</span>
                              </li>
                            ))}
                          </ul>
                        </div>
                      )}
                      
                      {prosAndCons.cons.length > 0 && (
                        <div>
                          <div className="text-xs font-semibold text-red-700 mb-2 flex items-center gap-1">
                            <ThumbsDown size={12} />
                            Disadvantages
                          </div>
                          <ul className="space-y-1.5">
                            {prosAndCons.cons.map((con, idx) => (
                              <li key={idx} className="flex items-start gap-2 text-sm text-gray-700">
                                <Minus size={14} className="text-red-600 mt-0.5 flex-shrink-0" />
                                <span>{con}</span>
                              </li>
                            ))}
                          </ul>
                        </div>
                      )}
                    </div>

                    {/* Features */}
                    <div>
                      <div className="text-xs font-semibold text-gray-600 uppercase tracking-wide mb-2">Key Features</div>
                      <ul className="space-y-2">
                        {plan.features.map((feature, idx) => (
                          <li key={idx} className="flex items-start gap-2 text-sm text-gray-700">
                            <div className="w-4 h-4 bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5">
                              <CheckCircle className="text-white" size={10} />
                            </div>
                            <span>{feature}</span>
                          </li>
                        ))}
                      </ul>
                    </div>

                    {/* CTA */}
                    <button className="w-full py-3.5 bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 text-white rounded-xl hover:shadow-lg active:scale-95 transition-all font-semibold">
                      Get This Plan
                    </button>
                  </div>
                );
              })}

              {/* Swipe Hint */}
              <div className="text-center mt-4 text-xs text-gray-500">
                <div className="flex items-center justify-center gap-2">
                  <ChevronLeft size={14} />
                  <span>Swipe or tap tabs to switch plans</span>
                  <ChevronRight size={14} />
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          ) : (
            // Desktop: Multiple View Options
            <div>
              {comparisonView === 'cards' && (
                <ComprehensiveComparison
                  plans={plans}
                  getWinner={getWinner}
                  getDecisionScore={getDecisionScore}
                  getAllUniqueFeatures={getAllUniqueFeatures}
                  recommendedPlan={recommendedPlan}
                />
              )}

              {comparisonView === 'table' && (
                <div className="bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-3xl overflow-hidden">
                  <div className="overflow-x-auto">
                    <table className="w-full">
                      <thead>
                        <tr className="bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-50 to-indigo-50 border-b border-blue-100">
                          <th className="text-left px-6 py-4 font-semibold text-gray-900">Feature</th>
                          {plans.map(plan => (
                            <th key={plan.id} className="text-center px-6 py-4 min-w-[200px]">
                              <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-2">
                                <span className="text-3xl">{plan.logo}</span>
                                <div className="font-bold text-gray-900">{plan.provider}</div>
                                <div className="text-xs text-gray-600 font-normal">{plan.name}</div>
                              </div>
                            </th>
                          ))}
                        </tr>
                      </thead>
                      <tbody className="divide-y divide-gray-100">
                        {/* Monthly Premium */}
                        <tr className="hover:bg-gray-50">
                          <td className="px-6 py-4 font-medium text-gray-700">Monthly Premium</td>
                          {plans.map(plan => (
                            <td key={plan.id} className="px-6 py-4 text-center">
                              <div className={`inline-block px-4 py-2 rounded-xl ${
                                getWinner('monthlyPremium', true) === plan.id
                                  ? 'bg-green-50 border-2 border-green-500'
                                  : 'bg-gray-50'
                              }`}>
                                <div className="text-xl font-bold text-gray-900">${plan.monthlyPremium}</div>
                                <div className="text-xs text-gray-600">/month</div>
                                {getWinner('monthlyPremium', true) === plan.id && (
                                  <div className="text-xs text-green-600 font-bold mt-1 flex items-center justify-center gap-1">
                                    <Crown size={10} />
                                    LOWEST
                                  </div>
                                )}
                              </div>
                            </td>
                          ))}
                        </tr>

                        {/* Annual Cost */}
                        <tr className="hover:bg-gray-50">
                          <td className="px-6 py-4 font-medium text-gray-700">Annual Cost</td>
                          {plans.map(plan => (
                            <td key={plan.id} className="px-6 py-4 text-center">
                              <div className="font-bold text-gray-900">${(plan.monthlyPremium * 12).toLocaleString()}</div>
                            </td>
                          ))}
                        </tr>

                        {/* Coverage Amount */}
                        <tr className="hover:bg-gray-50">
                          <td className="px-6 py-4 font-medium text-gray-700">Coverage Amount</td>
                          {plans.map(plan => (
                            <td key={plan.id} className="px-6 py-4 text-center">
                              <div className={`inline-block px-4 py-2 rounded-xl ${
                                getWinner('coverage') === plan.id
                                  ? 'bg-blue-50 border-2 border-blue-500'
                                  : 'bg-gray-50'
                              }`}>
                                <div className="text-xl font-bold text-gray-900">${(plan.coverage / 1000).toFixed(0)}K</div>
                                {getWinner('coverage') === plan.id && (
                                  <div className="text-xs text-blue-600 font-bold mt-1">HIGHEST</div>
                                )}
                              </div>
                            </td>
                          ))}
                        </tr>

                        {/* Deductible */}
                        <tr className="hover:bg-gray-50">
                          <td className="px-6 py-4 font-medium text-gray-700">Deductible</td>
                          {plans.map(plan => (
                            <td key={plan.id} className="px-6 py-4 text-center">
                              <div className={`inline-block px-4 py-2 rounded-xl ${
                                getWinner('deductible', true) === plan.id
                                  ? 'bg-green-50 border-2 border-green-500'
                                  : 'bg-gray-50'
                              }`}>
                                <div className="font-bold text-gray-900">${plan.deductible.toLocaleString()}</div>
                                {getWinner('deductible', true) === plan.id && (
                                  <div className="text-xs text-green-600 font-bold mt-1">LOWEST</div>
                                )}
                              </div>
                            </td>
                          ))}
                        </tr>

                        {/* Out-of-Pocket Max */}
                        {plans.some(p => p.outOfPocketMax) && (
                          <tr className="hover:bg-gray-50">
                            <td className="px-6 py-4 font-medium text-gray-700">Out-of-Pocket Maximum</td>
                            {plans.map(plan => (
                              <td key={plan.id} className="px-6 py-4 text-center">
                                <div className="font-bold text-gray-900">
                                  {plan.outOfPocketMax ? `$${plan.outOfPocketMax.toLocaleString()}` : 'N/A'}
                                </div>
                              </td>
                            ))}
                          </tr>
                        )}

                        {/* Rating */}
                        <tr className="hover:bg-gray-50">
                          <td className="px-6 py-4 font-medium text-gray-700">Customer Rating</td>
                          {plans.map(plan => (
                            <td key={plan.id} className="px-6 py-4 text-center">
                              <div className={`inline-block px-4 py-2 rounded-xl ${
                                getWinner('rating') === plan.id
                                  ? 'bg-yellow-50 border-2 border-yellow-500'
                                  : 'bg-gray-50'
                              }`}>
                                <div className="flex items-center justify-center gap-1">
                                  <Star size={18} className="text-yellow-500 fill-yellow-500" />
                                  <span className="font-bold text-gray-900">{plan.rating}</span>
                                </div>
                                <div className="text-xs text-gray-600">{plan.reviews.toLocaleString()} reviews</div>
                                {getWinner('rating') === plan.id && (
                                  <div className="text-xs text-yellow-600 font-bold mt-1">HIGHEST</div>
                                )}
                              </div>
                            </td>
                          ))}
                        </tr>

                        {/* Claim Processing */}
                        {plans.some(p => p.claimProcessingDays) && (
                          <tr className="hover:bg-gray-50">
                            <td className="px-6 py-4 font-medium text-gray-700">Claim Processing</td>
                            {plans.map(plan => {
                              const fastestDays = Math.min(...plans.filter(p => p.claimProcessingDays).map(p => p.claimProcessingDays!));
                              const isFastest = plan.claimProcessingDays === fastestDays;
                              return (
                                <td key={plan.id} className="px-6 py-4 text-center">
                                  <div className={`inline-block px-4 py-2 rounded-xl ${
                                    isFastest ? 'bg-purple-50 border-2 border-purple-500' : 'bg-gray-50'
                                  }`}>
                                    <div className="font-bold text-gray-900">
                                      {plan.claimProcessingDays ? `${plan.claimProcessingDays} days` : 'N/A'}
                                    </div>
                                    {isFastest && plan.claimProcessingDays && (
                                      <div className="text-xs text-purple-600 font-bold mt-1">FASTEST</div>
                                    )}
                                  </div>
                                </td>
                              );
                            })}
                          </tr>
                        )}

                        {/* Features */}
                        {getAllUniqueFeatures(plans).map((feature, idx) => (
                          <tr key={idx} className="hover:bg-gray-50">
                            <td className="px-6 py-4 text-sm text-gray-700">{feature}</td>
                            {plans.map(plan => (
                              <td key={plan.id} className="px-6 py-4 text-center">
                                {plan.features.includes(feature) ? (
                                  <div className="inline-flex items-center justify-center w-8 h-8 bg-green-100 rounded-full">
                                    <CheckCircle size={20} className="text-green-600" />
                                  </div>
                                ) : (
                                  <div className="inline-flex items-center justify-center w-8 h-8 bg-gray-100 rounded-full">
                                    <X size={20} className="text-gray-400" />
                                  </div>
                                )}
                              </td>
                            ))}
                          </tr>
                        ))}

                        {/* Match Score */}
                        <tr className="bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-50 to-indigo-50">
                          <td className="px-6 py-4 font-bold text-gray-900">AI Match Score</td>
                          {plans.map(plan => {
                            const score = getDecisionScore(plan);
                            const isRecommended = plan.id === recommendedPlan.id;
                            return (
                              <td key={plan.id} className="px-6 py-4 text-center">
                                <div className="relative w-full h-3 bg-gray-200 rounded-full overflow-hidden mb-2">
                                  <div 
                                    className={`absolute top-0 left-0 h-full rounded-full ${
                                      isRecommended
                                        ? 'bg-gradient-to-r from-green-600 to-emerald-600'
                                        : 'bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600'
                                    }`}
                                    style={{ width: `${score}%` }}
                                  />
                                </div>
                                <div className={`text-2xl font-bold ${isRecommended ? 'text-green-600' : 'text-blue-600'}`}>
                                  {score}%
                                </div>
                                {isRecommended && (
                                  <div className="mt-2 inline-flex items-center gap-1 px-3 py-1 bg-green-600 text-white text-xs rounded-full font-bold">
                                    <Trophy size={12} />
                                    BEST MATCH
                                  </div>
                                )}
                              </td>
                            );
                          })}
                        </tr>
                      </tbody>
                    </table>
                  </div>
                </div>
              )}

              {comparisonView === 'compact' && (
                <div className="space-y-4">
                  {plans.map(plan => {
                    const prosAndCons = getProsAndCons(plan);
                    const score = getDecisionScore(plan);
                    const isRecommended = plan.id === recommendedPlan.id;
                    
                    return (
                      <div key={plan.id} className={`bg-white border rounded-2xl p-6 hover:shadow-lg transition-all ${
                        isRecommended ? 'border-green-500 border-2 shadow-md' : 'border-gray-200'
                      }`}>
                        <div className="flex items-start gap-6">
                          {/* Left: Plan Info */}
                          <div className="flex-1">
                            <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-3">
                              <span className="text-4xl">{plan.logo}</span>
                              <div>
                                <h3 className="font-bold text-xl text-gray-900">{plan.provider}</h3>
                                <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">{plan.name}</p>
                              </div>
                              {isRecommended && (
                                <div className="ml-auto px-3 py-1 bg-gradient-to-r from-green-600 to-emerald-600 text-white text-xs rounded-full font-bold flex items-center gap-1">
                                  <Trophy size={12} />
                                  BEST MATCH
                                </div>
                              )}
                            </div>

                            {/* Key Metrics in One Row */}
                            <div className="grid grid-cols-4 gap-4 mb-4">
                              <div className={`text-center p-3 rounded-xl ${
                                getWinner('monthlyPremium', true) === plan.id
                                  ? 'bg-green-50 border-2 border-green-500'
                                  : 'bg-gray-50'
                              }`}>
                                <div className="text-xs text-gray-600 mb-1">Premium</div>
                                <div className="font-bold text-lg">${plan.monthlyPremium}</div>
                                <div className="text-xs text-gray-600">/mo</div>
                              </div>

                              <div className={`text-center p-3 rounded-xl ${
                                getWinner('coverage') === plan.id
                                  ? 'bg-blue-50 border-2 border-blue-500'
                                  : 'bg-gray-50'
                              }`}>
                                <div className="text-xs text-gray-600 mb-1">Coverage</div>
                                <div className="font-bold text-lg">${(plan.coverage / 1000).toFixed(0)}K</div>
                              </div>

                              <div className={`text-center p-3 rounded-xl ${
                                getWinner('deductible', true) === plan.id
                                  ? 'bg-green-50 border-2 border-green-500'
                                  : 'bg-gray-50'
                              }`}>
                                <div className="text-xs text-gray-600 mb-1">Deductible</div>
                                <div className="font-bold text-lg">${plan.deductible}</div>
                              </div>

                              <div className={`text-center p-3 rounded-xl ${
                                getWinner('rating') === plan.id
                                  ? 'bg-yellow-50 border-2 border-yellow-500'
                                  : 'bg-gray-50'
                              }`}>
                                <div className="text-xs text-gray-600 mb-1">Rating</div>
                                <div className="flex items-center justify-center gap-1">
                                  <Star size={16} className="text-yellow-500 fill-yellow-500" />
                                  <span className="font-bold">{plan.rating}</span>
                                </div>
                              </div>
                            </div>

                            {/* Pros & Cons Side by Side */}
                            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                              {prosAndCons.pros.length > 0 && (
                                <div>
                                  <div className="text-xs font-semibold text-green-700 mb-2 flex items-center gap-1">
                                    <ThumbsUp size={12} />
                                    Pros
                                  </div>
                                  <ul className="space-y-1">
                                    {prosAndCons.pros.slice(0, 3).map((pro, idx) => (
                                      <li key={idx} className="flex items-start gap-2 text-sm text-gray-700">
                                        <CheckCircle size={14} className="text-green-600 mt-0.5 flex-shrink-0" />
                                        <span>{pro}</span>
                                      </li>
                                    ))}
                                  </ul>
                                </div>
                              )}
                              
                              {prosAndCons.cons.length > 0 && (
                                <div>
                                  <div className="text-xs font-semibold text-red-700 mb-2 flex items-center gap-1">
                                    <ThumbsDown size={12} />
                                    Cons
                                  </div>
                                  <ul className="space-y-1">
                                    {prosAndCons.cons.slice(0, 3).map((con, idx) => (
                                      <li key={idx} className="flex items-start gap-2 text-sm text-gray-700">
                                        <Minus size={14} className="text-red-600 mt-0.5 flex-shrink-0" />
                                        <span>{con}</span>
                                      </li>
                                    ))}
                                  </ul>
                                </div>
                              )}
                            </div>
                          </div>

                          {/* Right: Match Score & CTA */}
                          <div className="w-48 flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-4 border-l border-gray-200 pl-6">
                            <div className="text-center">
                              <div className="relative w-32 h-32 mb-3">
                                <svg className="transform -rotate-90 w-32 h-32">
                                  <circle
                                    cx="64"
                                    cy="64"
                                    r="56"
                                    stroke="currentColor"
                                    strokeWidth="8"
                                    fill="none"
                                    className="text-gray-200"
                                  />
                                  <circle
                                    cx="64"
                                    cy="64"
                                    r="56"
                                    stroke="currentColor"
                                    strokeWidth="8"
                                    fill="none"
                                    strokeDasharray={`${2 * Math.PI * 56}`}
                                    strokeDashoffset={`${2 * Math.PI * 56 * (1 - score / 100)}`}
                                    className={isRecommended ? 'text-green-600' : 'text-blue-600'}
                                    strokeLinecap="round"
                                  />
                                </svg>
                                <div className="absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center">
                                  <div className={`text-3xl font-bold ${isRecommended ? 'text-green-600' : 'text-blue-600'}`}>
                                    {score}%
                                  </div>
                                </div>
                              </div>
                              <div className="text-xs text-gray-600 mb-4">Match Score</div>
                            </div>
                            
                            <button className="w-full py-3 bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 text-white rounded-xl hover:shadow-lg transition-all font-semibold">
                              Get Quote
                            </button>
                          </div>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    );
                  })}
                </div>
              )}
            </div>
          )}

          {/* Cost Calculator - kept from original */}
          {showCostCalculator && (
            <div className="bg-gradient-to-br from-green-50 to-emerald-50 border border-green-200 rounded-2xl md:rounded-3xl p-4 md:p-6 mb-6">
              <h3 className="text-base md:text-lg font-bold text-gray-900 mb-4 flex items-center gap-2">
                <Calculator size={18} className="text-green-600" />
                Total Cost Calculator
              </h3>
              
              <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3 md:gap-4 mb-4 md:mb-6">
                <div>
                  <label className="block text-xs md:text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2">
                    Time Period
                  </label>
                  <select
                    value={calculatorYears}
                    onChange={(e) => setCalculatorYears(Number(e.target.value))}
                    className="w-full px-3 md:px-4 py-2 md:py-3 border border-gray-300 rounded-xl focus:ring-2 focus:ring-green-500 focus:border-transparent text-sm md:text-base"
                  >
                    <option value={1}>1 year</option>
                    <option value={3}>3 years</option>
                    <option value={5}>5 years</option>
                    <option value={10}>10 years</option>
                  </select>
                </div>
                <div>
                  <label className="block text-xs md:text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2">
                    Claims/year
                  </label>
                  <select
                    value={expectedClaims}
                    onChange={(e) => setExpectedClaims(Number(e.target.value))}
                    className="w-full px-3 md:px-4 py-2 md:py-3 border border-gray-300 rounded-xl focus:ring-2 focus:ring-green-500 focus:border-transparent text-sm md:text-base"
                  >
                    <option value={0}>0 claims</option>
                    <option value={1}>1 claim</option>
                    <option value={2}>2 claims</option>
                    <option value={3}>3+ claims</option>
                  </select>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div className="space-y-2 md:space-y-3">
                {plans.map(plan => {
                  const totalCost = calculateTotalCost(plan, calculatorYears, expectedClaims * calculatorYears);
                  const lowestCost = Math.min(...plans.map(p => calculateTotalCost(p, calculatorYears, expectedClaims * calculatorYears)));
                  const isLowest = totalCost === lowestCost;
                  
                  return (
                    <div key={plan.id} className={`p-3 md:p-4 rounded-xl ${isLowest ? 'bg-green-100 border-2 border-green-500' : 'bg-white border border-gray-200'}`}>
                      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 md:gap-3 flex-1 min-w-0">
                          <span className="text-xl md:text-2xl flex-shrink-0">{plan.logo}</span>
                          <div className="min-w-0">
                            <div className="font-semibold text-sm md:text-base text-gray-900 truncate">{plan.provider}</div>
                            <div className="text-xs text-gray-600 hidden sm:block">
                              ${plan.monthlyPremium}/mo × {calculatorYears * 12} + ${plan.deductible} × {expectedClaims * calculatorYears}
                            </div>
                          </div>
                        </div>
                        <div className="text-right flex-shrink-0">
                          <div className={`text-xl md:text-2xl font-bold ${isLowest ? 'text-green-700' : 'text-gray-900'}`}>
                            ${totalCost.toLocaleString()}
                          </div>
                          {isLowest && (
                            <div className="text-xs text-green-600 font-semibold flex items-center gap-1 justify-end">
                              <Crown size={10} />
                              LOWEST
                            </div>
                          )}
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  );
                })}
              </div>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Share Modal - Mobile Optimized */}
      {showShareModal && (
        <div 
          className="fixed inset-0 bg-black/50 z-50 flex items-end md:items-center justify-center p-0 md:p-4"
          onClick={() => setShowShareModal(false)}
        >
          <div 
            className="bg-white rounded-t-3xl md:rounded-2xl p-4 md:p-6 max-w-md w-full"
            onClick={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}
          >
            {/* Handle (mobile only) */}
            <div className="flex justify-center mb-4 md:hidden">
              <div className="w-12 h-1.5 bg-gray-300 rounded-full" />
            </div>

            <h3 className="text-lg font-bold text-gray-900 mb-4">Share Comparison</h3>
            <div className="space-y-2 md:space-y-3 pb-safe">
              <button
                onClick={() => handleShare('Email')}
                className="w-full flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3.5 bg-gray-100 hover:bg-gray-200 active:bg-gray-300 rounded-xl transition-colors"
              >
                <Mail size={20} className="text-gray-600" />
                <span className="font-medium text-gray-900">Email to yourself</span>
              </button>
              <button
                onClick={() => handleShare('Link')}
                className="w-full flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3.5 bg-gray-100 hover:bg-gray-200 active:bg-gray-300 rounded-xl transition-colors"
              >
                <Link2 size={20} className="text-gray-600" />
                <span className="font-medium text-gray-900">Copy shareable link</span>
              </button>
              <button
                onClick={() => handleShare('PDF')}
                className="w-full flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3.5 bg-gray-100 hover:bg-gray-200 active:bg-gray-300 rounded-xl transition-colors"
              >
                <FileText size={20} className="text-gray-600" />
                <span className="font-medium text-gray-900">Download PDF</span>
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

```

## File: `components (2)/InsuranceComparisonEnhanced.tsx`
- Bytes: 19,698
- SHA256: `06bef9ff843ac3f0d96499f1062f2331824026eddef30706317c14fdd385c0e8`

```tsx
/**
 * Enhanced Comprehensive Comparison Section
 * 
 * This component provides a detailed side-by-side comparison
 * of insurance plans with many more comparison items.
 * 
 * Use this to replace the placeholder desktop comparison in InsuranceComparison.tsx
 */

import { 
  Shield, Star, DollarSign, Users, Zap, CheckCircle, X, 
  Sparkles, Trophy, Crown, Clock 
} from 'lucide-react';

type InsurancePlan = {
  id: string;
  provider: string;
  name: string;
  type: string;
  rating: number;
  reviews: number;
  monthlyPremium: number;
  coverage: number;
  deductible: number;
  features: string[];
  logo: string;
  popular?: boolean;
  aiBadge?: 'best-value' | 'top-rated' | 'most-coverage';
  comparingNow?: number;
  outOfPocketMax?: number;
  copay?: number;
  coinsurance?: number;
  networkSize?: string;
  claimProcessingDays?: number;
  financialStrength?: string;
};

type ComprehensiveComparisonProps = {
  plans: InsurancePlan[];
  getWinner: (field: keyof InsurancePlan, lowerIsBetter?: boolean) => string;
  getDecisionScore: (plan: InsurancePlan) => number;
  getAllUniqueFeatures: (plans: InsurancePlan[]) => string[];
  recommendedPlan: InsurancePlan;
};

export function ComprehensiveComparison({
  plans,
  getWinner,
  getDecisionScore,
  getAllUniqueFeatures,
  recommendedPlan,
}: ComprehensiveComparisonProps) {
  return (
    <div className="space-y-6">
      {/* 1. PRICING & COSTS */}
      <div className="bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-3xl overflow-hidden">
        <div className="bg-gradient-to-r from-green-50 to-emerald-50 border-b border-green-100 px-6 py-4">
          <h3 className="font-bold text-gray-900 flex items-center gap-2">
            <DollarSign size={20} className="text-green-600" />
            Pricing & Costs
          </h3>
        </div>
        <div className="divide-y divide-gray-100">
          {/* Monthly Premium */}
          <div className="grid grid-cols-4 gap-4 p-4 hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors">
            <div className="font-medium text-gray-700">Monthly Premium</div>
            {plans.map(plan => (
              <div key={plan.id} className={`text-center p-3 rounded-xl ${
                getWinner('monthlyPremium', true) === plan.id
                  ? 'bg-green-50 border-2 border-green-500'
                  : 'bg-gray-50'
              }`}>
                <div className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">${plan.monthlyPremium}</div>
                <div className="text-xs text-gray-600">/month</div>
                {getWinner('monthlyPremium', true) === plan.id && (
                  <div className="text-xs text-green-600 font-bold mt-1 flex items-center justify-center gap-1">
                    <Crown size={10} />
                    LOWEST
                  </div>
                )}
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>

          {/* Annual Cost */}
          <div className="grid grid-cols-4 gap-4 p-4 hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors">
            <div className="font-medium text-gray-700">Annual Cost</div>
            {plans.map(plan => (
              <div key={plan.id} className="text-center p-3 bg-gray-50 rounded-xl">
                <div className="text-xl font-bold text-gray-900">${(plan.monthlyPremium * 12).toLocaleString()}</div>
                <div className="text-xs text-gray-600">per year</div>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>

          {/* 3-Year Total Cost */}
          <div className="grid grid-cols-4 gap-4 p-4 hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors">
            <div className="font-medium text-gray-700">3-Year Total Cost</div>
            {plans.map(plan => {
              const threeYearCost = (plan.monthlyPremium * 36) + (plan.deductible * 3);
              return (
                <div key={plan.id} className="text-center p-3 bg-gray-50 rounded-xl">
                  <div className="text-lg font-bold text-gray-900">${threeYearCost.toLocaleString()}</div>
                  <div className="text-xs text-gray-600">with deductibles</div>
                </div>
              );
            })}
          </div>

          {/* Deductible */}
          <div className="grid grid-cols-4 gap-4 p-4 hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors">
            <div className="font-medium text-gray-700">Deductible</div>
            {plans.map(plan => (
              <div key={plan.id} className={`text-center p-3 rounded-xl ${
                getWinner('deductible', true) === plan.id
                  ? 'bg-green-50 border-2 border-green-500'
                  : 'bg-gray-50'
              }`}>
                <div className="text-xl font-bold text-gray-900">${plan.deductible.toLocaleString()}</div>
                {getWinner('deductible', true) === plan.id && (
                  <div className="text-xs text-green-600 font-bold mt-1">LOWEST</div>
                )}
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>

          {/* Out-of-Pocket Maximum */}
          {plans.some(p => p.outOfPocketMax) && (
            <div className="grid grid-cols-4 gap-4 p-4 hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors">
              <div className="font-medium text-gray-700">
                <div>Out-of-Pocket Max</div>
                <div className="text-xs text-gray-500 font-normal">Maximum you pay per year</div>
              </div>
              {plans.map(plan => (
                <div key={plan.id} className="text-center p-3 bg-gray-50 rounded-xl">
                  <div className="text-xl font-bold text-gray-900">
                    {plan.outOfPocketMax ? `$${plan.outOfPocketMax.toLocaleString()}` : 'N/A'}
                  </div>
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          )}

          {/* Copay */}
          {plans.some(p => p.copay) && (
            <div className="grid grid-cols-4 gap-4 p-4 hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors">
              <div className="font-medium text-gray-700">
                <div>Copay</div>
                <div className="text-xs text-gray-500 font-normal">Per doctor visit</div>
              </div>
              {plans.map(plan => (
                <div key={plan.id} className="text-center p-3 bg-gray-50 rounded-xl">
                  <div className="text-xl font-bold text-gray-900">
                    {plan.copay ? `$${plan.copay}` : 'N/A'}
                  </div>
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          )}

          {/* Coinsurance */}
          {plans.some(p => p.coinsurance) && (
            <div className="grid grid-cols-4 gap-4 p-4 hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors">
              <div className="font-medium text-gray-700">
                <div>Coinsurance</div>
                <div className="text-xs text-gray-500 font-normal">Your share after deductible</div>
              </div>
              {plans.map(plan => (
                <div key={plan.id} className="text-center p-3 bg-gray-50 rounded-xl">
                  <div className="text-xl font-bold text-gray-900">
                    {plan.coinsurance ? `${plan.coinsurance}%` : 'N/A'}
                  </div>
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* 2. COVERAGE & PROTECTION */}
      <div className="bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-3xl overflow-hidden">
        <div className="bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-50 to-indigo-50 border-b border-blue-100 px-6 py-4">
          <h3 className="font-bold text-gray-900 flex items-center gap-2">
            <Shield size={20} className="text-blue-600" />
            Coverage & Protection
          </h3>
        </div>
        <div className="divide-y divide-gray-100">
          {/* Coverage Amount */}
          <div className="grid grid-cols-4 gap-4 p-4 hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors">
            <div className="font-medium text-gray-700">
              <div>Coverage Amount</div>
              <div className="text-xs text-gray-500 font-normal">Maximum payout</div>
            </div>
            {plans.map(plan => (
              <div key={plan.id} className={`text-center p-3 rounded-xl ${
                getWinner('coverage') === plan.id
                  ? 'bg-blue-50 border-2 border-blue-500'
                  : 'bg-gray-50'
              }`}>
                <div className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">${(plan.coverage / 1000).toFixed(0)}K</div>
                {getWinner('coverage') === plan.id && (
                  <div className="text-xs text-blue-600 font-bold mt-1">HIGHEST</div>
                )}
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>

          {/* Network Size */}
          {plans.some(p => p.networkSize) && (
            <div className="grid grid-cols-4 gap-4 p-4 hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors">
              <div className="font-medium text-gray-700">
                <div>Network Size</div>
                <div className="text-xs text-gray-500 font-normal">In-network providers</div>
              </div>
              {plans.map(plan => (
                <div key={plan.id} className="text-center p-3 bg-gray-50 rounded-xl">
                  <div className="font-bold text-gray-900">
                    {plan.networkSize || 'N/A'}
                  </div>
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          )}

          {/* All Features Comparison */}
          <div className="p-4">
            <div className="font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-4">Feature Comparison</div>
            <div className="space-y-2">
              {getAllUniqueFeatures(plans).map((feature, idx) => (
                <div key={idx} className="grid grid-cols-4 gap-4 items-center py-2 hover:bg-gray-50 rounded-lg px-2">
                  <div className="text-sm text-gray-700">{feature}</div>
                  {plans.map(plan => (
                    <div key={plan.id} className="text-center">
                      {plan.features.includes(feature) ? (
                        <div className="inline-flex items-center justify-center w-8 h-8 bg-green-100 rounded-full">
                          <CheckCircle size={20} className="text-green-600" />
                        </div>
                      ) : (
                        <div className="inline-flex items-center justify-center w-8 h-8 bg-gray-100 rounded-full">
                          <X size={20} className="text-gray-400" />
                        </div>
                      )}
                    </div>
                  ))}
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* 3. RATINGS & REPUTATION */}
      <div className="bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-3xl overflow-hidden">
        <div className="bg-gradient-to-r from-yellow-50 to-orange-50 border-b border-yellow-100 px-6 py-4">
          <h3 className="font-bold text-gray-900 flex items-center gap-2">
            <Star size={20} className="text-yellow-600" />
            Ratings & Reputation
          </h3>
        </div>
        <div className="divide-y divide-gray-100">
          {/* Customer Rating */}
          <div className="grid grid-cols-4 gap-4 p-4 hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors">
            <div className="font-medium text-gray-700">Customer Rating</div>
            {plans.map(plan => (
              <div key={plan.id} className={`text-center p-3 rounded-xl ${
                getWinner('rating') === plan.id
                  ? 'bg-yellow-50 border-2 border-yellow-500'
                  : 'bg-gray-50'
              }`}>
                <div className="flex items-center justify-center gap-1 mb-1">
                  <Star size={20} className="text-yellow-500 fill-yellow-500" />
                  <span className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">{plan.rating}</span>
                </div>
                <div className="text-xs text-gray-600">{plan.reviews.toLocaleString()} reviews</div>
                {getWinner('rating') === plan.id && (
                  <div className="text-xs text-yellow-600 font-bold mt-1">HIGHEST RATED</div>
                )}
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>

          {/* Financial Strength */}
          {plans.some(p => p.financialStrength) && (
            <div className="grid grid-cols-4 gap-4 p-4 hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors">
              <div className="font-medium text-gray-700">
                <div>Financial Strength</div>
                <div className="text-xs text-gray-500 font-normal">Credit rating</div>
              </div>
              {plans.map(plan => (
                <div key={plan.id} className="text-center p-3 bg-gray-50 rounded-xl">
                  <div className="text-xl font-bold text-gray-900">
                    {plan.financialStrength || 'N/A'}
                  </div>
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          )}

          {/* Number of People Comparing */}
          {plans.some(p => p.comparingNow) && (
            <div className="grid grid-cols-4 gap-4 p-4 hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors">
              <div className="font-medium text-gray-700">
                <div>Popularity</div>
                <div className="text-xs text-gray-500 font-normal">Currently comparing</div>
              </div>
              {plans.map(plan => (
                <div key={plan.id} className="text-center p-3 bg-gray-50 rounded-xl">
                  <div className="flex items-center justify-center gap-1 mb-1">
                    <Users size={18} className="text-blue-600" />
                    <span className="text-xl font-bold text-gray-900">{plan.comparingNow}</span>
                  </div>
                  <div className="text-xs text-gray-600">people now</div>
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* 4. SERVICE & SUPPORT */}
      <div className="bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-3xl overflow-hidden">
        <div className="bg-gradient-to-r from-purple-50 to-pink-50 border-b border-purple-100 px-6 py-4">
          <h3 className="font-bold text-gray-900 flex items-center gap-2">
            <Zap size={20} className="text-purple-600" />
            Service & Support
          </h3>
        </div>
        <div className="divide-y divide-gray-100">
          {/* Claim Processing Time */}
          {plans.some(p => p.claimProcessingDays) && (
            <div className="grid grid-cols-4 gap-4 p-4 hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors">
              <div className="font-medium text-gray-700">
                <div>Claim Processing</div>
                <div className="text-xs text-gray-500 font-normal">Average turnaround time</div>
              </div>
              {plans.map(plan => {
                const fastestDays = Math.min(...plans.filter(p => p.claimProcessingDays).map(p => p.claimProcessingDays!));
                const isFastest = plan.claimProcessingDays === fastestDays;
                
                return (
                  <div key={plan.id} className={`text-center p-3 rounded-xl ${
                    isFastest
                      ? 'bg-purple-50 border-2 border-purple-500'
                      : 'bg-gray-50'
                  }`}>
                    <div className="flex items-center justify-center gap-1 mb-1">
                      <Clock size={18} className="text-purple-600" />
                      <span className="text-xl font-bold text-gray-900">
                        {plan.claimProcessingDays || 'N/A'}
                      </span>
                    </div>
                    <div className="text-xs text-gray-600">days</div>
                    {isFastest && plan.claimProcessingDays && (
                      <div className="text-xs text-purple-600 font-bold mt-1">FASTEST</div>
                    )}
                  </div>
                );
              })}
            </div>
          )}

          {/* 24/7 Support */}
          <div className="grid grid-cols-4 gap-4 p-4 hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors">
            <div className="font-medium text-gray-700">24/7 Customer Support</div>
            {plans.map(plan => {
              const has247Support = plan.features.some(f => 
                f.toLowerCase().includes('24/7') || 
                f.toLowerCase().includes('roadside')
              );
              return (
                <div key={plan.id} className="text-center p-3">
                  {has247Support ? (
                    <div className="inline-flex items-center justify-center w-8 h-8 bg-green-100 rounded-full">
                      <CheckCircle size={20} className="text-green-600" />
                    </div>
                  ) : (
                    <div className="inline-flex items-center justify-center w-8 h-8 bg-gray-100 rounded-full">
                      <X size={20} className="text-gray-400" />
                    </div>
                  )}
                </div>
              );
            })}
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* 5. MATCH SCORE & RECOMMENDATION */}
      <div className="bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-50 to-indigo-50 border-2 border-blue-200 rounded-3xl p-6">
        <h3 className="font-bold text-gray-900 mb-4 flex items-center gap-2">
          <Sparkles size={20} className="text-blue-600" />
          AI Match Score & Recommendation
        </h3>
        <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-4">
          {plans.map(plan => {
            const score = getDecisionScore(plan);
            const isRecommended = plan.id === recommendedPlan.id;
            return (
              <div key={plan.id} className={`text-center p-6 rounded-2xl transition-all ${
                isRecommended
                  ? 'bg-gradient-to-br from-green-50 to-emerald-50 border-2 border-green-500 shadow-lg scale-105'
                  : 'bg-white border border-gray-200'
              }`}>
                <div className="text-4xl mb-3">{plan.logo}</div>
                <div className="font-bold text-lg text-gray-900 mb-3">{plan.provider}</div>
                
                {/* Progress bar */}
                <div className="relative w-full h-4 bg-gray-200 rounded-full overflow-hidden mb-2">
                  <div 
                    className={`absolute top-0 left-0 h-full rounded-full transition-all ${
                      isRecommended
                        ? 'bg-gradient-to-r from-green-600 to-emerald-600'
                        : 'bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600'
                    }`}
                    style={{ width: `${score}%` }}
                  />
                </div>
                
                <div className={`text-3xl font-bold mb-2 ${isRecommended ? 'text-green-600' : 'text-blue-600'}`}>
                  {score}%
                </div>
                <div className="text-sm text-gray-600 mb-3">Match Score</div>
                
                {isRecommended && (
                  <div className="mt-3 px-4 py-2 bg-gradient-to-r from-green-600 to-emerald-600 text-white text-sm rounded-full font-bold inline-flex items-center gap-2 shadow-lg">
                    <Trophy size={14} />
                    BEST OVERALL MATCH
                  </div>
                )}
              </div>
            );
          })}
        </div>
        
        {/* Recommendation explanation */}
        <div className="mt-6 bg-white rounded-xl p-4 border border-blue-200">
          <div className="text-sm text-gray-700">
            <strong className="text-blue-600">Why {recommendedPlan.provider}?</strong> Based on your priorities, this plan offers the best combination of pricing, coverage, and customer satisfaction.
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

```

```tsx
import { FileText, GitCompare, AlertTriangle, Bell, Globe, Lock, Shield } from 'lucide-react';
import { ImageWithFallback } from '../figma/ImageWithFallback';

export function Benefits() {
  const benefits = [
    {
      icon: FileText,
      title: 'Plain-language coverage',
      description: 'See exactly what you\'re covered for, with technical terms explained in simple, human language.',
      color: 'from-blue-500 to-cyan-500',
    },
    {
      icon: GitCompare,
      title: 'Side-by-side benchmarks',
      description: 'Compare limits, deductibles, and key extensions across multiple policies in one view.',
      color: 'from-green-500 to-emerald-500',
    },
    {
      icon: AlertTriangle,
      title: 'Hidden exclusions surfaced',
      description: 'Spot exclusions and tricky clauses that reduce coverage so you can discuss them with your broker.',
      color: 'from-purple-500 to-pink-500',
    },
    {
      icon: Bell,
      title: 'Renewal & notification center',
      description: 'Get reminders before renewal dates and important coverage milestones.',
      color: 'from-orange-500 to-red-500',
    },
    {
      icon: Globe,
      title: 'Local language + English',
      description: 'Review your coverage in your local language, with optional English summaries for international stakeholders.',
      color: 'from-indigo-500 to-blue-500',
    },
    {
      icon: Lock,
      title: 'Bank-level security',
      description: 'Your policy documents are encrypted and never shared without your permission.',
      color: 'from-yellow-500 to-orange-500',
    },
    {
      icon: Shield,
      title: 'Comprehensive protection',
      description: 'Enjoy a wide range of coverage options tailored to your specific needs.',
      color: 'from-gray-500 to-gray-900',
    },
  ];

  return (
    <section id="benefits" className="py-24 bg-white">
      <div className="container mx-auto px-4">
        <div className="text-center max-w-3xl mx-auto mb-20">
          <h2 className="text-4xl md:text-5xl mb-6 tracking-tight">
            Why policyholders <span className="bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 bg-clip-text text-transparent">love</span> InsureBench
          </h2>
          <p className="text-xl text-gray-600">
            Turn complex policy wording into clear, comparable coverage insights.
          </p>
        </div>

        <div className="grid lg:grid-cols-2 gap-16 items-center mb-20">
          <div className="grid gap-6">
            {benefits.map((benefit, index) => {
              const Icon = benefit.icon;
              return (
                <div key={index} className="group bg-gradient-to-br from-white to-gray-50 rounded-3xl p-6 shadow-sm hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-500 border border-gray-100 hover:-translate-y-1">
                  <div className="flex items-start gap-4">
                    <div className={`flex-shrink-0 w-12 h-12 bg-gradient-to-br ${benefit.color} rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center shadow-lg group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform`}>
                      <Icon className="text-white" size={22} />
                    </div>
                    <div>
                      <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold mb-2 text-gray-900">{benefit.title}</h3>
                      <p className="text-gray-600">{benefit.description}</p>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              );
            })}
          </div>

          <div className="relative">
            <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-400/20 to-purple-400/20 rounded-[3rem] blur-3xl" />
            <ImageWithFallback 
              src="https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1705909770198-7e83c24e1616?crop=entropy&cs=tinysrgb&fit=max&fm=jpg&ixid=M3w3Nzg4Nzd8MHwxfHNlYXJjaHwxfHxtb2Rlcm4lMjBtaW5pbWFsJTIwd29ya3NwYWNlfGVufDF8fHx8MTc2NDE1MzU1NHww&ixlib=rb-4.1.0&q=80&w=1080&utm_source=figma&utm_medium=referral"
              alt="Modern workspace"
              className="relative rounded-[3rem] shadow-2xl"
            />
            
            {/* Floating Stats Card */}
            <div className="absolute -bottom-6 -right-6 bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-xl rounded-2xl p-6 shadow-2xl border border-white/20 max-w-xs">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-3">
                <div className="w-12 h-12 bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-500 to-indigo-500 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center">
                  <Shield className="text-white" size={24} />
                </div>
                <div>
                  <div className="text-sm text-gray-600">Coverage insights</div>
                  <div className="text-xl font-semibold text-gray-900">Key limits, exclusions, and gaps at a glance</div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </section>
  );
}
```

## File: `components (2)/landing/CompareSection.tsx`
- Bytes: 7,068
- SHA256: `3f0a69fa18c9278c6699756727ff3a7eef097dc1ccafb4074cb833a4819143c9`

```tsx
import { UploadWidget } from './UploadWidget';
import { Policy } from '../../App';
import { Sparkles, Upload, Brain, LineChart, ArrowRight, CheckCircle } from 'lucide-react';
import { RenewalTimeline, RenewalTimelineMobile } from './RenewalTimeline';

type CompareSectionProps = {
  onPoliciesUploaded: (policies: Policy[]) => void;
  onNavigateToUpload: () => void;
};

export function CompareSection({ onPoliciesUploaded, onNavigateToUpload }: CompareSectionProps) {
  const steps = [
    {
      number: '01',
      icon: Upload,
      title: 'Upload Your Policies',
      description: 'Simply upload your existing insurance policies in any format - PDF, images, or documents. No data entry required.',
      features: [
        'Supports PDF, JPG, PNG',
        'Multiple policies at once',
        'Secure & encrypted'
      ]
    },
    {
      number: '02',
      icon: Brain,
      title: 'AI Analyzes Everything',
      description: 'Our AI instantly reads and understands your policies, extracting coverage details, terms, exclusions, and key information.',
      features: [
        'Coverage gap detection',
        'Term extraction',
        'Risk assessment'
      ]
    },
    {
      number: '03',
      icon: LineChart,
      title: 'Get Clear Insights',
      description: 'Receive plain-language explanations, side-by-side comparisons, and actionable recommendations to optimize your coverage.',
      features: [
        'Plain language summaries',
        'Benchmark comparisons',
        'Coverage recommendations'
      ]
    }
  ];

  return (
    <section id="get-started" className="py-24 relative overflow-hidden bg-gradient-to-br from-slate-50 to-blue-50">
      <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-[url('data:image/svg+xml;base64,')] opacity-40" />
      
      <div className="relative container mx-auto px-4">
        <div className="max-w-6xl mx-auto">
          {/* Section Header */}
          <div className="text-center mb-16">
            <div className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600/10 to-indigo-600/10 backdrop-blur-sm border border-blue-200 rounded-full mb-6">
              <Sparkles size={16} className="text-blue-600" />
              <span className="text-sm font-medium text-blue-600">Simple 3-Step Process</span>
            </div>
            <h2 className="text-4xl md:text-5xl mb-4 tracking-tight text-gray-900">
              How It <span className="bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 bg-clip-text text-transparent">Works</span>
            </h2>
            <p className="text-xl text-gray-600 max-w-2xl mx-auto">
              Get AI-powered policy insights in minutes. No insurance expertise needed.
            </p>
          </div>

          {/* Steps Grid */}
          <div className="grid lg:grid-cols-3 gap-8 mb-12">
            {steps.map((step, index) => (
              <div key={step.number} className="relative">
                {/* Connector Arrow - Desktop Only */}
                {index < steps.length - 1 && (
                  <div className="hidden lg:block absolute top-24 -right-4 z-10">
                    <ArrowRight className="text-blue-400" size={32} strokeWidth={2} />
                  </div>
                )}

                {/* Step Card */}
                <div className="relative bg-white rounded-3xl p-8 shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all border border-gray-100 h-full group">
                  {/* Step Number Badge */}
                  <div className="absolute -top-4 -left-4 w-12 h-12 bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center shadow-lg">
                    <span className="text-white font-bold">{step.number}</span>
                  </div>

                  {/* Icon */}
                  <div className="w-16 h-16 bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-100 to-indigo-100 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center mb-6 group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform">
                    <step.icon className="text-blue-600" size={32} />
                  </div>

                  {/* Content */}
                  <h3 className="text-2xl mb-3 text-gray-900">{step.title}</h3>
                  <p className="text-gray-600 mb-6 leading-relaxed">
                    {step.description}
                  </p>

                  {/* Features */}
                  <ul className="space-y-3">
                    {step.features.map((feature, idx) => (
                      <li key={idx} className="flex items-start gap-2 text-sm text-gray-700">
                        <CheckCircle className="text-emerald-500 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" size={16} />
                        <span>{feature}</span>
                      </li>
                    ))}
                  </ul>
                </div>

                {/* Mobile Connector */}
                {index < steps.length - 1 && (
                  <div className="lg:hidden flex justify-center my-4">
                    <div className="w-0.5 h-8 bg-gradient-to-b from-blue-400 to-indigo-400" />
                  </div>
                )}
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>

          {/* CTA Section */}
          <div className="text-center bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 rounded-3xl p-8 md:p-12 shadow-xl">
            <h3 className="text-3xl md:text-4xl text-white mb-4">
              Ready to Get Started?
            </h3>
            <p className="text-xl text-blue-100 mb-8 max-w-2xl mx-auto">
              Upload your first policy and see the AI-powered insights in action.
            </p>
            
            <button
              onClick={onNavigateToUpload}
              className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-8 py-4 bg-white text-blue-600 rounded-xl hover:bg-blue-50 transition-all shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl hover:scale-105"
            >
              <Upload size={20} />
              <span className="font-semibold">Upload Your Policy</span>
            </button>

            <div className="flex flex-wrap justify-center gap-6 mt-8 text-blue-100 text-sm">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                <CheckCircle size={18} />
                <span>Free to try</span>
              </div>
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                <CheckCircle size={18} />
                <span>No credit card required</span>
              </div>
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                <CheckCircle size={18} />
                <span>Results in minutes</span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </section>
  );
}

```
