```tsx
import { CheckCircle2, XCircle, AlertCircle } from 'lucide-react';

export function ComparisonMock() {
  const comparisonData = [
    {
      label: 'Coverage Limit',
      policyA: { value: '$500,000', highlight: false },
      policyB: { value: '$750,000', highlight: true },
      policyC: { value: '$500,000', highlight: false },
    },
    {
      label: 'Deductible',
      policyA: { value: '$2,500', highlight: false },
      policyB: { value: '$1,000', highlight: true },
      policyC: { value: '$2,500', highlight: false },
    },
    {
      label: 'Flood Coverage',
      policyA: { value: 'Included', icon: CheckCircle2, highlight: true },
      policyB: { value: 'Excluded', icon: XCircle, highlight: false },
      policyC: { value: 'Optional', icon: AlertCircle, highlight: false },
    },
    {
      label: 'Personal Property',
      policyA: { value: '$100,000', highlight: false },
      policyB: { value: '$150,000', highlight: true },
      policyC: { value: '$100,000', highlight: false },
    },
  ];

  return (
    <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl shadow-2xl border border-gray-100 overflow-hidden">
      {/* Header */}
      <div className="grid grid-cols-4 gap-0 bg-gradient-to-r from-slate-50 to-blue-50 border-b border-gray-200">
        <div className="p-4 border-r border-gray-200"></div>
        <div className="p-4 border-r border-gray-200">
          <div className="text-center">
            <div className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-900">Policy A</div>
            <div className="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-1">Property Insurance</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div className="p-4 border-r border-gray-200">
          <div className="text-center">
            <div className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-900">Policy B</div>
            <div className="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-1">Property Insurance</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div className="p-4">
          <div className="text-center">
            <div className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-900">Policy C</div>
            <div className="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-1">Property Insurance</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Rows */}
      {comparisonData.map((row, index) => (
        <div key={index} className="grid grid-cols-4 gap-0 border-b border-gray-100 hover:bg-gray-50/50 transition-colors">
          <div className="p-4 border-r border-gray-100">
            <span className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-700">{row.label}</span>
          </div>
          <div className={`p-4 border-r border-gray-100 text-center ${row.policyA.highlight ? 'bg-green-50' : ''}`}>
            <div className="flex items-center justify-center gap-2">
              {row.policyA.icon && <row.policyA.icon size={16} className={row.policyA.highlight ? 'text-green-600' : 'text-gray-400'} />}
              <span className={`text-sm ${row.policyA.highlight ? 'font-semibold text-green-700' : 'text-gray-600'}`}>
                {row.policyA.value}
              </span>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div className={`p-4 border-r border-gray-100 text-center ${row.policyB.highlight ? 'bg-blue-50' : ''}`}>
            <div className="flex items-center justify-center gap-2">
              {row.policyB.icon && <row.policyB.icon size={16} className={row.policyB.highlight ? 'text-blue-600' : 'text-gray-400'} />}
              <span className={`text-sm ${row.policyB.highlight ? 'font-semibold text-blue-700' : 'text-gray-600'}`}>
                {row.policyB.value}
              </span>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div className={`p-4 text-center ${row.policyC.highlight ? 'bg-purple-50' : ''}`}>
            <div className="flex items-center justify-center gap-2">
              {row.policyC.icon && <row.policyC.icon size={16} className={row.policyC.highlight ? 'text-purple-600' : 'text-gray-400'} />}
              <span className={`text-sm ${row.policyC.highlight ? 'font-semibold text-purple-700' : 'text-gray-600'}`}>
                {row.policyC.value}
              </span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      ))}

    </div>
  );
}

export function ComparisonMockMobile() {
  return (
    <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-xl border border-gray-100 overflow-hidden">
      <div className="p-4 bg-gradient-to-r from-slate-50 to-blue-50 border-b border-gray-200">
        <div className="text-center text-sm font-semibold text-gray-900">Side-by-side Comparison</div>
      </div>
      
      <div className="p-4 space-y-3">
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-3 bg-green-50 rounded-xl border border-green-100">
          <span className="text-xs font-medium text-gray-700">Coverage Limit</span>
          <span className="text-sm font-semibold text-green-700">$750,000</span>
        </div>
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-3 bg-blue-50 rounded-xl border border-blue-100">
          <span className="text-xs font-medium text-gray-700">Deductible</span>
          <span className="text-sm font-semibold text-blue-700">$1,000</span>
        </div>
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-3 bg-purple-50 rounded-xl border border-purple-100">
          <span className="text-xs font-medium text-gray-700">Flood Coverage</span>
          <span className="text-sm font-semibold text-purple-700 flex items-center gap-1">
            <CheckCircle2 size={14} />
            Included
          </span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div className="p-3 bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-50 to-indigo-50 text-center border-t border-gray-100">
        <span className="text-xs text-gray-600">Highlights best values across policies</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
```

## File: `components (2)/landing/FAQ.tsx`
- Bytes: 3,498
- SHA256: `c35350524e8251e187abe71513bde443495e6ac232099eaabe1f4a634aaa9785`

```tsx
import { useState } from 'react';
import { ChevronDown, Sparkles } from 'lucide-react';

export function FAQ() {
  const [openIndex, setOpenIndex] = useState<number | null>(0);

  const faqs = [
    {
      question: 'What does InsureBench do?',
      answer: 'InsureBench analyzes your existing insurance policies, explains coverage, extensions, and exclusions in plain language, and lets you compare multiple policies side-by-side.',
    },
    {
      question: 'What types of policies can I analyze?',
      answer: 'You can start with property, cargo, liability, and other commercial policies. We also support many standard personal policies. Just upload your documents and we\'ll guide you.',
    },
    {
      question: 'How accurate is the analysis?',
      answer: 'Our AI is trained on real policy documents, and we continuously improve it. You should always review the output and, if needed, confirm details with your broker or insurer.',
    },
    {
      question: 'Can I compare more than one policy?',
      answer: 'Yes. You can compare 2–3 policies at a time to see differences in limits, deductibles, extensions, and exclusions.',
    },
    {
      question: 'Will I get renewal reminders?',
      answer: 'Yes. When you provide policy dates, InsureBench can send you reminders ahead of renewals and other important milestones.',
    },
    {
      question: 'Is my data secure?',
      answer: 'Yes. Your documents are encrypted in transit and at rest. We never share your policies with third parties without your consent.',
    },
  ];

  return (
    <section id="faq" className="py-24 bg-white">
      <div className="container mx-auto px-4">
        <div className="text-center max-w-3xl mx-auto mb-20">
          <div className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 bg-blue-50 border border-blue-100 rounded-full mb-6">
            <Sparkles className="text-blue-600" size={16} />
            <span className="text-sm font-medium text-blue-900">Questions?</span>
          </div>
          <h2 className="text-4xl md:text-5xl mb-6 tracking-tight">
            Everything you <span className="bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 bg-clip-text text-transparent">need to know</span>
          </h2>
          <p className="text-xl text-gray-600">
            Can't find your answer? Chat with us anytime
          </p>
        </div>

        <div className="max-w-3xl mx-auto space-y-4">
          {faqs.map((faq, index) => (
            <div key={index} className="bg-white rounded-2xl overflow-hidden border border-gray-200 hover:border-blue-200 transition-all">
              <button
                onClick={() => setOpenIndex(openIndex === index ? null : index)}
                className="w-full flex items-center justify-between p-6 text-left hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors"
              >
                <span className="font-semibold text-gray-900 pr-4">{faq.question}</span>
                <ChevronDown
                  className={`flex-shrink-0 text-gray-400 transition-transform duration-300 ${
                    openIndex === index ? 'rotate-180' : ''
                  }`}
                  size={20}
                />
              </button>
              {openIndex === index && (
                <div className="px-6 pb-6 pt-0">
                  <p className="text-gray-600 leading-relaxed">{faq.answer}</p>
                </div>
              )}
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
      </div>
    </section>
  );
}

```

```tsx
import { Shield, Mail, Phone, MapPin, Sparkles } from 'lucide-react';

export function Footer() {
  return (
    <footer className="relative bg-gradient-to-br from-slate-900 via-blue-900 to-indigo-900 text-gray-300 py-16 overflow-hidden">
      <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-[url('data:image/svg+xml;base64,')] opacity-40" />
      
      <div className="relative container mx-auto px-4">
        <div className="grid md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-12 mb-12">
          <div>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-6">
              <div className="w-11 h-11 bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center shadow-xl">
                <Sparkles className="text-white" size={20} />
              </div>
              <div>
                <span className="text-white text-xl font-semibold">InsureBench</span>
                <div className="text-xs text-blue-300">Policy Benchmarking & Coverage Assistant</div>
              </div>
            </div>
            <p className="text-sm mb-6 text-gray-400 leading-relaxed">
              InsureBench makes insurance policies clear, comparable, and understandable with the power of AI.
            </p>
            <div className="flex gap-3">
              {['📘', '🐦', '💼', '📸'].map((emoji, i) => (
                <a key={i} href="#" className="w-10 h-10 bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center hover:bg-white/20 transition-all hover:scale-110">
                  <span>{emoji}</span>
                </a>
              ))}
            </div>
          </div>

          <div>
            <h3 className="text-white mb-4">Quick Links</h3>
            <ul className="space-y-2 text-sm">
              <li><a href="#how-it-works" className="hover:text-white transition-colors">How It Works</a></li>
              <li><a href="#benefits" className="hover:text-white transition-colors">Benefits</a></li>
              <li><a href="#testimonials" className="hover:text-white transition-colors">Testimonials</a></li>
              <li><a href="#faq" className="hover:text-white transition-colors">FAQ</a></li>
            </ul>
          </div>

          <div>
            <h3 className="text-white mb-4">Insurance Types</h3>
            <ul className="space-y-2 text-sm">
              <li><a href="#" className="hover:text-white transition-colors">Property Insurance</a></li>
              <li><a href="#" className="hover:text-white transition-colors">Cargo & Transit</a></li>
              <li><a href="#" className="hover:text-white transition-colors">Liability Insurance</a></li>
              <li><a href="#" className="hover:text-white transition-colors">Other Commercial Policies</a></li>
            </ul>
          </div>

          <div>
            <h3 className="text-white mb-4">Contact Us</h3>
            <ul className="space-y-3 text-sm">
              <li className="flex items-start gap-2">
                <Mail size={18} className="flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
                <span>support@insurebench.com</span>
              </li>
              <li className="flex items-start gap-2">
                <Phone size={18} className="flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
                <span>1-800-INSURE-1</span>
              </li>
              <li className="flex items-start gap-2">
                <MapPin size={18} className="flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
                <span>123 Insurance Way<br />San Francisco, CA 94105</span>
              </li>
            </ul>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="border-t border-white/10 pt-8 flex flex-col md:flex-row justify-between items-center gap-4 text-sm">
          <p className="text-gray-400">&copy; 2025 InsureBench. Powered by AI.</p>
          <div className="flex gap-6">
            <a href="#" className="text-gray-400 hover:text-white transition-colors">Privacy</a>
            <a href="#" className="text-gray-400 hover:text-white transition-colors">Terms</a>
            <a href="#" className="text-gray-400 hover:text-white transition-colors">Cookies</a>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </footer>
  );
}
```

## File: `components (2)/landing/Hero.tsx`

- SHA256: `a93513ac1e7462a13f94081aa166d502aec16c636575b764ddfce91d45e89821`

```tsx
import { Shield, Menu, X, Sparkles, ArrowRight, Lock, Phone, Upload, User, Search, Bell, ChevronDown, Settings, LogOut, HelpCircle } from 'lucide-react';
import { useState } from 'react';
import { UploadWidget } from './UploadWidget';
import { Policy } from '../../App';
import { ImageWithFallback } from '../figma/ImageWithFallback';
import { StaggeredList, AnimatedButton, NumberCounter, ScaleOnHover } from '../animations/AnimatedComponents';
import { ComparisonMock, ComparisonMockMobile } from './ComparisonMock';
import { LanguageToggle } from './LanguageToggle';

type HeroProps = {
  onPoliciesUploaded: (policies: Policy[]) => void;
  onNavigateToComparison: () => void;
  onNavigateToUpload: () => void;
  onNavigateToDashboard?: () => void;
  onNavigateToChat?: () => void;
  onNavigateToHelpCenter?: () => void;
  onNavigateToMyAccount?: () => void;
  onNavigateToSettings?: () => void;
  onNavigateToLanding?: () => void;
  onNavigateToTurkishKaskoDemo?: () => void;
  policyCount?: number;
};

export function Hero({ 
  onPoliciesUploaded, 
  onNavigateToComparison, 
  onNavigateToUpload, 
  onNavigateToDashboard, 
  onNavigateToChat,
  onNavigateToHelpCenter,
  onNavigateToMyAccount,
  onNavigateToSettings,
  onNavigateToLanding,
  onNavigateToTurkishKaskoDemo,
  policyCount = 0
}: HeroProps) {
  const [mobileMenuOpen, setMobileMenuOpen] = useState(false);
  const [showProfileMenu, setShowProfileMenu] = useState(false);

  return (
    <div className="relative bg-gradient-to-b from-slate-50 to-white overflow-hidden">
      {/* Decorative Elements */}
      <div className="absolute top-0 right-0 w-[600px] h-[600px] bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-100/40 to-purple-100/40 rounded-full blur-3xl -translate-y-1/2 translate-x-1/2" />
      <div className="absolute bottom-0 left-0 w-[500px] h-[500px] bg-gradient-to-tr from-indigo-100/40 to-blue-100/40 rounded-full blur-3xl translate-y-1/2 -translate-x-1/2" />
      
      {/* Navigation */}
      <nav className="relative bg-white border-b border-gray-200 sticky top-0 z-50 shadow-sm">
        {/* Top utility bar */}
        <div className="bg-slate-50 border-b border-gray-200">
          <div className="max-w-[1600px] mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
            <div className="flex items-center justify-between h-9 text-xs">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
                <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5 text-gray-600">
                  <Lock size={12} className="text-emerald-600" />
                  <span>Secure & Encrypted</span>
                </div>
                <div className="hidden sm:flex items-center gap-1.5 text-gray-600">
                  <Shield size={12} className="text-blue-600" />
                  <span>Licensed Insurance Advisors</span>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
                <a 
                  href="tel:1-855-555-0123" 
                  className="flex items-center gap-1.5 text-gray-700 hover:text-slate-900 font-medium transition-colors"
                >
                  <Phone size={12} />
                  <span className="hidden sm:inline">1-855-555-0123</span>
                  <span className="sm:hidden">Call Us</span>
                </a>
                <button 
                  onClick={() => {
                    if (onNavigateToHelpCenter) onNavigateToHelpCenter();
                  }}
                  className="text-gray-600 hover:text-slate-900 transition-colors"
                >
                  Help
                </button>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Main navigation */}
        <div className="max-w-[1600px] mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8">
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between h-16">
            {/* Logo */}
            <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
              <ScaleOnHover>
                <div className="w-9 h-9 bg-gradient-to-br from-slate-700 to-slate-900 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center shadow-md">
                  <Shield className="text-white" size={18} />
                </div>
              </ScaleOnHover>
              <div className="hidden sm:block">
                <div className="font-bold text-gray-900">InsureBench</div>
                <div className="text-xs text-gray-500">Your Policy Benchmarking Command Center</div>
              </div>
            </div>
            
            {/* Desktop Navigation Items */}
            <div className="hidden md:flex items-center gap-1">
              {onNavigateToDashboard && (
                <button
                  onClick={onNavigateToDashboard}
                  className="flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg font-medium text-sm text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900 hover:bg-gray-50 transition-all"
                >
                  <span>Dashboard</span>
                  {policyCount > 0 && (
                    <span className="ml-1 px-1.5 py-0.5 bg-slate-700 text-white text-xs rounded-full font-semibold">
                      {policyCount > 9 ? '9+' : policyCount}
                    </span>
                  )}
                </button>
              )}
              <button
                onClick={onNavigateToComparison}
                className="flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg font-medium text-sm text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900 hover:bg-gray-50 transition-all"
              >
                <span>Compare</span>
              </button>
              {onNavigateToChat && policyCount > 0 && (
                <button
                  onClick={onNavigateToChat}
                  className="flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg font-medium text-sm text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900 hover:bg-gray-50 transition-all"
                >
                  <span>Chat</span>
                </button>
              )}
            </div>

            {/* Right side utilities */}
            <div className="hidden md:flex items-center gap-2">
              {/* Search - placeholder */}
              <button
                className="p-2 text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900 hover:bg-gray-100 rounded-lg transition-colors"
                aria-label="Search"
              >
                <Search size={20} />
              </button>

              {/* Notifications - placeholder */}
              <button
                className="relative p-2 text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900 hover:bg-gray-100 rounded-lg transition-colors"
                aria-label="Notifications"
              >
                <Bell size={20} />
              </button>

              {/* Upload Button - Primary CTA */}
              <button
                onClick={onNavigateToComparison}
                className="flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 text-white rounded-xl hover:shadow-lg hover:shadow-blue-500/30 transition-all font-medium text-sm ml-2"
              >
                <Upload size={18} />
                <span>Upload Policy</span>
              </button>

              {/* Sign In / Profile */}
              <div className="relative">
                <button
                  onClick={() => setShowProfileMenu(!showProfileMenu)}
                  className="flex items-center gap-2 p-2 hover:bg-gray-100 rounded-lg transition-colors"
                  aria-label="Profile menu"
                >
                  <div className="w-8 h-8 bg-slate-700 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center">
                    <User size={16} className="text-white" />
                  </div>
                  <ChevronDown size={16} className="text-gray-600" />
                </button>

                {showProfileMenu && (
                  <>
                    {/* Backdrop */}
                    <div 
                      className="fixed inset-0 z-40"
                      onClick={() => setShowProfileMenu(false)}
                    ></div>
                    
                    {/* Dropdown */}
                    <div className="absolute right-0 mt-2 w-56 bg-white rounded-xl shadow-lg border border-gray-200 py-2 z-50">
                      <div className="px-4 py-3 border-b border-gray-100">
                        <p className="font-semibold text-gray-900">John Doe</p>
                        <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">john@example.com</p>
                      </div>
                      <button 
                        onClick={() => {
                          setShowProfileMenu(false);
                          // Navigate to account page (to be implemented)
                          console.log('Navigate to My Account');
                          if (onNavigateToMyAccount) onNavigateToMyAccount();
                        }}
                        className="w-full flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors text-left"
                      >
                        <User size={16} />
                        <span>My Account</span>
                      </button>
                      <button 
                        onClick={() => {
                          setShowProfileMenu(false);
                          // Open settings modal or navigate to settings (to be implemented)
                          console.log('Navigate to Settings');
                          if (onNavigateToSettings) onNavigateToSettings();
                        }}
                        className="w-full flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors text-left"
                      >
                        <Settings size={16} />
                        <span>Settings</span>
                      </button>
                      <button 
                        onClick={() => {
                          setShowProfileMenu(false);
                          // Open help center or navigate to help (to be implemented)
                          console.log('Navigate to Help Center');
                          if (onNavigateToHelpCenter) onNavigateToHelpCenter();
                          else window.open('https://help.insurebench.com', '_blank');
                        }}
                        className="w-full flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-2 text-sm text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors text-left"
                      >
                        <HelpCircle size={16} />
                        <span>Help Center</span>
                      </button>
                      <div className="border-t border-gray-100 mt-2 pt-2">
                        <button 
                          onClick={() => {
                            setShowProfileMenu(false);
                            // Handle sign out (to be implemented)
                            console.log('Sign out clicked');
                            if (window.confirm('Are you sure you want to sign out?')) {
                              // Clear user session, redirect to login, etc.
                              if (onNavigateToLanding) onNavigateToLanding();
                            }
                          }}
                          className="w-full flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-2 text-sm text-red-600 hover:bg-red-50 transition-colors text-left"
                        >
                          <LogOut size={16} />
                          <span>Sign Out</span>
                        </button>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </>
                )}
              </div>
            </div>

            {/* Mobile menu button */}
            <button 
              className="md:hidden p-2 hover:bg-gray-100 rounded-xl transition-colors"
              onClick={() => setMobileMenuOpen(!mobileMenuOpen)}
            >
              {mobileMenuOpen ? <X size={24} /> : <Menu size={24} />}
            </button>
          </div>

          {/* Mobile Menu */}
          {mobileMenuOpen && (
            <div className="md:hidden py-4 space-y-2 bg-white border-t border-gray-200">
              {onNavigateToDashboard && (
                <button 
                  onClick={onNavigateToDashboard}
                  className="block w-full text-left px-4 py-2.5 text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-50 rounded-xl transition-colors"
                >
                  Dashboard
                </button>
              )}
              <button 
                onClick={onNavigateToComparison}
                className="block w-full text-left px-4 py-2.5 text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-50 rounded-xl transition-colors"
              >
                Compare
              </button>
              {onNavigateToChat && policyCount > 0 && (
                <button 
                  onClick={onNavigateToChat}
                  className="block w-full text-left px-4 py-2.5 text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-50 rounded-xl transition-colors"
                >
                  Chat
                </button>
              )}
              <button 
                onClick={onNavigateToComparison}
                className="block w-full px-4 py-2.5 bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 text-white rounded-xl text-center"
              >
                Upload Policy
              </button>
              <button 
                className="block w-full text-left px-4 py-2.5 text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-50 rounded-xl transition-colors"
              >
                Sign In
              </button>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      </nav>

      {/* Hero Content */}
      <div className="relative container mx-auto px-4 py-16 md:py-24">
        <div className="grid lg:grid-cols-2 gap-12 lg:gap-16 items-center">
          {/* Left Column - Text Content */}
          <StaggeredList staggerDelay={0.15}>
            {[
              /* AI Badge */
              <div key="badge" className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-sm border border-blue-100 rounded-full shadow-sm">
                <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
                  <div className="w-2 h-2 bg-green-500 rounded-full animate-pulse" />
                  <Sparkles className="text-blue-600" size={16} />
                </div>
                <span className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-700">AI-powered policy analysis · For risk-aware individuals and teams</span>
              </div>,
              
              /* Headline */
              <h1 key="headline" className="text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl leading-[1.1] tracking-tight">
                Understand and <span className="bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 via-indigo-600 to-purple-600 bg-clip-text text-transparent">benchmark</span> your insurance policies in minutes
              </h1>,
              
              /* Subheadline */
              <p key="subheadline" className="text-xl md:text-2xl text-gray-600 leading-relaxed">
                Upload your policy documents and let AI translate coverage, extensions, and exclusions into plain language. Compare 2–3 policies side-by-side and track renewals in one place.
              </p>,

              /* Benefits */
              <div key="benefits" className="flex flex-wrap gap-6 text-sm text-gray-600">
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                  <div className="w-5 h-5 bg-green-100 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center">
                    <svg className="w-3 h-3 text-green-600" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 20 20">
                      <path fillRule="evenodd" d="M16.707 5.293a1 1 0 010 1.414l-8 8a1 1 0 01-1.414 0l-4-4a1 1 0 011.414-1.414L8 12.586l7.293-7.293a1 1 0 011.414 0z" clipRule="evenodd"/>
                    </svg>
                  </div>
                  <span>Works with PDF, Word, and scanned images</span>
                </div>
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                  <div className="w-5 h-5 bg-green-100 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center">
                    <svg className="w-3 h-3 text-green-600" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 20 20">
                      <path fillRule="evenodd" d="M16.707 5.293a1 1 0 010 1.414l-8 8a1 1 0 01-1.414 0l-4-4a1 1 0 011.414-1.414L8 12.586l7.293-7.293a1 1 0 011.414 0z" clipRule="evenodd"/>
                    </svg>
                  </div>
                  <span>Explains coverage in your local language</span>
                </div>
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                  <div className="w-5 h-5 bg-green-100 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center">
                    <svg className="w-3 h-3 text-green-600" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 20 20">
                      <path fillRule="evenodd" d="M16.707 5.293a1 1 0 010 1.414l-8 8a1 1 0 01-1.414 0l-4-4a1 1 0 011.414-1.414L8 12.586l7.293-7.293a1 1 0 011.414 0z" clipRule="evenodd"/>
                    </svg>
                  </div>
                  <span>Renewal reminders and policy alerts</span>
                </div>
              </div>,

              /* CTAs */
              <div key="ctas" className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row gap-4 pt-4">
                <UploadWidget onPoliciesUploaded={onPoliciesUploaded} compact={true} />
                <AnimatedButton
                  onClick={onNavigateToComparison}
                  className="group inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2.5 px-8 py-3.5 bg-white border-2 border-gray-300 text-gray-700 rounded-xl hover:border-blue-500 hover:bg-gradient-to-r hover:from-blue-50 hover:to-indigo-50 hover:text-blue-700 transition-all shadow-sm hover:shadow-md font-medium"
                >
                  <span>Try with sample policies</span>
                  <ArrowRight size={18} className="group-hover:translate-x-1 transition-transform" />
                </AnimatedButton>
              </div>,

              /* Turkish Kasko Demo CTA */
              onNavigateToTurkishKaskoDemo && (
                <div key="turkish-kasko-cta" className="mt-4 p-4 bg-gradient-to-r from-slate-50 to-blue-50 border border-slate-200 rounded-2xl">
                  <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-4">
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                      <div className="text-2xl">🇹🇷</div>
                      <div>
                        <div className="font-bold text-gray-900 text-sm">Turkish Kasko Auto Insurance</div>
                        <div className="text-xs text-gray-600">See our specialized insurance line features in action</div>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                    <button
                      onClick={onNavigateToTurkishKaskoDemo}
                      className="flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 bg-gradient-to-r from-slate-700 to-slate-900 text-white rounded-xl hover:shadow-lg transition-all text-sm font-semibold whitespace-nowrap"
                    >
                      View Demo
                      <ArrowRight size={16} />
                    </button>
                  </div>
                </div>
              ),

              /* Trust Indicators */
              <div key="trust" className="pt-8 flex items-center gap-8 text-sm text-gray-500">
                <div>
                  <NumberCounter value={4.9} decimals={1} suffix="★" className="text-2xl font-semibold text-gray-900" />
                  <div>15K+ reviews</div>
                </div>
                <div className="w-px h-12 bg-gray-200" />
                <div>
                  <NumberCounter value={2300} suffix="+" className="text-2xl font-semibold text-gray-900" decimals={0} />
                  <div>Policies analyzed</div>
                </div>
              </div>
            ]}
          </StaggeredList>

          {/* Right Column - Comparison Mock (Desktop Only) */}
          <div className="hidden lg:block relative">
            <div className="absolute -top-4 -right-4 z-10">
              <LanguageToggle />
            </div>
            <div className="relative">
              <ComparisonMock />
              {/* Decorative glow */}
              <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-400/10 to-purple-400/10 rounded-3xl blur-2xl -z-10" />
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Mobile Comparison Mock - Below Hero on Mobile */}
        <div className="lg:hidden mt-12">
          <div className="mb-4 flex justify-center">
            <LanguageToggle />
          </div>
          <ComparisonMockMobile />
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

```

## File: `components (2)/landing/HowItWorks.tsx`
- Bytes: 3,402
- SHA256: `e213dc366f426c05a5de859883cb137a221e94e4e5420b1fb90e12d3d860c443`

```tsx
import { Upload, Sparkles, Award } from 'lucide-react';

export function HowItWorks() {
  const steps = [
    {
      icon: Upload,
      title: 'Upload policies',
      description: 'Drop your insurance documents—PDF, Word, or scanned images. We accept any format.',
      color: 'from-blue-500 to-cyan-500',
      delay: '0ms',
    },
    {
      icon: Sparkles,
      title: 'AI analyzes coverage',
      description: 'Our AI extracts limits, deductibles, extensions, and exclusions and explains them in everyday language.',
      color: 'from-purple-500 to-pink-500',
      delay: '100ms',
    },
    {
      icon: Award,
      title: 'Compare & track',
      description: 'Compare 2–3 policies side-by-side and set reminders for renewals and key dates.',
      color: 'from-green-500 to-emerald-500',
      delay: '200ms',
    },
  ];

  return (
    <section id="how-it-works" className="py-24 bg-gradient-to-b from-white to-slate-50">
      <div className="container mx-auto px-4">
        <div className="text-center max-w-3xl mx-auto mb-20">
          <div className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 bg-blue-50 border border-blue-100 rounded-full mb-6">
            <Sparkles className="text-blue-600" size={16} />
            <span className="text-sm font-medium text-blue-900">Simple Process</span>
          </div>
          <h2 className="text-4xl md:text-5xl mb-6 tracking-tight">
            Three steps to <span className="bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 bg-clip-text text-transparent">benchmark your policies</span>
          </h2>
          <p className="text-xl text-gray-600">
            No jargon, no manuals—just clear coverage in your own language.
          </p>
        </div>

        <div className="grid md:grid-cols-3 gap-8 max-w-6xl mx-auto">
          {steps.map((step, index) => {
            const Icon = step.icon;
            return (
              <div 
                key={index} 
                className="relative group"
                style={{ animationDelay: step.delay }}
              >
                <div className="relative bg-white rounded-3xl p-8 shadow-lg hover:shadow-2xl transition-all duration-500 border border-gray-100 group-hover:-translate-y-2">
                  {/* Number Badge */}
                  <div className="absolute -top-4 -left-4 w-10 h-10 bg-gradient-to-br from-gray-900 to-gray-700 text-white rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center font-bold shadow-xl text-lg">
                    {index + 1}
                  </div>

                  {/* Icon */}
                  <div className={`inline-flex items-center justify-center w-16 h-16 bg-gradient-to-br ${step.color} rounded-2xl mb-6 shadow-lg shadow-blue-500/20 group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform`}>
                    <Icon className="text-white" size={28} />
                  </div>

                  <h3 className="text-2xl font-semibold mb-3 text-gray-900">{step.title}</h3>
                  <p className="text-gray-600 leading-relaxed">{step.description}</p>
                </div>

                {/* Connector Line */}
                {index < steps.length - 1 && (
                  <div className="hidden md:block absolute top-1/3 -right-4 w-8 h-0.5 bg-gradient-to-r from-gray-300 to-transparent" />
                )}
              </div>
            );
          })}
        </div>
      </div>
    </section>
  );
}

```

## File: `components (2)/landing/LanguageToggle.tsx`
- Bytes: 1,149
- SHA256: `3d6b85af476b3971cb8a4116ab16f2466926dcd4b29d565a99ccca7ae1674ff3`

```tsx
import { Globe } from 'lucide-react';
import { useState } from 'react';

export function LanguageToggle() {
  const [language, setLanguage] = useState<'local' | 'en'>('local');

  return (
    <div className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-2 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-sm border border-gray-200 rounded-xl shadow-sm">
      <Globe size={14} className="text-gray-500" />
      <div className="flex items-center gap-1 bg-gray-100 rounded-lg p-0.5">
        <button
          onClick={() => setLanguage('local')}
          className={`px-3 py-1 text-xs font-medium rounded-md transition-all ${
            language === 'local'
              ? 'bg-white text-blue-600 shadow-sm'
              : 'text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900'
          }`}
        >
          TR
        </button>
        <button
          onClick={() => setLanguage('en')}
          className={`px-3 py-1 text-xs font-medium rounded-md transition-all ${
            language === 'en'
              ? 'bg-white text-blue-600 shadow-sm'
              : 'text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900'
          }`}
        >
          EN
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

```

## File: `components (2)/landing/PolicyComparisonSection.tsx`
- Bytes: 6,023
- SHA256: `9b3151c0b8f298a78b54d5ec7702f99f2f344da5740784de07a4c1c1cf36df1b`

```tsx
import { Sparkles, TrendingUp, TrendingDown, Minus } from 'lucide-react';

export function PolicyComparisonSection() {
  const policies = [
    { name: 'Policy A', provider: 'Insurer ABC', color: 'from-blue-500 to-cyan-500' },
    { name: 'Policy B', provider: 'Insurer XYZ', color: 'from-purple-500 to-pink-500' },
    { name: 'Policy C', provider: 'Insurer DEF', color: 'from-green-500 to-emerald-500' },
  ];

  const comparisonRows = [
    {
      label: 'Coverage Limit',
      values: ['$500,000', '$750,000', '$500,000'],
      trend: [null, 'up', null],
    },
    {
      label: 'Annual Premium',
      values: ['$1,800', '$1,650', '$1,900'],
      trend: [null, 'down', null],
    },
    {
      label: 'Deductible',
      values: ['$2,500', '$1,000', '$2,500'],
      trend: [null, 'down', null],
    },
    {
      label: 'Flood Protection',
      values: ['✓ Included', '✗ Excluded', '~ Optional'],
      trend: ['up', 'down', 'neutral'],
    },
    {
      label: 'Earthquake Coverage',
      values: ['✗ Excluded', '✓ Included', '✗ Excluded'],
      trend: ['down', 'up', 'down'],
    },
  ];

  return (
    <section id="compare-policies" className="py-24 bg-gradient-to-b from-slate-50 to-white">
      <div className="container mx-auto px-4">
        <div className="text-center max-w-3xl mx-auto mb-16">
          <div className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 bg-blue-50 border border-blue-100 rounded-full mb-6">
            <Sparkles className="text-blue-600" size={16} />
            <span className="text-sm font-medium text-blue-900">Policy Comparison</span>
          </div>
          <h2 className="text-4xl md:text-5xl mb-6 tracking-tight">
            Compare <span className="bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 bg-clip-text text-transparent">2–3 policies</span> side-by-side
          </h2>
          <p className="text-xl text-gray-600">
            See differences in limits, deductibles, extensions, and exclusions at a glance.
          </p>
        </div>

        {/* Desktop Comparison Table */}
        <div className="hidden md:block max-w-5xl mx-auto">
          <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl shadow-xl border border-gray-100 overflow-hidden">
            {/* Header */}
            <div className="grid grid-cols-4 gap-0 bg-gradient-to-r from-slate-50 to-blue-50">
              <div className="p-6 border-r border-gray-200">
                <span className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider">Coverage Details</span>
              </div>
              {policies.map((policy, index) => (
                <div key={index} className={`p-6 ${index < 2 ? 'border-r border-gray-200' : ''}`}>
                  <div className="text-center">
                    <div className={`inline-flex w-10 h-10 bg-gradient-to-br ${policy.color} rounded-xl items-center justify-center mb-2 shadow-lg`}>
                      <span className="text-white font-bold text-sm">{String.fromCharCode(65 + index)}</span>
                    </div>
                    <div className="font-semibold text-gray-900">{policy.name}</div>
                    <div className="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-1">{policy.provider}</div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>

            {/* Rows */}
            {comparisonRows.map((row, rowIndex) => (
              <div key={rowIndex} className={`grid grid-cols-4 gap-0 ${rowIndex < comparisonRows.length - 1 ? 'border-b border-gray-100' : ''} hover:bg-gray-50/50 transition-colors`}>
                <div className="p-6 border-r border-gray-100 flex items-center">
                  <span className="font-medium text-gray-700">{row.label}</span>
                </div>
                {row.values.map((value, colIndex) => {
                  const trend = row.trend[colIndex];
                  return (
                    <div key={colIndex} className={`p-6 ${colIndex < 2 ? 'border-r border-gray-100' : ''} flex items-center justify-center`}>
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                        <span className="text-gray-900">{value}</span>
                        {trend === 'up' && <TrendingUp size={16} className="text-green-600" />}
                        {trend === 'down' && <TrendingDown size={16} className="text-red-600" />}
                        {trend === 'neutral' && <Minus size={16} className="text-gray-400" />}
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  );
                })}
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Mobile Comparison Cards */}
        <div className="md:hidden space-y-6">
          {policies.map((policy, index) => (
            <div key={index} className="bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-lg border border-gray-100 overflow-hidden">
              <div className={`p-4 bg-gradient-to-br ${policy.color} text-white`}>
                <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                  <div className="w-12 h-12 bg-white/20 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center">
                    <span className="font-bold text-lg">{String.fromCharCode(65 + index)}</span>
                  </div>
                  <div>
                    <div className="font-semibold">{policy.name}</div>
                    <div className="text-sm opacity-90">{policy.provider}</div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div className="p-4 space-y-3">
                {comparisonRows.map((row, rowIndex) => (
                  <div key={rowIndex} className="flex items-center justify-between py-2 border-b border-gray-100 last:border-0">
                    <span className="text-sm text-gray-600">{row.label}</span>
                    <span className="font-medium text-gray-900">{row.values[index]}</span>
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
      </div>
    </section>
  );
}

```

```tsx
import { Bell, Clock, AlertCircle } from 'lucide-react';

export function RenewalTimeline() {
  const renewals = [
    {
      title: 'Property Policy',
      daysRemaining: 45,
      status: 'upcoming',
      icon: Clock,
      color: 'blue',
    },
    {
      title: 'Cargo Policy',
      daysRemaining: 10,
      status: 'urgent',
      icon: AlertCircle,
      color: 'orange',
    },
    {
      title: 'Liability Policy',
      daysRemaining: 30,
      status: 'review',
      icon: Bell,
      color: 'purple',
    },
  ];

  return (
    <div className="bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-xl rounded-2xl border border-gray-200/50 shadow-xl p-6 max-w-sm">
      <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-4 pb-3 border-b border-gray-200">
        <div className="w-10 h-10 bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-500 to-indigo-500 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center">
          <Bell className="text-white" size={20} />
        </div>
        <div>
          <div className="font-semibold text-gray-900">Renewal Reminders</div>
          <div className="text-xs text-gray-500">Upcoming policy dates</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div className="space-y-3">
        {renewals.map((renewal, index) => {
          const Icon = renewal.icon;
          const colorClasses = {
            blue: 'bg-blue-50 border-blue-200 text-blue-700',
            orange: 'bg-orange-50 border-orange-200 text-orange-700',
            purple: 'bg-purple-50 border-purple-200 text-purple-700',
          };

          return (
            <div key={index} className={`flex items-center justify-between p-3 rounded-xl border ${colorClasses[renewal.color as keyof typeof colorClasses]}`}>
              <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                <Icon size={16} />
                <div>
                  <div className="text-sm font-medium">{renewal.title}</div>
                  <div className="text-xs opacity-75">Renewal in {renewal.daysRemaining} days</div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          );
        })}
      </div>

      <div className="mt-4 pt-3 border-t border-gray-200 text-center">
        <button className="text-sm text-blue-600 hover:text-blue-700 font-medium">
          View all reminders →
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

export function RenewalTimelineMobile() {
  return (
    <div className="bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-xl rounded-2xl border border-gray-200/50 shadow-lg p-4">
      <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-3">
        <Bell className="text-blue-600" size={18} />
        <span className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-900">Upcoming Renewals</span>
      </div>
      
      <div className="space-y-2">
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-2 bg-orange-50 rounded-lg border border-orange-200">
          <span className="text-xs font-medium text-orange-700">Cargo Policy</span>
          <span className="text-xs text-orange-600">10 days</span>
        </div>
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-2 bg-purple-50 rounded-lg border border-purple-200">
          <span className="text-xs font-medium text-purple-700">Liability Policy</span>
          <span className="text-xs text-purple-600">30 days</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

```

## File: `components (2)/landing/Stats.tsx`
- Bytes: 2,587
- SHA256: `1b492ac18b0a67335004a0442bfdb479e96d8abf3eaec33cca81b3e907cf0748`

```tsx
import { ScrollReveal, NumberCounter, ScaleOnHover } from '../animations/AnimatedComponents';

export function Stats() {
  const stats = [
    { value: 2300, suffix: '+', label: 'Policies Analyzed', color: 'from-blue-500 to-cyan-500' },
    { value: 750, suffix: '+', label: 'Coverage Gaps Flagged', color: 'from-green-500 to-emerald-500' },
    { value: 40, suffix: '+', label: 'Entities & Locations', color: 'from-purple-500 to-pink-500' },
    { value: 15, suffix: '+', label: 'Lines of Coverage', color: 'from-yellow-500 to-orange-500' },
  ];

  return (
    <div className="relative py-20 overflow-hidden">
      <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-br from-slate-900 via-blue-900 to-indigo-900" />
      <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-[url('data:image/svg+xml;base64,')] opacity-40" />
      
      <ScrollReveal>
        <div className="relative container mx-auto px-4">
          <div className="grid grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-8 lg:gap-12">
            {stats.map((stat, index) => (
              <ScrollReveal key={index} delay={index * 0.1}>
                <div className="text-center group">
                  <ScaleOnHover scale={1.1}>
                    <div className={`inline-flex items-center justify-center w-16 h-16 bg-gradient-to-br ${stat.color} rounded-2xl mb-4 shadow-xl transition-transform`}>
                      <div className="text-2xl font-bold text-white">
                        {stat.prefix || ''}{stat.value.toString().charAt(0)}
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </ScaleOnHover>
                  <div className="text-4xl md:text-5xl font-bold text-white mb-2">
                    <NumberCounter 
                      value={stat.value} 
                      prefix={stat.prefix}
                      suffix={stat.suffix}
                      decimals={stat.decimals || 0}
                      duration={2000}
                    />
                  </div>
                  <div className="text-blue-200">{stat.label}</div>
                </div>
              </ScrollReveal>
            ))}
          </div>
        </div>
      </ScrollReveal>
    </div>
  );
}

```

```tsx
import { Star, Quote } from 'lucide-react';

export function Testimonials() {
  const testimonials = [
    {
      name: 'Sarah Johnson',
      role: 'Facilities Manager',
      image: '👩‍💼',
      rating: 5,
      text: 'For the first time, I could see exactly what my property policy covered and where the exclusions were. The plain-language summary was a game changer.',
      color: 'from-blue-500 to-cyan-500',
    },
    {
      name: 'Michael Chen',
      role: 'Risk Manager',
      image: '👨‍💼',
      rating: 5,
      text: 'We uploaded policies from three insurers and InsureBench highlighted the differences in limits and extensions in minutes. It made our renewal discussions much easier.',
      color: 'from-purple-500 to-pink-500',
    },
    {
      name: 'Emily Rodriguez',
      role: 'Finance Director',
      image: '👩',
      rating: 5,
      text: 'The tool found coverage gaps I didn\'t even realize were there and reminded us about renewal dates. Now I feel much more confident about our insurance.',
      color: 'from-green-500 to-emerald-500',
    },
  ];

  return (
    <section id="testimonials" className="py-24 bg-gradient-to-b from-slate-50 to-white">
      <div className="container mx-auto px-4">
        <div className="text-center max-w-3xl mx-auto mb-20">
          <h2 className="text-4xl md:text-5xl mb-6 tracking-tight">
            Loved by <span className="bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 bg-clip-text text-transparent">real policyholders</span>
          </h2>
          <p className="text-xl text-gray-600">
            See how others use InsureBench to understand and benchmark their coverage.
          </p>
        </div>

        <div className="grid md:grid-cols-3 gap-8 max-w-6xl mx-auto">
          {testimonials.map((testimonial, index) => (
            <div key={index} className="group bg-white rounded-3xl p-8 shadow-sm hover:shadow-2xl transition-all duration-500 border border-gray-100 hover:-translate-y-2">
              <div className={`inline-flex w-12 h-12 bg-gradient-to-br ${testimonial.color} rounded-2xl items-center justify-center mb-6 shadow-lg group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform`}>
                <Quote className="text-white" size={24} />
              </div>
              
              <div className="flex gap-1 mb-4">
                {[...Array(testimonial.rating)].map((_, i) => (
                  <Star key={i} className="text-yellow-400 fill-current" size={18} />
                ))}
              </div>
              
              <p className="text-gray-700 mb-6 leading-relaxed">"{testimonial.text}"</p>
              
              <div className="flex items-center gap-3 pt-4 border-t border-gray-100">
                <div className="text-4xl">{testimonial.image}</div>
                <div>
                  <div className="font-semibold text-gray-900">{testimonial.name}</div>
                  <div className="text-sm text-gray-600">{testimonial.role}</div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
      </div>
    </section>
  );
}
```

## File: `components (2)/landing/UploadWidget.tsx`
- Bytes: 5,035
- SHA256: `b503c5722a0c9b683ed0a5e6ec3dad22f9ad3004715c38a8c47c60ceaa33a9dd`

```tsx
import { useState } from 'react';
import { Upload, Sparkles } from 'lucide-react';
import { Policy } from '../../App';

type UploadWidgetProps = {
  onPoliciesUploaded: (policies: Policy[]) => void;
  compact?: boolean;
};

export function UploadWidget({ onPoliciesUploaded, compact = true }: UploadWidgetProps) {
  const [isUploading, setIsUploading] = useState(false);

  const handleFileInput = (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {
    if (e.target.files) {
      const files = Array.from(e.target.files);
      handleFiles(files);
    }
  };

  const handleFiles = async (files: File[]) => {
    setIsUploading(true);
    await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 1500));

    const policies: Policy[] = files.map((file, index) => ({
      id: `policy-${Date.now()}-${index}`,
      name: file.name,
      provider: ['Allstate', 'State Farm', 'Geico', 'Progressive', 'Liberty Mutual'][Math.floor(Math.random() * 5)],
      type: ['Auto', 'Home', 'Life', 'Health'][Math.floor(Math.random() * 4)],
      premium: Math.floor(Math.random() * 200) + 100,
      coverage: Math.floor(Math.random() * 500000) + 100000,
      deductible: Math.floor(Math.random() * 2000) + 500,
      uploadedAt: new Date(),
    }));

    onPoliciesUploaded(policies);
    setIsUploading(false);
  };

  const handleTryDemo = () => {
    const demoFiles = [
      new File([''], 'Allstate_Auto_Policy.pdf'),
      new File([''], 'Geico_Auto_Quote.pdf'),
      new File([''], 'Progressive_Coverage.pdf'),
    ];
    handleFiles(demoFiles);
  };

  if (compact) {
    return (
      <div className="inline-block">
        <label className="block cursor-pointer group">
          <input
            type="file"
            multiple
            accept=".pdf,.doc,.docx,.jpg,.jpeg,.png"
            onChange={handleFileInput}
            className="hidden"
            disabled={isUploading}
          />
          <span className="inline-flex items-center gap-2.5 px-8 py-3.5 bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 text-white rounded-xl hover:shadow-xl hover:shadow-blue-500/30 transition-all group-hover:scale-[1.02] font-medium shadow-lg">
            {isUploading ? (
              <>
                <div className="w-5 h-5 border-2 border-white/30 border-t-white rounded-full animate-spin" />
                <span>AI is analyzing...</span>
              </>
            ) : (
              <>
                <Upload size={20} />
                <span>Upload Policy PDFs</span>
              </>
            )}
          </span>
        </label>
        {!isUploading && (
          <button
            onClick={handleTryDemo}
            className="block mt-3 text-sm text-gray-600 hover:text-blue-600 transition-colors"
          >
            or try with sample data
          </button>
        )}
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl rounded-3xl border border-gray-200/50 p-8 shadow-xl">
      {isUploading ? (
        <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
          <div className="relative w-12 h-12">
            <div className="absolute inset-0 border-4 border-blue-200 rounded-full" />
            <div className="absolute inset-0 border-4 border-blue-600 border-t-transparent rounded-full animate-spin" />
            <Sparkles className="absolute inset-0 m-auto text-blue-600" size={20} />
          </div>
          <div>
            <div className="font-semibold text-gray-900">AI is analyzing your policies...</div>
            <div className="text-sm text-gray-600">Extracting coverage, limits, and exclusions</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      ) : (
        <div className="space-y-6">
          <div className="text-center">
            <div className="inline-flex w-16 h-16 bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-500 to-indigo-600 rounded-2xl items-center justify-center mb-4 shadow-lg shadow-blue-500/30">
              <Upload className="text-white" size={28} />
            </div>
            <h3 className="text-xl font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-2">Drop your policies here</h3>
            <p className="text-gray-600">or click to browse • PDF, Word, Images</p>
          </div>

          <label className="block">
            <input
              type="file"
              multiple
              accept=".pdf,.doc,.docx,.jpg,.jpeg,.png"
              onChange={handleFileInput}
              className="hidden"
            />
            <span className="flex items-center justify-center gap-2 w-full px-8 py-4 bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 text-white rounded-xl hover:shadow-lg hover:shadow-blue-500/30 cursor-pointer transition-all hover:scale-[1.02] font-medium">
              <Upload size={20} />
              Choose Files
            </span>
          </label>

          <button
            onClick={handleTryDemo}
            className="block w-full text-center text-sm text-gray-600 hover:text-blue-600 transition-colors"
          >
            Try with sample policies
          </button>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

```

```tsx
import { Users, Briefcase, FileText } from 'lucide-react';

export function WhoItsFor() {
  const audiences = [
    {
      icon: Users,
      title: 'Risk & insurance teams',
      description: 'Benchmark programs across entities, years, and insurers with a single view of coverage.',
      color: 'from-blue-500 to-cyan-500',
    },
    {
      icon: Briefcase,
      title: 'Business owners',
      description: 'Understand what your policies actually cover before renewals and negotiations.',
      color: 'from-purple-500 to-pink-500',
    },
    {
      icon: FileText,
      title: 'Individuals with complex coverage',
      description: 'Turn long policy PDFs into clear, plain-language summaries you can actually use.',
      color: 'from-green-500 to-emerald-500',
    },
  ];

  return (
    <section className="py-24 bg-white">
      <div className="container mx-auto px-4">
        <div className="text-center max-w-3xl mx-auto mb-16">
          <h2 className="text-4xl md:text-5xl mb-6 tracking-tight">
            Designed for people who need <span className="bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 bg-clip-text text-transparent">clarity</span>, not more jargon
          </h2>
        </div>

        <div className="grid md:grid-cols-3 gap-8 max-w-6xl mx-auto">
          {audiences.map((audience, index) => {
            const Icon = audience.icon;
            return (
              <div key={index} className="group bg-gradient-to-br from-white to-gray-50 rounded-3xl p-8 shadow-sm hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-500 border border-gray-100 hover:-translate-y-2">
                <div className={`inline-flex items-center justify-center w-16 h-16 bg-gradient-to-br ${audience.color} rounded-2xl mb-6 shadow-xl group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform`}>
                  <Icon className="text-white" size={28} />
                </div>
                <h3 className="text-xl font-semibold mb-4 text-gray-900">{audience.title}</h3>
                <p className="text-gray-600 leading-relaxed">{audience.description}</p>
              </div>
            );
          })}
        </div>
      </div>
    </section>
  );
}
```

```tsx
import { Award, Users, Database, HeadphonesIcon } from 'lucide-react';

export function WhyChooseUs() {
  const reasons = [
    {
      icon: Award,
      title: 'Reliable extraction',
      description: 'Trained on real insurance documents to capture limits, deductibles, extensions, and exclusions accurately.',
      color: 'from-yellow-500 to-orange-500',
    },
    {
      icon: Users,
      title: 'Built for policyholders',
      description: 'Designed for people and teams who already hold policies and need clarity, not another price-comparison site.',
      color: 'from-blue-500 to-cyan-500',
    },
    {
      icon: Database,
      title: 'Secure by design',
      description: 'Your data is encrypted in transit and at rest, with strict access controls and retention policies.',
      color: 'from-purple-500 to-pink-500',
    },
    {
      icon: HeadphonesIcon,
      title: 'Always here',
      description: '24/7 support whenever you need help reviewing or interpreting your analysis.',
      color: 'from-green-500 to-emerald-500',
    },
  ];

  return (
    <section className="py-24 bg-gradient-to-b from-white to-slate-50">
      <div className="container mx-auto px-4">
        <div className="text-center max-w-3xl mx-auto mb-20">
          <h2 className="text-4xl md:text-5xl mb-6 tracking-tight">
            Why <span className="bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 bg-clip-text text-transparent">trust</span> InsureBench?
          </h2>
          <p className="text-xl text-gray-600">
            We're dedicated to giving you clear, reliable insight into what your insurance policies actually cover.
          </p>
        </div>

        <div className="grid md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-8 max-w-6xl mx-auto">
          {reasons.map((reason, index) => {
            const Icon = reason.icon;
            return (
              <div key={index} className="group text-center">
                <div className={`inline-flex items-center justify-center w-16 h-16 bg-gradient-to-br ${reason.color} rounded-2xl mx-auto mb-6 shadow-xl group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform`}>
                  <Icon className="text-white" size={28} />
                </div>
                <h3 className="text-xl font-semibold mb-3 text-gray-900">{reason.title}</h3>
                <p className="text-gray-600 leading-relaxed">{reason.description}</p>
              </div>
            );
          })}
        </div>
      </div>
    </section>
  );
}
```

## File: `components (2)/LandingPage.tsx`

- SHA256: `5fea0f2fe47b5b92ca1a1af871e110b28b26a47f2e78ed1355f24cbbd13a2181`

```tsx
import { Hero } from './landing/Hero';
import { Stats } from './landing/Stats';
import { HowItWorks } from './landing/HowItWorks';
import { Benefits } from './landing/Benefits';
import { WhyChooseUs } from './landing/WhyChooseUs';
import { Testimonials } from './landing/Testimonials';
import { CompareSection } from './landing/CompareSection';
import { FAQ } from './landing/FAQ';
import { Footer } from './landing/Footer';
import { Policy } from '../App';
import { PolicyComparisonSection } from './landing/PolicyComparisonSection';
import { WhoItsFor } from './landing/WhoItsFor';

interface LandingPageProps {
  onPoliciesUploaded: (policies: any[]) => void;
  onNavigateToComparison: () => void;
  onNavigateToUpload: () => void;
  onNavigateToDashboard?: () => void;
  onNavigateToChat?: () => void;
  onNavigateToHelpCenter?: () => void;
  onNavigateToMyAccount?: () => void;
  onNavigateToSettings?: () => void;
  onNavigateToLanding?: () => void;
  onNavigateToTurkishKaskoDemo?: () => void;
  policyCount?: number;
}

export function LandingPage({ 
  onPoliciesUploaded, 
  onNavigateToComparison, 
  onNavigateToUpload, 
  onNavigateToDashboard, 
  onNavigateToChat,
  onNavigateToHelpCenter,
  onNavigateToMyAccount,
  onNavigateToSettings,
  onNavigateToLanding,
  onNavigateToTurkishKaskoDemo,
  policyCount = 0
}: LandingPageProps) {
  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-white">
      <Hero 
        onPoliciesUploaded={onPoliciesUploaded}
        onNavigateToComparison={onNavigateToComparison}
        onNavigateToUpload={onNavigateToUpload}
        onNavigateToDashboard={onNavigateToDashboard}
        onNavigateToChat={onNavigateToChat}
        onNavigateToHelpCenter={onNavigateToHelpCenter}
        onNavigateToMyAccount={onNavigateToMyAccount}
        onNavigateToSettings={onNavigateToSettings}
        onNavigateToLanding={onNavigateToLanding}
        onNavigateToTurkishKaskoDemo={onNavigateToTurkishKaskoDemo}
        policyCount={policyCount}
      />
      <Stats />
      <HowItWorks />
      <PolicyComparisonSection />
      <Benefits />
      <WhoItsFor />
      <WhyChooseUs />
      <Testimonials />
      <CompareSection onPoliciesUploaded={onPoliciesUploaded} onNavigateToUpload={onNavigateToUpload} />
      <FAQ />
      <Footer />
    </div>
  );
}

```

## File: `components (2)/LanguageSelector.tsx`
- Bytes: 4,003
- SHA256: `1003fa2e1eb37088a8e8e62641782bd040696403487a25a326db1dc51b3cf869`

```tsx
import { useState } from 'react';
import { Globe, Check } from 'lucide-react';

type Language = {
  code: string;
  name: string;
  nativeName: string;
  flag: string;
};

const languages: Language[] = [
  { code: 'en', name: 'English', nativeName: 'English', flag: '🇺🇸' },
  { code: 'es', name: 'Spanish', nativeName: 'Español', flag: '🇪🇸' },
  { code: 'fr', name: 'French', nativeName: 'Français', flag: '🇫🇷' },
  { code: 'de', name: 'German', nativeName: 'Deutsch', flag: '🇩🇪' },
  { code: 'zh', name: 'Chinese', nativeName: '中文', flag: '🇨🇳' },
  { code: 'ja', name: 'Japanese', nativeName: '日本語', flag: '🇯🇵' },
  { code: 'pt', name: 'Portuguese', nativeName: 'Português', flag: '🇵🇹' },
  { code: 'ar', name: 'Arabic', nativeName: 'العربية', flag: '🇸🇦' },
];

interface LanguageSelectorProps {
  variant?: 'compact' | 'full';
}

export function LanguageSelector({ variant = 'compact' }: LanguageSelectorProps) {
  const [selectedLanguage, setSelectedLanguage] = useState<string>('en');
  const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = useState(false);

  const currentLanguage = languages.find(lang => lang.code === selectedLanguage) || languages[0];

  const handleSelect = (code: string) => {
    setSelectedLanguage(code);
    setIsOpen(false);
    // In a real app, this would trigger i18n language change
    localStorage.setItem('language', code);
  };

  return (
    <div className="relative">
      {/* Trigger Button */}
      <button
        onClick={() => setIsOpen(!isOpen)}
        className="flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-2 text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-900 dark:hover:text-white hover:bg-gray-100 dark:hover:bg-gray-800 rounded-lg transition-colors text-sm"
        title="Change language"
      >
        {variant === 'compact' ? (
          <>
            <Globe size={18} />
            <span className="hidden sm:inline">{currentLanguage.code.toUpperCase()}</span>
          </>
        ) : (
          <>
            <span className="text-lg">{currentLanguage.flag}</span>
            <span>{currentLanguage.nativeName}</span>
          </>
        )}
      </button>

      {/* Dropdown */}
      {isOpen && (
        <>
          {/* Backdrop */}
          <div 
            className="fixed inset-0 z-40"
            onClick={() => setIsOpen(false)}
          />

          {/* Menu */}
          <div className="absolute right-0 mt-2 w-64 bg-white dark:bg-gray-800 rounded-xl shadow-lg border border-gray-200 dark:border-gray-700 py-2 z-50 max-h-80 overflow-y-auto">
            <div className="px-3 py-2 border-b border-gray-200 dark:border-gray-700">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-xs text-gray-500 dark:text-gray-400 uppercase tracking-wider font-semibold">
                <Globe size={14} />
                <span>Select Language</span>
              </div>
            </div>
            {languages.map((language) => (
              <button
                key={language.code}
                onClick={() => handleSelect(language.code)}
                className={`w-full flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2 text-sm transition-colors ${
                  selectedLanguage === language.code
                    ? 'bg-slate-100 dark:bg-gray-700 text-slate-900 dark:text-white'
                    : 'text-gray-700 dark:text-gray-300 hover:bg-gray-50 dark:hover:bg-gray-700'
                }`}
              >
                <span className="text-xl">{language.flag}</span>
                <div className="flex-1 text-left">
                  <div className="font-medium">{language.nativeName}</div>
                  <div className="text-xs text-gray-500 dark:text-gray-400">{language.name}</div>
                </div>
                {selectedLanguage === language.code && (
                  <Check size={16} className="text-slate-700 dark:text-white" />
                )}
              </button>
            ))}
          </div>
        </>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

```

## File: `components (2)/MyAccount.tsx`
