- SHA256: `47504c9784c5dee8f68ddec3d5ddf0772f9fb806fedb83372b89422b0d0f80e3`

```tsx
import { useState } from 'react';
import { 
  User, Mail, Phone, MapPin, Calendar, Shield, 
  Edit2, Save, X, Camera, CreditCard, FileText,
  Building, AlertCircle, CheckCircle, Lock, Key
} from 'lucide-react';

interface MyAccountProps {
  onBack: () => void;
}

export function MyAccount({ onBack }: MyAccountProps) {
  const [isEditing, setIsEditing] = useState(false);
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<'profile' | 'security' | 'billing'>('profile');
  
  const [formData, setFormData] = useState({
    firstName: 'John',
    lastName: 'Doe',
    email: 'john.doe@example.com',
    phone: '(555) 123-4567',
    address: '123 Main Street',
    city: 'San Francisco',
    state: 'CA',
    zipCode: '94102',
    dateOfBirth: '1985-06-15',
    memberSince: 'January 2024'
  });

  const handleSave = () => {
    // Save logic here
    console.log('Saving profile data:', formData);
    setIsEditing(false);
  };

  const handleCancel = () => {
    // Reset form data
    setIsEditing(false);
  };

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-slate-50">
      {/* Header */}
      <div className="bg-white border-b border-gray-200">
        <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-6">
          <button 
            onClick={onBack}
            className="text-sm text-blue-600 hover:text-blue-700 font-medium mb-4 flex items-center gap-2"
          >
            ← Back to Dashboard
          </button>
          <div className="flex items-start justify-between">
            <div>
              <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900">My Account</h1>
              <p className="text-gray-600 mt-1">Manage your account information and preferences</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-8">
        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6">
          {/* Sidebar */}
          <div className="lg:col-span-1">
            <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl border border-gray-200 shadow-sm p-6 sticky top-24">
              {/* Profile Picture */}
              <div className="text-center mb-6">
                <div className="relative inline-block">
                  <div className="w-24 h-24 bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center mx-auto shadow-lg">
                    <User size={40} className="text-white" />
                  </div>
                  <button className="absolute bottom-0 right-0 w-8 h-8 bg-white rounded-full border-2 border-gray-200 flex items-center justify-center hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors shadow-md">
                    <Camera size={14} className="text-gray-600" />
                  </button>
                </div>
                <h3 className="mt-4 font-bold text-gray-900">{formData.firstName} {formData.lastName}</h3>
                <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">{formData.email}</p>
              </div>

              {/* Navigation Tabs */}
              <div className="space-y-1">
                <button
                  onClick={() => setActiveTab('profile')}
                  className={`w-full flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 rounded-xl font-medium text-sm transition-all ${
                    activeTab === 'profile'
                      ? 'bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 text-white shadow-lg shadow-blue-500/30'
                      : 'text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-50'
                  }`}
                >
                  <User size={18} />
                  <span>Profile Information</span>
                </button>
                <button
                  onClick={() => setActiveTab('security')}
                  className={`w-full flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 rounded-xl font-medium text-sm transition-all ${
                    activeTab === 'security'
                      ? 'bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 text-white shadow-lg shadow-blue-500/30'
                      : 'text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-50'
                  }`}
                >
                  <Shield size={18} />
                  <span>Security</span>
                </button>
                <button
                  onClick={() => setActiveTab('billing')}
                  className={`w-full flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 rounded-xl font-medium text-sm transition-all ${
                    activeTab === 'billing'
                      ? 'bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 text-white shadow-lg shadow-blue-500/30'
                      : 'text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-50'
                  }`}
                >
                  <CreditCard size={18} />
                  <span>Billing</span>
                </button>
              </div>

              {/* Member Status */}
              <div className="mt-6 pt-6 border-t border-gray-200">
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-gray-600 mb-2">
                  <Calendar size={14} />
                  <span>Member since {formData.memberSince}</span>
                </div>
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-emerald-600">
                  <CheckCircle size={14} />
                  <span>Verified Account</span>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* Main Content */}
          <div className="lg:col-span-3">
            {/* Profile Information Tab */}
            {activeTab === 'profile' && (
              <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl border border-gray-200 shadow-sm">
                {/* Header */}
                <div className="p-6 border-b border-gray-200 flex items-center justify-between">
                  <div>
                    <h2 className="text-xl font-bold text-gray-900">Profile Information</h2>
                    <p className="text-sm text-gray-500 mt-1">Update your personal details and contact information</p>
                  </div>
                  {!isEditing ? (
                    <button
                      onClick={() => setIsEditing(true)}
                      className="flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 text-white rounded-xl hover:shadow-lg hover:shadow-blue-500/30 transition-all font-medium text-sm"
                    >
                      <Edit2 size={16} />
                      <span>Edit Profile</span>
                    </button>
                  ) : (
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                      <button
                        onClick={handleCancel}
                        className="flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 bg-gray-100 text-gray-700 rounded-xl hover:bg-gray-200 transition-all font-medium text-sm"
                      >
                        <X size={16} />
                        <span>Cancel</span>
                      </button>
                      <button
                        onClick={handleSave}
                        className="flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 text-white rounded-xl hover:shadow-lg hover:shadow-blue-500/30 transition-all font-medium text-sm"
                      >
                        <Save size={16} />
                        <span>Save Changes</span>
                      </button>
                    </div>
                  )}
                </div>

                {/* Form */}
                <div className="p-6 space-y-6">
                  {/* Personal Information */}
                  <div>
                    <h3 className="font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-4 flex items-center gap-2">
                      <User size={18} className="text-blue-600" />
                      Personal Information
                    </h3>
                    <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                      <div>
                        <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2">First Name</label>
                        <input
                          type="text"
                          value={formData.firstName}
                          onChange={(e) => setFormData({ ...formData, firstName: e.target.value })}
                          disabled={!isEditing}
                          className="w-full px-4 py-3 border border-gray-300 rounded-xl focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-blue-500 disabled:bg-gray-50 disabled:text-gray-500"
                        />
                      </div>
                      <div>
                        <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2">Last Name</label>
                        <input
                          type="text"
                          value={formData.lastName}
                          onChange={(e) => setFormData({ ...formData, lastName: e.target.value })}
                          disabled={!isEditing}
                          className="w-full px-4 py-3 border border-gray-300 rounded-xl focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-blue-500 disabled:bg-gray-50 disabled:text-gray-500"
                        />
                      </div>
                      <div>
                        <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2">Date of Birth</label>
                        <input
                          type="date"
                          value={formData.dateOfBirth}
                          onChange={(e) => setFormData({ ...formData, dateOfBirth: e.target.value })}
                          disabled={!isEditing}
                          className="w-full px-4 py-3 border border-gray-300 rounded-xl focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-blue-500 disabled:bg-gray-50 disabled:text-gray-500"
                        />
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </div>

                  {/* Contact Information */}
                  <div className="pt-6 border-t border-gray-200">
                    <h3 className="font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-4 flex items-center gap-2">
                      <Mail size={18} className="text-blue-600" />
                      Contact Information
                    </h3>
                    <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                      <div>
                        <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2">Email Address</label>
                        <input
                          type="email"
                          value={formData.email}
                          onChange={(e) => setFormData({ ...formData, email: e.target.value })}
                          disabled={!isEditing}
                          className="w-full px-4 py-3 border border-gray-300 rounded-xl focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-blue-500 disabled:bg-gray-50 disabled:text-gray-500"
                        />
                      </div>
                      <div>
                        <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2">Phone Number</label>
                        <input
                          type="tel"
                          value={formData.phone}
                          onChange={(e) => setFormData({ ...formData, phone: e.target.value })}
                          disabled={!isEditing}
                          className="w-full px-4 py-3 border border-gray-300 rounded-xl focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-blue-500 disabled:bg-gray-50 disabled:text-gray-500"
                        />
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </div>

                  {/* Address */}
                  <div className="pt-6 border-t border-gray-200">
                    <h3 className="font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-4 flex items-center gap-2">
                      <MapPin size={18} className="text-blue-600" />
                      Address
                    </h3>
                    <div className="space-y-4">
                      <div>
                        <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2">Street Address</label>
                        <input
                          type="text"
                          value={formData.address}
                          onChange={(e) => setFormData({ ...formData, address: e.target.value })}
                          disabled={!isEditing}

                        />
                      </div>
                      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
                        <div>
                          <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2">City</label>
                          <input
                            type="text"
                            value={formData.city}
                            onChange={(e) => setFormData({ ...formData, city: e.target.value })}
                            disabled={!isEditing}
                            className="w-full px-4 py-3 border border-gray-300 rounded-xl focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-blue-500 disabled:bg-gray-50 disabled:text-gray-500"
                          />
                        </div>
                        <div>
                          <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2">State</label>
                          <input
                            type="text"
                            value={formData.state}
                            onChange={(e) => setFormData({ ...formData, state: e.target.value })}
                            disabled={!isEditing}
                            className="w-full px-4 py-3 border border-gray-300 rounded-xl focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-blue-500 disabled:bg-gray-50 disabled:text-gray-500"
                          />
                        </div>
                        <div>
                          <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2">ZIP Code</label>
                          <input
                            type="text"
                            value={formData.zipCode}
                            onChange={(e) => setFormData({ ...formData, zipCode: e.target.value })}
                            disabled={!isEditing}
                            className="w-full px-4 py-3 border border-gray-300 rounded-xl focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-blue-500 disabled:bg-gray-50 disabled:text-gray-500"
                          />
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            )}

            {/* Security Tab */}
            {activeTab === 'security' && (
              <div className="space-y-6">
                {/* Change Password */}
                <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl border border-gray-200 shadow-sm">
                  <div className="p-6 border-b border-gray-200">
                    <h2 className="text-xl font-bold text-gray-900 flex items-center gap-2">
                      <Lock size={20} className="text-blue-600" />
                      Change Password

                    <p className="text-sm text-gray-500 mt-1">Update your password to keep your account secure</p>
                  </div>
                  <div className="p-6 space-y-4">
                    <div>
                      <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-2">Current Password</label>
                      <input
                        type="password"

                        type="password"

                      <input
                        type="password"
                        className="w-full px-4 py-3 border border-gray-300 rounded-xl focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-blue-500"
                        placeholder="Confirm new password"

                    </div>
                    <button className="w-full md:w-auto px-6 py-3 bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 text-white rounded-xl hover:shadow-lg hover:shadow-blue-500/30 transition-all font-medium">

                    <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-4 bg-gray-50 rounded-xl">
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-3">

                  <div className="p-6 border-b border-gray-200">
                    <h2 className="text-xl font-bold text-gray-900">Active Sessions</h2>
                    <p className="text-sm text-gray-500 mt-1">Manage where you're signed in</p>
                  </div>
                  <div className="p-6 space-y-4">
                    <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-4 border border-gray-200 rounded-xl">
                      <div>
                        <p className="font-medium text-gray-900">MacBook Pro - San Francisco, CA</p>
                        <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">Current session • Last active: Just now</p>
                      </div>
                      <span className="px-3 py-1 bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-700 text-xs rounded-full font-medium">Active</span>
                    </div>
                    <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-4 border border-gray-200 rounded-xl">
                      <div>
                        <p className="font-medium text-gray-900">iPhone 14 - San Francisco, CA</p>
                        <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">Last active: 2 hours ago</p>
                      </div>
                      <button className="text-sm text-red-600 hover:text-red-700 font-medium">Revoke</button>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            )}

            {/* Billing Tab */}
            {activeTab === 'billing' && (
              <div className="space-y-6">
                {/* Current Plan */}
                <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl border border-gray-200 shadow-sm">
                  <div className="p-6 border-b border-gray-200">

                  <div className="p-6">

                          <h3 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">Professional Plan</h3>

                          <p className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900">$29</p>
                          <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">per month</p>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-gray-600 mb-4">
                        <Calendar size={14} />
                        <span>Next billing date: February 15, 2025</span>
                      </div>
                      <div className="flex gap-2">
                        <button className="px-4 py-2 bg-white border border-gray-300 rounded-xl hover:bg-gray-50 transition-all font-medium text-sm">
                          Change Plan
                        </button>
                        <button className="px-4 py-2 text-red-600 hover:bg-red-50 rounded-xl transition-all font-medium text-sm">
                          Cancel Subscription
                        </button>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>

                {/* Payment Methods */}
                <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl border border-gray-200 shadow-sm">
                  <div className="p-6 border-b border-gray-200 flex items-center justify-between">
                    <div>
                      <h2 className="text-xl font-bold text-gray-900">Payment Methods</h2>
                      <p className="text-sm text-gray-500 mt-1">Manage your payment options</p>
                    </div>
                    <button className="px-4 py-2 bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 text-white rounded-xl hover:shadow-lg hover:shadow-blue-500/30 transition-all font-medium text-sm">
                      Add Payment Method
                    </button>
                  </div>
                  <div className="p-6 space-y-4">
                    <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-4 border border-gray-200 rounded-xl">
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
                        <div className="w-12 h-12 bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center">
                          <CreditCard size={20} className="text-white" />
                        </div>
                        <div>
                          <p className="font-medium text-gray-900">Visa ending in 4242</p>
                          <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">Expires 12/2026</p>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                        <span className="px-3 py-1 bg-blue-100 text-blue-700 text-xs rounded-full font-medium">Default</span>
                        <button className="text-sm text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900 font-medium">Edit</button>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>

                {/* Billing History */}
                <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl border border-gray-200 shadow-sm">
                  <div className="p-6 border-b border-gray-200">
                    <h2 className="text-xl font-bold text-gray-900">Billing History</h2>
                    <p className="text-sm text-gray-500 mt-1">View and download your invoices</p>
                  </div>
                  <div className="p-6">
                    <div className="space-y-3">
                      {[
                        { date: 'Jan 15, 2025', amount: '$29.00', status: 'Paid' },
                        { date: 'Dec 15, 2024', amount: '$29.00', status: 'Paid' },
                        { date: 'Nov 15, 2024', amount: '$29.00', status: 'Paid' },
                      ].map((invoice, index) => (
                        <div key={index} className="flex items-center justify-between p-4 border border-gray-200 rounded-xl hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors">

                            <div className="w-10 h-10 bg-gray-100 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center">
                              <FileText size={18} className="text-gray-600" />
                            </div>
                            <div>
                              <p className="font-medium text-gray-900">Invoice for {invoice.date}</p>
                              <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">{invoice.amount}</p>
                            </div>
                          </div>
                          <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                            <span className="px-3 py-1 bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-700 text-xs rounded-full font-medium">{invoice.status}</span>
                            <button className="text-sm text-blue-600 hover:text-blue-700 font-medium">Download</button>
                          </div>
                        </div>
                      ))}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
```

## File: `components (2)/NotificationPanel.tsx`
- Bytes: 7,788
- SHA256: `6610a1819ed2bb2bc1221d198734ebec260d8f15d2d303bca5331a1dbf6d38f3`

```tsx
import { useState } from 'react';
import { 
  Bell, X, AlertCircle, CheckCircle, Info, Clock,
  FileText, Calendar, DollarSign, TrendingUp, Shield
} from 'lucide-react';

export type Notification = {
  id: string;
  type: 'info' | 'success' | 'warning' | 'error';
  title: string;
  message: string;
  timestamp: Date;
  read: boolean;
  actionLabel?: string;
  actionUrl?: string;
  icon?: any;
};

interface NotificationPanelProps {
  isOpen: boolean;
  onClose: () => void;
  notifications: Notification[];
  onMarkAsRead: (id: string) => void;
  onMarkAllAsRead: () => void;
  onNotificationClick?: (notification: Notification) => void;
}

export function NotificationPanel({
  isOpen,
  onClose,
  notifications,
  onMarkAsRead,
  onMarkAllAsRead,
  onNotificationClick
}: NotificationPanelProps) {
  if (!isOpen) return null;

  const unreadCount = notifications.filter(n => !n.read).length;

  const getIcon = (notification: Notification) => {
    if (notification.icon) return notification.icon;
    
    switch (notification.type) {
      case 'success': return CheckCircle;
      case 'warning': return AlertCircle;
      case 'error': return AlertCircle;
      default: return Info;
    }
  };

  const getIconColor = (type: string) => {
    switch (type) {
      case 'success': return 'text-emerald-600';
      case 'warning': return 'text-amber-600';
      case 'error': return 'text-red-600';
      default: return 'text-blue-600';
    }
  };

  const formatTimestamp = (date: Date) => {
    const now = new Date();
    const diff = now.getTime() - date.getTime();
    const minutes = Math.floor(diff / 60000);
    const hours = Math.floor(minutes / 60);
    const days = Math.floor(hours / 24);

    if (minutes < 1) return 'Just now';
    if (minutes < 60) return `${minutes}m ago`;
    if (hours < 24) return `${hours}h ago`;
    if (days < 7) return `${days}d ago`;
    return date.toLocaleDateString();
  };

  return (
    <>
      {/* Backdrop */}
      <div 
        className="fixed inset-0 z-[90]"
        onClick={onClose}
      />

      {/* Panel */}
      <div className="fixed right-4 top-20 w-96 max-w-[calc(100vw-2rem)] bg-white rounded-xl shadow-2xl border border-gray-200 z-[91] max-h-[calc(100vh-6rem)] flex flex-col">
        {/* Header */}
        <div className="px-4 py-3 border-b border-gray-200 flex items-center justify-between">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
            <Bell size={18} className="text-gray-700" />
            <h3 className="font-semibold text-gray-900">Notifications</h3>
            {unreadCount > 0 && (
              <span className="px-2 py-0.5 bg-slate-700 text-white text-xs rounded-full font-semibold">
                {unreadCount}
              </span>
            )}
          </div>
          <button
            onClick={onClose}
            className="p-1 hover:bg-gray-100 rounded-lg transition-colors"
          >
            <X size={18} />
          </button>
        </div>

        {/* Actions */}
        {notifications.length > 0 && unreadCount > 0 && (
          <div className="px-4 py-2 border-b border-gray-100">
            <button
              onClick={onMarkAllAsRead}
              className="text-sm text-blue-600 hover:text-blue-700 font-medium transition-colors"
            >
              Mark all as read
            </button>
          </div>
        )}

        {/* Notifications List */}
        <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto">
          {notifications.length === 0 ? (
            <div className="px-4 py-12 text-center text-gray-500">
              <Bell size={48} className="mx-auto mb-3 text-gray-300" />
              <p className="font-medium">No notifications</p>
              <p className="text-sm mt-1">You're all caught up!</p>
            </div>
          ) : (
            <div className="divide-y divide-gray-100">
              {notifications.map((notification) => {
                const Icon = getIcon(notification);
                return (
                  <button
                    key={notification.id}
                    onClick={() => {
                      onMarkAsRead(notification.id);
                      if (onNotificationClick) {
                        onNotificationClick(notification);
                      }
                    }}
                    className={`w-full px-4 py-3 text-left hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors ${
                      !notification.read ? 'bg-blue-50/50' : ''
                    }`}
                  >
                    <div className="flex gap-3">
                      <div className={`flex-shrink-0 ${getIconColor(notification.type)}`}>
                        <Icon size={20} />
                      </div>
                      <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
                        <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-2 mb-1">
                          <h4 className={`text-sm font-medium text-gray-900 ${
                            !notification.read ? 'font-semibold' : ''
                          }`}>
                            {notification.title}
                          </h4>
                          {!notification.read && (
                            <div className="w-2 h-2 bg-blue-600 rounded-full flex-shrink-0 mt-1.5" />
                          )}
                        </div>
                        <p className="text-sm text-gray-600 mb-2">
                          {notification.message}
                        </p>
                        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-xs text-gray-500">
                          <Clock size={12} />
                          <span>{formatTimestamp(notification.timestamp)}</span>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </button>
                );
              })}
            </div>
          )}
        </div>

        {/* Footer */}
        {notifications.length > 0 && (
          <div className="px-4 py-3 border-t border-gray-200">
            <button className="w-full text-center text-sm text-gray-600 hover:text-gray-900 font-medium transition-colors">
              View all notifications
            </button>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    </>
  );
}

// Sample notifications for demonstration
export const sampleNotifications: Notification[] = [
  {
    id: '1',
    type: 'warning',
    title: 'Policy Expiring Soon',
    message: 'Your State Farm Auto Insurance policy expires in 15 days. Renew now to avoid coverage gaps.',
    timestamp: new Date(Date.now() - 1000 * 60 * 30), // 30 min ago
    read: false,
    icon: Calendar
  },
  {
    id: '2',
    type: 'success',
    title: 'Payment Processed',
    message: 'Your payment of $245.00 for Allstate Home Insurance has been successfully processed.',
    timestamp: new Date(Date.now() - 1000 * 60 * 60 * 3), // 3 hours ago
    read: false,
    icon: DollarSign
  },
  {
    id: '3',
    type: 'info',
    title: 'New Coverage Option Available',
    message: 'Based on your profile, you may qualify for additional flood coverage at a discounted rate.',
    timestamp: new Date(Date.now() - 1000 * 60 * 60 * 24), // 1 day ago
    read: false,
    icon: Shield
  },
  {
    id: '4',
    type: 'info',
    title: 'Document Uploaded',
    message: 'Your Progressive Auto Insurance policy has been successfully uploaded and analyzed.',
    timestamp: new Date(Date.now() - 1000 * 60 * 60 * 48), // 2 days ago
    read: true,
    icon: FileText
  },
  {
    id: '5',
    type: 'success',
    title: 'Better Rate Found',
    message: 'Our AI found a similar policy with 20% lower premium. View comparison now.',
    timestamp: new Date(Date.now() - 1000 * 60 * 60 * 72), // 3 days ago
    read: true,
    icon: TrendingUp
  }
];

```

## File: `components (2)/PolicyChat.tsx`
- Bytes: 22,609
- SHA256: `927cf42728c91b73ed8c9683ea344afb115c966542557ec359fe2665687aa7eb`

```tsx
import { useState, useRef, useEffect } from 'react';
import {
  MessageSquare, Send, Sparkles, Search, X, Check, FileText,
  Shield, DollarSign, Calendar, TrendingUp, Archive, AlertCircle,
  User, Bot, ChevronDown, Plus
} from 'lucide-react';
import { toast } from 'sonner@2.0.3';

interface Policy {
  id: string;
  policyNumber: string;
  provider: string;
  logo: string;
  type: string;
  coverage: number;
  premium: number;
  deductible: number;
  startDate: string;
  expiryDate: string;
  status: 'active' | 'expiring' | 'expired';
}

interface Message {
  id: string;
  role: 'user' | 'assistant';
  content: string;
  timestamp: Date;
}

interface PolicyChatProps {
  uploadedPolicies: Policy[];
  onBack?: () => void;
}

const SUGGESTED_PROMPTS = [
  {
    icon: TrendingUp,
    text: "What's our total coverage amount?",
    category: "Overview"
  },
  {
    icon: Calendar,
    text: "Which policies expire in the next 90 days?",
    category: "Expiration"
  },
  {
    icon: FileText,
    text: "What types of insurance do we have?",
    category: "Overview"
  },
  {
    icon: DollarSign,
    text: "What's our total annual premium?",
    category: "Costs"
  },
  {
    icon: AlertCircle,
    text: "What's the most expensive policy?",
    category: "Analysis"
  },
  {
    icon: Shield,
    text: "Show me all auto insurance policies",
    category: "Filter"
  }
];

export function PolicyChat({ uploadedPolicies = [], onBack }: PolicyChatProps) {
  const [messages, setMessages] = useState<Message[]>([]);
  const [inputValue, setInputValue] = useState('');
  const [selectedPolicies, setSelectedPolicies] = useState<Set<string>>(
    new Set(uploadedPolicies.map(p => p.id))
  );
  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('');
  const [isTyping, setIsTyping] = useState(false);
  const messagesEndRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);
  const inputRef = useRef<HTMLInputElement>(null);

  const scrollToBottom = () => {
    messagesEndRef.current?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' });
  };

  useEffect(() => {
    scrollToBottom();
  }, [messages]);

  const filteredPolicies = uploadedPolicies.filter(policy =>
    policy.provider.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()) ||
    policy.type.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()) ||
    policy.policyNumber.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase())
  );

  const togglePolicy = (policyId: string) => {
    const newSelected = new Set(selectedPolicies);
    if (newSelected.has(policyId)) {
      newSelected.delete(policyId);
    } else {
      newSelected.add(policyId);
    }
    setSelectedPolicies(newSelected);
  };

  const toggleAllPolicies = () => {
    if (selectedPolicies.size === uploadedPolicies.length) {
      setSelectedPolicies(new Set());
    } else {
      setSelectedPolicies(new Set(uploadedPolicies.map(p => p.id)));
    }
  };

  const handleSendMessage = async (text?: string) => {
    const messageText = text || inputValue.trim();
    if (!messageText) return;

    if (selectedPolicies.size === 0) {
      toast.error('Please select at least one policy to ask questions about');
      return;
    }

    const userMessage: Message = {
      id: `msg-${Date.now()}`,
      role: 'user',
      content: messageText,
      timestamp: new Date()
    };

    setMessages(prev => [...prev, userMessage]);
    setInputValue('');
    setIsTyping(true);

    // Simulate AI response
    setTimeout(() => {
      const aiResponse = generateAIResponse(messageText, selectedPolicies);
      const assistantMessage: Message = {
        id: `msg-${Date.now()}-ai`,
        role: 'assistant',
        content: aiResponse,
        timestamp: new Date()
      };
      setMessages(prev => [...prev, assistantMessage]);
      setIsTyping(false);
    }, 1000 + Math.random() * 1000);
  };

  const generateAIResponse = (question: string, selectedIds: Set<string>): string => {
    const selected = uploadedPolicies.filter(p => selectedIds.has(p.id));
    const lowerQuestion = question.toLowerCase();

    if (lowerQuestion.includes('total coverage') || lowerQuestion.includes('coverage amount')) {
      const total = selected.reduce((sum, p) => sum + p.coverage, 0);
      return `Based on the ${selected.length} selected ${selected.length === 1 ? 'policy' : 'policies'}, your total coverage amount is **$${(total / 1000).toFixed(0)}K** (${total.toLocaleString()} USD).\n\nThis includes:\n${selected.map(p => `• **${p.provider}** ${p.type}: $${(p.coverage / 1000).toFixed(0)}K`).join('\n')}`;
    }

    if (lowerQuestion.includes('expire') || lowerQuestion.includes('expiring')) {
      const days = lowerQuestion.includes('90') ? 90 : 30;
      const cutoffDate = new Date();
      cutoffDate.setDate(cutoffDate.getDate() + days);
      
      const expiring = selected.filter(p => {
        const expiry = new Date(p.expiryDate);
        return expiry <= cutoffDate && expiry >= new Date();
      });

      if (expiring.length === 0) {
        return `Good news! None of your ${selected.length} selected ${selected.length === 1 ? 'policy' : 'policies'} will expire in the next ${days} days.`;
      }

      return `You have **${expiring.length}** ${expiring.length === 1 ? 'policy' : 'policies'} expiring in the next ${days} days:\n\n${expiring.map(p => {
        const daysUntil = Math.ceil((new Date(p.expiryDate).getTime() - new Date().getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
        return `• **${p.provider}** ${p.type} - Expires in **${daysUntil} days** (${new Date(p.expiryDate).toLocaleDateString()})`;
      }).join('\n')}\n\n⚠️ Consider renewing these policies soon to avoid coverage gaps.`;
    }

    if (lowerQuestion.includes('types') || lowerQuestion.includes('what kind')) {
      const types = new Set(selected.map(p => p.type));
      return `Among your ${selected.length} selected ${selected.length === 1 ? 'policy' : 'policies'}, you have **${types.size}** different types of insurance:\n\n${Array.from(types).map(type => {
        const count = selected.filter(p => p.type === type).length;
        const total = selected.filter(p => p.type === type).reduce((sum, p) => sum + p.coverage, 0);
        return `• **${type.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + type.slice(1)}** - ${count} ${count === 1 ? 'policy' : 'policies'} ($${(total / 1000).toFixed(0)}K coverage)`;
      }).join('\n')}`;
    }

    if (lowerQuestion.includes('annual premium') || lowerQuestion.includes('yearly cost') || lowerQuestion.includes('total premium')) {
      const monthlyTotal = selected.reduce((sum, p) => sum + p.premium, 0);
      const annualTotal = monthlyTotal * 12;
      return `Based on your ${selected.length} selected ${selected.length === 1 ? 'policy' : 'policies'}, your insurance costs are:\n\n• **Monthly Premium**: $${monthlyTotal.toLocaleString()}\n• **Annual Premium**: $${annualTotal.toLocaleString()}\n\nBreakdown by policy:\n${selected.map(p => `• **${p.provider}** ${p.type}: $${p.premium}/month ($${(p.premium * 12).toLocaleString()}/year)`).join('\n')}`;
    }

    if (lowerQuestion.includes('most expensive') || lowerQuestion.includes('highest premium')) {
      const mostExpensive = selected.reduce((max, p) => p.premium > max.premium ? p : max, selected[0]);
      return `Your most expensive policy among the ${selected.length} selected is:\n\n**${mostExpensive.provider}** - ${mostExpensive.type}\n• Monthly Premium: **$${mostExpensive.premium}**\n• Annual Cost: **$${(mostExpensive.premium * 12).toLocaleString()}**\n• Coverage: $${(mostExpensive.coverage / 1000).toFixed(0)}K\n• Deductible: $${mostExpensive.deductible.toLocaleString()}\n\nThis represents **${((mostExpensive.premium / selected.reduce((sum, p) => sum + p.premium, 0)) * 100).toFixed(1)}%** of your total monthly premium.`;
    }

    if (lowerQuestion.includes('auto') || lowerQuestion.includes('car') || lowerQuestion.includes('vehicle')) {
      const auto = selected.filter(p => p.type === 'auto');
      if (auto.length === 0) {
        return `You don't have any auto insurance policies among your ${selected.length} selected ${selected.length === 1 ? 'policy' : 'policies'}.`;
      }
      return `You have **${auto.length}** auto insurance ${auto.length === 1 ? 'policy' : 'policies'}:\n\n${auto.map(p => `• **${p.provider}**\n  - Coverage: $${(p.coverage / 1000).toFixed(0)}K\n  - Premium: $${p.premium}/month\n  - Deductible: $${p.deductible.toLocaleString()}\n  - Status: ${p.status}`).join('\n\n')}`;
    }

    // Default response
    return `I can help you with information about your ${selected.length} selected insurance ${selected.length === 1 ? 'policy' : 'policies'}. Here's what I can assist with:\n\n• **Coverage Analysis** - Total and individual coverage amounts\n• **Cost Breakdown** - Monthly and annual premiums\n• **Expiration Tracking** - Upcoming renewal dates\n• **Policy Comparison** - Compare different policies\n• **Recommendations** - Suggestions for optimization\n\nTry asking specific questions like:\n- "What's my total coverage?"\n- "Which policies expire soon?"\n- "What's my most expensive policy?"\n- "Show me all home insurance policies"`;
  };

  const handlePromptClick = (prompt: string) => {
    handleSendMessage(prompt);
  };

  const handleKeyDown = (e: React.KeyboardEvent) => {
    if (e.key === 'Enter' && !e.shiftKey) {
      e.preventDefault();
      handleSendMessage();
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50 flex">
      {/* Left Sidebar - Policy Selection */}
      <div className="w-80 bg-white border-r border-gray-200 flex flex-col">
        <div className="p-4 border-b border-gray-200">
          <h2 className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-700 uppercase tracking-wide mb-3">
            Selected Policies
          </h2>
          <div className="relative">
            <Search className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-gray-400" size={16} />
            <input
              type="text"
              placeholder="Search policies..."
              value={searchQuery}
              onChange={(e) => setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}
              className="w-full pl-9 pr-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-slate-500 focus:border-transparent"
            />
          </div>
        </div>

        {uploadedPolicies.length === 0 ? (
          <div className="flex-1 flex items-center justify-center p-6">
            <div className="text-center">
              <div className="w-16 h-16 bg-gray-100 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center mx-auto mb-4">
                <FileText className="text-gray-400" size={32} />
              </div>
              <p className="text-sm text-gray-600 mb-2">No policies uploaded</p>
              <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">Upload policies to start chatting</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        ) : (
          <>
            <div className="p-4 border-b border-gray-200">
              <button
                onClick={toggleAllPolicies}
                className="w-full flex items-center justify-between px-3 py-2 bg-gray-50 hover:bg-gray-100 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 transition-colors"
              >
                <span>
                  {selectedPolicies.size === uploadedPolicies.length ? 'Deselect All' : 'Select All'}
                </span>
                <span className="px-2 py-0.5 bg-slate-700 text-white rounded-full text-xs">
                  {selectedPolicies.size}/{uploadedPolicies.length}
                </span>
              </button>
            </div>

            <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto">
              {filteredPolicies.length === 0 ? (
                <div className="p-6 text-center">
                  <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">No policies match your search</p>
                </div>
              ) : (
                <div className="p-2">
                  {filteredPolicies.map((policy) => {
                    const isSelected = selectedPolicies.has(policy.id);
                    return (
                      <button
                        key={policy.id}
                        onClick={() => togglePolicy(policy.id)}
                        className={`w-full flex items-start gap-3 p-3 rounded-lg mb-2 transition-all text-left ${
                          isSelected
                            ? 'bg-slate-50 border-2 border-slate-300'
                            : 'bg-white border-2 border-gray-200 hover:border-gray-300'
                        }`}
                      >
                        <div
                          className={`w-5 h-5 rounded border-2 flex items-center justify-center flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5 transition-colors ${
                            isSelected
                              ? 'bg-slate-700 border-slate-700'
                              : 'border-gray-300'
                          }`}
                        >
                          {isSelected && <Check size={14} className="text-white" />}
                        </div>
                        <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
                          <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-1">
                            <span className="text-lg">{policy.logo}</span>
                            <span className="font-semibold text-gray-900 text-sm truncate">
                              {policy.provider}
                            </span>
                          </div>
                          <p className="text-xs text-gray-600 mb-1 capitalize">{policy.type}</p>
                          <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">{policy.policyNumber}</p>
                        </div>
                        <div
                          className={`px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold ${
                            policy.status === 'active'
                              ? 'bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-700'
                              : policy.status === 'expiring'
                              ? 'bg-amber-50 text-amber-700'
                              : 'bg-red-50 text-red-700'
                          }`}
                        >
                          {policy.status}
                        </div>
                      </button>
                    );
                  })}
                </div>
              )}
            </div>
          </>
        )}
      </div>

      {/* Main Chat Area */}
      <div className="flex-1 flex flex-col">
        {/* Simplified Header - Global nav handles main navigation */}
        <div className="bg-white border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4">
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
            <div>
              <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">Chat with AI about your insurance policies</p>
            </div>
            {selectedPolicies.size > 0 && (
              <div className="px-4 py-2 bg-slate-100 rounded-lg flex items-center gap-2">
                <FileText size={16} className="text-slate-700" />
                <span className="font-semibold text-gray-900">
                  {selectedPolicies.size} {selectedPolicies.size === 1 ? 'policy' : 'policies'}
                </span>
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Chat Messages or Welcome Screen */}
        <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto">
          {messages.length === 0 ? (
            // Welcome Screen
            <div className="max-w-4xl mx-auto px-6 py-12">
              <div className="text-center mb-12">
                <div className="w-20 h-20 bg-gradient-to-br from-slate-100 to-slate-200 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center mx-auto mb-6">
                  <Sparkles className="text-slate-700" size={36} />
                </div>
                <h2 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-3">
                  How can I help you today?
                </h2>
                <p className="text-gray-600 max-w-2xl mx-auto">
                  Ask me anything about your insurance policies. I can help you analyze coverage,
                  find expiring policies, compare insurers, and more.
                </p>
              </div>

              {/* Suggested Prompts */}
              {uploadedPolicies.length > 0 && (
                <div>
                  <h3 className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-700 mb-4 text-center">
                    Try asking me about...
                  </h3>
                  <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-3 mb-8">
                    {SUGGESTED_PROMPTS.map((prompt, index) => {
                      const Icon = prompt.icon;
                      return (
                        <button
                          key={index}
                          onClick={() => handlePromptClick(prompt.text)}
                          className="flex items-center gap-3 p-4 bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-xl hover:border-slate-300 hover:shadow-sm transition-all text-left group"
                        >
                          <div className="w-10 h-10 bg-slate-50 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center flex-shrink-0 group-hover:bg-slate-100 transition-colors">
                            <Icon size={20} className="text-slate-700" />
                          </div>
                          <span className="text-sm text-gray-900 font-medium">
                            {prompt.text}
                          </span>
                        </button>
                      );
                    })}
                  </div>
                </div>
              )}

              {uploadedPolicies.length === 0 && (
                <div className="text-center py-8">
                  <p className="text-gray-600 mb-4">
                    Upload insurance policies to start asking questions
                  </p>
                </div>
              )}
            </div>
          ) : (
            // Chat Messages
            <div className="max-w-4xl mx-auto px-6 py-6">
              {messages.map((message) => (
                <div
                  key={message.id}
                  className={`flex gap-4 mb-6 ${
                    message.role === 'user' ? 'justify-end' : 'justify-start'
                  }`}
                >
                  {message.role === 'assistant' && (
                    <div className="w-8 h-8 bg-slate-100 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center flex-shrink-0">
                      <Bot size={18} className="text-slate-700" />
                    </div>
                  )}
                  <div
                    className={`max-w-[70%] rounded-2xl px-4 py-3 ${
                      message.role === 'user'
                        ? 'bg-slate-700 text-white'
                        : 'bg-white border border-gray-200 text-gray-900'
                    }`}
                  >
                    <div className="text-sm whitespace-pre-wrap leading-relaxed">
                      {message.content}
                    </div>
                    <div
                      className={`text-xs mt-2 ${
                        message.role === 'user' ? 'text-slate-300' : 'text-gray-500'
                      }`}
                    >
                      {message.timestamp.toLocaleTimeString([], {
                        hour: '2-digit',
                        minute: '2-digit'
                      })}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  {message.role === 'user' && (
                    <div className="w-8 h-8 bg-slate-700 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center flex-shrink-0">
                      <User size={18} className="text-white" />
                    </div>
                  )}
                </div>
              ))}

              {isTyping && (
                <div className="flex gap-4 mb-6">
                  <div className="w-8 h-8 bg-slate-100 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center flex-shrink-0">
                    <Bot size={18} className="text-slate-700" />
                  </div>
                  <div className="bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-2xl px-4 py-3">
                    <div className="flex gap-1">
                      <div className="w-2 h-2 bg-gray-400 rounded-full animate-bounce" style={{ animationDelay: '0ms' }}></div>
                      <div className="w-2 h-2 bg-gray-400 rounded-full animate-bounce" style={{ animationDelay: '150ms' }}></div>
                      <div className="w-2 h-2 bg-gray-400 rounded-full animate-bounce" style={{ animationDelay: '300ms' }}></div>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              )}

              <div ref={messagesEndRef} />
            </div>
          )}
        </div>

        {/* Input Area */}
        <div className="bg-white border-t border-gray-200 p-4">
          <div className="max-w-4xl mx-auto">
            <div className="flex gap-3 items-end">
              <div className="flex-1 relative">
                <input
                  ref={inputRef}
                  type="text"
                  value={inputValue}
                  onChange={(e) => setInputValue(e.target.value)}
                  onKeyDown={handleKeyDown}
                  placeholder={
                    selectedPolicies.size === 0
                      ? 'Select policies to start chatting...'
                      : 'Ask a question about your policies...'
                  }
                  disabled={selectedPolicies.size === 0}
                  className="w-full px-4 py-3 pr-12 border border-gray-300 rounded-xl text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-slate-500 focus:border-transparent disabled:bg-gray-100 disabled:cursor-not-allowed"
                />
              </div>
              <button
                onClick={() => handleSendMessage()}
                disabled={!inputValue.trim() || selectedPolicies.size === 0 || isTyping}
                className="px-4 py-3 bg-slate-700 text-white rounded-xl hover:bg-slate-800 transition-all disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed flex items-center gap-2 font-medium"
              >
                <Send size={18} />
              </button>
            </div>
            <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 text-center mt-2">
              Press <kbd className="px-1.5 py-0.5 bg-gray-100 border border-gray-300 rounded text-xs">Enter</kbd> to send, <kbd className="px-1.5 py-0.5 bg-gray-100 border border-gray-300 rounded text-xs">Shift + Enter</kbd> for new line
            </p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
```

## File: `components (2)/PolicyDashboard.tsx`
