```tsx
import { useState } from 'react';
import {
  Shield, TrendingUp, DollarSign, Calendar, Upload, FileText,
  Clock, AlertCircle, CheckCircle, Eye, Edit, Trash2, Download,
  MoreVertical, PieChart, BarChart3, TrendingDown, Award,
  Sparkles, ArrowRight, RefreshCw, Bell, Settings, Filter,
  Search, ChevronRight, Activity, Target, Zap, Star
} from 'lucide-react';
import { toast } from 'sonner@2.0.3';

interface Policy {
  id: string;
  policyNumber: string;
  provider: string;
  logo: string;
  type: string;
  coverage: number;
  premium: number;
  deductible: number;
  startDate: string;
  expiryDate: string;
  status: 'active' | 'expiring' | 'expired';
  uploadDate: string;
  documentType: string;
}

interface PolicyDashboardProps {
  uploadedPolicies: Policy[];
  onUploadPolicy: () => void;
  onViewPolicy: (policyId: string) => void;
  onEditPolicy: (policyId: string) => void;
  onDeletePolicy: (policyId: string) => void;
  onBack?: () => void;
}

export function PolicyDashboard({
  uploadedPolicies = [],
  onUploadPolicy,
  onViewPolicy,
  onEditPolicy,
  onDeletePolicy,
  onBack
}: PolicyDashboardProps) {
  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('');
  const [filterStatus, setFilterStatus] = useState<'all' | 'active' | 'expiring' | 'expired'>('all');
  const [selectedPolicy, setSelectedPolicy] = useState<string | null>(null);

  // Calculate dashboard metrics
  const totalPolicies = uploadedPolicies.length;
  const totalCoverage = uploadedPolicies.reduce((sum, p) => sum + p.coverage, 0);
  const annualPremium = uploadedPolicies.reduce((sum, p) => sum + (p.premium * 12), 0);
  
  // Policies expiring in the next 30 days
  const expiringPolicies = uploadedPolicies.filter(p => {
    const expiryDate = new Date(p.expiryDate);
    const thirtyDaysFromNow = new Date();
    thirtyDaysFromNow.setDate(thirtyDaysFromNow.getDate() + 30);
    return expiryDate <= thirtyDaysFromNow && expiryDate >= new Date();
  }).length;

  // Filter policies
  const filteredPolicies = uploadedPolicies.filter(policy => {
    const matchesSearch = policy.provider.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()) ||
                         policy.type.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()) ||
                         policy.policyNumber.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase());
    const matchesFilter = filterStatus === 'all' || policy.status === filterStatus;
    return matchesSearch && matchesFilter;
  });

  // Coverage by type for chart
  const coverageByType = uploadedPolicies.reduce((acc, policy) => {
    acc[policy.type] = (acc[policy.type] || 0) + policy.coverage;
    return acc;
  }, {} as Record<string, number>);

  const getPolicyStatusColor = (status: string) => {
    switch (status) {
      case 'active': return 'bg-green-100 text-green-700 border-green-200';
      case 'expiring': return 'bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-700 border-yellow-200';
      case 'expired': return 'bg-red-100 text-red-700 border-red-200';
      default: return 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-700 border-gray-200';
    }
  };

  const getPolicyStatusIcon = (status: string) => {
    switch (status) {
      case 'active': return <CheckCircle size={14} />;
      case 'expiring': return <Clock size={14} />;
      case 'expired': return <AlertCircle size={14} />;
      default: return <FileText size={14} />;
    }
  };

  const getDaysUntilExpiry = (expiryDate: string) => {
    const expiry = new Date(expiryDate);
    const today = new Date();
    const diffTime = expiry.getTime() - today.getTime();
    const diffDays = Math.ceil(diffTime / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
    return diffDays;
  };

  const getHealthScore = () => {
    if (totalPolicies === 0) return 0;
    const activeCount = uploadedPolicies.filter(p => p.status === 'active').length;
    const expiringCount = uploadedPolicies.filter(p => p.status === 'expiring').length;
    return Math.round((activeCount / totalPolicies) * 100 - (expiringCount / totalPolicies) * 20);
  };

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-50 via-white to-purple-50">
      {/* Header */}
      <div className="bg-white border-b border-gray-100 sticky top-0 z-30">
        <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-6">
          <div className="flex flex-col md:flex-row md:items-center md:justify-between gap-4">
            <div>
              <h1 className="text-3xl md:text-4xl mb-2 tracking-tight">
                Insurance Policy Dashboard
              </h1>
              <p className="text-gray-600">
                Manage and monitor your insurance portfolio
              </p>
            </div>
            <button
              onClick={onUploadPolicy}
              className="flex items-center justify-center gap-2 px-6 py-3 bg-gradient-to-r from-pink-600 to-rose-600 text-white rounded-xl hover:from-pink-700 hover:to-rose-700 transition-all shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl font-semibold"
            >
              <Upload size={20} />
              Upload Policy
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-8">
        {/* Key Metrics */}
        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6 mb-8">
          {/* Total Policies */}
          <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl p-6 shadow-lg border border-gray-100 hover:shadow-xl transition-all">
            <div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-4">
              <div className="w-12 h-12 bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-100 to-indigo-100 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center">
                <FileText className="text-blue-600" size={24} />
              </div>
            </div>
            <div className="text-4xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-1">
              {totalPolicies}
            </div>
            <div className="text-sm text-gray-600">
              Active insurance policies
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* Total Coverage */}
          <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl p-6 shadow-lg border border-gray-100 hover:shadow-xl transition-all">
            <div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-4">
              <div className="w-12 h-12 bg-gradient-to-br from-green-100 to-emerald-100 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center">
                <TrendingUp className="text-green-600" size={24} />
              </div>
            </div>
            <div className="text-4xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-1">
              ${(totalCoverage / 1000).toFixed(0)}K
            </div>
            <div className="text-sm text-gray-600">
              Total insured value
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* Annual Premium */}
          <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl p-6 shadow-lg border border-gray-100 hover:shadow-xl transition-all">
            <div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-4">
              <div className="w-12 h-12 bg-gradient-to-br from-yellow-100 to-amber-100 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center">
                <DollarSign className="text-yellow-600" size={24} />
              </div>
            </div>
            <div className="text-4xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-1">
              ${annualPremium.toLocaleString()}
            </div>
            <div className="text-sm text-gray-600">
              Yearly premium cost
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* Expiring Soon */}
          <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl p-6 shadow-lg border border-gray-100 hover:shadow-xl transition-all">
            <div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-4">
              <div className="w-12 h-12 bg-gradient-to-br from-orange-100 to-red-100 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center">
                <Calendar className="text-orange-600" size={24} />
              </div>
            </div>
            <div className="text-4xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-1">
              {expiringPolicies}
            </div>
            <div className="text-sm text-gray-600">
              Policies expiring this month
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Portfolio Health & Quick Stats */}
        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6 mb-8">
          {/* Portfolio Health Score */}
          <div className="bg-gradient-to-br from-purple-50 to-pink-50 rounded-2xl p-6 border-2 border-purple-200 shadow-lg">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-4">
              <div className="w-10 h-10 bg-white rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center">
                <Shield className="text-purple-600" size={20} />
              </div>
              <div>
                <div className="font-bold text-gray-900">Portfolio Health</div>
                <div className="text-xs text-gray-600">Overall protection score</div>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div className="flex items-end gap-3">
              <div className="text-5xl font-bold text-purple-700">
                {getHealthScore()}%
              </div>
              <div className="pb-2">
                {getHealthScore() >= 80 ? (
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-1 text-green-600 text-sm font-semibold">
                    <TrendingUp size={16} />
                    Excellent
                  </div>
                ) : getHealthScore() >= 60 ? (
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-1 text-yellow-600 text-sm font-semibold">
                    <TrendingUp size={16} />
                    Good
                  </div>
                ) : (
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-1 text-red-600 text-sm font-semibold">
                    <TrendingDown size={16} />
                    Needs Attention
                  </div>
                )}
              </div>
            </div>
            <div className="mt-4 pt-4 border-t border-purple-200">
              <div className="text-xs text-gray-700">
                {uploadedPolicies.filter(p => p.status === 'active').length} active • {' '}
                {uploadedPolicies.filter(p => p.status === 'expiring').length} expiring soon
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* Coverage Distribution */}
          <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl p-6 shadow-lg border border-gray-100">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-4">
              <div className="w-10 h-10 bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-100 to-indigo-100 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center">
                <PieChart className="text-blue-600" size={20} />
              </div>
              <div>
                <div className="font-bold text-gray-900">Coverage Types</div>
                <div className="text-xs text-gray-600">Portfolio distribution</div>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div className="space-y-3">
              {Object.entries(coverageByType).slice(0, 3).map(([type, amount]) => (
                <div key={type}>
                  <div className="flex items-center justify-between text-sm mb-1">
                    <span className="capitalize text-gray-700">{type}</span>
                    <span className="font-semibold text-gray-900">${(amount / 1000).toFixed(0)}K</span>
                  </div>
                  <div className="w-full bg-gray-100 rounded-full h-2">
                    <div
                      className="bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 h-full rounded-full"
                      style={{ width: `${(amount / totalCoverage) * 100}%` }}
                    />
                  </div>
                </div>
              ))}
              {Object.keys(coverageByType).length === 0 && (
                <div className="text-sm text-gray-500 text-center py-4">
                  No policies uploaded yet
                </div>
              )}
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* Monthly Spending */}
          <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl p-6 shadow-lg border border-gray-100">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-4">
              <div className="w-10 h-10 bg-gradient-to-br from-green-100 to-emerald-100 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center">
                <BarChart3 className="text-green-600" size={20} />
              </div>
              <div>
                <div className="font-bold text-gray-900">Monthly Cost</div>
                <div className="text-xs text-gray-600">Premium breakdown</div>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div className="text-4xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-2">
              ${(annualPremium / 12).toFixed(0)}
            </div>
            <div className="text-sm text-gray-600 mb-4">
              per month
            </div>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm">
              <div className="flex-1 bg-gray-100 rounded-lg px-3 py-2">
                <div className="text-xs text-gray-600">Avg per policy</div>
                <div className="font-semibold text-gray-900">
                  ${totalPolicies > 0 ? ((annualPremium / 12) / totalPolicies).toFixed(0) : 0}
                </div>
              </div>
              <div className="flex-1 bg-gray-100 rounded-lg px-3 py-2">
                <div className="text-xs text-gray-600">Annual</div>
                <div className="font-semibold text-gray-900">
                  ${annualPremium.toLocaleString()}
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* AI Insights & Recommendations */}
        {totalPolicies > 0 && (
          <div className="bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 rounded-2xl p-6 mb-8 shadow-xl">
            <div className="flex items-start gap-4">
              <div className="w-12 h-12 bg-white/20 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center flex-shrink-0">
                <Sparkles className="text-white" size={24} />
              </div>
              <div className="flex-1">
                <h3 className="font-bold text-white text-lg mb-2 flex items-center gap-2">
                  AI-Powered Insights
                </h3>
                <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                  <div className="bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-xl p-4 border border-white/20">
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
                      <Target className="text-yellow-300" size={16} />
                      <span className="text-white font-semibold text-sm">Potential Savings</span>
                    </div>
                    <p className="text-white/90 text-sm">
                      Based on your coverage, you could save up to <span className="font-bold text-yellow-300">$420/year</span> by comparing alternatives
                    </p>
                  </div>
                  <div className="bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-xl p-4 border border-white/20">
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
                      <Award className="text-green-300" size={16} />
                      <span className="text-white font-semibold text-sm">Coverage Gap Detected</span>
                    </div>
                    <p className="text-white/90 text-sm">
                      Consider adding <span className="font-bold text-green-300">health insurance</span> to complete your protection portfolio
                    </p>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        )}

        {/* Recent Policies Section */}
        <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-lg border border-gray-100 overflow-hidden">
          {/* Section Header */}
          <div className="px-6 py-5 border-b border-gray-100">
            <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row sm:items-center sm:justify-between gap-4">
              <div>
                <h2 className="text-xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-1">
                  {filterStatus === 'all' ? 'All Policies' : `${filterStatus.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + filterStatus.slice(1)} Policies`}
                </h2>
                <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">
                  {filteredPolicies.length} {filteredPolicies.length === 1 ? 'policy' : 'policies'} found
                </p>
              </div>
              
              {/* Filters & Search */}
              <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                <div className="relative">
                  <Search className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-gray-400" size={18} />
                  <input
                    type="text"
                    placeholder="Search policies..."
                    value={searchQuery}
                    onChange={(e) => setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}
                    className="pl-10 pr-4 py-2 border border-gray-200 rounded-lg text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-transparent"
                  />
                </div>
                <select
                  value={filterStatus}
                  onChange={(e) => setFilterStatus(e.target.value as any)}
                  className="px-4 py-2 border border-gray-200 rounded-lg text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-transparent"
                >
                  <option value="all">All Status</option>
                  <option value="active">Active</option>
                  <option value="expiring">Expiring</option>
                  <option value="expired">Expired</option>
                </select>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* Policies List */}
          <div className="divide-y divide-gray-100">
            {filteredPolicies.length === 0 ? (
              <div className="px-6 py-16 text-center">
                <div className="w-16 h-16 bg-gray-100 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center mx-auto mb-4">
                  <FileText className="text-gray-400" size={32} />
                </div>
                <h3 className="font-bold text-gray-900 mb-2">No Policies Found</h3>
                <p className="text-gray-600 mb-6">
                  {searchQuery || filterStatus !== 'all' 
                    ? 'Try adjusting your filters or search query'
                    : 'Upload your first insurance policy to get started'
                  }
                </p>
                {!searchQuery && filterStatus === 'all' && (
                  <button
                    onClick={onUploadPolicy}
                    className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-6 py-3 bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 text-white rounded-xl hover:from-blue-700 hover:to-indigo-700 transition-all font-semibold"
                  >
                    <Upload size={18} />
                    Upload Your First Policy
                  </button>
                )}
              </div>
            ) : (
              filteredPolicies.map((policy) => {
                const daysUntilExpiry = getDaysUntilExpiry(policy.expiryDate);
                
                return (
                  <div
                    key={policy.id}
                    className="px-6 py-5 hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors group"
                  >
                    <div className="flex items-start gap-4">
                      {/* Logo */}
                      <div className="w-14 h-14 bg-gradient-to-br from-purple-100 to-pink-100 border-2 border-purple-200 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center text-2xl flex-shrink-0">
                        {policy.logo}
                      </div>

                      {/* Policy Details */}
                      <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
                        <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-4 mb-2">
                          <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
                            <div className="flex items-center gap-2 flex-wrap mb-1">
                              <h3 className="font-bold text-gray-900">
                                {policy.provider}
                              </h3>
                              <span className={`inline-flex items-center gap-1 px-2.5 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold border ${getPolicyStatusColor(policy.status)}`}>
                                {getPolicyStatusIcon(policy.status)}
                                {policy.status.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + policy.status.slice(1)}
                              </span>
                              {daysUntilExpiry <= 30 && daysUntilExpiry > 0 && (
                                <span className="inline-flex items-center gap-1 px-2.5 py-1 bg-orange-100 text-orange-700 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold border border-orange-200">
                                  <Bell size={12} />
                                  {daysUntilExpiry} days left
                                </span>
                              )}
                            </div>
                            <p className="text-sm text-gray-600 mb-1 capitalize">
                              {policy.type} Insurance
                            </p>
                            <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">
                              Policy #{policy.policyNumber}
                            </p>
                          </div>

                          {/* Action Buttons */}
                          <div className="flex items-center gap-2 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity">
                            <button
                              onClick={() => {
                                onViewPolicy(policy.id);
                                toast.success('Opening policy details');
                              }}
                              className="p-2 hover:bg-blue-50 rounded-lg transition-colors"
                              title="View Details"
                            >
                              <Eye size={18} className="text-blue-600" />
                            </button>
                            <button
                              onClick={() => {
                                onEditPolicy(policy.id);
                                toast.success('Opening policy editor');
                              }}
                              className="p-2 hover:bg-green-50 rounded-lg transition-colors"
                              title="Edit Policy"
                            >
                              <Edit size={18} className="text-green-600" />
                            </button>
                            <button
                              onClick={() => {
                                toast.success('Policy downloaded');
                              }}
                              className="p-2 hover:bg-purple-50 rounded-lg transition-colors"
                              title="Download"
                            >
                              <Download size={18} className="text-purple-600" />
                            </button>
                            <button
                              onClick={() => {
                                if (confirm('Are you sure you want to delete this policy?')) {
                                  onDeletePolicy(policy.id);
                                  toast.success('Policy deleted');
                                }
                              }}
                              className="p-2 hover:bg-red-50 rounded-lg transition-colors"
                              title="Delete"
                            >
                              <Trash2 size={18} className="text-red-600" />
                            </button>
                          </div>
                        </div>

                        {/* Policy Stats Grid */}
                        <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4 mt-4">
                          <div className="bg-gray-50 rounded-lg px-3 py-2">
                            <div className="text-xs text-gray-600 mb-1">Coverage</div>
                            <div className="font-bold text-gray-900">
                              ${policy.coverage > 0 ? (policy.coverage / 1000).toFixed(0) + 'K' : 'N/A'}
                            </div>
                          </div>
                          <div className="bg-gray-50 rounded-lg px-3 py-2">
                            <div className="text-xs text-gray-600 mb-1">Premium</div>
                            <div className="font-bold text-gray-900">
                              ${policy.premium}/mo
                            </div>
                          </div>
                          <div className="bg-gray-50 rounded-lg px-3 py-2">
                            <div className="text-xs text-gray-600 mb-1">Deductible</div>
                            <div className="font-bold text-gray-900">
                              ${policy.deductible > 0 ? policy.deductible.toLocaleString() : 'N/A'}
                            </div>
                          </div>
                          <div className="bg-gray-50 rounded-lg px-3 py-2">
                            <div className="text-xs text-gray-600 mb-1">Expires</div>
                            <div className="font-bold text-gray-900">
                              {policy.expiryDate ? new Date(policy.expiryDate).toLocaleDateString() : 'N/A'}
                            </div>
                          </div>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                );
              })
            )}
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Quick Actions */}
        {totalPolicies > 0 && (
          <div className="mt-8 grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
            <button
              onClick={() => toast.success('Opening comparison tool')}
              className="bg-white rounded-2xl p-6 shadow-lg border border-gray-100 hover:shadow-xl transition-all text-left group"
            >
              <div className="w-12 h-12 bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-100 to-indigo-100 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center mb-4">
                <BarChart3 className="text-blue-600" size={24} />
              </div>
              <h3 className="font-bold text-gray-900 mb-2">Benchmark Policies</h3>
              <p className="text-sm text-gray-600 mb-4">
                Compare your policies side-by-side and analyze premium costs
              </p>
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-blue-600 font-semibold text-sm">
                Start Benchmarking
                <ArrowRight size={16} className="group-hover:translate-x-1 transition-transform" />
              </div>
            </button>

            <button
              onClick={() => toast.success('Opening renewal reminders')}
              className="bg-white rounded-2xl p-6 shadow-lg border border-gray-100 hover:shadow-xl transition-all text-left group"
            >
              <div className="w-12 h-12 bg-gradient-to-br from-purple-100 to-pink-100 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center mb-4">
                <Bell className="text-purple-600" size={24} />
              </div>
              <h3 className="font-bold text-gray-900 mb-2">Set Reminders</h3>
              <p className="text-sm text-gray-600 mb-4">
                Get notified before your policies expire
              </p>
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-purple-600 font-semibold text-sm">
                Manage Alerts
                <ArrowRight size={16} className="group-hover:translate-x-1 transition-transform" />
              </div>
            </button>

            <button
              onClick={() => toast.success('Opening savings calculator')}
              className="bg-white rounded-2xl p-6 shadow-lg border border-gray-100 hover:shadow-xl transition-all text-left group"
            >
              <div className="w-12 h-12 bg-gradient-to-br from-green-100 to-emerald-100 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center mb-4">
                <Target className="text-green-600" size={24} />
              </div>
              <h3 className="font-bold text-gray-900 mb-2">Find Savings</h3>
              <p className="text-sm text-gray-600 mb-4">
                Discover opportunities to reduce your premiums
              </p>
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-green-600 font-semibold text-sm">
                Calculate Savings
                <ArrowRight size={16} className="group-hover:translate-x-1 transition-transform" />
              </div>
            </button>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

```
