## File: `components (2)/PolicyDashboardImproved.tsx`
- Bytes: 60,535
- SHA256: `e70d4f980a2982161cfcd603874689ba0ee88ced76aa75f007dc59f7af10f3c8`

```tsx
import { useState, useMemo } from 'react';
import {
  Shield, TrendingUp, DollarSign, Calendar, Upload, FileText,
  Clock, AlertCircle, CheckCircle, Eye, Edit, Trash2, Download,
  MoreVertical, PieChart, BarChart3, TrendingDown, Award,
  Sparkles, ArrowRight, RefreshCw, Bell, Settings, Filter,
  Search, ChevronRight, Activity, Target, Zap, Star, X,
  ChevronDown, ChevronUp, Columns, Move, ArrowUpDown, FileDown,
  Table2, LayoutGrid, Maximize2, Minimize2, File, Image as ImageIcon,
  Plus, Home, BarChart, FileStack, ChevronLeft
} from 'lucide-react';
import { toast } from 'sonner@2.0.3';
import {
  LineChart, Line, AreaChart, Area, BarChart, Bar,
  XAxis, YAxis, CartesianGrid, Tooltip as RechartsTooltip,
  Legend, ResponsiveContainer, Cell, RadarChart, PolarGrid,
  PolarAngleAxis, PolarRadiusAxis, Radar
} from 'recharts';

interface Policy {
  id: string;
  policyNumber: string;
  provider: string;
  logo: string;
  type: string;
  coverage: number;
  premium: number;
  deductible: number;
  startDate: string;
  expiryDate: string;
  status: 'active' | 'expiring' | 'expired';
  uploadDate: string;
  documentType: string;
  insuredPerson?: string;
  location?: string;
  beneficiary?: string;
  policyTerm?: string;
  paymentFrequency?: string;
  agentName?: string;
  documentUrl?: string;
}

interface PolicyDashboardImprovedProps {
  uploadedPolicies: Policy[];
  onUploadPolicy: () => void;
  onViewPolicy: (policyId: string) => void;
  onEditPolicy: (policyId: string) => void;
  onDeletePolicy: (policyId: string) => void;
  onBack?: () => void;
}

type ColumnKey = 
  | 'provider' | 'policyNumber' | 'type' | 'insuredPerson' 
  | 'coverage' | 'premium' | 'deductible' | 'startDate' 
  | 'expiryDate' | 'status' | 'location' | 'beneficiary' 
  | 'policyTerm' | 'paymentFrequency' | 'agentName';

type TabType = 'overview' | 'analytics' | 'policies';

const AVAILABLE_COLUMNS: Record<ColumnKey, { label: string; width: string }> = {
  provider: { label: 'Provider/Insurer', width: '150px' },
  policyNumber: { label: 'Policy Number', width: '140px' },
  type: { label: 'Policy Type', width: '120px' },
  insuredPerson: { label: 'Insured Person', width: '150px' },
  coverage: { label: 'Coverage Amount', width: '140px' },
  premium: { label: 'Monthly Premium', width: '130px' },
  deductible: { label: 'Deductible', width: '120px' },
  startDate: { label: 'Start Date', width: '120px' },
  expiryDate: { label: 'Expiry Date', width: '120px' },
  status: { label: 'Status', width: '110px' },
  location: { label: 'Location', width: '150px' },
  beneficiary: { label: 'Beneficiary', width: '150px' },
  policyTerm: { label: 'Policy Term', width: '110px' },
  paymentFrequency: { label: 'Payment Freq.', width: '130px' },
  agentName: { label: 'Agent/Broker', width: '150px' }
};

export function PolicyDashboardImproved({
  uploadedPolicies = [],
  onUploadPolicy,
  onViewPolicy,
  onEditPolicy,
  onDeletePolicy,
  onBack
}: PolicyDashboardImprovedProps) {
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<TabType>('overview');
  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('');
  const [filterStatus, setFilterStatus] = useState<'all' | 'active' | 'expiring' | 'expired'>('all');
  const [showColumnCustomizer, setShowColumnCustomizer] = useState(false);
  const [showDocumentPreview, setShowDocumentPreview] = useState(false);
  const [previewPolicy, setPreviewPolicy] = useState<Policy | null>(null);
  const [viewMode, setViewMode] = useState<'cards' | 'table'>('cards');
  
  // Pagination
  const [currentPage, setCurrentPage] = useState(1);
  const [itemsPerPage, setItemsPerPage] = useState(10);
  
  // Collapsible sections
  const [sectionsExpanded, setSectionsExpanded] = useState({
    charts: true,
    insights: true
  });
  
  // Column management
  const [visibleColumns, setVisibleColumns] = useState<ColumnKey[]>([
    'provider', 'policyNumber', 'type', 'coverage', 'premium', 'status', 'expiryDate'
  ]);
  
  const [columnFilters, setColumnFilters] = useState<Record<string, string>>({});
  const [sortColumn, setSortColumn] = useState<ColumnKey | null>(null);
  const [sortDirection, setSortDirection] = useState<'asc' | 'desc'>('asc');

  // Calculate dashboard metrics
  const totalPolicies = uploadedPolicies.length;
  const totalCoverage = uploadedPolicies.reduce((sum, p) => sum + p.coverage, 0);
  const annualPremium = uploadedPolicies.reduce((sum, p) => sum + (p.premium * 12), 0);
  
  const expiringPolicies = uploadedPolicies.filter(p => {
    const expiryDate = new Date(p.expiryDate);
    const thirtyDaysFromNow = new Date();
    thirtyDaysFromNow.setDate(thirtyDaysFromNow.getDate() + 30);
    return expiryDate <= thirtyDaysFromNow && expiryDate >= new Date();
  }).length;

  // Chart data
  const premiumTrendData = useMemo(() => {
    const months = ['Jan', 'Feb', 'Mar', 'Apr', 'May', 'Jun'];
    return months.map((month, idx) => ({
      month,
      premium: annualPremium / 12 + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 200,
      coverage: totalCoverage / 6 + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 50000
    }));
  }, [annualPremium, totalCoverage]);

  const coverageByTypeData = useMemo(() => {
    const byType: Record<string, number> = {};
    uploadedPolicies.forEach(p => {
      byType[p.type] = (byType[p.type] || 0) + p.coverage;
    });
    return Object.entries(byType).map(([type, amount]) => ({
      type: type.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + type.slice(1),
      amount: amount / 1000,
      count: uploadedPolicies.filter(p => p.type === type).length
    }));
  }, [uploadedPolicies]);

  const statusDistributionData = useMemo(() => {
    const active = uploadedPolicies.filter(p => p.status === 'active').length;
    const expiring = uploadedPolicies.filter(p => p.status === 'expiring').length;
    const expired = uploadedPolicies.filter(p => p.status === 'expired').length;
    
    return [
      { status: 'Active', count: active, fill: '#10b981' },
      { status: 'Expiring', count: expiring, fill: '#f59e0b' },
      { status: 'Expired', count: expired, fill: '#ef4444' }
    ];
  }, [uploadedPolicies]);

  const radarChartData = useMemo(() => {
    return [
      { category: 'Coverage', value: Math.min((totalCoverage / 2000000) * 100, 100) },
      { category: 'Affordability', value: Math.max(100 - (annualPremium / 50000) * 100, 0) },
      { category: 'Active Policies', value: (uploadedPolicies.filter(p => p.status === 'active').length / Math.max(totalPolicies, 1)) * 100 },
      { category: 'Diversification', value: (new Set(uploadedPolicies.map(p => p.type)).size / 5) * 100 },
      { category: 'Renewal Health', value: 100 - (expiringPolicies / Math.max(totalPolicies, 1)) * 100 }
    ];
  }, [totalCoverage, annualPremium, uploadedPolicies, totalPolicies, expiringPolicies]);

  // Filter and sort policies
  const filteredAndSortedPolicies = useMemo(() => {
    let result = uploadedPolicies.filter(policy => {
      const matchesSearch = policy.provider.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()) ||
                           policy.type.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()) ||
                           policy.policyNumber.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()) ||
                           (policy.insuredPerson || '').toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()) ||
                           (policy.location || '').toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase());
      
      const matchesStatus = filterStatus === 'all' || policy.status === filterStatus;
      
      const matchesColumnFilters = Object.entries(columnFilters).every(([key, value]) => {
        if (!value) return true;
        const policyValue = String(policy[key as keyof Policy] || '').toLowerCase();
        return policyValue.includes(value.toLowerCase());
      });
      
      return matchesSearch && matchesStatus && matchesColumnFilters;
    });

    if (sortColumn) {
      result.sort((a, b) => {
        let aVal = a[sortColumn];
        let bVal = b[sortColumn];
        
        if (typeof aVal === 'number' && typeof bVal === 'number') {
          return sortDirection === 'asc' ? aVal - bVal : bVal - aVal;
        }
        
        if (sortColumn.includes('Date')) {
          const aDate = new Date(aVal as string).getTime();
          const bDate = new Date(bVal as string).getTime();
          return sortDirection === 'asc' ? aDate - bDate : bDate - aDate;
        }
        
        const aStr = String(aVal || '').toLowerCase();
        const bStr = String(bVal || '').toLowerCase();
        return sortDirection === 'asc' 
          ? aStr.localeCompare(bStr)
          : bStr.localeCompare(aStr);
      });
    }

    return result;
  }, [uploadedPolicies, searchQuery, filterStatus, columnFilters, sortColumn, sortDirection]);

  // Pagination
  const totalPages = Math.ceil(filteredAndSortedPolicies.length / itemsPerPage);
  const paginatedPolicies = filteredAndSortedPolicies.slice(
    (currentPage - 1) * itemsPerPage,
    currentPage * itemsPerPage
  );

  // Reset to page 1 when filters change
  useMemo(() => {
    setCurrentPage(1);
  }, [searchQuery, filterStatus, columnFilters]);

  const exportToCSV = () => {
    const headers = visibleColumns.map(col => AVAILABLE_COLUMNS[col].label);
    const rows = filteredAndSortedPolicies.map(policy => 
      visibleColumns.map(col => {
        const value = policy[col];
        if (value === undefined || value === null) return '';
        if (typeof value === 'number') return value;
        return `"${value}"`;
      })
    );
    
    const csv = [headers.join(','), ...rows.map(row => row.join(','))].join('\n');
    const blob = new Blob([csv], { type: 'text/csv' });
    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
    const a = document.createElement('a');
    a.href = url;
    a.download = `insurance-policies-${new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]}.csv`;
    a.click();
    toast.success('Exported to CSV');
  };

  const exportToJSON = () => {
    const data = filteredAndSortedPolicies.map(policy => {
      const obj: any = {};
      visibleColumns.forEach(col => {
        obj[AVAILABLE_COLUMNS[col].label] = policy[col];
      });
      return obj;
    });
    
    const json = JSON.stringify(data, null, 2);
    const blob = new Blob([json], { type: 'application/json' });
    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
    const a = document.createElement('a');
    a.href = url;
    a.download = `insurance-policies-${new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]}.json`;
    a.click();
    toast.success('Exported to JSON');
  };

  const handleSort = (column: ColumnKey) => {
    if (sortColumn === column) {
      setSortDirection(sortDirection === 'asc' ? 'desc' : 'asc');
    } else {
      setSortColumn(column);
      setSortDirection('asc');
    }
  };

  const toggleColumn = (column: ColumnKey) => {
    if (visibleColumns.includes(column)) {
      if (visibleColumns.length > 1) {
        setVisibleColumns(visibleColumns.filter(c => c !== column));
      } else {
        toast.error('At least one column must be visible');
      }
    } else {
      setVisibleColumns([...visibleColumns, column]);
    }
  };

  const moveColumn = (column: ColumnKey, direction: 'left' | 'right') => {
    const index = visibleColumns.indexOf(column);
    if (index === -1) return;
    
    const newIndex = direction === 'left' ? index - 1 : index + 1;
    if (newIndex < 0 || newIndex >= visibleColumns.length) return;
    
    const newColumns = [...visibleColumns];
    [newColumns[index], newColumns[newIndex]] = [newColumns[newIndex], newColumns[index]];
    setVisibleColumns(newColumns);
  };

  const getCellValue = (policy: Policy, column: ColumnKey) => {
    const value = policy[column];
    
    switch (column) {
      case 'coverage':
        return `$${((value as number) / 1000).toFixed(0)}K`;
      case 'premium':
        return `$${value}/mo`;
      case 'deductible':
        return value ? `$${(value as number).toLocaleString()}` : 'N/A';
      case 'startDate':
      case 'expiryDate':
        return value ? new Date(value as string).toLocaleDateString() : 'N/A';
      case 'status':
        return (
          <span className={`inline-flex items-center gap-1 px-2.5 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold border ${
            value === 'active' ? 'bg-green-100 text-green-700 border-green-200' :
            value === 'expiring' ? 'bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-700 border-yellow-200' :
            'bg-red-100 text-red-700 border-red-200'
          }`}>
            {value === 'active' ? <CheckCircle size={12} /> :
             value === 'expiring' ? <Clock size={12} /> :
             <AlertCircle size={12} />}
            {String(value).charAt(0).toUpperCase() + String(value).slice(1)}
          </span>
        );
      default:
        return value || 'N/A';
    }
  };

  const getPolicyStatusColor = (status: string) => {
    switch (status) {
      case 'active': return 'bg-green-100 text-green-700 border-green-200';
      case 'expiring': return 'bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-700 border-yellow-200';
      case 'expired': return 'bg-red-100 text-red-700 border-red-200';
      default: return 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-700 border-gray-200';
    }
  };

  const getPolicyStatusIcon = (status: string) => {
    switch (status) {
      case 'active': return <CheckCircle size={14} />;
      case 'expiring': return <Clock size={14} />;
      case 'expired': return <AlertCircle size={14} />;
      default: return <FileText size={14} />;
    }
  };

  const getDaysUntilExpiry = (expiryDate: string) => {
    const expiry = new Date(expiryDate);
    const today = new Date();
    const diffTime = expiry.getTime() - today.getTime();
    const diffDays = Math.ceil(diffTime / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
    return diffDays;
  };

  const getHealthScore = () => {
    if (totalPolicies === 0) return 0;
    const activeCount = uploadedPolicies.filter(p => p.status === 'active').length;
    const expiringCount = uploadedPolicies.filter(p => p.status === 'expiring').length;
    return Math.round((activeCount / totalPolicies) * 100 - (expiringCount / totalPolicies) * 20);
  };

  const toggleSection = (section: keyof typeof sectionsExpanded) => {
    setSectionsExpanded(prev => ({
      ...prev,
      [section]: !prev[section]
    }));
  };

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-slate-50">
      {/* Sticky Header */}
      <div className="bg-white border-b border-gray-100 sticky top-0 z-40 shadow-sm">
        <div className="max-w-[1600px] mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-4">
          <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row sm:items-center sm:justify-between gap-4">
            <div>
              <h1 className="text-2xl md:text-3xl font-bold tracking-tight">
                Policy Benchmarking Dashboard
              </h1>
              <p className="text-sm text-gray-600 mt-1">
                Overview of your policies, coverage, and upcoming renewals
              </p>
            </div>
            <button
              onClick={onUploadPolicy}
              className="flex items-center justify-center gap-2 px-5 py-2.5 bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 text-white rounded-xl hover:shadow-lg hover:shadow-blue-500/30 transition-all font-semibold text-sm"
            >
              <Upload size={18} />
              Upload Policy
            </button>
          </div>

          {/* Sticky Metrics Bar */}
          <div className="grid grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-3 mt-4">
            <div className="bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-50 to-blue-100 rounded-xl p-3 border border-blue-200">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                <FileText className="text-blue-600" size={18} />
                <div>
                  <div className="text-xs text-blue-700">Policies</div>
                  <div className="text-lg font-bold text-blue-900">{totalPolicies}</div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div className="bg-gradient-to-br from-green-50 to-green-100 rounded-xl p-3 border border-green-200">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                <TrendingUp className="text-green-600" size={18} />
                <div>
                  <div className="text-xs text-green-700">Coverage</div>
                  <div className="text-lg font-bold text-green-900">${(totalCoverage / 1000).toFixed(0)}K</div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div className="bg-gradient-to-br from-yellow-50 to-yellow-100 rounded-xl p-3 border border-yellow-200">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                <DollarSign className="text-yellow-600" size={18} />
                <div>
                  <div className="text-xs text-yellow-700">Annual Cost</div>
                  <div className="text-lg font-bold text-yellow-900">${(annualPremium / 1000).toFixed(1)}K</div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div className="bg-gradient-to-br from-orange-50 to-orange-100 rounded-xl p-3 border border-orange-200">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                <Calendar className="text-orange-600" size={18} />
                <div>
                  <div className="text-xs text-orange-700">Expiring</div>
                  <div className="text-lg font-bold text-orange-900">{expiringPolicies}</div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* Tabs Navigation */}
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mt-4 overflow-x-auto">
            <button
              onClick={() => setActiveTab('overview')}
              className={`flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2.5 rounded-lg font-medium text-sm transition-all whitespace-nowrap ${
                activeTab === 'overview'
                  ? 'bg-blue-600 text-white shadow-lg'
                  : 'bg-white text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-100 border border-gray-200'
              }`}
            >
              <Home size={16} />
              Overview
            </button>
            <button
              onClick={() => setActiveTab('analytics')}
              className={`flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2.5 rounded-lg font-medium text-sm transition-all whitespace-nowrap ${
                activeTab === 'analytics'
                  ? 'bg-blue-600 text-white shadow-lg'
                  : 'bg-white text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-100 border border-gray-200'
              }`}
            >
              <BarChart size={16} />
              Analytics
            </button>
            <button
              onClick={() => setActiveTab('policies')}
              className={`flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2.5 rounded-lg font-medium text-sm transition-all whitespace-nowrap ${
                activeTab === 'policies'
                  ? 'bg-blue-600 text-white shadow-lg'
                  : 'bg-white text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-100 border border-gray-200'
              }`}
            >
              <FileStack size={16} />
              All Policies
              <span className="px-2 py-0.5 bg-blue-100 text-blue-700 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold">
                {filteredAndSortedPolicies.length}
              </span>
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Tab Content */}
      <div className="max-w-[1600px] mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-6">
        {/* OVERVIEW TAB */}
        {activeTab === 'overview' && (
          <div className="space-y-6">
            {/* AI Insights */}
            {totalPolicies > 0 && (
              <div className="bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 rounded-2xl p-6 shadow-xl">
                <div className="flex items-start gap-4">
                  <div className="w-12 h-12 bg-white/20 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center flex-shrink-0">
                    <Sparkles className="text-white" size={24} />
                  </div>
                  <div className="flex-1">
                    <h3 className="font-bold text-white text-lg mb-3">AI-Powered Insights</h3>
                    <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                      <div className="bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-xl p-4 border border-white/20">
                        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
                          <AlertCircle className="text-yellow-300" size={16} />
                          <span className="text-white font-semibold text-sm">Coverage Gaps Detected</span>
                        </div>
                        <p className="text-white/90 text-sm">
                          We found <span className="font-bold text-yellow-300">3 potential gaps</span> in your coverage across policies
                        </p>
                      </div>
                      <div className="bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-xl p-4 border border-white/20">
                        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
                          <Award className="text-green-300" size={16} />
                          <span className="text-white font-semibold text-sm">Portfolio Health: {getHealthScore()}%</span>
                        </div>
                        <p className="text-white/90 text-sm">
                          Your portfolio is in {getHealthScore() >= 80 ? 'excellent' : getHealthScore() >= 60 ? 'good' : 'fair'} condition
                        </p>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            )}

            {/* Quick Actions */}
            <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
              <button
                onClick={() => setActiveTab('analytics')}
                className="bg-white rounded-2xl p-6 shadow-lg border border-gray-100 hover:shadow-xl transition-all text-left group"
              >
                <div className="w-12 h-12 bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-100 to-indigo-100 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center mb-4">
                  <BarChart3 className="text-blue-600" size={24} />
                </div>
                <h3 className="font-bold text-gray-900 mb-2">View Analytics</h3>
                <p className="text-sm text-gray-600 mb-4">
                  Explore charts and detailed portfolio insights
                </p>
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-blue-600 font-semibold text-sm">
                  Open Analytics
                  <ArrowRight size={16} className="group-hover:translate-x-1 transition-transform" />
                </div>
              </button>

              <button
                onClick={() => toast.success('Opening renewal reminders')}
                className="bg-white rounded-2xl p-6 shadow-lg border border-gray-100 hover:shadow-xl transition-all text-left group"
              >
                <div className="w-12 h-12 bg-gradient-to-br from-purple-100 to-pink-100 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center mb-4">
                  <Bell className="text-purple-600" size={24} />
                </div>
                <h3 className="font-bold text-gray-900 mb-2">Set Reminders</h3>
                <p className="text-sm text-gray-600 mb-4">
                  Get notified before your policies expire
                </p>
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-purple-600 font-semibold text-sm">
                  Manage Alerts
                  <ArrowRight size={16} className="group-hover:translate-x-1 transition-transform" />
                </div>
              </button>

              <button
                onClick={() => toast.success('Opening savings calculator')}
                className="bg-white rounded-2xl p-6 shadow-lg border border-gray-100 hover:shadow-xl transition-all text-left group"
              >
                <div className="w-12 h-12 bg-gradient-to-br from-green-100 to-emerald-100 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center mb-4">
                  <AlertCircle className="text-green-600" size={24} />
                </div>
                <h3 className="font-bold text-gray-900 mb-2">Find Gaps</h3>
                <p className="text-sm text-gray-600 mb-4">
                  Discover coverage gaps, exclusions, and inconsistencies across policies
                </p>
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-green-600 font-semibold text-sm">
                  View Coverage Gaps
                  <ArrowRight size={16} className="group-hover:translate-x-1 transition-transform" />
                </div>
              </button>
            </div>

            {/* Recent Policies Preview */}
            {uploadedPolicies.length > 0 && (
              <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-lg border border-gray-100 overflow-hidden">
                <div className="px-6 py-4 border-b border-gray-100 flex items-center justify-between">
                  <h2 className="font-bold text-gray-900">Recent Policies</h2>
                  <button
                    onClick={() => setActiveTab('policies')}
                    className="text-sm text-blue-600 hover:text-blue-700 font-medium"
                  >
                    View All →
                  </button>
                </div>
                <div className="p-6">
                  <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
                    {uploadedPolicies.slice(0, 6).map((policy) => (
                      <div
                        key={policy.id}
                        className="bg-gray-50 rounded-xl border border-gray-200 p-4 hover:shadow-md transition-all"
                      >
                        <div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-3">
                          <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                            <div className="w-10 h-10 bg-gradient-to-br from-purple-100 to-pink-100 border-2 border-purple-200 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center text-lg">
                              {policy.logo}
                            </div>
                            <div>
                              <h3 className="font-semibold text-gray-900 text-sm">{policy.provider}</h3>
                              <p className="text-xs text-gray-600 capitalize">{policy.type}</p>
                            </div>
                          </div>
                          <span className={`inline-flex items-center gap-1 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold border ${getPolicyStatusColor(policy.status)}`}>
                            {policy.status.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + policy.status.slice(1)}
                          </span>
                        </div>
                        <div className="space-y-1.5">
                          <div className="flex justify-between text-xs">
                            <span className="text-gray-600">Coverage</span>
                            <span className="font-semibold text-gray-900">${(policy.coverage / 1000).toFixed(0)}K</span>
                          </div>
                          <div className="flex justify-between text-xs">
                            <span className="text-gray-600">Premium</span>
                            <span className="font-semibold text-gray-900">${policy.premium}/mo</span>
                          </div>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    ))}
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            )}

            {totalPolicies === 0 && (
              <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-lg border border-gray-100 p-12 text-center">
                <div className="w-20 h-20 bg-gray-100 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center mx-auto mb-4">
                  <FileText className="text-gray-400" size={40} />
                </div>
                <h3 className="font-bold text-gray-900 text-xl mb-2">No Policies Yet</h3>
                <p className="text-gray-600 mb-6">
                  Upload your first policy to start analyzing coverage and benchmarks
                </p>
                <button
                  onClick={onUploadPolicy}
                  className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-6 py-3 bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 text-white rounded-xl hover:from-blue-700 hover:to-indigo-700 transition-all font-semibold"
                >
                  <Upload size={18} />
                  Upload Your First Policy
                </button>
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        )}

        {/* ANALYTICS TAB */}
        {activeTab === 'analytics' && totalPolicies > 0 && (
          <div className="space-y-6">
            {/* Charts Grid */}
            <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
              {/* Premium Trend */}
              <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl p-6 shadow-lg border border-gray-100">
                <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-6">
                  <div>
                    <h3 className="font-bold text-gray-900 text-lg">Premium Trends</h3>
                    <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">Monthly premium overview</p>
                  </div>
                  <div className="p-2 bg-blue-100 rounded-lg">
                    <TrendingUp className="text-blue-600" size={20} />
                  </div>
                </div>
                <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height={280}>
                  <AreaChart data={premiumTrendData}>
                    <defs>
                      <linearGradient id="colorPremium" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
                        <stop offset="5%" stopColor="#3b82f6" stopOpacity={0.3}/>
                        <stop offset="95%" stopColor="#3b82f6" stopOpacity={0}/>
                      </linearGradient>
                    </defs>
                    <CartesianGrid strokeDasharray="3 3" stroke="#f0f0f0" />
                    <XAxis dataKey="month" stroke="#9ca3af" style={{ fontSize: '12px' }} />
                    <YAxis stroke="#9ca3af" style={{ fontSize: '12px' }} />
                    <RechartsTooltip 
                      contentStyle={{ 
                        backgroundColor: '#fff', 
                        border: '1px solid #e5e7eb',
                        borderRadius: '8px',
                        boxShadow: '0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1)'
                      }}
                    />
                    <Area 
                      type="monotone" 
                      dataKey="premium" 
                      stroke="#3b82f6" 
                      fillOpacity={1} 
                      fill="url(#colorPremium)"
                      strokeWidth={2}
                    />
                  </AreaChart>
                </ResponsiveContainer>
              </div>

              {/* Coverage Distribution */}
              <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl p-6 shadow-lg border border-gray-100">
                <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-6">
                  <div>
                    <h3 className="font-bold text-gray-900 text-lg">Coverage Distribution</h3>
                    <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">By policy type</p>
                  </div>
                  <div className="p-2 bg-green-100 rounded-lg">
                    <PieChart className="text-green-600" size={20} />
                  </div>
                </div>
                <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height={280}>
                  <BarChart data={coverageByTypeData}>
                    <CartesianGrid strokeDasharray="3 3" stroke="#f0f0f0" />
                    <XAxis dataKey="type" stroke="#9ca3af" style={{ fontSize: '12px' }} />
                    <YAxis stroke="#9ca3af" style={{ fontSize: '12px' }} />
                    <RechartsTooltip 
                      contentStyle={{ 
                        backgroundColor: '#fff', 
                        border: '1px solid #e5e7eb',
                        borderRadius: '8px',
                        boxShadow: '0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1)'
                      }}
                    />
                    <Bar dataKey="amount" radius={[8, 8, 0, 0]}>
                      {coverageByTypeData.map((entry, index) => (
                        <Cell key={`cell-${index}`} fill={['#3b82f6', '#10b981', '#f59e0b', '#ef4444', '#8b5cf6'][index % 5]} />
                      ))}
                    </Bar>
                  </BarChart>
                </ResponsiveContainer>
              </div>

              {/* Portfolio Health Radar */}
              <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl p-6 shadow-lg border border-gray-100">
                <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-6">
                  <div>
                    <h3 className="font-bold text-gray-900 text-lg">Portfolio Analysis</h3>
                    <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">Health metrics radar</p>
                  </div>
                  <div className="p-2 bg-purple-100 rounded-lg">
                    <Shield className="text-purple-600" size={20} />
                  </div>
                </div>
                <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height={280}>
                  <RadarChart data={radarChartData}>
                    <PolarGrid stroke="#e5e7eb" />
                    <PolarAngleAxis dataKey="category" style={{ fontSize: '11px' }} />
                    <PolarRadiusAxis angle={90} domain={[0, 100]} style={{ fontSize: '10px' }} />
                    <Radar 
                      name="Score" 
                      dataKey="value" 
                      stroke="#8b5cf6" 
                      fill="#8b5cf6" 
                      fillOpacity={0.5}
                      strokeWidth={2}
                    />
                    <RechartsTooltip 
                      contentStyle={{ 
                        backgroundColor: '#fff', 
                        border: '1px solid #e5e7eb',
                        borderRadius: '8px'
                      }}
                    />
                  </RadarChart>
                </ResponsiveContainer>
              </div>

              {/* Status Distribution */}
              <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl p-6 shadow-lg border border-gray-100">
                <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-6">
                  <div>
                    <h3 className="font-bold text-gray-900 text-lg">Status Overview</h3>
                    <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">Policy status breakdown</p>
                  </div>
                  <div className="p-2 bg-yellow-100 rounded-lg">
                    <Activity className="text-yellow-600" size={20} />
                  </div>
                </div>
                <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height={280}>
                  <BarChart data={statusDistributionData} layout="vertical">
                    <CartesianGrid strokeDasharray="3 3" stroke="#f0f0f0" />
                    <XAxis type="number" stroke="#9ca3af" style={{ fontSize: '12px' }} />
                    <YAxis dataKey="status" type="category" stroke="#9ca3af" style={{ fontSize: '12px' }} width={80} />
                    <RechartsTooltip 
                      contentStyle={{ 
                        backgroundColor: '#fff', 
                        border: '1px solid #e5e7eb',
                        borderRadius: '8px'
                      }}
                    />
                    <Bar dataKey="count" radius={[0, 8, 8, 0]}>
                      {statusDistributionData.map((entry, index) => (
                        <Cell key={`cell-${index}`} fill={entry.fill} />
                      ))}
                    </Bar>
                  </BarChart>
                </ResponsiveContainer>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        )}

        {activeTab === 'analytics' && totalPolicies === 0 && (
          <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-lg border border-gray-100 p-12 text-center">
            <div className="w-20 h-20 bg-gray-100 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center mx-auto mb-4">
              <BarChart3 className="text-gray-400" size={40} />
            </div>
            <h3 className="font-bold text-gray-900 text-xl mb-2">No Analytics Available</h3>
            <p className="text-gray-600 mb-6">
              Upload policies to see detailed analytics and insights
            </p>
          </div>
        )}

        {/* ALL POLICIES TAB */}
        {activeTab === 'policies' && (
          <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-lg border border-gray-100 overflow-hidden">
            {/* Toolbar */}
            <div className="px-6 py-4 border-b border-gray-100">
              <div className="flex flex-col lg:flex-row lg:items-center lg:justify-between gap-4">
                <div>
                  <h2 className="font-bold text-gray-900">All Policies</h2>
                  <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">
                    Showing {paginatedPolicies.length} of {filteredAndSortedPolicies.length} {filteredAndSortedPolicies.length === 1 ? 'policy' : 'policies'}
                  </p>
                </div>
                
                <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3">
                  {/* Search */}
                  <div className="relative">
                    <Search className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-gray-400" size={16} />
                    <input
                      type="text"
                      placeholder="Search..."
                      value={searchQuery}
                      onChange={(e) => setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}
                      className="pl-9 pr-4 py-2 border border-gray-200 rounded-lg text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-transparent w-48"
                    />
                  </div>

                  {/* Status Filter */}
                  <select
                    value={filterStatus}
                    onChange={(e) => setFilterStatus(e.target.value as any)}
                    className="px-3 py-2 border border-gray-200 rounded-lg text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500"
                  >
                    <option value="all">All Status</option>
                    <option value="active">Active</option>
                    <option value="expiring">Expiring</option>
                    <option value="expired">Expired</option>
                  </select>

                  {/* View Toggle */}
                  <div className="flex items-center bg-gray-100 rounded-lg p-1">
                    <button
                      onClick={() => setViewMode('cards')}
                      className={`px-2.5 py-1.5 rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors ${
                        viewMode === 'cards' 
                          ? 'bg-white text-blue-600 shadow-sm' 
                          : 'text-gray-600'
                      }`}
                    >
                      <LayoutGrid size={14} />
                    </button>
                    <button
                      onClick={() => setViewMode('table')}
                      className={`px-2.5 py-1.5 rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors ${
                        viewMode === 'table' 
                          ? 'bg-white text-blue-600 shadow-sm' 
                          : 'text-gray-600'
                      }`}
                    >
                      <Table2 size={14} />
                    </button>
                  </div>

                  {/* Column Customizer */}
                  {viewMode === 'table' && (
                    <button
                      onClick={() => setShowColumnCustomizer(!showColumnCustomizer)}
                      className="flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-2 border border-gray-200 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-50"
                    >
                      <Columns size={14} />
                      Columns
                    </button>
                  )}

                  {/* Export */}
                  <div className="relative group">
                    <button className="flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-2 bg-blue-600 text-white rounded-lg text-sm font-medium hover:bg-blue-700 shadow-md">
                      <FileDown size={14} />
                      Export
                    </button>
                    <div className="absolute right-0 top-full mt-2 w-44 bg-white rounded-xl shadow-xl border border-gray-200 opacity-0 invisible group-hover:opacity-100 group-hover:visible transition-all z-50">
                      <button
                        onClick={exportToCSV}
                        className="w-full px-4 py-2 text-left text-sm text-gray-700 hover:bg-blue-50 first:rounded-t-xl flex items-center gap-2"
                      >
                        <FileText size={12} />
                        CSV
                      </button>
                      <button
                        onClick={exportToJSON}
                        className="w-full px-4 py-2 text-left text-sm text-gray-700 hover:bg-blue-50 last:rounded-b-xl flex items-center gap-2"
                      >
                        <File size={12} />
                        JSON
                      </button>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>

              {/* Column Customizer */}
              {showColumnCustomizer && viewMode === 'table' && (
                <div className="mt-4 p-4 bg-gray-50 rounded-xl border border-gray-200">
                  <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-3">
                    <h3 className="font-semibold text-gray-900 text-sm">Customize Columns</h3>
                    <button
                      onClick={() => setShowColumnCustomizer(false)}
                      className="p-1 hover:bg-gray-200 rounded-lg"
                    >
                      <X size={14} />
                    </button>
                  </div>
                  <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-5 gap-2">
                    {(Object.keys(AVAILABLE_COLUMNS) as ColumnKey[]).map(column => {
                      const isVisible = visibleColumns.includes(column);
                      const columnIndex = visibleColumns.indexOf(column);
                      
                      return (
                        <div
                          key={column}
                          className={`flex items-center justify-between p-2 rounded-lg border transition-all ${
                            isVisible ? 'bg-blue-50 border-blue-200' : 'bg-white border-gray-200'
                          }`}
                        >
                          <label className="flex items-center gap-2 flex-1 cursor-pointer">
                            <input
                              type="checkbox"
                              checked={isVisible}
                              onChange={() => toggleColumn(column)}
                              className="rounded text-blue-600 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500"
                            />
                            <span className="text-xs text-gray-700">
                              {AVAILABLE_COLUMNS[column].label}
                            </span>
                          </label>
                          {isVisible && (
                            <div className="flex items-center gap-0.5 ml-2">
                              <button
                                onClick={() => moveColumn(column, 'left')}
                                disabled={columnIndex === 0}
                                className="p-0.5 hover:bg-blue-200 rounded disabled:opacity-30"
                                title="Move left"
                              >
                                <ChevronLeft size={10} />
                              </button>
                              <button
                                onClick={() => moveColumn(column, 'right')}
                                disabled={columnIndex === visibleColumns.length - 1}
                                className="p-0.5 hover:bg-blue-200 rounded disabled:opacity-30"
                                title="Move right"
                              >
                                <ChevronRight size={10} />
                              </button>
                            </div>
                          )}
                        </div>
                      );
                    })}
                  </div>
                </div>
              )}
            </div>

            {/* Content */}
            {viewMode === 'cards' ? (
              <div className="p-6">
                {paginatedPolicies.length === 0 ? (
                  <div className="text-center py-12">
                    <div className="w-16 h-16 bg-gray-100 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center mx-auto mb-4">
                      <FileText className="text-gray-400" size={32} />
                    </div>
                    <h3 className="font-bold text-gray-900 mb-2">No Policies Found</h3>
                    <p className="text-gray-600">
                      {searchQuery || filterStatus !== 'all' 
                        ? 'Try adjusting your filters'
                        : 'Upload your first policy to get started'
                      }
                    </p>
                  </div>
                ) : (
                  <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-5">
                    {paginatedPolicies.map((policy) => {
                      const daysUntilExpiry = getDaysUntilExpiry(policy.expiryDate);
                      
                      return (
                        <div
                          key={policy.id}
                          className="bg-white rounded-xl border border-gray-200 p-5 hover:shadow-lg transition-all"
                        >
                          <div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-4">
                            <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                              <div className="w-12 h-12 bg-gradient-to-br from-purple-100 to-pink-100 border-2 border-purple-200 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center text-xl">
                                {policy.logo}
                              </div>
                              <div>
                                <h3 className="font-bold text-gray-900">{policy.provider}</h3>
                                <p className="text-xs text-gray-600 capitalize">{policy.type}</p>
                              </div>
                            </div>
                            <span className={`inline-flex items-center gap-1 px-2.5 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold border ${getPolicyStatusColor(policy.status)}`}>
                              {getPolicyStatusIcon(policy.status)}
                              {policy.status.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + policy.status.slice(1)}
                            </span>
                          </div>

                          <div className="space-y-2 mb-4">
                            <div className="flex justify-between text-sm">
                              <span className="text-gray-600">Coverage</span>
                              <span className="font-semibold text-gray-900">${(policy.coverage / 1000).toFixed(0)}K</span>
                            </div>
                            <div className="flex justify-between text-sm">
                              <span className="text-gray-600">Premium</span>
                              <span className="font-semibold text-gray-900">${policy.premium}/mo</span>
                            </div>
                            <div className="flex justify-between text-sm">
                              <span className="text-gray-600">Expires</span>
                              <span className="font-semibold text-gray-900">{new Date(policy.expiryDate).toLocaleDateString()}</span>
                            </div>
                          </div>

                          {daysUntilExpiry <= 30 && daysUntilExpiry > 0 && (
                            <div className="mb-4 px-3 py-2 bg-orange-50 border border-orange-200 rounded-lg flex items-center gap-2 text-xs text-orange-700">
                              <Bell size={12} />
                              Expires in {daysUntilExpiry} days
                            </div>
                          )}

                          <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                            <button
                              onClick={() => {
                                setPreviewPolicy(policy);
                                setShowDocumentPreview(true);
                              }}
                              className="flex-1 px-3 py-2 bg-blue-50 text-blue-600 rounded-lg hover:bg-blue-100 text-sm font-medium"
                            >
                              Preview
                            </button>
                            <button
                              onClick={() => onEditPolicy(policy.id)}
                              className="px-3 py-2 bg-gray-100 text-gray-700 rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-200"
                            >
                              <Edit size={16} />
                            </button>
                            <button
                              onClick={() => {
                                if (confirm('Delete this policy?')) {
                                  onDeletePolicy(policy.id);
                                  toast.success('Policy deleted');
                                }
                              }}
                              className="px-3 py-2 bg-gray-100 text-gray-700 rounded-lg hover:bg-red-50 hover:text-red-600"
                            >
                              <Trash2 size={16} />
                            </button>
                          </div>
                        </div>
                      );
                    })}
                  </div>
                )}
              </div>
            ) : (
              <div className="overflow-x-auto">
                <table className="w-full">
                  <thead className="bg-gray-50 border-b border-gray-200">
                    <tr>
                      {visibleColumns.map(column => (
                        <th key={column} className="px-4 py-3 text-left">
                          <button
                            onClick={() => handleSort(column)}
                            className="flex items-center gap-2 text-xs font-semibold text-gray-700 hover:text-blue-600"
                          >
                            {AVAILABLE_COLUMNS[column].label}
                            <ArrowUpDown size={12} className={sortColumn === column ? 'text-blue-600' : 'text-gray-400'} />
                          </button>
                        </th>
                      ))}
                      <th className="px-4 py-3 text-left text-xs font-semibold text-gray-700 w-28">
                        Actions
                      </th>
                    </tr>
                  </thead>
                  <tbody className="divide-y divide-gray-100">
                    {paginatedPolicies.length === 0 ? (
                      <tr>
                        <td colSpan={visibleColumns.length + 1} className="px-6 py-12 text-center">
                          <div className="w-16 h-16 bg-gray-100 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center mx-auto mb-4">
                            <FileText className="text-gray-400" size={32} />
                          </div>
                          <h3 className="font-bold text-gray-900 mb-2">No Policies Found</h3>
                          <p className="text-gray-600">Try adjusting your filters</p>
                        </td>
                      </tr>
                    ) : (
                      paginatedPolicies.map((policy) => (
                        <tr key={policy.id} className="hover:bg-gray-50">
                          {visibleColumns.map(column => (
                            <td key={column} className="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-gray-700">
                              {getCellValue(policy, column)}
                            </td>
                          ))}
                          <td className="px-4 py-3">
                            <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
                              <button
                                onClick={() => {
                                  setPreviewPolicy(policy);
                                  setShowDocumentPreview(true);
                                }}
                                className="p-1.5 hover:bg-blue-50 rounded-lg"
                                title="Preview"
                              >
                                <Eye size={14} className="text-blue-600" />
                              </button>
                              <button
                                onClick={() => onEditPolicy(policy.id)}
                                className="p-1.5 hover:bg-green-50 rounded-lg"
                                title="Edit"
                              >
                                <Edit size={14} className="text-green-600" />
                              </button>
                              <button
                                onClick={() => {
                                  if (confirm('Delete?')) {
                                    onDeletePolicy(policy.id);
                                    toast.success('Deleted');
                                  }
                                }}
                                className="p-1.5 hover:bg-red-50 rounded-lg"
                                title="Delete"
                              >
                                <Trash2 size={14} className="text-red-600" />
                              </button>
                            </div>
                          </td>
                        </tr>
                      ))
                    )}
                  </tbody>
                </table>
              </div>
            )}

            {/* Pagination */}
            {filteredAndSortedPolicies.length > 0 && (
              <div className="px-6 py-4 border-t border-gray-100 flex flex-col sm:flex-row items-center justify-between gap-4">
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                  <span className="text-sm text-gray-600">Show</span>
                  <select
                    value={itemsPerPage}
                    onChange={(e) => {
                      setItemsPerPage(Number(e.target.value));
                      setCurrentPage(1);
                    }}
                    className="px-3 py-1.5 border border-gray-200 rounded-lg text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500"
                  >
                    <option value={10}>10</option>
                    <option value={25}>25</option>
                    <option value={50}>50</option>
                    <option value={100}>100</option>
                  </select>
                  <span className="text-sm text-gray-600">per page</span>
                </div>

                <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                  <button
                    onClick={() => setCurrentPage(p => Math.max(1, p - 1))}
                    disabled={currentPage === 1}
                    className="px-3 py-1.5 border border-gray-200 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-50 disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed"
                  >
                    Previous
                  </button>
                  
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
                    {[...Array(Math.min(5, totalPages))].map((_, i) => {
                      let pageNum;
                      if (totalPages <= 5) {
                        pageNum = i + 1;
                      } else if (currentPage <= 3) {
                        pageNum = i + 1;
                      } else if (currentPage >= totalPages - 2) {
                        pageNum = totalPages - 4 + i;
                      } else {
                        pageNum = currentPage - 2 + i;
                      }
                      
                      return (
                        <button
                          key={i}
                          onClick={() => setCurrentPage(pageNum)}
                          className={`px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium ${
                            currentPage === pageNum
                              ? 'bg-blue-600 text-white'
                              : 'border border-gray-200 text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-50'
                          }`}
                        >
                          {pageNum}
                        </button>
                      );
                    })}
                  </div>

                  <button
                    onClick={() => setCurrentPage(p => Math.min(totalPages, p + 1))}
                    disabled={currentPage === totalPages}
                    className="px-3 py-1.5 border border-gray-200 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-50 disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed"
                  >
                    Next
                  </button>
                </div>

                <div className="text-sm text-gray-600">
                  Page {currentPage} of {totalPages}
                </div>
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        )}
      </div>

      {/* Document Preview Modal */}
      {showDocumentPreview && previewPolicy && (
        <div className="fixed inset-0 bg-black/50 backdrop-blur-sm z-50 flex items-center justify-center p-4">
          <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-2xl max-w-4xl w-full max-h-[90vh] overflow-hidden">
            <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-6 border-b border-gray-200">
              <div>
                <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">Policy Preview</h2>
                <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">{previewPolicy.provider} - {previewPolicy.policyNumber}</p>
              </div>
              <button
                onClick={() => {
                  setShowDocumentPreview(false);
                  setPreviewPolicy(null);
                }}
                className="p-2 hover:bg-gray-100 rounded-lg"
              >
                <X size={24} />
              </button>
            </div>
            
            <div className="p-6 overflow-y-auto max-h-[calc(90vh-200px)]">
              <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4 mb-6">
                {visibleColumns.map(column => {
                  const value = previewPolicy[column];
                  if (!value) return null;
                  
                  return (
                    <div key={column} className="bg-gray-50 rounded-lg p-4">
                      <div className="text-xs text-gray-600 mb-1">{AVAILABLE_COLUMNS[column].label}</div>
                      <div className="font-semibold text-gray-900">
                        {typeof getCellValue(previewPolicy, column) === 'object' 
                          ? value 
                          : getCellValue(previewPolicy, column)}
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  );
                })}
              </div>

              <div className="bg-gray-100 rounded-xl p-8 text-center">
                <FileText size={64} className="text-gray-400 mx-auto mb-4" />
                <p className="text-gray-600 mb-2">Document Preview</p>
                <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">
                  {previewPolicy.documentType?.toUpperCase()} • Uploaded {new Date(previewPolicy.uploadDate).toLocaleDateString()}
                </p>
                <button
                  onClick={() => toast.success('Document downloaded')}
                  className="mt-4 inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 bg-blue-600 text-white rounded-lg hover:bg-blue-700"
                >
                  <Download size={16} />
                  Download
                </button>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

```
