## File: `components (2)/PolicyDashboardProfessional.tsx`
- Bytes: 51,306
- SHA256: `3548801b35c22b4636ad58cd521ef74bc05db8c92e827bd7fc48b145bb475bff`

```tsx
import { useState, useMemo } from 'react';
import {
  Shield, TrendingUp, DollarSign, Calendar, Upload, FileText,
  Clock, AlertCircle, CheckCircle, Eye, Edit, Trash2, Download,
  MoreVertical, PieChart, BarChart3, TrendingDown, Award,
  Sparkles, ArrowRight, RefreshCw, Bell, Settings, Filter,
  Search, ChevronRight, Activity, Target, Zap, Star, X,
  ChevronDown, ChevronUp, Columns, Move, ArrowUpDown, FileDown,
  Table2, LayoutGrid, Maximize2, Minimize2, File, Image as ImageIcon,
  Plus, Home, BarChart, FileStack, ChevronLeft, Info, ExternalLink,
  AlertTriangle, TrendingDown as TrendDown, Check, Copy, MoreHorizontal
} from 'lucide-react';
import { toast } from 'sonner@2.0.3';
import {
  LineChart, Line, AreaChart, Area, BarChart, Bar,
  XAxis, YAxis, CartesianGrid, Tooltip as RechartsTooltip,
  Legend, ResponsiveContainer, Cell, RadarChart, PolarGrid,
  PolarAngleAxis, PolarRadiusAxis, Radar, PieChart as RechartsPieChart, Pie
} from 'recharts';

interface Policy {
  id: string;
  policyNumber: string;
  provider: string;
  logo: string;
  type: string;
  coverage: number;
  premium: number;
  deductible: number;
  startDate: string;
  expiryDate: string;
  status: 'active' | 'expiring' | 'expired';
  uploadDate: string;
  documentType: string;
  insuredPerson?: string;
  location?: string;
  beneficiary?: string;
  policyTerm?: string;
  paymentFrequency?: string;
  agentName?: string;
  documentUrl?: string;
}

interface PolicyDashboardProfessionalProps {
  uploadedPolicies: Policy[];
  onUploadPolicy: () => void;
  onViewPolicy: (policyId: string) => void;
  onEditPolicy: (policyId: string) => void;
  onDeletePolicy: (policyId: string) => void;
  onBack?: () => void;
}

type ColumnKey = 
  | 'provider' | 'policyNumber' | 'type' | 'insuredPerson' 
  | 'coverage' | 'premium' | 'deductible' | 'startDate' 
  | 'expiryDate' | 'status' | 'location' | 'beneficiary' 
  | 'policyTerm' | 'paymentFrequency' | 'agentName' | 'uploadDate';

type TabType = 'overview' | 'list' | 'analytics';

const AVAILABLE_COLUMNS: Record<ColumnKey, { label: string; width: string; sortable: boolean }> = {
  provider: { label: 'Provider/Insurer', width: '180px', sortable: true },
  policyNumber: { label: 'Policy Number', width: '160px', sortable: true },
  type: { label: 'Type', width: '140px', sortable: true },
  insuredPerson: { label: 'Insured Person', width: '170px', sortable: true },
  coverage: { label: 'Coverage', width: '140px', sortable: true },
  premium: { label: 'Premium (Monthly)', width: '150px', sortable: true },
  deductible: { label: 'Deductible', width: '130px', sortable: true },
  startDate: { label: 'Start Date', width: '130px', sortable: true },
  expiryDate: { label: 'Expiry Date', width: '130px', sortable: true },
  status: { label: 'Status', width: '120px', sortable: true },
  location: { label: 'Location', width: '160px', sortable: true },
  beneficiary: { label: 'Beneficiary', width: '160px', sortable: true },
  policyTerm: { label: 'Term', width: '110px', sortable: true },
  paymentFrequency: { label: 'Payment Freq.', width: '140px', sortable: true },
  agentName: { label: 'Agent/Broker', width: '160px', sortable: true },
  uploadDate: { label: 'Upload Date', width: '130px', sortable: true }
};

export function PolicyDashboardProfessional({
  uploadedPolicies = [],
  onUploadPolicy,
  onViewPolicy,
  onEditPolicy,
  onDeletePolicy,
  onBack
}: PolicyDashboardProfessionalProps) {
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<TabType>('overview');
  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('');
  const [filterStatus, setFilterStatus] = useState<'all' | 'active' | 'expiring' | 'expired'>('all');
  const [filterType, setFilterType] = useState<'all' | string>('all');
  const [showColumnCustomizer, setShowColumnCustomizer] = useState(false);
  const [selectedPolicies, setSelectedPolicies] = useState<string[]>([]);
  
  // Pagination
  const [currentPage, setCurrentPage] = useState(1);
  const [itemsPerPage, setItemsPerPage] = useState(10);
  
  // Column management for List view
  const [visibleColumns, setVisibleColumns] = useState<ColumnKey[]>([
    'provider', 'policyNumber', 'type', 'coverage', 'premium', 'status', 'expiryDate'
  ]);
  
  const [sortColumn, setSortColumn] = useState<ColumnKey | null>('expiryDate');
  const [sortDirection, setSortDirection] = useState<'asc' | 'desc'>('asc');

  // Calculate dashboard metrics
  const totalPolicies = uploadedPolicies.length;
  const totalCoverage = uploadedPolicies.reduce((sum, p) => sum + p.coverage, 0);
  const monthlyPremium = uploadedPolicies.reduce((sum, p) => sum + p.premium, 0);
  const annualPremium = monthlyPremium * 12;
  const totalDeductible = uploadedPolicies.reduce((sum, p) => sum + p.deductible, 0);
  
  const activePolicies = uploadedPolicies.filter(p => p.status === 'active').length;
  const expiringPolicies = uploadedPolicies.filter(p => {
    const expiryDate = new Date(p.expiryDate);
    const thirtyDaysFromNow = new Date();
    thirtyDaysFromNow.setDate(thirtyDaysFromNow.getDate() + 30);
    return expiryDate <= thirtyDaysFromNow && expiryDate >= new Date();
  }).length;
  const expiredPolicies = uploadedPolicies.filter(p => p.status === 'expired').length;

  // Policy types
  const policyTypes = useMemo(() => {
    return Array.from(new Set(uploadedPolicies.map(p => p.type)));
  }, [uploadedPolicies]);

  // Filtered and sorted policies
  const filteredPolicies = useMemo(() => {
    let filtered = uploadedPolicies;

    // Apply search
    if (searchQuery) {
      filtered = filtered.filter(p =>
        p.provider.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()) ||
        p.policyNumber.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()) ||
        p.type.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()) ||
        (p.insuredPerson && p.insuredPerson.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()))
      );
    }

    // Apply status filter
    if (filterStatus !== 'all') {
      filtered = filtered.filter(p => p.status === filterStatus);
    }

    // Apply type filter
    if (filterType !== 'all') {
      filtered = filtered.filter(p => p.type === filterType);
    }

    // Apply sorting
    if (sortColumn) {
      filtered = [...filtered].sort((a, b) => {
        let aValue: any = a[sortColumn];
        let bValue: any = b[sortColumn];

        // Handle dates
        if (sortColumn === 'startDate' || sortColumn === 'expiryDate' || sortColumn === 'uploadDate') {
          aValue = new Date(aValue).getTime();
          bValue = new Date(bValue).getTime();
        }

        // Handle numbers
        if (sortColumn === 'coverage' || sortColumn === 'premium' || sortColumn === 'deductible') {
          aValue = Number(aValue) || 0;
          bValue = Number(bValue) || 0;
        }

        // Handle strings
        if (typeof aValue === 'string') {
          aValue = aValue.toLowerCase();
          bValue = bValue?.toLowerCase() || '';
        }

        if (aValue < bValue) return sortDirection === 'asc' ? -1 : 1;
        if (aValue > bValue) return sortDirection === 'asc' ? 1 : -1;
        return 0;
      });
    }

    return filtered;
  }, [uploadedPolicies, searchQuery, filterStatus, filterType, sortColumn, sortDirection]);

  // Paginated policies
  const paginatedPolicies = useMemo(() => {
    const startIndex = (currentPage - 1) * itemsPerPage;
    return filteredPolicies.slice(startIndex, startIndex + itemsPerPage);
  }, [filteredPolicies, currentPage, itemsPerPage]);

  const totalPages = Math.ceil(filteredPolicies.length / itemsPerPage);

  // Chart data
  const coverageByTypeData = useMemo(() => {
    const byType: Record<string, { coverage: number; count: number; premium: number }> = {};
    uploadedPolicies.forEach(p => {
      if (!byType[p.type]) {
        byType[p.type] = { coverage: 0, count: 0, premium: 0 };
      }
      byType[p.type].coverage += p.coverage;
      byType[p.type].count += 1;
      byType[p.type].premium += p.premium;
    });
    return Object.entries(byType).map(([type, data]) => ({
      type: type.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + type.slice(1),
      coverage: data.coverage,
      count: data.count,
      premium: data.premium,
      fill: type === 'auto' ? '#3b82f6' : type === 'home' ? '#10b981' : type === 'health' ? '#f59e0b' : '#8b5cf6'
    }));
  }, [uploadedPolicies]);

  const statusDistributionData = useMemo(() => {
    return [
      { name: 'Active', value: activePolicies, fill: '#10b981' },
      { name: 'Expiring Soon', value: expiringPolicies, fill: '#f59e0b' },
      { name: 'Expired', value: expiredPolicies, fill: '#ef4444' }
    ].filter(item => item.value > 0);
  }, [activePolicies, expiringPolicies, expiredPolicies]);

  const premiumTrendData = useMemo(() => {
    const months = ['Jan', 'Feb', 'Mar', 'Apr', 'May', 'Jun'];
    return months.map((month, idx) => ({
      month,
      premium: monthlyPremium * (0.9 + Math.random() * 0.2),
      target: monthlyPremium
    }));
  }, [monthlyPremium]);

  // Handlers
  const handleSort = (column: ColumnKey) => {
    if (sortColumn === column) {
      setSortDirection(sortDirection === 'asc' ? 'desc' : 'asc');
    } else {
      setSortColumn(column);
      setSortDirection('asc');
    }
  };

  const toggleColumnVisibility = (column: ColumnKey) => {
    if (visibleColumns.includes(column)) {
      setVisibleColumns(visibleColumns.filter(c => c !== column));
    } else {
      setVisibleColumns([...visibleColumns, column]);
    }
  };

  const handleSelectPolicy = (policyId: string) => {
    if (selectedPolicies.includes(policyId)) {
      setSelectedPolicies(selectedPolicies.filter(id => id !== policyId));
    } else {
      setSelectedPolicies([...selectedPolicies, policyId]);
    }
  };

  const handleSelectAll = () => {
    if (selectedPolicies.length === paginatedPolicies.length) {
      setSelectedPolicies([]);
    } else {
      setSelectedPolicies(paginatedPolicies.map(p => p.id));
    }
  };

  const handleExport = () => {
    toast.success('Exporting policies...', { description: 'Your policies will be downloaded as CSV' });
  };

  const formatCurrency = (amount: number) => {
    return new Intl.NumberFormat('tr-TR', {
      style: 'currency',
      currency: 'TRY',
      minimumFractionDigits: 0,
      maximumFractionDigits: 0
    }).format(amount);
  };

  const formatDate = (dateString: string) => {
    return new Date(dateString).toLocaleDateString('tr-TR', {
      year: 'numeric',
      month: 'short',
      day: 'numeric'
    });
  };

  const getDaysUntilExpiry = (expiryDate: string) => {
    const days = Math.ceil((new Date(expiryDate).getTime() - new Date().getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
    return days;
  };

  const getStatusColor = (status: string) => {
    switch (status) {
      case 'active': return 'bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-700 border-emerald-200';
      case 'expiring': return 'bg-amber-50 text-amber-700 border-amber-200';
      case 'expired': return 'bg-red-50 text-red-700 border-red-200';
      default: return 'bg-slate-50 text-slate-700 border-slate-200';
    }
  };

  const getStatusIcon = (status: string) => {
    switch (status) {
      case 'active': return <CheckCircle className="w-4 h-4" />;
      case 'expiring': return <Clock className="w-4 h-4" />;
      case 'expired': return <AlertCircle className="w-4 h-4" />;
      default: return <Info className="w-4 h-4" />;
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gradient-to-br from-slate-50 via-blue-50/30 to-indigo-50/20">
      {/* Header */}
      <div className="bg-white border-b border-slate-200">
        <div className="max-w-[1600px] mx-auto px-6 py-6">
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
              {onBack && (
                <button
                  onClick={onBack}
                  className="p-2 hover:bg-slate-100 rounded-xl transition-colors"
                >
                  <ChevronLeft className="w-5 h-5 text-slate-600" />
                </button>
              )}
              <div>
                <h1 className="text-slate-900 flex items-center gap-3">
                  <div className="w-10 h-10 rounded-xl bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-500 to-indigo-600 flex items-center justify-center">
                    <Shield className="w-5 h-5 text-white" />
                  </div>
                  Policy Dashboard
                </h1>
                <p className="text-slate-500 mt-1">Manage and analyze your insurance portfolio</p>
              </div>
            </div>
            <button
              onClick={onUploadPolicy}
              className="px-6 py-3 bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 text-white rounded-2xl hover:from-blue-700 hover:to-indigo-700 transition-all shadow-lg shadow-blue-500/25 flex items-center gap-2"
            >
              <Plus className="w-5 h-5" />
              Add Policy
            </button>
          </div>

          {/* Tabs */}
          <div className="flex items-center gap-1 mt-6 bg-slate-100 p-1 rounded-2xl w-fit">
            <button
              onClick={() => setActiveTab('overview')}
              className={`px-6 py-2.5 rounded-xl transition-all ${
                activeTab === 'overview'
                  ? 'bg-white text-slate-900 shadow-sm'
                  : 'text-slate-600 hover:text-slate-900'
              }`}
            >
              <span className="flex items-center gap-2">
                <LayoutGrid className="w-4 h-4" />
                Overview
              </span>
            </button>
            <button
              onClick={() => setActiveTab('list')}
              className={`px-6 py-2.5 rounded-xl transition-all ${
                activeTab === 'list'
                  ? 'bg-white text-slate-900 shadow-sm'
                  : 'text-slate-600 hover:text-slate-900'
              }`}
            >
              <span className="flex items-center gap-2">
                <Table2 className="w-4 h-4" />
                List
              </span>
            </button>
            <button
              onClick={() => setActiveTab('analytics')}
              className={`px-6 py-2.5 rounded-xl transition-all ${
                activeTab === 'analytics'
                  ? 'bg-white text-slate-900 shadow-sm'
                  : 'text-slate-600 hover:text-slate-900'
              }`}
            >
              <span className="flex items-center gap-2">
                <BarChart3 className="w-4 h-4" />
                Analytics
              </span>
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Content */}
      <div className="max-w-[1600px] mx-auto px-6 py-8">
        {activeTab === 'overview' && (
          <div className="space-y-6">
            {/* KPI Cards */}
            <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6">
              {/* Total Policies */}
              <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200 hover:shadow-lg hover:shadow-blue-500/5 transition-all">
                <div className="flex items-start justify-between">
                  <div>
                    <p className="text-slate-500 mb-1">Total Policies</p>
                    <p className="text-slate-900 mt-2">{totalPolicies}</p>
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mt-3">
                      <span className="text-emerald-600 flex items-center gap-1">
                        <TrendingUp className="w-4 h-4" />
                        {activePolicies} active
                      </span>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <div className="w-12 h-12 rounded-2xl bg-blue-50 flex items-center justify-center">
                    <FileText className="w-6 h-6 text-blue-600" />
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>

              {/* Total Coverage */}
              <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200 hover:shadow-lg hover:shadow-emerald-500/5 transition-all">
                <div className="flex items-start justify-between">
                  <div>
                    <p className="text-slate-500 mb-1">Total Coverage</p>
                    <p className="text-slate-900 mt-2">{formatCurrency(totalCoverage)}</p>
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mt-3">
                      <span className="text-slate-500">
                        Avg {formatCurrency(totalCoverage / Math.max(totalPolicies, 1))}
                      </span>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <div className="w-12 h-12 rounded-2xl bg-emerald-50 flex items-center justify-center">
                    <Shield className="w-6 h-6 text-emerald-600" />
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>

              {/* Monthly Premium */}
              <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200 hover:shadow-lg hover:shadow-amber-500/5 transition-all">
                <div className="flex items-start justify-between">
                  <div>
                    <p className="text-slate-500 mb-1">Monthly Premium</p>
                    <p className="text-slate-900 mt-2">{formatCurrency(monthlyPremium)}</p>
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mt-3">
                      <span className="text-slate-500">
                        {formatCurrency(annualPremium)}/year
                      </span>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <div className="w-12 h-12 rounded-2xl bg-amber-50 flex items-center justify-center">
                    <DollarSign className="w-6 h-6 text-amber-600" />
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>

              {/* Expiring Soon */}
              <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200 hover:shadow-lg hover:shadow-red-500/5 transition-all">
                <div className="flex items-start justify-between">
                  <div>
                    <p className="text-slate-500 mb-1">Expiring Soon</p>
                    <p className="text-slate-900 mt-2">{expiringPolicies}</p>
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mt-3">
                      <span className="text-amber-600 flex items-center gap-1">
                        <AlertCircle className="w-4 h-4" />
                        Within 30 days
                      </span>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <div className="w-12 h-12 rounded-2xl bg-red-50 flex items-center justify-center">
                    <Clock className="w-6 h-6 text-red-600" />
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>

            {/* Action Items & Recent Policies */}
            <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
              {/* Action Items */}
              <div className="lg:col-span-1">
                <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
                  <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-4">
                    <h3 className="text-slate-900 flex items-center gap-2">
                      <AlertTriangle className="w-5 h-5 text-amber-600" />
                      Action Items
                    </h3>
                    <span className="text-slate-500">{expiringPolicies}</span>
                  </div>
                  <div className="space-y-3">
                    {uploadedPolicies
                      .filter(p => getDaysUntilExpiry(p.expiryDate) <= 30 && getDaysUntilExpiry(p.expiryDate) > 0)
                      .slice(0, 5)
                      .map(policy => {
                        const daysLeft = getDaysUntilExpiry(policy.expiryDate);
                        return (
                          <div key={policy.id} className="p-3 rounded-2xl bg-amber-50 border border-amber-200">
                            <div className="flex items-start justify-between">
                              <div className="flex-1">
                                <p className="text-slate-900">{policy.provider}</p>
                                <p className="text-slate-500 text-sm mt-0.5">{policy.type}</p>
                              </div>
                              <span className="px-2 py-1 rounded-lg bg-amber-100 text-amber-700 text-xs">
                                {daysLeft}d left
                              </span>
                            </div>
                          </div>
                        );
                      })}
                    {expiringPolicies === 0 && (
                      <div className="p-4 rounded-2xl bg-emerald-50 border border-emerald-200 text-center">
                        <Check className="w-6 h-6 text-emerald-600 mx-auto mb-2" />
                        <p className="text-emerald-700">All policies are up to date!</p>
                      </div>
                    )}
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>

              {/* Recent Policies */}
              <div className="lg:col-span-2">
                <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
                  <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-4">
                    <h3 className="text-slate-900 flex items-center gap-2">
                      <Activity className="w-5 h-5 text-blue-600" />
                      Recent Policies
                    </h3>
                    <button
                      onClick={() => setActiveTab('list')}
                      className="text-blue-600 hover:text-blue-700 flex items-center gap-1"
                    >
                      View all
                      <ChevronRight className="w-4 h-4" />
                    </button>
                  </div>
                  <div className="space-y-3">
                    {uploadedPolicies.slice(0, 4).map(policy => (
                      <div
                        key={policy.id}
                        className="p-4 rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 hover:border-blue-200 hover:bg-blue-50/50 transition-all cursor-pointer group"
                        onClick={() => onViewPolicy(policy.id)}
                      >
                        <div className="flex items-start justify-between">
                          <div className="flex items-start gap-3 flex-1">
                            <div className="text-2xl">{policy.logo}</div>
                            <div className="flex-1">
                              <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                                <p className="text-slate-900">{policy.provider}</p>
                                <span className={`px-2 py-0.5 rounded-lg text-xs border ${getStatusColor(policy.status)}`}>
                                  {policy.status}
                                </span>
                              </div>
                              <p className="text-slate-500 text-sm mt-0.5">{policy.policyNumber}</p>
                              <div className="flex items-center gap-4 mt-2 text-sm">
                                <span className="text-slate-600">{formatCurrency(policy.coverage)}</span>
                                <span className="text-slate-400">•</span>
                                <span className="text-slate-600">{formatCurrency(policy.premium)}/mo</span>
                                <span className="text-slate-400">•</span>
                                <span className="text-slate-500">Expires {formatDate(policy.expiryDate)}</span>
                              </div>
                            </div>
                          </div>
                          <div className="opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity">
                            <Eye className="w-5 h-5 text-blue-600" />
                          </div>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    ))}
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>

            {/* Quick Stats */}
            <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
              {/* Coverage by Type */}
              <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
                <h3 className="text-slate-900 mb-4 flex items-center gap-2">
                  <PieChart className="w-5 h-5 text-blue-600" />
                  Coverage by Type
                </h3>
                <div className="space-y-3">
                  {coverageByTypeData.map((item, idx) => (
                    <div key={idx} className="flex items-center justify-between p-3 rounded-2xl bg-slate-50">
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                        <div className="w-3 h-3 rounded-full" style={{ backgroundColor: item.fill }} />
                        <div>
                          <p className="text-slate-900">{item.type}</p>
                          <p className="text-slate-500 text-sm">{item.count} {item.count === 1 ? 'policy' : 'policies'}</p>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                      <div className="text-right">
                        <p className="text-slate-900">{formatCurrency(item.coverage)}</p>
                        <p className="text-slate-500 text-sm">{formatCurrency(item.premium)}/mo</p>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  ))}
                </div>
              </div>

              {/* Status Distribution */}
              <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
                <h3 className="text-slate-900 mb-4 flex items-center gap-2">
                  <Target className="w-5 h-5 text-emerald-600" />
                  Policy Status
                </h3>
                <div className="space-y-3">
                  <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-3 rounded-2xl bg-emerald-50">
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                      <CheckCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-emerald-600" />
                      <span className="text-slate-900">Active</span>
                    </div>
                    <span className="text-slate-900">{activePolicies}</span>
                  </div>
                  <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-3 rounded-2xl bg-amber-50">
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                      <Clock className="w-5 h-5 text-amber-600" />
                      <span className="text-slate-900">Expiring Soon</span>
                    </div>
                    <span className="text-slate-900">{expiringPolicies}</span>
                  </div>
                  <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-3 rounded-2xl bg-red-50">
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                      <AlertCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-red-600" />
                      <span className="text-slate-900">Expired</span>
                    </div>
                    <span className="text-slate-900">{expiredPolicies}</span>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        )}

        {activeTab === 'list' && (
          <div className="space-y-6">
            {/* Filters and Search */}
            <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
              <div className="flex flex-col lg:flex-row gap-4">
                {/* Search */}
                <div className="flex-1">
                  <div className="relative">
                    <Search className="absolute left-4 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-5 h-5 text-slate-400" />
                    <input
                      type="text"
                      placeholder="Search policies by provider, number, or type..."
                      value={searchQuery}
                      onChange={(e) => setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}
                      className="w-full pl-12 pr-4 py-3 rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-transparent"
                    />
                  </div>
                </div>

                {/* Status Filter */}
                <select
                  value={filterStatus}
                  onChange={(e) => setFilterStatus(e.target.value as any)}
                  className="px-4 py-3 rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-transparent"
                >
                  <option value="all">All Status</option>
                  <option value="active">Active</option>
                  <option value="expiring">Expiring Soon</option>
                  <option value="expired">Expired</option>
                </select>

                {/* Type Filter */}
                <select
                  value={filterType}
                  onChange={(e) => setFilterType(e.target.value)}
                  className="px-4 py-3 rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-transparent"
                >
                  <option value="all">All Types</option>
                  {policyTypes.map(type => (
                    <option key={type} value={type}>{type.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + type.slice(1)}</option>
                  ))}
                </select>

                {/* Column Customizer */}
                <div className="relative">
                  <button
                    onClick={() => setShowColumnCustomizer(!showColumnCustomizer)}
                    className="px-4 py-3 rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 transition-colors flex items-center gap-2"
                  >
                    <Columns className="w-5 h-5 text-slate-600" />
                    Columns
                  </button>
                  {showColumnCustomizer && (
                    <div className="absolute right-0 top-full mt-2 w-72 bg-white rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 shadow-xl z-50 p-4">
                      <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-3">
                        <span className="text-slate-900">Select Columns</span>
                        <button onClick={() => setShowColumnCustomizer(false)}>
                          <X className="w-5 h-5 text-slate-400 hover:text-slate-600" />
                        </button>
                      </div>
                      <div className="space-y-2 max-h-96 overflow-y-auto">
                        {(Object.keys(AVAILABLE_COLUMNS) as ColumnKey[]).map(column => (
                          <label key={column} className="flex items-center gap-3 p-2 rounded-xl hover:bg-slate-50 cursor-pointer">
                            <input
                              type="checkbox"
                              checked={visibleColumns.includes(column)}
                              onChange={() => toggleColumnVisibility(column)}
                              className="w-4 h-4 rounded border-slate-300 text-blue-600 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500"
                            />
                            <span className="text-slate-700">{AVAILABLE_COLUMNS[column].label}</span>
                          </label>
                        ))}
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  )}
                </div>

                {/* Export */}
                <button
                  onClick={handleExport}
                  className="px-4 py-3 rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 transition-colors flex items-center gap-2"
                >
                  <Download className="w-5 h-5 text-slate-600" />
                  Export
                </button>
              </div>

              {/* Results Summary */}
              <div className="flex items-center justify-between mt-4 pt-4 border-t border-slate-200">
                <p className="text-slate-600">
                  Showing {filteredPolicies.length} {filteredPolicies.length === 1 ? 'policy' : 'policies'}
                  {selectedPolicies.length > 0 && ` (${selectedPolicies.length} selected)`}
                </p>
                {selectedPolicies.length > 0 && (
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                    <button
                      onClick={() => {
                        selectedPolicies.forEach(id => onDeletePolicy(id));
                        setSelectedPolicies([]);
                        toast.success('Policies deleted');
                      }}
                      className="px-4 py-2 rounded-xl text-red-600 hover:bg-red-50 transition-colors flex items-center gap-2"
                    >
                      <Trash2 className="w-4 h-4" />
                      Delete Selected
                    </button>
                  </div>
                )}
              </div>
            </div>

            {/* Table */}
            <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl border border-slate-200 overflow-hidden">
              <div className="overflow-x-auto">
                <table className="w-full">
                  <thead className="bg-slate-50 border-b border-slate-200">
                    <tr>
                      <th className="px-6 py-4 text-left">
                        <input
                          type="checkbox"
                          checked={selectedPolicies.length === paginatedPolicies.length && paginatedPolicies.length > 0}
                          onChange={handleSelectAll}
                          className="w-4 h-4 rounded border-slate-300 text-blue-600 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500"
                        />
                      </th>
                      {visibleColumns.map(column => (
                        <th
                          key={column}
                          className="px-6 py-4 text-left text-slate-700 cursor-pointer hover:bg-slate-100 transition-colors"
                          onClick={() => AVAILABLE_COLUMNS[column].sortable && handleSort(column)}
                        >
                          <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                            <span>{AVAILABLE_COLUMNS[column].label}</span>
                            {AVAILABLE_COLUMNS[column].sortable && (
                              <div className="flex flex-col">
                                <ChevronUp
                                  className={`w-3 h-3 -mb-1 ${
                                    sortColumn === column && sortDirection === 'asc'
                                      ? 'text-blue-600'
                                      : 'text-slate-300'
                                  }`}
                                />
                                <ChevronDown
                                  className={`w-3 h-3 ${
                                    sortColumn === column && sortDirection === 'desc'
                                      ? 'text-blue-600'
                                      : 'text-slate-300'
                                  }`}
                                />
                              </div>
                            )}
                          </div>
                        </th>
                      ))}
                      <th className="px-6 py-4 text-right text-slate-700">Actions</th>
                    </tr>
                  </thead>
                  <tbody className="divide-y divide-slate-200">
                    {paginatedPolicies.map(policy => (
                      <tr
                        key={policy.id}
                        className="hover:bg-slate-50 transition-colors"
                      >
                        <td className="px-6 py-4">
                          <input
                            type="checkbox"
                            checked={selectedPolicies.includes(policy.id)}
                            onChange={() => handleSelectPolicy(policy.id)}
                            className="w-4 h-4 rounded border-slate-300 text-blue-600 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500"
                          />
                        </td>
                        {visibleColumns.map(column => (
                          <td key={column} className="px-6 py-4 text-slate-700">
                            {column === 'provider' && (
                              <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                                <span className="text-2xl">{policy.logo}</span>
                                <span>{policy[column]}</span>
                              </div>
                            )}
                            {column === 'policyNumber' && (
                              <span className="font-mono text-sm">{policy[column]}</span>
                            )}
                            {column === 'type' && (
                              <span className="capitalize">{policy[column]}</span>
                            )}
                            {column === 'status' && (
                              <span className={`inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1 rounded-xl text-xs border ${getStatusColor(policy[column])}`}>
                                {getStatusIcon(policy[column])}
                                {policy[column]}
                              </span>
                            )}
                            {(column === 'coverage' || column === 'premium' || column === 'deductible') && (
                              <span>{formatCurrency(policy[column])}</span>
                            )}
                            {(column === 'startDate' || column === 'expiryDate' || column === 'uploadDate') && policy[column] && (
                              <span>{formatDate(policy[column])}</span>
                            )}
                            {column !== 'provider' && column !== 'policyNumber' && column !== 'type' && 
                             column !== 'status' && column !== 'coverage' && column !== 'premium' && 
                             column !== 'deductible' && column !== 'startDate' && column !== 'expiryDate' && 
                             column !== 'uploadDate' && (
                              <span>{policy[column] || '-'}</span>
                            )}
                          </td>
                        ))}
                        <td className="px-6 py-4">
                          <div className="flex items-center justify-end gap-2">
                            <button
                              onClick={() => onViewPolicy(policy.id)}
                              className="p-2 rounded-xl hover:bg-blue-50 text-blue-600 transition-colors"
                              title="View"
                            >
                              <Eye className="w-4 h-4" />
                            </button>
                            <button
                              onClick={() => onEditPolicy(policy.id)}
                              className="p-2 rounded-xl hover:bg-slate-100 text-slate-600 transition-colors"
                              title="Edit"
                            >
                              <Edit className="w-4 h-4" />
                            </button>
                            <button
                              onClick={() => {
                                if (confirm('Are you sure you want to delete this policy?')) {
                                  onDeletePolicy(policy.id);
                                  toast.success('Policy deleted');
                                }
                              }}
                              className="p-2 rounded-xl hover:bg-red-50 text-red-600 transition-colors"
                              title="Delete"
                            >
                              <Trash2 className="w-4 h-4" />
                            </button>
                          </div>
                        </td>
                      </tr>
                    ))}
                  </tbody>
                </table>
              </div>

              {/* Pagination */}
              {totalPages > 1 && (
                <div className="px-6 py-4 border-t border-slate-200 flex items-center justify-between">
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                    <span className="text-slate-600">Show</span>
                    <select
                      value={itemsPerPage}
                      onChange={(e) => {
                        setItemsPerPage(Number(e.target.value));
                        setCurrentPage(1);
                      }}
                      className="px-3 py-1.5 rounded-xl border border-slate-200 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500"
                    >
                      <option value={10}>10</option>
                      <option value={25}>25</option>
                      <option value={50}>50</option>
                      <option value={100}>100</option>
                    </select>
                    <span className="text-slate-600">per page</span>
                  </div>

                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                    <button
                      onClick={() => setCurrentPage(Math.max(1, currentPage - 1))}
                      disabled={currentPage === 1}
                      className="px-4 py-2 rounded-xl border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed transition-colors"
                    >
                      Previous
                    </button>
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
                      {Array.from({ length: Math.min(5, totalPages) }, (_, i) => {
                        let pageNum;
                        if (totalPages <= 5) {
                          pageNum = i + 1;
                        } else if (currentPage <= 3) {
                          pageNum = i + 1;
                        } else if (currentPage >= totalPages - 2) {
                          pageNum = totalPages - 4 + i;
                        } else {
                          pageNum = currentPage - 2 + i;
                        }
                        return (
                          <button
                            key={i}
                            onClick={() => setCurrentPage(pageNum)}
                            className={`w-10 h-10 rounded-xl transition-colors ${
                              currentPage === pageNum
                                ? 'bg-blue-600 text-white'
                                : 'hover:bg-slate-100 text-slate-600'
                            }`}
                          >
                            {pageNum}
                          </button>
                        );
                      })}
                    </div>
                    <button
                      onClick={() => setCurrentPage(Math.min(totalPages, currentPage + 1))}
                      disabled={currentPage === totalPages}
                      className="px-4 py-2 rounded-xl border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed transition-colors"
                    >
                      Next
                    </button>
                  </div>
                </div>
              )}
            </div>
          </div>
        )}

        {activeTab === 'analytics' && (
          <div className="space-y-6">
            {/* Charts Grid */}
            <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
              {/* Coverage by Type Chart */}
              <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
                <h3 className="text-slate-900 mb-6 flex items-center gap-2">
                  <BarChart3 className="w-5 h-5 text-blue-600" />
                  Coverage Distribution
                </h3>
                <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height={300}>
                  <BarChart data={coverageByTypeData}>
                    <CartesianGrid strokeDasharray="3 3" stroke="#e2e8f0" />
                    <XAxis dataKey="type" stroke="#64748b" />
                    <YAxis stroke="#64748b" />
                    <RechartsTooltip
                      contentStyle={{
                        backgroundColor: 'white',
                        border: '1px solid #e2e8f0',
                        borderRadius: '12px',
                        padding: '12px'
                      }}
                    />
                    <Bar dataKey="coverage" fill="#3b82f6" radius={[8, 8, 0, 0]} />
                  </BarChart>
                </ResponsiveContainer>
              </div>

              {/* Status Distribution Chart */}
              <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
                <h3 className="text-slate-900 mb-6 flex items-center gap-2">
                  <PieChart className="w-5 h-5 text-emerald-600" />
                  Policy Status Distribution
                </h3>
                <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height={300}>
                  <RechartsPieChart>
                    <Pie
                      data={statusDistributionData}
                      cx="50%"
                      cy="50%"
                      labelLine={false}
                      label={({ name, percent }) => `${name} ${(percent * 100).toFixed(0)}%`}
                      outerRadius={100}
                      fill="#8884d8"
                      dataKey="value"
                    >
                      {statusDistributionData.map((entry, index) => (
                        <Cell key={`cell-${index}`} fill={entry.fill} />
                      ))}
                    </Pie>
                    <RechartsTooltip
                      contentStyle={{
                        backgroundColor: 'white',
                        border: '1px solid #e2e8f0',
                        borderRadius: '12px',
                        padding: '12px'
                      }}
                    />
                  </RechartsPieChart>
                </ResponsiveContainer>
              </div>

              {/* Premium Trend */}
              <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200 lg:col-span-2">
                <h3 className="text-slate-900 mb-6 flex items-center gap-2">
                  <TrendingUp className="w-5 h-5 text-indigo-600" />
                  Premium Trend
                </h3>
                <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height={300}>
                  <AreaChart data={premiumTrendData}>
                    <defs>
                      <linearGradient id="colorPremium" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
                        <stop offset="5%" stopColor="#3b82f6" stopOpacity={0.3}/>
                        <stop offset="95%" stopColor="#3b82f6" stopOpacity={0}/>
                      </linearGradient>
                    </defs>
                    <CartesianGrid strokeDasharray="3 3" stroke="#e2e8f0" />
                    <XAxis dataKey="month" stroke="#64748b" />
                    <YAxis stroke="#64748b" />
                    <RechartsTooltip
                      contentStyle={{
                        backgroundColor: 'white',
                        border: '1px solid #e2e8f0',
                        borderRadius: '12px',
                        padding: '12px'
                      }}
                    />
                    <Area
                      type="monotone"
                      dataKey="premium"
                      stroke="#3b82f6"
                      fillOpacity={1}
                      fill="url(#colorPremium)"
                    />
                    <Line type="monotone" dataKey="target" stroke="#64748b" strokeDasharray="5 5" />
                  </AreaChart>
                </ResponsiveContainer>
              </div>
            </div>

            {/* Insights */}
            <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
              <div className="bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-50 to-indigo-50 rounded-3xl p-6 border border-blue-200">
                <Target className="w-10 h-10 text-blue-600 mb-4" />
                <h4 className="text-slate-900 mb-2">Coverage Insights</h4>
                <p className="text-slate-600 mb-4">
                  Your average coverage is {formatCurrency(totalCoverage / Math.max(totalPolicies, 1))} per policy.
                </p>
                <button className="text-blue-600 hover:text-blue-700 flex items-center gap-1">
                  View details
                  <ChevronRight className="w-4 h-4" />
                </button>
              </div>

              <div className="bg-gradient-to-br from-emerald-50 to-teal-50 rounded-3xl p-6 border border-emerald-200">
                <Sparkles className="w-10 h-10 text-emerald-600 mb-4" />
                <h4 className="text-slate-900 mb-2">Optimization Tips</h4>
                <p className="text-slate-600 mb-4">
                  You could save up to {formatCurrency(monthlyPremium * 0.15)} per month by reviewing your policies.
                </p>
                <button className="text-emerald-600 hover:text-emerald-700 flex items-center gap-1">
                  Get recommendations
                  <ChevronRight className="w-4 h-4" />
                </button>
              </div>

              <div className="bg-gradient-to-br from-amber-50 to-orange-50 rounded-3xl p-6 border border-amber-200">
                <Award className="w-10 h-10 text-amber-600 mb-4" />
                <h4 className="text-slate-900 mb-2">Coverage Score</h4>
                <p className="text-slate-600 mb-4">
                  Your portfolio has a coverage score of {Math.round((activePolicies / Math.max(totalPolicies, 1)) * 100)}/100.
                </p>
                <button className="text-amber-600 hover:text-amber-700 flex items-center gap-1">
                  Improve score
                  <ChevronRight className="w-4 h-4" />
                </button>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        )}

        {/* Empty State */}
        {totalPolicies === 0 && (
          <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-12 border border-slate-200 text-center">
            <div className="w-20 h-20 rounded-3xl bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-500 to-indigo-600 flex items-center justify-center mx-auto mb-6">
              <FileText className="w-10 h-10 text-white" />
            </div>
            <h3 className="text-slate-900 mb-2">No policies yet</h3>
            <p className="text-slate-500 mb-6 max-w-md mx-auto">
              Start by uploading your first insurance policy to unlock powerful insights and comparisons.
            </p>
            <button
              onClick={onUploadPolicy}
              className="px-8 py-4 bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 text-white rounded-2xl hover:from-blue-700 hover:to-indigo-700 transition-all shadow-lg shadow-blue-500/25 inline-flex items-center gap-2"
            >
              <Plus className="w-5 h-5" />
              Add Your First Policy
            </button>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

```
