## File: `components (2)/PolicyDetailView.tsx`
- Bytes: 39,184
- SHA256: `06ee4f648fc8667e4d8598ada8767a16fc67220f621771296baf9ffc6bbbf403`

```tsx
import { useState } from 'react';
import { 
  ArrowLeft, Car, Home as HomeIcon, Heart, Users, Briefcase, Shield,
  Bell, DollarSign, Calendar, CheckCircle, Clock, TrendingUp, Info,
  RefreshCw, CreditCard, Sparkles, Phone, Mail, MapPin, Building2,
  User, ExternalLink, BarChart3, ChevronRight, Edit, Target, Award,
  AlertTriangle, FileText, Download, Share2, Copy, Check
} from 'lucide-react';
import { BasePolicy } from './insurance-lines';
import { TurkishKaskoDetails } from './insurance-lines/TurkishKaskoDetails';
import { TurkishTrafficDetails } from './insurance-lines/TurkishTrafficDetails';
import { TurkishCreditLifeDetails } from './insurance-lines/TurkishCreditLifeDetails';
import { TurkishFireDetails } from './insurance-lines/TurkishFireDetails';
import { TurkishPersonalAccidentDetails } from './insurance-lines/TurkishPersonalAccidentDetails';
import { TurkishHealthDetails } from './insurance-lines/TurkishHealthDetails';
import { TurkishAgriculturalDetails } from './insurance-lines/TurkishAgriculturalDetails';
import { CoverageDetails } from './CoverageDetails';
import { toast } from 'sonner@2.0.3';

type PolicyDetailViewProps = {
  policy: BasePolicy & {
    extendedData?: any;
    country?: string;
    insuranceLine?: string;
  };
  onBack: () => void;
};

export function PolicyDetailView({ policy, onBack }: PolicyDetailViewProps) {
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<'overview' | 'coverage' | 'analysis' | 'documents' | 'lineSpecific'>('overview');
  const [copiedField, setCopiedField] = useState<string | null>(null);

  // Determine if this policy has line-specific details
  const hasLineSpecificDetails = policy.country && policy.insuranceLine && policy.extendedData;
  
  // Get line-specific tab label
  const getLineSpecificLabel = () => {
    if (policy.country === 'TR' && policy.insuranceLine === 'kasko') {
      return '🇹🇷 Turkish Kasko Auto Insurance';
    }
    if (policy.country === 'TR' && policy.insuranceLine === 'traffic') {
      return '🇹🇷 Turkish Traffic Insurance';
    }
    if (policy.country === 'TR' && policy.insuranceLine === 'credit-life') {
      return '🇹🇷 Turkish Credit Life Insurance';
    }
    if (policy.country === 'TR' && policy.insuranceLine === 'fire') {
      return '🇹🇷 Turkish Fire/Housing Insurance';
    }
    if (policy.country === 'TR' && policy.insuranceLine === 'personal-accident') {
      return '🇹🇷 Turkish Personal Accident Insurance';
    }
    if (policy.country === 'TR' && policy.insuranceLine === 'health') {
      return '🇹🇷 Turkish Health Insurance';
    }
    return 'Line-Specific Details';
  };

  // Mock AI analysis data
  const aiAnalysis = {
    overallScore: policy.aiConfidence || 85,
    strengths: [
      'Comprehensive coverage with no major gaps',
      'Competitive premium for coverage level',
      'Includes valuable add-ons (roadside assistance)',
    ],
    weaknesses: [
      'Deductible is higher than industry average',
      'Limited international coverage',
    ],
    recommendations: [
      'Consider increasing liability limits',
      'Add rental car reimbursement',
    ],
  };

  // Calculate days until expiry
  const getDaysUntilExpiry = () => {
    const expiryDate = new Date(policy.endDate);
    const today = new Date();
    const diffTime = expiryDate.getTime() - today.getTime();
    const diffDays = Math.ceil(diffTime / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
    return diffDays;
  };

  const daysUntilExpiry = getDaysUntilExpiry();

  // Format currency
  const formatCurrency = (amount: number) => {
    return new Intl.NumberFormat('tr-TR', {
      style: 'currency',
      currency: 'TRY',
      minimumFractionDigits: 0,
      maximumFractionDigits: 0
    }).format(amount);
  };

  // Format date
  const formatDate = (dateString: string) => {
    return new Date(dateString).toLocaleDateString('tr-TR', {
      year: 'numeric',
      month: 'long',
      day: 'numeric'
    });
  };

  // Copy to clipboard
  const handleCopy = (text: string, field: string) => {
    navigator.clipboard.writeText(text);
    setCopiedField(field);
    toast.success('Copied to clipboard');
    setTimeout(() => setCopiedField(null), 2000);
  };

  // Get policy type icon
  const getPolicyIcon = () => {
    const type = policy.type.toLowerCase();
    if (type.includes('auto') || type.includes('kasko') || type.includes('traffic')) return Car;
    if (type.includes('home') || type.includes('property')) return HomeIcon;
    if (type.includes('health') || type.includes('medical')) return Heart;
    if (type.includes('life')) return Users;
    if (type.includes('business')) return Briefcase;
    return Shield;
  };

  const PolicyIcon = getPolicyIcon();

  // Extract vehicle/insured item info
  const vehicleInfo = policy.extendedData?.vehicleInfo;
  const paymentInfo = policy.extendedData?.paymentInfo;
  const agentInfo = policy.extendedData?.agentInfo;

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gradient-to-br from-slate-50 via-blue-50/30 to-indigo-50/20">
      {/* Header */}
      <div className="bg-white border-b border-slate-200 sticky top-0 z-10 shadow-sm">
        <div className="max-w-[1600px] mx-auto px-6 py-4">
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
              <button
                onClick={onBack}
                className="p-2 hover:bg-slate-100 rounded-xl transition-colors"
              >
                <ArrowLeft className="w-5 h-5 text-slate-600" />
              </button>
              <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                <div className="text-3xl">{policy.logo}</div>
                <div>
                  <h1 className="text-slate-900 flex items-center gap-2">
                    {policy.provider}
                    {policy.recommendation === 'good' && (
                      <span className="px-2 py-0.5 rounded-lg bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-700 text-xs border border-emerald-200">
                        Recommended
                      </span>
                    )}
                  </h1>
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mt-0.5">
                    <p className="text-slate-500 font-mono text-sm">{policy.policyNumber || policy.fileName}</p>
                    <button 
                      onClick={() => handleCopy(policy.policyNumber || policy.fileName, 'policyNumber')}
                      className="p-1 hover:bg-slate-100 rounded transition-colors"
                    >
                      {copiedField === 'policyNumber' ? (
                        <Check className="w-3.5 h-3.5 text-emerald-600" />
                      ) : (
                        <Copy className="w-3.5 h-3.5 text-slate-400" />
                      )}
                    </button>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
              <button 
                onClick={() => toast.success('Share link copied to clipboard')}
                className="px-4 py-2.5 text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-100 rounded-xl transition-colors flex items-center gap-2"
              >
                <Share2 className="w-4 h-4" />
                <span>Share</span>
              </button>
              <button className="px-6 py-2.5 bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 text-white rounded-xl hover:shadow-lg hover:shadow-blue-500/25 transition-all flex items-center gap-2">
                <Download className="w-4 h-4" />
                <span>Download</span>
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Tabs */}
      <div className="bg-white border-b border-slate-200">
        <div className="max-w-[1600px] mx-auto px-6">
          <div className="flex gap-1 overflow-x-auto">
            <button
              onClick={() => setActiveTab('overview')}
              className={`px-6 py-4 text-sm border-b-2 transition-colors whitespace-nowrap ${
                activeTab === 'overview'
                  ? 'border-blue-600 text-blue-600'
                  : 'border-transparent text-slate-600 hover:text-slate-900'
              }`}
            >
              Overview
            </button>
            <button
              onClick={() => setActiveTab('coverage')}
              className={`px-6 py-4 text-sm border-b-2 transition-colors whitespace-nowrap ${
                activeTab === 'coverage'
                  ? 'border-blue-600 text-blue-600'
                  : 'border-transparent text-slate-600 hover:text-slate-900'
              }`}
            >
              Coverage Details
            </button>
            <button
              onClick={() => setActiveTab('analysis')}
              className={`px-6 py-4 text-sm border-b-2 transition-colors whitespace-nowrap ${
                activeTab === 'analysis'
                  ? 'border-blue-600 text-blue-600'
                  : 'border-transparent text-slate-600 hover:text-slate-900'
              }`}
            >
              <span className="flex items-center gap-2">
                <Sparkles className="w-4 h-4" />
                AI Analysis
              </span>
            </button>
            <button
              onClick={() => setActiveTab('documents')}
              className={`px-6 py-4 text-sm border-b-2 transition-colors whitespace-nowrap ${
                activeTab === 'documents'
                  ? 'border-blue-600 text-blue-600'
                  : 'border-transparent text-slate-600 hover:text-slate-900'
              }`}
            >
              Documents
            </button>
            {hasLineSpecificDetails && (
              <button
                onClick={() => setActiveTab('lineSpecific')}
                className={`px-6 py-4 text-sm border-b-2 transition-colors whitespace-nowrap ${
                  activeTab === 'lineSpecific'
                    ? 'border-blue-600 text-blue-600'
                    : 'border-transparent text-slate-600 hover:text-slate-900'
                }`}
              >
                {getLineSpecificLabel()}
              </button>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Content */}
      <div className="max-w-[1600px] mx-auto px-6 py-8">
        {/* Overview Tab */}
        {activeTab === 'overview' && (
          <div className="space-y-6">
            {/* Expiry Alert */}
            {daysUntilExpiry <= 30 && daysUntilExpiry > 0 && (
              <div className="bg-gradient-to-r from-amber-50 to-orange-50 border border-amber-200 rounded-3xl p-6">
                <div className="flex items-start gap-4">
                  <div className="w-12 h-12 rounded-2xl bg-amber-100 flex items-center justify-center flex-shrink-0">
                    <Bell className="w-6 h-6 text-amber-600" />
                  </div>
                  <div className="flex-1">
                    <h3 className="text-slate-900 mb-1">Policy Expiring Soon</h3>
                    <p className="text-slate-600">
                      This policy will expire in <span className="font-semibold text-amber-700">{daysUntilExpiry} days</span> on {formatDate(policy.endDate)}. Consider renewing before the expiration date.
                    </p>
                    <button className="mt-3 px-4 py-2 bg-amber-600 text-white rounded-xl hover:bg-amber-700 transition-colors">
                      Renew Now
                    </button>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            )}

            {/* Key Metrics */}
            <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6">
              <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-slate-500 mb-2">
                  <DollarSign className="w-5 h-5" />
                  <span>Monthly Premium</span>
                </div>
                <div className="text-slate-900 mt-2">
                  {formatCurrency(policy.monthlyPremium)}
                </div>
                <div className="mt-3 text-sm text-slate-500">
                  {formatCurrency(policy.monthlyPremium * 12)}/year
                </div>
              </div>

              <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-slate-500 mb-2">
                  <Shield className="w-5 h-5" />
                  <span>Coverage</span>
                </div>
                <div className="text-slate-900 mt-2">
                  {formatCurrency(policy.coverage)}
                </div>
                <div className="mt-3 text-sm text-emerald-600 flex items-center gap-1">
                  <CheckCircle className="w-4 h-4" />
                  Comprehensive
                </div>
              </div>

              <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-slate-500 mb-2">
                  <TrendingUp className="w-5 h-5" />
                  <span>Deductible</span>
                </div>
                <div className="text-slate-900 mt-2">
                  {formatCurrency(policy.deductible)}
                </div>
                <div className="mt-3 text-sm text-slate-500">
                  Per claim
                </div>
              </div>

              <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-slate-500 mb-2">
                  <Calendar className="w-5 h-5" />
                  <span>Policy Period</span>
                </div>
                <div className="text-sm text-slate-900 mt-2">
                  {formatDate(policy.startDate)}
                </div>
                <div className="text-sm text-slate-900">
                  {formatDate(policy.endDate)}
                </div>
                <div className="mt-3 text-sm text-slate-500">
                  {daysUntilExpiry > 0 ? `${daysUntilExpiry} days remaining` : 'Expired'}
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>

            {/* Two Column Layout */}
            <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
              {/* Main Content - 2 columns */}
              <div className="lg:col-span-2 space-y-6">
                {/* Policy Summary */}
                <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
                  <h3 className="text-slate-900 mb-4 flex items-center gap-2">
                    <Info className="w-5 h-5 text-blue-600" />
                    Policy Summary
                  </h3>
                  <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-6">
                    <div>
                      <p className="text-slate-500 text-sm mb-1">Policy Type</p>
                      <p className="text-slate-900 capitalize flex items-center gap-2">
                        <PolicyIcon className="w-4 h-4 text-blue-600" />
                        {policy.type}
                      </p>
                    </div>
                    <div>
                      <p className="text-slate-500 text-sm mb-1">Policy Status</p>
                      <span className={`inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1 rounded-xl text-sm ${
                        daysUntilExpiry > 30 
                          ? 'bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-700 border border-emerald-200'
                          : daysUntilExpiry > 0
                          ? 'bg-amber-50 text-amber-700 border border-amber-200'
                          : 'bg-red-50 text-red-700 border border-red-200'
                      }`}>
                        {daysUntilExpiry > 30 ? <CheckCircle className="w-4 h-4" /> : <Clock className="w-4 h-4" />}
                        {daysUntilExpiry > 30 ? 'Active' : daysUntilExpiry > 0 ? 'Expiring Soon' : 'Expired'}
                      </span>
                    </div>
                    <div>
                      <p className="text-slate-500 text-sm mb-1">Payment Frequency</p>
                      <p className="text-slate-900">Monthly</p>
                    </div>
                    <div>
                      <p className="text-slate-500 text-sm mb-1">Auto-Renewal</p>
                      <p className="text-slate-900 flex items-center gap-2">
                        <RefreshCw className="w-4 h-4 text-emerald-600" />
                        Enabled
                      </p>
                    </div>
                    <div>
                      <p className="text-slate-500 text-sm mb-1">Coverage Territory</p>
                      <p className="text-slate-900">Turkey (Nationwide)</p>
                    </div>
                    <div>
                      <p className="text-slate-500 text-sm mb-1">AI Confidence</p>
                      <p className="text-slate-900 flex items-center gap-2">
                        <Sparkles className="w-4 h-4 text-blue-600" />
                        {policy.aiConfidence || 92}%
                      </p>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>

                {/* Vehicle/Insured Item Details */}
                {vehicleInfo && (
                  <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
                    <h3 className="text-slate-900 mb-4 flex items-center gap-2">
                      <Car className="w-5 h-5 text-blue-600" />
                      Vehicle Information
                    </h3>
                    <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-6">
                      <div>
                        <p className="text-slate-500 text-sm mb-1">Make & Model</p>
                        <p className="text-slate-900">{vehicleInfo.brand} {vehicleInfo.model}</p>
                      </div>
                      <div>
                        <p className="text-slate-500 text-sm mb-1">Year</p>
                        <p className="text-slate-900">{vehicleInfo.modelYear}</p>
                      </div>
                      <div>
                        <p className="text-slate-500 text-sm mb-1">License Plate</p>
                        <p className="text-slate-900 font-mono">{vehicleInfo.licensePlate || 'N/A'}</p>
                      </div>
                      <div>
                        <p className="text-slate-500 text-sm mb-1">Engine</p>
                        <p className="text-slate-900">{vehicleInfo.engineVolume || 'N/A'}</p>
                      </div>
                      {vehicleInfo.vehicleValue && (
                        <div>
                          <p className="text-slate-500 text-sm mb-1">Vehicle Value</p>
                          <p className="text-slate-900">{formatCurrency(vehicleInfo.vehicleValue)}</p>
                        </div>
                      )}
                      {vehicleInfo.usage && (
                        <div>
                          <p className="text-slate-500 text-sm mb-1">Usage Type</p>
                          <p className="text-slate-900 capitalize">{vehicleInfo.usage}</p>
                        </div>
                      )}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                )}

                {/* Coverage Features */}
                {policy.features && policy.features.length > 0 && (
                  <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
                    <h3 className="text-slate-900 mb-4 flex items-center gap-2">
                      <CheckCircle className="w-5 h-5 text-emerald-600" />
                      Coverage Features
                    </h3>
                    <div className="grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-3">
                      {policy.features.map((feature, idx) => (
                        <div key={idx} className="flex items-start gap-3 p-4 bg-emerald-50 rounded-2xl border border-emerald-200">
                          <CheckCircle className="text-emerald-600 flex-shrink-0 w-5 h-5 mt-0.5" />
                          <span className="text-slate-700">{feature}</span>
                        </div>
                      ))}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                )}

                {/* Payment Information */}
                <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
                  <h3 className="text-slate-900 mb-4 flex items-center gap-2">
                    <CreditCard className="w-5 h-5 text-blue-600" />
                    Payment Information
                  </h3>
                  <div className="space-y-4">
                    <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-4 bg-slate-50 rounded-2xl">
                      <div>
                        <p className="text-slate-500 text-sm mb-1">Monthly Premium</p>
                        <p className="text-slate-900">{formatCurrency(policy.monthlyPremium)}</p>
                      </div>
                      <div className="text-right">
                        <p className="text-slate-500 text-sm mb-1">Next Payment</p>
                        <p className="text-slate-900">
                          {new Date(Date.now() + 30 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toLocaleDateString('tr-TR', { month: 'short', day: 'numeric' })}
                        </p>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                    <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-4">
                      <div className="p-4 bg-blue-50 rounded-2xl border border-blue-200">
                        <p className="text-slate-500 text-sm mb-1">Total Paid (YTD)</p>
                        <p className="text-slate-900">{formatCurrency(policy.monthlyPremium * 6)}</p>
                      </div>
                      <div className="p-4 bg-indigo-50 rounded-2xl border border-indigo-200">
                        <p className="text-slate-500 text-sm mb-1">Annual Total</p>
                        <p className="text-slate-900">{formatCurrency(policy.monthlyPremium * 12)}</p>
                      </div>
                      <div className="p-4 bg-emerald-50 rounded-2xl border border-emerald-200">
                        <p className="text-slate-500 text-sm mb-1">Payment Method</p>
                        <p className="text-slate-900 text-sm">•••• 4242</p>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>

                {/* Coverage Limits Breakdown */}
                <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
                  <h3 className="text-slate-900 mb-4 flex items-center gap-2">
                    <BarChart3 className="w-5 h-5 text-blue-600" />
                    Coverage Limits
                  </h3>
                  <div className="space-y-3">
                    <div className="p-4 bg-slate-50 rounded-2xl">
                      <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-2">
                        <span className="text-slate-700">Total Coverage Limit</span>
                        <span className="text-slate-900">{formatCurrency(policy.coverage)}</span>
                      </div>
                      <div className="w-full h-2 bg-slate-200 rounded-full overflow-hidden">
                        <div className="h-full bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-500 to-indigo-600" style={{ width: '100%' }} />
                      </div>
                    </div>
                    <div className="p-4 bg-slate-50 rounded-2xl">
                      <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-2">
                        <span className="text-slate-700">Third-Party Liability</span>
                        <span className="text-slate-900">Unlimited (via IMM)</span>
                      </div>
                      <div className="w-full h-2 bg-slate-200 rounded-full overflow-hidden">
                        <div className="h-full bg-gradient-to-r from-emerald-500 to-teal-600" style={{ width: '100%' }} />
                      </div>
                    </div>
                    <div className="p-4 bg-slate-50 rounded-2xl">
                      <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-2">
                        <span className="text-slate-700">Deductible (Your Responsibility)</span>
                        <span className="text-slate-900">{formatCurrency(policy.deductible)}</span>
                      </div>
                      <div className="w-full h-2 bg-slate-200 rounded-full overflow-hidden">
                        <div className="h-full bg-gradient-to-r from-amber-500 to-orange-600" style={{ width: `${(policy.deductible / policy.coverage) * 100}%` }} />
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>

              {/* Sidebar - 1 column */}
              <div className="space-y-6">
                {/* Quick Actions */}
                <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
                  <h3 className="text-slate-900 mb-4">Quick Actions</h3>
                  <div className="space-y-2">
                    <button className="w-full px-4 py-3 bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 text-white rounded-xl hover:shadow-lg hover:shadow-blue-500/25 transition-all flex items-center justify-between">
                      <span>File a Claim</span>
                      <ChevronRight className="w-4 h-4" />
                    </button>
                    <button className="w-full px-4 py-3 border border-slate-200 text-slate-700 rounded-xl hover:bg-slate-50 transition-all flex items-center justify-between">
                      <span>Contact Support</span>
                      <Phone className="w-4 h-4" />
                    </button>
                    <button className="w-full px-4 py-3 border border-slate-200 text-slate-700 rounded-xl hover:bg-slate-50 transition-all flex items-center justify-between">
                      <span>Renew Policy</span>
                      <RefreshCw className="w-4 h-4" />
                    </button>
                    <button className="w-full px-4 py-3 border border-slate-200 text-slate-700 rounded-xl hover:bg-slate-50 transition-all flex items-center justify-between">
                      <span>Request Changes</span>
                      <Edit className="w-4 h-4" />
                    </button>
                  </div>
                </div>

                {/* Contact Information */}
                <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
                  <h3 className="text-slate-900 mb-4 flex items-center gap-2">
                    <Building2 className="w-5 h-5 text-blue-600" />
                    Provider Contact
                  </h3>
                  <div className="space-y-4">
                    <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                      <Phone className="w-5 h-5 text-slate-400 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
                      <div>
                        <p className="text-slate-500 text-sm">Phone</p>
                        <a href="tel:+908504202024" className="text-blue-600 hover:text-blue-700">
                          0850 420 20 24
                        </a>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                    <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                      <Mail className="w-5 h-5 text-slate-400 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
                      <div>
                        <p className="text-slate-500 text-sm">Email</p>
                        <a href="mailto:musteri@anadolusigorta.com.tr" className="text-blue-600 hover:text-blue-700 break-all">
                          musteri@anadolusigorta.com.tr
                        </a>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                    <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                      <MapPin className="w-5 h-5 text-slate-400 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
                      <div>
                        <p className="text-slate-500 text-sm">Address</p>
                        <p className="text-slate-700 text-sm">
                          Rüzgarlıbahçe Mah. Kavak Sok. No:29 Beykoz, Istanbul
                        </p>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                    <div className="pt-3 border-t border-slate-200">
                      <button className="text-blue-600 hover:text-blue-700 flex items-center gap-2">
                        <ExternalLink className="w-4 h-4" />
                        Visit Website
                      </button>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>

                {/* Agent Information */}
                {agentInfo && (
                  <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
                    <h3 className="text-slate-900 mb-4 flex items-center gap-2">
                      <User className="w-5 h-5 text-blue-600" />
                      Your Agent
                    </h3>
                    <div className="space-y-4">
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                        <div className="w-12 h-12 rounded-full bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-500 to-indigo-600 flex items-center justify-center text-white">
                          {agentInfo.name?.charAt(0) || 'A'}
                        </div>
                        <div>
                          <p className="text-slate-900">{agentInfo.name || 'Mehmet Yılmaz'}</p>
                          <p className="text-slate-500 text-sm">Licensed Agent</p>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                      <div className="space-y-2">
                        <button className="w-full px-4 py-2 border border-slate-200 text-slate-700 rounded-xl hover:bg-slate-50 transition-all flex items-center gap-2">
                          <Phone className="w-4 h-4" />
                          Call Agent
                        </button>
                        <button className="w-full px-4 py-2 border border-slate-200 text-slate-700 rounded-xl hover:bg-slate-50 transition-all flex items-center gap-2">
                          <Mail className="w-4 h-4" />
                          Email Agent
                        </button>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                )}

                {/* Important Dates */}
                <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
                  <h3 className="text-slate-900 mb-4 flex items-center gap-2">
                    <Calendar className="w-5 h-5 text-blue-600" />
                    Important Dates
                  </h3>
                  <div className="space-y-3">
                    <div className="p-3 bg-slate-50 rounded-xl">
                      <p className="text-slate-500 text-sm">Policy Start</p>
                      <p className="text-slate-900">{formatDate(policy.startDate)}</p>
                    </div>
                    <div className="p-3 bg-slate-50 rounded-xl">
                      <p className="text-slate-500 text-sm">Policy End</p>
                      <p className="text-slate-900">{formatDate(policy.endDate)}</p>
                    </div>
                    <div className="p-3 bg-blue-50 rounded-xl border border-blue-200">
                      <p className="text-slate-500 text-sm">Next Payment</p>
                      <p className="text-slate-900">
                        {new Date(Date.now() + 30 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toLocaleDateString('tr-TR')}
                      </p>
                    </div>
                    <div className="p-3 bg-amber-50 rounded-xl border border-amber-200">
                      <p className="text-slate-500 text-sm">Renewal Reminder</p>
                      <p className="text-slate-900">
                        {new Date(new Date(policy.endDate).getTime() - 30 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toLocaleDateString('tr-TR')}
                      </p>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>

                {/* Policy Score */}
                <div className="bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-50 to-indigo-50 rounded-3xl p-6 border border-blue-200">
                  <h3 className="text-slate-900 mb-3 flex items-center gap-2">
                    <Target className="w-5 h-5 text-blue-600" />
                    Policy Score
                  </h3>
                  <div className="text-center mb-4">
                    <div className="text-4xl text-slate-900 mb-1">{policy.aiConfidence || 92}/100</div>
                    <p className="text-slate-600 text-sm">Overall Rating</p>
                  </div>
                  <div className="space-y-2 text-sm">
                    <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                      <span className="text-slate-600">Coverage</span>
                      <span className="text-slate-900">Excellent</span>
                    </div>
                    <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                      <span className="text-slate-600">Value</span>
                      <span className="text-slate-900">Good</span>
                    </div>
                    <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                      <span className="text-slate-600">Provider</span>
                      <span className="text-slate-900">A+ Rated</span>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        )}

        {/* Coverage Tab */}
        {activeTab === 'coverage' && (
          <CoverageDetails policy={policy} />
        )}

        {/* AI Analysis Tab */}
        {activeTab === 'analysis' && (
          <div className="space-y-6">
            {/* Overall Score */}
            <div className="bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 text-white rounded-3xl p-8">
              <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-4">
                <h3 className="text-xl">AI Confidence Score</h3>
                <Award className="text-blue-200" size={32} />
              </div>
              <div className="text-5xl mb-2">{aiAnalysis.overallScore}%</div>
              <div className="text-blue-100">This policy has been comprehensively analyzed</div>
            </div>

            {/* Strengths */}
            <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
              <h3 className="text-slate-900 mb-4 flex items-center gap-2">
                <CheckCircle className="text-emerald-600" size={24} />
                Strengths
              </h3>
              <div className="space-y-3">
                {aiAnalysis.strengths.map((strength, idx) => (
                  <div key={idx} className="flex items-start gap-3 p-4 bg-emerald-50 rounded-2xl border border-emerald-200">
                    <CheckCircle className="text-emerald-600 flex-shrink-0 w-5 h-5 mt-0.5" />
                    <span className="text-slate-700">{strength}</span>
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>
            </div>

            {/* Weaknesses */}
            <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
              <h3 className="text-slate-900 mb-4 flex items-center gap-2">
                <AlertTriangle className="text-amber-600" size={24} />
                Areas for Improvement
              </h3>
              <div className="space-y-3">
                {aiAnalysis.weaknesses.map((weakness, idx) => (
                  <div key={idx} className="flex items-start gap-3 p-4 bg-amber-50 rounded-2xl border border-amber-200">
                    <AlertTriangle className="text-amber-600 flex-shrink-0 w-5 h-5 mt-0.5" />
                    <span className="text-slate-700">{weakness}</span>
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>
            </div>

            {/* Recommendations */}
            <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
              <h3 className="text-slate-900 mb-4 flex items-center gap-2">
                <Sparkles className="text-blue-600" size={24} />
                AI Recommendations
              </h3>
              <div className="space-y-3">
                {aiAnalysis.recommendations.map((rec, idx) => (
                  <div key={idx} className="flex items-start gap-3 p-4 bg-blue-50 rounded-2xl border border-blue-200">
                    <Sparkles className="text-blue-600 flex-shrink-0 w-5 h-5 mt-0.5" />
                    <span className="text-slate-700">{rec}</span>
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        )}

        {/* Documents Tab */}
        {activeTab === 'documents' && (
          <div className="bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 border border-slate-200">
            <h3 className="text-slate-900 mb-4 flex items-center gap-2">
              <FileText size={24} />
              Policy Documents
            </h3>
            <div className="space-y-3">
              <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-4 bg-slate-50 rounded-2xl hover:bg-slate-100 transition-colors cursor-pointer">
                <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                  <div className="w-12 h-12 bg-red-100 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center">
                    <FileText className="text-red-600" size={20} />
                  </div>
                  <div>
                    <div className="text-slate-900">{policy.fileName}</div>
                    <div className="text-sm text-slate-500">PDF • 2.4 MB</div>
                  </div>
                </div>
                <Download className="w-5 h-5 text-slate-400" />
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        )}

        {/* Line-Specific Tab */}
        {activeTab === 'lineSpecific' && hasLineSpecificDetails && (
          <>
            {policy.country === 'TR' && policy.insuranceLine === 'kasko' && (
              <TurkishKaskoDetails policy={policy} />
            )}
            {policy.country === 'TR' && policy.insuranceLine === 'traffic' && (
              <TurkishTrafficDetails policy={policy} />
            )}
            {policy.country === 'TR' && policy.insuranceLine === 'credit-life' && (
              <TurkishCreditLifeDetails policy={policy} />
            )}
            {policy.country === 'TR' && policy.insuranceLine === 'fire' && (
              <TurkishFireDetails policy={policy} />
            )}
            {policy.country === 'TR' && policy.insuranceLine === 'personal-accident' && (
              <TurkishPersonalAccidentDetails policy={policy} />
            )}
            {policy.country === 'TR' && policy.insuranceLine === 'health' && (
              <TurkishHealthDetails policy={policy} />
            )}
            {policy.country === 'TR' && policy.insuranceLine === 'agricultural' && (
              <TurkishAgriculturalDetails policy={policy} />
            )}
          </>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

```

## File: `components (2)/PolicyUpload.tsx`
- Bytes: 32,351
- SHA256: `c5ae67c7e1a5d7241cb155a16e360397e712682b1438f772e99b72a4c6962094`

```tsx
import { useState, useCallback, useRef } from 'react';
import {
  Upload, FileText, Image, CheckCircle, X, AlertCircle, Sparkles,
  Eye, Download, Trash2, ArrowRight, Shield, DollarSign, Calendar,
  Building2, Phone, Mail, Zap, TrendingDown, TrendingUp, Info,
  Loader2, Camera, FileImage, FilePlus
} from 'lucide-react';
import { toast } from 'sonner@2.0.3';

type PolicyUploadProps = {
  onPoliciesAnalyzed: (policies: AnalyzedPolicy[]) => void;
  onCompare: () => void;
  onViewDetails?: (policyId: string) => void;
};

type UploadedFile = {
  id: string;
  file: File;
  preview?: string;
  status: 'uploading' | 'processing' | 'completed' | 'error';
  progress: number;
  error?: string;
};

type AnalyzedPolicy = {
  id: string;
  fileName: string;
  provider: string;
  policyNumber: string;
  type: 'auto' | 'home' | 'life' | 'health';
  monthlyPremium: number;
  coverage: number;
  deductible: number;
  startDate: string;
  endDate: string;
  features: string[];
  logo: string;
  aiConfidence: number;
  savings?: number;
  recommendation?: 'keep' | 'switch' | 'review';
};

export function PolicyUpload({ onPoliciesAnalyzed, onCompare, onViewDetails }: PolicyUploadProps) {
  const [uploadedFiles, setUploadedFiles] = useState<UploadedFile[]>([]);
  const [analyzedPolicies, setAnalyzedPolicies] = useState<AnalyzedPolicy[]>([]);
  const [isDragging, setIsDragging] = useState(false);
  const [showCamera, setShowCamera] = useState(false);
  const fileInputRef = useRef<HTMLInputElement>(null);
  const cameraInputRef = useRef<HTMLInputElement>(null);

  // Simulate AI policy analysis
  const analyzePolicy = (file: File): Promise<AnalyzedPolicy> => {
    return new Promise((resolve) => {
      setTimeout(() => {
        const mockPolicies: Partial<AnalyzedPolicy>[] = [
          {
            provider: 'Geico',
            policyNumber: 'POL-2024-8834',
            type: 'auto',
            monthlyPremium: 145,
            coverage: 250000,
            deductible: 1000,
            startDate: '2023-06-15',
            endDate: '2024-06-15',
            features: ['Liability Coverage', 'Basic Collision', 'Uninsured Motorist'],
            logo: '🚗',
            aiConfidence: 92,
            savings: 20,
            recommendation: 'switch',
          },
          {
            provider: 'Allstate',
            policyNumber: 'HM-2023-5521',
            type: 'home',
            monthlyPremium: 165,
            coverage: 300000,
            deductible: 2000,
            startDate: '2023-01-10',
            endDate: '2024-01-10',
            features: ['Dwelling Coverage', 'Personal Property', 'Basic Liability'],
            logo: '🏠',
            aiConfidence: 88,
            savings: 15,
            recommendation: 'review',
          },
          {
            provider: 'Blue Cross',
            policyNumber: 'HLT-2024-1234',
            type: 'health',
            monthlyPremium: 425,
            coverage: 1000000,
            deductible: 2000,
            startDate: '2024-01-01',
            endDate: '2024-12-31',
            features: ['PPO Network', 'Prescription Coverage', 'Emergency Care'],
            logo: '🏥',
            aiConfidence: 95,
            recommendation: 'keep',
          },
        ];

        const randomPolicy = mockPolicies[Math.floor(Math.random() * mockPolicies.length)];
        
        resolve({
          id: Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9),
          fileName: file.name,
          ...randomPolicy,
        } as AnalyzedPolicy);
      }, 2500); // Simulate processing time
    });
  };

  const handleFileSelect = async (files: FileList | null) => {
    if (!files || files.length === 0) return;

    const validFiles = Array.from(files).filter(file => {
      const isValidType = file.type === 'application/pdf' || file.type.startsWith('image/');
      const isValidSize = file.size <= 10 * 1024 * 1024; // 10MB

      if (!isValidType) {
        toast.error(`${file.name}: Please upload PDF or image files only`);
        return false;
      }
      if (!isValidSize) {
        toast.error(`${file.name}: File size must be less than 10MB`);
        return false;
      }
      return true;
    });

    if (validFiles.length === 0) return;

    // Add files to upload queue
    const newFiles: UploadedFile[] = validFiles.map(file => ({
      id: Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9),
      file,
      preview: file.type.startsWith('image/') ? URL.createObjectURL(file) : undefined,
      status: 'uploading',
      progress: 0,
    }));

    setUploadedFiles(prev => [...prev, ...newFiles]);

    // Process each file
    for (const uploadedFile of newFiles) {
      try {
        // Simulate upload progress
        for (let i = 0; i <= 100; i += 20) {
          await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 200));
          setUploadedFiles(prev =>
            prev.map(f =>
              f.id === uploadedFile.id
                ? { ...f, progress: i, status: i === 100 ? 'processing' : 'uploading' }
                : f
            )
          );
        }

        // Analyze policy
        const analyzed = await analyzePolicy(uploadedFile.file);
        
        setUploadedFiles(prev =>
          prev.map(f =>
            f.id === uploadedFile.id
              ? { ...f, status: 'completed', progress: 100 }
              : f
          )
        );

        setAnalyzedPolicies(prev => {
          const updated = [...prev, analyzed];
          onPoliciesAnalyzed(updated);
          return updated;
        });

        toast.success(`${uploadedFile.file.name} analyzed successfully!`);
      } catch (error) {
        setUploadedFiles(prev =>
          prev.map(f =>
            f.id === uploadedFile.id
              ? { ...f, status: 'error', error: 'Failed to analyze policy' }
              : f
          )
        );
        toast.error(`Failed to analyze ${uploadedFile.file.name}`);
      }
    }
  };

  const handleDragOver = useCallback((e: React.DragEvent) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    setIsDragging(true);
  }, []);

  const handleDragLeave = useCallback((e: React.DragEvent) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    setIsDragging(false);
  }, []);

  const handleDrop = useCallback((e: React.DragEvent) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    setIsDragging(false);
    handleFileSelect(e.dataTransfer.files);
  }, []);

  const removeFile = (fileId: string) => {
    setUploadedFiles(prev => prev.filter(f => f.id !== fileId));
  };

  const removePolicy = (policyId: string) => {
    setAnalyzedPolicies(prev => {
      const updated = prev.filter(p => p.id !== policyId);
      onPoliciesAnalyzed(updated);
      return updated;
    });
    toast.success('Policy removed');
  };

  const getRecommendationInfo = (rec?: string) => {
    switch (rec) {
      case 'switch':
        return {
          label: 'Switch Recommended',
          color: 'from-green-600 to-emerald-600',
          icon: TrendingDown,
          description: 'Better options available',
        };
      case 'review':
        return {
          label: 'Review Suggested',
          color: 'from-yellow-500 to-orange-500',
          icon: AlertCircle,
          description: 'Could save money',
        };
      case 'keep':
        return {
          label: 'Good Coverage',
          color: 'from-blue-600 to-indigo-600',
          icon: CheckCircle,
          description: 'Competitive pricing',
        };
      default:
        return null;
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gradient-to-b from-slate-50 to-white">
      {/* Decorative Elements */}
      <div className="absolute top-0 right-0 w-[500px] h-[500px] bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-100/30 to-purple-100/30 rounded-full blur-3xl pointer-events-none" />
      <div className="absolute bottom-0 left-0 w-[400px] h-[400px] bg-gradient-to-tr from-indigo-100/30 to-blue-100/30 rounded-full blur-3xl pointer-events-none" />

      <div className="container mx-auto px-4 py-8 md:py-16 relative">
        {/* Header */}
        <div className="text-center max-w-3xl mx-auto mb-8 md:mb-12">
          <div className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 bg-purple-50 border border-purple-100 rounded-full mb-6">
            <Sparkles className="text-purple-600" size={16} />
            <span className="text-sm font-medium text-purple-900">AI-Powered Analysis</span>
          </div>
          <h1 className="text-3xl md:text-5xl mb-4 tracking-tight">
            Upload Your <span className="bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 via-indigo-600 to-purple-600 bg-clip-text text-transparent">Current Policies</span>
          </h1>
          <p className="text-lg md:text-xl text-gray-600 leading-relaxed">
            Our AI instantly analyzes your insurance documents and finds better deals
          </p>
        </div>

        {/* Upload Area */}
        <div className="max-w-4xl mx-auto mb-8 md:mb-12">
          <div
            onDragOver={handleDragOver}
            onDragLeave={handleDragLeave}
            onDrop={handleDrop}
            className={`
              relative bg-white rounded-3xl border-2 border-dashed transition-all duration-300 overflow-hidden
              ${isDragging
                ? 'border-purple-500 bg-purple-50 scale-105 shadow-2xl'
                : 'border-gray-300 hover:border-purple-400 hover:bg-purple-50/50 shadow-lg'
              }
            `}
          >
            <div className="p-8 md:p-12 text-center">
              <div className="w-20 h-20 md:w-24 md:h-24 bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-100 to-indigo-100 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mx-auto mb-6">
                <Upload className="text-blue-600" size={40} />
              </div>

              <h3 className="text-xl md:text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-2">
                {isDragging ? 'Drop files here' : 'Upload Policy Documents'}
              </h3>
              <p className="text-gray-600 mb-6 max-w-md mx-auto">
                Drag and drop your insurance policy PDFs or images, or click to browse
              </p>

              <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row items-center justify-center gap-3 mb-6">
                <button
                  onClick={() => fileInputRef.current?.click()}
                  className="px-6 py-3 bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 text-white rounded-xl hover:shadow-lg hover:shadow-blue-500/30 transition-all font-semibold flex items-center gap-2"
                >
                  <FilePlus size={20} />
                  Browse Files
                </button>
                <button
                  onClick={() => cameraInputRef.current?.click()}
                  className="px-6 py-3 bg-white border-2 border-blue-300 text-blue-700 rounded-xl hover:bg-blue-50 transition-all font-semibold flex items-center gap-2"
                >
                  <Camera size={20} />
                  Take Photo
                </button>
              </div>

              <div className="flex items-center justify-center gap-4 text-sm text-gray-500">
                <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
                  <FileText size={16} />
                  <span>PDF</span>
                </div>
                <div className="w-1 h-1 bg-gray-300 rounded-full" />
                <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
                  <FileImage size={16} />
                  <span>JPG, PNG</span>
                </div>
                <div className="w-1 h-1 bg-gray-300 rounded-full" />
                <span>Max 10MB</span>
              </div>

              <input
                ref={fileInputRef}
                type="file"
                multiple
                accept=".pdf,image/*"
                onChange={(e) => handleFileSelect(e.target.files)}
                className="hidden"
              />
              <input
                ref={cameraInputRef}
                type="file"
                accept="image/*"
                capture="environment"
                onChange={(e) => handleFileSelect(e.target.files)}
                className="hidden"
              />
            </div>

            {/* Uploading Files */}
            {uploadedFiles.length > 0 && (
              <div className="border-t border-gray-200 bg-gray-50 p-4 md:p-6">
                <h4 className="font-semibold text-gray-900 mb-4 flex items-center gap-2">
                  <Loader2 className="animate-spin" size={18} />
                  Processing Files ({uploadedFiles.filter(f => f.status !== 'completed').length})
                </h4>
                <div className="space-y-3">
                  {uploadedFiles.map(file => (
                    <div
                      key={file.id}
                      className="flex items-center gap-3 p-4 bg-white rounded-xl border border-gray-200"
                    >
                      {/* File Icon/Preview */}
                      <div className="w-12 h-12 bg-gray-100 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center flex-shrink-0 overflow-hidden">
                        {file.preview ? (
                          <img src={file.preview} alt="" className="w-full h-full object-cover" />
                        ) : (
                          <FileText className="text-gray-400" size={24} />
                        )}
                      </div>

                      {/* File Info */}
                      <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
                        <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-1">
                          <p className="font-medium text-gray-900 truncate">{file.file.name}</p>
                          {file.status === 'completed' ? (
                            <CheckCircle className="text-green-600 flex-shrink-0" size={20} />
                          ) : file.status === 'error' ? (
                            <AlertCircle className="text-red-600 flex-shrink-0" size={20} />
                          ) : (
                            <button
                              onClick={() => removeFile(file.id)}
                              className="p-1 hover:bg-gray-100 rounded transition-colors"
                            >
                              <X size={16} className="text-gray-400" />
                            </button>
                          )}
                        </div>
                        
                        {file.status === 'error' ? (
                          <p className="text-sm text-red-600">{file.error}</p>
                        ) : file.status === 'completed' ? (
                          <p className="text-sm text-green-600 font-medium">Analysis complete</p>
                        ) : (
                          <>
                            <div className="w-full bg-gray-200 rounded-full h-1.5 mb-1">
                              <div
                                className="bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 h-full rounded-full transition-all duration-300"
                                style={{ width: `${file.progress}%` }}
                              />
                            </div>
                            <p className="text-xs text-gray-600">
                              {file.status === 'uploading' ? 'Uploading...' : 'Analyzing with AI...'}
                            </p>
                          </>
                        )}
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  ))}
                </div>
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Analyzed Policies */}
        {analyzedPolicies.length > 0 && (
          <div className="max-w-6xl mx-auto">
            <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-6">
              <div>
                <h2 className="text-2xl md:text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-2">
                  Your Current Policies
                </h2>
                <p className="text-gray-600">
                  AI analyzed {analyzedPolicies.length} {analyzedPolicies.length === 1 ? 'policy' : 'policies'}
                </p>
              </div>
              {analyzedPolicies.length > 0 && (
                <button
                  onClick={onCompare}
                  className="px-6 py-3 bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 text-white rounded-xl hover:shadow-lg hover:shadow-blue-500/30 transition-all font-semibold flex items-center gap-2"
                >
                  Browse Alternatives
                  <ArrowRight size={20} />
                </button>
              )}
            </div>

            {/* Summary Card - shows when multiple policies */}
            {analyzedPolicies.length > 1 && (
              <div className="bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-100 via-indigo-100 to-purple-100 rounded-3xl border-2 border-blue-200 p-6 mb-6 shadow-xl">
                <div className="flex items-start gap-4 mb-4">
                  <div className="w-12 h-12 bg-white rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center">
                    <Sparkles className="text-purple-600" size={24} />
                  </div>
                  <div className="flex-1">
                    <h3 className="text-xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-2">Portfolio Analysis Complete</h3>
                    <p className="text-gray-700">
                      We found potential savings opportunities across your {analyzedPolicies.length} policies
                    </p>
                  </div>
                </div>
                
                <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4">
                  <div className="bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-2xl p-4 border border-purple-200">
                    <div className="text-sm text-gray-600 mb-1">Total Monthly</div>
                    <div className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">
                      ${analyzedPolicies.reduce((sum, p) => sum + p.monthlyPremium, 0)}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <div className="bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-2xl p-4 border border-purple-200">
                    <div className="text-sm text-gray-600 mb-1">Total Coverage</div>
                    <div className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">
                      ${(analyzedPolicies.reduce((sum, p) => sum + p.coverage, 0) / 1000).toFixed(0)}K
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <div className="bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-2xl p-4 border border-purple-200">
                    <div className="text-sm text-gray-600 mb-1">Potential Savings</div>
                    <div className="text-2xl font-bold text-green-600">
                      ${analyzedPolicies.reduce((sum, p) => sum + (p.savings || 0), 0)}/mo
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <div className="bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-2xl p-4 border border-purple-200">
                    <div className="text-sm text-gray-600 mb-1">Avg AI Confidence</div>
                    <div className="text-2xl font-bold text-purple-600">
                      {Math.round(analyzedPolicies.reduce((sum, p) => sum + p.aiConfidence, 0) / analyzedPolicies.length)}%
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            )}

            <div className="grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
              {analyzedPolicies.map((policy, index) => {
                const recInfo = getRecommendationInfo(policy.recommendation);
                const RecIcon = recInfo?.icon;
                const annualSavings = policy.savings ? policy.savings * 12 : 0;

                return (
                  <div
                    key={policy.id}
                    className="bg-white rounded-3xl border-2 border-gray-200 overflow-hidden shadow-lg hover:shadow-2xl hover:border-purple-300 transition-all duration-300 group relative"
                    style={{ 
                      animation: `fadeInUp 0.5s ease-out ${index * 0.1}s both`
                    }}
                  >
                    {/* Header */}
                    <div className="bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-50 to-indigo-50 p-6 border-b border-gray-200 relative overflow-hidden">
                      {/* AI Confidence Badge */}
                      <div className="absolute top-4 right-4">
                        <div className="px-3 py-1 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-sm border border-purple-200 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold text-purple-700 flex items-center gap-1">
                          <Sparkles size={12} />
                          {policy.aiConfidence}% AI Confidence
                        </div>
                      </div>

                      <div className="flex items-start gap-4 mb-4">
                        <div className="w-16 h-16 bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center text-3xl shadow-sm">
                          {policy.logo}
                        </div>
                        <div className="flex-1">
                          <h3 className="text-xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-1">{policy.provider}</h3>
                          <p className="text-sm text-gray-600 mb-2">Policy #{policy.policyNumber}</p>
                          <div className="inline-block px-2.5 py-1 bg-purple-100 text-purple-700 text-xs rounded-full font-semibold uppercase">
                            {policy.type}
                          </div>
                        </div>
                      </div>

                      {/* Recommendation Badge */}
                      {recInfo && RecIcon && (
                        <div className={`inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 bg-gradient-to-r ${recInfo.color} text-white rounded-xl shadow-lg`}>
                          <RecIcon size={16} />
                          <div>
                            <div className="text-sm font-bold">{recInfo.label}</div>
                            <div className="text-xs opacity-90">{recInfo.description}</div>
                          </div>
                        </div>
                      )}
                    </div>

                    {/* Body */}
                    <div className="p-6">
                      {/* Key Metrics */}
                      <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-4 mb-6">
                        <div className="bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-50 to-indigo-50 border border-blue-100 rounded-xl p-4">
                          <div className="text-xs text-gray-600 mb-1 font-medium">Premium</div>
                          <div className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">${policy.monthlyPremium}</div>
                          <div className="text-xs text-gray-600">/month</div>
                        </div>

                        <div className="bg-gradient-to-br from-green-50 to-emerald-50 border border-green-100 rounded-xl p-4">
                          <div className="text-xs text-gray-600 mb-1 font-medium">Coverage</div>
                          <div className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">${(policy.coverage / 1000).toFixed(0)}K</div>
                          <div className="text-xs text-gray-600">limit</div>
                        </div>

                        <div className="bg-gradient-to-br from-orange-50 to-red-50 border border-orange-100 rounded-xl p-4">
                          <div className="text-xs text-gray-600 mb-1 font-medium">Deductible</div>
                          <div className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">${(policy.deductible / 1000).toFixed(1)}K</div>
                          <div className="text-xs text-gray-600">per claim</div>
                        </div>
                      </div>

                      {/* Savings Opportunity */}
                      {policy.savings && policy.savings > 0 && (
                        <div className="bg-gradient-to-r from-green-100 to-emerald-100 border-2 border-green-300 rounded-xl p-4 mb-6">
                          <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                            <div className="w-10 h-10 bg-green-600 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center flex-shrink-0">
                              <DollarSign className="text-white" size={20} />
                            </div>
                            <div className="flex-1">
                              <h4 className="font-bold text-green-900 mb-1">Save ${policy.savings}/month</h4>
                              <p className="text-sm text-green-800">
                                We found plans that could save you ${policy.savings * 12}/year with similar or better coverage
                              </p>
                            </div>
                          </div>
                        </div>
                      )}

                      {/* Policy Details */}
                      <div className="space-y-3 mb-6">
                        <div className="flex items-center gap-3 p-3 bg-gray-50 rounded-xl">
                          <Calendar className="text-gray-400" size={18} />
                          <div className="flex-1">
                            <div className="text-xs text-gray-600">Policy Period</div>
                            <div className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-900">
                              {new Date(policy.startDate).toLocaleDateString()} - {new Date(policy.endDate).toLocaleDateString()}
                            </div>
                          </div>
                        </div>

                        <div className="flex items-center gap-3 p-3 bg-gray-50 rounded-xl">
                          <FileText className="text-gray-400" size={18} />
                          <div className="flex-1">
                            <div className="text-xs text-gray-600">Source Document</div>
                            <div className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-900 truncate">{policy.fileName}</div>
                          </div>
                        </div>
                      </div>

                      {/* Features */}
                      <div className="mb-6">
                        <h4 className="text-sm font-bold text-gray-900 mb-3">Coverage Features</h4>
                        <div className="space-y-2">
                          {policy.features.map((feature, idx) => (
                            <div key={idx} className="flex items-start gap-2 text-sm text-gray-700">
                              <CheckCircle size={16} className="text-green-600 mt-0.5 flex-shrink-0" />
                              <span>{feature}</span>
                            </div>
                          ))}
                        </div>
                      </div>

                      {/* Actions */}
                      <div className="flex gap-3">
                        {onViewDetails && (
                          <button
                            onClick={() => onViewDetails(policy.id)}
                            className="flex-1 py-3 bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-600 to-indigo-600 text-white rounded-xl hover:shadow-lg hover:shadow-blue-500/30 transition-all font-semibold flex items-center justify-center gap-2"
                          >
                            <Eye size={18} />
                            View Details
                          </button>
                        )}
                        <button
                          onClick={onCompare}
                          className="flex-1 py-3 bg-gradient-to-r from-purple-600 to-pink-600 text-white rounded-xl hover:shadow-lg hover:shadow-purple-500/30 transition-all font-semibold flex items-center justify-center gap-2"
                        >
                          <Zap size={18} />
                          Find Better Deals
                        </button>
                        <button
                          onClick={() => removePolicy(policy.id)}
                          className="px-4 py-3 bg-gray-100 hover:bg-gray-200 rounded-xl transition-colors"
                          title="Remove"
                        >
                          <Trash2 size={18} className="text-gray-600" />
                        </button>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                );
              })}
            </div>
          </div>
        )}

        {/* How It Works */}
        {analyzedPolicies.length === 0 && (
          <div className="max-w-4xl mx-auto mt-12">
            <h2 className="text-2xl md:text-3xl font-bold text-center text-gray-900 mb-8">
              How It Works
            </h2>
            <div className="grid md:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
              <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl p-6 border border-gray-200 shadow-lg">
                <div className="w-14 h-14 bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-100 to-indigo-100 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center mb-4">
                  <Upload className="text-blue-600" size={24} />
                </div>
                <h3 className="text-lg font-bold text-gray-900 mb-2">1. Upload Documents</h3>
                <p className="text-gray-600 text-sm">
                  Upload your current insurance policy PDFs or take photos of your insurance cards
                </p>
              </div>

              <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl p-6 border border-gray-200 shadow-lg">
                <div className="w-14 h-14 bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-100 to-indigo-100 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center mb-4">
                  <Sparkles className="text-blue-600" size={24} />
                </div>
                <h3 className="text-lg font-bold text-gray-900 mb-2">2. AI Analysis</h3>
                <p className="text-gray-600 text-sm">
                  Our AI instantly extracts key information: coverage, premiums, deductibles, and features
                </p>
              </div>

              <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl p-6 border border-gray-200 shadow-lg">
                <div className="w-14 h-14 bg-gradient-to-br from-green-100 to-emerald-100 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center mb-4">
                  <TrendingDown className="text-green-600" size={24} />
                </div>
                <h3 className="text-lg font-bold text-gray-900 mb-2">3. Find Savings</h3>
                <p className="text-gray-600 text-sm">
                  We compare your current coverage with thousands of plans to find better deals
                </p>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        )}

        {/* Trust Signals */}
        <div className="max-w-4xl mx-auto mt-12 bg-white rounded-2xl p-6 md:p-8 border border-gray-200 shadow-lg">
          <div className="flex items-start gap-4">
            <div className="w-12 h-12 bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-100 to-indigo-100 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center flex-shrink-0">
              <Shield className="text-blue-600" size={24} />
            </div>
            <div>
              <h3 className="font-bold text-gray-900 mb-2">Your Privacy is Protected</h3>
              <p className="text-sm text-gray-600 mb-3">
                Your policy documents are analyzed securely and automatically deleted after processing. We never share your personal information.
              </p>
              <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-4 text-sm text-gray-600">
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                  <CheckCircle size={16} className="text-green-600" />
                  <span>Bank-level encryption</span>
                </div>
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                  <CheckCircle size={16} className="text-green-600" />
                  <span>GDPR compliant</span>
                </div>
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                  <CheckCircle size={16} className="text-green-600" />
                  <span>SOC 2 certified</span>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Sample Documents */}
        <div className="max-w-4xl mx-auto mt-8 text-center">
          <button className="text-purple-600 hover:text-purple-700 font-medium text-sm flex items-center gap-2 mx-auto">
            <Info size={16} />
            Don't have your policy handy? Try a sample document
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
```
